Name: The Little Big Dairy Co.
Description:
The Little Big Dairy Co is a family-run business, delivering high quality, award winning milk from one dairy, traceable down to the very cow that made it. It’s the smallness of our process combined with our ability to supply these substantial quantities that allow us to share our milk with many.

Owned and managed by the Chesworth family on the banks of the Macquarie river in the Central West of NSW, The Little Big Dairy Co was started, in order to deliver the best-tasting, single source milk you’ll drink to as many people as possible. It’s our belief that this shouldn’t be reserved for the lucky few; it should be readily available to many, supporting the economy in which it was made.

On our farm, we see the product from start to finish, milking through processing and into the bottle. This smallness, the intimacy of our process, is what guarantees the integrity, quality and health benefits of our delicious single source milk.

But what really makes us special is our herd of 800 beautiful Holsteins, born and raised on our farm. Each has a name, which we know by heart. They make us who we are, and it’s their happiness and health that allow us to deliver over 8 million litres of milk every year.

Name: Campanella Alimentos
Description:
A Campanella Alimentos Ltda, iniciou suas atividades em 1996, com a distribuição de frios em geral na cidade de Salvador. Em 2001 a Campanella, inaugurou sua indústria de laticínio, na cidade de Palmas de Monte Alto-Ba, com a missão de produzir produtos derivados do leite, como queijos reino; provolone; prato; mussarela; coalho, frescal; padrão; ricota; ralado; manteiga; além de iogurtes, bebidas lácteas, doce de leite e leite pasteurizado.

 

Visando o desenvolvimento sustentável das comunidades em que atua, o grupo Campanella realiza um trabalho de parceria com apoio técnico efetivo aos produtores de leite, das associações e bacias leiteiras da região de Palmas de Monte Alto-Ba e municípios circunvizinhos.

A aquisição do leite in natura é adquirida 90% por pequenos produtores da agricultura familiar. A coleta é feita em caminhões com tanque isotérmico e passa por processo de mapeamento e controle de qualidade, realizado no seu próprio laboratório, mediante análises microbiológicas e físico-químicas, os produtos acabados também são mapeados. Preocupada com a qualidade de seus produtos e a segurança alimentar, a empresa investe em aperfeiçoamento técnico de seus colaboradores e fornecedores.

Name: Carron Lodge Ltd.
Description:
We are a leading supplier of wholesale cheese and fine food to the independent retail, food service, manufacturing and wholesale trade. We have our own fleet of refrigerated vehicles across the UK served by our three distribution depots. Our prices are competitive and service is fast and reliable. Our product range is extensive complemented by our own on-site farmhouse production.

Carron Lodge is a family run business that prides itself in building strong relationships with suppliers and customers. We go above and beyond to ensure that our customers have the best possible service, offering over 2000 products for next day delivery. Our product range extends beyond cheese to fine foods such as charcuterie, olives and pates.

We produce over 30 varieties of cheese at Carron Lodge, using milk from our own farm, including our own herd of water buffalo.

We also have facilities to cold smoke cheese using oak chippings. Our Oak Smoked Brie has won numerous awards for its wonderfully creamy, smokey flavour. We can also “Bespoke Smoke” and smoke any cheese to the customers’ requirements.

We can also tailor celebration cheesecakes to customer’s demands. Fruit or sponge cake isn’t to everybody’s taste! After people have indulged, cake often goes uneaten. Cheese has endless nibble appeal and goes well with wine and crackers in the evening.

Name: Underberg Dairy
Description:
We are a trusted bulk supplier of butter, cheese, and amasi, located in Southern Drakensberg, KZN, South Africa. Established in 2016, Underberg Dairy is a farmer-driven initiative born in response to the challenges faced by South African dairy farmers post-industry deregulation in 1998, which led to the closure of 6500 out of 8000 dairy farms. Our dedication to excellence was not a product of circumstance; it was ingrained in our ethos long before the factory stood, evident in our top-quality, award-winning products supplied today.

Our story is one of perseverance, innovation, and relentless pursuit of quality. From the struggles faced by farmers to the construction of our factory, every step has been a building block towards delivering nothing but the absolute best to our customers.

A proud moment in our journey was winning the Business Category for the Agricultural sector at the Standard Bank KZN Top Business Awards 2023. In the same year, our mozzarella cheese received the prestigious Qualité Award at the South African Dairy Championships. These notable recognitions reflect the exceptional quality and craftsmanship that define our products. We take pride in the fact that our products are not just dairy items, but are the result of a labour of love, attention to detail, and commitment to delivering nothing but the absolute best.

None of this would be possible without our dedicated team. Their hard work, passion, and expertise are the backbone of our success. From our farmers who ensure the highest quality milk, to our skilled craftsmen and women who turn that milk into delicious, award-winning products, each member of the Underberg Dairy family plays a vital role in our mission. We are proud of our team and their unwavering dedication to excellence, which ensures that we consistently deliver quality dairy products to our valued customers.

Name: Atena Group JSC

     Atena Farm was built with the aim of providing the dairy factory with quality milk in sufficient quantity that corresponds to long-term identical standards.
     Atena products, from the process of collecting raw materials until they are placed on store shelves, undergo 100 kinds of tests, of which 98 are applied only to milk. No preservatives or additives are used during this process. Several times purified water is used in the course of production. 
----------
     “Atena” süd zavodu Ağcabədi rayonunun Ağabəyli kəndində inşa edilmişdir. Sutkalıq 400 ton süd istehsal etmək gücünə malik olan “Atena” süd zavodu tətbiq etdiyi texnologiya və riayət etdiyi gigiyenik qaydalara görə rəqib tanımır.
     “Atena” süd zavodunu keyfiyyətli, kifayət edəcək miqdarda və eyni standartda davamlı süd ilə təmin etmək üçün “Atena” ferması inşa edilmişdir. 
     Toplanmasından rəflərə yerləşdirildiyi ana qədər bütün məhsullar 100 növ təhlildən keçir ki, bu təhlillərin 98-i südün üzərində aparılır. Proses zamanı heç bir konservantdan, və ya əlavə qatqıdan istifadə olunmur. İstehsal zamanı bir neçə təmizləmə mərhələsindən keçmiş tamamilə təmiz sudan istifadə edilir.

Name: MASTERRIND GmbH
Description:
MASTERRIND GmbH is one of the leading cattle breeding organizations in Europe. Strengths and experiences developed in more than 100 years form the basis for a solid future of our organization. A fair and professional partnership to our members and clients is important for us in everything we do.

With a total of 8.500 members and about 619.000 dairy and 20.000 beef cows, MASTERRIND has the largest herd book population in Germany and the second largest worldwide. The Holstein cows produce an average of 9.500 kg milk per annum.

MASTERRIND has the most modern A.I centres in Holstein breeding with registered offices in Verden, Bad Zwischenahn and Meißen. Round about 800.000 first services are carried out annually on our member farms. 
3.1 million doses of semen are sold at the same time period of which about one million doses are exported to more than 30 countries worldwide. 

Within embryo-transfer MASTERRIND belongs to the European pioneers. The classical method and also the latest techniques of ovum-pick-up (OPU) and in-vitro-production (IVP) are practiced in the laboratories of MASTERRIND. 
MASTERRIND is the German market leader in sales of breeding and commercial cattle. On more than 50 auctions and on farm purchases approximately 155.000 animals are sold annually. 35.000 Holsteins are exported to EU countries, Africa and Asia. 

MASTERRIND 
One vision, one goal, one future - We support your success in cattle production and marketing.

Description:
مجموعة هيلثي القابضه ش. م. م هي صاحبة العلامه التجاريه هيلثي و تضم هيلثي ميلك لمنتجات الالبان و الجبن و الايس كريم و الحلويات و هيلثى فاميلي للعصائر الطبيعيه  و جمعية تنمية الثروه الحيوانيه لطفي فارم مجموعة هيلثي من الشركات الرائده تقوم بالانتاج للسوق المحلي و التصدير لاوروبا و امريكا الشماليه و حاصلين علي اكثر من شهادات للجوده و صحة الغذاء

وھنا بيكون تمت أول مرحلة في التعقيم بالبسترة.. بعد كده وحدات دفع بتمشيھ في مواسير محكمة الغلق علشان يوصل لخط الإنتاج.
قبل التعبئة بيبقي في مرحلة تعقيم أخري بيوصل فيھا الحليب ل 86 درجة مئوية وبعد كده بينزل ل 3 درجات مئوية وھنا بيكون تم بسترتة في المرحلة الأخيرة
ويتعبي بعد كده في عبواتھ ويبقي منتج جاھز للبيع (وده بالمناسبة مبيحصلش في أي مصنع ألبان بيعبي تترباك.. اللي بيحصل إنھم بيرفعوا درجة حرارة الحليب بيتغلي عند 128 درجة مئوية.. وھنا طبعا وفقا لدراسات كتير جداا إن اللبن بيفقد معظم فوائدة لئن الكالسيوم والمواد الغذائية اللي في الحليب بتتكسر بفعل الحرارة.. فبيضطروا في مرحلة أخري من التصنيع إنھم يضيفوا كالسيوم وعناصر غذائية أخري باودر علي الحليب بعد الغليان اللي تم علشان يقدروا يحافظوا علي القيمة الغذائية اللي مكتوبة علي العبوة).
في ھيلثي الموضوع مختلف.. فكرنا إننا نقدم منتج طبيعي أورجانيك بدون أي تدخل أو إضافات.. فقط دور المصنع التعبئة في ظروف ومعايير تحافظ علي جودة المنتج الطبيعي.
وعلشان كده مدة صلاحية المنتجات عندنا 7 أيام فقط.. لئنھا منتجات فريش وطبيعية.. لو كان عليھا مواد حافظة.. أو تم غليانھا كان سھل جدا نقدم منتج صلاحيتھ 6 أشھر.
لكن ھي دي القيمة المضافة الحقيقية اللي بنقدمھا علشان كده أي مستھلك بيجرب حليب ھيلثي بيبقي عميل دائم

Name: Daily Dairy Holland
Description:
Let’s be honest. Exploring something new by yourself can be challenging. Navigating the busy
streets of a unknown city. Ordering from a menu written in a foreign language. Or staying cool,
calm and collective during the fi rst days of dating. ‘New’ is scary. Unless you have someone
experienced right beside you…
We’re Daily Dairy Holland. Your personal guide in the world of cheese. We have been at home in
the export of this delicious delicacy since the beginning of the 20th century. Along the way we
learned where to take a right for competitive prices or to go left for premium quality. Knowledge
we’d now love to share with you as you embark on your journey of fi nding the perfect cheeses.
Whether you’re after Dutch classics like Gouda and Edam or more adventurous fl avours like
guacamole or limoncello; we’re here for you. As your guiding companion, we’ll help you navigate
the vast landscape of cheese with ease and confi dence. You just have to follow our lead.
We don’t expect a tip at the end of the tour. Your satisfaction is our greatest reward.
However, your feedback is of great value to us. It’s how we ensure your next journey with
us is even more memorable.

Name: ZuivelNL
Description:
Op 7 januari 2014 is ZuivelNL opgericht door LTO Nederland (LTO) en de Nederlandse Zuivel Organisatie (NZO), als ketenorganisatie van de zuivelsector.

ZuivelNL is actief op terreinen waar samenwerking tussen de schakels in de zuivelketen tot meerwaarde leidt. Zwaartepunt van de activiteiten ligt bij een aantal themagroepen, die op deelgebieden als overleg- en actie platform dienen voor leden en partnerorganisaties. De missie van ZuivelNL is het versterken van de Nederlandse zuivelketen met respect voor milieu en maatschappij.

De ketenorganisatie is voor de overheid en derden het neutrale aanspreekpunt van de zuivelsector. ZuivelNL is het platform waar afspraken over gezamenlijke regelingen en financiering tot stand komen.

De ketenorganisatie is door de Nederlandse overheid erkend als Inter Branch Organisatie, conform Europees recht, waardoor in gevallen waar sprake is van een groot publiek belang afspraken algemeen verbindend verklaard kunnen worden.

Name: mooh cooperative
Description: With some 4000 milk producers, the mooh cooperative is a leading milk producer organisation in Switzerland. It operates in 20 cantons in the west, north and east of the country. As an independent marketing organisation, mooh offers sustainable, forward-looking cooperation for milk producers and milk processors. It delivers around 1.5 million kg of milk to its customers on a daily basis, thereby ensuring the distribution of its members‘ milk and the availability of raw materials for Swiss dairies.

Name: COKZ
Description: Toezichthouder op de veiligheid en kwaliteit van in Nederland geproduceerde zuivelproducten, eieren- eiproducten en bieden bedrijven een betere toegang tot de (inter)nationale markten

Name: Taciroglu Group of Companies
Description:
Taciroğlu, one of the leading manufacturer of dairy products sector in Turkey specialised on cheese production since 30s. In 1967, the company launched first packed cheese in Turkish market under Taciroğlu brand. Taciroğlu, supplying traditional Turkish cheese produced with traditional methods, has given priority to the brand concept and responsibility. In 1979, PEYSAN brand was added to its product range. At the same year Peysan Food Incorporation was founded and the company gathered its functions under the same roof. Peysan Food Incorporation, in 1987, in addition to traditional Turkish cheeses, started to produce Jadel cheese that has big market share in Middle-East, by the assistance of foreign experts. Peysan and Taciroğlu brands are produced in Edirne plant, having 31.000 square meter of production facilities, and equipped with modern technology. The cheeses are produced from cow's, sheep's and goat's milk depending on milking season. The raw material, namely the milk has been fastidiously selected and the each step of the production is controlled by well trained and experienced personnel.
  
Peysan and Taciroğlu brands succeeded to penetrate in all big market chains and big supermarkets as well, and obtained large shelf shares. The products are distributed by a well organised distribution system and reach all sales points in the market.

Name: STAMOU SMSA/ ΣΤΑΜΟΥ ΜΑΒΕΕ
Description:
Everything begins with our love for fresh milk! 

Since 1964, STAMOU dairy products have stayed true to our philosophy and values which are deeply rooted in traditional Greek recipes. We only use the purest, highest-quality ingredients: always fresh milk, collected daily and delivered within 24 hours to our dairy stores. All our flavors are inspired by Greek nature and are created by people who embody skill, patience, and mastery. Principles that you can "taste" in the first spoonful of our traditional yogurt with its velvety creamy texture, and in the tempting aromas of our rice pudding and our galaktoboureko. Principles that you can see shining through in the sparkle in children’s eyes when they try our ice cream, made of fresh sheep’s milk.

We are a family, and like your family, offering the very best is a commitment. For us, this commitment is reflected in our quality control standards. We have developed and implemented the ISO 22000:2018 food safety management system and are certified by SIS Certifications. 

Our company stands out from the crowd. We won 7 awards - including the «BRAND OF THE YEAR» award - at the Dairy Awards 2022 which relate to most categories of dairy products including milk, yogurt and ice cream, as well as traditional desserts like rice pudding.

You can find our products in our 23 Dairy Stores in Attica which are a beacon of Greek tradition and keep all our products fresh and pure. Our products are made simply and traditionally, which is why they are a firm favorite with most families and households that share our philosophy and values.

Our ambition is to broaden our vision and bring our love for milk to every neighborhood in Greece and beyond.

Name: EVROFARMA SA
Description: Our vision is to offer quality milk products, having absolute control over the raw materials resulting from vertically integrated production. With respect for people, society and the natural environment in which we live and operate, we try to create surplus value for the consumer and the Greek family.

More than 90% of products are exported to Africa, Middle East, Asia as well as EU countries. Litamilk, using experience and know-how about product’s properties and application, supplies Lithuanian and other markets with different specification milk powder, additives for food and feed industry.

Name: Milk Man
Description:
Dairy Goodness

Like any other concerned customer, when you’re shopping for products, you most likely want to be well-informed about the items in your shopping cart and choose the best for yourself and your family. 

And such is the case when you’re searching for fresh dairy products, rich in nutrients and free of any impurities or unnatural processes. 

Who is Milk Man?

Milk Man is a wholly-owned dairy farm and milk retailer. From the well-being of our cattle to the procurement process, food produced to organic standards must be certified and thus we adhere to international hygiene criterions and ensure our animals eat the best quality feed to produce premium milk that is both safe and highly nutritious for you and your family. 

Where are we?

Our farm is located at Hawksbay Karachi and is open for visits to anyone willing to verify what we sell.

One step at a time

Just as good things come in small packages, we only sell what we produce and don’t procure milk from any other farm therefore our sellable quantity is highly limited. 

We’re offering you what we would choose for our families, that is, a purely wholesome bottle of the finest milk you’ll ever get your hands on.

Why us?

Milk Man is the outcome of a man’s journey to find the best quality milk that is unadulterated and free from harmful hormones.

Reading about the utter lack of nutritional value in Ultra High Treated milk, Mr. Milk Man set out on a journey to source the best for his family. He did a lot of research and visited almost every dairy farm in town but couldn’t locate a single farm where he found organic milk in its essence, from start to finish.

Safe and Fresh

The Milk Man farm is a prime example of a high-tech modern cattle farm that abides by rigorous practices to ensure the production of milk is not influenced by artificial means such as the injection of Oxytocin, a hormone specially used to increase milk production in female cows.

The reputation we enjoy worldwide focuses on three key facts:

Name: La Casearia Carpenedo
Description:
Antonio Carpenedo affinatore di formaggi, conduce assieme ai figli Ernesto ed Alessandro, La Casearia Carpenedo srl con sede a Camalò di Povegliano in provincia di Treviso. Negli anni ’60 comincia l’avventura di Antonio come casaro, prendend in gestione un piccolo caseificio in quel di Rovarè di San Biagio in provincia di Treviso. Imparò a fare il formaggio da autodidatta con l’aiuto di un amico tecnico casaro. Nel 1965 Antonio Carpenedo è stato uno dei primi ad esportare fuori dalla provincia di Treviso e di seguito in Emilia Romagna, Lombardia, Piemonte la “Casata Carpenedo” oggi conosciuta ed apprezzata come Casatella Trevigiana Dop. Ricordiamo due importanti riconoscimenti nel 1976 con la Casatella, premiata con lo Spino d’oro conferito dalla Città di Thiene e nel 1984 con il Montasio dop.
La grande avventura di Antonio Carpenedo come affinatore inizia nel 1976 quando riscopre un’antica tradizione conservata dai contadini della zona del Piave, quella di mettere il formaggio sotto le vinacce durante la vendemmia. Tradizione che pare abbia origine nella prima guerra mondiale, quando i contadini, per preservare le forme di formaggio dalle razzie dei belligeranti ebbero l’idea di nasconderle sotto le vinacce in fermentazione.In quell’anno Antonio comincia a produrre le prime forme di formaggio affinato in vino e vinaccia che decise di chiamare Ubriaco. Ubriaco è un marchio registrato di proprietà esclusiva de La Casearia Carpenedo. Da allora Antonio ha cominciato a dar voce alla sua innata creatività trasformando la sua azienda nel primo laboratorio di affinamento riconosciuto in Italia.Dall’utilizzo delle vinacce passa alla sperimentazione di nuovi ingredienti come fieno, foglie di noce, pepe, spezie, birra , liquori e molti altri che oggi compongono il vasto repertorio dei “Formaggi di Cantina”.Affinare formaggi è un’arte che la Casearia Carpenedo interpreta oggi come allora regalando profumi e sentori al formaggio utilizzando materie prime selezionate

Name: Wedholms AB
Description:
From 1879 to today.
At Wedholms, we have worked with milk for over 140 years. When the company was founded in 1879, we made milk churns, and we have worked hard since then to develop our products further in conjunction with our customers. Over the years, we have devised more efficient solutions aiming consistently to preserve and cool the milk so that it retains the highest possible quality. In 2021, Wedholms entered a new era in milk cooling by launching CO2 by Wedholms, a sustainable and profitable milk cooling tank with recycled CO2 as refrigerant.

In 1957, we took a big step forward by starting to manufacture milk cooling tanks with direct evaporation. During the period from 1942 to1988, Wedholms was owned by the Swedish Dairy Association (Svenska Mejeriernas Riksförening SMR), which was in turn owned by the Association of Swedish Farmers. Still today, we have a close cooperation with farmers, service companies end experts in the dairy sector.

Today, the Wedholms Group comprises of the Wedholms headquarter in Sweden, the modern Eurotanks Wedholms production site in Poland, Wedholms GmbH in Germany and our two service companies; Skånes Kylteknik (Sweden) and Kylmäkärki (Finland). By this, we cover an extensive market around the Baltic Sea. Together with our sales and service partners, we currently also supply our products to other EU countries as well as globally.

Name: Dairy Lane Systems Ltd.
Description:
In 1990 Bill and Glenda van Logtenstein saw an opportunity to purchase Piet Verhual Ltd., a Surge and Mueller milk equipment dealer, and thus started the legacy of Dairy Lane Systems (DLS). Bill and Glenda strategically led DLS by seeking out innovative dairy equipment suppliers who believed in producing a higher quality product. This lead to the addition of the Jourdain, JOZ and Daritech product lines to the DLS portfolio. However for DLS it has never been just about the product, we work hard to provide each individual client with the best solution for their application. Further we stand behind our work through our outstanding service program. To do this we have heavily invested in establishing a strong service and installation team that has grown steadily over the years.

Within the last several years DLS has expanded its scope beyond southwestern Ontario through its affiliate companies DLS Barn Solutions, DLS Biogas and DLS Structures. After over 20 years at the helm Bill and Glenda have passed the batons onto their children: John and Mike van Logtenstein and Kim Sibley. Mike, John and Kim grew up working with their parents at DLS, and they have developed a sincere passion for the dairy and agricultural industry.

Name: Mejerifolk uden Grænser / Dairy without Borders
Description:
Mejerifolk uden Grænser har til formål at etablere og støtte små lokale udviklingsprojekter på mejeriområdet i udvalgte udviklingslande.

Vi yder bistand inden for det mejerifaglige område, som er defineret som forløbet fra malkningen (mælkekvalitet) til mælken er forarbejdet (proces og pakning) og til enten afsætning på et lokalt marked eller tilbagelevering til de bønder, der har leveret mælken. 

Mejerifolk uden Grænser er en almennyttig organisation, der primært baserer sig på frivillig arbejdskraft. 
Vi udfører ikke konkurrerende virksomhed til den etablerede mejeribranche, da vi eksklusivt arbejder i områder, hvor de lokale ikke har råd til at betale for konsulentarbejde og den offentlige sektor heller ikke bidrager.

Name: MAHALAXMI DAIRY PRODUCTS
Description: Mahalaxmi Dairy Products. Milken brand presents all the range of Mahalaxmi Dairy products to our customers through our high efficient supply chain. We take all care that Milken is available at every nook and corner of cities, small towns, at retails places and places of human activities. Milken provides fresh and fully hygienic dairy products in most hygienic packaging materials and at the most competitive prices to all class of our customers. Our customers' satisfaction for the quality expectation narrates the story of our success.

Name: Caseificio Di Pasquo | L’arte di avere gusto
Description:
Il caseificio Di Pasquo S.r.l. è un’azienda casearia in cui convivono perfettamente tradizione ed innovazione.

Fin dal 1956, anno di sua fondazione, il caseificio Di Pasquo ha portato sulle tavole di tutto il mondo prodotti che rispettano la tradizione casearia locale. 

Oggigiorno il caseificio non è più il laboratorio artigianale creato da Francesco Di Pasquo; si tratta bensì di una vera e propria S.r.l. che, pur essendo inserita nella grande distribuzione organizzata, riesce a rispettare gli elevati standard dei consumatori finali i quali, ormai, riconoscono nei formaggi e latticini “Di Pasquo” un prodotto d’eccellenza.

Nato nel 1956 dall’amore per il latte e dalla lungimiranza di nonno Ciccillo, il Caseificio Di Pasquo vanta fin da subito la presenza decisiva e il supporto costante di donne forti e instancabili, che hanno fatto la differenza nel trasformare un semplice Caseificio in un vero e proprio vanto della produzione casearia alto molisana.

Nonna Tina, mamma Amelia e le sue quattro figlie Donatella, Debora, Fabiola e Martina insieme a nonno Ciccillo e papà Lorenzo Di Pasquo sono figure centrali della storia del Caseificio, una storia fatta di uomini caparbi e donne tenaci impegnati nella produzione di formaggi a pasta filata di alta qualità e dal gusto unico.

La storia dell’azienda è la storia di una famiglia che con la sua unione e il suo impegno continuo ha fatto sì che il marchio Di Pasquo – Agnone diventasse negli anni uno dei simboli della tradizione casearia in Italia e all’estero.

Name: Emmi UK
Description: We are part of the globally renowned Emmi Group. At Emmi, we craft exceptional dairy products with care, innovation, and sustainability at the heart of everything we do. We are a trusted name in dairy, founded in Switzerland, with our roots in milk production dating back to 1907. In the UK we supply Onken Yoghurts, Emmi Caffe Latte Iced Coffees and a variety of Swiss cheese including our award-winning, cave aged Kaltbach.

Name: Caseificio Tenuta del Lago
Description: Tenuta Del Lago è un'azienda agricola italiana produttrice di mozzarella di bufala campana DOP. La filiera è completa, dalla gestione oculata dell'allevamento mirata al benessere degli animali, fino alla produzione del prodotto finale caseario.

Name: DNMCmilk
Description: DNMCmilk is a consulting firm founded in the Panhandle of Texas. We serve clients in Texas, New Mexico, Colorado, Kansas, Florida as well as internationally.  The focus of DNMC is to provide consulting services to dairy producers in the areas of nutrition, milk/feed economics, employee development and performance analysis.  The firm's goal is to provide leadership not only to their client's farms, but the dairy industry as a whole.

Name: kwality milk foods ltd
Description: Kwality Milk Foods Limited (KMFL) is a fast growing Dairy Business Company based in Kanchipuram, committed to supply of safe and wholesome milk and milk products to its valued customers.

Name: Fresh Milk Dairies Private Limited
Description:
Fresh milk Dairies (pvt) Ltd was established in Sri Lanka in 2015. Our factory is situated in Handapangoda, Ingiriya, Sri Lanka. We are engaged in manufacturing, marketing and distributing of Dairy and allied products over four years. A fully owned subsidiary of Pulses splitting & processing industries (pvt) Ltd. 
Our state of the art factory has the capabilities of manufacturing over 80000 liters milk base products on a monthly basis. Currently we are distributing Fresh milk, flavored milk, Set Yoghurts, Drinking Yoghurts, Popsicles and Ice Creams under our own brand Dairy House and Squeeze. We also have the capabilities and a strategy to manufacturing partner for many other brands Food & Beverage, catering to their milk based and non-milk based related requirements covering food ingredients and beverage sectors. We also continue to innovate in our industrial solutions and renewable energy offerings.
The reality of sourcing in Fresh Milk dairies is, of course, a bit more complex than the saying itself. To create a sense of overview, we have outlined the main product and service categories that are currently sourced by Dairy House. We’re surrounded by the environment every day, we care about farmers and their cows and the world around them, ensuring the ingredients in our products are as natural as possible.
We want to create the future of dairy and bring health and inspiration to Sri Lanka. In order to fulfill this vision, we need to source goods and services that support us in offering natural and healthy products to Consumers Island wide.  Our contribution and commitment towards the farmers in such manner where we aim to develop farmers business that also directly contributes to our economy.

Name: Real Lacto

Name: ABS Progenex
Description:
ABS Progenex surge en Julio de 2018 cuando ABS Global adquiere la división de genética bovina de Progenex S.L. después de más de 20 años de exitosas relaciones comerciales, consolidando así su presencia como proveedor líder de soluciones de mejora genética y servicios de reproducción en España.

Genus ABS es una división de Genus plc.

Name: Milk of life
Description: MilkOfLife is a brand that believes in the Vedic postulates of health and purity. Name: MilkStation | Ice Cream Junction
Description:
MilkStation is a modern private dairy company in India, building a farmer-first, quality-driven dairy ecosystem.

Founded in 2021 in Rajasthan—one of India’s largest milk-producing regions—MilkStation was created to build a strong, scalable dairy brand from North-West India. Today, we are growing as a challenger dairy brand across North India.

We operate consumer brands including MilkStation and Ice Cream Junction, offering fresh milk, value-added dairy products, and artisanal ice creams crafted for consistency, purity, and taste.

By working directly with local milk producers, we focus on transparent sourcing, reliable procurement, and long-term farmer partnerships.

MilkStation | Farmer-First | Quality-Driven | Made in Rajasthan

Name: Caseificio Giordano s.r.l.
Description:
Con sede nel parco del Ticino a Oleggio (Novara) il Caseificio Giordano produce da più di cinquant'anni mozzarella e altri formaggi a pasta filata nel rispetto della più pura tradizione casearia della Costiera Amalfitana.

Su una superficie di 10.000 mq. in uno stabilimento a "tecnologia avanzata", vengono ancora rispettate le storiche tradizioni, ma con l'applicazione delle più moderne tecnologie industriali e rigide normative igienico sanitarie.

A conferma della continua ricerca dell'eccellenza, il Caseificio Giordano attualmente lavora, ogni giorno 100.000 litri di latte italiano di provenienza lombardo/piemontese.

Name: Lácteos Cavanelas
Description:
Lácteos Cavanelas es una empresa cuyo objetivo principal es la satisfacción de todos sus clientes. Elabora un Queso Mozzarella Argentino de excelentes características, que nos ha permitido competir en el mercado, brindando el mejor servicio y dándonos la posibilidad de expandirnos hacia productos nuevos como el Queso Cremoso y el Queso Tybo .

Nuestra Personalidad está caracterizada por la Calidad y la Actitud, pilares fundamentales, que le dieron a Lácteos Cavanelas origen y éxito.

El crecimiento y el desarrollo de nuevas ideas, nos llevan a generar distintas oportunidades para la empresa y sus empleados, permitiendo también la incorporación de nuevos puestos de trabajo y vacantes para estos mismos.

Quienes trabajamos en Lácteos Cavanelas constituimos un grupo de personas que se conoce, comparte los mismos valores y lucha día a día para brindarle a los consumidores un producto de excelencia, creyendo y sabiendo lo que hacemos. En Lácteos Cavanelas entendemos que la Calidad de los Alimentos está constituida por una serie de atributos, pero tiene como condición básica “la Inocuidad”, establecemos un sistema de producción siguiendo normas que aseguran en todas las etapas, que nuestros productos cumplen con esta definición de Calidad.

Name: Pastora da Fazenda
Description:
Destaque por sua excelência em todo o mercado de laticínios, a Pastora da Fazenda está estrategicamente localizada em Itapira, interior do Estado de São Paulo. Com diversos tipos de queijos e seus derivados, todos produzidos com o mais alto rigor de qualidade, sendo utilizados equipamentos modernos que auxiliam em todo o processo, desde a seleção do leite até o produto final. A Pastora destaca-se por oferecer ao mercado sabores e sensações especiais, proporcionando assim, momentos únicos para os mais sofisticados e exigentes paladares.
A Pastora da Fazenda acredita que o melhor da vida é a simplicidade. A vida no campo, os sabores frescos dos alimentos, a beleza natural. Com esta compreensão dos recursos naturais, a Pastora preocupa-se com todos os detalhes de sua produção, sendo executadas todas as possibilidades de reaproveitamento dos recursos utilizados, os devolvendo para a natureza de forma limpa, sem agredir o meio ambiente.

Name: Collegiate Dairy Products Evaluation Contest
Description: The Collegiate Dairy Products Contest represents the culmination of student training by college professors who are experts in dairy product evaluation. A group of industry experts select the eight products to be judged in each of the six categories, and they evaluate them using the same attributes and scoring values taught by the coaches. The six dairy products that are evaluated include 2% fluid milk, butter, cheddar cheese, vanilla ice cream, cottage cheese, and strawberry-flavored yogurt. During the competition, the students utilize their method honed sensory skills and standardized scorecards to evaluate the quality of and score the products. Teams and individuals that score closest to the expert evaluations are honored with awards.

Description: Welcome to the official LinkedIn account of Madurai's Famous Jigarthanda! We have been proudly serving the original and undeniably famous jigarthanda since 1977. Name: Jain dairy Products Pvt Ltd
Description: We are one of the leading manufacturers of milk products in the private sector in Gujarat. We cater to hotels, restaurants, hospitals, canteens of industrial houses, clubs, airport caterers, super malls and multiplexes in the City of Ahmedabad. We also supply to all other major cities of the State. Our promoters Ashvin Shah, Nishith Shah, Aalap Shah & Kalpesh Trivedi practice a strong customer centric approach. Two of the promoters are highly qualified Dairy technologists and are backed by an excellent R & D capability, resulting in superior processing expertise and high levels of hygiene.

Name: Dairy Challenge
Description:
The North American Intercollegiate Dairy Challenge (NAIDC) is the premier event for tomorrow's dairy leaders. It brings together the best and the brightest collegiate students diligently studying for a career in the dairy industry.

NAIDC is a unique two-day competition among teams representing North American universities' dairy science programs. The competition challenges those institutions to inspire their students with a high quality education - empowering them with the resources for real-world success. This challenge incorporates all facets of a working dairy business in a forum that's interactive, educational and fun.

Name: Yarra Valley Dairy
Description:
At Yarra Valley Dairy, situated in the rich landscape of the Yarra Valley in Victoria, Australia, we make original fine cheeses using only premium quality milk and ingredients. 
Established in 1994, our family-owned Dairy proudly created Australia’s first marinated fetta, introducing a cheese style that is still revered and widely emulated over 3 decades on.
Our cheeses are primarily soft in style, reflecting the time-honoured, traditional farmhouse cheeses of Central Europe yet bolstered by the rich provenance of the Yarra Valley.

Name: The Dairy Council
Description:
The Dairy Council is a non-profit organisation which provides science-based information on the role of dairy foods as part of a healthy, balanced and sustainable diet.

We provide evidenced based information to health professionals, the media, industry and consumers.

Our materials for health professionals and consumers range from booklets giving dietary advice during pregnancy, weaning and childhood to documents on the nutritional composition of dairy foods, the importance of calcium in the diet, and information on common misconceptions surrounding dairy consumption.

Dairy Council conferences, events, tailored seminars and presentations are delivered by registered nutritionists and dietitians.

Name: Gaj Milk
Description:
Gaj was founded in 2019 with a mission to transform India’s dairy landscape through innovation, transparency, and trust. What began with 16 cows and a 500-litre setup has evolved into a 7-acre state-of-the-art dairy facility in Sikandrabad, Uttar Pradesh.

In 2021, Gaj entered the B2C market under the brand "Moospring," delivering farm-fresh, lab-tested dairy products directly to consumers. The facility includes an R&D center, scientific lab, and advanced processing that ensures milk is turned into dairy products within 3 hours of milking.

By sourcing directly from farmers and fostering fair trade, Gaj has become one of North India’s most loved dairy brands—committed to purity, health, and community growth.
#GharGharMeinGaj #TheMilkOfIndia

Name: Al-Taif National Dairy Factory
Description:
Al-Taif National Dairy Factory is one of the oldest dairy factories in the Kingdom Of Saudi Arabia. Production started in 1982. Due to its geographical location, the city of Taif was chosen to be the head quarter for the factory. During a history of more than thirty years, Taif National Dairy Factory has achieved excellence in production and increased its production to meet the ongoing demands of consumers around the kingdom. And to achieve its goals, the factory enhanced the development of its production and the different categories as well as the distribution media.

The factory is always following the newest technology in the dairy and dairy derivatives production field and is updating its machinery, material and production accordingly. The factory has excelled in producing makheedh, labaneh, labaneh with olive oil, and cream with honey.

There are state of the art quality laboratories that always monitor the different stages of production and assure the quality of the various products. Our products are distributed to the Saudi Market using our caravan of trucks that covers the main parts of the kingdom of Saudi Arabia.

Name: Walo von Mühlenen AG
Description:
Say goodbye to price wars!
As a processor and distributor, do you know the fear of losing customers and giving in to price pressure immediately because your cheeses are interchangeable? 

With us it will be differen: We are reliable and open and develop cheeses and recipes with you and for you in order to make your offer unique and you can say goodbye to price wars.

Affineur Walo 150 years of cheese tradition that has received more awards, than Switzerland has mountains: 

Life is too short to eat bad cheese.


My story
When I was a kid, I used to go with my father in the dairies in the Emmental to buy the cheese and I have tried hundreds of cheeses. Each cheese told me his own exclusive story

I was working for a big chemical group when Swiss Government decided to dissolve the Swiss cheese union and our company was likely to disappear. This was the moment I decided to continue to tell the story of the Swiss cheese. 

I love these stories cheese is telling you by smelling and tasting them. But what if the cheese does not tell you a story anymore. This happens when the industry is treating the milk, the milk is pasteurized, microfiltered and going through a Baktifuge separator until she is completely neutral and sterile, and the cheese loses his story. I want that our kids will still have the possibility to listen to the cheese story and that’s why I fight every day for the traditional cheese making. 

As Affineur Walo I am now leading the business in the 5th Generation and we have won more awards than Switzerland has Mountains. In addition to that we have been honored by the historical Museum in Bern together with big names as Tobler (Toblerone), Bloch (Ragusa). I guess I am the first Affineur having a place in the museum.

Name: Bourgondisch Lifestyle
Description:
Wat bij de boer begint maken wij af - Les Affineurs des Pays-Bas

Bourgondisch Lifestyle is er voor de kaas connaisseur. Bent u een professional of een liefhebber van kaas? Voor ons maakt dat niets uit want voor de fijnproever die geniet van delicatessen en houdt van het ambachtelijk product hebben wij een prachtige selectie kazen uit heel Europa in het assortiment. Wat bij de boer begint maken wij af. Met passie voor ambacht selecteren wij de boeren zorgvuldig en halen wij de kazen persoonlijk bij ze op. De kazen rijpen niet alleen bij ons, wij verzorgen ze met aandacht en passie. Dit houdt in dat we de kazen op unieke wijze verrijken waardoor er een authentiek product ontstaat met een ware smaaksensatie. Onze kazen kenmerken zich door frisheid en elegantie. Kom bij ons proeven of bestel uw proefpakket online.

Bourgondisch Lifestyle aims to offer delicious artisan cheese to cheese connoisseurs. Are you a professional or a consumer in love with artisan cheese? For us it doesn't matter because for love to serve you both. We have selected a wonderful assortment of European artisan cheeses to offer you a rich, fresh and elegant selection of artisan cheese delicacies. We finish what starts with the farmer. With a shared passion for craftsmanship, we carefully select the farmers and collect the cheeses from them personally. Then, the cheeses not only ripen with us, we passionately turn and nourish the cheeses. This means that we enrich the cheeses in a unique way, creating a rich and authentic product with a true taste sensation. Our cheeses are characterized by freshness and elegance. Bring us a visit and we serve you a cheese tasting or order your sample package online..

Name: Ajanta Dairy
Description:
AJANTA DAIRY, established in the year 1975, is a leading manufacturer of Sterilized Canned Paneer & Sterilized Canned Low-fat Cream  in the country.

AJANTA DAIRY is also the authorised member of APEDA (Agricultural & Processed food product Export Development Authority of India).

Name: Continental Dairy Facilities Southwest, LLC
Description: Continental Dairy Facilities Southwest, LLC is a consumer goods company based out of 1926 FM 54, Littlefield, Texas, United States.

Name: KERRYMAID
Description:
Our story began in Co. Kerry, Ireland which is one of the wettest places in Western Europe. With fields watered by copious amounts of rain created lush grass making for happy cows and ultimately, providing the best tasting milk - this is where we got the inspiration behind Kerrymaid. 

With over 30 years dairy expertise, we have put our great love for dairy to good use and created a wide range of great tasting Kerrymaid products that we know you’ll love too!

Ci troviamo nell'alta pianura mantovana, dove i prati stabili sono la nostra principale coltura e nostra grandissimo valore aggiunto.

Name: Valfoo
Description:
Valfoo is one of the leading family-owned dairy suppliers of niche milk and whey products in Europe. Using our extensive experience and know-how, we develop new dairy products, innovative technologies and fully integrated supply chains that deliver high-value and high-quality to our customers. 

We believe in a sustainable dairy industry for a healthy tomorrow and the importance of bringing farm and table ever closer. At Valfoo, we aim to be the leading supplier of niche dairy ingredients and products that benefit customers around the world.

Mindful of people, animals and the environment, we use innovative technologies, new ideas and sophisticated supply chains to offer our customers the best quality and ensure a bright future for the dairy industry.

A specialist in adding value at every stage, we stand for “the VALue of FOOd”.

Name: Cornerstone Ag Management
Description: Cornerstone Ag Management provides dairy technical leadership, technical training and technical support to our clients. We regularly contact customers and prospects, developing and maintaining positive customer relationships. We provide proper nutritional advice to our clients along with developing and maintaining relationships with allied members of the dairy industry. Cornerstone Ag Management brings nutritional knowledge to the producer and formulates dairy rations to fit individual producer needs. We also assist clients on different management practices and troubleshoot client’s individual operations to help improve total net spread per head per day.

Name: FASCO AP - Mount Activity Label / Heat Detector
Description:
FASCO AP’s self adhesive labels are specifically designed for cows. FASCO AP, together with your knowledge and experience give you credible information at first sight for detecting mount activity / standing heat in animals, increasing productivity. 
They are used to identify and detect mount activity / estrus heat and also to synchronize and accelerate reproduction cycles.

Name: Laiterie de l'Outaouais
Description: La Laiterie de l’Outaouais, c’est le synonyme d’une mobilisation de milliers de citoyens qui ont mis du sien afin de redonner à la communauté de l’Outaouais, une laiterie de chez nous.

Name: Leites Manacá
Description:
Desde 1965 a Leites Manacá atua no ramo de derivados de leite.  A história de carinho e atenção da marca Manacá começou com a manteiga com sal, seu primeiro produto. Sempre empenhada em satisfazer seus clientes, a Manacá oferece embalagens práticas de fácil transporte e alta segurança. Hoje possui amplo e respeitável mix de produtos: leite UHT (desnatado e integral), manteiga, achocolatado, queijos mussarela e parmesão, leite em pó, leite condensado e creme de leite, composto lácteo em pó, creme de leite, leite condensado.
A produção está concentrada em Goiás e no Pará. Na Região Norte, a Manacá possui laticínio no município de Mãe do Rio; e, em Goiás, as fábricas estão em Rianápolis e Porangatú. A Manacá busca aprimorar a arte de trabalhar com leite, cuidando e oferecendo mais sabor para a vida de consumidores, fornecedores e parceiros.

Name: Xanda Farms
Description: Xanda Farms is a zero-grazing integrated dairy farm with a commitment to its cows, empowerment of its host community and preservation of the environment.

Name: Beppino Occelli
Description:
Quella di Beppino Occelli è una personalissima storia del gusto ricca di intuizioni, progetti e soddisfazioni, ma anche di sacrifici ed incomprensioni a causa di una mentalità e di uno stile di vita imposto dalla logica industriale e dall’impoverimento culturale della campagna e della montagna.

Contro questa tendenza all’omologazione, Beppino Occelli ha proposto creazioni e interpretazioni personali dei prodotti della tradizione che nascono dal suo profondo e indissolubile amore per il territorio dove è nato: le Langhe e le Alpi.


The story of Beppino Occelli is a very personal history of taste, rich insights, projects and satisfaction, but also of sacrifices and misunderstandings, due to a certain mentality and way of life imposed by the industrial logic and by the cultural impoverishment of the rural and mountain areas.

Against this trend towards homologation, Beppino Occelli offered creations and personal interpretations of traditional products that arise from his deep and indissoluble love for the place where he was born: the Langhe and the Alps.

Name: Biodéal

Produit au lait de vache, brebis et chèvre sous les marques R bio, Vilactée, Jean Roussey Fromager Nous livrons l'ensemble du territoire et faisons de l'export et du grand export . Notre large gamme permet de répondre aux besoins des Industriels, des grossistes, des magasins, crémiers et de la restauration collective.

Name: De Goey Kaas Holland
Description:
Warehouse:
De Goey Kaas Holland is een familiebedrijf met ruim zestig jaar ervaring in de behandeling van kaas. Met die ervaring is in 2015-2016 aan de Pompmolenlaan in Woerden een ultramodern kaasopslag- en distributiecentrum gebouwd. In een optimaal geklimatiseerde omgeving wordt de kaas opgelegd, gekeerd en geplastificeerd. Dit gecontroleerde en geautomatiseerde proces voldoet aan de hoogste kwaliteitseisen op het gebied van voedselveiligheid.

Het zijn dan ook de beste kaasmakers van Nederland die de behandeling van hun kwaliteitsproduct aan ons toevertrouwen. Bent u benieuwd naar wat wij voor u kunnen betekenen? Neem contact op met Jelmer Schenkel, Directeur De Goey Kaas Holland Warehouse.

Trade:
Jan de Goey, de vader van de huidige eigenaar startte in 1961 als zelfstandig kaashandelaar en wist met zijn nuchtere Hollandse handelsgeest het bedrijf in 50 jaar uit te bouwen. Zoon John heeft hetzelfde talent. Vanuit twee locaties in de gemeente Woerden, Barwoutswaarder en Zegveld wisselen de partijen kaas wekelijks eigenaar en worden honderden soorten kaas verkocht aan collega handelaren en detaillisten.

Name: Aeolikos Dairy
Description:
The cheese factory unit AEOLIKOS is located in Lesvos , the third in size island of Greece, in the Aegean Sea and the only island that can produce FETA CHEESE P.D.O (prodected designation of origin)
The construction of the cheese factory was completed in year 2009 and it has been equipped with the most modern production lines, which were awarded in 2012 from the Chamber of Commerce of Lesbos for their innovative character.The founders of «AEOLIKOS» have been active in the field of dairy production since 1970, whereas the same family owns a modern factory for the production of premium animal feed. Needless to say, the combination of experience , knowledge and modern technology led the way for the successful course of business.

With the constant and close cooperation with sheep milk producers, veterinary monitoring of the herds, the correct and very specific diet, daily monitoring and analysis at the product’s receipt , a top quality raw material is guaranteed , the milk, which then gives as a final product, feta cheese of rare quality, brewed from the land’s wild herbs, and strictly fixed in caloric value.

The unit works according to ISO 22OOO, IFS and BRC certified by TUV AUSTRIA ,by AGROCERT for the production and distribution of P.D.O products and D.I.O for the production of organic FETA . Respecting the environment works the biological function and cares for the ecological disposal of waste according to the European legislation.

Nordic Milk
Description:
Nordic Milk is Estonia’s leading dairy group. Known for its two legendary brands – Tere and Farmi. New, third brand – Deary brings  plant-based portfolio under one umbrella brand for efficient expansion in export markets.

In July 2020 AS Maag Group restructured its dairy companies and transferred the shareholdings in TERE AS and AS Farmi Piimatööstus to a holding company Nordic Milk OÜ. Nordic Milk OÜ is now the group of dairy companies with a simple and clear structure, solid production and known trademarks.
The new structure will guarantee more efficient management of the companies and all their  factories and will give better position to expand the activities in the Baltic and Nordic countries.

It is our vision to be innovative, responsible and respectful company and act as a role model and leader of the modern dairy industry. To achieve this Nordic Milk must exceed the expectations of its partners and clients. Always. 
We are confident to believe that we are up for that.

Nordic Milk - 
•	125 years of dairy-experience
•	2 beloved historical dairy brands: Tere and Farmi
•	570 dedicated employees
•	Over 400 SKUs in 16 product segments

Description:
Dairy Connect was formed in 2011 to be a unique agricultural advocacy body, by representatives of the dairy industry. The focus was to represent a broad cross-section of the Australian dairy industry, including dairy farmers, processors & supporting corporate partners around a shared dairy vision.  

The commitment was to encourage initiatives that would reinvigorate the many parts of the dairy industry.

Name: Little Acres Ranch
Description:
Little Acres Ranch is a 5-hectare dairy farm in Abuja, Nigeria. Our herd consists of a variety of breeds, specifically chosen for optimum milk production capacity; while adapting to the Nigerian climate. We are more than just a farm; we are a movement and we are committed to:
•	Bridge the gap within the Nigerian dairy industry: We aim to significantly contribute to reducing Nigeria's dairy product deficit and large import dependency by producing high-quality milk and dairy products.
•	Empower the dairy community: Through educational programs and training initiatives, we will cultivate a new generation of passionate dairy farmers in Abuja.
•	Champion sustainable dairy cattle breeding: We'll develop a unique herd by crossbreeding local breeds known for their hardiness with high-yielding foreign breeds, creating cattle optimized for the Nigerian climate while producing excellent milk.

Name: Polish Dairy

We can deliver your product in a variety of origins, compositions and packaging, according to your preferences. Our products can be used for both food & feed production depending of customer needs.

Our mission is to market Polish dairy products worldwide. We want to support our business partners with the highest quality assistance and advice on Polish dairy market. We want to provide added value for our clients and to be a reliable long-term partner for our customers.

We care about ethics and honesty of our business. We are focused on building personal relationships and full commitment with our customers. We take responsibility for every aspect of our activity in order to create safe and effective trading environment for our business partners.

Name: DiaSolution
Description:
DIASOLUTION is an innovative probiotic for diabetes management as a novel, completely
natural product exhibiting protective effects on pancreas, liver and kidney cells, and prevents the
offset of diabetes complications, contributing in an efficient way to improvement of the quality
of life of patients with diabetes and prediabetes without any side effect. The protective effects
have been proven in preclinical studies in rats, while the efficacy and safety of probiotic in adults
with diabetes type II was proved in clinical trial. DIASOLUTION probiotic have beneficial
effects on decreasing the level of HbA1c, fasting blood glucose, and inflammation while
improving the overall mood of treated adults.

Name: Dairy Nutrition Plus
Description: On July 11, 1984, the dairy industry was forever changed with the introduction of SoyPlus bypass protein. A quality product of Landus Cooperative, SoyPlus was the result of a unique, 100% all-natural expeller process. Heating and pressing the beans, instead of relying on chemical extraction, resulted in a 60% bypass protein value in an aroma-rich, great tasting dairy nutrient source.

Name: Glacier Products Ltd
Description:
Glacier Products Ltd celebrates its 32nd birthday this year having been incepted in 1979 with a purpose of manufacturing and distributing world-class ice cream to consumers. 
 
The company manufactures and distributes 3 leading brands of ice cream
 	1.     Dairyland ice cream – It’s the company’s flagship brand and its market cuts across the economic and       social spectrum.  	     
	2.      Amore Mia ice cream – There has been a growing niche of consumers who consume imported ice creams. Amore Mia is our premium brand to cater for that niche of up-market consumers who are want the best and are willing to pay extra for it.   
	3.      Mio ice cream – For many years, ice cream was a product for the “well-to-do”. GPL introduced Mio as a cheap yet high quality ice cream within the reach of ordinary people.

From a humble beginning and due to its dynamic nature, GPL brands have become market leaders in  ice cream with a 35% market share in the East African region with over 10 players. The company now serves  Kenya, Uganda, Tanzania, Rwanda, Burundi and Southern Sudan through branch offices and distributors. We have a fleet of 19 refrigerated vehicles and over 1,200 freezers around East Africa. 

 To ensure that are our products are always safe and hygienic for consumers we are have an in-house  quality control and are currently in the process of getting certification for  ISO 22000 2005  Food Safety Management Systems.

Name: Agroindustrias Lacteas Los Quesos de Oriente S.A. de C.V.
Description:
Nuestro Concepto

Somos una empresa caracterizada por brindar atención personalizada a través de un concepto diferente:

Salas de ventas modernas y cómodas en las que los clientes encuentran una gran variedad de quesos nacionales, internacionales y exclusivos, que han sido elaborados en nuestra Moderna planta procesadora; esta se encarga de seleccionar cuidadosamente la materia prima y transformarla en nuestra variedad de productos lácteos, yogurt y gelatos de gran sabor y calidad con el fin de satisfacer a todos nuestros clientes.

Name: ViPlus Dairy Pty Ltd.
Description:
ViPlus Dairy is one of Australia’s leading milk formula manufactures, specializing in a diverse range of high quality, nutritional dairy products. Our commitment to world leading quality products, combined with our focus on innovation and technology, all of which is underpinned by our location world class facility in Toora South Gippsland. Toora is one of Australia’s most historic and economically important dairy producing regions, which is why ViPlus enjoy the support of both Australian State and Federal funding.

The ViPlus Toora plant boasts a rich history in the dairy industry in Australia, with over 120 years of dairy production. The Toora plant is the cornerstone of reputable high quality dairy products engineered for domestic and international export markets in the region.

ViPlus Dairy was one of the first accredited dairy manufacturer in Australia approved by China’s CNCA, and more recently acquired CFDA approval for our infant formula products. ViPlus Dairy are now leading the Australian Infant formula dairy industry under the new CFDA (China Food & Drug Authority), and our facility continues to operate to all Australian and International dairy regulations and standards.

Boasting a modern production facility and leading technology undertaken to strict GMP standards, ViPlus Dairy provides a wide range quality Nutritional Milk Powder product meeting the various nutritional needs of growth and development, from infant to the ageing population. ViPlus also produce a range of functional milk powder products supporting various health and dietary requirements.

Name: NUTRICARE., JSC
Description:
CÔNG TY CỔ PHẦN DINH DƯỠNG NUTRICARE
Nutricare là công ty chăm sóc dinh dưỡng & sức khỏe tại Việt Nam, được thành lập bởi các nhà khoa học dinh dưỡng hàng đầu. Thấu hiểu để có nền tảng sức khỏe toàn diện thì không thể chỉ quan tâm đến 1 giai đoạn mà phải chăm sóc dinh dưỡng cả vòng đời, Nutricare đã tiên phong đem đến các giải pháp dinh dưỡng & dinh dưỡng y học chuyên biệt từng lứa tuổi & chuyên sâu từng bệnh lý như: người tiểu đường, người ung thư, người bệnh gan, thận, trẻ bất dung nạp lactose, bị chứng nôn trớ, trào ngược…

Name: Mayfield Dairy
Description:
In 1910, when T.B. Mayfield Jr. purchased 45 Jersey cows and began delivering milk to customers in his hometown of Athens, Tennessee, little did he know that four generations later, his family milk and ice cream business would become one of the nation's favorite dairy brands. 


After T.B. Jr. retired, the next generation of the Mayfield family picked up where he left off, and in 1950, under the leadership of owners Thomas B. Mayfield III and C. Scott Mayfield Sr., we build the Southeast's most modern milk plant. Today, Mayfield is one of the nation's leading dairies, using advanced technology to bring the best products and innovative packaging to our customers.

Name: Technology Business Incubator @  National Dairy Research Institute
Description:
In the form of a business centre, the TBI provides incubatees an initial place of operation equipped with supportive environment in which services such as assistance in technology, hands-on management, mentoring, business plan development, exposure to Venture Capital and Institutional Capital and all other operational business/finance related needs involved in starting and growing a technology company.
The TBI is designed to support and nurture industries in the following areas:

1)	Commercial Dairy & Food Processing
2)	Commercial Dairy Farming
3)	Commercial Feed Technology
4)	Commercial Fish Farming
5)	Commercial Apiculture & Honey Processing
6)	Bio-fertilizers, Bio-pesticides & Panchgavya products based on dung & urine.

Services Offered:

1.	Incubation Process: SINED-TBI is designed to provide a launch pad to budding entrepreneurs who wish to launch themselves into the world of technology based business careers. The incubator is designed to provide entrepreneurs all the support to make technology based business ventures successful. An entrepreneur makes fewer mistakes when he operates in highly innovative and supportive environment of TBI.
2.	Pre-Incubation Process:
•	Entrepreneurship Awareness Camps
•	Entrepreneurship Development Programmes: TBI will be conducting Entrepreneurship Development Programmes in the following areas:
	Commercial Milk Procurement & its Management
	Commercial Milk Processing
	Commercial Manufacture of Cattle Feed
	Organic Dairy Farming
	Ice Cream, Softy & Frozen Desserts
	Commercial Honey Production & Processing
	Indigenous Milk Products 
•	Technology Entrepreneurship Training
•	Consultancy & Testing
•	My Idea Programme

Name: Dairy India Yearbook, New Delhi
Description:
In publication since 1983, "Dairy India" serves as a Databook-cum-Management Guide-cum-Directory-cum-Buyer's Guide to suppliers of products and services, a handy training guide, and a Who's Who.

"Dairy India" also identifies new trends, market opportunities and investment prospects as well as new insights, analysis and ideas. A volume of 950+ pages, it has over 100 articles as well as 300 tables and charts. The Directory and Who's Who sections list over 7,000 organisations and specialists in the dairy industry.

An important feature is a section dealing with project reports / feasibility studies and financing of dairy farms and plants. In-depth practical articles on establishment/expansion and management of dairy farms and plants, cattle breeding, feeding & nutrition, animal health care, milk & milk products, dairy technology and food safety have been featured.

"Dairy India" covers production, processing, distribution, marketing, research and development. It outlines exciting prospects for entrepreneurs to make profitable investments or expand their presence in the fast-expanding Indian dairy industry, where the annual milk production exceeds 187 million tonnes.

"Dairy India", after seven editions since 1983, is recognized as the only source of authentic, authoritative and up-to-date information.  

For more information, kindly visit: www.DairyIndia.in

Name: De Mèkkerstee

Specialist in geitenkaas
De Mèkkerstee en geiten zijn een eenheid. Van dag één dat de Mèkkerstee bestaat wordt hier dan ook de lekkerste (biologische) geitenkaas gemaakt, die door de jaren heen meerdere keren nationaal en internationaal is bekroond met hoge onderscheidingen. Uniek aan de Mèkkerstee is dat het open is voor publiek, bezoekers kunnen een kijkje nemen in de geitenstal, vanachter het glas het kaasmaken bekijken. Wat eten en drinken in ons restaurant/ijssalon en wat lekkers kopen in onze winkel. Op de Mèkkerstee werken, naast de vaste professionele medewerkers, nog ongeveer 70 mensen met een afstand tot de maatschappij. Waar mogelijk werken zij onder begeleiding mee in stal, winkel, restaurant, en kaasopslag.
Onze kaas gaat via de groothandel naar speciaalzaken, delicatessewinkels in binnen en buitenland. 
Naast de vervaardiging van geitenkaas produceert de Mèkkerstee, in opdracht,  nog een aantal mooie koekazen. 

Biologische Jerseykaas van de Jerseyhoeve:
Deze kaas heeft in 2016 de hoogste onderscheiding gekregen die maar denkbaar is, Supreme Champion op de grootste kaaskeuring ter wereld de International Cheese Award in Engeland. Deze kaas is nummer 1 geworden van 5000 kazen van over de hele wereld. Maak kennis: www.dejerseyhoeve.nl 

Biologische koekaas van de Biostee
3 eigenwijze biologische landbouwers uit de Hoeksche Waard met een biologische melkveebedrijf zorgen voor hoogwaardige melk waar de Mèkkerstee de beste biologische koekaas van maakt. We zijn blij dat we de verwaardigers mogen zijn  van de Jonge Blom, Pittige Tante, Ouwe Knar… etc. Kijk uzelf maar: www.biostee.nl

Name: MANIMAS مانی ماس
Description:
In 1988 and in an attempt to fulfill a part of the country's need for dairy products,
ARMAGHAN Pasteurized Milk Company, with MANIMAS as its commercial brand name, was established in the town of FASSA, south of IRAN. But it was not until February 1990 that the company was ready for production. The factory was set up in an area covering 7,000 square meters east of FARS province, south of IRAN, 125 km from the city of SHIRAZ.
In the 1992-2001 periods, due to Iranian government's declining support for the private sector and directing all its backing towards government-based companies, MANIMAS and all such companies were thus unable to see any real expansion and development. In 2001 when the government's support for private sector firms started, most especially for dairy companies, MANIMAS was also on the road towards expansion, renovation and development. Aiming to produce various high quality dairy products with the most modern machines and equipment benefiting from the latest technology, the company started to expand, adding the production lines of milk, yoghurt drink, yoghurt, creamy cheese, Curd, etc. to the existing inventory. The rapid expansion has resulted in the factory site now covering 150,000 square meters while the area given to production halls and other departments presently covers 20,000 square meters. Another MANIMAS achievement in this regard has been to set up and implement a post-production water treatment system in order to fulfill a more hygienic and healthier production and safeguard the environment benefiting from the latest technology in the field. The factory is active with two 12-hour shifts and houses welfare facilities for the staff including a store, prayer room, changing room, canteen, first aid section, football pitch and volleyball stadium. MANIMAS also extends loans and facilities to its personnel. The company is directly employing 350 production operatives, as well as a number of distributors and drivers.

Marenchino è una storia di amore per i formaggi, il racconto di chi ha saputo individuare i doni della terra in cui vive, per realizzare prodotti caseari dal sapore unico e dalla genuinità indiscussa.
Questa storia ha origine negli anni Cinquanta in Provincia di Cuneo, terra generosa, tra le Alpi e le Langhe, scelta dai nostri nonni per avviare l’attività.
I primi passi sono cauti, dedicati soprattutto alle fasi di stagionatura e commercializzazione. Convinti dal successo internazionale dell’alimentare italiano e consapevoli di avere a disposizione materie prime d’eccellenza e conoscenze esclusive, ben presto i Marenchino optano per la produzione in proprio: è l’inizio di un nuovo capitolo ricco di passione e di riscoperta delle tradizioni.
A partire dagli storici stabilimenti di Savigliano, l’azienda si afferma su tutto il territorio cuneese, realizzando acquisizioni importanti che la portano a una capacità produttiva senza precedenti e a una visibilità di scala nazionale.
I formaggi del Gruppo Marenchino nascono dagli stessi valori di sempre: la difesa della lavorazione artigianale, la valorizzazione del territorio e l’impegno per un gusto inconfondibilmente buono e genuino.
Oggi il Gruppo Marenchino racchiude Cisalpino e Perla due realtà che si sono contraddistinte nel tempo per rappresentare le specialità casearie piemontesi.
Gruppo Marenchino, una storia di famiglia!
Specialisti dei Formaggi DOP e Specialità Casearie Piemontesi.

Name: Mill Haven Foods LLC
Description:
Operating in the heart of the dairy industry, Mill Haven Foods, is an innovator in dairy protein manufacturing. Our agile solutions help bring the flexibility that many of our customers are looking for while our highly responsive and proactive team and state-of the-art facilities make us an industry leader in speed to market. We like to think outside the box and see ourselves as the mavericks in the industry. We have the knowledge, expertise, and product development capabilities to partner with you on the dreams of your company. 

Our vision is to accelerate and focus quality dairy foods products into the marketplace through our commitment to crafting a network of energized customers and suppliers that are nurtured by enduring value, innovative concepts,
collective experiences, professional understanding, loyalty and appreciation to the highest dairy industry standards. Headquartered in New Lisbon, Wisconsin, Mill Haven Foods operates in two locations, New Lisbon and Tomah, Wisconsin. Our two facilities provide more than 165,000 square feet of space that is stacked with customized, state of-the-art machinery designed to meet the highest quality processing standards of dry dairy powders. With our own in-house lab, we can ensure the highest quality is met every time with one of the fastest turnarounds. Our company maintains the highest quality measurements at all stages of the manufacturing process, from receipt of raw materials, blending, to shipment of finished product.

Producing over 50 million pounds of product annually, with distribution network worldwide, we are not done growing yet. We look forward to providing you with the highest quality dairy protein and to exceed your quality expectations to help your company meet its goals.

Name: Foudeh Company
Description:
"Foudeh Group" was founded by Haj Mohammad Hassan Foudeh with the establishment of the agricultural unit of the company in the mid-1950s. Afterwards, with the completion of Mr. Ahmad Foudeh's academic education and his return from the United States, a sense of duty to improve the living standards of his fellow citizens in accordance with modern world standards encouraged him to develop and update the company's activities. In this regard, he mechanized agricultural processes in 1963 and then established the livestock unit under the name "Sepahan Foudeh; Milk and Meat Co." in 1974. During the following years, Foudeh Group operated in two departments of "livestock husbandry" and "agriculture" and gradually, in line with scientific and applied developments, has evolved from a local company into a strong successful national brand. Nowadays, the company's dairy farm with about 3200 breeder cows (a total of 7500 cows, heifers and bulls) and an annual production of 45,000 tons of milk is one of the leading suppliers of milk for dairy factories in Iran. Using the latest agricultural knowledge and equipment, the company's agriculture department cultivates corn and barley forage to meet part of the dairy herd's nutritional requirements, too.
Gradually, with the quantitative and qualitative development of the company's livestock department activities and relying on the technical knowledge and experience of decades, the company officials’ interest in meeting part of the country's livestock needs and job creation encouraged them to expand the Foudeh Group's scope of activities. In this regard, two factories under the name of "Novin Roshd Shahran Foudeh" was put into operation in 2018 in Razi Industrial Town of Isfahan; "Animal Feed Supplements Factory" with the focus on the production of vitamin and mineral supplements for poultry and livestock as well as toxin binder and "Animal Milk Replacer Production Factory" which produce milk powdered formula for newborn animals.

Name: Australian Dairy Products Federation (ADPF)
Description:
ADPF is the peak body representing businesses with a presence in Australia engaged in the manufacture, marketing or trading of dairy products.
We represent the collective views of our members as they relate to:

- Promoting the consumption of dairy products through improvements in manufacturing, marketing, trading and distribution of dairy and dairy related products

- Providing input into policy formulation at every level of government that impacts on the profitability, viability and sustainability of members’ operations and the dairy industry

- Forming strategic relationships with the dairy industry and non-dairy organisations to ensure members’ input on relevant issues

- Developing policies and strategies that address key issues confronting members and the dairy industry

- Representing and promoting the dairy industry at all levels both nationally and internationally

- Working with governments and industries related to the dairy industry to achieve mutually beneficial outcomes for the dairy industry.

- Providing a forum for Members to exchange ideas, techniques, processes, research and other information.

- Encouraging research and employment opportunities in all sections of the Australian dairy industry.

Name: CCB_Anandam
Description:
Choudhery Cheese Bazar Pvt. Ltd. (CCBPL) has been a trusted name in the Indian dairy industry since 1986. From a family business to a modern private limited company, we have built our legacy on quality, consistency, and innovation.

Under our flagship brand ANANDAM, we craft a wide range of premium dairy products including mozzarella, cheddar, pizza cheese, processed cheese, paneer, curd, ghee, butter, and dairy powders. With a strong presence across Pan India and expanding into new export regions, we are committed to delivering international-standard products with an Indian heart.

Our state-of-the-art plant in Hisar, Haryana, spans 10.66 acres with a capacity of 40 MT/day, ensuring hygiene, efficiency, and eco-friendly practices. Backed by industry experts and global training, we combine tradition with modern technology to bring the purest dairy experience to homes, restaurants, and businesses.

 A proud milestone in our journey — our new dairy project was virtually inaugurated by the Hon’ble Prime Minister of India, reflecting national recognition of our scale, vision, and contribution to the dairy sector.

Name: Sumul Dairy
Description:
Sumul or Surat Milk Union Limited, which is now renamed as The Surat District Co-operative Milk Union Ltd, is one among the 17 district unions which acts as manufacturing units of dairy products for Gujarat Co-operative Milk Marketing Federation Limited, the marketers of Amul brand of products.
General Information
Sumul or Surat Milk Union Limited, which is now renamed as The Surat District Co-operative Milk Producers' Union Ltd, is one among the 17 district unions which acts as manufacturing units of dairy products for Gujarat Co-operative Milk Marketing Federation Limited, the marketers of Amul brand of products.
Surat District has been a Pioneer in India in channeling trade in Cotton and Milk through co-operatives. Before SUMUL stepped in, traditional Private Milk Traders were dominant in the area.
The private trade was monopolizing the Milk market and exploiting both the Milk Producers and Consumers alike. The milk procurement price which used to be fixed by the traders (traditional Bhatias) was very low and was fluctuating from time to time at their sole discretion. These has capitalized on the absence of any infrastructure and processing facilities and has managed to keep producers from deriving equitable benefits from the marketable surplus generated. As such their income from milk was very low and they had no incentive for modern dairy farming. The farmers resented the system, but were helpless in the face of these traditional constraints and to their own lack of resourcelessness.
Dairying on the other hand, was never popular with tribal's (a major rural population in the District) as practically no infrastructure existed for milk marketing in their talukas, inaccessibility to their villages as well as taboos regarding keeping of buffaloes prevented the entire population of tribal's from considering dairying as a source of income. The tribal's kept their cows to produce bullocks rather than milk, which was insufficient even to nurse the calves.

Name: Eurilait Ltd
Description:
Eurilait is the UK subsidiary of two large French dairy co-operatives, Laita and Eurial. We are one of the UK’s leading distributors of quality speciality cheese and dairy products.

Eurilait is located within the rural village of Evercreech in the heart of Somerset, where it operates a 44,000 sq.ft cutting, packing and distribution facility supplying retail, wholesale and food manufacturing markets throughout the UK and Ireland.

Products handled by Eurilait are produced in the 20 certified creameries owned by Laita and  Eurial throughout western France. Along with the cheese, butter, cream and crème fraiche supplied by Eurilait’s parent companies, a vast array of cheese, yogurts and other dairy products are sourced throughout Europe to ensure a comprehensive range is available to all customers.

Eurilait is diligent in its responsibility to quality assurance and food safety.

Eurilait’s experience in dealing with Creameries throughout Europe ensures our suppliers are assessed at all levels for their competence and ability to meet the high standards set by the UK market.

Eurilait’s strength is its ability to meet customer requirements. Whether you need a specific format, case configuration or label, the production team at Evercreech have the ability to meet these demands.

At Eurilait we pride ourselves in our flexible, professional, category led approach to supplying our customers.
