Name: Olympus Foods Romania
Description:
Olympus este un brand de lactate, bauturi vegetale si sucuri proaspete cu origini elene, care pune accentul mai intai pe calitate, atat a produselor, cat si a angajamentului fata de consumatori. 

Olympus inseamna credibilitate, incredere, excelenta profesionala si dezvoltare continua, oferind produse in perfecta armonie cu natura si pastrand valorile traditionale.

Grupul Hellenic Dairies, din care Olympus face parte, este o afacere de familie aflată la a treia generație de producători de lactate, cu operațiuni în 47 de țări din toată lumea. 
Pe plan local, in 2011 am deschis Fabrica de Lapte Brasov, in localitatea Halchiu, jud. Brasov, in urma unei investitii greenfield. Construită inițial pe o suprafață de 25.000 de metri pătrați, fabrica a fost extinsă succesiv până la 39.000 de metri pătrați. Astăzi, fabrica este cea mai tehnologizată unitate de producție de lactate din România și un lider în colectarea laptelui de la fermierii români,

Pe parcursul celor peste 13 ani de prezență în România, Olympus Foods a avut o evoluție remarcabilă, devenind unul dintre cei mai importanți producători de lactate de pe piața locală, recunoscut pentru standardele inalte de calitate pe care le aplica produselor din portofoliu.

Povestea insa nu se opreste aici. Investitiile continua, portofoliul de produse este in continua dezvoltare, iar actiunile pentru comunitate si experientele oferite consumatorului continua procesul de amplificare.

Name: Globemilk
Description:
The Dutch dairy industry has a long history and is the basis of the modern global dairy sector. From 1870, hundreds of milk processing plants flourished, but of these just one specialist in long-life milk remains: Globemilk BV. Starting from the vision that the best milk products for everyone must be accessible worldwide, we work with distribution partners every day to achieve this dream.

Globemilk is a family business set up by traditional dairy farmers. The bond with Holland has remained steady: Globemilk is familiar with the entire chain, from cow to fridge. Globemilk has since grown into an international brand, but the basics have remained the same:

Globemilk is 100% independent and believes in the strength of the family. Everything begins with honest business practices, which is exactly what Globemilk stands for.

Name: TamboDem
Description:
Proyecto para tambo demostrativo sobre ruta.

Se ha formado una sociedad de explotación lechera (“TamboDem”), con un tambo instalado sobre la Ruta Nacional 5, en Guanaco, Partido de Pehuajó, y sobre suelo de aptitud agrícola.

Visión de TamboDem.
Reinstalar en la comunidad agropecuaria la validez de la producción de leche como negocio en suelo de aptitud agrícola, y recuperar la dignidad del oficio. “Ser tambero es transitar el camino hacia el crecimiento”.

Objetivos de la sociedad
• Demostrar con las mejoras prácticas uno de los sistemas posibles de generar renta sustentable, superior a la de la agricultura
• Explorar la maximización de un sistema pastoril como eje de uno de los sistemas competitivos posibles.
• Satisfacer anhelos personales de propietarios y colaboradores
• Explorar las ventajas de un sistema asociativo.

¿Por qué un Tambo Demostrativo?
• No existe en el Oeste de la Provincia de Buenos Aires
• Agenda “política” (promover la competitividad como valor clave, una de las consignas de la Cuenca Oeste)
• Amor propio, por la prolijidad, y satisfacción personal
• Motivación del personal, base del planteo productivo
• Prestigio de nuestras empresas, y de la institución
• Posibilidad de financiar gastos de la gestión “demostrativa” con auspicios comerciales

¿Qué NO es un tambo demostrativo?
• No es un tambo “modelo” (objeto de orgullo para un inversor rico proveniente de otro sector)
• No es una cabaña (institución que pretende demostrar que su hacienda es superior a la de otros)
• No es un tambo experimental (institución con capacidad profesional para llevar a cabo varios ensayos)

Name: Ayal Kaas B.V.
Description:

Wilt u blokjes, plakjes, grof of fijn geraspte kaas? Wilt u gangbare kaas, biologische kaas, halal kaas of een vegan alternatief? Wij verpakken deze kaassoorten in een beschermende atmosfeer in neutrale of bedrukte verpakking, dieptrek of flowpack. Wij leveren wereldwijd aan supermarkten, groothandelaren en horecazaken.

Sinds 2019 werken wij in ons nieuwe productiehal in Westzaan. Ayal Kaas kan zich echt een innovatieve trendsetter noemen. En niet alleen op het gebied van snijden, verpakken en opslaan van kaas. We reinigen met bio-verantwoorde desinfectiemiddelen. Het dak staat vol met zonnepanelen en de warmte uit de koelinstallatie wordt hergebruikt. Rond het gebouw staan fruitbomen en bloeiende struiken speciaal voor insecten.

Wij denken graag met u mee bij het ontwikkelen van een product. Neem gerust contact met ons op om de mogelijkheden nader te bespreken.

Name: SRI VIJAYA VISAKHA MILK PRODUCERS COMPANY LTD (VISAKHA DAIRY)
Description:
Sri Vijaya Visakha Milk Producers Company Ltd., (more popularly known as “Visakha Dairy”), was established in the year 1966. The registered office of the Company is situated at Akkireddipalem, Visakhapatnam. Visakha Dairy is having state of the art integrated Dairy unit at Akkireddipalem, Visakhapatnam with a handling capacity of 6 lakh litres of milk per day and at Rangampeta, near Rajahmundry with a handling capacity of 2 lakh litres.

Visakha Dairy is selling all variants of milk i.e Whole Milk, Standard Milk, Toned Milk, Double Toned Milk, (Pasteurized, Homogenised, non-homogenised), extended shelf life milk (in Elecster Packing) upto 30 days, long shelf life milk upto 180 days (in Tetrapak) and major products being Curd, Butter Milk, Lassi, Flavoured Milk, Ghee, Butter, Panneer, Skimmed Milk Powder, khova, Sweet Curd, other Sweets, Cattle feed etc. 

Visakha Dairy has set up dairy with a milk processing capacity of 1.00 Lakh litres per day and registered under A.P.State Co-operative Societies Act in 1973. The society was converted into Mutually Aided Cooperative Act., 1995 with effect from 08.07.1999.  Visakha Dairy has undertaken various capex programmes from time to time and increased the capacity to meet the growing demand and the operations, business activity spread beyond Andhra Pradesh. With the Economic Liberalisation in 1991, competition increased and Govt. of India considering the fact that the co-operative societies are unable to grow inspite of market demand, availability of milk due to their limited financial and marketing resources, education and access to advanced technology vis a vis private competition, introduced Producer Companies Act. To reflect the multi state nature of business operations, to bring in more operational and administrative efficiencies, Visakha Dairy was converted into Producers Companies Act in 2006 and the name was changed to “SRI VIJAYA VISAKHA MILK PRODUCERS COMPANY LTD”.

Name: Zott Polska Sp. z o.o.
Description:
Zott Polska Sp. z o.o. od ponad trzydziestu lat dostarcza na polski rynek najwyższej jakości produkty mleczne - jogurty, desery, napoje i inne artykuły, cieszące się uznaniem zarówno wśród konsumentów, jak 
i handlowców. Szczególnie istotna jest dla nas opinia konsumenta, która przyświeca misji naszego przedsiębiorstwa: „Życzenia konsumentów wyznaczają naszą drogę!”. Dziś Zott posiada w swojej ofercie jedne z najbardziej rozpoznawalnych marek na rynku przetworów mlecznych, takie jak Jogobella, Monte, Zottarella czy Primo.

Name: Blue River Dairy LP
Description:
Nestled in Invercargill, New Zealand’s southern most town, Blue River Dairy is a world class nutritional formula manufacturer. Established in 2003, we’ve grown from creating award winning sheep milk cheeses into a global leader in nutritional formula production and exporting. A proven pioneer in the industry, Blue River Dairy developed the world’s first infant formula using exclusively sheep milk protein and was the first plant in the world manufacturing nutritional formulas using milks from three different species—sheep, goat and cow.

Blue River Dairy’s innovative team are focused on quality, nutrition and compliance. Our strictly controlled production process begins with rigorous testing to select only the highest quality ingredients from New Zealand and around the world. Our processing environment is carefully controlled to ensure the every can exceeds some of the highest compliance standards in the world. Infant Formula is only released to export after being thoroughly tested to the high standards demanded by the New Zealand and China market Authorities and our customers.

At Blue River Dairy, we’re changing the face of New Zealand Dairy. We recognise that every baby has different nutritional and digestive needs, and we strive to provide more nutritional choices for your baby’s happy and healthy development.

Name: APCBRH
Description:
A Associação Paranaense de Criadores de Bovinos da Raça Holandesa (APCBRH) é uma entidade sem fins lucrativos. 

Desde sua fundação, em 27 de março de 1953, trabalha intensamente no desenvolvimento da cadeia produtiva do leite, fornecendo soluções e resultados positivos em diversas áreas para produtores, técnicos, cooperativas e empresas de laticínios.

- Melhoramento Genético
- Gestão de Rebanhos
- Indicadores de Produção
- Reprodução
- Nutrição
- Saúde dos Animais
- Qualidade do Leite
- Diagnósticos de Sanidade

Name: Glenstal Foods
Description:
Glenstal Foods Ltd. is Ireland's leading independent dairy trading and marketing company. We are a partner of choice to many multi-nationals in the retail, food service and manufacturing sectors of the food industry where dairy products are used.

Our success is based on providing top quality products, at very competitive prices with the highest level of service.

Name: Sebore Group
Description:
At Sebore International Farms Limited, we leverage technology and relationships with dairy farmers in the host community to provide consumers with milk and dairy products manufactured using high-quality raw milk in Adamawa's magnificent natural environment.
Even beyond agriculture, we believe in a future where energy is consistently available for all as it is crucial in human development; this belief fuels our path in Renewable Energy Technologies (RETs), the future of energy sources.

Name: Carozzi Formaggi
Description:
Carozzi Formaggi nasce nel 1960 grazie allo spirito visionario di Aldo Carozzi. Dall’anno della sua nascita ad oggi, l'azienda ha intrapreso una processo di espansione caratterizzatosi per l’attenzione profusa nel mantenere viva la tradizione a fianco di una continua voglia di crescere sia a livello nazionale che internazionale.

I prodotti Carozzi Formaggi si dividono in otto principali categorie: Taleggio DOP, Quartirolo DOP, Gorgonzola DOP, formaggi a crosta lavata, formaggi a crosta naturale, formaggi freschi e formaggi di capra.

La manualità è ancora importante in azienda: il latte viene lavorato in caldaiette ed è compito del casaro sentire con le proprie mani quando la cagliata è pronta per poterla mettere negli stampi.  La stagionatura viene fatta artigianalmente attraverso l’utilizzo di casse di legno nelle quali viene applicata una tela, processo che si contraddistingue per una salatura a secco ed un controllo accurato forma per forma.

Certificata BRC e IFS, l'azienda nel corso degli ultimi anni ha vinto importanti premi nazionali ed internazionali. Nel 2015 Carozzi Formaggi ha aperto, presso la sua sede di Pasturo, La Formaggeria: non solo un punto vendita, ma un vero e proprio luogo nel quale trascorrere il proprio tempo libero a contatto con la natura.

Name: Busti Formaggi SpA
Description: La famiglia Busti ha iniziato la sua attività di caseificazione oltre mezzo secolo fa, partendo dalla produzione di due prodotti: ricotta e burro con Alessandro e Remo Busti, pastori originari dell’alta Garfagnana. Stefano Busti, erede di questa preziosa tradizione, è fiero di presentare una vasta gamma di pecorini, frutto dell’esperienza e dell’impegno nel mantenere inalterate le tecniche di lavorazione tradizionali, con una continua ricerca e valorizzazione del territorio.

Name: The Panchmahal District Cooperative Milk Producers` Union Ltd. ;GODHRA
Description: The Panchmahal District Cooperative Milk Producers` Union Ltd. is an apex district level Cooperative Organisation having over 1800 Primary Village level Dairy Cooperatves of Panchmahal & Dahod districts, affiliated to it,with membership of over 250000 milk producer members. The annual turnover for the curent year is over Rs. 400 Crores. The Organisation has affiliation with AMUL.

Name: Anderson Erickson Dairy
Description: Our goal has always been to help customers enjoy the goodness and taste of dairy the AE way. That means no skimping on the ingredients or on the time it takes to make our products.

Name: County Milk Products Limited
Description:
With over 30 years of industry experience, County Milk Products is one of the UK’s most established and trusted dairy ingredient suppliers. 

We’re known for building long-term partnerships, delivering consistently high-quality dairy products, and offering the technical expertise and supply chain reliability that our customers know they can depend on. 

From raw milk and cream to specialist powders, fats and liquids, we process and supply dairy ingredients across the UK and Europe with a core focus on quality, reliability and care. 

Our customers rely on us to solve a range of supply challenges, and we reward their loyalty by continually going the extra mile, whether that’s by sourcing hard-to-find products or simply maintaining our high standards of quality and sustainability, ensuring that our customers receive consistent and reliable products every time. 

Got a question, or need more information about any of our products or services? We’d love to hear from you. Send us a message or get in touch via our website below.

Name: Lactoprot Deutschland GmbH
Description:
Milk is our passion; the processing of milk is our mission. We are one of the world's leading manufacturers of caseinates. With a long tradition and the seal "Made in Germany," we operate successfully around the globe. 
The main focus of our activities is on processing milk and whey. We extract the best from our "white gold" for our customers around the globe. We know our "contract cows" and their owners personally. They supply us with the highest-quality raw milk from the heartland of Europe's dairy production. 
As one of the international leaders in the production of caseinates, we look back on a long tradition. Our owner-managed group of companies has knowledge of the diverse functional properties of milk and its constituents that has accumulated over the course of generations, combined with extensive experience of the markets for the many different areas of application in the food industry. Our products are used in milk and whey specialties, delicatessen foods, ice cream, baked goods and confectionery, beverages, baby food and sports products, and many other applications. A pilot plant with state-of-the-art equipment, several production sites and a worldwide distribution network guarantee service from A to Z. We are your experienced and inspiring partner - from the development of innovative products to the delivery of ingredient systems for product solutions. 
Companies are always part of a whole. That is why we accept responsibility and act as we would expect from the point of view of our partners and customers. Science-based targets provide a clearly defined pathway for companies to reduce greenhouse gas (GHG) emissions, helping prevent the worst impacts of climate change and future-proof business growth. In accordance with the Science-based targets initiative, Lactoprot has committed itself to setting ambitious reduction targets for GHG emissions. Find out how we balance delivering valuable natural nutrition with minimizing our environmental footprint!

Name: Huwai
Description: blah blah blah blah

Name: Grober Nutrition
Description:
A subsidiary of Gay Lea Foods, we are a proud Canadian business. From a modest beginning in the early 1970′s, Grober has grown from a singular animal nutrition company to a dynamic agribusiness. Our high quality standards and investment in continuous research has cemented Grober Nutrition as a national supplier of excellent feeds. Now as part of the Gay Lea Foods family, we offer more to our employees & customers, RIGHT FROM THE START!

FROM HUMBLE BEGINNINGS TO BIG DREAMS
Our founder, Jerry Bartelse, moved to Canada from the Netherlands in 1974.  At that time, he founded the Grober Group of Companies in Cambridge, Ontario.  Initially a one-man operation; Jerry did it all, purchased ingredients, mixed products and made deliveries.

Today, things look a lot different, but our values remain the same. In 2020, we joined the Gay Lea Foods family. As part of a Canadian farmer-owned co-operative, our founding mission of creating premium products using high quality ingredients, continues. 

Grober was built on looking forward and not back, ‘because what is relevant is the future’. With this optimistic attitude, we have continued to innovate and add value to the animal nutrition industry.

INTRODUCING NEW IDEAS
From day one, Grober Nutrition has been committed to pushing the bar higher when it comes to raising young animals. Over the years we have continued to innovate in feeding methods, housing & raising practices, and researching exciting new ingredients. In 2020, we brought this knowledge and innovation to the pet industry, launching Grober Pets - a line of dairy-based pet health products. 

YOUR YOUNG ANIMAL SPECIALISTS
Combined with over 40 years of manufacturing, our own experience raising over 100,000 animals, and our commitment to industry, academia and farmers, we are passionate about nutrition, feed management, housing and manufacturing technologies. Come with us, let’s GRO together.

Name: L&Z Integrated Farms Nig. Ltd.
Description:
L&Z is an Integrated dairy farm involved in the entire dairy value chain , from production, through processing, packaging to marketing.

We produce dairy products that  are 100% natural, Obtained from healthy and well-fed cow milk. L&Z Yogurts are specially made and packed with great natural taste and amazing nutritional benefits.

Name: Doña Angela
Description:
Doña Angela es una empresa paraguaya, líder en productos lácteos con estándares de calidad que prevalecen hace más de 3 décadas.

Doña Angela mantiene su firme crecimiento mediante la productividad y rentabilidad del negocio. Basado en el compromiso de sus recursos humanos para elaborar productos saludables 100% naturales, confiables e higiénicos. 

Ayudan a mejorar la calidad de alimentación de sus consumidores, buscando así mejorar el estilo de vida de todas las familias paraguayas.

Como parte de su responsabilidad social y hace varios años viene trabajando en la conservación de la Reserva Guarapi, una reserva forestal con más de 100 hectáreas que protege remanentes boscosos y fauna asociada en el departamento de Paraguari.

Name: Laticínios Sibele
Description:
O Laticínios SIBELE nasceu em uma fazenda mineira, na cidade de Pará de Minas. Hoje, já são 30 anos de mercado, sempre oferecendo produtos lácteos de qualidade, nutritivos e muito saborosos, fabricados com rigoroso controle de matéria-prima e produção.

Para garantir o padrão de qualidade da marca, o Laticínios SIBELE possui um dos mais modernos e completos parques industriais do país. E não para de inovar e crescer. Mas o maior orgulho da SIBELE é de poder contribuir com a saúde e com o bem-estar de pessoas de todas as idades, porque sabe que oferece muito mais do que sabor: os produtos SIBELE são sinônimo de nutrição.

Name: DariFill, Inc.
Description:
Helping you make great ice cream products!
  
At DariFill, our mission is to provide superior quality filling and packaging solutions. Our versatile packaging options and state-of-the-art equipment solutions help our customers to reduce costs, increase production, and improve product safety. Call us to see if we can do the same for you.

What We Do
 
Whether you are filling ice cream, yogurt, dressing, or any similar food product, from individual servings to large containers, DariFill has a solution for you. Browse our site to see some of the filling and packaging options that we can provide.

Who We Are
 
DariFill is a team of engineers, technicians and customer service specialists working to help our customers improve their production.

Name: Laiterie Chagnon Dairy
Description:
Who knows more about quality milk products than a dairy producer? That is what the Kaiser family told themselves before launching Laiterie Chagnon in 2017. 

With over 40 years of experience as a Quebec dairy producer, The Kaiser family is proud to guarantee the quality and integrity of milk from one of the last existing independent dairies in Quebec.

Name: Nukamel
Description:
Founded in 1954, Nukamel is the world’s first milk replacer producer, active in over 60 countries.
 
Nukamel is a company which specializes in the development of nutritional solutions for young and suckling animals based on dairy ingredients.

In our home base, Belgium and the Netherlands, milk and milk derivatives have always been abundantly available and therefore a whole industry has been developed. What once were byproducts of the dairy industry, like liquid whey, are now highly valuable nutritional ingredients.
 
We started with the production of milk replacers for white veal. Today Nukamel has solutions for many feeding systems and high performing production animals, including rearing calves, piglets, lambs... even turkeys and broilers.

Name: Lácteos Martínez S.L.U.
Description: Quesos elaborados con materias primas seleccionadas 100% naturales y un tradicional proceso de elaboración, el cual es nuestra filosofía de vida, plasmándose en las cortezas naturales bañadas en aceite de oliva.

Name: Dairy Solution Pvt. Ltd.
Description:
We would like to introduce Dairy Solution (Pvt) Ltd. as a premium full service dairy farm machinery seller and service provider, with total focus on customized products as well as turnkey solution of complete Dairy farm builds and sale of after market products.
 
Dairy Solution (Pvt) Ltd. is part of the National Group which is the largest and most integrated nationwide Dairy farming infrastructure solution provider in Pakistan.

To be the one stop shop for the Farmers.  To work with the best companies in the world and to bring best quality products at best price from all over the world for our farmers.

Name: BABA GROUP
Description:
HI,
We are leading Dairy products manufacturer & exporters based in Baroda (Guj) India.

I feel Proud to annouce that we have just started our new venture "SIMCOM MOBILES".

Name: Latterie Vicentine sca
Description: Latterie Vicentine è una società cooperativa leader nel territorio per la produzione e distribuzione di latte e suoi derivati. Nasce nel 2001 dalla fusione di due realtà storiche della provincia di Vicenza. Latterie Vicentine s.c.a.  produce in media 3.500 q.li di latte lavorato al giorno (per la quasi totalità vicentino). Annovera circa 400 Aziende Agricole associate. Il fatturato del 2017 si è attestato complessivamente sui  76,5 milioni di euro . Gli stabilimenti di produzione sono due: Bressanvido e Bassano del Grappa. 424.000 sono le forme di formaggio Asiago Fresco prodotte ogni anno alle quali si aggiungono 52.000 forme di formaggio Asiago Stagionato e 72.000 forme di formaggio Grana Padano. I litri di latte fresco di alta qualità distribuiti ogni anno alle famiglie vicentine sono 14 milioni.

Name: Latte Nobile s.r.l.
Description:
Latte Nobile s.r.l. (ex La Compagnia della Qualità s.r.l.) nasce nel 2011 per promuovere e commercializzare il meglio delle produzioni lattiero casearie della Campania e Italia secondo il Metodo Nobile del Dott. Roberto Rubino fondatore dell’Anfosc, nonchè ideatore del Progetto Latte Nobile.

Siamo stati la prima realtà imprenditoriale a credere nel Progetto grazie anche agli studi del Dott. Federico Infascelli, professore di nutrizione e alimentazione animale dell’Università Federico II di Napoli

Sin dalla nostra fondazione, il nostro scopo è stato valorizzare il Latte Nobile assumendone la distribuzione e realizzando una linea completa di derivati.

I nostri prodotti hanno una identità certa e sicura, rintracciabile in qualsiasi momento, tutti nascono e vengono realizzati nelle migliori condizioni ambientali.

Latte Nobile s.r.l. si rivolge a quello che ci piace definire mondo dei produttori e distributori di gusto: ristoranti, pizzerie, supermercati, botteghe, negozi gourmet, salumerie, alimentari di prossimità, gruppi di acquisto familiari o sociali.

I nostri Allevatori e Casari sono uomini e donne, persone che apprezziamo per la loro bontà ed impegno per garantire la qualità.

Produciamo con tecniche tradizionali ma sempre nei parametri della qualità certificata europea ma soprattutto della qualità Agerolina.

Visita il nostro sito web lattenobile.it per maggiori informazioni

Name: Industrias Lácteas Monteverde
Description:
Nuestra historia comenzó en 1970, cuando cuatro vecinos de la comarca rural de Los Oscos, en el extremo occidental de Asturias, se unieron con un propósito claro: transformar su tierra a través del queso, aprovechando los excelentes recursos naturales del entorno y el saber hacer local. Así nació el auténtico queso de Oscos.

Hoy seguimos fieles a ese origen y a los mismos valores. Combinamos tradición, innovación y pasión por el queso para ofrecer productos auténticos y de calidad reconocida. Detrás de cada queso hay una leche excelente, una receta transmitida durante generaciones y un compromiso absoluto con la calidad. 

Desde los quesos más tiernos a los más curados, de vaca, cabra o mezcla; en Queso Tres Oscos hay un queso perfecto para cada gusto y momento.

Name: The Cheshire Cheese Company
Description:
The Cheshire Cheese Company – creators of the only Cheese That Makes You Grin!

Based on Laurels Farm in Nantwich, Cheshire, we produce a unique range of waxed cheese truckles, indulgent chutneys, and complementary cheese biscuits, each expertly crafted to time-honoured recipes. From traditional Cheshire and Cheddar to international award-winning flavour infusions, we uniquely use only local milk to make our cheese, making us a true farm-to-fork producer.

Available online via our expanding fulfilment centre in Macclesfield or in independent farm shops and retail outlets in the UK and several overseas locations - but unlike other waxed cheese brands, you will never find us in big chain supermarkets.

Name: PLAC-FATTORIE CREMONA
Description:
PLAC-FATTORIE CREMONA è una Cooperativa di allevatori nata nel 1933. Oltre 150 milioni di litri di latte l'anno conferiti da 84 soci. Quarto produttore di Grana Padano ( circa 220.000 forme l'anno ) e terzo di Provolone.
4 stabilimenti produttivi

Name: TYRAS
Description: Το μεράκι και η αγάπη για το χώρο της γαλακτοκομίας και τυροκομίας σε συνδυασμό με τις γνώσεις και εμπειρίες χρόνων στον τομέα αυτό, οδήγησαν το 1985 τους αδερφούς Δημήτρη και Μιχάλη Σαράντη μαζί με τον πατέρα τους Στέργιο Σαράντη, στην ίδρυση της ΤΥΡΑΣ.

Name: Dudhshree Milk Producer Organization
Description:
Dudhshree Milk Producer Company Limited, established on March 12, 2023, operates under the guidelines of Chapter XXI-A of the Companies Act, 2013 and funded by National Rural Livelihoods Mission & West Bengal State Rural Livelihood Mission. It is technically supported by NDDB Dairy Services and operates on Mutual Assistance Principles, emphasizing voluntary membership, voting rights independent of shareholding, an elected board, limited dividend distribution, member education, and collaboration with other entities.

The primary objectives of the company are:

Procuring, processing, and marketing milk supplied by its members, along with engaging in related activities.
Providing or facilitating technical and managerial support in areas such as breeding, feed/fodder, and veterinary services to enhance milk production for the members' benefit.
Offering education, training, and other initiatives to foster mutual assistance among its members.
Ensuring the procurement of quality milk from members that complies with both organizational standards and statutory regulations.

Name: Veldhuyzen Kaas | MAAZ Cheese
Description:
Veldhuyzen Kaas is an innovative & leading exporter of premium Dutch cheese specialties.
With our brands Veldhuyzen, Basiron, Hommage and Montana, we service customers in more than 60 countries.
In selected markets we also act as the exclusive master distributor of Old Amsterdam, the leading brand in aged gouda.

Name: Royal VIVBuisman
Description:
Royal VIVBuisman is a family-owned business founded in 1868. We have a wealth of experience and history in trading and producing milk fat products. Having achieved our "Royal" denomination in 1968, and most importantly, maintained this status over the years, we pride ourselves in tradition and excellence. 

Royal VIVBuisman produces a full range of butter and milk fat products. To continue meeting the high market demands, we are dedicated to a customer-oriented approach. Royal VIVBuisman is one of the leading experts in churned butter, texturised butter, concentrated butter, Anhydrous Milk Fat (AMF), deodorised milk fat (white AMF), fractionated milk fat (low, middle and high melting fractions), milk fat preparations and butter blends.

Through the years we have built long-term relationships with our partners via strong cooperation and responding to each others needs. Thanks to our strong relationship with all our partners, our products are widely appreciated and valued in more than 50 countries all over the world.

Name: T. C. Jacoby & Company, Inc.
Description: T. C. Jacoby & Co. is a third-generation family-owned business and one of North America's premier dairy product trading companies.  We specialize in the physical trading of all dairy commodities including fluid milk, cream, liquid milk protein concentrate, butter and cheese, and whey and milk powders including non-fat dry milk and skim milk powder.

Name: Mona Dairy
Description: A new generation of sustainable and ethical cheese production for the 21st century. Built on the principles of integrity, innovation and quality, at Mona Dairy doing the right thing for people and the planet is our goal so sustainability is at the heart of every process from farm to fork.

Name: VITADAIRY - Công Ty Cổ Phần Sữa VitaDairy Việt Nam
Description:
***Vị Thế Công Ty Số 1 Sữa Non Trong Hành Trình Vun Bồi Sức Sống
Chỉ trong 3 năm (2017-2020), VitaDairy đã nâng tổng doanh thu của mình lên gấp ba và trở thành một trong những doanh nghiệp sữa có tiếng tại Việt nam. Đặc biệt, VitaDairy đã trở thành “người tiên phong” trong phân khúc Dinh dưỡng miễn dịch, nghiên cứu, khai thác và biến phân khúc này trở thành một nhóm dinh dưỡng phù hợp với trẻ em sống trong vùng khí hậu nhiệt đới gió mùa nhiều nhiễm virus, vi khuẩn như Việt Nam. Nhờ thành quả này cùng với việc phối hợp tuyên truyền về dinh dưỡng miễn dịch và vai trò của kháng thể IgG với sức khỏe của trẻ, năm 2019, VitaDairy đã được Bộ Y tế lựa chọn là đối tác duy nhất đồng hành trong năm Hành động tăng cường miễn dịch. Đây là bước đà giúp cho VitaDairy trở thành công ty số 1 về ứng dụng sữa non tại Việt Nam.
Điển hình cho phân khúc dinh dưỡng miễn dịch là ColosBaby - dòng sản phẩm ứng dụng sữa non trong sữa công thức với nguồn nguyên liệu sữa non ColosIgG 24h nhập khẩu từ Tập đoàn PantheryX (Mỹ) - Nhà cung cấp nguyên liệu sữa non hàng đầu thế giới. Vì uy tín, vì những ứng dụng khoa học và sáng tạo trong sản phẩm, VitaDairy đã trở thành đối tác chiến lược và độc quyền sử dụng nguyên liệu sữa non ColosIgG 24h của tập đoàn này.
-----------------
Không ngừng phát triển và phát triển một cách bền vững - những thành quả có được kể trên là nhờ những giá trị cốt lõi mà VitaDairy lựa chọn trong triết lý kinh doanh của mình: KHOA HỌC trong dinh dưỡng, SÁNG TẠO trong sản phẩm, và TỬ TẾ trong cách ứng xử với nhân viên và đối tác.

-----------------
Với TẦM NHÌN chiến lược vươn tới vị trí “Công ty số 1 về sữa non tại Việt Nam” và SỨ MỆNH chăm sóc dinh dưỡng cho người Việt, VitaDairy cam kết nỗ lực không ngừng để mang đến nguồn dinh dưỡng tốt nhất, chăm sóc sức khỏe cho mọi gia đình.

Name: Karnataka Cooperative Milk Producers Federation Limited(KMF)
Description: Karnataka Cooperative Milk Producers' Federation Limited (KMF) is the Apex Body for the dairy co-operative movement  in Karnataka. It is the second largest dairy co-operative amongst the dairy cooperatives in the country. In South India it stands first in terms of procurement as well as sales. One of the core functions of the Federation is marketing of Milk and Milk Products. The Brand "Nandini" is the household name for Pure and Fresh milk and milk products. KMF has 16 Milk Unions covering all the districts of  the State which procure milk from Primary Dairy Cooperative Societies(DCS) and distribute milk to the consumers in various Towns/Cities/Rural markets in Karnataka.

Name: Fountain Food and Beverages Ltd. & Dairy Fountain Inc.
Description:
Fountain Food and Beverages Ltd. is passionate about providing one on one service and supplying the very best of dairy products, for the food service and retail industries. Established in 2009, Fountain Food and Beverages Ltd. has expanded into one of  North America’s leading ethnic dairy supplier.
Our prime location is in Toronto – the heart of Canada’s food province, which has helped us forge strong relationships with some of North America’s major suppliers and given us access to a wide range of quality products at competitive prices.
Fountain Food and Beverages Ltd.  has maintained it’s image of providing our clients with superior grade, high-quality products that are created for international market place.
We work in close partnership with Canadian and international manufacturers, marketers and distributors, developing product solutions that ultimately provide us with a wide-ranging portfolio and the capacity to secure consistent supply and competitive pricing.
Our team is well qualified in food technology, management, logistics and international trade. Our commitment to customer service excellence is what enables us  to succeed in this competitive global market.

Name: PROLACSA
Description:
PRODUCTOS LÁCTEOS SAN ANTONIO, S.A. (PROLACSA), con más de 40 años en el mercado nacional, es líder en la producción de quesos frescos, madurados y procesados. Operando desde nuestra planta ubicada en Hato San Antonio, El Roble, Coclé, procesamos anualmente más de 20 millones de litros de leche proveniente de más de 300 productores locales; consolidándonos como un pilar en el desarrollo del sector productor de leche a nivel nacional. 
PROLACSA continúa comprometida en utilizar su experiencia en la producción e industrialización de lácteos para el desarrollo de productos de alta calidad a precios accesibles al consumidor, utilizando para dicho fin nuestros principios empresariales de Creatividad, Calidad Total, Mejoramiento Continuo, Ética y Solidaridad.

Name: Mooz Formaggio - Wellness Foods
Description:
We at Mooz manufacture, Fresh Cheese, also commonly known as soft Cheese. Our cheese is hand crafted, from milk directly procured from farmers. Our team consists of a 4th generation Italian cheese maker who developes and creates our authentic cheese recipes, hence our products have authentic Italian taste.

We have our presence in 16 cities all over India with strong relations with Dairy cooperative societies. Together, we share a strong vision of sustainable Growth that paves our path as we create the healthy future of dairy. 
For us, this means pivoting the agenda for a pure and responsible dairy industry. We relentlessly work on the farms, dairies and in our facility to improve our work in these areas. We hold hands with our customers, employees, suppliers, NGO’s who help us nurture our business . 

Our consumers benefit from our stringent quality norms and innovative approach. We have our presence in the most well renowned stores in India like Godrej Nature's Basket, Food Hall, Spencer's, Le Marche and Modern Bazaar.

https://www.bigbasket.com/pb/mooz/international-cheese/

Name: Latec Ingredientes
Description: A Latec é distribuidora dos ingredientes Novonesis em vários estados Brasileiros (SP, AC, AM, RR, SE, AL, PE, PB, RN, CE, MA e PI), nossa motivação é levar inovação, qualidade e rentabilidade para a indústria de laticínios.

Name: Treur Kaas
Description:
Treur Kaas is de groothandel voor binnenlandse en buitenlandse kaasspecialiteiten. Met ruim 55 jaar ervaring is Treur specialist in het rijpen en verzorgen van kaas. Dit gebeurt in ons eigen geconditioneerde kaaspakhuis, waar een constante temperatuur en luchtvochtigheid heerst. Onze exclusieve kaasmerken bieden u als kaasspecialist een onderscheidend vermogen ten opzichte van concurrenten. Wij leveren alleen de beste kwaliteitskaas met de puurste smaak. Een pure kaasbeleving dus!

Missie
Treur is een familiebedrijf die de kaaswereld wil voorzien van een renderend concept van premium kaasmerken met een pure kaasbeleving. Onze kleinschaligheid, gedrevenheid en klant- en servicegerichtheid maken dat wij de kwaliteit leveren waar u op kan bouwen.

Visie 
Gedreven door passie, kennis en expertise wil Treur een onderscheidende positie innemen in de wereld van “kaasbeleving” en premium merken in zowel binnen als buitenland. Op een eerlijke en betrouwbare willen we zaken doen en bouwen aan een duurzame relatie. Daarbij putten we kracht uit ons familiebedrijf zodat we met onze persoonlijke begeleiding uiterst precies waarnemen welke behoeften onze klant heeft en waar de ontwikkelingen in de markt zijn, om vervolgens deze behoeften te kunnen voorzien met nieuwe kaasbeleving concepten.

Name: Senara GmbH
Description: We aim to secure the future of tasty, high-quality, and well-tolerated animal milk, ensuring dairy products remain accessible for all.

Name: Dairyworks
Description:
Established in 2001 Dairyworks is a company built on the values and innovation that have made New Zealand a world leader in dairy production.

Dairyworks source high quality, bulk cheese and butter from local South Island suppliers and transform it into added-value consumer products for an ever increasing clientele throughout New Zealand and Australia.

In addition we produce our own cheese and butter brands, Alpine, Rolling Meadow and Dairyworks.  We’ve also developed markets for the by-products of our block cheese packaging process.  For example our grated cheeses and powdered parmesan are in demand from bakeries, restaurants and food producers around New Zealand.

Dairyworks takes pride in achieving the high standards demanded by food industry authorities, our retail clients and their customers.  Our high production values and commitment to safe, hygienic and efficient work practices throughout every aspect of our operation enables Dairyworks to deliver a quality product to our clients at a competitive price, every time.  

We also understand that the highly competitive retail world demands reliability of supply.  To ensure that those supply demands are consistently met, Dairyworks has invested heavily in plant, technology and human expertise.

Our business principle is a simple one that has formed the backbone of retailing since shopping began: source a high quality raw material, package it and supply it to market efficiently, cost-effectively and reliably.

Name: FutureCow
Description: We are a technology driven manufacturer of dairy equipment. Our focus is to provide a better alternative to traditional dairy farming methods that are cost effective and offer superior results. By implementing FutureCow products you can improve performance while producing a happier, healthier, more productive animal.  Our state-of-the-art equipment has been proven to reduce SCC, Mastitis, and milking time while improving production, worker morale, and animal comfort.

Name: Happy Beverages and Foods Pvt Ltd
Description: Happy Beverages and Foods Pvt Ltd. incorporated in Nov 2014 and launched its first brand - woohoo: doodh made by happy cows, in May 2015. The woohoo team works with farmers on nature-aligned practices to build pure, unadulterated milk. In order to maintain quality standards, we also process the milk, package and home deliver it to our consumers within 24 hrs of milking. We are the first in India to launch milk in eco-friendly, paper based pack - Gable top/milk carton in India. Our goal? To make everyone that will make the good stuff in our glass as happy as us. And we do mean EVERYONE —the cows, the farmers who tend to them, the green pastures, our consumers and our team!

Name: Saras Jaipur Dairy
Description: Jaipur Zila Dugdh Utpadak Sahakari Sangh Ltd. popularly known as Jaipur Dairy was formed in year 1975 under Cooperative Act 1965 to undertake dairy activities for Jaipur District.

Name: Samooh - Faisla Mera Hain
Description: Experience the purest dairy products from Sudhamrit - a leading dairy manufacturer based in India. Our commitment to quality and sustainability starts from our happy cows to our state-of-the-art production facilities. Discover our range of fresh and wholesome dairy products that contribute to your health and well-being.

Name: Buisman
Description:
Welcome to Buisman - We Take As Much Care As You Do 

At Buisman, we're dedicated to providing top-quality food production, storage, and transportation solutions that meet the ever-evolving needs of the food industry. With a rich legacy spanning decades, we have perfected the art of creating innovative, sustainable and high-quality products for both local and international markets.

Our commitment to excellence drives us to constantly anticipate industry trends, adapt to changing regulations and exceed the expectations of our partners. From our state-of-the-art facilities to our dedicated team, every aspect of Buisman is geared towards delivering excellence.

We specialize in a range of services, including manufacturing products such as (premium) dairy powders and powders from vegetable origin, efficient storage and logistics solutions, and fostering product innovation that keeps us at the forefront of the industry.

Join us on this journey as we continue to reshape the landscape of the food sector with cutting-edge solutions and a steadfast dedication to sustainability and quality. Connect with us to stay updated on the latest industry insights, innovations and company updates.

Together, let's create a world where quality, sustainability and innovation are the cornerstones of the food industry. 

Take care.

Name: Callestick Farm Ice Cream
Description: We have been making ice cream at Callestick Farm since 1989 always using the finest fruits & confectionery and local Cornish cream to create flavour upon flavour of beautiful ice cream. We have a range of 35+ ice creams made using only fresh milk all from our own herd of 380+ Jersey X Friesian cows that graze on our 1,000 acres of farm land in the heart of Cornwall. Our dairy free, fresh water sorbets are also made on the farm using water from our farms own natural spring. Our philosophy is simple, a balanced diet is an ice cream in each hand!

Name: GRUPO MAULEC
Description:
Somos una empresa 100% mexicana y orgullosamente poblana, con más de 50 años de experiencia en la producción de leche de vaca de la más alta calidad.
Como parte de Grupo Maulec, la maquiladora de leche más grande del país, nuestra producción se realiza en una moderna planta que implementa las últimas tecnologías y los estándares más altos de higiene y calidad, con una impresionante capacidad de envasado de 1.3 millones de litros de leche diarios.
Gracias a esa visión y empeño, hoy Tamariz es reconocida como una empresa pionera y experta en la producción, y ultra pasteurización de leche en México.

Name: Latco
Description: Há mais de 40 anos, a Latco busca constantemente desenvolver produtos de qualidade, investindo no desenvolvimento de novas tecnologias e no aperfeiçoamento dos processos de produção. A história de sucesso da Latco começou em 1966, na cidade de Cruzeiro do Oeste, Paraná. Foi lá que a empresa iniciou suas atividades produzindo manteiga e caseína. Desde então, frequenta diariamente a casa da família brasileira.

Name: Northeast Dairy Foods & Suppliers Associations
Description: Northeast Dairy Foods Association, Inc. was established in 1928. Northeast Dairy Foods Association is a full service trade association with members in New York, New Jersey and New England. Our members include milk processors, distributors, cheese manufacturers, ice cream plants and dairy farm producers.

Name: Naturasi Inc.
Description:
Naturasì Inc. is a company based in Cavite, born to supply the demand of the local market for Mozzarella cheese and other dairy products. Its founders are Filipino and Italian partners with the same vision and passion for dairy products, and in particular for fresh and healthy mozzarella.

Equipped with structures and machinery for the production and modern making of Mozzarella, our mission is to provide the best experience to customers in terms of quality and volumes.
With the touch of the ancient hand-made tradition, typical of the Italian culture, mixed with modern technology, certified and guaranteed, we want to bring a healthy and delicious Mozzarella to all Filipino families.
With the experience and knowledge of the local market, we aim to develop a best practice in manufacturing Philippine-made cheese for Filipinos.
We develop our products to guarantee the quality and the natural property that makes Mozzarella an excellent fresh, healthy, tasty dietary product, popular all over the world.

Name: KOLIOS S.A. | Greek Dairy
Description:
In KOLIOS S.A.  we specialise in the production of premium quality dairy products with an exports network covering over 50 countries across five continents.

KOLIOS’ first factory used the most advanced technology and know-how of the time. Since then we constantly invest and innovate in the production methods and technology we use. Between 1980 and 2000 we increased our output twentyfold and as a result in 2002 our new factory started operating.

We strive to keep our quality standards high and our production is strictly regulated. In 1983 we launched the first packaged cheese to the Greek market and we have been awarded renowned certificates including the ISO 22000, BRC and IFS for our quality management system. Our milk suppliers are handpicked from Northern Greece to guarantee freshness and a clear environmental conscience in our produce. 

Today we are the biggest exporters of FETA CHEESE P.D.O., our specialty. It has received numerous prizes for its original taste and quality, including the internationally recognized “Product of the Year”, “International Cheese Award” and “World Cheese Award”.  

Outside our Feta Cheese exports we also have a strong presence in the yogurt market, with a wide range of products. These now come under our own brand-name and numerous private labels for both the domestic and international market.

Through our extensive exports network we aspire to make it possible for the world to enjoy and benefit from the Greek and Mediterranean food culture.

Name: TINE Ireland Ltd
Description:
TINE is one of Norway's biggest food product companies with an operating revenue of 23,8 Billion NOK in 2019 and a full-scale supplier of well-known dairy product brands. The Jarlsberg cheese product is currently TINE's largest export product with US, Australia, Canada and UK being the main markets.

TINE Ireland is currently producing Jarlsberg cheese in our brand new factory in Mogeely, Co. Cork.
TINE is one of Norway's biggest food product companies with an operating revenue of 22,5 Billion NOK in 2016 and a full-scale supplier of well-known dairy product brands. The Jarlsberg cheese product is currently TINE's largest export product with US, Australia, Canada and UK being the main markets.

Name: Emmi Bettine
Description:
Sinds 2025 is Emmi Bettine B.V. de nieuwe naam voor de samengevoegde krachten van Bettinehoeve en Emmi Benelux. Als onderdeel van de Zwitserse Emmi Group verenigen we sterke internationale met lokale zuivelmerken.

Onder Emmi Bettine vallen zowel iconische Zwitserse merken als Emmi CAFFÈ LATTE, Kaltbach, Emmi Fondü, Raclette en diverse AOP-kazen, als het Nederlandse merk Bettine – dé specialist in geitenkaas met een eigen productielocatie in Etten-Leur.

We staan voor kwaliteit en smaak in de zuivel. Of het nu gaat om een verfrissende ijskoffie voor onderweg, een rijke kaasplank of een ambachtelijke geitenkaas voor op tafel – wij brengen bijzondere zuivelmomenten naar de consument.

Met een betrokken team bouwen we aan groei in de Benelux en Scandinavische markt en zetten we de toon in de categorie met sterke merken en relevante innovaties.

Name: ALIMA MILK
Description:
ALIMA MILK | Excellence in Milk Powders Production
 For over 25 years, ALIMA MILK has been synonymous with high-quality milk and whey powders. Our journey began and continues in Złotów and Góra, where our three advanced manufacturing facilities transform Polish whey concentrate into products that are celebrated both domestically and internationally.

 Innovation & Quality: At the heart of our operations, modern technology and deep expertise in milk processing technology enable us to maintain the highest standards of quality. Each batch of our milk powders not only meets but exceeds industry expectations with its excellent properties and parameters.

 Global Reach with Local Roots: We are proud to blend local heritage with global presence. Holding crucial international certifications, including HALAL, ALIMA MILK's products have a far-reaching impact across diverse markets, catering to a wide range of industries from food production to agriculture.

 Natural Nutrition: Our milk blends and whey powder is more than just an ingredient; it's a source of natural protein, vital for food industries, and agriculture. Rich in proteins, lactose, and calcium, our whey powder ensures quality and nutrition in every use.

 Connect with us to discover how our tradition of excellence can enhance your products. We are committed to innovation, quality, and your success.

Name: Australian Dairy Farmers
Description: Australian Dairy Farmers (ADF) is the national advocacy body representing dairy farmers across the six dairying states. Our mission is to improve the profitability and sustainability of dairy farmers in Australia.

Name: GippsDairy
Description: GippsDairy is the regional service arm of Dairy Australia. It was established in 1996 under the Dairy Research and Development Corporation’s (now Dairy Australia) regional development program. Its role is to invest in research, development and extension projects that bring benefit to the dairy industry of Gippsland

Name: Dairy One Cooperative, Inc.
Description: Dairy One exists to help farms succeed. We do this by measuring components on the farm, from cow and crop production, to feed, soil and water analysis. Measuring the right things provides the critical information necessary to make informed decisions. We measure it so you can manage it.

Name: Casearia Cioffi SpA
Description: Esperienza pluriennale nel settore caseario, ingredienti selezionati e certificati, moderni mezzi di produzione, tecniche produttive all'avanguardia e, sapienti mani di maestri casari che attingono alla tradizione per realizzare prodotti caseari genuini e buoni come quelli di una volta.

Name: ALIMA MILK AND WHEY POWDERS
Description:
ALIMA Group | Excellence in Whey Powder Production
 For over 20 years, ALIMA Group has been synonymous with high-quality whey and demineralised whey powders. Our journey began and continues in Złotów and Góra, where our three advanced manufacturing facilities transform Polish whey concentrate into products that are celebrated both domestically and internationally.

 Innovation & Quality: At the heart of our operations, modern technology and deep expertise in milk processing technology enable us to maintain the highest standards of quality. Each batch of our whey powder not only meets but exceeds industry expectations with its excellent properties and parameters.

 Global Reach with Local Roots: We are proud to blend local heritage with global presence.  Natural Nutrition: Our whey powder is more than just an ingredient; it's a source of natural protein, vital for food industries, and agriculture. Rich in proteins, lactose, and calcium, our whey powder ensures quality and nutrition in every use.

 Connect with us to discover how our tradition of excellence can enhance your products. We are committed to innovation, quality, and your success.

Name: CONAFE - Confederación de Asociaciones de Frisona Española
Description:
La Confederación de Asociaciones de Frisona Española (CONAFE) es una organización de ámbito nacional integrada por las asociaciones y federaciones de la raza frisona de las comunidades autónomas de España. Trabaja por la mejora y selección de esta raza y es responsable de la Gestión del Libro Genealógico, el Programa de Calificación Morfológica, las Evaluaciones Genéticas y el Control Lechero.

CONAFE también representa a la raza frisona española en eventos internacionales del sector y forma parte de organizaciones supranacionales como European Holstein and Red Holstein Federation (EHRC) y World Holstein Friesian Federation (WHFF). 

Entre otras actividades, CONAFE se ocupa de la formación de sus asociados y de otros ganaderos y técnicos relacionados con el sector de ganado frisón mediante la celebración de simposios y conferencias o la organización del Concurso Nacional y las escuelas de Jueces y Preparadores.

CONAFE nació como Confederación en 1990, pero tiene su origen como asociación de ganaderos en 1971, año en el que se constituyó la Asociación Nacional Frisona Española (ANFE). 

El órgano de difusión de CONAFE es la revista 'Frisona Española', dedicada al sector ganadero de vacuno de leche y publicada desde el año 1981 con periodicidad bimensual.

CONAFE es "Entidad Reconocida Oficial" para la gestión del Libro Genealógico según orden del Ministerio de Agricultura de 27 de Marzo de 1991. También ha sido declarada Organismo Oficialmente Reconocido por la Comisión Europea de Agricultura para la realización de las Evaluaciones Genéticas de los reproductores (machos y hembras) de la Raza Frisona (Documento VI-5096/97 Rev 2).

Name: Gläserne Molkerei GmbH
Description:
Wir sind die Gläserne Molkerei.

Die Gläserne Molkerei ist eine reine Bio-Molkerei. Wir leben Transparenz und lieben Regionalität – für kurze Wege, faire Preise und unverfälschten Bio-Genuss. Du findest uns und unsere Landwirte im Nord-Osten Deutschlands. Die Milch aus den umliegenden Regionen verarbeiten wir mit handwerklicher Expertise zu Trinkmilch, Butter, Joghurt, Buttermilch und naturgereiften Käse.

Vertrauensvolle Zusammenarbeit wird bei der Gläsernen Molkerei großgeschrieben. Regelmäßig werden die Landwirte auf Ihren Höfen besucht. Eine enge Zusammenarbeit ist für eine vertrauensvolle und langjährige Partnerschaft essenziell. Gemeinsam stellen wir höchste Anforderungen an uns selbst: zum Schutz der Natur, der Biodiversität und dem Tierwohl. Bei uns dürfen z.B. alle Kühe durchschnittlich 230 Tage im Jahr auf die Weide und sich auch im Stall jederzeit frei bewegen. Alle unsere Landwirte gehören zusätzlich zur Bio-Zertifizierung einem Bio-Anbauverband an (z.B. Demeter, Bioland, Naturland).

Gute Milch kommt nur von gesunden Kühen. Deshalb werden gute Gesundheitsparameter mit einem besonders hohen Milchpreis honoriert. Die Bio-Bauern der Gläsernen Molkerei lieben ihre Arbeit und ihre Kühe. Viele halten alte und vom Aussterben bedrohte Rinderrassen. Andere engagieren sich für horntragende Kühe oder für eine kuhgebundene Kälberaufzucht.  

Falls ihr in der Nähe unserer Standorte seid, schaut doch mal in unserem Hofladen vorbei und probiert die Produkte frisch vom Band. 

Sieh uns zu bei Youtube: https://www.youtube.com/@glasernemolkerei3045/videos

Deine Bio-Molkerei

Description:
Pienempi meijeri, suurempi sielu – savolaismeijeri liputtaa kestävämmän maidontuotannon puolesta 

Lue lehmien hyvinvoinnista ja Vapaa-tuotteista: maitomaa.fi/vastuullisuus

Name: Pravarsha Dairy
Description: Pravarsha Agro Industries as a progressive corporate citizen understands the enormous significance for the Agro sector aligned with industrial development. Leveraging the strength of superior product offerings, Pravarsha Agro has strategized its forays into consumer market, with the aim to be the market leaders earning respect and revenue for the stakeholders.

Name: CRIEL Alpes Massif Central
Description:
Véritable outil nécessaire à la dynamique de la production et de la transformation des produits laitiers et fromagers, Le CRIEL, Centre Régional Interprofessionnel de l'Economie Laitière Alpes Massif Central est une plate-forme essentielle.

Name: Newfoundland and Labrador Dairy Co-operative
Description:
NL Dairy Co-op is the only 100% locally owned and operated fluid milk processor in the province.

Founded and owned by 19 local dairy farmers across the province, and operated by a team right here in Newfoundland and Labrador, we’re committed to delivering the quality products businesses and local families depend on., including 100% local milk.

Name: AI Total BV
Description:
AI Total is an young, dynamic delivering world class bovine genetics worldwide. AI Total was founded in 2010 and is the proud owner of bulls like Vendairy Wonder, Hood MOM Emmett and many more. The bulls are housed in the Netherlands, Czech Republic, United Kingdom and Spain. AI Total has offices located in Zwolle, the Netherlands and Hudson, WI, USA. 

AI Total is exporting to countries on all continents of the globe. AI Total is striving to offer the complete package of dairy genetics to distributors around the globe. Partnerships with other industry partners is a key element in the strategy of AI Total. AI Total is owned by Albada Beheer B.V. (also owner of KI Service Zuid West Friesland B.V.) and Genetics Consolidated (also owner of Diamond Genetics, AMS Genetics. Eurogenes, Holsteinplaza and Holstein Select).

If you want to learn more about AI Total are if you are interested in working with AI Total please visit our website: www.ai-total.com or contact our office.

AI Total

8042 PZ Zwolle
The Netherlands

Name: DairyBest
Description:
At Dairybest, we are committed to providing the finest and freshest dairy products to our customers. With years of experience and a passion for quality, we take pride in delivering a wide range of high-quality dairy items that elevate every meal. Whether it’s milk, curd, butter, or cheese, our products are sourced from trusted farms and produced with the highest standards of care and hygiene.

Our Vision:
To be a leading provider of premium dairy products that enrich the lives of our consumers while ensuring sustainability, integrity, and innovation in every step of our process.

Our Commitment:

Freshness Guaranteed: We ensure that every product that leaves our facility is fresh, nutritious, and ready to be enjoyed.
Quality: We use the finest ingredients and state-of-the-art production techniques to guarantee the best quality in every pack.
Customer Focus: We are dedicated to meeting the needs of our customers and providing products that bring health and taste together.

Discover more about our products and join the Dairybest family to experience dairy like never before!

Name: rora dairy
Description:
Our yogurt is made right here on our farm. We only use non-homogenised milk direct from the dairy on the day of production. This means we can set to work straight away creating our delicious yogurt. And, because the milk is pasteurised, it’s safe for everyone to enjoy. The only thing we add is a touch of skimmed-milk powder, to give it some extra thickness, and live culture which helps turn the milk into yogurt.

Yogurt is a very sensitive product. That’s why every batch is made with painstaking care and tenderness to deliver the same consistent, delicious and creamy product time and time again.

Name: Echiré
Description:
La marque Echiré a vu le jour en 1894, quand un groupe de producteurs installés à proximité du Marais Poitevin, en Deux-Sèvres, fonda la Laiterie Coopérative d’Echiré.
Synonyme de qualité et d'excellence, les produits Échiré sont plébiscités par les Chefs et les gourmets pour leur texture et leur goût uniques, résultats de notre savoir-faire ancestral.
Le beurre Echiré, labellisé AOP Beurre Charentes-Poitou, est  le seul beurre fabriqué en baratte tonneau depuis 130 ans. Reconnu internationalement pour sa qualité, son goût aux notes de noisette et sa texture très malléable, il a reçu le prix de l’Excellence française en 2015 .
Le lait Echiré, au goût franc de lait et à la texture onctueuse est l’expression de la qualité du lait de nos producteurs. 
Distribués à travers le monde, dans plus de 40 pays, nos produits d’exception sont choisis par les plus grandes tables et hôtels de prestige , qui les font découvrir à leur clientèle au travers de leurs recettes ou en les proposant à la dégustation à leurs tables. Les produits Echiré sont aussi disponibles en crèmeries, épiceries fines et dans les boutiques - concepts à Echiré et à Tokyo.
La marque Echiré appartient à la Laiterie Terre de Sèvre.

Name: KC Dairy
Description:
The Company has been exploiting the potential of Hygienic and High Quality KC Milk & KC+ Milk Products to the society. The initial period, a diminutive quantity of cow Milk procured around the villages and sold the raw Milk to various places of the district. now we are producing more than one lakhs litres per day.  Currently, we have the capability to produce a wide range of Milk & Milk products, like Paneer, Dairy whitener, Skim Milk Powder, Butter, Ghee, Fermented products. The capacity expansion was necessitated with the goal of providing superlative quality of all the products, particularly in the Packaged Milk categories like KC+ Toned Milk, KC+ Standardised Milk and KC+ Full Cream Milk and for future product innovations

* 2 DECADES OF EXPERIENCE IN DAIRY PRODUCTS
* BEST QUALITY OF DAIRY PRODUCTS
* 32 QUALITY CHECKS BEFORE IT REACHES THE CONSUMER

Name: Dairy Records Management Systems
Description: Providing superior dairy management information systems to our customers is our mission statement, our business and our passion.

Name: Star Blends
Description: Star Blends is a modern, feed manufacturing facility specializing in custom feeds for dairy producers. Located in Sparta, WI and Chippewa Falls. Star Blends serves Central, Western, and Southwestern Wisconsin as well as Southeast Minnesota and Northeast Iowa.

Name: Nutura Organic
Description:
At Nutura Organic, our mission is to provide premium quality formulas manufactured to the highest possible standards. That’s why we don’t just conform to Australian food manufacturing requirements; we exceed them.

Nutura Organic is our most advanced formulation and contains a blend of scientifically researched ingredients designed to give your child the nourishment they need during their time of rapid growth and development.

As well as being Australian owned, Nutura Organic is made from Australian dairy and is manufactured right here in Gippsland, Victoria. All ingredients that enter our facility are sent away for independent testing prior to use. This is to protect the integrity and consistency of Nutura Organic products even before they are made. We send the finished product away for a full independent testing prior to release (not required under current Australian standards) and have a stringent quality assurance process to ensure that all of our suppliers conform to our own unique high manufacturing standards.

Our highly trained team of expert nutritionists, dieticians, food technologists and quality assurance specialists are committed to producing quality products to the highest possible manufacturing practices and standards.

Name: Caseificio LA BELLA CONTADINA
Description: La Contadina è uno dei maggiori produttori italiani di Mozzarella di Bufala Campana DOP, producendo circa 6.000 tonnellate di prodotto finito all’anno. La struttura aziendale si estende su una superficie di oltre 20.000 mq di cui 10.000 mq coperti, ed e in continua espansione, sia territoriale che tecnologica. Siamo certificati BRC – IFS. Esportiamo in oltre 40 paesi in tutto il mondo, sia prodotti freschi che surgelati. Name: Lucknow Cleaning Services
Description:
Lucknow Ice Cream: A Taste of Heritage in Every Scoop

Company Description:

Welcome to Lucknow Ice Cream, where the rich flavors of Lucknow's culinary traditions meet the indulgence of premium ice cream. Established with a deep appreciation for the city’s vibrant culture and gastronomic heritage, our brand is dedicated to delivering a unique ice cream experience that captures the essence of this historical gem. Each scoop from Lucknow Ice Cream is a celebration of authentic flavors, crafted with passion and precision to bring you the finest taste of tradition.

Our Journey:

Lucknow, known for its opulent palaces, poetic charm, and exquisite cuisine, inspires everything we do. Our journey began in the heart of this illustrious city, driven by a vision to blend the timeless elegance of Lucknowi desserts with the universally beloved delight of ice cream. We take pride in our roots and strive to share the city's culinary treasures with the world through our meticulously crafted ice creams.

Our Offerings:

At Lucknow Ice Cream, we offer a delightful array of flavors that honor both the classic and contemporary tastes of our customers. Our menu features a harmonious blend of traditional recipes and innovative creations, each meticulously developed to ensure an unparalleled ice cream experience. Signature flavors include:

Royal Kesar Pista: Embodying the luxurious flavors of saffron and pistachios, reminiscent of the Nawabi delicacies.
Mango Mastani: Celebrating the luscious sweetness of Lucknow's renowned mangoes, this flavor is a summer favorite.
Malai Kulfi: A creamy, rich tribute to the traditional Indian kulfi, evoking the essence of local street vendors.
Awadhi Rose: Infused with the subtle fragrance of rose petals, this flavor pays homage to Lucknow’s beautiful gardens.
Each flavor is crafted using the highest quality ingredients, from fresh dairy to ripe fruits and premium nuts, ensuring every bite is as authentic and delicious as possible.

Name: ROCCA TOSCANA FORMAGGI S.R.L.
Description:
Rocca Toscana Formaggi: un armonioso connubio tra tradizione e innovazione. 
Il progetto imprenditoriale di Rocca Toscana Formaggi nasce nel 2015 dall’esperienza della famiglia Canti che opera nel settore caseario dal 1956 e, nel tempo, è riuscita a maturare una spiccata specializzazione nella selezione, stagionatura e affinatura dei pecorini. Il progetto fa affidamento sull’arte del “fare il formaggio” custodita dal caseificio di Roccastrada ed è animato dall’obiettivo di produrre pecorini e caprini di eccellenza, attraverso il controllo diretto di ogni dettaglio della produzione, dalla scelta del latte alla distribuzione.

Name: SAVIOLA S.P.A.
Description:
SAVIOLA Spa venne fondata nel 1897 e vanta oltre 120 anni di esperienza nella produzione di Grana Padano e di Parmigiano Reggiano. L’azienda utilizza da sempre i migliori ingredienti disponibili ed una tecnologia all’avanguardia per garantire un alto standard qualitativo ai clienti, personalizzando il più possibile il prodotto in base alle loro richieste. La ditta si è sempre distinta prestando molta attenzione alle evoluzioni della domanda.
Restando sempre fedele alla storia e alla valorizzazione dei formaggi stagionati tipici della tradizione casearia italiana, Saviola si avvale di diversi stabilimenti produttivi sia nella zona di produzione del Grana Padano che in quella del Parmigiano Reggiano. 
Per quanto riguarda il Grana Padano, il sito di San Giovanni in Croce (CR), sede della direzione generale, rappresenta l’unità produttiva principale: qui troviamo infatti sia il caseificio che lo stabilimento di confezionamento, diviso in due parti: il primo in cui il formaggio viene tagliato e porzionato, ed il secondo dedicato al confezionamento di grattugiati e bocconcini.
Saviola è presente anche a Fiorenzuola d’Arda (PC) con un altro caseificio abilitato alla produzione di GRANA PADANO. A Parma siamo invece presenti con due unità produttive nelle quali avviene la produzione e la lavorazione di Parmigiano Reggiano.
L’internazionalizzazione è un altro importante traguardo raggiunto, Saviola Spa opera infatti su tutti i mercati europei e internazionali.

Unsere Leidenschaft gilt der traditionellen Käseherstellung, insbesondere Tête de Moine, Gruyère, L'Horloger, Mont-Soleil sowie weiteren regionalen Spezialitätenkäsen. Mit Produktionsstätten in Saint-Imier und Sonvilier bewahren wir die überlieferten Verfahren und das wertvolle Fachwissen, um Käse von höchster Qualität und unverkennbarem Charakter zu schaffen. Qualität und Liebe zum Detail stehen bei uns im Mittelpunkt. Entdecken Sie das Beste aus dem Schweizer Jura und erleben Sie unvergessliche Geschmackserlebnisse.

      Desde 2012, ano inicial de nossa participação no Concurso Nacional de Produtos Lácteos, nossos queijos vêm sendo premiados:
      Em 2012 e em 2015 o queijo Minas Padrão foi eleito como o terceiro melhor queijo em todo o território nacional. 
      Em 2013 foi a vez do queijo tipo Reino ser eleito o segundo melhor queijo nesta categoria.
       E em 2015 a Manteiga de Primeira Qualidade atingiu o posto de terceira melhor manteiga do país, subindo para o segundo lugar no ano de 2017!!
      2016 foi o ano em que nosso provolone brilhou! Ele foi eleito como o melhor queijo provolone do país, tendo alcançado o primeiro lugar!!
       O Concurso Nacional de Produtos Lácteos é realizado todos os anos pelo Instituto Cândido Tostes e pela EPAMIG em Juiz de Fora - MG.

Description:
At SKVL Farm, we ensure our Desi Gir A2 cows thrive in a compassionate and nurturing environment, where they have the freedom to graze on nothing but organic grass and receive care throughout their entire lives, regardless of their milk-producing capability. Our dedication to offering 100% organic, fresh products stems from a deep-seated belief in achieving wellness by aligning with the natural rhythms of the earth. Through the application of age-old Ayurvedic principles, we strive to offer sustainable answers to today's health concerns, prioritizing prevention and the holistic well-being of our community.

Our products, from Gir A2 cow milk to Vedic-inspired foods, are crafted following age-old recipes and methods, ensuring they meet your body unique needs. We're dedicated to rural development, women empowerment, and fostering a community that values knowledge sharing and holistic health.

Our Farm Benefits:

Free Grazing Cows: Our cows enjoy a natural habitat, grazing freely on organic pastures.

Lifelong Care: Every cow stays at our farm for their entire life, reflecting our commitment to cruelty-free farming.

Support for Organic Farming: We advocate for and practice organic farming, contributing to a healthier planet and populace.

Our dedication goes far beyond merely creating premium food products. We are focused on enhancing food quality and driving the evolution of knowledge for the next generation of food and health services. By nurturing a culture of collaboration and exchange, we actively promote the sharing of insights and learning within our community, fostering an environment where ideas flourish and collective growth is encouraged

At SKVL-Organic we are not just a farm; we are a movement towards a healthier, more sustainable future, grounded in the wisdom of Ayurveda and the richness of nature. Join us on this journey to health and harmony.

Name: Fattoria della Piana
Description:
Alla Fattoria della Piana non ci limitiamo a coltivare la terra, ma coltiviamo un futuro migliore. 

Con oltre 90 anni di storia e quasi 300 ettari di terre coltivate con dedizione, siamo il fiore all’occhiello dell’agricoltura sostenibile del Sud Italia.

La nostra missione è rivoluzionare l'agricoltura tradizionale con l'innovazione e la sostenibilità come pilastri fondamentali, consapevoli che il futuro dell'agricoltura risiede in pratiche che rispettano l’ambiente, valorizzano le persone e promuovono una gestione etica delle risorse. 

Ogni giorno ci impegniamo a curare un delicato sistema agricolo circolare, proteggendo e rigenerando il territorio che coltiviamo, utilizzando energie rinnovabili che produciamo con i nostri sottoprodotti e implementando processi che riducono le emissioni di CO2 e preservano le risorse naturali.

Questi sforzi si riflettono in tutti i nostri formaggi, premiati ed esportati in tutto il mondo, che uniscono la tradizione casearia artigianale all’innovazione ed il rispetto per l’ambiente.

Name: Suomisen Maito Oy - Home of Jymy Ice Cream
Description:
Just a cows gallop away from the dairy-farm, in the village of Aura, we found suitable premises for our new organic ice cream company. An old candy-factory nearby, where the famous Finnish Sisu – candies once were made, is now the home of JYMY, possibly the best Finnish ice cream.  

The most genuine ice cream comes from the organic milk, that is brought to us on the morning, freshly milked, from cows gallop away, from the Suominen´s dairy-farm. In our small ice cream factory it meets the wild and pure berries, roasted coffee-beans, dark chocolate, vanilla – all of entirely organic origin, too.
Flavors created with passion are then frozen to be the fresh, delicious Finnish JYMY ice cream.

Our philosophy on milk and berries is based on fresh and local organic production, delightfully combined with a variety of internationally acquired flavor-ingredients, also grown organically, chosen with care and devotion. All ingredients are fulfilling our ambitious organic and additive-free standards.

The cows at the dairy farm, that give us their fresh milk, are fed only with GMO, fertilizer and pesticide free food, grown at own meadows. The way we choose and prepare our ingredients, influences directly to the taste and structure of the ice cream. That unique way of production makes Jymy Ice Cream so delicious.

The dairies produce Blue Cheese, Havarti, Danbo, Samsoe, White/Salad Cheese and Combi White Cheese (vegetable fat based Salad Cheese). Through our extensive network we co-operate with dairy plants all across EU. As far as products manufactured outside the European Union are concerned, we are also capable of offering products produced in North America, South America or Oceania. Mozzarella, Cheddar and Cream Cheese are among the most popular cheeses produced in the United States for example.

At Mammen Cheese we pride ourselves on delivering the highest quality cheese, at the most competitive costs, by utilizing the most efficient supply chain. Since the beginning we have expanded our knowledge and background in the dairy business, with extensive knowledge about products, markets, legislations, trends etc.

Name: Dogruluk Dairy Products
Description:
Dogruluk established in 1969 and first started to operate in İstanbul Eminonu Kantarcilar Yeni Kozluca Han, then moved to the temporary food wholesalers site in Rami in 1986. With the investment we made in 1993, we established our dairy factory in Çanakkale Ezine and started packaging our products in 2001 at Istanbul to put on the taste of our natural ezine cheese to the market. We continue to grow rapidly with our investments.

We produce cow, sheep and goat cheeses with natural milk obtained from animals fed with unique plant cover of Ida Mountains. In production, only use our fresh milk, salt and rennet without adding any other additives or preservatives and we pack them in hygienic conditions.

Name: Gad Dairy
Description:
About a hundred years ago, Ezra Cohen and his wife Levana would milk their only cow in eastern Turkey, heat the milk on a Primus stove, add yogurt, and begin the cheese-making process. They wrapped the cheese in thin cloth, hung it in the yard, then transferred it with salt to wooden barrels to develop its flavors, much like wine. The cheese was ready when Ezra decided.

A few years later, the Cohen family immigrated to Israel, joined the Jewish community in Gaza, and continued their cheese-making traditions. The milk from their cattle and sheep went through the same process, waiting in wooden barrels for Ezra's approval.

In the 1930s, the family moved to central Israel, expanding their cheese selection with more Balkan varieties, selling them at their family store "Cohen Dairy" in Tel Aviv's Levinsky Market. In the 1960s, Ezra's son, David, established another dairy specializing in Balkan cheeses, passing down the cheese-making secrets through generations.

Ezra Gad Cohen, named after his grandfather, started in the cheese business before his military service, delivering cheeses in his yellow Beetle. He eventually founded "Gad Dairies," which he manages today.

The family's Balkan cheeses were joined by Italian varieties like mozzarella, ricotta, mascarpone, and pecorino, which Ezra learned to make in Italy. These cheeses became popular in Israel, allowing chefs to recreate authentic Italian flavors with local produce.

Today, "Gad Dairy" is the fourth-largest in Israel, offering a wide range of products, including Balkan and Italian cheeses, New York-style cream cheeses, French-style cheeses, premium yogurts, and dairy desserts. The dairy combines modern technology with family secrets passed down through generations. Ezra Gad Cohen remains the sole taster, deciding when the cheeses are ready for market.

Name: Tasty Dairy Specialities Limited
