Name: Cheesemaking
Description:
Founder and owner of Cheesemaking, Graham Redhead provides a passion for cheese that is truly contagious as participants who have attended one of his cheesemaking classes will testify.

With a life time of experience in the dairy industry from the dairy farm to the factory, working for both Government and private industry, Graham has a vast knowledge of the cheese and the dairy industry.  He has formal qualifications in Food Technology and Business and is an active member of several industry associations. This expertise led Graham to develop Australia’s first Farmhouse Cheesemaking course in 1997 which is the predecessor of the current Intensive Cheesemaking courses.

Graham combines his technical expertise with his passion for cheese to provide all participants with very simple ways to make great tasting cheese in their own homes. His recipes work.  When you leave one of his Intensive Cheesemaking Courses you will have an immense amount of knowledge and the confidence to be able to create literally hundreds of cheeses in your own home.

Graham continues to provide training and advice to commercial manufacturers and travels regularly to ensure that his skills remain relevant in the commercial industry.

Name: FRESH HILLS
Description: Milk for a stronger tomorrow |Building Healthy India

Name: CADÍ Cooperativa
Description:
Som una cooperativa lletera, fundada el 1915, amb l'objectiu de buscar un impacte positiu al territori, de les comarques pirinenques de l'Alt Urgell i la Cerdanya, per preservar-lo, mantenir-lo i desenvolupar-lo des d'un punt de vista social, econòmic i mediambiental.

La nostra raó de ser és mantenir viu aquest territori, respectant la tradició agrícola i ramadera, a través d'un model de negoci cooperatiu, sostenible i respectuós amb el medi ambient i les persones. Un model que parteix d'un estil de vida rural basat en la producció lletera de qualitat i en la transformació d'aquesta llet en productes lactis, mantega i formatges, de valor afegit. Uns productes, disponibles en diferents canals de distribució, que permeten a les sòcies i socis ramaders cobrar un preu just per la llet, i a les treballadores i treballadors uns salaris justos que els permeten una vida digna.

Els nostres valors cooperatius basats en l'honestedat, la transparència i la qualitat, entesa en fer les coses bé, en primar l'excel·lència i el respecte als mètodes tradicionals, però adaptant-nos a les noves tendències del mercat, són el nostre llegat.

A Cadí, treballem per mantenir viu aquest llegat, perquè els consumidors continuïn gaudint d'uns productes lactis responsables, saborosos i nutritius i, per continuar donant vida a aquesta terra d'una manera digna, sostenible i respectant la tradició.

Name: Ferma cu Omenie
Description:
Fondată in 1994, De  La Ferma este o afacere de familie, aflata la a doua  generație. Timp de 10 ani au ingrijit cu drag animalele, vaci si oi, in satul Unirea, aflat inima Transilvaniei, ca apoi  in anul 2002  să construiască o fabrica nouă pentru prelucrarea laptelui.  

Au pornit la drum in urma cu 22  de ani cu o mână de oameni iscusiți si plini de ambitie. Am construit o fermă modernă care administrează  peste 800 hectare  de teren arabil cultivate majoritatea cu cereale si o păsune de 200 hectare.  

Fabrica companiei este una din cele mai importante  investitii in lactate din judetul Alba si zonele invecinate.  Accentul a fost pus pe produse  traditonale si  pe tot ce inseamnă protejarea  lor in  reteta originală  si toate acestea pentru a oferi consumatorilor produse de o calitate superioara.
 
Din grijă pentru oameni sunt  in permanentă preocupati să ofere tot ce au mai bun: brânzeturi gustoase  si sănătoase din gospodaria " De la Ferma".
 
Brânzeturilor "De la Fema"  din Transilvania  ajung pe mesele noatre, imbinând tradiția si calitatea. 
Produsele  "De la Ferma"  sunt: brânza de burduf, cascaval si telemea. 

"De la Ferma", brânză traditională preparată din laptele vacuțelor  din propria  ferma, aceasta este trăsatura definitorie pentru brandul De la Ferma.
Faptul ca  fac brânză din laptele colectat de la  vacile din ferma proprie  este  detaliul  care  face diferenta si pozitioneaza De la Ferma in liga superioara a producatorilor  de brânză.

Name: Queijos Joana
Description:
A empresa iniciou suas atividades no estado de Minas Gerais em 2004 no município de Bom Repouso, de altitude média de 1.500 metros, localizado na 2° escarpa da Serra da Mantiqueira, na região do Circuito das Serras Verdes, com clima ameno e propício para produção de queijos de alta qualidade. Em 2006, sob nova administração, a empresa ganhou novas feições, ao reformular embalagens e criar novos produtos.

Em 2008 foi adquirida nova unidade no município de Olímpio Noronha, também na Serra da Mantiqueira em Minas Gerais, na região do Circuito das Águas, onde se encontram as cidades turísticas de Lambari, São Lourenço e Caxambu, marcada pela qualidade de suas águas e pelo clima agradável, possuindo ótimas condições para a fabricação de queijos de alta qualidade. Atualmente toda nossa produção está concentrada na Unidade de Olímpio Noronha - MG.



Além da unidade fabril Minas Gerais, a empresa conta com Centro de Distribuição no munícipio de Santo André, Grande São Paulo, onde a logística é realizada por meio de frota própria e controles que garantem qualidade dos produtos e rapidez nas entregas.

We look forward to providing more, distinguished and better, and we will always remain at the consumer’s confidence. We are not the only ones, but we are distinguished by our products with a long history and Kurdish authenticity.

Name: GMP FOODS PVT LTD
Description:
Welcome to GMP FOODS, where our passion lies in crafting nutritious dairy products of the highest quality. We take immense pride in delivering top-tier service to our valued clients across various facets, including product quality, logistics solutions, market insights, and risk management.
As a global dairy commodity provider, we are active in all major dairy-producing and consuming markets, embodying a steadfast commitment to excellence. Above all, the well-being of our customers is paramount to us, and we ensure that our products are crafted from the finest ingredients meticulously sourced from trusted suppliers.
Our commitment to quality is underpinned by a series of certifications, including ISO 9001, ISO 14001, Halal, FSSC-22000, HACCP, and FDA, which serve as a testament to the trust and authenticity we bring to every product and service we offer.
Moloko Foods and Peak Fresh are proud subsidiaries of GMP FOODS, sharing the same unwavering commitment to our core vision of delivering top-notch products to our valued customers.
GMP Foods provides consumers with dairy products, such as Cheese, milk, yoghurt, condensed milk, dairy-based beverages, butter, quark and cream. The dairy company supplies specific nutrition geared to meet the needs of specific consumer groups, such as children, the elderly and sportspeople. Professional customers, such as bakers, pastry chefs, chocolate confectioners, chefs and caterers can also rely on our broad product range, including creams, butter, desserts and fillings. In addition, the company supplies high-quality ingredients to international food producers and pharmaceutical companies. With 500+ employees (FTEs) our products find their way to plenty of countries worldwide.
With distinct expertise and specialties, Moloko Foods complement the GMP FOODS family by adding unique Flavors and freshness to our offerings. Together, as a unified force, we continue to uphold the highest standards of quality and service excellence.

Name: cows.ie
Description:
Cows.ie – David Clarke Livestock, we are an Irish based company with over 30 years experience specialising in providing a full solution for the supply of high quality livestock to customers in Ireland, across Europe and to many other countries across the world.


We offer a full advice and selection service to our customers and pride ourselves in providing a seamless solution for the importation and exportation of high quality livestock.

On our 400 HA farm in Ireland we are farming in excess of 1,000 head of dairy stock ensuring a consistent supply of quality dairy cattle for our customers.  We also purchase dairy and beef stock from our extensive database of farmers in Ireland to provide a wide range of options to suit our customers specific system requirements.

We have housing facilities for quarantine of 1000 adult stock and up to 5000 if required.

Our company also partners with a specialist team to provide farm yard and farm design, which ensures we can offer the full suite of services to our clients across the globe.

Name: J.N.Dairies
Description:
J.N.Dairies has been a part of the British morning since 1985, supporting local communities and serving the heart of England with fresh milk, bread and more.

Through the loyalty and encouragement of independent shopkeepers, we’re proud to have grown from a small, family-run business, doing the milk rounds in our local town, to one of the country’s largest independent, family-run suppliers of quality milk, branded bread, and award-winning chilled and ambient dairy, non-dairy and morning goods.

From convenience stores, independent supermarkets and wholesalers, to schools, hospitals and care homes, to some of the country’s leading coffee shop chains and the region's top hotels, restaurants and catering establishments, our mission is to champion local businesses while delivering a friendly, ethical and reliable service to everyone.

Roaming what are the old boundaries of the medieval 'Kingdom of Mercia', the J.N.Dairies milkman goes far and beyond the English Midlands of today, serving thousands of urban and rural locations each week across central England.

As one of the region’s most iconic dairy suppliers, we're renowned for our honest business practises, fair competition and honourable partnerships. Whether you're an existing customer, a prospective customer or a supplier looking to partner with our distribution network, we’d love to hear from you.

If you’d like to talk, please don’t hesitate to get in touch.

J.N.Dairies
~Your local milkmen, supporting communities since 1985.

Name: Khan Dairy Farm
Description:
Khan Dairy Farm, established in June 2022, is a modern dairy farm in Pakistan committed to excellence in dairy production and farm management. Our vision is to set new benchmarks in the industry by adopting best practices in farm management, breeding, production, animal health, and feeding.  

At Khan Dairy Farm, we emphasize on the induction and breeding of top-genetics Holstein-Friesian cows sourced from Australia and the USA. These high-yielding cows form the backbone of our operations, ensuring superior milk production, herd health, and genetic advancement.  

We are dedicated to implementing state-of-the-art farm management techniques, including precision feeding, advanced breeding programs, and stringent animal health protocols. Our focus on innovation and sustainability enables us to optimize milk yield while maintaining the highest standards of animal welfare.  

As we continue to grow swiftly, our goal is to make Khan Dairy Farm a model dairy farm in Pakistan, setting a precedent for efficiency, productivity, and quality in the dairy sector.

Welcome to Fauji Foods Limited

In February 2016, Fauji Foods introduced a new brand for the masses by the name of Dostea. Dostea is a liquid tea whitener which renders the perfect taste and colour you require from your daily cup of tea.

Founded in 1966, the Company’s brand Nurpur has been a household name across generations. After the acquisition, Fauji Foods relaunched the House of Nurpur in May 2016, thus reviving an age-old tradition of wholesome quality.

Name: Dairy Farmers of America
Description:
At Dairy Farmers of America, our 19,000 employees work with one goal in mind – to bring value to our family farm-owners. 

As a farmer-owned cooperative, DFA offers rewarding jobs across the nation in a variety of fields, including manufacturing, accounting, communications, marketing, economics, on-farm field services, and more.

We value our employees and reward them with competitive benefits, a supportive working environment, and growth opportunities. We capitalize on the strengths of each individual and ensure that each employee is challenged in their role. Through Dairy University, employees receive online training and job enhancement, classes. Employees also have the opportunity to grow within DFA.

We also want our employees to live a healthy lifestyle and offer a health and wellness program that provides access to online classes and materials tailored to help our employees make healthier choices, as well as an Employee Assistance Program that helps employees with legal and health issues, such as advice on parenting or stress management, and free counseling sessions.

At DFA, we understand that our employees provide value within our organization and in our community. We cultivate a culture of openness, transparency, and integrity where employees are encouraged to voice their opinions and share their ideas. We also believe we have a responsibility to give back the communities in which we operate and work to do so through the DFA Cares Foundation.

Dairy Farmers of America, Inc. is an equal employment employer and is committed to providing employment opportunities to minorities, females, veterans, and disabled individuals.

Name: Arla Foods Ingredients
Description:
Arla Foods Ingredients is a global leader in improving premium nutrition. Together with our customers, research partners, suppliers, NGOs and others, we discover and deliver ingredients and products that can advance lifelong nutrition for the benefit of consumers around the world.

A passion for progress, combined with specialist knowledge of food products and production technology, and a strong commitment to sustainability, enables us to serve leading global brands in early life nutrition, medical nutrition, sports nutrition, health foods, and other foods and beverages.

Arla Foods Ingredients is a 100% owned subsidiary of the dairy company Arla Foods

Name: National Dairy Development Board
Description:
The National Dairy Development Board (NDDB) was founded in 1965 to replace exploitation with empowerment, tradition with modernity, stagnation with growth, transforming dairying into an instrument for the development of India's rural people.
 
NDDB began its operations with the mission of making dairying a vehicle to a better future for millions of grassroots milk producers. The mission achieved thrust and direction with the launching of  "Operation Flood", a programme extending over 26 years and which used World Bank loan to finance India's emergence as the world's largest milk producing nation.   Operation Flood's third phase was completed in 1996 and has to its credit a number of  significant achievements.

Since its inception, the Dairy Board has planned and spearheaded India's dairy programmes by placing dairy development in the hands of milk producers and the professionals they employ to manage their cooperatives.  In addition, NDDB also promotes other commodity-based cooperatives,  allied industries and veterinary biologicals on an intensive and nation-wide basis.
 
The National Dairy Development Board has been constituted as a body corporate and declared an institution of national importance by an Act of India's Parliament.

The National Dairy Development Board -- initially registered as a society under the Societies Act 1860 -- was merged with the erstwhile Indian Dairy Corporation, a company formed and registered under the Companies Act 1956, by an Act of India's Parliament - the NDDB Act 1987 (37 of 1987), with effect from 12 October, 1987.  The new body corporate was declared an institution of national importance by the Act.

The general superintendence, direction, control and management of NDDB's affairs and business  vests with the Board of Directors.

Name: Lactalis South Africa
Description: Lactalis South Africa (LSA) was registered in South Africa in 2020. Name: Country Delight
Description:
50 years back, life was very simple. We used to have a cow in our backyard that used to give us natural and fresh milk everyday.  There was never a need to worry about adulteration as the animal was our own. Today, the milk we consume is either reconstituted/recombined with milk powder, takes days/weeks post milking to reach our home and is more often than not prone to adulteration. In summary, the basic essence of milk has been lost.

 
We are a bunch of Engineers and IIM Graduates who aim to bring back the basics of Milk. Our promise is to deliver Natural, Fresh and Unadulterated Milk directly to the doorstep of our consumers. We leverage technology to source a superior product from the farmer and to give a hassle free experience to the consumer.

No Preservatives
No artificial colours
Nutrient Density
Focus on Naturality

Name: Valio
Description:
Valio employs over 4,000 people around the world in various career fields. At Valio, we work together to make life better – by always catering for our customers and inspiring and supporting one another. Virtanen was the leader of our laboratory, our legacy has been to increase our consumers’ wellbeing through innovations. Even today, we encourage each other to experiment and invent. Valio – Together we make life better.
www.valio.com

Name: Lactalis India
Description:
Lactalis is a family-owned dairy group based in Laval (Mayenne), in the west of France.

In 1933, André Besnier started up his cheese-making company. On the first day he collected 17 litres of milk and produced 35 camemberts: the Besnier company was in business. Since then, the group, which adopted the more international name of Lactalis in 1999, has continued to expand rapidly.

Its range of products has grown considerably (cheeses, milk, cream, butter, ultra-fresh, milk powder, etc.), as has the reputation of its products. Lactalis now owns a series of prestigious French and international brands.

# 1 dairy group in the world
# 1 dairy and cheese group in Europe
# 1 milk collector in Europe
# 1 cheese producer in Europe
Around the world, Lactalis is recognised as having the know-how of a major dairy Group. Present in over one hundred countries, its experience abroad is backed up by a professionalism that is expressed in both its vast range of products adapted to the expectations of consumers and its logistics know how.

In 2014, Groupe Lactalis entered India after acquiring, the leading South Indian dairy production company Thirumala Milk Products Private Limited. Continuing its spree, the group soon took over the reins of other leading dairy companies in India including Anik Industries and Prabhat Dairy in 2016 and 2019 respectively. In India, the group now sells through its regional brands Tirumala, Anik, Prabhat as well as its international brands President and Lactel. Especially for the domestic market, the traditional and cultural experience of the domestic brands and the international expertise of Lactalis has formed a unique and formidable combination, leading to a success story to be talked by generations to come.

Name: ilolay
Description: ilolay es una empresa láctea con sede en la ciudad de Rafaela, provincia de Santa Fe, que posee 3 plantas fabriles ubicadas en el corazón de la cuenca lechera argentina. Procesa 560 millones de litros de leche al año que se transforman en una completa línea de productos comercializados bajo la marca ilolay.

Name: Greenfields Dairy Group
Description:
The early 1990’s saw countries in Southeast Asia, including Indonesia, going through a period of rapid economic growth. At that time, imported products primarily met the demand for fresh dairy produce. The absence of large-scale commercial dairy farms in Indonesia, coupled with the vast availability of labour and natural resources, presented a huge opportunity to create a significant dairy enterprise to supply the domestic Indonesian market and the region.

On March 14, 1997, PT Greenfields Indonesia was established by a group of Australian and Indonesian entrepreneurs. The company commenced the development of a dairy farm at Desa Babadan, Malang Highland, East Java in April 1997, and began the construction of a milk processing facility that became operational in June 2000. Till today, Extended Shelf Life (ESL) pasteurised and Ultra High Temperature (UHT) milk produced by the farm is of the highest quality and meets the world’s toughest microbiological standards.

Greenfields Indonesia’s dairy farm has a cattle population of over 10,000 Holstein and Jersey cows, producing over 43.5 million litres of fresh milk each year. Besides supplying the domestic market, a significant portion of its finished products are sold in Singapore, Malaysia, Hong Kong, Philippines and other countries in the region.

Deeply committed to innovation, manufacturing excellence and customer satisfaction, Mahaan prides in its ability to provide customized solutions for the dairy needs of its clients. Deploying the latest technologies in milk processing and investing heavily in R&D, Mahaan has steadily increased its capacity of milk consumption from 1.25 lac litres each day to over 10 lac litres each day. 

Mahaan Milk Food is managed by the founding family with a vision to take the company’s growth story to unprecedented heights. The management is supported by highly motivated teams  in each department: finance, marketing, food technology and engineering, sales and compliance. The organization’s culture promotes workspace harmony and productivity, thereby fostering a strong sense of loyalty and efficiency amongst employees. 

By integrating technological advancements in the industry with incredible taste and quality of products, Mahaan strives to continually exceed global quality benchmarks and serve as the preferred partner for providing dairy solutions to its customers.

Description:
Lactalis Australia is part of the Lactalis Group, a third-generation, family-owned business headquartered in France.  Lactalis Group is the world’s largest fresh dairy company with over 250 production sites and 85,000 employees across 90 countries.

We are incredibly proud of our portfolio of global and Australian brands, such as Pauls, OAK, Ice Break, Tamar Valley Dairy, Vaalia, President, and Galbani. Name: Sid's Farm
Description:
Is the milk you are drinking every day gradually harming you? What happens when the purest substance like milk is laced with detergent? These are the menacing challenges Sid's Farm confronts head-on. Every day.
Why? Because we are paranoid about milk quality; no we seriously are. But, we address this paranoia with a serious commitment- Stringent milk testing. Through rigorous assessment encompassing over 45 parameters from our end, we proudly produce India's most tested milk and dairy products. 
Where did we start? - Our journey began as a promise of a parent to their child, to produce the best milk possible. At Sid’s Farm, we work relentlessly every day to uphold this promise and deliver the purest milk to our customers. Because testing milk for us is not a choice- it’s a way of life. We ensure every glass of milk processed, is free from preservatives, antibodies, and hormones. 
So that, the source remains pure, the treatment natural, and the tests a testament to our uncompromising quality.

Description: Established in 1948, Indian Dairy Association (IDA) is the apex body of the dairy industry in India. The members are from the cooperatives, MNCs, corporate bodies, private institutions, educational institutions, government and public sector units. IDA functions very closely with the dairy producers, professionals & planners, scientists & educationists, institutions and organisations associated with the development of dairying in India.

Description: Think USA Dairy is a global resource brought to you by the U.S. Dairy Export Council to showcase how high-quality, versatile and sustainably-produced U.S. dairy ingredients can meet the unique needs of global buyers, food & beverage manufacturers and foodservice professionals. Continuous investments in research, innovation and customer success have transformed the United States into a leading global supplier of quality dairy ingredients and products. Follow and explore this page as a trusted resource for marketing, nutrition and technical insights into the advantages U.S. Dairy offers for developing successful products to excite consumers. Learn more on ThinkUSAdairy.org

Name: NDDB Dairy Services
Description:
Dr. Verges Kurien once said, "India needs to show an honest face, a kind face, a human face.."
At NDDB Dairy Services (NDS), this face is the hardworking face of our dairy farmers. We come to work each day to make dairying an important source of income for them and bring long lasting smile to their face.
How do we do this?
• By bringing dairy farmers together to form their own enterprise as a Producer Company
• By reaching out to dairy farmers located in the agrarian- distressed, flood prone, drought prone or aspirational districts in India
• By establishing direct milk procurement facilities for milk, thus eliminating the middle man
• By ensuring the dairy farmers have complete control on procurement
• By providing twice-a-day, round-the-year market access to the milk produced by the dairy farmers
• By improving the productivity of milch animals by providing dairy farmers access to AI using high-genetic merit germplasm, animal nutrition and various other improved animal management practices
• By providing complete digital access to dairy farmers through a mobile app that holds information about their transaction with the MPCs, such as milk pouring, payment, shareholding and deductions for input services, if any.

Description:
Dairygold Co-Operative Society Limited is Ireland’s leading farmer owned Agri business and the country’s second largest dairy processor. Located in Munster, in the heart of the Golden Valleys, Dairygold processes 1.41bn million litres of milk annually from its 2,500 milk suppliers. 

Dairygold currently employs over 1,350 people across Ireland, UK, Germany, Spain and China and in 2023 generated a turnover of c. €1.4 billion.

Name: Jibal
Description:
JIBAL compte parmi le top 3 des opérateurs clés de l’industrie laitière au Maroc. 

JIBAL est une entreprise spécialisée dans la transformation, le conditionnement et la commercialisation de produits laitiers et dérivés, engagées depuis l’année de son démarrage en 2006 à fournir des produits laitiers de haute qualité sous le respect des normes les plus strictes en matière de sécurité alimentaire. 

En 2022, JIBAL a rejoint le groupe POLMLEK, leader polonais du secteur laitier depuis plus de 30 ans avec une forte présence dans l’industrie laitière sur les deux marchés polonais et international. 

JIBAL propose une large gamme de produits, finement distingués grâce à un travail rigoureux d’élevage en amont suivant les standards internationaux que ce soit au niveau de notre ferme à Fkih Ben Saleh ou via le choix de lait premium strictement et minutieusement sélectionnés auprès de nos agriculteurs et fermiers et contrôlés selon des normes strictes permettant ainsi de concocter des recettes savoureuses et sures pour nos consommateurs de tous les âges.  

Nous plaçons la satisfaction client et la valorisation du capital humain au cœur de nos priorités. Nos valeurs qui sont : Modestie, Agilité et Esprit de famille, accompagnent le quotidien de chaque collaborateur de JIBAL.

Name: Alta Genetics
Description:
We Create Value

We do more than produce and market semen from high caliber sires. We aim to create value for farmers by striving to understand each farm’s individual needs and goals. Our innovative genetic programs and reproductive services make the difference at the farm level. Using customized programs, specific to each producer's needs, we promise to improve individual herd profitability.

We Build Trust

Trust is built on the foundation to provide top quality products and services that deliver on their promise. We commit to providing such programs and services every day. Our unique product development testing standards are the most rigorous and accurate in the world, and are the clearest statement of our commitment to gaining your trust.

We Deliver Results

Our people, who have a passion for the business, can be counted on to deliver beyond expectation. We consistently deliver high impact genetic results and strategies to maximize herd profitability. We provide services to improve each farm's reproductive performance and capitalize on genetic investments. 

We take our responsibility seriously – to deliver excellence through our products, programs and services that generate profit for the progressive farms we workw ith around the world.

Dairy Australia works towards shaping a profitable and sustainable dairy industry by providing services that benefit and advance dairy farm businesses and the industry.

Our focus includes research and innovation, supporting farm business management, responding to events such as drought, bushfires, floods or COVID-19, developing tools to adapt to the environment and address climate, supporting on-farm employment needs, marketing of dairy products and commitment to sustainability, policy research, industry insights, and delivering international market programs.


Dairy Australia values are at the core of everything we do:
Farmer First - Farmer needs guide our purpose
One Team - We work together to achieve great things
Innovative Thinking - We embrace new ideas and learning as we go
Decisive Action - We make informed decisions and move quickly to implement.

For more information about what we do visit dairyaustralia.com.au/whatwedo

Through our ingredients, we help to nourish both the big and the small everyday moments that we all cherish. Our ingredients are enjoyed globally across the early life, active, performance, medical and cell nutrition markets.

Bulla is more than just a company - everyone who works here is part of the family.

Name: Lactalis UK & Ireland
Description:
WHO WE ARE.
Lactalis UK & Ireland is headquartered in Redhill, Surrey with production sites in Stranraer and Cricket St. Thomas. We are one of the UK’s leading dairy companies. The business produces and sells dairy products including the amazing brands; Seriously, Président, Galbani, Leerdammer, Galloway, Orkney and Cricket St. Thomas.

We are part of the family-owned Lactalis Group. The #1 dairy company worldwide, operating in 84 countries. We offer delicious and healthy dairy products, bringing people together every day.

DEVELOP YOUR CAREER WITH US.
At Lactalis, people are at the heart of our achievements.
As part of such a large multi-national organisation we can provide challenging opportunities across the UK and overseas. We give people the time, space and support to shine in a dynamic and fast-paced working environment thanks to our dedicated training programmes.
We offer interesting careers where ambition, delivery, creativity and teamwork are rewarded and recognised, as well as a good work/life balance.

REAL SUCCESS COMES FROM WITHIN.
Are you looking to participate in the development of the world’s leading dairy group and build your skills in a dynamic, growing and multicultural environment? As an employee with drive and ambition, we can offer you real career opportunities.

Our products are the result of the know-how, passion and values of our 85,500 employees globally. We value and nurture talent across every sector of the dairy industry, helping our people to develop specialist expertise across all business functions.

Name: Consorzio Tutela Grana Padano
Description: Consorzio Tutela Grana Padano, nato il 18 giugno 1954, riunisce i produttori, stagionatori e commercianti del formaggio DOP più consumato al mondo. Mediante attività di promozione e tutela ha lo scopo di garantire il rispetto della ricetta tradizionale del formaggio Grana Padano DOP e la sua alta qualità, riconoscibile e ritrovabile in ogni singola forma prodotta.

Name: Dairy Farmers of Canada | Les Producteurs laitiers du Canada
Description:
Dairy Farmers of Canada (DFC) is the national policy, advocacy and promotional organization representing Canadian dairy producers. DFC advocates on behalf of dairy farmers to create the winning conditions for our sector so that they can focus on what they do best: producing high-quality, nutritious milk, both safely and sustainably. Through our promotional activities, DFC also works to enhance awareness of the stringent standards followed on Canadian farms and the many health and nutritional benefits of dairy consumption.

Les Producteurs laitiers du Canada (PLC) sont l’organisation nationale de politique, de représentation et de promotion représentant les producteurs laitiers canadiens. Les PLC défendent les intérêts des producteurs laitiers afin de créer les conditions favorables à notre secteur pour qu'ils puissent se concentrer sur ce qu'ils font le mieux : produire un lait de haute qualité, nutritif et salubre, de manière durable. Grâce à leurs activités promotionnelles, les PLC s'efforcent également de mieux faire connaître les normes rigoureuses appliquées dans les fermes canadiennes et les nombreux bienfaits de la consommation de produits laitiers sur le plan de la santé et de la nutrition.

Name: Amul Dairy
Description: Amul is the flagship brand of GCMMF, India's largest food products marketing organisation.

Name: YOLO
Description:
Elaboramos el Yogur Griego 100% natural de los Venezolanos. Fabricamos productos saludables sin Gluten y sin azúcares.
#LaVidaAlNatural 
You Only Live Once

Name: MEVGAL S.A.
Description:
MEVGAL is the largest dairy company of Northern Greece and the third largest producer of fresh dairy products in the country. 

MEVGAL produces and sells:

Fresh pasteurized milk
Traditional and Greek Yogurt
Feta Cheese P.D.O.
Other Cheese Products
Desserts, rice puddings, deserts and milk creams
Cholesterol-free dairy products, Lactose Free dairy products 
Natural juices

Since 1950 MEVGAL has been active in Northern Greece, the heartland of fresh milk, where 70% of Greece’s fresh milk is being produced. With more than 1.600 farms located close to Mevgal facilities, meeting the national demand for high-quality milk is, therefore, guaranteed. The proximity to the farms ensures the fast delivery of fresh milk to MEVGAL’s plant, the immediate processing, and the freshness of the final product. 

As a result of its excellent fresh raw milk, state-of-the-art technology applied in the production lines (HACCP system, ISO/BRC/GMO certifications), well-organized sales channels, and experienced personnel, MEVGAL is distributing its products through more than 22,000 small and large points of sale in Greece while at the same time exports to more than 30 countries around the world.

Respecting traditional values and being dedicated to quality, Mevgal is proud to have more than 170 appetizing products branded under the MEVGAL brand name.

Name: Woodlands Dairy
Description: www.woodlandsdairy.co.za

Name: Milk Specialties Global
Description:
For over six decades, Milk Specialties Global has been a pioneer in developing top quality science-based nutrition products.

Milk Specialties Global Human Nutrition provides innovative milk and whey protein ingredients for the active nutrition and healthy lifestyle industries.

Milk Specialties Global Animal Nutrition is a leading supplier of functional fats, milk replacer, by-pass amino acids and carbohydrates for livestock producers worldwide.

Name: Skånemejerier
Description:
Skånemejerier är det ledande mejeriföretaget i södra Sverige, en hungrig utmanare nationellt och dessutom en del av världens ledande mejerikoncern Lactalis.

Hos oss samlas ambitiösa, pragmatiska och engagerade medarbetare som alla jobbar mot samma mål – att förse svenska folket med riktigt bra mat. I vårt sortiment finns närproducerade mejerivaror, Sveriges mest köpta juice och ostspecialiteter från Sverige och Europa.

Vår vision är att bli Sveriges mest hållbara mejeri, och då handlar det inte bara om att erbjuda produkter som är bra för både människa och miljö, utan också om att vara en hållbar arbetsplats. Vi värnar om gott ledarskap, givande samarbeten och en välkomnande och inkluderande arbetsmiljö. Hos oss får du möjlighet att utvecklas, växa och påverka vår gemensamma väg framåt.

Välkommen till Skånemejerier!

Name: Prairie Farms Dairy, Inc.
Description:
Drink Local With Prairie Farms Dairy 

Prairie Farms Dairy, Inc. is one of the largest and most successful dairy cooperatives operating in the Midwest and the South. Elements of the cooperative include nearly 600 farm families, 7,000 associates, 48 manufacturing plants, 100+ distribution facilities, and annual sales of over $4.6 billion. 

Prairie Farms is a nationally recognized leader in the dairy industry known for milk flavor innovations and producing award-winning milk, cheese, ice cream, and cultured dairy products. 

With headquarters in Edwardsville, Ill., the Prairie Farms distribution footprint covers over 30 percent of the United States; products are available in grocery chains, mass merchandiser stores, club stores, convenience stores, dollar stores, drug stores, schools, foodservice outlets, and warehouse distribution centers. 

Prairie Farms has proudly adopted the U.S. Dairy Stewardship Commitment, affirming to our customers, our consumers and the global marketplace Prairie Farms' pledge to responsible dairy production as we nourish the communities we serve. For more information about the U.S. Dairy Stewardship Commitment, go to: http://commitment.usdairy.com. 

Learn more about our dairy farmers and cooperative by visiting www.prairiefarms.com. 

And don't forget to visit our coupon page https://www.prairiefarms.com/coupons for savings on many of award-winning dairy products!

Name: Xandô
Description:
Viver bem. A Xandô nasceu em 1982 pra ajudar você a viver assim. E para a Xandô, viver bem é preencher a vida com equilíbrio entre momentos de bem-estar e sabor. Observando a natureza fica fácil perceber que ela já entrega pra gente o seu melhor. Só é preciso cuidar, preservar e levar pra você. 

Nosso leite é leite, nosso suco é suco, nosso queijo é queijo, porque vêm direto da fruta, direto da vaca, com a menor interferência humana possível. 
 
Quem manda aqui é a natureza. Até no jeito de cuidar das
frutas e das vacas, por sinal, sempre muito bem tratadas na nossa Fazenda Colorado. 

Xandô é hoje uma das maiores produtoras do país, levando produtos fresquinhos, gostosos e saudáveis para milhares de famílias. 

De verdade, a gente não produz nada, não. Quem produz é a natureza. 

A gente só engarrafa, embala e entrega. 
 
Tudo fresquinho para você. 
Esse é o jeito Xandô pra você viver bem. 
E para nós viver bem é o X da questão.

Name: Leite Lider
Description: Estamos presentes na mesa de milhares de brasileiros desde 1980, fazendo com que as refeições de nossos consumidores sejam mais prazerosas e saudáveis.

Name: Arla Foods Netherlands & Belgium
Description:
Arla Foods is een coöperatie in handen van Europese melkveehouders. Dit betekent dat we in nauwe samenwerking voortdurend sterker en beter proberen te worden om de boeren daarvan te laten profiteren. Dit principe heeft altijd centraal gestaan bij alles wat we doen. Dit is ook de reden dat Arla nu een sterk bedrijf is, meer dan 100 jaar nadat het werd opgericht.

We werken hard om ons bedrijf op een duurzame manier te laten groeien. Dit kan alleen in nauwe samenwerking met onze melkveehouders en met de vele mensen en bedrijven waarmee we zaken doen. En, erg belangrijk, door naar onze klanten te luisteren.

We willen dat onze zuivelproducten gezondheid en plezier brengen. Dat ze jouw leven gezonder maken en inspiratie geven - waar je ook bent, wanneer je maar wilt en in elke fase van je leven.

Name: Cooperativa Piá
Description:
Com sede em Nova Petrópolis, na Serra Gaúcha, a Cooperativa Piá é referência na produção de lácteos de alta qualidade, elaborados a partir do leite entregue diariamente por nossos associados produtores. Desde sua fundação, em 1967, a Piá tem como propósito fortalecer o cooperativismo, promover o desenvolvimento sustentável no campo e oferecer alimentos que unem sabor, qualidade e confiança.

Somos uma cooperativa comprometida com a valorização do trabalho do produtor rural, com a inovação constante e com o bem-estar de nossos consumidores. Atuamos de forma integrada em toda a cadeia do leite — da produção à industrialização — garantindo rastreabilidade, segurança alimentar e responsabilidade social.

Acreditamos que cooperativas transformam realidades. E é com essa convicção que seguimos construindo um futuro mais justo, próspero e colaborativo.
Location: Nova Petrópolis, Rio Grande do Sul

Name: Param Dairy
Description:
At Param, we are a legacy of trust, quality, & innovation in the dairy industry. Since our inception in 1999, we are committed to manufacturing premium dairy products including SMP (Skimmed Milk Powder), Full Cream Milk Powder, Dairy Whitener, Butter, Desi Ghee, Cow Ghee, Flavored Milk, Almond Milk, Sweets, Gulabjamun Mix, Pouch Milk, Buttermilk, Sweetened Buttermilk, Curd under our brand, "Param Premium"

Since 2004, we have expanded our global footprint, to markets in Australia, Singapore, Iraq, UAE, Oman, Jordan, Afghanistan, Pakistan, Algeria, Ethiopia, Nepal, & Yemen. 

Our vision is to make milk more accessible & affordable through technology & innovation while upholding traditional values. We are driven by our values of Trust, Customer Orientation, Innovation, Quality, Relations & CSR.

Our Village Level Collection Centre (VLCC) network connects 1,650+ villages, providing a sustainable income & better livelihoods to thousands of dairy farmers. By utilizing Automatic Milk Collection Units (AMCU), we support local economies & promote clean milk production practices.

Our technologically advanced processing plant, located in Khurja, UP, boasts a capacity of 1 million liters of milk per day. From pasteurization & homogenization to packaging & distribution, we strive to preserve the freshness & nutritional value of our products.

We are proud to build a robust network of 1650+ Villages, 1.5+ lakh farmers, 1000+ Employees, 1000+ Distributors, 2000+Vendors & 25000+ Retailers.

We are recognized for our excellence by the Govt. of India, with ISO 22000:2005 Certification, Agmark, & HALAL Certification. Our plant is certified by the Agricultural & Processed Food Exports Development Authority (APEDA) for international trade

We undergo regular audits to ensure safety, quality, regulatory compliance, market access, operational efficiency, traceability, sustainability, consumer trust & public health.

Param is poised to deliver the purest & most nutritious dairy products.

Name: Parmalat Australia
Description:
Parmalat Australia Pty Ltd is a national diary company with a long and proud history in Australia and is part of a global dairy organization that brings nutrition and wellness to people all over the world.  We continue to invest and expand in Australia, setting the benchmark for the dairy industry locally and playing an ever-increasing role in the export of dairy products into Asia. 
Parmalat specialises in the production of branded milk and dairy products and is one of the major manufacturers of milk, yoghurt and fresh dairy products in Australia. 

The company has an impressive stable of well recognised, popular milk and dairy product brands. These include Pauls, Trim, Rev, PhysiCAL, Zymil, Oak, Breaka, Ice Break, Rush, Rachel’s, Harvey Fresh and Vaalia.

From November 2017, Parmalat and Lactalis Group companies in Australia awarded White Ribbon Workplace Accreditation, expanding commitment to ending violence against women.

Name: FAGE
Description: FAGE (pronounced ‘fa-yeh’) is the dairy company that has made Greek yogurt known and loved around the globe.

Name: nzmp
Description:
NZMP is the global dairy ingredients and solutions brand of Fonterra. 

Trusted globally, our ingredients are sold in over 100 countries and are used by some of the world’s most famous food and nutrition brands. NZMP are dedicated to curating the best dairy expertise the industry has to offer in order to provide our customers with ingredients and solutions that meet their needs. 

We have one of the broadest ranges of dairy ingredient offerings worldwide, with more than 3,000 ingredients across six product families – powders, dairy fats, cheese, proteins, paediatrics and Health & Wellbeing.

As part of the dairy Co-operative, Fonterra, NZMP is owned by thousands of New Zealand farming families. We are backed by Fonterra’s grass-fed farming heritage, passion for innovation, and leading processing and quality standards.

Name: Namaste India Foods
Description:
Offering wholesome goodness with authentic milk products and delivering pure and fresh dairy products.

Welcome to the official page of Namaste India Foods, where the authentic dairy experience meets the rich Indian traditions. Our mission is to bring you pure and nourishing dairy products.

From creamy milk to aromatic ghee, our products are pure and healthy. We take pride in delivering the finest dairy delights, free from additives, ensuring each bite is filled with the goodness of Indian dairy.

NIF Pvt. Ltd., a proud sister concern of RSPL Ltd., is committed to bringing you the purest milk and freshest dairy products. Beyond being an FMCG conglomerate, RSPL Group is your trusted partner in delivering unparalleled value for money. Our journey began in 1988, sparking an industry revolution and touching the lives of millions across the nation. With our unwavering focus on holistic growth and meaningful CSR initiatives, we stand as a symbol of trust, reliability, and progress.

Name: CNIEL
Description:
Le CNIEL (Centre National Interprofessionnel de l’Economie Laitière) est l’Interprofession de la filière lait de vache. Créé par les éleveurs laitiers et les transformateurs (coopératives et industries privées), c’est le lieu d’échange de tous les acteurs de la filière laitière. Son rôle : accompagner le développement de la filière laitière française. Pour cela, le Cniel agit dans les domaines où l’action collective permet d’amplifier l’action des opérateurs.
 En tant qu’organe représentant de la filière laitière reconnu par les pouvoirs publics français et européens, nous menons des actions d’intérêt collectif pour promouvoir et défendre l’image du lait, des produits laitiers et de la filière laitière.


Missions
1. Améliorer la compétitivité de la production et de la transformation laitière française : Développer les atouts du modèle laitier français par des actions visant à améliorer la compétitivité de la production laitière et sa capacité à faire face à la volatilité des cours.
2. Fournir les éléments nécessaires à un dialogue objectif entre producteurs et transformateurs : Créer et entretenir un climat de confiance entre les producteurs de lait et les transformateurs laitiers afin de fluidifier leurs relations.
3. Soutenir le développement des exportations : Développer les exportations en agissant sur plusieurs leviers : analyse des marchés, promotion du modèle laitier français à l’international, communication en faveur des produits laitiers sur les marchés extérieurs.
4. Développer et faire connaître les qualités du lait et des produits laitiers : Concourir au développement de la qualité du lait et des produits laitiers et participer à une meilleure connaissance nutritionnelle des produits laitiers
5. Donner une image durable et positive de la filière : Présenter une image positive de la filière en tant qu’acteur du développement durable. Élaborer une stratégie de progrès et de communication autour de 3 piliers ; environnement, économie et sociétal.

Name: Sids Farm Hiring
Description:
Sid’s Farm is a small, niche dairy based out of Hyderabad. We pride ourselves in being able to provide 100% natural milk & healthy wholesome products to 100’s of families around us. 
Our Motto – No Antibiotics. No Hormones. No Preservatives
Our animals are given a balanced diet and are well taken care of. We never inject our animals with hormones that artificially boost milk production. If an animal is sick and is given antibiotics, the milk is separated out until the animal is well again. We also test our milk every day to be absolutely sure that you are getting nothing but the best.
We try our best to do our part for the environment. We recycle our water for our fodder forest and we do not use any chemical fertilizers. We are among the largest supplier of whole milk in India. We are in the business of creation of health. Our vision is to create a society where everyone has access to chemical-free food at their doorstep at affordable prices. We are looking for people who share our vision of creating a healthier society while protecting the natural resources. We offer a plethora of opportunities both online, offline and hands-on in marketing, operations, engineering, and agriculture. Sid's farm is run by a team of passionate engineers, farmers, and housewives.

Name: Sunfresh Agro Industries P. Ltd. (Prabhat Dairy)
Description: We are an integrated milk and dairy products company in India, catering to institutional as well as retail customers. For the past 15 years, we have established ourselves as one of the most trusted dairy brands in its category. With the state-of-the-art plant, cutting edge technology and stringent quality standards, our products deliver unmatched quality.

Name: Arla Foods Deutschland
Description:
Arla Foods ist eine europäische Molkereigenossenschaft und gehört den knapp 9.000 Arla Landwirten aus Deutschland, Belgien, Dänemark, Großbritannien, Luxemburg, Schweden und den Niederlanden.  

Deutschland gehört zu den sechs Kernmärkten von Arla Foods. Hierzulande ist Arla Foods das drittgrößte Molkereiunternehmen (nach Produktabsatz) und beschäftigt rund 1.650 Mitarbeiter in verschiedenen Werken und der Deutschland-Zentrale in Düsseldorf.  

Arla ist der europaweit der größte Hersteller von Molkereiprodukten in Bio-Qualität. Hierzulande ist Arla mit Marken wie Arla Buko, Arla Bio, Arla Kærgården und Arla Skyr sowie einem großen Handelsmarken-Portfolio im Handel vertreten. 

Darüber hinaus wollen wir uns nicht nur für eine gesunde Lebensweise einsetzen, sondern auch unsere Verbraucher dazu inspirieren, ein gesundes Leben zu führen. Hierfür arbeiten wir eng mit Nichtregierungsorganisationen und öffentlichen Interessensgruppen zusammen, um die wichtigen Nährstoffe der Milch für jeden zugänglich zu machen.  

Wir nehmen unsere Verantwortung, unsere Beziehungen und unsere Rolle in der Gesellschaft ernst. Aus diesem Grund tauschen wir uns regelmäßig mit Vertretern der Wirtschaft und Forschung sowie NGOs aus, um unsere Unternehmensentwicklung nachhaltig voran zu treiben.  

Wir leben eine leistungsbereite und dynamische Kultur mit großen Ambitionen. Dafür haben wir eine starke Wachstumsstrategie, sowohl für unsere Unternehmen, als auch für unsere Mitarbeiter. Wenn Sie sich für ein dynamisches Umfeld interessieren, in dem Veränderungen an der Tagesordnung sind, entdecken Sie mehr über unser Unternehmen, tauchen Sie in das Leben bei Arla ein und sehen Sie, welche Möglichkeiten sich bei uns bieten.

Name: VitaDairy Việt Nam
Description:
Established in 2005, VitaDairy has affirmed its position as number 1 in colostrum in Vietnam. VitaDairy provides high-quality dairy products to its customers with the goal of providing optimal nutritional solutions for all customers, especially helping mothers to release some of their worries when raising their children.

Starting with KINDNESS, combined with SCIENCE and non-stop CREATIVITY, VitaDairy takes those 3 factors as core values to inspire and spread the spirit of FOR HUMANS to all the staff. 

VitaDairy was established with the goal of serving people, carrying the mission of Nurturing vitality; and always trying our best to devote ourselves to the benefit of our society.

Name: Desi Farms
Description:
Desi Farms, the brand name of SNA Milk & Milk Products Pvt Ltd., is a farm-to-table company that promises 100% chemical preservative-free milk, and dairy products within 12 to 24 hours of milking. The company prides itself on steering the industry towards higher standards of quality, freshness, and transparency!

Our Purpose
..is to bring prosperity to local farmers by promoting healthy living amongst consumers.

Our Goal
..is to be India’s most trusted and leading ‘Farm-to-Table’ company, dedicated to delivering fresh, unadulterated, and chemical preservative-free milk, and dairy products, directly to the consumers within 12-24 hours of milking.

Our commitment is to support the rural livelihoods by generating maximum employment opportunities for rural farmers into the food industry. With constant income every month they can be financially secure and can provide for their families.

Name: Society of Dairy Technology
Description:
Dedicated to Advancing Dairy Science and Technology
The Society of Dairy Technology (SDT) is at the forefront of the dairy and food industries. It is dedicated to the advancement of Dairy Science and Technology across all areas of the agri-food sector, to the mutual benefit of milk producers, dairy processors, food retailers and consumers.

The Society is the recognised professional body fostering scientific and technological developments in the dairy industries of the United Kingdom and the Republic of Ireland. Whilst its many members are predominantly from these two countries, it also has wider international representation through overseas members drawn from other EU countries and further afield.

The SDT, in conjunction with Wiley-Blackwell Publishing, publishes the renowned International Journal of Dairy Technology, it also organises formal Meetings, Symposia and Conferences, and facilitates technological training and education in appropriate subjects.

The Society is an active member of the Brussels-based International Dairy Federation (IDF) and a member of the Management Board of the United Kingdom IDF.

Name: Devondale Murray Goulburn
Description:
Devondale Murray Goulburn (Murray Goulburn Co-operative Co. Limited) is Australia’s largest dairy foods company and we are committed to being the first choice in dairy foods in Australia and globally.

Our co-operative  was established more than 65 years ago by a passionate group of Victorian dairy farmers, each seeking a better deal for their milk. Since then we have grown to a supplier-shareholder base of over 2,200 across south east Australia. We are proud of our heritage and value the contribution of our supplier-shareholders and their diverse communities.

Today, we are the primary partner of Australian dairy farmers and our dairy products can be found all around the world, from the lush green pastures of Gippsland to the busy Vietnamese capital, Hanoi. Our employees work with customers and consumers in well over 30 countries worldwide. 

To learn more about Devondale Murray Goulburn, visit us online at: www.mgc.com.au

Name: VRS Foods ( Paras Dairy )
Description:
PARAS’s history reflects back to 1960, when the procurement of milk started with 60 Liters of milk. Ch. Ved Ram, the founder and promoter of our company is one of the connoisseurs in the dairy farm industry. Ved Ram & Sons started as our partnership company in April 1986. Our first unit was established in 1987 under company's name VRS Foods Limited and since then it’s in tandem with the rapidly changing technology, production units are well armed with the latest equipment. These facilities enable us to cater to the needs of our clients by selling over 2, 50,000 liters of milk per day in Delhi Metro. At the heart of the entire network of Paras are hundreds of Village level collection centers covering 5400 villages across Western U.P., Haryana, Rajasthan, Maharashtra and Gujarat from where the milk is collected everyday. The farmers not only get financial help but also get support in buying cattle, feed, providing veterinary services and other infrastructural provision. The trust of the farmers has grown stronger and so has the network. There is continuous monitoring and up gradation of quality. The stress therefore is on ensuring sanitation and hygiene right from village level. That’s the reason why every Village level collection center is equipped for field testing, efficient chilling and speedy transport to processing and manufacturing facilities.
Our large manufacturing capacity at 7 different locations across most part of India is backed by an impressive distribution network, to ensure that our products find their way to every household in India.

Name: Milan Dairy
Description:
Milan Dairy Foods Private Limited Was founded in 1989, the founding unit of Gopaljee brand the company has basket of brands like Gopaljee, Milan Dairy and Fresco in north India. The company has made his name in the Indian market through its quality and sales network and various products like Milk, Dahi, Panner, Buttermilk, Flavoured Milk, Pure Desi Ghee ans many more. The company has over 5 lakhs liters capacity of handling milk everyday, with over 500 milk society, 6000 milk producers and over 10 chillers which make the company’s procurement network strong.

Management:

(Founder & Managing Director)

Mrs. Kusum Lata Dixit
(Director - Finance & Operations)

Name: Verka
Description:
Verka is a flagship brand of MILKFED and came into being in 1973 when it was mandated for milk procurement, quality processing of milk and its products. 
The primary aim is to provide a lucrative milk market to the state milk producers by value addition and marketing of produce. Another one of its objective is to provide technical inputs for the enhancement of milk production. 

Vision
To become the most admired brand in the dairy sector and vibrant cooperative institution in the country, facilitating inclusive growth.

Name: California Dairies, Inc.
Description:
California Dairies, Inc. is the states leading farmer-owned dairy cooperative. We are dedicated to producing the highest quality dairy products. 
Our team contributes to a vital industry where our work directly impacts daily life, around the globe. We're committed to our employees' success, offering competitive benefits and robust career growth opportunities in a dynamic environment.

Name: Innovation Center for U.S. Dairy
Description: The Innovation Center for U.S. Dairy (IC) is a precompetitive forum initiated by dairy farmers in 2008 to drive alignment and action across the U.S. dairy community on category-wide issues and opportunities.  The IC brings together leaders and experts from agriculture, co-operatives, processors, retailers, civil society, academia and more to advance a shared dairy social responsibility platform and communicate U.S. dairy’s positive impact. This work is reflected in the U.S. Dairy Stewardship Commitment, dairy’s pledge to demonstrate and report progress against an economically viable and socially responsible U.S. dairy community from farm to table. We welcome the involvement of all those along the dairy chain who share our commitment of a socially responsible and ever-improving dairy community. If you would like to learn more or become involved, please contact us at innovationcenter@usdairy.com

Name: Goodfarms Milk Pvt Ltd.
Description:
Goodfarms Milk Private Limited (GMPL), operates one of India’s largest private dairy farms having approx.~1400 heads of cattle of 
Holstein Friesian and Gir breed. Goodfarms is located within 550 acres of lush green forested area, on the banks of the Meshwo river, 
Modasa, surrounded by the imposing Aravalli mountain range, in the Aravalli district of Gujarat. 
Goodfarms is developed as an integrated business model to achieve forward and backward integration for the “Grass to Glass” model
Goodfarms has successfully addressed Feed manufacturing and storage through hi-tech agricultural crop cultivation, processing and baling techniques, Breed development with In-House Veterinary and Diagnostic services, 
utilizing advanced AI and Genomic tools, and localized specialized calf rearing techniques and infrastructure. 
2Q Milk production (i.e. Quality and Quantity) through scientific and efficient Dairy farming and animal husbandry, integrated with Agri tech based in house and contract feed cultivation and storage, topped off by Fertilizer production for captive consumption have become the hallmarks of Goodfarms success.
With proven operational and scientific capabilities, the Goodfarms team remains committed to developing and growing this environment friendly, socio-economic booster, state-of-the-art business model in the region.

Name: Ananda Dairy
Description: Ananda Group was started with a thought of providing wholesome nutrition to the people through a wide range of international quality Dairy products

Name: Shwetdhara Milk Producer Organisation
Description:
Shwetdhara Milk Producer Company Ltd. is a producer owned enterprise registered on April 25, 2016 under chapter XXI-A of Companies Act, 2013. Shwetdhara runs on the basis of Mutual Assistance Principles i.e voluntary membership, voting rights independent of shareholding, an elected board, limited dividend, education of members and co-operation with other organisations. 

The core objectives of the Company are as under: 
 
1. To carry on the business of pooling, purchasing, processing of milk supplied by the members, marketing of the same and to deal in allied activities. 
2. To provide or arrange to provide technical and managerial services in the areas of breeding, feed/ fodder, veterinary services to increase milk production for the benefit of the members. 
3. To provide education, training and other activities to promote mutual assistance amongst the members. 
4. To arrange to procure quality milk from members that meet the standards laid down by the organization and statutory authorities.

Name: PUNTA DEL AGUA
Description: Punta del Agua S.A. es una empresa de firmes raíces familiares con más de 50 años de trayectoria en el sector lácteo.

Name: Wisconsin Cheese Makers Association
Description: Wisconsin Cheese Makers Association gives voice to Wisconsin dairy processors on national and state issues that impact our businesses. WCMA is an active advocate for fair and reasonable regulation and legislation both in Washington D.C. and in Wisconsin. Through internal newsletters and constant communication in national media, WCMA works to maintain a positive, competitive climate for dairy manufacturers and marketers. WCMA also offers training and education programs, industry recognition, scholarship opportunities, and much more.

Name: Parma Guatemala
Description: Parma, is a guatemalan company in the dairy industry. We work mostly in the manufacturing and commercialization of products elaborated and derived of fresh milk. We have more than 50 years of trajectory that have helped us grow, innovate and develop into what we are today.

Name: Aurivo Co-operative Society Limited
Description:
Aurivo Co-operative Society Limited is an innovative, multipurpose agricultural co-operative with business interests in Dairy Ingredients, Consumer Foods, Sports Nutrition, Agri and Lifestyle Retail Stores, Animal Nutrition and Livestock Marts and Trading. 
Aurivo has an award winning portfolio of  regional, national and international consumer  foods brands, including For Goodness Shakes sports nutrition; Connacht Gold; Organic for Us; Donegal Creameries and exports butter and enriched milk powder to almost 50 countries worldwide. 
Aurivo operates a network of agri retail and lifestyle stores under the Homeland brand, and its scientifically formulated animal nutrition brand is Nutrias. 

Aurivo has a turnover of around €400m and has a team of approximately 650 employees.

Name: Cooperativa Central Mineira de Laticínios - CEMIL
Description:
Em seus 30 anos de história, a Cemil é guiada pelos princípios cooperativistas. É uma cooperativa resultante do trabalho incansável de inúmeras pessoas que acordam todos os dias com o mesmo propósito: produzir o melhor leite possível em segurança e qualidade. São milhares de produtores rurais e centenas de colaboradores que, diariamente, trabalham com empenho e dedicação para levar um mix de produtos com sabor e alta qualidade para a mesa de nossos consumidores.

Nossa paixão pelo leite nos tornou uma das mais importantes indústrias de leite longa vida e bebidas lácteas de Minas Gerais e uma das marcas mais vendidas do Brasil. O leite processado pela Cemil se traduz em segurança e estabilidade para diversas famílias, além de contribuir para o desenvolvimento da região.

Estrategicamente localizado na maior bacia leiteira do país e próximo aos grandes centros consumidores, o parque industrial da Cemil conta com a mais avançada tecnologia disponível em fabricação de laticínios. A Cemil é uma cooperativa que investe na inovação e tecnologia sem se esquecer de suas responsabilidades sociais e ambientais. Consciente da importância de seus colaboradores no processo de evolução, e sempre atenta aos cooperados e aos seus consumidores. Uma cooperativa geradora de postos de trabalho e riquezas, que mantém o seu olhar no futuro, e os seus pés em suas origens.

Name: Lactalis Ingredients
Description:
Global producer of whey and milk ingredients for the food, beverage and nutrition industry, Lactalis Ingredients is active in more than 100 countries worldwide. Our mission is to provide the best of whey and milk through targeted innovative solutions. 

As part of Lactalis Group, leading dairy company and number one cheese producer in the world, Lactalis Ingredients leverages over 85 years of dairy tradition to deliver excellence and technical expertise.

Name: Liban Lait SAL
Description:
Since 1997, Libanlait has been bringing fresh, high-quality dairy products to families across Lebanon. Through a franchise agreement with Candia|France, Liban Lait SAL also offers a dairy and juice line, which is distributed nationwide.

With an area covering over 504,000 square meters in the Bekaa Valley, LibanLait’s facilities include a farm, a state-of-the art processing plant, fully automated production and packaging lines and a quality department.  A herd of 3,000 Holstein cows, nurtured by expert veterinarians secure the supply of high-quality milk. Unwavering, stringent control procedures are enforced at every stage of production, packaging, and loading, ensuring the highest quality standards. Supported by an in-house logistics and sales distribution network, we achieve consistent daily market coverage.

A varied dairy product range is crafted to meet every taste and lifestyle. Leading the market with premium quality, our fresh and long-life UHT milk offers convenience and nourishment. Embracing tradition, our authentic Lebanese staples - Labneh (strained yogurt) and Laban (yogurt) - remain essential in every household. For moments of joy, our milk drinks bring delightful refreshment to both children and adults alike. When it comes to snacking, sandwiches and culinary creations, our fresh semi-soft cheeses provide the perfect blend of texture and taste.

Our mission is to deliver well-being and lasting value through high-quality dairy and juice products, guided by a deep commitment to sustainability, and socio-economic development. We work hand-in-hand with our partners, suppliers, and retailers to serve our communities - our team, and consumers at large - with integrity and purpose.

AUTHENTICITY. UNCOMPROMISING QUALITY. PROUDLY LEBANESE.  
 
Natural goodness guaranteed, because better living belongs to everyone!

We value your input. E-mail:info@libanlait.com

Name: Doodhvale Farms
Description:
Doodhvale Farms: Doodh is not doodh, until it's fresh and pure.

Doodhvale Farms is a fully vertically integrated, technology-driven Direct-to-Consumer (D2C) dairy and daily essentials company that produces and delivers premium, farm-fresh products directly to consumers' doorsteps. The company's mission is to bring back the soul-satisfying, nutrient-packed, farm-fresh richness that milk was always meant to be. From their happy cattle roaming free in modern farms to delivering farm-fresh milk within 36 hours, every action reflects their unwavering commitment to purity. Because, doodh is not doodh, until it's fresh and pure.

Our Products
Explore a wide range of farm-fresh milk, dairy, and daily essentials. We deliver premium-quality milk from happy cattle at hi-tech farms, including Sahiwal, Gir, Rathi cows, and Murrah buffaloes, along with other dairy items, rich traditional sweets, bakery products, and more. Everything is sourced directly and delivered without middlemen.

App Features
Subscription Made Easy: Set delivery frequency for milk or other products—daily, alternate days, or specific weekdays.
Order Management: Place or modify orders by 11:00 PM for next-morning delivery.
Pause & Resume: Pause deliveries easily when you're away, and they resume automatically on your return.
Seamless Recharge: Recharge via multiple options like UPI, wallets, and cards.
Loyalty Program: Earn and redeem coins monthly for additional savings.
Referral Program: Invite friends to enjoy discounts for both.
Billing Transparency: View monthly bills, daily deliveries, and consumption details easily.

Description: Dairy Management Inc. (DMI) is funded by America’s 29,000 dairy farmers, as well as dairy importers. Name: Jayamm Milk Products Private Limited
Description:
Jayamm Milk Products Private Limited is a leading manufacturer and supplier of dairy products spanning across pan India. We operate our milk procurement across Tamil Nadu and certain parts of Andhra Pradesh. Our milk and dairy products are sold under the popular brand name Swastika through our Strategic Business Partners. Since its inception, the company has been growing and expanding consistently under the visionary leadership of promoter directors, the business acumen of operational heads, and the unrelenting efforts of a committed workforce.

Jayamm Milk Products is a symbol of unrivaled quality and innovation. Our Swastika range of products is a testament to purity, quality, and a commitment to enriching lives. Being headquartered in Chennai, India, we have redefined industry standards by seamlessly combining exceptional quality, meticulous safety protocols, world-class packaging, and an expansive nationwide reach.

We partner with local farmers who share our commitment to ethical farming practices, ensuring that only the finest quality of milk finds its way into our state-of-the-art production facilities. We adhere to stringent quality control measures, guaranteeing excellence.

Name: Dairy Processors Association of Canada | Association des transformateurs laitiers du Canada
Description:
Established in 2003, the Dairy Processors Association of Canada (DPAC) is the national voice of the dairy processing sector, representing the public policy and regulatory interests of Canada's dairy processors. Our members represent some of the most recognized brands in Canada and provide work to over 24,500 Canadians, contributing $18 billion to the national economy. 
_________________________________________________________

Créée en 2003, l’Association des transformateurs laitiers du Canada (ATLC) est la voix nationale du secteur de la transformation des produits laitiers représentant les intérêts de politiques publiques et réglementaires de l’industrie de la transformation des produits laitiers au pays. Nos membres sont les dépositaires de certaines des marques les plus reconnues au Canada et emploient plus de 24500 Canadiennes et Canadiens, pour une contribution à l’économie nationale s’élevant à 18 milliards de dollars.

Name: Lácteos Verónica S.A.
Description:
Empresa nacional dedicada a la elaboración de productos lacteos:leches,manteca,dulces y quesos.
Hoy cuenta con 8 plantas industriales instaladas en la más importante cuenca lechera de latinoamérica, en las localidades de Suardi, Lehmann y Totoras, equipadas con la tecnología más avanzada del mundo.

Name: Warrnambool Cheese and Butter
Description:
Established in 1888, Warrnambool Cheese & Butter (WCB) is Australia's oldest dairy processor and has been producing high quality dairy products for over 125 years. WCB is one of the largest dairy processors in Australia and is the Dairy Division (Australia) of Saputo Inc. 

WCB is located on the Great Ocean Road at Allansford near Warrnambool in south-west Victoria, one of the best dairy regions in Australia.  WCB's products include cheese, butter and butter blends, milk, cream and other dairy ingredients which are sold in Australia and to various customers around the world under well-known brand names including Sungold, COON, Cracker Barrel,6 Mil Lel and Great Ocean Road. Sales are well-balanced between domestic and export markets. 

WCB employees around 800 people and is a major regional employer in the South West of Victoria.  Manufacturing operations occur at a factory site in Allansford. The site comprises separate manufacturing facilities for cheese and other dairy products, and a cheese cut and wrap operation.  WCB also operates a specialty cheese cut and wrap plant in Mil Lel, just north of Mt Gambier, in South Australia, and Sales offices in Melbourne and Tokyo. 
In February 2014, Saputo acquired an interest of approximately 88% of WCB.  In February 2017, Saputo Inc. successfully acquired additional shares to complete the acquisition of WCB.

To learn more about Warrnambool Cheese & Butter, visit online at http://www.wcbf.com.au/Home 

To learn more about Saputo Inc, visit online at  www.saputo.com

Name: Fazenda Atibainha - Laticínio Atilatte
Description:
Em nossa fazenda produzimos os melhores iogurtes premium, queijos, creme de leite, leite tipo A e coalhadas do Brasil, valorizando a qualidade de vida, a saúde e o bem-estar das pessoas. É a nossa forma de viver a vida, acreditando na produção autossustentável, no respeito ao ecossistema, a natureza e ao planeta! Nossa filosofia é trazer o verdadeiro sabor da natureza até você, por isso não usamos hormônios na fabricação de nossos produtos, que recebem apenas corantes e aromas naturais com o mais puro leite tipo A do mercado, o nosso.

Proteção Ambiental
Toda a produção da Atilatte é localizada na Fazenda Atibainha, que dispõe de extensas áreas de agricultura intensiva de forrageiras, como milho para silagem, campos de feno e pastagens para o rebanho leiteiro, além de áreas de reflorestamento em pinus e eucaliptus, matas ciliares às margens do Rio Atibaia e reserva legal em matas virgens, totalmente preservadas. A Atilatte já nasceu sustentável e focada em sua responsabilidade socioambiental, antecipando-se sempre as exigências dos órgãos fiscalizadores.

Sustentabilidade
Todos os resíduos produzidos pelo laticínio são tratados e utilizados posteriormente como fertilizantes nas áreas agrícolas da fazenda. Assim, a necessidade de reposição de matéria orgânica nas áreas de plantio é feita de forma natural e sustentável, eliminando-se a necessidade de fertilizantes químicos. A matéria orgânica extraída da terra em forma de forragens, retorna à terra diluída em água na forma de fértil irrigação, fechando um ciclo importante de ecorrenovação.

Name: Ellsworth Cooperative Creamery
Description:
Located in the heart of Wisconsin’s Dairyland, Ellsworth Cooperative Creamery produces 190,000 pounds of cheddar cheese curds daily. They’re so delicious that we’ve earned the title of “Cheese Curd Capital of Wisconsin”, a title bestowed by Governor Anthony S. Earl in 1983. Our all-natural premium cheddar cheese curds can be found in all 50 states and around the world.
Our Wohlt Creamery, in New London, WI, joined the team in 2018. Specializing in high-quality and customized processed cheeses for food service, retail deli, and pre-packaged food manufacturers, at Wohlt, quality and innovation are woven into the culture.
In early 2022, we opened our new production facility in Menomonie, WI. This new facility combines experience, tradition, and standards of quality with modern-day green technology for the lowest environmental impact to produce a variety of specialty block cheeses.

Name: SwadeshiVIP - A2 Milk
Description:
"SwadeshiVIP - A2: Cultivating Wellness and Cow Care"

At SwadeshiVIP, we're on a mission to redefine your dairy experience. We believe in the power of nature, and our commitment to you and your family is unwavering. Our goal is to provide you with the most nutritious, preservative-free organic milk and wholesome dairy products, ensuring the natural goodness that your body deserves.

Preserving Nature's Goodness
We stand by our values, prioritizing both quality and timely delivery. With SwadeshiVIP, you can trust that every sip of our milk and every bite of our dairy products is a taste of purity. Our dedication to excellence ensures that you never have to compromise on the quality of the food you consume.

Beyond the Dairy Farm
But our journey doesn't end at the dairy farm. SwadeshiVIP takes pride in being a part of something bigger. We are proud to announce our partnership with India's leading NGO, hindrise.org, under their Community Partnership Program. Through this collaboration, we're feeding over 5000 roadside cows in Noida, providing them with the care and nourishment they deserve. 

Join the SwadeshiVIP Movement
We invite you to join the SwadeshiVIP movement. By supporting us, you're not only choosing a healthier, more natural way of life for yourself and your family, but you're also contributing to the protection of indigenous cows in India. Together, we can ensure that these sacred animals receive the love and care they need to thrive.

At SwadeshiVIP, we're not just about milk; we're about cultivating wellness and cow care. Come, be a part of our journey, and let's nurture nature's goodness together.
