Name: LETTILOG Logística Refrigerada
Description:
Iniciamos em outubro de 2008 a distribuição em São Paulo de derivados de leite de primeiríssima linha (leite A, iogurte e creme de leite da Fazenda Agrindus, além de suco de laranja , manteiga  e queijos de búfala  de terceiros selecionados) .
Como uma breve introdução, a Fazenda Agrindus tem 65 anos de tradição no leite, sendo pioneira no desenvolvimento do gado Holandês no Brasil (com importações desde 1961), já fazendo inseminação artificial desde 1967, nos anos 80 trabalhando com transferência de embriões e um pouco mais recente com sexagem.  Atualmente é a segunda maior produtora de leite A do Brasil com média diária de 50.000 litros e clientes como Nestle e Rascál, entre muitos outros. 
Atualmente somos fornecedores de praticamente 100% do creme de leite e leite usados na rede Rascal, aprovados pela rede Sergio Arno, Hospital Metropolitano, Empório Santa Luzia, Empório Moema, entre vários outros.
Podemos diferenciar a qualidade do leite A no que se refere a manutenção dos Lactobacilos Vivos (destruídos no longa vida), rastreamento do rebanho, por ser único, pasteurização e embalagem na própria fazenda, a baixíssima quantidade de  ufc (unidades formadoras de colônias) após o processamento (abaixo de 100 ufc/ml no nosso caso, versus 40.000 ufc no leite B  no mercado e 150.000 ufc no leite C) e a ausência total de coliformes fecais (permitido pela legislação 2/ml no leite B e 5/ml no leite C). Este leite é base para nossos outros produtos como iogurte e creme de leite.
Além do nosso ser direto da fazenda, conseguimos ser bem competitivos no segmento institucional por oferecermos o mesmo produto vendido nas padarias (em garrafas de 1.000ml para leite e 600ml para creme de leite) em sacos de um litro.
Temos também iogurtes feitos com leite A semidesnatados nos sabores pêssego, frutas vermelhas e morando em garrafas de 600 ml e 180 ml,  suco de laranja com 1.000 ml, além da manteiga argentina "La Sereníssima" em pacotes de 200 grs

Name: Watson Dairy Consulting
Description:
We are leaders in the dairy industry and offer independent advice and consultancy to dairy manufacturers / milk processors. We provide project Intrerim Factory Management & project management services for the design and build of dairy and food production plants as well as bespoke consultancy for individual projects relating to the dairy industry. We are based in the UK, and operate worldwide with over 40 years experience. 

We provide management services for greenfield dairy developments, as well as expansions and relocations and offer process optimisation to existing dairy factories looking to become more automated and cut costs. We use our contacts in the industry to help our clients achieve their objectives and become more profitable.

Established in 1998, we provide design services for milk powder,
infant formula milk powder, butter, butter-oil, cream, ghee, ice cream, frozen yogurt, pasteurised milk, cheese, UHT milk and yogurt factories throughout the world.

Name: Vidya Dairy
Description:
Established in 1994 under the visionary guidance of Dr. Verghese Kurien, the Father of the White Revolution, Vidya Dairy is a unique institution dedicated to hands-on, industry-integrated training in the dairy sector.

Functioning as a commercially operating dairy with an installed capacity of 2 lakh liters per day, Vidya Dairy provides year-long, immersive training to final-year B.Tech. (Dairy Technology) students from SMC College of Dairy Science, Kamdhenu University. This “Learning-by-Doing” model bridges academic learning with real-world dairy operations—developing skilled, industry-ready professionals.

Training is delivered across 12 structured modules covering milk processing, engineering, quality assurance, marketing, finance, and plant administration—mirroring the workflow of large-scale cooperative dairies like Amul. While delivering high-quality products, Vidya Dairy remains focused on its core mission: student training, making it distinct from conventional commercial dairies.

Beyond academia, Vidya Dairy also plays a vital role in upskilling the dairy workforce. It regularly conducts short-term training programs for professionals from cooperatives, government bodies, and private sector leaders such as IDMC, GEA, L&T, and Tetra Pak, both from India and abroad.

Vidya Dairy stands as a model of self-reliance and sustainability, contributing significantly to the growth of India’s dairy sector through education, innovation, and excellence in practice.

Name: Andechser Molkerei Scheitz GmbH
Description:
Die Andechser Molkerei Scheitz ist ein moderner, mittelständischer und inhabergeführter Familienbetrieb mit Sitz in Oberbayern. Das Produktsortiment der Bio-Molkerei aus Andechs reicht vom feinsten Jogurt über fruchtig-frische Jogurtdrinks bis hin zum herzhaftesten Käseschmankerl und einer feinen Auswahl an Ziegenmilchprodukten. Die ANDECHSER NATUR Bio-Produkte werden –getreu dem Credo „Natürliches natürlich belassen“ – ausschließlich aus besten Rohstoffen, ohne künstliche Zusatzstoffe, ohne Aromen und ohne gentechnisch veränderte Substanzen hergestellt.
Dabei verarbeitet das Unternehmen jährlich ca. 130 Mio. kg Kuhmilch und etwa 10,5 Mio. kg Ziegenmilch. Die wertvolle Bio-Milch liefern insgesamt 663 verbandszertifizierte Bio-Milchlieferanten in einem Umkreis von 160 km, mit denen die Molkerei vertrauensvoll und in einer „Partnerschaft auf Augenhöhe“ zusammenarbeitet.

Description:
Asha Mahila Milk Producer Company Ltd. is a producer owned enterprise registered on March 21, 2016 under chapter XXI-A of Companies Act, 2013. Asha has only women members and runs on the basis of Mutual Assistance Principles i.e voluntary membership, voting rights independent of shareholding, an elected board, limited dividend, education of members and co-operation with other organizations. 

The core objectives of the Company are as under: 

1. To carry on the business of pooling, purchasing, processing of milk supplied by the members, marketing of the same and to deal in allied activities. 
2. To provide or arrange to provide technical and managerial services in the areas of breeding, feed/ fodder, veterinary services to increase milk production for the benefit of the members. 
3. To provide education, training and other activities to promote mutual assistance amongst the members. 
4. To arrange to procure quality milk from members that meet the standards laid down by the organization and statutory authorities.

Name: Karibu Food
Description:
KARIBU Food General Trading, a global milk powder supplier, headquartered in Dubai, United Arab Emirates, specializes in supplying an entire range of Milk Powder (IFCMP, FCMP, SMP, FFMP). KARIBU is a high-quality milk powder sourced from the heart of Europe.
Our Company is highly experienced in the dairy-processing industry and thrives in sourcing our customers in the G.C.C, Africa and South East Asian Market.

Name: GIOIELLA LATTICINI
Description:
Il Gruppo Gioiella, con sede a Gioia del Colle, opera dal 1946 nel comparto lattiero caseario producendo una vasta gamma di latticini di alta qualità come burrata, mozzarella, ricotta, formaggi semiduri e altre specialità.

Il latte utilizzato viene raccolto fresco quotidianamente e proveniente prevalentemente da allevamenti locali, costantemente attenti al benessere animale mediante un controllo diretto sulle stalle.

Tra i punti di forza della realtà, vi è la produzione tradizionale con l’impiego del siero-innesto autoctono, la filiera corta con allevatori selezionati, la tracciabilità della filiera fino alla stalla, il rispetto di un rigido disciplinare in materia di sicurezza e qualità alimentare.

3000 quintali di latte lavorato quotidianamente, 9 linee produttive per prodotti a pasta filata, 3 linee produttive per ricotta, 2 linee produttive per prodotti affumicati, 1 linea produttiva per formaggi e 30 linee di confezionamento e oltre 2000 Sku’s gestite.

Il brand Gioiella è presente oggi nelle maggiori catene distributive in tutto il mondo. Oltre 70 anni di storia, tradizione e qualità tramandata dalla famiglia Capurso, giunta oggi alla 3° generazione che prosegue lo sviluppo del business in modo virtuoso e con un occhio attento alla sostenibilità economica, sociale e ambientale, in allineamento agli Obiettivi di Sviluppo Sostenibile (SDGs) dell’agenda 2030.

Name: Southern Pastures Limited Partnership
Description: Southern Pastures LP is an institutional investor dairy farming fund. Southern Pastures utilises grass-fed, free-range, GMO and hormone-free, animal welfare and sustainability based farming systems. The Southern Pastures Group includes NZ Grass-Fed LP and the famous Lewis Road Creamery

Name: BV Dairy
Description:
A widely respected specialist chilled dairy producer for the Manufacturing, Catering and Food Service industries, now offering a range of contract manufacturing opportunities. BV Dairy are committed to supplying consistent, top quality products using the latest manufacturing technology. This is allied to a friendly and efficient service, tailored to each customer’s individual needs.

Operating an ongoing development programme for both new and existing products and manufacturing processes, we are proud of our achievements in terms of award winning and accredited product range.

Name: Gonçalves Salles S/A Ind. Com. (Laticínios Aviação)
Description: Empresa Brasileira de laticínios com 90 anos de existência, líder nacional de vendas de manteigas e também a número um em qualidade neste item. Possou ampla linha de queijos, requeijões  e doce de leite, zelando sempre pela qualidade de seus produtos.

Name: Molokia
Description: Компанія «Молокія» – це велика сім'я, в якій немає зайвих людей. Усі свої. І вже двадцять років ми разом робимо чесні молочні продукти, в яких теж нема нічого зайвого. Мабуть, інакше ми просто не можемо. В час війни ми знайшли в собі дещо особливе. Те, що дає фермерам сили доглядати корів. Водіям – доставляти молоко. Молокіянам – робити йогурти, сметани і кефіри. Пакувати, складати, розвозити, відправляти і знову робити. Навіть якщо страшно і небезпечно. Це сміливість бути Україною. Зберігаймо її, що б там не було. І щоб молочка далі була.

Name: Gestión Agro Ganadera S.L
Description:
TRADICION E INNOVACION
GESTION AGRO GANADERA S.L., empresa presente en el sector lácteo de ovino desde el año 1994, pone en marcha a finales del año 2002 una nueva línea de negocio dedicada a la fabricación de forma artesanal de QUESO DE OVEJA de la máxima calidad.

Para ello rehabilita en su totalidad una antigua y prestigiosa fabrica en la localidad de Fuentesaúco (Zamora), provincia donde, desde siempre, se han producido los más famosos quesos regionales, con el nombre comercial de QUESERIA LA ANTIGUA DE FUENTESAUCO.

Dedicados de manera exclusiva a la fabricación de leche cruda de oveja, elaboramos todos nuestros quesos siguiendo la tradición artesana, con el mimo y cuidado de antaño, en una moderna fábrica
dotada de avanzada tecnología, preservando siempre los métodos tradicionales de nuestros antepasados.

En el mes de noviembre 2007 se ha implantado el Sistema de Control de Calidad BRC GLOBAL STANDARD FOOD Issue 4:January 2005, Norma que tiene el más alto grado de prestigio internacional. A finales de enero 2008, se ha realizado también la Auditoria del Sistema de Calidad INTERNATIONAL FOOD STANDARD (IFS) Issue 4, january 2004. Ambas Certificaciones han sido realizadas por LLOYD´S REGISTER QUALITY ASSURANCE LIMITED.

Name: Eurial Italia
Description:
Eurial, la divisione latte del gruppo Agrial, è il 2° più grande gruppo cooperativo lattiero-caseario francese.

In Francia, Eurial è leader nel mercato del formaggio di capra con il suo marchio Soignon, in quello del burro di specialità con il marchio Grand Fermage, nonché per quanto riguarda la mozzarella industriale con il marchio Maestrella.

Forte dei suoi valori cooperativi e di una grande esperienza, la mission di Eurial è quella di garantire ai consumatori prodotti sani e sicuri.

In Italia è presente con uno stabilimento a Borso del Grappa (Treviso), ai piedi del Monte Grappa.  In questo luogo di lunga tradizione casearia, Eurial produce formaggi freschi e yogurt per soddisfare gli esigenti palati dei consumatori italiani.

Per saperne di più sui nostri prodotti:
- https://www.bonta-viva.it/
- https://it.soignon.com/
- https://www.maestrella.com/it/

Name: Laticínios Monte Celeste
Description: O Laticínios Monte Celeste tem todas suas atividades voltadas para produção de Queijo Minas frescal e Ricota Fresca, atividades estas realizada com qualidade desde a coleta da matéria-prima láctea até o produto final, feitos com tecnologia e viabilidade para o consumo.

Name: AL-BOROUJ Company for dairy production
Description: Rhodes Cheese is produced by Al Borouj for food industries, a sister company of  Badawy Group for food industeries, the owner of Al Arousa Tea and Hawaa Pasta trade marks.

Name: Grafton Village Cheese Company
Description: We produce small batch cheeses made by hand using traditional methods and unpasteurized milk for our characteristic flavor profile. Our products include traditional New England-style cheddars matured as long as 4 years and specialty cave-aged cheeses with cow, sheep and mixed milks. Grafton Village Cheese is a Windham Foundation-owned enterprise, supporting Vermont's rural communities through grants, programs, and social enterprises.

Name: Sill Dairy International
Description:
Sill Dairy International, the most recent plant of SILL ENTREPRISES, is dedicated exclusively to the manufacture of infant formula. SDI is based in Landivisiau in Brittany- France. From the outset, this new, ultra-modern plant, operational in the spring of 2021, has incorporated the latest regulatory standards. SDI also relies on the strength of SILL ENTREPRISES. Established in 1962 in Brittany, the group's core business is the manufacture of dairy products and infant formula from its own dairy network

SDI offers several ranges of products specifically adapted to different customer profiles:

-	Laboratoires Vitalaë, SDI's own brand, comes in several formulas (standard, premium, organic) designed to meet the nutritional needs of babies throughout their growth, including occasional specific needs (AR, Comfort, etc...) or long-lasting (LF, EHF).

-	A complete Copack offer. SDI acts as a service provider for the production of infant milk on behalf of third-party brands. Depending on the specifications, SDI can manage all or part of the process, from conception to delivery.

-	“Infant grade" ingredients: infant grade milk powders dedicated to professionals

Today, Sill Dairy International has probably one of the most modern infant milk production plants in the world equipped with an extremely precise automatic production control tool, the MES (Manufacturing Execution System). It allows a standardization and a constant quality of the product at the microbiological and physico-chemical level throughout the year. It also guarantees real-time traceability

Name: PT. BANGUN RASAGUNA LESTARI
Description: Process Cheddar Cheese Manufacturing with brand WINCheez that supported by a team who has more than 20 years of experience in the process cheese industry. We committed to produce best quality product and being a trusted partner

Name: Eucolait
Description:
EUCOLAIT is the European Association of Dairy Trade representing the European wholesalers, exporters and importers of dairy products.

EUCOLAIT promotes the interests of the dairy trade at the European Institutions, is a platform for discussion and meetings for European and international dairy trade companies and provides an unparalleled information service on relevant policy and market developments.

Name: Dlba Dairy Company
Description:
"Welcome to the heart of DLBA Dairy, where excellence is crafted and tradition meets innovation. Our state-of-the-art dairy factory is a symphony of precision and care, where each process is meticulously designed to bring you the purest and freshest dairy products.


Step inside our factory, where the aroma of freshly crafted dairy delights fills the air, and the passion of our team resonates in every corner. We adhere to the highest industry standards, ensuring that each product bearing the DLBA name is a testament to our dedication to quality.

Join us on a journey through the art and science of dairy production. Experience the care, expertise, and love that goes into every batch we create. DLBA Dairy – where the art of dairy comes to life, enriching your moments with the purest joy of nature's bounty."

Name: Olympia NV
Description: OLYMPIA is een zuivelfabriek. Wij produceren UHT producten zoals melk, room, ijsmix en overheerlijke desserten en vullingen.

Name: KHYBER AGRO FARMS
Description:
Introducing Khyber Agro Farms also popularly known as Khyber Milk, a stalwart in Kashmir's dairy landscape, established in 1998. With a legacy spanning over more than two decades, Khyber Agro Farms has emerged as one of the foremost brands in the valley's dairy sector. Boasting an impressive handling capacity of 1,80,000 liters of milk per day, we have solidified our position as a leader in dairy production and distribution specialising in a diverse range of dairy products, including milk, curd, ghee, paneer, yogurt, buttermilk, and lassi.

At Khyber Agro Farms, our dedication to excellence extends beyond mere production. We prioritize customer satisfaction, striving to meet the evolving needs of our diverse clientele.

Moreover, Khyber Agro Farms is deeply committed to supporting local communities and empowering farmers across Kashmir. By providing fair prices for milk and fostering sustainable agricultural practices, we contribute to the socio-economic development of the region, fostering a symbiotic relationship with our suppliers.

Driven by a passion for purity and authenticity, Khyber Agro Farms stands as a beacon of quality in Kashmir's dairy industry, enriching lives with every sip and bite of our wholesome products.

Name: Maui Milk
Description:
At Maui Sheep Milk we’re passionate about bringing pure wholesome sheep milk products to the world using innovative technology, sustainable farming, and animal welfare practices. Our 100% pure premium Maui sheep milk products (including sheep milk powder) are available for export and/or distribution from New Zealand.

Learn more >>
https://www.mauimilk.co.nz/products/

Name: Cumberland Valley Analytical Services, Inc
Description:
Cumberland Valley Analytical Services (CVAS) was started in 1994 as a small chemistry forage lab serving the local dairy industry in Maryland and south-central Pennsylvania. Beginning with only 800 square feet of leased space and one employee our main facility now encompasses over 33,000 square feet dedicated to agricultural materials analysis.

CVAS employs over 90 people in its Waynesboro facilities and has satellite locations in Batavia, NY, Zumbrota, MN, and Madison, WI.  In addition, our team supports over 35 affiliate labs in the U.S., Canada, and globally.

CVAS has grown significantly by providing cutting-edge forage and feed evaluation services in a quick, accurate, and cost-effective manner. CVAS was the first to commercialize the Fermentation Analysis in the U.S. and one of the first to offer extensive in vitro digestibility services and analyses for the Cornell and CPM nutritional models.

As the largest chemistry-based feed lab in the U.S., CVAS has the resources to offer one of the most comprehensive sets of NIR forage and feed evaluations available to the industry.

Building on its successful service model, CVAS supports multiple lab entities throughout the U.S and around the world with NIR technical services.

Despite its size, growth and investment CVAS continues to operate as a fully independent family owned company.

Name: Hiroland
Description:
Hiroland Dairy: Your Trusted Source for Premium Powdered Milk Products, where quality meets your dairy needs. Explore our selection today and taste the excellence that sets us apart.
We supply a wide range of Dairy Products and Ingredients such as SMP, WMP, BMP, Butter (SCB), UHT Milk, Cheese, Whey Powder, and more.

Name: Câm
Description:
Câmpions of real dairy. 
We use real milk from real cows to make real dairy. 

To quench our thirst for the good stuff, we’re building a modern and sustainable 
dairy industry from scratch that unites pastoralists across Nigeria and produces enough milk to nourish our country.

Name: Tremblay
Description:
Somos una empresa láctea con perfil altamente innovador, creada por y para argentinos.
Situados en Pilar, Santa Fe, somos la empresa con mayor crecimiento de los últimos 10 años del país.

Name: South Caernarfon Creameries
Description:
South Caernarfon Creameries was established in 1938 by J.O.Roberts who had a vision to bring dairy farmers together to get a better price for their milk.

Based in the foothills of Snowdonia, SCC produce a range of Welsh cheese and butter under the Dragon brand.

Name: Ruhaanii Milk Producer Company limited
Description:
Ruhaanii Milk Producer Company Ltd. is a producer owned enterprise registered on October 21, 2016 under chapter XXI-A of Companies Act, 2013. The core objectives of the Company are as under:

Name: Doodh Bar
Description:
At Doodh Bar, we’re committed to bringing fresh, high-quality milk directly to your doorstep—daily and with zero delivery charges. We believe that convenience should be affordable, and that's why we’ve designed our service to offer the best of both: a hassle-free, daily milk delivery service that ensures you never run out of this essential part of your daily routine.

Our mission is simple: to make life easier for busy families and individuals by providing timely, safe, and consistent deliveries of the finest milk—without any extra delivery costs. Whether it’s for your morning coffee, a bowl of cereal, or a nutritious drink for your kids, Doodh Bar delivers fresh, locally sourced milk straight to your door, every day.

Why Choose Doodh Bar?
Zero Delivery Charges: Enjoy the convenience of milk delivered right to your doorstep without any additional delivery costs.

Freshness Guaranteed: Our milk is sourced from trusted local dairies to ensure the highest quality and freshness in every drop.

Daily Delivery: We provide daily deliveries, so you always have fresh milk when you need it.

Sustainable Practices: We’re committed to eco-friendly packaging and sustainable delivery methods to minimize our environmental impact.

Customer-Centered Service: With flexible subscription plans and personalized delivery schedules, we’re always here to make your life easier.

Whether you’re a busy professional, a parent, or someone who simply enjoys fresh, locally sourced dairy, Doodh Bar is here to simplify your daily routine—without the hassle of extra charges.

Let us take care of your milk delivery needs, so you can focus on what matters most.

Name: LOUROFOOD, LDA
Description:
Lourofood positions itself as a company that produces and sells cheeses with high quality standards.

It has a young technical staff, with great dynamism and technical knowledge and is equipped with the most modern technology.

Lourofood is characterized by the fast service it provides to its customers and partners and its future is based on three important pillars:

- Quality
- Price
- Service


A Lourofood posiciona-se como uma empresa que transforma e comercializa queijos com elevados padrões de qualidade. 

Possui quadros técnicos jovens, com grande dinamismo e conhecimento técnico. 
Está dotada da mais moderna tecnologia.

A Lourofood é caracterizada pelo rápido serviço que presta aos seus parceiros clientes e o seu futuro assenta em 3 importantes pilares:

- Qualidade
- Preço
- Serviço

Name: Westland Kaas B.V.
Description:
Al 90 jaar is familiebedrijf Westland Kaas een vertrouwde naam op de wereldwijde kaasmarkt. Vanuit onze Hollandse handelsgeest hebben wij merken als Old Amsterdam, Maaslander, Westlite en Trenta op de kaart gezet.
Met diepgaande expertise in kaas en de internationale kaasmarkt spelen we in op de vraag naar producten die gezond, verrassend en vernieuwend zijn. Wij richten ons volledig op Marketing, Sales en Research & Development, terwijl zorgvuldig geselecteerde partners zorg dragen voor de productie en verpakking van onze kazen.
Samen bouwen we verder aan 90 jaar vakmanschap, vernieuwing en smaak.

Name: Centrale del Latte di Roma S.p.A.
Description:
In ogni romano ci sono ricordi di famiglia legati alla Centrale del Latte di Roma, una lunga storia fatta di tradizione, qualità ed innovazione che dura da più di cento anni e che rappresenta un’eredità preziosa da custodire e preservare nel tempo.

Questo è il motivo che spinge ogni giorno il team della Centrale del Latte di Roma ad essere un punto di riferimento sul territorio nella produzione e distribuzione del latte fresco.

Il controllo della filiera produttiva, il know-how nella lavorazione, l’attenzione per la sicurezza alimentare valorizzano la nostra marca ed offrono ogni giorno un ampio assortimento di latte pastorizzato presente nel mercato del Lazio.

Garantire ai propri consumatori massimi standard di qualità, di sicurezza e di sviluppo di nuovi prodotti sono gli elementi  che supportano la leadership della Centrale del Latte di Roma sul territorio del Lazio.

Name: AMCO Proteins
Description:
AMCO Proteins partners with food, beverage, and nutrition brands to deliver high-quality dairy and functional protein ingredients. With over 60 years of experience in dairy protein manufacturing, we help our customers bring better products to market—faster and more efficiently.

As a U.S.-based manufacturer with a focus on dairy and custom protein powders, AMCO supports customers from early-stage formulation through product launch and existing business protein ingredient supply.

Our protein portfolio includes:
• Hydrolysates & Functional Proteins
• Custom Protein Blends
• Milk Proteins
•Whey Proteins
• Casein & Caseinates

Whether you’re looking to improve texture, enhance nutrition, increase functionality, or meet clean label demands, our application-driven approach allows us to identify proteins appropriate to your needs.

 We work closely with clients to supply proteins, solve formulation challenges and support product development across categories—RTDs, powders, bars, baking, and more.

Driven by a passion for protein and a commitment to quality, AMCO continues to push innovation forward with every customer partnership.

Name: Tipperary Cooperative
Description:
Tipperary Cooperative Creamery Limited is a medium-sized 100% farmer owned cooperative with over one hundred years of dairy processing experience, Tipperary Cooperative is widely renowned for the manufacture of high quality, technically differentiated dairy ingredients. 

We are a leading supplier of high quality milk powders and continues to be a leading manufacturer of high heat and 'high heat - heat stable', low spore skim and buttermilk powders. We have a very highly automated cheese factory we manufacture a variety of continental style cheeses that include Emmental and Maasdam. Tipperary Cooperative also produces a high quality grass fed butter for retail and food ingredient sector. 

Research and innovation are core to Tipperary Cooperative and our technical teams work closely with both national and international research centers to provide our customers with research capabilities and technical solutions

Name: Shri Baba Gorakhnath Kripaa Milk Producer Organization
Description: Women milk producers’ owned company exclusively managed and governed by the women milk producer members. The aim is to establish an institutional setup at the Village level, providing a sustainable long-term livelihood option. This initiative provides year-round guaranteed market access for the milk supplied by the women milk producers of the Gorakhpur division.

Name: MALO - Laiterie de Saint-Malo
Description: Depuis sa création à Saint-Malo en 1948, MALO s’appuie sur des valeurs familiales fortes, cultivant souvenirs, savoir-faire traditionnels et ancrage territorial.

Name: Virtus Nutrition, LLC
Description: As the industry leader in fatty acid nutrition for dairy cattle, Virtus Nutrition precisely formulates and manufactures innovative dairy feed ingredients that are proven to drive significant improvements in production efficiency and reproductive performance. Virtus Nutrition collaborates with leading industry researchers to improve understanding of fatty acids in the diet, develops innovative products, and manufactures them to the tightest specifications to optimize their powerful results.

Name: SalzburgMilch
Description: SalzburgMilch is a dairy producer offering premium products made from premium milk.

Name: Milk Source, LLC
Description:
Milk Source LLC was co-founded in 1994 by Jim Ostrom, John Vosters and Todd Willer — all from multi-generational Wisconsin farm families — and traces its roots back to 1965 when a small 30-cow dairy farm was started in Freedom by John’s parents.
Milk Source operates quality dairies in Wisconsin and throughout the greater Midwest, producing milk to be used for cheese, butter and other dairy products. Milk Source also has a calf farm and a heifer raising facility, all featuring modern, sustainable and environmentally sound farming practices. 
Milk Source's goal every day is to be an outstanding dairy producer through quality care of animals, sustainable practices, environmental accountability and constant attention to detail. We are proud of an honest and considerate work force, and have earned a reputation as an outstanding place to work.

If you are interested in a career with Milk Source, please visit https://www.milksource.com/careers/ or email our HR department at mshr@milksource.net for more information.

Name: Molkerei Alois Müller
Description:
Aretsrieder Molkerei Alois Müller GmbH & Co KG, located in the Western Forests Nature Park just outside Augsburg, is the origin of the Unternehmensgruppe Theo Müller.

Founded in 1896 by Ludwig Müller, the former village dairy developed into a modern large dairy when Theo Müller took over the business in 1971.

Name: Granlatte Soc. Coop. Agricola - Granarolo group
Description:
Siamo nati nel 1957 con la fondazione della cooperativa che sarebbe diventata Granlatte, la più grande realtà di produttori di latte in Italia, che controlla la società per azioni Granarolo S.p.A..
La nostra cooperativa aderisce a Legacoop e a Confcooperative.

Siamo l’unica filiera italiana basata su un sistema integrato di produzione, dove l’intero processo è controllato e gestito in stretta collaborazione con i nostri 546 soci produttori singoli associati e 2 cooperative di raccolta in Emilia Romagna, Piemonte, Lombardia, Veneto, Friuli Venezia Giulia, Marche, Lazio, Molise, Campania, Basilicata, Puglia e Calabria. 
Insieme seguiamo tutte le fasi di processo: dalla produzione della materia prima alla distribuzione del prodotto finito ai punti vendita, per garantire la massima qualità e sicurezza e la ricerca costante di una sostenibilità a 360°, che si traduce in benessere animale, meno farmaci, meno acqua, meno emissioni, meno plastica, più trasparenza sull’origine, più tutela del lavoro.

Name: Mr. Dairy
Description:
From simple beginnings, Nanak Dairy Farms matured over years and in the 60’s it was the first of its kind company to introduce “poly-packaged” milk in India. Having proven Mattel in the dairy industry, the company has come a long way since.
	
Nanak Dairy farms is all set to introduce Mr. Dairy, a new brand focusing on producing the finest A2 milk and milk products. We are going great lengths to give you the milk that you deserve which is nothing but the best and want to bring back original milk to you!

Name: Israeli Dairy School Dairy Farm Training. Learn Advanced Dairy Herd Management in extreme conditions
Description:
The Israeli Dairy School is a leading dairy farm training center. We teach how to improve your Dairy skills based on the successful Israel Dairy industry.
We hold dairy management course for those involved in the dairy, sheep, and goats industry with tailor-made seminars and professional training based on years of proven experience. We will teach you all about the Israel Dairy sector. Our interactive seminars cover a range of topics including herd nutrition, veterinary care, breeding and fertility management, dairy farming in Israel, sheep, and goats dairy farming, and technological farming solutions. Our dairy herd management course is offered in a variety of languages and will educate participants on the success of the Israeli Dairy Industry. Israeli Dairy School is also involved in farm support as well as Dairy Sheep and Goat new projects and farm development. 
Offering Custom Dairy Seminars focus on Israel Dairy success 
Each Dairy seminar is tailor-made to suit the needs of your group. While the ideal group size is eight people, the school caters to groups of all sizes. The seminars conducted in many languages, including English, Chinese, Japanese, and Russian. Seminars are entirely customizable, and the Israeli Dairy School works with group leaders to design a seminar that fits the group’s particular needs.
The time for your visit and the duration of the seminar can adjust according to your needs, and the typical seminar duration is 5- 7 days.
Small groups are welcome: 
Join us with your best friends or colleague; get your private seminar. A small group is welcome.
The primary seminar language is English. The translation to other languages is possible according to your request.
We are dairy herd management experts join our dairy farm training center. Call us for details

Name: Fromagerie Renard Gillard (Coopérative Sodiaal)
Description: FROMAGERIE RENARD GILLARD est une fromagerie basée à BIENCOURT SUR ORGE, France.

Name: National Dairy and Food Company
Description:
National Dairy & Food Company (Nadfood) is a Yemeni Industrial Company. It is one of H.S.A Group, specialized in Producing and Supplying Food and Dairy Products...


شركة الألبان والأغذية الوطنية - نادفوود، تأسست عام 1983م، متخصصة في انتاج منتجات الألبان والأغذية المعلبة والعصائر والحليب المركز.

تأسست شركة الألبان والأغذية الوطنية (نادفوود) عام 1983م  كأول شركة صناعية يمنية متخصصة في إنتاج الأغذية والحلائب المركزة وبدأ الإنتاج في عام  1985م وتحديداً في شهر سبتمبر , تضم الشركة ستة مصانع كاملة التجهيز وبأحدث ما توصلت إليه تكنولوجيا صناعة الألبان والأغذية في العالم.
كما تم تجهيز جميع مصانع الشركة بشبكة الكترونية تعمل بالتحكم الآلي بداً من التحضير وحتى الإنتاج النهائي في بيئة صناعية حديثة وآمنة وذلك لإنتاج تشكيلة واسعة من المنتجات الغذائية عالية الجودة وبأرقى المواصفات العالمية تحت علامات رائدة ومتميزة ومشهورة في السوق.

Name: FIT, dairy expert
Description:
FIT: Dairy ingredients expert, your raw dairy products partner in Rennes, France

FIT specializes in the trade and distribution of:
- dairy ingredients for agri-food industry processors: butter, powdered milk, whey and lactose, milk protein, whey protein, fresh produce, cheeses, etc.
- raw materials for the food service and nutraceutical industries
- dairy ingredients for animal nutrition

Since 1990, thanks to the commitment and care of its team dedicated to the interests of its partners, this expert human and logistical network has allowed and continues to allow it to wholly integrate the requirements of the dairy market.

Aware of market requirements and those of the economic world means FIT  is able to prioritize the performance  of its customer service department and its internal organization. We were among the first dairy ingredient trading companies to incorporate the primacy of quality/traceability requirements into our strategy.  Finally, through our logistics team and while meeting increasing constraints,  FIT also handles the transport and storage of ingredients it sells.

To serve our customers: a priority for FIT

Our goal is to provide the right product while offering excellent service. We are certainly prepared to rise to the challenge of ensuring that our customers’ needs meet the constraints of our suppliers . We’ve therefore introduced a Core Values Credo. Our commitment can be described in one word: SERVICE.

Are you looking for a reliable partner?

Want to be represented by a reliable agent on the French market for the sale of your ingredients? 

Contact us on 02 99 53 88 88 or info@fitsa-group.com.
Fill out our contact form on our website

Name: ANAFIBJ - Associazione Nazionale Allevatori della razza Frisona, Bruna e Jersey Italiana
Description: Selection, breeding and services

Name: Vimal Dairy Limited
Description:
Vimal Dairy Limited, FSSC 22000, Certified Company, Gujarat’s No.1 private Dairy* offers a wide range of Milk Products.

At Vimal, we believe milk is not just milk, it is Mother Nature’s most precious and Healthy gift, meant to be shared & consumed with joy & satisfaction by one and all. Our fresh, healthy & wholesome quality range of Milk & Milk Products like Pasteurized Milk, Ghee, Butter, Cheese (Processed Cheddar & Mozzarella Cheese), Dahi (Yogurt), Lassi, Paneer, Khoya, Shrikhand, Flavoured Milk, Skimmed Milk Powder, Whole Milk Powder, Dairy Whitener & a wide range of Ice Creams help every family savour this gift with delightful fulfilment.

Each Vimal Dairy product is a testament to our commitment towards Quality, Satisfaction, Innovation & an Ambition for Growth for a Healthy Society.

Healthy U , Happy U!

Name: Milkvilla
Description:
Who We Are: Milkvilla is more than just a milk brand – we’re a movement for healthier living and a greener planet. Rooted in purity, sustainability, and innovation, we bring raw, unprocessed milk straight from free-grazing cows to your doorstep.

 What Makes Us Different

Plastic-Free Promise: We eliminate plastic from our packaging, delivering milk in eco-friendly solutions.

Farm-to-Home Freshness: Directly sourced from partner farms, ensuring natural goodness and purity.

Cows First: Our cows graze freely, cared for with dignity, ensuring their well-being and your health.

 Our Impact
By choosing Milkvilla, you become part of real change:

Eliminating plastic waste – every customer saves the equivalent of 1 tree per month.

Supporting eco-friendly, responsible farming methods.

Promoting a lifestyle built on wellness and sustainability.

 Our Commitment to Innovation: We combine traditional farming with modern technology. With blockchain and IoT, we ensure complete traceability, transparency, and quality from farm to table. Every drop of milk you consume carries a story of care, integrity, and innovation.

 Join the Movement: Choosing Milkvilla isn’t just about milk – it’s about being part of a mission to redefine dairy for the future. Together, we’re building a healthier, greener, and more conscious world.

 Vision & Mission: We envision a future where dairy is sustainable, eco-conscious, and health-focused. Our mission is to deliver pure, raw milk, free from plastic, rich in natural goodness, and powered by innovation.

 Our Core Values: Sustainability & Eco-consciousness – eliminating plastic, building a carbon-positive supply chain.

Quality & Purity – fresh, raw milk from free-grazing cows.

Innovation & Transparency – leveraging blockchain & IoT for traceability, trust, and excellence.

With Milkvilla, you don’t just drink milk. You join a movement for change.

Name: Pure Valley Dairy
Description: Pure Valley is a popular name in the dairy industry with a wide range of products. The company has started operations in 2018 and introduced different varieties of dairy products under the brand Pure Valley. Pure Valley has marked tremendous growth in the market share as a leading player in the dairy industry.

Name: Grupo Maralac
Description:
Somos un grupo empresarial con más de 72 años de trayectoria en el desarrollo de productos lácteos y derivados. 

Nos apasiona alimentar a la familia venezolana con productos de calidad, por eso, en nuestras marcas Maralac, Upaca, Pastor, Kempis y Sur Del Lago nos esmeramos por fabricar cada uno de nuestros productos bajo los más estrictos estándares de calidad.   

Hablar de Grupo Maralac es hablar de su gente, de los 200 trabajadores directos y de los 850 trabajadores indirectos, quienes con esfuerzo, profesionalismo, compromiso y dedicación hacen posible que día a día, y sin importar el lugar, nuestros productos estén presentes en la mesa de los venezolanos. 

Nos sentimos orgullosos de tener un equipo tan comprometido y de que gracias a ellos, llevamos más de 72 años dedicados a acompañar a cada hogar venezolano en su alimentación.

Name: LAITERIE DES ARDENNES
Description:
La Laiterie des Ardennes est une coopérative laitière belge située au cœur des Ardennes. Forte de nos 2 000 adhérents, ce ne sont pas moins de 950 millions de litres qui sont collectés annuellement sur l’ensemble du territoire belge. 
L’ensemble du lait collecté auprès de nos membres est ensuite valorisé par notre filiale SOLAREC. 
Notre objectif ? Apporter une meilleure vie à nos producteurs. 

C’est pourquoi, en coopération avec SOLAREC, la Laiterie des Ardennes veille à obtenir une rémunération juste pour les producteurs de lait. Afin de les aider dans leur quotidien, nous proposons également différents services tels que des conseils techniques en termes d’élevage et d’équipements mais également une fourniture en produits en agricoles. 
Envie d’en savoir plus ? N’hésitez pas à vous rendre sur notre site : https://www.lda-coop.be/

Name: ROUSSAS DAIRY
Description:
Roussas Dairy was founded in 1952 by the Roussas Family and has remained solely dedicated to the feta cheese production ever since. 
The dairy is located in Almyros - Central Greece, in a state of the art production plant of 6.500 sq.meters. Traditional techniques of feta production co-exist alongside first rate equipment, modern hygiene specifications and the family's devotion to the production of top quality products. We believe that quality products begin with quality ingredients and we strongly oppose the use of GMO's in the production of animal feed and remain steadfast in ther use of pure, natural milk. 
Roussas dairy is the pioneer of organic feta production in Greece and the leader exporter of portioned feta, that matures traditionally in wooden barrels. 
Nowadays Roussas Dairy exports over 95% of its annual production worldwide to USA, Canada, Europe, Africa, Asia, Australia, Middle & Far East.

Name: Shanthi Farm & Agri Products
Description:
At Shanti Farm & Agri Products, we specialize in farm-fresh dairy and a variety of agricultural products. We care for the well-being and the health of our customers to better enable them to live a happy life.
Our milk is 100% organic - the fat percentages of both Cow Milk and Buffalo Milk are 4.5% and 7.2% respectively.
Apart from milk, we also specialize in fruits (Starfruit, Mango varieties, custard apple etc.), vegetables and byproducts like as cow dung cakes, cow dung manure etc.
We are committed to learn and grow further while maintaining our quality and commitment to our customer's well being.

Name: Dairy Gyan
Description:
डेरी ज्ञान 
"एक संस्था जो किसानो की तरफ से किसानो के लिये काम कर रही हैं"

 "स्वागत हैं आप सभीका भारत के एकमात्र 24/7 लाइव पोर्टल डेरी ज्ञान मैं"

भारत की वर्तमान जलवायु और पर्यावरण परिस्थितियों को देखते हुए यहाँ खेती करना या उससे संबंधित ब्यबसाय करना उतना आसान नहीं रहा जितना की पूर्व मैं हुआ करता था।इन बातों को ध्यान मैं रखते हुए हमने कृषक भाइयों के लिए ऑनलाइन किसान सेवा पोर्टल "डेरी ज्ञान" नाम से लांच किया हैं जो की पूर्णतया निःशुल्क हैं।इस किसान सेवा पोर्टल मैं कृषि और डेरी से संबंधित समस्याओं का निवारण किया जाता हैं,इस निःशुल्क सेवा द्वारा हम किसान भाइयों को उन वंचित सुविधाओं से अवगत और उन सेवाओं को प्रदान करना चाहते हैं जो उनको आसानी से प्राप्त नहीं हो पति हैं।हमारा एक मात्रा लक्ष्य भारतीय किसानों को सम्पन्न और कृषि को पारंपरिक तरीके से स्वस्थ और उन्नत बनाना हैं।आइये मिलकर भारत को फिर से समृद्ध और सम्पन्न बनाएं और इस नेक कार्य मैं सहभागी बन लोगो को जागरूक करे।

Name: Dutch Farms
Description:
Dutch Farms was founded in 1987 by brothers Brian & Bruce Boomsma, who were the 3rd generation in a family with a long history in the egg and dairy busines.  Dutch Farms operates out in Chicago, Illinois and supplies egg and dairy items across the U.S. and into many countries around the world.  WIth over 300 items in the Dutch Farms brand family, including many egg items as well as several different catetgories in the dairy family, and now branching out into other perishable categories, Dutch Farms has rapidly increased it's sales in several different markets across the United States including reaching a high point in 2009 as the #2 ranked cheese brand in the Chicago market. With distribution across over 40 states and 15+ countries around the world, Dutch Farms is continually growing and expanding it's reach to consumers looking for name brand quailty at great prices.  

For any further inquiries into Dutch Farms or what it's brand can offer you, please visit our website at www.dutchfarms.com or feel free to contact Joel Boomsma at jboomsma@dutchfarms.com

Accredited by the BBB with an A+ rating

Name: CentralStar Cooperative, Inc
Description: CentralStar’s mission of enhancing producer profitability through integrated solutions for mutual success is fulfilled by incorporating an array of products and services critical to dairy-and-beef-farm prosperity. CentralStar’s product and service offerings include Accelerated Genetics, GenerVations, and Select Sires genetics; extensive artificial-insemination (A.I.) technician service; genetic, reproduction, and dairy-records consultation; DHI services; diagnostic testing; herd-management products; research and development; and more. CentralStar’s administration and warehouse facilities are located in Lansing, Mich., and Waupun, Wis., with laboratories in Grand Ledge, Mich., and Kaukauna, Wis. The cooperative serves dairy and beef producers throughout Wisconsin, Michigan, and Indiana, with additional DHI territory in various surrounding states. For more information, visit CentralStar Cooperative Inc. at www.mycentralstar.com.

Name: American Dairy Association Indiana Inc.
Description:
American Dairy Association Indiana, Inc. (ADAI) is a not-for-profit promotion, advertising, and nutrition education organization funded by and serving Indiana dairy farm families.  We provide service to consumers, health professionals, teachers, food service professionals, and also our friends in the dairy industry. 

Our organization is affiliated with the National Dairy Council.  The National Dairy Council (NDC) is the nutrition arm of Dairy Management Inc and has been a leader in dairy nutrition research, education, and communication since 1915.  NDC provides timely, scientifically sound nutrition information to the media, physicians, dietitians, nurses, educators, and consumers concerned about fostering a healthier society.

Our Winners Drink Milk and other marketing programs and services reach Hoosiers through print and radio media, special promotions and events. The Indianapolis 500 Victory Circle Bottle of Milk tradition, The Fastest Rookie of the Year award program, the annual Ice Cream Social on Monument Circle, the Indiana State Fair Dairy Bar, and the Indiana State School Music Association competitions are just a few of the many activities sponsored or supported by ADAI. Currently, the statewide effort to educate consumers on dairy farming practices, entitled "Every Single Day," can be heard on radio and viewed on Youtube.

Name: Dairy Livestock and Poultry Expo Asia
Description:
INTERNATIONAL EXHIBITION & SEMINAR ON LATEST TECHNOLOGY & EQUIPMENT OF
DAIRY, LIVESTOCK AND POULTRY FARMING

Name: Ingredia America
Description: Promoting better health around the world with only the finest dairy ingredients. We'll help you improve digestion, blood sugar levels and mental health through your dairy products with our innovative expertise in the dairy industry.

Name: Bayerische Milchindustrie eG
Description:
Als Molkerei und Genossenschaft mit mehr als 70-jähriger Tradition verstehen wir uns darauf unterschiedliche Anforderungen und Interessen zu vereinen. Unsere differenzierte Marktaufstellung und das breite Produktportfolio bilden neben dem hohen Qualitätsanspruch und der Innovationskraft die Basis für unseren Erfolg.

27 Milchliefergenossenschaften, Molkereien, finanzierende und investierende Mitglieder sind an der BMi eG beteiligt. Zusammen mit unseren Erzeugern - das sind rund 250 deutsche Milchbauern, vor allem aus Baden-Württemberg, Sachsen-Anhalt, Brandenburg, Sachsen und Bayern - werden gemeinsam Lösungen und Strategien für die Vermarktung des Rohstoffes Milch erarbeitet und umgesetzt - zum Wohle aller.
Unter unseren Erzeugern finden sich Familienbetriebe und Agrarunternehmen, Höfe mit konventioneller Bewirtschaftung und Biolandwirte, Spezialisten und Generalisten. Diese Vielfalt macht uns aus und ermöglicht uns, differenzierte Konzepte für unsere Kunden zu entwickeln.
Bei unseren Produkten setzen wir auf die strategische Kombination aus Käse- und Trockenprodukten und bieten neben Standardprodukten auch kundenindividuelle Produktlösungen an.

Mehr Infos: https://www.bmi-eg.com/
Impressum: https://www.bmi-eg.com/footer/impressum/

We create the Best Milk Ideas. In accordance with our slogan and mission statement, we continuously provide product innovation and dynamic growth. With curiosity and enthusiasm, we work hard to generate customized products tailored to each target group.
Our producers are 250 German milk farmers, mainly from Baden-Wuerttemberg, Saxony-Anhalt, Brandenburg, Saxony, and Bavaria.

Visit our website: https://www.bmi-eg.com/en/

Name: Killowen Farm
Description: Killowen Farm is the only Single Origin Dairy yogurt producer, in Ireland. Every drop of milk, in our delicious, award-winning Killowen Farm yogurt, comes from our beloved cows. Cows whom we know by name, as we have cared for them through nine generations of the Dunne family, on our Wexford farm, at the foothills of the Blackstairs Mountains. Happy cows make happy milk, which creates a joyously, good yogurt. One taste and you’ll believe it.

Name: Lactalis Česko
Description:
Jsme Lactalis CZ, česká pobočka významné francouzské mlékárenské společnosti Lactalis Group, která se může pochlubit nejen skvělými sýry zn. Président a Galbani z Mlékárny Klatovy, ale také vynikajícími jogurty, smetanami či dezerty vyráběnými pod domácí českou značkou Mlékárna Kunín. Nově jsme mezi sebou přivítali značku Leerdammer.
www.lactalis.cz, www.mlekarna-kunin.cz, www.mlekarna-kt.cz

Name: Federación Nacional de Industrias Lácteas (FeNIL)
Description: La Federación Nacional de Industrias Lácteas (FeNIL) está compuesta por 60 empresas que transforman el 95% de la leche producida en España y vela por los intereses del sector industrial lácteo español para contribuir a la sostenibilidad de toda la cadena productiva.

Name: Kärntnermilch reg.Gen.m.b.H.
Description:
Mit Stolz blicken wir auf 96 Jahre Tradition und Qualitätsarbeit zurück.
Herausragende Innovationen und Weiterentwicklungen in Zusammenarbeit mit 1.000 Bäuerinnen und Bauern, vom Großglockner bis zum Gurktal, vom Lesachtal bis in den Unterkärntner Raum, gehören zu unseren Pionierleistungen.
Wir beweisen immer wieder, wie sich Genuss und bewusste Ernährung vereinen lassen. Dabei stehen Regionalität und Ressourcenschonung immer im Vordergrund und liefern die Grundlage für ausgezeichnete Produkte.

Gegründet wurde das Unternehmen als “Kärntner Molkerei” im Jahr 1928. Die Kärntnermilch ist bis heute eine bäuerliche Genossenschaft und hat ihren Sitz in Spittal/Drau. Die Solidargemeinschaft unserer Bauern war von Anfang an bestrebt, das wirtschaftliche Überleben der Landwirtinnen und Landwirte zu sichern und die Wertschätzung für die regionale Qualität zu stärken.
Unser Auftrag als Genossenschaft ist die Verarbeitung des Rohstoffes Milch unserer bäuerlichen Eigentümer, mit dem Ziel, die Region Kärnten nachhaltig flächendeckend zu bewirtschaften.

Name: Milchproduzenten SMP (Swissmilk)
Description:
Die nationale Dachorganisation der Schweizer Milchproduzenten SMP vertritt zusammen mit ihren Mitgliederorganisationen die Interessen von rund 18'000 Milchproduzenten auf politischer, wirtschaftlicher und gesellschaftlicher Ebene.

Hier stehen Schweizer Milch und Milchprodukte im Rampenlicht!

Name: Proliant Dairy Ingredients
Description:
Proliant Dairy Ingredients is passionately committed to developing the highest quality ingredients. VersiLac— is an excellent source of dairy solids in food applications with exceptional functionality, at a lower cost than other dairy ingredients.

With 25 years of experience in the industry, Proliant Dairy Ingredients is both a partner and a resource for food manufacturers. As a part of the Lauridsen Group, Inc. (LGI), we have access to our LAB, a state-of-the-art laboratory, test kitchen and pilot plant, and benefit from a global team that has experience with virtually every food application. We can offer customers technical and analytical support, formulation assistance, prototype development, regulatory review and logistics services.

Name: Almazraa Dairy - ألبان المزرعة
Description:
Established by Ahmad Barrak Shakaa, Al Mazraa Dairy Company has been a prominent name in Cheese & Dairy Production since 1994. Our team is dedicated to ensuring the freshness of our milk supply and using only the highest quality ingredients to maintain a rich, authentic, and superior taste. Our products rely on just three simple ingredients—fresh milk, natural salt, and the microbial enzyme needed to make cheese—completely free from any artificial additives or preservatives. By adopting the highest international quality standards, we ensure food safety and hygiene.

Thanks to the excellence of our products and services, Al Mazraa Dairy is one of the top cheese producers in the region and the number one producer in Jordan, holding a 65% market share locally in the bulk white cheese segment. In collaboration with Multivac – Germany, we developed and improved a new line of prepacked products using an advanced unique technology called “MultiFresh” to lock in freshness and superior taste on the shelf for our customers on the go, without any additives. We have obtained several accredited international certificates, including FSSC 22000 and Halal certifications.

Our exceptional productive work and professional experience have enabled us to expand our reach in both local and international markets, now serving more than 12 countries, including the Gulf Cooperation Council countries, Palestine, the United States of America, Canada, and Australia. All our products undergo strict examinations in these countries and have consistently proven their excellence.

At our dairy farm, we take pride in contributing to the healthy development of the communities we serve and strive to preserve the original authentic taste of traditional Arabic cheese. By keeping our products healthy and clean, we ensure that children today can enjoy the same quality and taste that our grandparents enjoyed.

Name: Nature One Dairy
Description: Nature One Dairy is a company dedicated to producing only the highest quality powdered and liquid dairy products. The Company produces a range of dairy products specifically designed for every age group ranging from infants to the elderly. The company's production facilities are located in Winston Hills NSW and Carrum Downs, Victoria with sales offices in Singapore, China and Hong Kong. Nature One Dairy products are available in Australia, China, Vietnam, Indonesia and other Asian Pacific countries.

Name: LB Bulgaricum PLC
Description:
LB Bulgaricum PLC is the only public company in the dairy processing sector in Bulgaria. We are proud of the decades of tradition we have in the production and export of dairy products, starter clultures and techonogies. 

Our main mission is to  protect the traditional recipes for the production of real Bulgarian dairy products and keep their authentic taste and healthy properties. We are the only leader in the country in terms of technological production, export of know-how and starter cultres for traditional yogurt and dairy products. 

LB Bulgaricum possesses two production units - in Sofia and Vidin, as well as a moder center for research and development for sturter cultures and healthy food. The center is also place where we store a unique collection of more than 1 000 lactic acid bacteria and more than 100 different combinations of starter cultures. 

 Every day our skilled experts ensure the quality of the products made and closely supervise the production process.

Name: Gossner Foods Inc
Description: Gossner Foods is a growing family business with three locations across the western United States. With a combined 120 years of cheese making experience, state of the art equipment, and a team of dedicated employees; Gossner Foods is a leader in the dairy industry. What began as a strictly Swiss cheese plant, has expanded until now over 30 varieties of cheeses, and also UHT (Ultra High Temperature) shelf stable milk in a variety of flavors.

Name: ABIQ Associação Brasileira das Industrias de Queijo
Description: Fundada em 15 de março de 1988, ABIQ é a legítima representante do setor queijeiro nacional.

Name: Vidya Dairy
Description:
The idea of Vidya Dairy was perceived by the Father of White Revolution, Late Dr Verghese Kurien. The dream came true in 1994 to provide full one-year hands-on training to B.Tech. (Dairy Technology) students of SMC College of Dairy Science, Anand. Students of the College coming from nook and corners of the nation undergo 365 days training programme at Vidya Dairy during their 4th Year of the degree curriculum.

Vidya Dairy follows the principle of ‘Learning-by doing’ and hence, here students work with their own hands and gain skills and experience which can be utilized later in their professional career.

Our Vision
The vision of Vidya Dairy is “To excel in training professionals for the dairy industry by bringing them in touch with the emerging new technologies”.

Our Mission
The mission of Vidya Dairy is “To organize elaborate hands-on training programmes for the students of SMC College of Dairy Science, Anand and
for working professionals from the industry. This requires the manufacture of dairy products by the use of modern dairy processes and green
technology”.

Name: Bresciangrana Srl
Description:
Bresciangrana Srl è un’azienda casearia produttrice di Grana Padano DOP, con sede a Cignano di Offlaga, in provincia di Brescia.
Il caseificio nasce dalla volontà di aziende fortemente radicate nel territorio, giovani e dinamiche, con lo sguardo rivolto al futuro, fatto di innovazione e qualità, con particolare attenzione al tema della sostenibilità.
Coniugare in questi termini la produzione di un elemento cardine della tradizione italiana, quale è il Grana Padano, è da sempre il filo conduttore dell’azienda.

Name: Dairy Health & Management Services, LLC
Description: Dairy Health & Management Services, LLC is a professional services company, providing value-based dairy health and production consulting services, research expertise, and computerized data management solutions to commercial dairies in the United States and abroad.

Name: STgenetics Canada
Description: STgenetics Canada works on the mission to improve milk production efficiency and dairy enterprises’ profitability through genetics and gender-sorted semen technologies.

Name: Healthy Milk
Description:
مجموعة هيلثي القابضه ش. م. م هي صاحبة العلامه التجاريه هيلثي و تضم هيلثي ميلك لمنتجات الالبان و الجبن و الايس كريم و الحلويات و هيلثى فاميلي للعصائر الطبيعيه  و جمعية تنمية الثروه الحيوانيه لطفي فارم مجموعة هيلثي من الشركات الرائده تقوم بالانتاج للسوق المحلي و التصدير لاوروبا و امريكا الشماليه و حاصلين علي اكثر من شهادات للجوده و صحة الغذاء 
 اما عن مزارعنا وحدة إنتاجية داخل المزرعة.. آخر مرحلة في الحلب الأوتوماتيكي.. بيحصل فيھا إن الحليب اللي بيتم حلبھ من لحظة الحلب مبيشوفش الھواء: يعني مش معرض لأي نوع من أنواع البكتريا.. بيخرج من تنكات الحلب بعد مايعدي علي فلاتر جوه المحلب.. وبيكون درجة حرارتة ھي درجة حرارة جسم البقرة 38 درجة مئوية.. بيعدي علي وحدة شيلر ينزل درجة حرارتة ل 2 درجة مئوية بدون تجميد في مدة لاتزيد عن 30 ثانية..
وھنا بيكون تمت أول مرحلة في التعقيم بالبسترة.. بعد كده وحدات دفع بتمشيھ في مواسير محكمة الغلق علشان يوصل لخط الإنتاج.
قبل التعبئة بيبقي في مرحلة تعقيم أخري بيوصل فيھا الحليب ل 86 درجة مئوية وبعد كده بينزل ل 3 درجات مئوية وھنا بيكون تم بسترتة في المرحلة الأخيرة
ويتعبي بعد كده في عبواتھ ويبقي منتج جاھز للبيع (وده بالمناسبة مبيحصلش في أي مصنع ألبان بيعبي تترباك.. اللي بيحصل إنھم بيرفعوا درجة حرارة الحليب بيتغلي عند 128 درجة مئوية.. وھنا طبعا وفقا لدراسات كتير جداا إن اللبن بيفقد معظم فوائدة لئن الكالسيوم والمواد الغذائية اللي في الحليب بتتكسر بفعل الحرارة.. فبيضطروا في مرحلة أخري من التصنيع إنھم يضيفوا كالسيوم وعناصر غذائية أخري باودر علي الحليب بعد الغليان اللي تم علشان يقدروا يحافظوا علي القيمة الغذائية اللي مكتوبة علي العبوة).
في ھيلثي الموضوع مختلف.. فكرنا إننا نقدم منتج طبيعي أورجانيك بدون أي تدخل أو إضافات.. فقط دور المصنع التعبئة في ظروف ومعايير تحافظ علي جودة المنتج الطبيعي.
وعلشان كده مدة صلاحية المنتجات عندنا 7 أيام فقط.. لئنھا منتجات فريش وطبيعية.. لو كان عليھا مواد حافظة.. أو تم غليانھا كان سھل جدا نقدم منتج صلاحيتھ 6 أشھر.
لكن ھي دي القيمة المضافة الحقيقية اللي بنقدمھا علشان كده أي مستھلك بيجرب حليب ھيلثي بيبقي عميل دائم وعنده ولاء تام للمنتج.

Name: MilkTestNZ
Description:
MilkTestNZ  is a laboratory which tests milk samples taken from farmer suppliers by dairy companies, the results of which are used to calculate the payment to the farmers. Over 97% of New Zealand dairy farm supplier samples are tested here.

In addition to supplier testing the laboratory performs a range of chemical and microbiological raw milk testing for dairy companies and other dairy industry groups such as QCONZ, veterinarians and Dairy NZ.

Name: DTC Praktijkschool Oenkerk
Description: Dairy Training Centre aims to be the national and international training center to be used for dairy farming and milk processing. Our courses close up to the innovations within the sector. Our headquarters is the in Oenkerk, the Netherlands.

Name: Dairy Technologies Corporation
Description:
Who We Are
At Dairy Technologies Corporation, we take pride in crafting delicious and high-quality processed cheese and choco peanut spread products that are both Halal certified and FDA-accredited. Since 2014, we have been dedicated to producing top-notch products that meet all statutory standards and exceed our customers' expectations.


Our state-of-the-art processing line allows us to manufacture processed cheese and choco peanut spread products from both milk and nuts (in a separate plant), catering to the needs of both retail and institutional clients. We also offer customized products tailored to our clients' specific needs and preferences.


What sets us apart is our commitment to Halal compliance. Our cheese processing line and products are certified by the HDIP, ensuring that our entire manufacturing process is fully Halal compliant. This means that we strictly adhere to guidelines when handling food ingredients like cheese, milk, and other components, and we never use pork or pork derivatives in any part of our production.


Choose Dairy Technologies Corporation for delicious, high-quality, and Halal-certified processed cheese and choco peanut spread products that you can trust.

Name: Kuusamon Juusto
Description:
"Puhtaasti pohjoisesta"

Sanovat, että olemme katajainen kansa. Allekirjoitamme sanonnan täällä maamme pohjoisimmassa juustolassa. Kukaan, joka arvostaa helppoa elämää, ei perustaisi juustolaa Kuusamoon. Mutta jos elämässä kaikki olisi helppoa, mielestämme siitä häviäisi suola. 

Yli 60 vuotta olemme tehneet juustoja Koillismaalla, entisessä Lapissa, nykyisessä Pohjois-Pohjanmaassa. Juustomme syntyvät pohjoisen perhetilojen vastalypsetystä maidosta ja kypsyvät koskien pauhatessa ja könkäiden hurmatessa vierailijoita läheltä ja kaukaa. Tuoreesta, vastalypsetystä maidosta valmistamme luonteikasta emmentalia, maukasta kermajuustoa ja vivahteikasta edamia. Olemme ylpeitä myös aidoilla leppälastuilla savustetuista savujuustoistamme.

Vuoden 2012 lopussa alkoi Kuusamon Juuston itsenäinen taival kun Kuusamon Osuusmeijerin perhetilat lunastivat juustomeijerin itselleen. Tällä päätöksellä maidontuottajamme halusivat turvata pohjoisen omaa maidontuotantoa ja osaltaan vahvistaa koko seutukunnan elinvoimaisuutta. 

Kuusamon Juusto Oy haluaa viestittää pohjoisen toiminta-alueemme sijaintia, luontoa, sen puhtautta sekä luonnosta lähtevää alkuvoimaa. Täällä toimintamme korostuu yhteistyössä luonnon ja sen mukanaan tuomien erityispiirteiden kanssa. Luonto on mukana maataloudessa lyhyen valoisan kesän, pitkän pimeän talven ja voimakkaiden vuodenaikojen vaihteluiden myötä.

Meijerimme on saanut useita palkintoja juusto-osaamisestaan. Erityisesti emmentaljuustomme ovat keränneet kehuja. Tärkeintä meille on pienenä paikallisena toimijana saavuttaa suomalaisten luottamus. Jos siis pidät maistamisen jälkeen juustoistamme, kerro siitä myös lähipiirillesi!

#kuusamonjuusto #puhtaastipohjoisesta #taistelijaluonne

Name: Natural Prairie Dairy
Description:
Founded by Donald and Cheri De Jong in 2005, Natural Prairie Dairy provides the highest quality organic milk while giving their cows the best care possible and providing a work environment for their employees that is best-in-class. 

Natural Prairie Dairy is dedicated to delivering the highest quality organic milk from our family to yours.

Core Beliefs

We strive to understand what our cows need and are relentless in meeting those needs.

If properly understood, the land, the cow, the environment and man are all in harmony. This understanding is an ongoing journey for us.

Name: GAO Farm
Description:
GaO is a brand of AA Agrotech LLP, which has a diversified portfolio of natural vegetarian food and beverage products. The company was started by the Bishnoi Family in Abohar District of Punjab, India in 2016. Our operations span the states of Punjab, Haryana and Delhi. Our company philosophy is deeply rooted in Bishnoi community beliefs of cleanliness, purity, environmentalism and vegetarianism.

Products of AA Agrotech LLP include:

Individual Quick Frozen Peas

Toned Milk & Full Cream Milk

Curd & Curd based drinks

Artisanal Cheese & Paneer

Tomatoes, Mushrooms, Soya

Tofu and plant based proteins

Name: GOKULWALA
Description: At Gokulwala, we bring you 100% pure, authentic desi ghee made with care, compassion, and a conscience. Rooted in a cooperative model , we proudly support women empowerment, promote vocal for local, and ensure stress-free, hormone-free milking from well-loved animals. Our sustainable and all-natural practices are driven by tradition and trust — every drop of Gokulwala ghee is a tribute to purity, purpose, and the true taste of Indian heritage.

Name: Dutch Drying Systems B.V.
Description:
Dutch Drying Systems is a young and dynamic company with many years of dryer and drying experience. We are keen to reach the best possible quality and are continuous improving the level. The people you are talking to will be also the people you are going to meet in the project. Our organization is organized in an open and transparent way. The design, execution and commissioning is executed with our own people in house.

Dutch Drying Systems mission is to design the most suitable solution for the client. The price/quality level must be in balance. We like to be as proud on the result as our clients will be. This will result in a project that will be unique from the start until the end.  ‘’One project fits all’’  is not possible in this business because every project and every client is special.

Our vision is to be flexible and customer oriented. We believe in a continuous improvement culture.

Name: Özgazi Dairy Foods
Description:
Family business Ozgazi Dairy Food grew into a worldwide supplier of white cheese for Private labels of Retailers from Azerbaijan to Canada. In the most modern production facility in Europe, they produce 64.000 kg of vegetable fat-based white cheese (COMBI) and soft white cheeses (FETA) out of cow’s, goat’s and sheep’s milk  each day. With their in-house tin
packaging production, highend end of line packaging and a flexible team,
they adapt rapidly to any client’s needs.

Name: ITALFOOD FZ LLC
Description:
At Italfood, we bring the rich legacy of Italian artisanal heritage to the heart of the UAE. Rooted in generations of master cheesemakers, we fuse traditional craftsmanship with modern innovation to create premium, authentic Italian cheeses that set the benchmark for quality in the Middle East.

Our commitment to product quality and mastery is unparalleled. Using the finest fresh milk from local Emirati farms, our skilled artisans meticulously craft each cheese with unique raw materials and cultures. By forming curds in small batches through time-honored methods, we infuse rich character into both our fresh and matured cheeses. Every batch undergoes rigorous testing to exceed the highest industry standards.

Innovation and sustainability are at the core of our operations. Combining age-old practices with cutting-edge equipment—including advanced milk coolers, traditional cheese vats and mozzarella machines—we guarantee exceptional quality and craftsmanship. By sourcing local ingredients and delivering our cheeses within 48 hours of production, we preserve their special taste while minimizing our environmental footprint.

Name: Gebrüder WOERLE Ges.m.b.H.
Description:
WOERLE ist ein Familienunternehmen, das von Menschen
geprägt wird, die jeden Tag ihr Wissen und ihre Kompetenz einbringen. Mit knapp 350 MitarbeiterInnen produzieren wir bereits in der 5. Generation hochwertige Käsespezialitäten.

Name: Amalthea Group, Wonders of milk
Description:
Wereldwijd het leven van consumenten, klanten en boeren verrijken door lekkere en nutritionele zuivel producten op een duurzame manier te maken op basis van het volledig benutten van de  rijkheid van geiten- en koemelk.

Wij maken en ontwikkelen dagelijks op integere wijze excellente producten op basis van melk die aansluiten bij behoeften in de B2B- en B2C-markt. Vanuit onze nieuwsgierige aard en de drang naar vernieuwing maken wij daarbij gebruik van state-of-the-art zuiveltechnologie die tot de top van de markt behoort. Daarmee willen we alles uit melk halen.

Name: Mlekarna Celeia
Description:
V zadružni Mlekarni Celeia pestro ponudbo mleka in mlečnih izdelkov tržimo pod blagovnimi znamkami Zelene Doline, LCA, Oki Doki, Mythos in Desert.

Smo največja mlekarna v Sloveniji s certifikatom "brez GSO".

Name: Colla S.p.a.
Description:
La storia di Colla inizia nel 1921 in un piccolo caseificio a Cadeo in provincia di Piacenza, con la produzione di formaggio duro che una trentina di anni più tardi prenderà il nome di Grana Padano. 
L’attività commerciale è iniziata con la vendita delle partite di Grana Padano di produzione propria e con la commercializzazione di quelle di Parmigiano Reggiano, acquistate in caseifici storici con molti dei quali ancora oggi esiste un’ottima collaborazione.
Ad oggi l'azienda conta diversi stabilimenti di cui la sede principale a Cadeo e quella di più recente costruzione a Fidenza.

Name: Naturleite
Description: Planta de producción láctea propiedad del grupo Covap situada en Meira (Lugo).

Name: Cimory Dairy Shop
Description: Cimory Dairy Shop is a dairy company based out of 24 Jl. Boulevard Raya Blok TN-2 No., Kelapa Gading Barat, India.

Name: Meister Cheese Co
Description: Family-owned and operated since founded by Joseph Meister more than 100 years ago, Meister Cheese is a model of award-winning cheesemaking in the heart of America’s Dairyland—Muscoda, Wisconsin. What started as a small rural cheese factory in 1916 has grown into one of the nation’s top premium cheese and whey products makers.

Name: Caseificio Ghidetti s.r.l.
Description:
Caseificio Ghidetti is a family-run dairy since 1937.
We offer a wide range of typical Italian PDO and non- PDO cheeses: hard cheeses, stretched cheeses, blue cheeses, fresh cheeses and dairies.
Among our main products: Grana Padano PDO, Provolone Valpadana PDO, Parmigiano Reggiano PDO, scamorza, ricotta and mozzarella fiordilatte.
We produce cheese with 100% Italian fresh milk, collected every day from the farms located at a maximum distance of 20 km from the dairy. The short supply chain is a primary feature for our production, which allows us to preserve all the nutrients of the milk and thus guarantee our customers traceability, recognisability, quality and safety.
We export to more than 40 countries.
To meet the needs of our different customers, from food service to retail, up to industry, we propose our cheeses in the most varied formats and cuts, from whole wheels to single-servings.

Name: Scherjon Dairy Equipment
Description:
Scherjon Dairy Equipment Holland is a reliable network company specialized in the design, development and production of equipment for the dairy industry, specifically cheese. 

We are active on both local and international markets. Our customers are small and medium size companies that process between 1,000 and 100,000 litres of milk a day. We engineer, produce and deliver high quality equipment that ensure not only smooth operation and customer satisfaction for the future, but also a quick return on investment.

Name: FrieslandCampina Dutch Nutrition
Description: Dutch Nutrition is specialized in the production of high-quality powder based nutritional products for every stage in life. From infant formula to elderly nutritional, we will be your partner! Dutch Nutrition has their own state of the art brand-new facilities, located in the dairy hart of the world; The Netherlands. Our team is formed by professional, highly educated staff members who have years of experience when it comes to the development and production of powder based nutritional products.

Name: Alberta Milk
Description:
Alberta Milk is a non-profit organization that represents the province’s dairy producers in policies and transportation, marketing and education, research and administration. Our vision is to grow a vital, sustainable and prosperous dairy industry.

The organization was established on August 1, 2002 through the approval of the Alberta Milk Plan Regulation under the authority of the Marketing of Agricultural Products Act of Alberta. Alberta Milk is supervised by the Agricultural Products Marketing Council, which is appointed by the Government of Alberta. This council supervises and regulates producer boards and marketing commissions in Alberta. 

We have supported nutrition education programs for over 50 years and strive to help teach people where their milk comes from.

Name: Glacio NV
Description:
Ice Cream Manufacturerer - Ice Cream Specialities

Glacio’s ice cream specialities are taking the world by surprise!

The culinary curiosity of consumers, longing for superior quality, refined tastes, great sophistication and endless diversity, is thriving as never before.

Glacio, driven by the ongoing search for délectable perfection and innovation, creates tempting ice cream specialities of the highest standards. Rooted in Belgium, world-renowned for its chocolate and fine desserts, Glacio brings the best European culinary dessert tradition to the world, in the form of its ice creams, sorbets and ice desserts in a surprising variety of flavours, colours and designs.

Since the very beginning, Glacio has sought to excel in delivering new dessert experiences to its foodservice and retail customers and bringing new sensations to the ice cream experience

Name: Kroger Mountain View Foods
Description: Mountain View Foods is a plant set apart from other dairies in the U.S. from a capability, flexibility, and a future technological standpoint. Mountain View Foods is the first dairy plant in the U.S. to deploy robotic technology enabling cases to be packed, picked, and palletized entirely by automation. With over 215,000 square feet on 12 acres, Mountain View Foods produces fresh conventional and organic milk, flavored milk, half and half, whipping cream, orange juice, aseptic liquid dairy proudcts, and broth.

Name: AnimalScienceJobs.com
Description: Job board for the Animal Science Community.  Find jobs for Veterinarians, Nutritionists, Farm Management professionals, Feed Mill Managers, & more.

Name: Precision
Description: Dairy tastes great. But its impact on human health, animal welfare and the environment isn't great. So, we're leveraging technology to fix its problems. To create a new dairy category. One that doesn't force a compromise between taste and sustainability. We are making dairy better for us and our planet.

Name: Zvolenská mliekareň
Description:
ZVOLENSKA MLIEKAREN AT A GLANCE

The brand Zvolenský is a traditional yogurt brand, which has been a part of the milk menu for hundreds of thousands Slovak consumers for decades. Although it is known mainly for its creamy yogurt range, we can also find an innovative ranges in its portfolio such as Greek style yoghurts.

•	• Leader in creamy yoghurts 
• 70 + years of tradition 
• 50 000 tons annual capacity 
• 6 production lines 
• Clean label – no artificial sweeteners
• Fair brand 
• Strong in private label production
• Export to Hungary, Spain, Portugal, France, Slovenia, Germany, Czechia, Denmark, Poland.
• New product development

HISTORY
Dairy production history in the region of Zvolen. 
The region has been known for milk processing since the 19th century.
We are company with Slovak ownership from 2018. 

FFOREIGN MARKETS
Our product portfolio is present in well-known retail chains as Mercadona, Continente, Spar, Mercator, Metro, REWE group, LIDL, Kaufland.

PRODUCT PORTFOLIO
Our portfolio includes the following items:
• Yoghurt- Greek style (2%, 8%, 10%, lactose-free), Kefir style, Creamy yoghurt (1%, 3,5%, 10%), Traditional set yoghurt (matures in a pot)
• Beverages based on yoghurt- Probiotic drinks (LGG and BB12 cultures), Kefir drinks, Ayran, Protein drinks, Acidophile drinks, Smoothies, Lactose-free drinks, Yoghurt drinks (0,8% and 1,2% fat)
• Desserts- sour cream dessert 15%fat, protein fortified yoghurts
• Milk, Sour cream, Creme fraiche, Milk powder
• Icecream cream-based sorbets
• HORECA products - 1,3,5,10kg packagings of yoghurt, sour cream and creme fraiche, dips (with creme fraiche base)
