Name: Organic Herd
Description: Formerly known as Omsco, now operating as Organic Herd.

Name: Cumberland Dairy
Description: We are a family-owned and operated manufacturer and marketer of specialty liquid food products of the highest quality, as deemed by our diverse group of customers. We are committed to organizational excellence by treating our customers, employees, suppliers, and our community with honesty, integrity, dignity, and respect. Read more about us on our website here: cumberlanddairy.com/our-culture

Name: Mandrekas S.A.
Description:
Mandrekas S.A. is a third-generation family business, proudly operating in the dairy sector for over 75 years.
With a presence in Greece and 17 countries worldwide, our cutting-edge production facility in Corinthos, near the Corinth Canal, spans 6,500 square meters. 
Since 2012, we have also expanded our operations to the U.S., with a base in Wisconsin.
We combine traditional yogurt-making techniques with modern equipment and stringent hygiene standards to deliver top-quality products. Our portfolio includes authentic Greek yogurt, fresh milk, a variety of milk and yogurt desserts, and the innovative Youphoria High Protein range, featuring our pioneering drinkable yogurt.
Mandrekas S.A.'s success is driven by the superior quality of our ingredients and products, along with our commitment to sustainability and ethical business practices. We invest in responsible programs and initiatives that positively impact the community and the environment, reflecting our values.
Mandrekas S.A. remains dedicated to producing top-quality dairy products that support a healthy, balanced diet for consumers, while continuously delivering value to shareholders, employees, suppliers, and customers alike.

Name: Karoun Dairies
Description:
Karoun Dairies, Inc. produces a wide variety of Mediterranean specialty cheeses and cultured dairy products with nationwide distribution. In our state-of-the-art plant in Turlock, California we faithfully produce dairy products that are free of thickeners, stabilizers and fillers and made strictly with fresh rBST growth hormone free Real California Milk.
 
Through our proprietary brands, Karoun Dairies, Inc. services various ethnic markets in the U.S. Middle Eastern, Mediterranean, European, Hispanic, Indian, Greek, Russian, Armenian and mainstream American. In detail:
 
Our original Karoun Dairies brand covers a wide variety of Mediterranean specialty products; like the hand braided string cheeses, Greek style Fetas and brined cheeses, whole milk, low-fat and non-fat yogurts and strained yogurts (Labne), yogurt drinks, sour creams, Ackawi, Nabulsi, Syrian, sweet, Touma, Chicago style, Spanish cheese, Armenian style, Mozzarella, smoked, goat and California style cheeses.
 
Our  Gopi brand covers our Indian style products; like the Paneer cheeses, the Gopi yogurts and the regular and mango Lassi yogurt drinks.
 
Our Arz brand covers a wide variety of Middle-Easters Mediterranean style products; like the Arz Ackawi Nabulsi and string cheeses, the Arz Labne, the Arz yogurts and the Arz yogurt drinks.
 
Our Queso del Valle brand covers a wide variety of Hispanic style products; like the Panela, Queso Fresco, Queso Blanco, Oaxaca and Cotija cheeses, the Crema Mexicana and Centro America cream cheeses.
 
Our Yanni brand covers the Greek products; like the Greek style Fetas, grilling cheeses and Kefalotyri cheeses.
 
Finally, Karoun Dairies, Inc. also distributes a wide variety of imported and domestic cheeses; like Danish white cheeses, Danish blue cheeses, Danish Havarti cheeses, Laughing Cow, Gouda cheeses, Edam cheeses, Picon, Puck cream cheeses, Roomi cheeses, Swiss cheeses, European butters, Hungarian Kashkaval cheeses, Viola and many others.

Name: Foothills Creamery
Description:
Foothills Creamery has proudly produced dairy products and served Western Canada for over 50 years. Foothills Creamery got its start by manufacturing butter and we eventually expanded to ice cream, now offering over 80 different flavours of ice cream, sorbet, sherbet, and soft serve. We continue to use the same old-fashioned, barrel churned techniques as we did in 1969. It’s what makes our ice cream and butter richer, creamier, and more full-bodied. 

Foothills Creamery is 100% Canadian owned, with our operations based in Calgary and additional locations in Edmonton and Kelowna. Even though Foothills has grown over the past 50 years, we’re still committed to providing small batch, craft dairy products that excite butter and dessert lovers of all ages.

Name: Unilac Holland BV
Description:
Unilac Holland is a unique and independent Dutch dairy company, specialized in export of European cheese, butter and other milk products. Our products have their own brands, brands of producers or private label with origin from all European dairy countries and are exported to all continents. We are providing hyper- and supermarkets, wholesalers, catering companies, ships chandlers, cruise ships, exporters and importers.

Through years of experience and knowledge of the international markets and even local cheese and dairy markets, we are capable of exporting worldwide by predetermined delivery agreements. Unilac Holland offers tailor-made solutions. For instance, we are able to deliver a variety of dairy products in one single shipment including the labeling of the product and the necessary export documents according to the ruling customs regulations in the country of destination. We also can offer you advise about your range of products on the local market. We are there to support you in the local market.

On a daily basis, we transport our products to our clients all over the world by several means: by road, via air transport or overseas. Taking into consideration your wishes, the sustainability and the volume of the order, we choose in consultation the most efficiënt way of transportation.

Unilac Holland shows you the way. Experience it yourself!

Name: mama’s milk farm
Description: We at Mama’s Milk Farm believe that everyone should consume nutritious food and keep their health as one of their top priorities! This is why we are giving you fresh from farm A2 milk that is filled with nutritious goodness! Our mission is to provide a healthier and more nutritious alternative to conventional milk.

Name: Nutifood Vietnam
Description: Customized nutrition solutions for Vietnamese people

Name: Manasa Dairy Farm
Description: Manasa Dairy is a 100% pure Buffalo milk without any extra additives, diluents, milk solids or preservatives. We’re a real working farm, raising our own buffaloes, growing their feed & packing milk in our own facilities for superior freshness.

Name: Holstein Foundation
Description:
The Holstein Foundation is a 501(c)3 organization founded in 1989. It's mission is to educate and inspire future dairy leaders for a vibrant dairy community. 

The Holstein Foundation's education, leadership development and outreach programs serve both youth and young adults across the country who are involved with all breeds of dairy cattle.

The cornerstone program for young adults is the renowned Young Dairy Leaders Institute (YDLI). Current programs targeting youth ages 9-21 include the popular Dairy Bowl and Dairy Jeopardy competitions. The Foundation also focuses on youth education and outreach activities, offering free educational workbooks, and ribbons for local shows.

The Holstein Foundation is headquartered in Brattleboro, Vermont, and shares office space with its parent organization, Holstein Association USA, Inc.

Name: Chawla Dairy Farms
Description:
Chawla Group is being considered as a trustworthy name in business circles from last 50 years. We are known for our Quality oriented and Innovative business approach. CDF was initiated as a new domain in our group, about eight years ago. We start dour dairy farm with more than 300 imported Australian cows with a modern & state of art infrastructure.

Chawla Dairy Farm (CDF) is being managed by team of professionals, which comprises of Agrarians, veterinarians and Food technologists, who ensure the quality of dairy products from grass to glass. Farm is equipped with all the latest techniques equipment for automated milking, pasteurizing, refrigerating & packing till delivery.

Chawla Dairy Farm (CDF)has many satisfied households on its fold whom our products are being delivered at their door step though our cold chain delivery system which helps to keep products in its original fresh condition.
Chawla Dairy Farm (CDF) is registered with Punjab food authority (PFA) and has got dairy farming license after fulfilling all the SOP’s prescribed by PFA.

Name: WAFIR GROUP
Description: Wafir international group was founded 20 years ago. Headquartered in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia. It is a dairy company that specializes in producing, marketing and selling its high value products to customers that will create a successful experience in developing long-term relationships with customers, suppliers and consumers.

Name: Vivante Pure Foods Pvt Ltd
Description: Vivante purefoods is a platform led by the spirit of entrepreneurship and innovation, with a passion to create global business success stories. Vivante specializes in the global foods and farming sector, with a mandate to meet the growing demand for pure and nutritious food. Our products support the quest for a healthy lifestyle, and contribute in meeting key economic and social developmental goals. We are distinguished manufacturers and exporters of Milk, Milk Products, Fat Spreads, Cattle feed and Nutritional products such as Health Drinks, Olive oil etc. We have direct business reach in over 76 countries across the globe and collaborations with renowned European dairy giants for research and product development.

Name: Laticínios Muller
Description: A Laticínios Muller de Canhada Grande é uma empresa familiar, fundada na década de 1980 e tem mais de 40 anos de tradição na produção de queijos. Com o crescimento do Laticínio novas instalações foram contruídas, e em 2006 foi transferida para sua nova sede. A administração continua pertencendo a familía Muller, que vem dia após dia apostando no crescimento da empresa. Em fevereiro de 2023, o laticínio passou por uma grande ampliação na qual predomina até o período atual, a qual vem buscando sempre, levar qualidade até a sua mesa!

Name: CHILOLAC
Description:
Somos una empresa productora de lácteos, referente de progreso en la Isla de Chiloé y la Región de Los Lagos, ocupandonos siempre del entorno ambiental y colectivo de la comunidad.

Nuestra hoja de ruta es el servicio a los clientes, pues la tarea es brindarles productos lácteos de máxima calidad y asegurar su confianza mediante la inocuidad de estos.

Name: LACTALIS MKD
Description:
Lactalis Macedonia is a company composed of three legal entities that operate as a whole. It became part of the Lactalis Group in 2007.
Lactalis MK Dairy is the heart of the company. Established in 1997, as "Ideal-Shipka", the Dairy has managed to introduce many innovations and conquer the market with dairy products, both in Macedonia and in the countries to which it exports. The main task of the Dairy is to buy milk with the best quality and microbiological characteristics, to process it and to produce from it dairy products that will satisfy the tastes of consumers, and will also be in accordance with the strict rules and regulations of safety standards of food, such as HACCP and ISO 22000.
Lactalis MK deals with the sale of products produced in the Dairy, as well as the purchase and sale of products produced in other members of the Group. Basic tasks are establishing contacts with customers, taking care of the coverage of the dairy market in Macedonia, customer care, collection of receivables, etc.
The main task of Lactalis MK Logistics is storage, storage and timely distribution of products to consumers, with special attention to maintaining their quality and safety. Within the Logistics are the distribution centers in Skopje and Bitola, through which the delivery of more than 150 different products takes place throughout the country.

Name: Dutch Ukrainian Dairy Centre
Description:
Initiated and supported by the Dutch government, Dutch Ukrainian Dairy Centre project focuses on two major milestones: Practical training and Institutional Development in Ukrainian Dairy Industry. 

Main goal – Ukraine, as a successful dairy exporter. Project will contribute to this by improving quality of practices in the chain and promoting transparent & efficient diseases monitoring, individual milk control, cooperation between players of the industry, etc.

Name: KWALITY LIMITED
Description: Kwality Ltd. (Kwality) was incorporated in 1992 as Kwality Dairy (India) Ltd. Kwality is one of the fastest growing private sector dairy companies with a new range of innovative products and enjoys a large presence in Northern India.

Name: YOÇOR - Garcez & Santos, Lda.
Description:
A empresa Garcez & Santos, Lda. foi constituída a 2 de Junho de 1978.

Tomando a denominação comercial de YOÇOR é, há mais de 40 anos, a única fábrica na ilha de S. Miguel, nos Açores a produzir iogurtes com leite 100% açoriano.

Os iogurtes YOÇOR são produzidos de modo tradicional, tal como seriam, ou ainda são, feitos nas nossas casas.

Name: Royal Crest Dairy
