Description:
DALTON BIOTECNOLOGIE specializes in the production of probiotic and microbial food cultures.

Our mission is to provide totally customized solutions, devised after in-depth, careful study of our client’s needs. Our continuous research and product development, together with our relentless effort to meet our customers’ demands, have allowed Dalton to create an extensive product list in terms of starter dairy cultures, nutritional cultures and adjuvants.

DALTON was founded in 1974 in Pescara (Italy), our sales network is composed by local agents and distributors all over the world.

Name: Kalleh Uzbekistan
Description:
Kalleh Dairy — иранская компания по производству молочных продуктов, продуктов питания и напитков со штаб-квартирой в Амоле, Иран. Компания была основана Solico Food Industries в 1991 году как промышленная пищевая компания. 
Бренд Kalleh занимает 48 место в топ-50 брендов-миллиардеров по версии Euromonitor International

Name: Bhole Baba Milk Food Industries Ltd
Description:
Bhole Baba Milk Food Industries Ltd. (BBMFIL), India, is operating in food business for the past two decades. 

We are into manufacturing dairy products- 
Milk Powders, Casein, Caseinates, Butter, AMF, Ghee under the brand name- "Krishna"

One of India's largest exporter of dairy products, a leader in dairy science and innovation, and associated with many leading companies.

Name: Rockview Farms
Description: Rockview Farms is a dairy company based out of P.O. Box 668, Downey, California, United States.

Name: Westby Cooperative Creamery
Description: As a farmer-owned cooperative, Westby Cooperative Creamery directly supports family farms. We develop cultured dairy foods in small batches, which allows us to deliver freshness in every bite. We are also unique in that we are equipped to produce organic and conventional dairy foods.

Name: Teplu
Description:
Teplu is a business with purpose. The purpose of Teplu is to alleviate the incomes of people in rural areas. The brand thought of Teplu (short form of Ten Plus) is to simplify dairy technology so that even a ten-year-old can implement them. 

Through this vision, we empower women and dairy farmers to establish dairy product manufacturing plants by providing essential equipment, inputs, access to credit, and hands-on support to address practical challenges.

In addition to our hands-on assistance, Teplu offers online courses in scientific dairy farming and dairy product manufacturing, available in multiple languages to facilitate capacity building. 

Our innovative approach has earned us a patent for our technology. Through our multilingual online learning platform, www.teplu.in, we have garnered paid customers from 10 different countries, demonstrating the global reach and impact of our initiatives.

Teplu's journey has been supported by esteemed institutions such as the IIT Madras Incubation Cell, Indian Veterinary Research Institute (IVRI), and Science & Technology Park, Pune.

Our dedication to excellence was recognized when Teplu emerged as one of the winners in the social track category during Eureka 2023-24 by IIT Bombay.

Name: CasaKunzler
Description: A Primeira e mais Tradicional  Marca de Queijo Ralado do Sul do País.

Name: Laticínios Econata
Description:
Nos Laticínios Econata, acreditamos que um bom produto começa por bons profissionais. Desde 1978, produzimos manteiga e derivados lácteos com qualidade reconhecida no mercado, mas é a nossa cultura de valorização humana que sustenta cada conquista.

Com raízes em Minas Gerais e presença forte em todo o Brasil, mantemos o equilíbrio entre tradição e inovação — na produção e na gestão de pessoas. Nosso ambiente é colaborativo, acolhedor e guiado por valores como respeito, responsabilidade e melhoria contínua.

Trabalhar na Econata é fazer parte de uma empresa em crescimento, que investe no desenvolvimento da sua equipe e acredita que o sucesso começa dentro de casa. Estamos construindo um futuro onde qualidade de vida, capacitação e propósito caminham juntos.

Se você busca um lugar onde sua dedicação é reconhecida e seu talento pode florescer, a Econata pode ser o seu próximo passo!

Name: Salone Industria Casearia e Conserviera
Description:
SIC 2026 – CASEARIO E CONSERVIERO: IL MEGLIO DELL’INDUSTRIA 4.0 IN UN UNICO EVENTO.
Dopo il grande successo della passata edizione con oltre 5.000 presenze in meno di 3 giorni, ritorna a San Marco Evangelista - Caserta, il Salone Industria Casearia e Conserviera - biennale delle tecnologie per la trasformazione agroalimentare, tra le più importanti manifestazioni sull’innovazione tecnologica dedicata al comparto. 
SIC 2026 rappresenta una vetrina completa delle migliori soluzioni per la trasformazione agroalimentare,  dagli ingredienti alle tecnologie di trasformazione, dal confezionamento alla logistica fino alla sicurezza alimentare. 
La XV edizione promette di essere ancora più ricca, con la partecipazione dei principali leader del settore, che presenteranno le loro ultime innovazioni e risponderanno alle sfide legate alla trasformazione digitale, all'automazione e alla digitalizzazione. Sarà un’occasione unica per scoprire le soluzioni all’avanguardia, dagli ingredienti alle tecnologie di trasformazione, dal confezionamento alla logistica, fino alla sicurezza alimentare.
L’evento di quest’anno avrà come parola d’ordine Innovazione Sostenibile, con un focus particolare su due temi cruciali: l’efficienza energetica e il packaging green. Il SIC 2026 sarà la vetrina perfetta per esplorare le migliori soluzioni dell'Industria 4.0, in un contesto che promuove la sostenibilità e l’evoluzione tecnologica.
SIC 2026 è un evento da non perdere! Organizza sin da subito la tua partecipazione e preparati a vivere una fiera ricca di novità e innovazioni.
Info Evento:
•	Quando: dal 13 al 15 marzo 2026, dalle 10:00 alle 18:00
•	Dove: A1Expò - San Marco Evangelista - Caserta
•	Ingresso: Gratuito

Name: Fruitières des Bornes - Capt et Fils Depuis 1850
Description:
Fruits d'un savoir-faire authentique transmis depuis des générations pour travailler le lait cru de notre trentaine de fermes, nos fromages portent le goût de nos pâturages de moyenne montagne situés sur un plateau à 800m d'altitude en Haute-Savoie (France).
Pour faire vivre durablement les fermes du plateau, nos fruitières d'Arbusigny et de Groisy rassemblent producteurs et fromagers dans une démarche solidaire et équitable : le prix du lait n'est pas défini pour l'année, mais est basé sur la juste répartition de la valeur ajoutée provenant du prix de vente des fromages.
Cette différence fait de notre partenariat une démarche pionnière et unique depuis plus de 30 ans.

Name: Micron Industries Private Limited
Description:
Starting over a decade ago and against considerable odds, “MICRON INDUSTRIES PRIVATE LIMITED” a firm formerly known as “Micron Engineering Group” has gained immense reputation for its quality products specifically manufactured for the dairy industry.

A solid foundation has been laid by its four directors of the company. The equal strength of all the directors acts as supporting pillars which has helped Micron to grow to newer heights.

The office and factory is strategically located at Rabale, MIDC. Having spread in a 2000 Sq. mtr. Area, the factory is well equipped with CNC machines to offer the customers a quality product. The company manufactures 90 % of the parts required for the machines in house so as to maintain the delivery as well as quality of the product.

A huge percentage of the company’s sales come from its products uniquely designed for the dairy industry.

Our Products Include:-
High Pressure Homogenisers
High Pressure Pumps
Dahi/Yoghurt Filling and Sealing Machines
Ice Cream Cup and Cone Filling Machines
Automatic Stickline
Continuous Freezer
Flow Wrapping Machine
Butter Wrapping Machine

The company has reached where they are today mainly due to the close team-work of our employees and due to our shared value system which emphasizes commitment to excellence, closeness to customers, and the spirit of innovation.

We do look forward to serve the Dairy & Food Industry with an innovative range of products in coming future.

Name: Continental Dairy Facilities, LLC
Description: Continental Dairy Facilities is a dairy processing plant located in Michigan in partnership with Select Milk Producers, the 5th largest dairy co-op in the United States, made up of more than 92 dairy farmers from Michigan, Indiana, Ohio, Texas and New Mexico. Our plant produces over 300,000 pounds of dry, non-fat milk per day for use as the base ingredient for a wide variety of consumer products including ice cream, cheese, yogurt, whipped cream, pasta sauce and more.

Name: Gulf Food Production (Raw’a)
Description:
Gulf Food Production (Rawa) is a leading brand in the food industry, established in 2015 in the State of Qatar. From the beginning, Rawa has been dedicated to delivering high-quality dairy, beverages, and sauces with a strong focus on health and nutrition. Our products are crafted to support a balanced lifestyle and meet the evolving needs of today’s health-conscious consumers across all age groups.
Driven by our passion for health and quality, we expanded our reach and now proudly supply our products to several Arab countries, including Saudi Arabia, Jordan, Oman, Yemen and others. This regional growth stems from our commitment to creating food products that are both delicious and nourishing — combining innovation with the highest standards of food safety.
At Rawa, our mission is to provide tasty, wholesome food that promotes wellbeing and happiness, while creating long-term value for our customers, employees, partners, and communities.

Name: DAIRY LAND FOR MILK AND FOOD INDUSTRIES ( ELZAHAR )
Farmhand India
Description:
Formed in the midst of the 2020 COVID 19 pandemic, Farmhand is a food and dairy products company. 

The company is on a mission to end the food crisis experienced by NGOs in the country.

Known for its commitment to the ecosystem it has created, Farmhand has contributed over 100,000 meals over the past 2 years of its existence. 

The ecosystem creates a sustainable and circular economy that connects farmers, customers and local NGOs.

Name: Kudron Commodities
Description:
Welcome to Kudron Commodities.

Specialized in Dairy Commodities: Milk, Cream, Butter, Cheese & Powders.
We focus on the old ways of doing business. Ethical business practices, honoured contracts, back-to-back trading, in a timely and respectable way. At Kudron Dairy Trading we take pride in ensuring that every supplier and client is fully satisfied. No games, just dairy results.

Name: Fortuna Group
Description:
We farm Southland. It’s a nice way of life down here and home to our family of over 13,500 dairy cows, spread across 4,695 hectares and 19 dairy farms.

It wasn’t always this way though.  Back in 1992, home was just 125 hectares for David & Kay Dodunski and their 216 cows.  But things change and evolve.  That’s what happened here and carried by a passion for innovation, along with an ability to efficiently produce lots of milk solids, things grew.  Pretty soon the Fortuna Group became one of the fastest growing dairy operations in the lower South Island.  Our operations perform in the top quartile of farms in Southland and we’ve earned a reputation for progressing farming techniques and implementing change. 

The thing is, we’re just getting started.  There’s a Management and Governance structure with a shared passion and the same values that have been with us since day 1.  That’s a key point too.  It’s that shared passion and a collective sense of purpose which drives us.  We’ll continue to grow, purchasing and establishing more dairy businesses.  But it’ll be done the right way.  

We look after our animals, our people and our land.  We look after our investors and we’re looking out for the future of farming.  That’s the Fortuna way.

Name: Ausnutria Dairy Ingredients BV
Description:
With a firm belief in the natural benefits of goat milk, Ausnutria Dairy Ingredients B.V. manufactures and supplies a complete range of goat milk ingredients under the brand name CBM.  The CBM brand is world leading in high quality goat milk ingredients for the business-to-business market.  
Ausnutria Dairy Ingredients B.V. is a division of the company Ausnutria, a professional and fast-growing company with over 100 years of experience in the dairy industry. The head office and five production sites are all based in the Netherlands, from there we market infant food, butter, cream and powdered milk (protein) ingredients to our partners all over the world.

Name: LaBan Foods
Description:
LaBan Foods is an innovative producer of butter specialties. We also take pride in the fact that we are the market leader in the herb butter segment. 

Similarly to many other companies in our region, we were initially involved in the cheese trade. Our continuous attention to the adaptation and innovation of our product range led to the inclusion of herb butter. We then proceeded to carry out numerous small-scale trials in close consultation with our customers, aimed at continuous product improvement. This ultimately resulted in the perfection of a delicious, high-quality herb butter: the launch of LaBan Foods.

The sale of herb butter soon proved so successful, that we decided to abandon our roots and focus entirely on the production and sale of herb butter from 1993. Our product range has since been expanded beyond solely herb butter, to include other butter specialities and flavoured varieties.

Nowadays, our various products are manufactured in a modern production plant, which fills several thousand packages on a daily basis, before dispatching them to customers. 

We would be pleased to think along with in devising a suitable solution for your organisation.

Name: Comercial De Campo
Description: Alimentos de excelencia

Name: The Dairy Solutions Group (TDSG)
Description: We’ve come a long way from the traditional milking methods. Our decades of experience in both milking equipment and high-end electrical engineering created a company unlike any other, The Dairy Solutions Group. Our level of detail is unmatched in the industry, as is our work ethic. We’ve got a good thing going. By building real relationships with our customers and taking the time to understand their unique dairy farm operations, we’re able to improve farm efficiency for the long run.

Name: Nordic Dairy Congress
Description: Since 1920 Dairy Congresses have been organized in the Nordic countries every second or third year. This has been possible due to a collaboration between a number of dairy employee’s organizations and societies of stakeholders in the dairy industry. During the last four decades, the work has been formalized in the Nordic Dairy Technology Council, which holds the responsibility for the congresses. In 2015 The Nordic Dairy Technology Council became a formal collaboration, registered as a nonprofit business partnership with secretariat and service supported by MejeriForum in Odense, DK. In 2019 the Society of Dairy Technology from UK/Ireland joined the collaboration as associated member and became ordinary member in 2024.

Name: Lucky Foods Pvt. Ltd.
Description:
Lucky foods a new venture of Yunus Brother Group, a leading business giant of Pakistan. The project targets the basic necessity of life and the increasing demand of the country that is milk. 

MISSION:
Our mission is to encounter the demands of diversified market by providing pure and fresh buffalo milk without mixing of any harmful chemicals. 

VISION: 
Our vision is to “Be everywhere, Do everything”, to provide quality product to our customers by not risking the lives of our citizen for the sake of few coins.

Name: Campo Commodities
Description:
At Campo, we love it when everyone wins.

We’re a global food ingredients company rooted in Amsterdam. From dairy and sugar to cereals and coffee, we help businesses worldwide access high-quality products, with a clear focus on Africa and the Middle East.

What sets us apart?
 A broad food ingredients portfolio
 Long-term partnerships built on trust
 Fast, flexible, and personal service
 Expertise in branding, private label, and local distribution
 Shared impact through Campo Charity Foundation

Since 2018, we’ve built strong local networks and deep market knowledge, making us a trusted gateway to African markets:
 Fast-growing (29% yoy sales growth)
 Exclusive reseller in Africa of Custom Food Ingredients
 Our brands and partners reach 25+ countries globally
 Successfully developed various in-house brands, eg. Campo Milk Powder 

Whether you’re looking to expand your brand in Africa or optimize your food supply chain, we bring the know-how, transparency and agility to help you grow. 

But our mission extends beyond business. Through our foundation, we reinvest in the communities we work in, supporting people, animals, and the environment. 

 Because if you want to go far, go together.

Name: Healthy
Description:
Healthy Holding Group S.A.E. M. M owns the trademark "Healthy," which encompasses several brands like Healthy Milk for dairy products, cheese, ice cream, and sweets, Healthy Family for natural juices, and the Livestock Development Association, Lotfi Farm. They are a prominent company, both serving the local market and exporting to Europe and North America, with numerous quality and food hygiene certificates.

Their dairy farm operates an advanced production unit where milking takes place under controlled conditions to prevent exposure to bacteria. The milk is quickly cooled to 2 degrees Celsius without freezing, then undergoes pasteurization at 86 degrees Celsius before being packaged for sale.

Unlike other dairy factories that use high-temperature processes, Healthy maintains a natural, organic approach without additives or interference. Consequently, their products have a shelf life of only 7 days, as they are fresh and natural. This commitment to preserving the nutritional value of their products and offering a healthier alternative has garnered them a dedicated and loyal customer base.

Name: Làctia Agroalimentària
Description:
FRESH MILK | We collect and package the milk from our farms every day, preserving all its freshness and flavour

 CATALAN FAMILY FARMS | We claim that, from the cooperation of small companies, it's possible to develop a business model that distributes value to the farmer and also to the customer, based on product quality.

 ANIMAL WELFARE | Cows are cared with love by farming families who have been dedicating their lives to pamper animals and respect their environment for generations.

 SOSTENIBILITAT | Committed to the environment, we take care of it and ensure the recyclability of all our resources, optimizing a circular economy model that become a benchmark for the sector.

 WE EXPORT QUALITY | We are present in most rigorous international markets, being one of the pioneering plants with authorization to produce milk for China.

 COOPERATIVE VOCATION | In Làctia we are all a family: workers, farmers, shippers and the people of Vidreres. Our main goal is to continue offering the best milk in order keep growing up, to create employment and improve local economy.

Name: Anik Milk Products Private Limited (Lactalis India)
Description:
About Anik

For over 50 years, Anik has been a trusted source for dairy products in India. Owing to the brand’s fine production and quality standards, its products have been a favourite across north Indian homes and businesses. Being sourced from the famed region, Malwa, Anik’s products are the finest in terms of purity, nutrition, and taste. Anik is also renowned for its milk powder which meets international quality standards and is exported to several countries.

About Lactalis

In 2016, Lactalis acquired Anik, where it opened up enormous opportunities in the biggest and most challenging dairy market in the world to position it as the most preferred brand in India. The traditional and cultural experience of Anik and international expertise of Lactalis provided a unique combination, leading to a success story to be talked by generations to come. Lactalis is a family-owned dairy group based in Laval (Mayenne), in the west of France. In 1933, André Besnier started up his cheese-making company. The group sells products in over morethan 180 countries and has 229 production sites across the globe. Lactalis is the largest dairy group in the world with turnover of over 22 billion Euros.

Name: ABUGHRAIB-DAIRY
Description: مصانع البان ابو غريب | شركة متخصصة في صناعة المنتجات الألبانية ذات الجودة العالية، وتوفير خدمات تغذية صحية للمستهلكين. تأسست الشركة منذ عقود وحققت نجاحًا كبيرًا في توفير منتجات الألبان الطازجة والمجمدة والمعالجة، وهي ملتزمة بمعايير الجودة والسلامة الغذائية في جميع عملياتها. تتميز مصانع البان ابو غريب بالابتكار والتطوير المستمر لمنتجاتها وخدماتها، وتتعاون مع عدد من الشركاء والعملاء في القطاع الغذائي لتلبية احتياجاتهم.

Name: Meredith Dairy
Description:
Meredith Dairy is an on-farm enterprise, milking sheep and goats year-round to make specialty cheeses and yoghurts. Our products are sold throughout Australia and exported around the world.

Up until 1990 farming at Meredith focused on beef, prime lamb and wool production. When the reserve price for wool was discontinued in the 1990s, the sheep industry collapsed. To stay viable it was necessary to search for alternative farming systems, in particular, options that involved value-adding primary produce and which offered a sustainable income, irrespective of global commodity prices.

The owners, Sandy & Julie Cameron extensively researched animal husbandry, sheep and goat milk production and cheesemaking techniques. Two years later the Meredith Dairy factory was built on the farm. The farming activities now concentrate on supply of inputs for the dairy animals including growing grains and fodder.

Sandy, a qualified Veterinarian who received his doctorate in philosophy in 1985, has focused his research in sheep & goat reproduction, particularly in year-round production. Ongoing research and development enable continual improvement to farming systems, final products and sustainability

Name: Fayrefield Foods A/S
Description:
Fayrefield Foods A/S blev stiftet i 1998 af Peter Nielsen og skotten John D. Kerr.
Fayrefield Foods A/S har hovedkontor i Vejle, men er repræsenteret med kontorer og samarbejdspartnere i det meste af verden og er dermed en global leverandør af mælkebaserede råvarer til fødevareindustrien.

De primære aktiviteter er baseret på følgende forretningsområder:

Salg og produktion af mælkebaserede ingredienser/funktionelle blandinger til fødevareindustrien.
Salg af ost og smør til fødevareindustrien og foodservice.
Import af mejeriprodukter til EU.
Global handel af mejeriprodukter til Mellemøsten, Asien og Syd- og Mellemamerika

Name: UAB "Marijampolės Pieno Konservai"
Description:
Started dairy manufacturing in 1977. Since 2001 became a private company. 
It is the only canned milk producer in Baltic region.
Production certified according to FSSC 22000. Member of SEDEX. 
Today with 45 years of experience it is a trustworthy supplier for the partners worldwide.

Name: Aabybro Mejeri - RYÅ IS
Description:
Aabybro Mejeri blev grundlagt i 1888 og er et af Danmarks ældste mejerier og har side 1968 været ejet af familien Lindhardt. Vi gør en dyd ud af at bevare de gamle håndværksmæssige traditioner og skaber produkter af høj kvalitet, hvor vi lægger vægt på at bruge de bedste råvarer. 

Aabybro Mejeri fremstiller RYÅ IS som dækker over flødeis, fromager, islagkager, sorbet og  energitæt is, som er opkaldt efter åen Ryå midt i det naturskønne Vendsyssel, hvor mejeriet ligger. Herudover laver vi prisvindende gammeldags kærnet smør både med og uden Læsø Sydesalt. Vi arbejder tæt sammen om at skabe produkter af højeste kvalitet baseret på gammeldags manér inden for dansk mejeribrug.

Vi har en stor passion for is, og tager os derfor tid til at gå i detaljer, således resultatet kan smages i det færdige produkt. Vi stiller samtidig store krav til lokale og bæredygtige råvarer så vores kunder får den bedste smagsoplevelse.

Du finder Mejeriets produkter i en lang række butikker og supermarkeder over hele landet - og i en iskiosk nær dig.

Name: Dairy Power Limited
Description: Deals With Milk and Milk Products

Name: Watly Engineering Ltd
Description: Watly Engineering Ltd is a friendly, established and growing business. Working with all aspects of stainless steel, including design, production, installation, welding, polishing and repairs. We are happy to cater for those in the food, dairy and beverage trades; while, also working with private individuals on bespoke projects.

Name: Geti Trade S.A.
Description: Geti Trade is a small-sized independent food trading & service company founded in 1994. We are mostly active in dairy, cocoa products and other food ingredients focusing on North and West Africa

Name: Khalis Farms
Description:
Welcome to Khalis, where purity meets innovation, setting a new benchmark in the world of premium dairy.

Embraced by the prestigious National Incubation Faisalabad Center, Khalis emerges as a trailblazing force dedicated to redefining purity within the dynamic dairy industry. Navigating the inherent challenges of the sector, Khalis specializes in curating an exclusive array of premium dairy products. Our offerings, sourced meticulously from diverse milking animals—cows, buffaloes, camels, and goats—promise an unparalleled standard of unadulterated excellence. Elevating our repertoire, we proudly present a range that extends to include the richness of desi ghee and butter.

Our affiliation with the National Incubation Faisalabad Center is more than a mere endorsement—it symbolizes our commitment to fostering innovation and excellence in the dairy sector. Khalis, as a startup, takes pride in contributing to the evolution of the industry, presenting consumers with a distinct and superior choice in every dairy experience.

Name: Sapins Dairy
Description: Sapins brings to you purity and health in the form of milk and milk products that are sourced internally and from trusted local dairy farms. We started off as a dairy farm and as our passion intensified, we imbibed the modern technologies for processing milk.

Name: Inforcampo Exposiciones S.A.
Description:
MERCOLACTEA, es la exposición del sector lácteo que se realiza una vez por año en el mes de mayo. Desde sus inicios, 2001, se sitúa en la Sociedad Rural de San Francisco, Prov. De Córdoba. Allí se conjugan todas las empresas de insumos para la actividad láctea. Asimismo tienen lugar diversos talleres y seminarios de capacitación con lo que es preciso saber y conocer en materia de lechería, a cargo de renombrados disertantes. Sede de los certámenes de mayor jerarquía, quesos, dulce de leche y forrajes conservados. Dinámicas a campo con lo último en calidad forrajera y la presencia y jura ganadera de los mejores ejemplares de las cabañas más prestigiosas del país. Gran presencia de empresas internacionales, quienes buscan oportunidades comerciales a través de las rondas de negocios y diversos servicios que la organización ofrece pone a de los visitantes para optimizar su paso por la exposición. Gran apuesta al saber con las olimpiadas lácteas en donde participan todas las escuelas agrotécnicas del país.

 Nuestra MISIÓN promover la generación y el fortalecimiento de vínculos entre todas las piezas claves de la lechería Argentina y mundial, contribuyendo al desarrollo y posicionamiento de la actividad láctea en su conjunto y de sus partes.
 Nuestros VALORES son compromiso, transparencia, trabajo y pasión por lo que hacemos.
 Nuestra VISIÓN, ser la exposición del sector lácteo referente a nivel nacional e internacional.

Name: Amsterdam Ingredients B.V.
Description:
Going beyond in Milk Proteins 

We supply milk protein solutions for protein-enriched foods, sports nutrition, ice cream and cheese products. Driven by an entrepreneurial spirit, we’re dedicated to even making the impossible possible.

Our product categories:

Milk Proteins
- Milk Protein Concentrates & Isolate
- Micellar Casein
- Calcium Caseinate

Whey Proteins
- Whey Protein Concentrates & Isolate
- Whey Protein Concentrate 75% (Ba’emek Israel origin)
- Whey Protein Hydrolysates (Ba’emek Israel origin)

Custom solutions
Customization of product, service, shipping and fulfillment is our specialty, allowing us to develop tailor-made solutions that simplify our customers' operations, often improving their bottom line at the same time.

Examples
- Protein-reduced replacers of skimmed milk powder that allow lower costs while maintaining a high-quality product
- High protein powders for nutritional applications 
- Import duty reducing blends  

How can we help?

Name: Pomerode Alimentos
Description: Empresa especializada na produção de queijos fundidos, fondues, geleias e queijos finos de mofo branco, sob a marca Vermont. Fundada em 2002, foi adquirida em 2013 pela família Mendes, fundadora da Cervejaria Eisenbahn. A empresa se encontra, desde então, em forte crescimento e expansão da rede de distribuição. Entre seus produtos mais famosos, está o autêntico Creme de Parmesão Kraeuterkase, produzido desde 1948 na cidade e envasado em bisnagas de alumínio.

Name: Amoya Agrifood
Description:
At AMOYA, we are reshaping the future of dairy in India with a focus on purity, consistency, and compassion.
 
India is the world’s largest consumer of dairy, yet adulteration and supply challenges continue to affect quality. AMOYA was created to solve this problem with a sustainable, village-focused ecosystem. We offer adulteration-free products, ensure ethical animal care, and create livelihoods for rural families.
Our infrastructure includes a 23-acre dairy facility with a 200,000 liters/day processing capacity and a 40-acre model farm that trains village caretakers while serving as a center for cow care. This empowers AMOYA to be a trusted white-label partner and a reliable processing and packaging resource for B2B clients.
 
Our philosophy is simple. Purity before profit, consistency without compromise, and compassion for both cows and communities. Starting with ghee and paneer, we are expanding into new categories while staying true to one promise: dairy products people can trust, created with compassion for animals, communities, and consumers alike.

Name: EPIRUS SA – ΗΠΕΙΡΟΣ ΑΕΒΕ
Description:
EPIRUS SA is one of the largest cheese-producing companies in Greece with a state-of-the-art production and packaging unit, in the region of Epirus, in Ammotopos, Arta.
The company’s production capacity and methods, its consistent investment in technology, research & development, plus an innovative spirit combined with in-depth knowledge and experience of tradition, guarantee the excellent quality of EPIROS products. 
Today EPIRUS SA exports to all 5 continents and operates in 23 countries in total so far. 
We are proud to serve as ambassadors of our country, by bringing traditional Greek cheeses to expat Greeks and foreign consumers around the world.
Visit our website for more information about our company and products. Our “flagship” of course is our PDO EPIROS Feta; the most award-winning feta in the world!

H ΗΠΕΙΡΟΣ ΑΕΒΕ είναι ένα από τα μεγαλύτερα εργοστάσια παραγωγής τυροκομικών προϊόντων στην Ελλάδα, με ιδιόκτητες υπερσύγχρονες εγκαταστάσεις, στον Αμμότοπο Άρτας, στην Ήπειρο. 
Η παραγωγική δυνατότητα, οι τεχνικές, το πρωτοποριακό πνεύμα και οι συνεχείς επενδύσεις σε τεχνολογία, έρευνα και ανάπτυξη, σε συνδυασμό με την εμπειρία και τη γνώση της παράδοσης, εγγυώνται την άριστη ποιότητα των προϊόντων της, μεταξύ των οποίων περιλαμβάνονται η «ΗΠΕΙΡΟΣ Φέτα ΠΟΠ», η «ΗΠΕΙΡΟΣ Φέτα ΠΟΠ με Λιγότερο Αλάτι», η «ΗΠΕΙΡΟΣ Μαλακή», το «ΗΠΕΙΡΟΣ Ελαφρύ», το «ΗΠΕΙΡΟΣ Κατσικίσιο», η «Ζεμύθα ΗΠΕΙΡΟΣ», το «ΗΠΕΙΡΟΣ Οικογενειακό», η «Γραβιέρα ΗΠΕΙΡΟΣ», η «Κεφαλογραβιέρα ΗΠΕΙΡΟΣ», το «Κεφαλοτύρι ΗΠΕΙΡΟΣ», το «Ανθότυρο ΗΠΕΙΡΟΣ» και άλλα.

Name: Maola Local Dairies
Description: Maola Local Dairies, owned by the farmers of Maryland & Virginia Milk Producers Cooperative Association, sustainably produces a full suite of nutritious dairy products through our network of six dairy processing plants. With a keen eye on quality, freshness, and love for the environment, Maola delivers dairy products that are both nutritious and sustainable to our local communities.

Name: Kapila Krishi Udyog Ltd.
Description:
"Kapila Krishi Udyog Ltd. is a leading cattle feed producer in India with a production capacity of 1600 Metric Tonnes of cattle feed per day. Kapila Krishi Udyog Ltd. operates cattle feed manufacturing unit, having production capacity of 800 Metric Tonnes per day, located at Tatyaganj, Kanpur and 400 Metric Tonnes per day at Gorakhpur, UP. Kapila Krishi Udyog Ltd. is also scheduled to have one more 200 Metric Tonnes per day plant (expandable to 400 MTPD) feed plant to be operational in October, 2018 in Khanna, Punjab.

Over the years, the company has developed and nurtured a close relationship with farmers, providing them with innovative products, as well as educating them on farming and cattle rearing practices.

Today, With a workforce of over 300 skilled people and three massive manufacturing units, including 4 automatic and 3 manual plants and With a network of over 800 distributors, dealers and C&F agents, Kapila is proud to be the market leader in cattle feed in North India. In its journey of growth Kapila has set new standards of corporate performance, reliably delivering quality products to all its customers at competitive prices.

Kapila has achieved this leadership with our core values of caring, team work and producing quality products because we believe ‘Quality speaks itself’."

Name: Auralac SA
Description:
Somos una empresa procesadora de derivados lácteos, fundada en 1995 por dos hermanos, estamos ubicados en la Vereda La Laja del Municipio de Rionegro-Antioquia. Actualmente procesamos leche que se produce en las fincas de pequeños, medianos y grandes productores de la región.

“Contamos con una planta de producción de 8 mil metros cuadrados, alta tecnología y generamos un gran número de empleos directos e indirectos en la región.”

Name: Oman Dairy Products
Description: ( ODP ) Oman Dairy Product L.L.C was created to invest in projects and achieve food security and dependence on the agricultural and maritime history of the Sultanate. Its first project was leading the establishment of the largest milk and dairy production farm and factory in the Sultanate, under the name of Mazoon Dairy Company.

Name: LÀCRIMA DAIRY
Description:
Established in 1959, Lacrima is one of the oldest and most experienced
dairy producers in Bulgaria that produces high quality, traditional,
Bulgarian white brine cheese, yellow cheese, cream cheese and butter.

Lacrima’s plant is situated in the town of Pazardzik, South Bulgaria,
in the vicinity of the Rhodope mountains. The region is famous for its
fertile lands, green pastures, cattle breeding and cheese production.

Our cheese is entirely hand-made by very experienced cheese masters,
following a traditional Bulgarian recipe, which uses the highest quality
Bulgarian milk and carefully selected ferments.

Since the company was founded, we have invested resources and
expertise in the local cattle farms to ensure purity, quality consistency
and rich nutritional values of the cows’ milk we buy.

Name: Optima SA
Description:
Η OPTIMA ΑΕ είναι ο κορυφαίος διανομέας τυροκομικών προϊόντων στην Ελλάδα, διακινώντας περισσότερους από 35.000 τόνους το χρόνο. Είναι μια 100% Ελληνική οικογενειακή εταιρεία, και ο ηγέτης στην αγορά των τυροκομικών με μερίδιο περίπου 14% (IRI) και κύκλο εργασιών 134 εκ. ευρώ (2017). Από το 1974, που ιδρύθηκε, μέχρι και σήμερα έχει δημιουργήσει ένα εντυπωσιακό χαρτοφυλάκιο brands ανάμεσα στα οποία είναι η  Ήπειρος, Adoro, Dirollo, Kerrygold, Ταλαγάνι, Λεβέτι, Ορεινές Πλαγιές Κατίκι Δομοκού και Λογάδι. Η Optima επενδύει σημαντικά στην Έρευνα & Ανάπτυξη και αναπτύσσει καινοτόμα προϊόντα που απαντούν στις διατροφικές και πρακτικές ανάγκες των σημερινών καταναλωτών 

Το πολυτιμότερο κεφάλαιο της Optima είναι το ανθρώπινο δυναμικό της. Η εταιρεία στηρίζει διαρκώς την ομάδα της με προγράμματα ανάπτυξης καριέρας, κινήτρων, bonus, ασφαλιστικής κάλυψης, εκπαίδευσης, και άλλων παροχών. Αυτό αντανακλάται στην πιστότητα και αφοσίωση των εργαζομένων σε αυτή, όπου παραμένουν για μεγάλο χρονικό διάστημα, σε σχέση με τους μέσους ρυθμούς μετακίνησης στην αγορά εργασίας
-----
OPTIMA SA is the No1 distributor and marketer of cheese products in Greece, trading over 35,000 tons per year. A 100% Greek family owned company, Optima is the market leader in the country’s cheese industry with a market share of approx. 14% (IRI) and a turnover of €134m (2017). Founded in 1974, Optima has built, over the years, an impressive portfolio of brands namely Adoro, Dirollo, Kerrygold, Epiros, Talagani, Leveti, Orines Plagies Katiki Domokou and Logadi. Optima invests heavily in R&D and develops innovative products that meet the needs of the contemporary consumer

Human resources are the most treasured capital for Optima. The company consistently supports its team with career development programs, bonus schemes, health insurance, training, and other benefits. This is reflected on the high degree of loyalty and dedication of the employees, making Optima an ideal workplace

Name: Bankai Agrifood
Description: Manufacturing Top Quality and Hygienic Agrifood Products Delivered at Your Doorsteps.

Name: Suiza Dairy Puerto Rico
Description:
Suiza Dairy, is a Puerto Rican corporation established in 1942. As leader in the distribution and manufacture of milk products, juices and drinks, it is proud to us arrive day by day to each corner of our island, offering quality products, convenience and freshness. The mark of our commitment is loyalty and good service.

Under its current leadership, the Suiza company has remained increasingly competitive.


Suiza Dairy, Corp. has not only the best personnel, and second largest sales team on island, with over 200 staff, it also has two of the best facilities in the US, operated by highly sophisticated computerized systems.

Fast machines package hundreds of units per minute. Besides the central plant located in Rio Piedras, Suiza counts on DFM in Aguadilla, manufacturing juice and milk and three distribution centers in Juncos, Ponce and Hatillo.

Name: Chaltafarm Dairy and Powders
Description:
Chaltafarm is Iran's largest and most modern dairy farm, boasting over 6 hectares of cultivated agricultural land. Our facility houses two state-of-the-art milking livestock units that produce over 250 metric tons of fresh milk daily. Additionally, our recently established milk powder factory operates under the Chaltafarm and Shiraland brands, manufacturing a monthly output of more than 1500 metric tons of various types of milk powder for both local and international markets.

We take pride in offering a diverse range of high-quality products, including skimmed milk powder, unsalted sweet cream butter, sweet whey powder, frozen cream, and frozen evaporated milk. These products are exported from Iran to cater to the discerning tastes of global consumers.

Our Product Portfolio includes: 
Skim Milk Powder Medium Heat (SMP MH)
Instant Skim Milk Powder Medium Heat (ISMP MH)
Skim Milk Powder Low Heat (SMP LH)
Skim Milk Powder High Heat Heat Stable Heat (SMP HHHS)
Whole Milk Powder (WMP)
Instant Whole Milk Powder (IWMP)
Buttermilk Powder (BMP)
Unsalted Sweet Cream Butter 82% (SCB)
Frozen High Fat Cream 40% and 50%
Frozen Evaporated Milk 
Skim Milk Powder UHT Grade (SMP UHT)
Whole Milk Powder UHT Grade (WMP UHT)

Name: Lactalis Botswana
Description:
The Lactalis Group is a family owned company driven by passion for dairy that was founded in 1933 by André Besnier in Laval, France. Groupe Lactalis is a global player in the production and distribution of foods that are essential for everyday wellness: milk, dairy products (yogurt, cream based sauces, desserts and cheese) and fruit beverages.

In the year 1995, Parmalat Botswana started operating in Botswana as a distribution company before the Lactalis Group acquired majority of shares in Parmalat. Today, Lactalis Botswana is part of Groupe Lactalis.  The plant produces 500 ml and 1 litre UHT milk as well as 2 litre and 500 ml maas (Madilla) – all in the Bonnita brand.

Name: Saskatoon Colostrum Company
Description:
SCCL is a biosciences company that develops and produces innovative products from dairy cow colostrum.  SCCL collects from over 1 million dairy cows to produce a spray-dried colostrum powder that maintains specific levels of important elements designed to assure optimal immunological, metabolic and nutritional components only found in colostrum.  With several proven applications for feeding, this safe and stable colostrum powder provides a convenient alternative to maternal colostrum and it’s productive benefits are shown long after the first day of life.   

SCCL provides the most researched, biologically-active, whole bovine colostrum for livestock producers globally to maximize their herd’s potential by optimizing newborn health and development.

We care about calves 
We care about the future of the herd. 
We are colostrum.

At SCCL, we strive to optimize calf beginnings with whole bovine colostrum perfected by Science, Nature and Care.

Name: Burra Foods Australia
Description:
Burra Foods is an Australian dairy ingredient processor that for over two decades has been producing and marketing value-added dairy products to the global food manufacturing market.

Specialising in creating products that deliver the functional and sensory characteristics of fresh milk, we have significant international market experience and a reputation for being a reliable supplier of high quality dairy products. These include natural cheese, fresh milk concentrates, food preparations, specialty milk powders and fresh dairy ingredients.

Our manufacturing plant is located in the heart of South Gippsland at Korumburra, in south eastern Victoria, and we have offices in Melbourne, Hong Kong and Tokyo.

For further information on the history of the Burra Foods business or operational capability, contact us today.

Name: Ehrmann Cornish Dairy
Description:
Ehrmann Cornish Dairy, home to Trewithen and Ehrmann UK, produces high-quality milk, cream, butter and dairy products from our Cornish dairy, working with local farms within 25 miles.

As part of Ehrmann, we combine Cornish dairy expertise with world-class dairy craftsmanship to deliver exceptional quality to retail, foodservice, and wholesale customers.

Name: Humma
Description: We strive to produce fresh, delicious, and wholesome dairy products and give you a choice of real food, by committing to deliver quality and value without dilution. Humma, the goodness for your gut direct from farms.

Name: Usina Láctea El Puente
Description:
Usina Láctea El Puente es una compañía dedicada a la elaboración de quesos y derivados lácteos cuyo compromiso con la calidad atraviesa toda la cadena de valor, desde el arribo de la materia prima a la planta industrial hasta que los productos llegan a sus propios puntos de venta.

El Puente se encuentra entre las 20 empresas que más leche reciben en la Argentina. Su planta industrial se encuentra en Ordóñez (Córdoba), en el corazón de una de las cuencas lecheras más importantes. Allí elabora su producto más emblemático: el queso. Entre las variedades de pasta blanda, dura y semidura, son casi 40 las que comercializa bajo las denominaciones Usina Láctea El Puente y D70. Por su parte, un mix compuesto por crema de leche, dulce de leche, leche envasada y yogures completan su variada oferta de productos.

En 2018, El Puente puso un pie en la producción de dulces y mermeladas con la adquisición de Dulces Serra, una empresa de Bell Ville con más de 70 años de historia. 

Gracias al Programa de Franquicias, ya son 27 los puntos de venta minorista y mayorista que El Puente opera en la ciudad de Buenos Aires, el Gran Buenos Aires y Ordóñez. Allí, más de 300.000 clientes acceden cada mes a todos los productos de la empresa, incluidas las picadas de quesos y fiambres preparadas in situ bajo la marca Picadita El Puente. Y gracias a una eficaz red de distribuidores, la compañía también está presente en las góndolas de más de 25 ciudades de 17 provincias.

Fundada por Héctor J. Maccari y su esposa, Elda Pérez, El Puente es una compañía orgullosa de su tradición familiar y de las oportunidades de progreso que brinda: hoy emplea a más de 1000 personas de manera directa e indirecta. De ese modo y por medio de acciones de RSE, la compañía contribuye al desarrollo económico y social de las comunidades donde está presente.

Name: Maurilait
Description:
Pionnière dans l'industrie laitière depuis 1976, Maurilait Production Ltée, une compagnie du groupe Eclosia, a créé une demande des consommateurs pour des produits à base de lait transformés de manière industrielle  de qualité supérieure.


En tant que franchisé de marques de renommée internationale telles  Yoplait, Candia et Miko, Maurilait production Ltée s’engage à offrir un large éventail de produits de qualité aux Mauriciens.En outre, Maurilait Production Ltée dispose d’une usine moderne équipée d’une machinerie de pointe.

Maurilait Production Ltée a implémenté depuis plus de 20 ans des systèmes de management basés sur les référentiels normatifs et plus récemment ISO 22000 pour la sécurité alimentaire et ISO 50001 pour l’efficacité énergétique.
Ce sont des leviers d’amélioration continue qui façonnent notre mode de gestion en prenant en compte nos impacts sur toute la chaîne de valeur.

L'innovation a toujours été au cœur de nos préoccupations et ce depuis les débuts de notre société. Chaque jour, notre équipe technique s’efforce de rendre nos produits plus savoureux et plus sains, afin que nos consommateurs soient ravis. Nous disposons également d'un laboratoire d'analyse bien équipé pour assurer un contrôle approfondi de toutes les opérations de traitement.

Conformément à notre engagement pour une  meilleure et plus prospère société mauricienne, Maurilait production Ltée est pleinement engagé dans différentes activités de responsabilités sociales d’entreprise (CSR) dans les environs de Phoenix et dans d'autres régions de l'île.

Name: The Kute Group Dairy
Description: The Kute Group Dairy - A Trusted Name in Milk and Milk Products a state of art Dairy suited in suburbs of Pune of Maharashtra India, it has Milk Processing Plant, Milk Powder Plant (Spray Dryer, Butter and Ghee manufacturing plant).

Name: NÖM
Description:
Die Niederösterreichische Molkerei NÖM, gilt als eine der modernsten Molkereien Europas. Ein großes Team an engagierten und kompetenten Mitarbeiten arbeitet täglich daran, beste Milch zu innovativen Milchprodukten zu veredeln. Sie stehen hinter dem jahrelangen Erfolg des Unternehmens. 

Etwas Gutes zu etwas Besonderem machen! 
Das ist der Anspruch der Molkerei und zeigt sich in der Vielzahl innovativer Milchprodukte. nöm ist der optimale Begleiter für Ernährungsbewusste, Sportbegeisterte oder einfach nur Genießer. 

nöm Bleib frisch.

Name: Just Milk
Description:
Just Milk is a dairy management company based in Grahamstown in the Eastern Cape of South Africa. The Just Milk Group manages 12 dairies (11 rotary dairies and 1 swingover) on 9 farms across the Eastern Cape with total Cows in Herd of approximately 12,000.

Just Milk is a unifying brand and not a single corporate entity that operates on farms with varying land ownership and profit share structures. This model has allowed land investors an opportunity to gain exposure to dairy farming without the necessary management capabilities and required initial stock numbers while allowing the Just Milk Group the opportunity to create scalable, people-oriented management systems that result in low-cost, high-yield dairy farming operations.

The Just Milk Group prides itself on three pillars of core competency:

1.People
Our dynamic management teams are carefully selected and trained within a personal growth focussed environment.
Our student programme has been developed to support a pipeline of talent that will continue to create young farmers who are capable of filling management positions across the group.
Our scale of operations allow the Group to accelerate management growth through strategic placements and movements across farms.
2.Cows
The “Just Milk Cow” is a cross Jersey-Friesland using predominantly New Zealand and Australian CRV genetics.
Very few animals have been brought into the herd from outside, resulting in selective breeding and an optimal animal suited to the conditions of dairy farming in the Eastern Cape.
Cows above current requirements are reared annually to stock potential growth opportunities.
3.Controls
All rotary dairies have been built by Northfield Engineering and make use of Waikato Milking Systems and Afimilk herd management systems which allow us to dictate and track individual cow diet and performance.
We have built controls around these systems to ensure high levels of data integrity that feedback to the head office in Grahamstown for analysis.

Name: Trewithen Dairy
Description:
Trewithen Dairy is a family business and leading supplier of great tasting dairy products to the South West and beyond. Proud to be part of the thriving Cornish dairy sector, we buy every drop of milk that is produced by our local herds all within 25 miles of our Dairy here in the Glynn Valley.

100% Cornish from our local herds, our award winning products are full of natural goodness. Our hero products are bottled fresh milk and Cornish clotted cream, as well as butter churned with Cornish cream and yoghurt made with Cornish milk. We operate a chilled delivery fleet servicing independent retailers and food service customers throughout the South West, as well as working with a network of wholesale partners to service further afield.  You will also find our products on the shelves of many national retailers, including Tesco, Morrisons, Asda, Waitrose, Costco, Coop, Spar. Or online with Ocado and Milk & More. We also supply in bulk formats to food manufacturers, who benefit from provenance claims on their ingredients declaration.

Name: COUNCIL ON DAIRY CATTLE BREEDING
Description:
The Council on Dairy Cattle Breeding (CDCB) manages the national cooperator database, calculates and distributes the U.S. genetic evaluations and genomic predictions, and aggregates dairy cattle data. 

The mission of CDCB is to drive global dairy cattle improvement by using a collaborative database to deliver state-of-the-art genetic merit and performance assessments for the herd decision making.

Name: Laiterie Saint-Père - AGROMOUSQUETAIRES
Description:
Agromousquetaires est le pôle industriel du Groupement Les Mousquetaires, premier fabricant de marques de distributeurs en France. C'est avant tout 11 000 femmes et hommes regroupés au sein de 70 sites industriels et logistiques, dont une cinquantaine d’usines, répartis en 6 pôles de performance.

Issue de la filière lait et créée en 1905, La Laiterie Saint-Père se situe à Saint-Père-en-Retz (Loire-Atlantique). Elle a pour activité la collecte de lait et la fabrication de produits laitiers (crèmes dessert, laits gélifiés, riz et semoules au lait, beurre, flans, crème fraîche, Lait etc.). Les produits de la Laiterie sont vendus sous la marque « Pâturages ».

Si vous voulez faire partie d’un collectif au sein duquel chacun peut être acteur et  vous engager au service du « Mieux Produire pour Mieux Vivre » avec des produits 100% Made in France, rejoignez-nous !

Name: Dairycs
Description: Dairycs is innovating the dairy farm and rewriting the deal between the farmer and the herd. We’re creating a farm that centers around the cow’s needs and puts her at the heart of the operation.  Our proprietary technologies are transforming the way cows are milked and creating sustainable farming methods.

Name: Rich Dad Premium Ice Creams
Description: Elanad Milk is an ISO 22000 certified company, committed to international standards of product quality. Our product portfolio includes milk, ghee, processed butter, etc. Elanad MilkLocated in the lush greenery of Elanad, close to Thrissur, The Cultural Capital of Kerala and we are now introduced our ice cream Brand Named #Rich #Dad #Premium #Ice #Creams

Name: Milchwerke Berchtesgadener Land Chiemgau eG
Description:
Wir sind ein modernes und innovatives Unternehmen im wunderschönen Berchtesgadener Land.

Dass wir uns über die Jahrzehnte so positiv entwickelt haben, verdanken wir zweierlei: Einerseits unseren hohen Qualitätsansprüchen.
Andererseits unseren einzigartigen Mitarbeiterinnen und Mitarbeitern. Derzeit sind es über 480, darunter 30 Auszubildende.

Wir bieten einen spannenden und sicheren Arbeitsplatz in einer der schönsten Gegenden der Welt.

Name: Balinee Milk Producer Organization
Description:
Balinee Milk Producer Company Limited incorporated under Company Act 2013, on 24th January 2019 with its headquarter in Jhansi Uttar Pradesh the company has the objective of safeguarding the interest of member producers(exclusively women) by providing round the year access to organize market in fair and transparent manner, timely payment, capacity building and providing livestock support services to increase milk productivity.
The Company was set up under the project titled “Dairy Value Chain Development in Bundelkhand region of Uttar Pradesh” financially supported by National Rural Livelihood Mission (NRLM) & Uttar Pradesh State Rural Livelihood Mission (UP-SRLM).
The Company was formally inaugurated by Hon’ble Chief Minister of Uttar Pradesh, Yogi Adityanath in December 2019. Currently the company has mobilized around 62840 women milk producers spread across 1150 villages in all 7 district of Buldenkhand ie Jhansi, Hamirpur, Banda, Jalaun, Chitrakoot,Lalitpur and Mahoba. These members together supply around 3.25 lakh kg of milk per day.

The company has put in place an efficient system of milk procurement at every procurement village.The milk is weighted, tested and the value is calculated without manual intervention in the presence of producer using Data Processor-cum-milk collection unit (DPMCU). The real time data is transferred using GPRS to central server, and the milk payment is transferred directly to the individual member’s bank account once in ten days. Members are provided acknowledgment receipt about the details and value of the milk poured. The Company has recently launched its own brand of Ghee “Balinee”.
Further, to improve the productivity of milch animals and to make available the quality Input services at affordable prices, the MPC has initiated breeding, nutrition and advisory services in its coverage villages.

Name: Inprolac S.A
Description:
La innovación y la calidad es nuestra razón de ser, Inprolac S.A cuenta con más de 30 años de experiencia en la industria de productos alimenticios, actualmente somos la mejor alternativa del mercado en cuanto
a calidad, buen sabor y precio.

Name: Matra Asia (Pvt) Limited
Description: Increasing productivity, improving efficiencies and providing solutions to farmers everywhere. Matra Asia is helping to feed the nation, one trade at a time.

Name: Bettinehoeve
Description:
Bettinehoeve, The Goat's Cheese Expert

The Bettinehoeve began as a traditional goat’s cheese farm in 1982, and has developed over the years into a modern goat’s cheese producer. 

All Bettine products are prepared with the greatest care with respect to flavour and quality. 
In addition to having outstanding quality, Bettinehoeve also has a wide variety in its range of products:

- Ripened goat's cheese, Chèvre Bûche.  Goats cheese white mould rind
- Fresh goat's cheese plain / natural
- Fresh goat's cheese with honey
- Fresh goat's cheese with herbs or wild garlic
- Fresh goat's cheese with cranberry
- Fresh goat's cheese with bacon
- Fresh goat's cheese with puff pastry
- Fresh goat's cheese crumbles
- Fresh spreadable goat's cheese plain / natural
- Fresh spreadable goat's cheese with herbs
- Goat's Brie
- UHT goat's milk
- Curd in 15 kg bags

We deliver our goat's cheese products to retail, food service and industry.
In different shapes, (such as logs, slices, crumbles and spread) and in different weights, (such as 90gr, 100gr, 120gr, 125gr, 200gr, 450gr, 500gr, 1 kg, 2,6 kg, 15 kg).

Would you like to know more about Bettine products? Please contact us. 
On our website you will find a lot of extra information including many different recipes with Bettine products to surprise your friends and family.

Werken bij Bettinehoeve b.v.?

Bettinehoeve B.V. is een groeiend bedrijf met ± 110 medewerkers, aangevuld met flexibele krachten. De werkzaamheden worden uitgevoerd op 2 locaties in Etten-Leur. De cultuur binnen Bettinehoeve onderscheidt zich door pioniersgeest te combineren met ambachtelijkheid en Brabantse zakelijkheid.
Geinteresseerd in een functie binnen ons bedrijf? Houd dan onze website www.bettine.nl en Linkedin-pagina goed in de gaten!

Name: Fromagerie Vaubernier
Description:
Founded in 1912, the Vaubernier dairy is one of the few remaining independent cheese producers in France. 

For more than 100 years, we have adhered to a traditional recipe using milk, ferments and just the right amount of salt to give our cheeses their distinctive character. Every care is taken throughout the ripening process : all our cheeses are hand-turned. Our expertise is handed down from generation to generation by our master cheesemakers, ensuring that we continue to offer our customers a generous and high-quality cheese.

Located in the heart of the verdant Mayenne countryside, Vaubernier contributes actively to the economic development of its local area. Every day, we collect our fresh milk from dairy farms within a 40 km radius around the cheese dairy. In Martigné, some 120 employees bring all their knowhow to bear, day in and day out, to make our butters, cheese and, most of all, our famous camembert BONS MAYENNAIS.

Well etablished on the French market, Bons Mayennais products have been exported around the world since 2012 and are now to be found in several European countries, as well as further afield in countries such as Australia, South Korea, North America and the French West Indies. The teams are always available to listen to your comments and suggestions on developing new products tailored specifically to your market.

Name: Malkara Birlik Süt ve Süt Mamülleri A.Ş
Description:
Malkara Birlik Süt ve Süt Mamulleri A.Ş.(Malkara Alliance Milk and Milk Products Inc.) was founded in Malkara district of Tekirdağ region in year 1993 to be the supplier to many food manufacturers by making milk and whey into an industrial and ecological additive.

The production capacity of 80-100 tons per month in the earlier times have reached 1000 tons today. Our company, with the largest facility in the Balkans, is in service on open area of 57.250 m2 and 27.000m2-closed area. Our company that pulverizes first-class raw cow's milk collected from The Thrace region also provides whey from nearby dairies to contribute to the environment and the Turkish economy by processing these raw materials accepted as environmental waste with the latest technology.

Maybi established with the infrastructure of Yazgan Machinery, Turkey's well-known brand of milk processing machine, offers its customers the highest quality end product and the product after-service through experienced staff. Our company adopting the principle of manufacturing according to customer requirements, rather than standard production concept has a policy of production in accordance with HACCP criteria.

Name: Global Dairy Trade
Description:
Global Dairy Trade (GDT) is the world's leading trading platform for core dairy products and supports efficient dairy derivative trading.

Since 2008 we have built a reputation for transparency and integrity. We operate on a worldwide scale with buyer/seller customers and stakeholders spread across more than 70 countries with different interests, languages, cultures and time zones, trading USD 2-3 billion annually.

GDT Events is the leading global auction for trading large volume dairy ingredients and reference price discovery.

GDT Pulse offers shorter duration auctions to take the pulse of the market between GDT Events.

GDT Insight is our data subscription service, designed to help you unlock more value in the world of dairy trading.

Name: Globo Inox
Description:
Fundada em 12 de junho de 1968 com a denominação social de Indústria de Máquinas Globo Ltda. , começou suas operações voltada a fabricação de máquinas para a indústria de bebidas e lavadoras de garrafas.

No final de 1983, sob nova direção, redefiniu seus objetivos, ampliando a sua linha de produtos e alterando a sua razão social. Nascia a Globo Inox Equipamentos Industriais LtdaS. especializada na fabricação de equipamentos para as indústrias de laticínios, refrigerantes e sucos, vinícolas, química e farmacêutica , entre outras.

Name: Family Farmers
Description: Fresh A2 Milk: The natural choice for a healthy lifestyle

Name: Orontes Manufacturing Group
Description: Orontes,  an integrated food and packaging group based in UAE, specializing in high quality dairy and beverage manufacturing and metal can production for regional and global brands. Through Orontes Dairy Manufacturing LLC and Orontes Cans Manufacturing LLC, we support private label, co packing and our own brands with reliable capacity, strong quality systems and competitive solutions that help partners grow.

Name: Saamarthya Milk Producer Company Limited
Description: Established on March 30, 2022, Saamarthya Milk Producer Company Limited (SMPCL) is a company formed under the Companies Act, 2013, with its registered office located in Raebareli, Uttar Pradesh. The 7 districts of Rae Bareli, Sultanpur, Amethi, Ayodhya, Fatehpur, Kanpur Nagar, and Pratapgarh in are the 1500 villages that the company plans to serve. There are currently 4 MCCs, 42 BMCs, 1250+ MPPs, and over 70,000+ female members. In order to guarantee transparency in milk collection, GPRS-based Data Processor cum Milk Collection Unit (DPMCU) have been set up at all MPPs. These units automatically weigh and analyze milk, as well as issue acknowledgement receipts that include information on the milk each member supplied. The member's bank account will get the milk payment straight from the central server, which is receiving real-time data transfer via GPRS.

Name: Leyde Honduras
Description: Somos una Empresa Hondureña que se caracteriza por elaborar, comercializar y distribuir productos lácteos, jugos y bebidas no alcohólicas, con altos estándares de calidad nacional e internacional, enfocados en la satisfacción de nuestros clientes, en consonancia con el medio ambiente y la responsabilidad social, contando con talento humano motivado y vocación de servicio, generado con todo ello, valor a nuestros accionistas

Name: Centrale del Latte di Torino & C. Spa
Description:
La Centrale del Latte di Torino & C. S.p.A. è un’azienda da sempre privata, di dimensioni interregionali, specializzata nella produzione e commercializzazione diretta - anche attraverso le controllate Centro Latte Rapallo S.p.A., Centrale del Latte di Vicenza S.p.A., nonché la partecipata al 40% Frascheri S.r.l - di prodotti dell’industria lattiero-casearia quali latte fresco, latte a lunga conservazione (UHT), yogurt e latte fermentato con fermenti probiotici. In aggiunta al core-business, l’Azienda ha recentemente sviluppato altre aree di interesse ad elevata potenzialità in altri settori, quali insalate di IV gamma e i frullati solo latte e frutta, dei quali gestisce direttamente la produzione e la vendita. La Centrale del Latte di Torino si caratterizza per un forte radicamento territoriale
che vede in Piemonte, Liguria e Veneto la quasi totalità del suo giro d’affari, con posizioni di leadership per ciò che riguarda il latte fresco e il latte a lunga conservazione (UHT). La società può contare su cinque stabilimenti produttivi dotati delle più avanzate
tecnologie per il trattamento, il confezionamento e lo stoccaggio refrigerato dei prodotti ubicati a: Torino, Rapallo (GE), Bardineto (SV), Vicenza e Casteggio (PV).

Name: Paayas Milk Producer Company Limited
Description:
In India, milk producers are struggling for their valid share in terms of milk price, stake in organisation and livelihood development. Same could be ensured by their direct participation in organised sectors.
This is possible through 'Producer Companies' which accommodate the special characteristics of Cooperative customs with a regulatory framework of Private Ltd. Company. In a Producer Company, only a producer engaged in an activity connected with or related to Produce (Milk) can participate in the ownership. The members have necessarily to be the primary producers as defined under the Companies Act, 1956. Hence, in order to retain producers' hold in the Dairy sector, there must be a strong Producer Organisation in the form of Milk Producer Company.
PAAYAS MILK PRODUCER COMPANY LIMITED was incorporated on May 19, 2012 under Part IX A of the Companies Act 1956. Since inception, the company has received overwhelming response From the milk producers who have applied for the membership of the company and resulting that the Company has successfully allotted membership to nearly 90 thousand milk producers of Rajasthan. At present, the company has its operations in eight districts in Rajasthan and daily harvests more than 5 lakh litres of fresh raw milk from its producer-members spread in nearly 3,000 villages of State.

Name: Long Clawson Dairy
Description:
Long Clawson Dairy is a producer of Award-Winning Speciality Cheese including Blue Stilton, Rutland Red and a range of blended products. These products are supplied UK-wide, as well as being exported to over 30 countries worldwide.

As a traditional company, Long Clawson Dairy is well known for its quality and innovation. In recent years it has been awarded several accolades including the highest award of supreme champion at 3 cheese shows.

Over 100-years ago in 1911, Thomas Hoe Stevenson founded the dairy as a farming cooperative, which remains unchanged today. The company has grown somewhat since then and is now supplied with 58 million litres of milk per year by over 40 farms, within the three neighbouring counties of Leicestershire, Nottinghamshire and Derbyshire.

In 1996 Stilton was awarded a PDO (Protected Designation of Origin) status. Meaning if a cheese is to bear the Stilton name, it must be produced using milk from these three counties (amongst other stipulations).

Our Cheese can be purchased from all leading UK supermarkets, as well as selected independent stores and from our on-site shop (see website for further details including opening times).

Name: Prolactal
Description:
Located near the heart of the Austrian Alps, Prolactal is a trusted provider of Premium Nutrition Solutions made from organic cow and goat milk, as well as whey. Our broad product portfolio supports a wide range of nutritional needs—from infant nutrition and mainstream food to sports performance and elderly care.

We specialize in high-quality dairy proteins with varied release profiles and protein concentrations, backed by a wide array of certifications (including NOP). Our offerings include A2 milk, lactose-free and specialized lactose variants, along with next-generation functional ingredients such as advanced milk protein concentrates and isolates.

By sourcing rare and premium raw materials and processing them in our state-of-the-art facility, we deliver exceptional dairy-based solutions that empower food and beverage manufacturers to create innovative, health-focused products for consumers of all ages.

Name: Organic Meadow Limited Partnership
Description:
Since 1989, Organic Meadow has been trusted by Canadian families to provide high-quality organic dairy foods that taste true to nature. We craft our full line of organic dairy products without compromise using the same care as our farmer founders. Our products are minimally processed, made using traditional methods, and include only purposeful ingredients to ensure the highest quality product.   Organic Meadow is Canada’s original organic dairy brand, a farmer-owned cooperative, and an industry leader in Canada’s organic food movement.
www.organicmeadow.com


Today, Organic Meadow has grown to one of the leading organic dairy brands in Canada with over 90 premium products coast to coast.

Name: DPTC - Dairy Processing Technology Centre
Description:
The Dairy Processing Technology Centre (DPTC) is an industry–academic collaborative research centre, hosted by the University of Limerick, with a research agenda driven by the long-term growth opportunities for the dairy sector. The centre is funded by Enterprise Ireland and the Dairy Industry Partners.

DPTC has been established as a centre of excellence for dairy processing research and innovation. The centre will help to fuel growth in the Irish dairy sector by performing research focused on cost-efficient processing, facilitating a step-change in environmental sustainability and creating, validating and commercializing a pipeline of science and technology-based manufacturing platforms for dairy ingredients. 

The foundation of the DPTC is a strong, long-term industry–academic collaborative partnership that will develop, build and translate the knowledge and capabilities in dairy processing that are needed today and for the long-term growth development of the sector.

Name: MSD Ruminants GB
Description:
MSD Animal Health is a Biopharmaceuticals and Technology Solutions company, with a proud history of improving the lives of animals and the people who care for them. 

At MSD Animal Health, we provide many solutions to support the ruminants sector. We are proud to be a leading provider of veterinary medicines, vaccines, and therapeutic solutions dedicated to supporting the ruminants sector.

Our SENSEHUB monitoring brand monitors livestock by collecting information on cow states to detect the potential for illness early and provide actionable insights.

Our ALLFLEX identification brand provides identification technology, delivering real-time information to help improve livestock management.

Name: Creamy Foods Ltd
Description: Creamy Foods Ltd is a dairy company based out of 2nd Floor, E 13/29 Harsha Bhawan, New Delhi, Delhi, India.

Name: Abu Dhabi Dairy
Description:
Abu Dhabi Investment Group was established in mid-2019 and is headquartered in Cairo.
The group believes in the inevitability of having a strong role in enabling the process of industrial and social prosperity to serve Egyptian and Arab society and future generations.
It also believes that building a prosperous society requires us to promote the growth of high-performance companies; In a manner that ensures value addition and supports the state’s policy and direction in establishing a diversified and prosperous economy; As well as our social responsibility towards society and future generations.
This made us commit ourselves to establishing our group of companies while enhancing comprehensive quality, and confidence, ensuring added value and optimal use of technology, all in light of the state’s orientation to settling a strong and diversified non-traditional economy.

Name: Melkweg Holland B.V.
Description:
Founded in 1993, Melkweg Holland has grown into a trusted global supplier of dairy commodities. We specialize in sourcing and marketing over 200,000 metric tons of dairy ingredients annually for industrial use, including milk powders, whey powders/ingredients, butter, and cheeses. Our supply chain includes both products from our own production and those from leading manufacturers worldwide.

Melkweg is a family-owned company and part of the VanDrie Group, which has a total annual turnover exceeding €3 billion. This strong financial foundation reinforces our position in the international marketplace.

For over 30 years, we have been a reliable partner to the global food and animal feed industries, serving multinational corporations, government institutions, and small to medium-sized enterprises in sectors such as dairy, chocolate, ice cream, bakery, and wholesale.

With operations in nearly 100 countries, our key markets include Europe, the Middle East, North and Sub-Saharan Africa, the Americas, and Asia. In response to evolving market demands, we have expanded our product portfolio in recent years with the introduction of new brands.

At Melkweg, we value long-term, transparent relationships with our customers, built on trust, reliability, and performance. If you have any inquiries or requests, feel free to contact us at trade@melkweg.com.

Name: Holland Dairy
Description:
Local Milk. High-Quality Products. Better Ethiopia.

Building a brighter tomorrow through dairy products
Holland Dairy is a leading dairy processing company in Ethiopia. We’re Ethiopian by nationality and Dutch by technology. We offer a wide array of dairy products with the goal of creating a better Ethiopia both in terms of health and economic growth.

High-Quality Products
We want our customers to know exactly what they’re giving themselves and their families. Since our founding, we’ve remained committed to the highest-quality dairy processing. In fact, we’ve developed a reputation as one of the best quality dairy processors in the entire country. We ensure compliance and sustainability before using an Ethiopian milk farm to source our milk. 

Locally Sourced 
Ethiopian dairy farming plays an important role in the economy of many rural communities. To give back to the country that has given us so much, we are dedicated to only sourcing our raw milk from local farms. More importantly, we’re focusing on smaller farms to really help these local communities thrive. Besides, that means higher-quality products too!

Name: Laticínio Santo Antonio
Description: Fundada em 2002, hoje o Laticínio Santo Antônio é sinônimo de qualidade, pois apesar de seu crescimento expressivo, mantém o mesmo carinho e cuidados especiais na elaboração e fabricação de seus produtos, e não abre mão de uma seleção rigorosa de fornecedores de leite e matéria prima. Hoje com uma completa linha de produtos que vai de Leite Pasteurizado Integral, Bebidas Lácteas de diversos sabores, Iogurtes e uma linha de Queijo Minas Frescal e Queijo Minas Padrão.

Name: Dairy Goat Co-operative (N.Z) Ltd
Description:
Dairy Goat Co-operative is a farmer owned co-operative that is the world’s leading manufacturer of goat milk nutritional powder products. Located on Gallagher Drive in Hamilton, New Zealand we have a large team of successful and driven employees that share the company’s key values, consisting of integrity, co-operative spirit, focus and trust.

Here at Dairy Goat Co-operative we have a wide range of employment opportunities from blending, spray drying, can making and can filling team members to quality, production, accounting and marketing team members. We are always willing to hear from dedicated people who are interested in joining the Dairy Goat Co-operative.

Name: Farmel
Description: Als Farmel voelen wij ons helemaal thuis in de melkveehouderij en op de zuivelmarkt. Niet alleen staan wij op diverse terreinen de melkveehouder bij in zijn bedrijfsvoering, maar ook kunt u efficiënt en vertrouwd zaken met ons doen in het kopen van rauwe melk en diverse zuivelproducten. Farmel brengt partijen graag bij elkaar, opereert graag in heldere en korte lijnen, houdt van persoonlijk contact en denkt én werkt met u mee.

Name: Mahaan Foods Ltd
Description:
Mahaan Foods Limited (MFL) is an ISO 9001/2000 & HACCUP certified company which was incorporated on the 13th of March, 1987. A Milk Processing unit was set up at Paonta Sahib in the State of Himachal Pradesh for processing skimmed milk to manufacture Dairy Whitener, Skimmed Milk Powder, Whole Milk Powder, Instantized Milk Powders, Baby Foods and other milk based products.

The company commenced commercial production in 1989 with an installed capacity to process 1.25 lac litres of Milk each day and eventually increased it to 2.5lacs in the year 1994.Today, Mahaan has a total capacity of 10 lac litres of milk through owned, leased and contract manufacturing facilities.

We use the latest procedures of the highest standards in order to stay a step ahead of our competitors in the dynamic market. The company has obtained technological expertise from various renowned dairy consultants, including M/s Rotacom Industries B.V., Netherlands and M/s Seppo Ralli O.Y., Finland.

Mahaan’s major products are:

•	Skimmed Milk Powder
•	Full Cream Milk Powder
•	Pure Ghee
•	Dairy Whitner
•	Dairy Creamer
•	Pastry Powder
•	White Butter etc


Mahaan, over the years has developed a strong & dedicated marketing team of professionals who look after the national and international sales of our products.

Name: Alexandre Family Farm
Description:
As the only dairy in the US to be certified regenerative organic by both the Savory Institute and the Regenerative Organic Alliance, our purpose is not only to put the healthiest and best-tasting mobile-coop eggs and 100% A2/A2 dairy products in your fridge, but also to be stewards of the land and protect both the ground we walk on and the air we breathe.  

Our regenerative organic farming practices actually help clear the air - by utilizing cows and chickens as essential partners in moving carbon out of the atmosphere and into the soil. We are devoted to farming our way because we believe that the Earth’s most delicious, healthiest foods are created when farmers work in harmony with nature.

Our milk, yogurt, and eggs are found in grocery stores on the west coast, and at farmer’s markets in SF Bay Area and LA. Our Eco Dairy milk line with 59 oz cartons is available nationwide. Use our Store Locator to find the closest retailer to you: https://alexandrefamilyfarm.com/store-locator/.

As of 2021, we are the first and only dairy in the US to be certified regenerative organic by both the Savory Institute and the Regenerative Organic Alliance. These certifications acknowledge that our farming practices go beyond sustainability and help reverse climate change. The “family” of the Alexandre Family Farm consists of Stephanie (mom) and Blake (dad) and our five children and their spouses. Together, we are not just the Alexandre family - we are the Alexandre Family Farm.

Name: Hershey Creamery Company
Description:
Welcome to Hershey’s Ice Cream! We are proud producers of REAL, quality ice cream and other delicious novelty items.  

Since 1894, it has been our pledge to produce the very best products by using only the best ingredients.  

Today, with our large delivery fleet of trucks, we serve parlors, C-stores, schools and colleges and more, at over 33,000 locations!   

Hershey’s, keepin’ it REAL for over 100 years!

Name: Yashili International Holdings Ltd
