Name: Domino Dairy & Ice cream
Description:
Domino stepped into the Iranian dairy and ice cream market in 2011 with the slogan “A New Taste with Domino”. But our story? It began long before that! 
Over 30 years of experience and passion from our founders laid the foundation for a brand that’s all about bringing fresh perspectives and exciting flavors to your life.

In our first decade, we redefined variety by crafting flavors that resonate with every palate. Today, with the slogan “For Growth and Happiness”, we’re here to bring joy and health to your moments—whether it’s a scoop of happiness or a cone of vitality. 

From cutting-edge R&D to top-notch ingredients, every step we take is about delivering the quality you deserve. And the journey isn’t over! With our sights set high, we’re aiming to be among the top three dairy and ice cream brands in the region. Let’s grow and celebrate happiness together!

Name: Cotteswold Dairy Ltd
Description: We are an independent family dairy that is at the heart of a sustainable dairy community. We work together with our farmers to ensure our milk is of the highest quality and from cows that have been treated with the highest respect. We deliver direct to doorsteps through a traditional milkman service and to all different kinds of businesses and educational settings across England and Wales. We produce conventional milk, Welsh milk, organic milk, channel island milk, glass bottled milk, poly bottle milk, single cream, double cream, whipping cream and organic double cream.

Name: Integrated Dairies Limited, Nigeria
Description: Integrated Dairies, domiciled in Nigeria, is a leading producer of dairy products with tentacles in dairy-related research. The firm was established in 2003 to help Nigerians and Africans, in extension, experience the true feel of dairy products; primarily fresh milk and dairy products.

Name: Pharm Robotics
Description:
We develop robotic health centers that help farmers with the inoculation process for dairy and beef cows. The automated system records when the cow was given vital pharmaceuticals, what kind of medication she was given, the dose administered, and how much she weighs at that point in time. We then send this information to the cloud, where we provide farmers with real-time data to make better-informed decisions pertaining to herd health and labor usage. This leads to an increase in immunization and pregnancy rates, reduced labor and replacement costs, and better milk quality.

Instagram @pharmrobotics
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/pharmrobotics/

Name: Ramsons Food
Description:
Ramsons Food  Limited is an established dairy products company,
formerly also known as “Ramsons”.
It deals
 in Desi Ghee, Skimmed Milk Powder, Milk Powder, Whey Powder, Fresh Milk, Butter, Cream other dairy products, and other edible products.

Name: St. Paul Group
Description:
St Paul. The solution when it comes to cheese.

St. Paul develops and manufactures industrial cheese and cheese alternatives for the professional market. With over 30 years of experience, a solution-oriented and targeted way of working, and innovative policies, St Paul is a committed partner in the European food industry.

St Paul produces three different types of cheese for each cheese form:

- Cheese
- Processed cheese
- Dairy preparations and analogs
- Vegan cheese

Also grated or IQF.

 Paul’s cheese innovations can provide the solution for every cheese application. Ranging from the cheese filling for Cordon Bleu and cheese for appetisers to cheese sauces and stretchy cheese.

Our mission: we strive to be one of the mayor players and most appreciated producers of high quality cheese and vegetable cheese for the food industry.

Looking for solutions? We have a solution... or we create one!

Name: Dendairy
Description: Dendairy specializes in the production of dairy-based food products. With substantial local and export markets, it empowers farmers and is a catalyst for job creation.

Name: National Milk Records (NMR)
Description:
From its formation in 1943, NMR has grown and developed into an integrated service provider working for both farmers and milk buyers as well as an independent source of data for advisors such as vets, farm consultants and breed societies.

The NMR Group today is structured on four subsidiary businesses that reflect the sectors in which we operate:
National Milk Records
National Milk Laboratories
Independent Milk Laboratories
National Livestock Records

More information about each of these can be found on our company website at http://www.nmr.co.uk/about

Name: Star Food industries
Description: Star Food is a popular name in the dairy industry with a wide range of products. The company has started operations in 2011 and introduced different varieties of dairy products under the brand Star food.

Name: LUFRA
Description:
Introducing LUFRA, the leading dairy company dedicated to providing healthy and high-quality dairy products while supporting local farmers and upholding ethics, transparency, and trust. Our vision is to make "Made in Albania" products sought after and trusted worldwide.

At LUFRA, we take pride in our end-to-end process. From collecting milk directly from farmers to processing, packing, and distributing a diverse range of products, we ensure freshness and excellence. Our chilled sales and distribution organization and logistics enable us to reach a wide array of customers, including retailers, food service, HORECA, bakery shops, and more. We offer a variety of packaging options, from family-sized packs to convenient "on the go" packages.

Committed to the highest ISO standards, we have our own quality control department and specialized laboratory, ensuring uncompromising product quality. With a substantial market share in almost all our categories, we have become a trusted name in the industry.

With approximately 350 dedicated employees, we foster a strong working culture and a "western mentality" that encourages learning and growth. We invest in our people through professional training and development facilitated by expert trainers. This, coupled with our absolute winning mindset, courage, and innovation, sets us apart from competitors.

Having expanded into Kosovo and gaining FDA approval in 2021, we are actively exploring further regional markets. Join us as we continue our journey to deliver exceptional dairy products while making a global impact.

Name: Fleurieu Milk Company
Description: We strive to produce Australia’s highest quality dairy in order to ensure consumers have the opportunity to purchase fresh dairy, how it used to taste. Despite operating in a volatile industry we refuse to become involved in price wars and can guarantee our farmers will be sustainable long term.

Name: Club de Buenas Practicas Tamberas
Description: Programa de capacitación, actualización e intercambio técnico, desarrollado por INTA con el apoyo estratégico de la FUNPEL para potenciar y promover la eficiencia de la producción lechera. Dirigido a equipos tamberos

Name: Valley Milk, LLC
Description:
Valley Milk, LLC (www.valleymikca.com)  is based in Turlock, CA and was founded in 2017 when five multi-generational Central Valley California Dairy Families, nutritionists, and veterinarians came together with the intent of realizing the dream of becoming a vertically integrated processor of dairy ingredients. Commercial operations began in 2018 at the newly constructed, state-of-the-art, milk powder processing facility. The company is supplied by 18 dairy farms, all within 45 miles of the plant, forming full vertical integration from farm to powder. Valley Milk’s resilient multi-generational family foundation is fundamental in their promise to foster core values representing integrity, respect, innovation, promotion of a healthy and safe work environment, and commitment to their customers.
With a solid, strategic business plan, world-class engineering, and a rock-solid financial relationship, Valley Milk LLC built a plant and the foundation necessary to support the continued growth of the business. The plant produces Non-fat dry milk, skim milk powder and whole milk powder; when it is producing skim milk powder, the plant has capacity to process 2.25 million pounds of milk each day and produce 35,000 Mt of powder and 34,000 Mt of cream each year. The plant was designed by Shambaugh & Sons of Ft. Wayne, Indiana, an EMCOR company. It is built on a 30-acre site in the Turlock Industrial Park with sufficient open space to more than double the current capacity. The plant was named the 2019 Food Engineering Plant of the Year. 
In 2023, Valley Milk expanded the plant to include the capability to process the cream into anhydrous milk fat (AMF), allowing the business to create additional value-added products and arbitrage the AMF, Cream and WMP markets. The AMF Plant has the capability to manufacture totes and drums for industrial users and bag in box for food service clients.

Name: Crickley Dairy
Description:
From the lush green fields of the Eastern Cape to your table, Crickley Dairy brings you the tastiest, freshest, healthiest milk around.

Based in Queenstown in the rolling green fields of the Eastern Cape, Crickley Dairy supplies a range of healthy and delicious dairy products to the region.

Crickley. It's the way dairy should be.

Name: Lácteos Luz Azul
Description:
Con más de 45 años de trayectoria, Luz Azul sigue trabajando día a día con el dinamismo de su nueva gestión a través de Ensemble SRL.
La empresa que da mucho que hablar, trabaja diariamente en la elaboración de productos entre los que se destacan; quesos de pasta blanda, duros, semi duros y pasta hilada. Además de dulce de leche y productos frescos como manteca y ricota. Cuenta en la actualidad con 6 locales propios y un nuevo sistema de franquicias. Con sede central y fábrica en la ciudad de Azul, esta empresa ha logrado iluminar en carácter de producción a la región.

Name: MULLER DAIRY RO
Description:
Istoria Müller are ingredientele naturale ale succesului: un procent bine definit de ambitie, un raport echilibrat de pricepere si de traditie germane si inovatie pe masura.
De mai bine de 100 de ani Müller este recunoscut pentru grija fata de gust şi pentru calitatea excepţională. Müller este în prezent un important producător european de lactate, fiind îndrăgit şi unanim recunoscut în Europa, cu 11 fabrici şi peste 9000 de angajaţi.
Povestea iaurturilor Müller a ajuns si in Romania in 2008. A fost odata ca niciodata, ca daca nu ar fi, nu s-ar degusta.
Personajele din povestea Müller te îmbie la desfatare si rasfat; fie că alegi produsele albe: Iaurtul sau Smântâna Müller, Lapte din Alpi, Bianco sau Kefir, fie că eşti un pofticios înrăit si preferi iaurturile cu fructe: Müller Crema di Frutta, Müller Iaurt cu bucati de fructe Pezzi, Mix, Froop sau al delicioaselor deserturi Pudding, Müllermilk şi Reis, gustând Müller te aventurezi într-o experienţă inedită de „tandreţuri gustative„.
Ei sunt eroii Müller. 
Descoperiti-i! Si, mai ales, spuneti-le povestea!

Name: Delmos Research
Description:
We, at DELMOS RESEARCH manufacture Rapid, Advanced & Easy to use tests for Detection of Adulteration in Milk. 

                                                       Our mission is to help build a healthy India.

We at Delmos Research possess a deep understanding of the real time needs of dairy industry. We are trustworthy, ethical, and able to adapt to market conditions in order to meet our client’s needs. We believe our service should exceed industry standards and be the best value for the customer. We are committed to excellence in providing quality products through our education, leadership, efficiency and service.

                                                                                                  Contact Us
                                                                                  Phone: +91-881-381-9899
                                                                  Email: purchase@delmosresearch.com
                                                                                marketing@delmosresearch.com
                                                                               Web: www.delmosresearch.com

                                                                                            Corporate Address:
                                                                        DELMOS RESEARCH PRIVATE LIMITED
                                                                                                  5210/29, 
                                                                                        Surat Nagar Phase 1,
                                                                               Gurgaon – 122001 (Haryana)

India is largest milk producer of the world. However, the quality of milk is far from satisfactory. This is evident from the media reports as well as from the report of the survey done by Food Safety and Standards Authority of India (FSSAI). Milk is being adulterated with various chemicals to fraudulently increase its solids-not-fat (SNF) content as well as its fat content.

Efforts have been made in the past for developing rapid tests for the detection of various adulterants in milk. These tests are liquid (chemical) based tests which need special care and lab set-up while performing. So we thought why not develop a product which can be performed by anyone, a product which do not need any lab set-up or expertise to perform.

So we came up with a revolutionary product to detect adulteration in milk and milk products. We have developed strip based tests for the detection of various adulterants in milk. With this product we want to empower common man with a tool to check adulteration in milk even at household level.

Our product are such that anyone could use it anywhere. It doesn't need testing skills or chemicals or equipments to perform tests. It can be implemented at village level or dairy farm or Factory and even at household level.

With our products, we can actually eliminate adulteration from our system like anything. Our dream of ‘Adulteration free India’ will soon become reality and we will not rest until its done.

Name: NIG Nutritionals Limited
Description:
NIG Nutritionals was founded out of the drive to develop quality nutritional products which enhance the health and wellbeing of others throughout all stages of life. Since the beginning, we have been creating category leading, scientifically formulated, quality products. 

Our brands, Babysteps, Bioshine and Symbiotics, are loved both here in New Zealand, as much as they are around the world. With global export making up the majority of our stock movement, we can truly say that we are delivering our mission at a global scale. We are also the trusted partner of some of the world’s leading, globally recognised brands to help create the products their customers love.

With a pedigree in excellence, NIG Nutritionals was launched out of New Image Group. New Image Group was founded in 1984, and after many years of experience with the successful development and production of our own nutritional products, we saw a gap in the market to expand and partner with internationally renowned brands to assist them with the same goal, of bringing to market nutritional products which enhance the wellbeing of others.

We pride ourselves in delivering innovative, quality products through our own leading brands, as well as being the trusted partners of large international brands. Our state-of-the-art manufacturing facilities and stringent quality control processes have made us a globally recognised partner of choice. With a combined 35 years of experience in the nutritionals and manufacturing industry, NIG Nutritional brands and partnerships are highly sought after in both the domestic and international markets.

NIG Nutritionals has a long-standing reputation of delivering nutritional formulations which are produced by some of New Zealand’s most talented, product development and manufacturing experts. And it appears others think so too! We’ve been the proud recipients of multiple export, business, as well as science and technology awards – and we’re just getting started.

Name: Молочна компанія «Галичина»
Description: Молочна компанія «Галичина» — одне з найбільших молочних підприємств в Україні, розташоване на Львівщині. Сьогодні завод Молочної компанії «Галичина» – це завод із сучасним європейським обладнанням: Tetra Pak (Швеція), ALFA LAVAL (Швеція), GЕА (Німеччина), Оbrам (Польща), ТEWES-BIS (Польща), ТEWES-KLIMA (Польща). 87% сировини молокозавод отримує з фермерських господарств, що забезпечує високий вміст білка, якісні показники молока та виготовленої продукції. Якість продукції підтверджено міжнародним сертифікатом відповідності FSSC 22000 – найвищим у сфері харчових продуктів.

Name: Laticínio Atilatte
Description:
Em nossa fazenda produzimos os melhores iogurtes premium, queijos, creme de leite, leite tipo A e coalhadas do Brasil, valorizando a qualidade de vida, a saúde e o bem-estar das pessoas. É a nossa forma de viver a vida, acreditando na produção autossustentável, no respeito ao ecossistema, a natureza e ao planeta! Nossa filosofia é trazer o verdadeiro sabor da natureza até você, por isso não usamos hormônios na fabricação de nossos produtos, que recebem apenas corantes e aromas naturais com o mais puro leite tipo A do mercado, o nosso.

Proteção Ambiental
Toda a produção da Atilatte é localizada na Fazenda Atibainha, que dispõe de extensas áreas de agricultura intensiva de forrageiras, como milho para silagem, campos de feno e pastagens para o rebanho leiteiro, além de áreas de reflorestamento em pinus e eucaliptus, matas ciliares às margens do Rio Atibaia e reserva legal em matas virgens, totalmente preservadas. A Atilatte já nasceu sustentável e focada em sua responsabilidade socioambiental, antecipando-se sempre as exigências dos órgãos fiscalizadores.

Sustentabilidade
Todos os resíduos produzidos pelo laticínio são tratados e utilizados posteriormente como fertilizantes nas áreas agrícolas da fazenda. Assim, a necessidade de reposição de matéria orgânica nas áreas de plantio é feita de forma natural e sustentável, eliminando-se a necessidade de fertilizantes químicos. A matéria orgânica extraída da terra em forma de forragens, retorna à terra diluída em água na forma de fértil irrigação, fechando um ciclo importante de ecorrenovação.

Name: S.R.Thorat Milk Products Private Limited
Description: Since 1992, delivering pure & wholesome dairy goodness.  We offer a variety of milk products for every family's needs!

Name: Prolacto
Description: In Azores since 1968, Prolacto is an ingredient manufacturer. It has evolved from being a corporate factory to a standalone company. Producing high quality dairy ingredients in a modernized factory and investing continuously in equipment, people and processes.

Name: Minerva Dairy Inc.
Description:
Minerva Dairy, America’s oldest family-owned creamery, produces butter for retail chains/food service/private label and cheese for food service and manufacturing customers across US markets. An over 130-year creamery, Minerva Dairy uses a time-tested recipe of slow churned, 85% butterfat butter that’s fit for the quality-obsessed home chef. Using only farm-fresh milk from pasture-raised cows, Minerva ensures a creamier, richer, and more flavorful product. Minerva’s cheeses are produced in blocks and range from cheddars to Italian-styles with Pasture Raised/Organic/Kosher/Halal value adds for each recipe specific for each customer.  

The 5th generation creamery churns out R&D recipes of flavored infused butters in addition to the sea salt and unsalted products available in 8oz, 16oz, 1 & 2-pound hand-rolled versions.

 All Minerva Dairy products are GMO-free, antibiotic-free, and gluten-free. For more information, including where to find Minerva products throughout the US, visit  www.minervadairy.com.

Name: Cookhouse Creamery
Description:
Cookhouse Creamery was purchased by the Just Milk Group in 2018 out of the Dairybelle liquidation.

Historically, the Just Milk Group provided all of its milk to Dairybelle, who in turn provided whey from the cheese making process to the Golden Valley and Cookhouse Piggeries, owned by Number Two Piggeries who are a key partner in Just Milk. The piggeries were situated on the Just Milk dairy farms and the manure from the piggeries was spread on the dairy pastures as a natural fertilizer.

This system worked well for all parties involved until Dairybelle went into default on their way to liquidation.

Production re-commenced in July 2018 with many Dairybelle’s ex-staff, including Elize de Vos who had worked at the Cookhouse Plant for 24 years.

Cookhouse Creamery produces bulk blocks of cheddar and 2.5kg mozzarella loaves. The factory also used to produce traditional Dutch rounds of Gouda which it will start producing again once market and space conditions allow.

Cookhouse Creamery market their cheese into bulk and value-add markets via strategic partners, Sundale Free Range Dairy, who are based in East London.

The Cookhouse factory can process 220,000 litres a day and is currently supplied by four Just Milk farms, being Riverside, Riverview, Dalfreuch and Leeway.

The Just Milk Group, through their three farms within 5km from Cookhouse and the factory, have become a key provider of jobs in the small town of Cookhouse, and hope to continue growing with assistance from the Blue Crane Municipality.

Drink milk. Eat cheese.

Name: Cooperativa Agropecuaria Ltda De Uberlandia (Calu)

Name: Fromagerie St-Guillaume
Description:
Founded in 1940, Fromagerie St-Guillaume’s experienced cheese experts now process more than 27 million liters of milk per year as Fresh Cheddar (Le P’tit Frais), Mild Cheddar, Medium Cheddar (6 months), Old Cheddar (1 year) and Extra-Old Cheddar (2 years), Halloumi (Baya, grilling cheese), Parmesan, Brick, Monterey Jack, Swiss (2017 Caseus finalist), Emmental, Pizza Mozzarella, Curled-Style Tortillons and Le Cantolait, a 4 months surface-repined Cantal-type cheese (winner of three Caseus awards).

Recognized for its high adaptability to the needs of hotels, restaurants and institutions (HRI) as well as retail customers, all cheeses are offered under private labels or under the St-Guillaume brand name, in blocks, wheels, cubes, slices or grated and in sizes ranging from 500 g to 18 kg.

In addition to meeting the Canadian Food Inspection Agency’s federal requirements for interprovincial trade, we comply with GFSI (Global Food Safety Initiative) standards with our Level 2 SQF certification. We are also certified Kosher for some of our cheeses.

Name: Morinaga Milk Industry
Description: Morinaga Milk Industry Co. Ltd. is a leading producer and seller of dairy products in Japan, including milk and ice cream, as well as other beverages and foods. The company also develops biochemical and pharmaceutical products.

Name: Milco Dairy
Description:
National Food Products Company was founded in 1971 with the establishment of a dairy production facility in the middle of the Arabian Desert.

The focus on the need, among the UAE’s consumers, for high quality, readily available diary products, made the foundation of a diary plant an essential need, as a result, Milco Plant took its grounding journey and was established, several kilometers outside the capital, Abu Dhabi, being the first diary plant at that time.
In 1976, a group was established to import dairy products from Europe. The operation grew quickly and a joint venture company in partnership with the giant Danish / Swedish co-operative Arla had been signed.

Name: Queijos Regina
Description:
Bem-vindo ao perfil oficial dos Queijos Regina 
Mais de um século de tradição em produzir queijos de qualidade, oferecendo sabor autêntico e experiências gastronômicas únicas. Desde 1915, nossa marca tem sido sinônimo de excelência e paixão pela tradição familiar.

Queijos Regina, há 109 anos trazendo, qualidade e tradição para sua mesa. Nosso sabor é puro prazer.

Name: Srijanee Milk Producer Organisation
Description:
Srijanee Milk Producer Company Limited incorporated under Company Act 2013, on 05 th January 2023 with its headquarter in Bareilly Uttar Pradesh. company has the objective of safeguarding the interest of member producers (exclusively women) by providing round the year access to organize market in fair and transparent manner, timely payment, capacity building and providing livestock support services to increase milk productivity.

A women dairy farmer's owned Milk Producer Company engaged in uplifting the  livelihood of dairy farmers by providing forward linkage and quality inputs in 6 district of Uttar Pradesh ie. Bareilly, Pilibhit, Rampur, Sitapur, Shahjahanpur, Lakhimpur.

Name: Real Dairy Australia
Description:
Real Dairy Australia is a world-class supplier of dairy-based ingredients that has made real commitment to quality and customer service a foundation for its growth. We deliver high quality and innovative dairy-based products, services and solutions to the retail, foodservice and food ingredient markets.

Supported by impressive market knowledge, a dedicated team, flexibility, scope of product range, and the use of function-specific ingredients to create superior products, Real Dairy is one of Australia’s largest and most respected suppliers delivering products to the food sectors. 

Our talented team’s enthusiasm, energy, industry experience, and passion are what makes us an invaluable partner for any customer. We work with efficiency and effectiveness to maintain the high standard of all our products and services, at every level of the business. 

We are across all food ingredient industries and specialise in:- Dairy, Health , Bakery & Biscuit, Confectionary & Chocolate, Ice-cream & Desserts, Convenience Snacks, Beverages, Milk Recombination/Reconstitution, Meat and Smallgoods, Technical/Industrial.

Real Dairy is continually changing to keep up with the market and has invested heavily in the dairy industry, boasting impressive warehouses in every state, cheese production plant, powder blending facility and a nationwide delivery network to ensure unsurpassed responsiveness and reliability.

Quality products supplied include:- Cheese (block and shredded), Butter, AMF, Milk Powders, Milk Powder Alternatives, Milk Proteins, Casein, Caseinates, Whey Protein Concentrate (WPC), Whey Protein Isolate (WPI), Milk Protein Concentrate (MPC), Micro Ingredients (Lactoferrin, colostrum, etc), Stabilizer Systems, Speciality Powders (yoghurt, sports, nutritional, dietetic, etc), bulk liquids (cream, sweetened condensed milk, etc) and some non-dairy ingredients.

Name: Lactalis U.S. Yogurt
Description:
The Lactalis U.S. Yogurt division is part of the world’s largest dairy company. With over 800 employees and three manufacturing facilities in New Hampshire, Vermont, and Arizona, we produce a wide assortment of products from yogurts and smoothies to dairy desserts under the Stonyfield Organic, Brown Cow, siggi’s, and Green Mountain Creamery brands.

The Lactalis U.S. Yogurt Division is creating a better food system for consumers, communities, and our own families by offering a variety of nutritious yogurts always made with people and the planet in mind. Our commitment to real, simple ingredients is unwavering – inspired by the iconic founders behind our popular brands. From organic yogurt made for babies to protein-packed skyr—we bring joy and pleasure to our consumers through high-quality, nutritious foods.

We believe it is as much about creating a world we want to live in as it is about making yogurt and these two missions work hand in hand. You can find our products on your local grocery shelf by looking for the Stonyfield Organic, siggi’s, Brown Cow, and Green Mountain Creamery brands.

Name: Dairy Specialists
Description:
Dairy Specialists is one of the leading and most innovative commercial dairy service and equipment dealerships in the country. With locations in Evans and Montrose, Colorado, Syracuse Kansas and Tillamook, we supply commercial dairy farms with innovative parlor designs, new construction, remodels, robotic milkers, dairy waste management and 24/7 support and technical services.

Dairy Specialists is a subsidiary of Ag Property Solutions (APS). APS is the industry leader in general contracting, providing customers with innovative and customized solutions related to the planning, design, construction and outfitting of animal and livestock production facilities. Ag Property Solutions is one of four independently run companies owned by Omaha, Nebraska-based Standard Nutrition Company.

Another related company, Standard Dairy Consultants (SDC) has been servicing the dairy industry since 1886. As the top provider of dairy farm nutrition and management consulting, SDC currently services customers in the largest dairy producing regions of the U.S. through a network of highly experienced and successful consultants. SDC is a wholly owned subsidiary of Standard Nutrition Company.

Name: Lactalis Malaysia
Description:
Lactalis Malaysia is a subsidiary of the Lactalis Group, a French multinational dairy products corporation, owned by the Besnier family and based in Laval, Mayenne, France. The Lactalis Group is the largest dairy company in the world, with operations in more than 90 countries.

Lactalis Malaysia is operating since 2019 after acquisition of a chilled dairy business in Malaysia. Lactalis Malaysia provides a wide range of dairy products, including yogurt, yogurt drink, ghee, butter, cheese, and milk, under well-known brands such as Lactel, QBB, Président, Galbani, Kraft, Pauls and etc.

Known for providing top quality dairy products around the world, Lactalis brings its expertise and knowledge to Malaysia, providing new and innovative products to the market to sustain the position as the No. 1 nation’s favourite chilled dairy brand!

Name: Achha Foods
Description:
At Achha Foods, our legacy of providing the finest and pure dairy products has been the cornerstone of our commitment. We believe in delivering top-notch dairy products to our customers.

Our journey began in 1940 with the vision of Chaudhry Achha Pehlwan from Bhatti Gate to take things in a new direction. It took 24 years, in 1964, to root the first Milk Franchise, known as Achha Milk Shop in Bhatti Gate. It was done by Chaudhry Muhammad Aslam. From that moment onward, an unwavering pursuit of success and dedication set sail that is still in motion.


In 1995, Chaudhry Muhammad Sohail took the role of the CEO, bringing fresh innovation to inspire generations in the dairy business. Since then, our company has been unwavering in its commitment to consistently exceed customer expectations by delivering unparalleled service.

To ensure the highest quality, Achha Group established a cutting-edge factory in Manga, Raiwind Road, Lahore. This state-of-the-art facility prioritizes hygiene, purity, and quality control, ensuring that our dairy products are free from impurities and consistently superior in quality. Our products are carefully transported from the plant to wholesalers and regional merchants in specially designed temperature-controlled trucks, guaranteeing freshness every step of the way.

Achha Foods has expanded its offerings to include a wide range of processed quality dairy items, such as Cheese, Yogurt, Desi Ghee, White Butter, and, the oldest star runner Milk.

Our commitment to quality supply begins with the collection of milk, followed by its meticulous processing at our factory. The evolution of Achha Foods has seen the introduction of high-quality processed Cheese, cementing our position as a leader in the dairy industry. We continue to grow in the field and now with the engulfing of our e-mart Achha foods has set sail to conquer the online market with dedication, commitment, and surety of quality.

Name: Bom Leite
Description:
Desde 1990, a Bom Leite leva para a mesa da família nordestina a mais alta qualidade, variedade e sabor.

Especialista em leite e derivados, a empresa conta com uma estrutura totalmente equipada, além de uma equipe de profissionais capacitados para cumprir as rigorosas normas sanitárias.

Com uma rede de distribuidores dispostos a levar diariamente até você os mais saborosos produtos com a máxima segurança e com o menor prazo, a Bom Leite oferece um ótimo sistema de logística.

Esse compromisso tem trazido frutos como a conquista da confiança do consumidor, o que inclusive se traduz no reconhecimento por meio de prêmios como o Top Marcas, que diversas vezes já confirmou a forte presença da marca na lembrança dos seus clientes.

É por essas e outras características que a Bom Leite é sinônimo de saúde e credibilidade para milhares de pessoas, tendo como objetivo maior oferecer produtos de excelência, com uma gestão fundamentada na valorização das pessoas, na ética e na sustentabilidade.

Há 34 anos, essa marca faz muito bem para você.

Name: Food Union
Description:
Food Union is one of the largest food-producing, distributing, and marketing groups in Europe. We are driven by local market insights and committed to offering everyday delight through strong brands in ice cream, snacks, dairy, and frozen foods.
 
Food Union unites some of the strongest market-leading and heritage dairy and ice cream companies in Northern and Eastern Europe: Rīgas Piena Kombināts and Valmieras Piens in Latvia, Premia in Estonia, Premier Is in Denmark, Isbjørn Is in Norway, Alpin57Lux in Romania, and Premia in Lithuania. In Denmark and Norway, we are also represented by ice cream and frozen food door-to-door delivery services—Hem Is and Isbilen, respectively.
 
Food Union products are available in more than 20 countries, with our main markets including Latvia, Ukraine, Poland, Denmark, Norway, Germany, Lithuania, Estonia, Romania, the UK, Azerbaijan, Kazakhstan, Moldova, Ireland, and Taiwan.
 
At present, Food Union is proud to be:

The largest ice cream manufacturer in the Baltics and Denmark.

The leading milk processing company in Latvia.

Among the top 3 market leaders in ice cream in Norway and Romania.

Employing more than 2,000 people across six home markets.

Generating total sales of over 320 million EUR annually.
 
Join our team!

As a truly international company, we embrace diversity and inclusivity. We believe that people from different nationalities, cultures, and perspectives enrich our company and strengthen our team. We welcome individuals with bright eyes, bright minds, and vibrant personalities who are ambitious to learn and grow within one of the most dynamic and forward-thinking organizations in the dairy industry.

Name: Laticínios Buritis
Description:
O Laticínio Vale dos Buritis, iniciou suas atividades em 5 de fevereiro de 1984 com o intuito de oferecer ao consumidor produtos inovadores e de alta qualidade. Em 2009 os produtos da conceituada marca Supremo também passaram a ser produzidos no Laticínios Vale dos Buritis.

O Laticínio Vale dos Buritis localiza-se no noroeste de Minas Gerais e atualmente produz aproximadamente 105.000 litros de leite/dia, com mais de 200 produtores parceiros de toda região. São mais de duas décadas de historia, produzindo e comercializando 40 produtos para todas as regiões do Brasil.

Name: ARD Foods Limited (Formerly: Adam Milk Foods Limited)
Description:
ARD Foods Limited (Formerly known as Adam Milk Foods Limited) is Pakistan's largest selling cheese brand. It has been in the business of cheese making for the past three decades. Starting off in the early 1980s as an association of partners, Adam Milk Foods was incorporated in 1993 and has since grown steadily to become a recognized and trusted dairy foods producer with a nation-wide distribution and sales network. Adam's has developed its product portfolio over the years and now carries fresh milk, butter, yoghurt, lassi, raita, desi ghee and a wide variety of cheeses.

The founders of Adam Milk Foods recognized the growing demand for cheese in the local market and decided to fulfil this demand by producing cheese locally. Based in Sahiwal, in the heart of the "milk belt" of Pakistan, Adam's procures the best available milk directly from the farmers. Milk is collected at Adam's owned and operated collection centers from where it is shipped in company trucks to the plant. Milk is tested at the collection center and at the plant to ensure that the milk is pure and unadulterated. By establishing contacts directly with the farmers, Adam's is able to obtain premium quality milk for its dairy products.

The dairy products are produced and packaged at a state-of-the-art automated production plant in Sahiwal. A high level of automation ensures that cheese and other dairy products are free of contaminants and consistent in quality. From the plant, the products are shipped in specially designed temperature controlled trucks to wholesalers and regional distributors for onward placement on shelves at retailers.

Name: Shreeja Milk Producer Organization
Description:
Shreeja Mahila Milk Producer Company Limited (Shreeja MMPCL), an all women owned milk producer company with Head Office in Tirupati, had started functioning from 15th September 2014.

Our main objective is to carry on the business of procuring, pooling, processing and marketing of milk to create maximum value for its shareholders and at the same time provide the best quality milk and milk products to the customers.

Our operations are spread over in districts of Andhra Pradesh and bordering villages of Karnataka and Tamil Nadu, covering about 1300+ Revenue Villages with a membership of about 70892 through 2,500 Milk Pooling Points. We are aiming to reach milk procurement of about 4 lakh Kg Per Day in FY 2017-18.

We plan to grow our current membership base to 0.78 lakhs by 2017-18 and expect to procure around 4 LLPD of milk by 2017-18. Our turnover is projected to grow from approximately Rs. 300 cr. in 2016-17 to around Rs. 400 cr. in 2017-18.

Shreeja MMPC has been formed with an objective of maximizing returns to its members through professional management and by harnessing capital, markets and technology thus ensuring business growth without undermining the basic cooperative character of democratic governance and autonomy.

Name: Pure Dairy
Description:
Pure Dairy is a privately held dairy company specialising in the sales, marketing, manufacturing, and distribution of high-quality dairy products.

With a growing network of offices across Australia, Dubai, the USA, Mexico, and Singapore, we operate in multiple channels including International Trade (Commodity), Food Service, and Retail.

Our new Australian head office and manufacturing facility is more than just a plant; it’s a living microcosm of the dairy industry. It brings together operations, logistics, R&D, and our customers to connect in one dynamic environment. It’s a place designed to accelerate innovation, empower our people, and continually push the boundaries of what’s possible in dairy.

Name: Ambrosi Spa
Description: Portiamo sulle tavole dei nostri consumatori e clienti tutto il piacere dei formaggi tradizionali italiani. Il metodo Ambrosi: selezione della migliore qualità, stagionatura perfetta, prodotti confezionati freschi, facili da utilizzare.

Name: Lakeland Dairies Food Ingredients
Description:
Lakeland Dairies Food Ingredients are completely committed to consistently delivering premium quality dairy ingredients no matter the time of year or geographical location.

The world doesn’t stop turning and neither do we. We collect fresh Irish milk every single day of the year, transforming it into nutritious food ingredients tailored to meet the specific needs of your business.

Lakeland Dairies Food Ingredients produces premium quality food ingredients using pure, fresh Irish milk. We are the food ingredients division of Lakeland Dairies, the second largest dairy co-op in Ireland and the 12th in Europe. We’re always there for our customers, delivering a constant supply of superb dairy ingredients every single day of the year.

We’re on a mission to nourish the world with one of Ireland’s richest, natural products – pure, fresh milk. Our business is built on over 100 years of dairy expertise, supported by our trusted network of farmers that provides us over 1.9 billion liters of milk annually. We source fresh milk every day, then transform it into a range of nutritious food ingredients for some of the world’s leading food brands.

At Lakeland Dairies Food Ingredients, we understand the difference between being a supplier and being a partner. Our responsive teams will work with you to develop dairy ingredient solutions that meet your unique market demands. Our state-of-the-art facilities are equipped with cutting edge technologies and provide the perfect testing ground to optimise your product offering.

Name: International Cheese & Dairy Awards & EXPO
Description:
The International Cheese & Dairy Expo (ICDA Expo) is the premier global event connecting industry professionals across retail, wholesale, foodservice, manufacturing, and hospitality. Offering an unparalleled platform for networking, product discovery, and industry insights, the Expo attracts over 2,500 delegates from around the world.

Bringing together 250+ leading suppliers, the Expo showcases the latest innovations in cheese and dairy, providing buyers with exclusive sourcing opportunities. With a legacy dating back to 1897, the event continues to expand each year, now featuring over 4,500 product entries - making it the largest and most prestigious cheese and dairy exhibition globally.

At the heart of the Expo is the International Cheese & Dairy Awards (ICDA), a two-day competition where 250 expert judges assess the finest products in the industry. Producers from across the globe compete for the coveted Supreme Champion trophy, the ultimate recognition of excellence in cheese and dairy.

Join us for an immersive experience celebrating tradition, innovation, and the best in cheese and dairy. The world’s leading and best cheese and dairy event awaits!

Name: Velder
Description: Velder is dé ketenpartner in de wereld van kaas. Vanuit onze oorsprong staan wij aan de basis van kwaliteit. We vertegenwoordigen álle schakels in de wereld van kaas. Van het weiland tot aan de distributie van onze producten. Samen vormen we één unieke keten, waarbij ieder onderdeel topkwaliteit levert. We ontwikkelen continue op duurzaamheid en beschikken over alle ingrediënten om toegevoegde waarde te bieden, vanuit onze visie op de categorie. Dit maakt ons dé ketenpartner in de wereld van kaas. Deze sterke basis stelt ons in staat om duurzame partnerships te bouwen, waarmee we een unieke klant- en consumentenervaring creëren. “We will guide you through the world of quality cheese”. Om te ontdekken en te inspireren, maar vooral om iedereen te laten genieten. Velder; Tasting Happiness.

Name: Florida Department of Education
Description: The Florida Association of District School Superintendents assists and supports superintendents in carrying out their responsibility as the educational leader of their community to ensure every student has access to a high-quality public education.

Name: Laticínios Marília S/A
Description:
Tradição, crescimento e inovação

Respaldada na tradição de grandes produtores de leite, a empresa Laticínios Marília foi fundada em 1970, mantendo-se competitiva e em crescimento. Com cuidadosa produção e investimento em tecnologia, hoje ela oferece ao consumidor uma variedade de derivados de leite, onde os queijos tem grande destaque.

A marca Marília está presente em produtos que vão do café da manhã (com a Linha Dia-a-Dia) aos momentos especiais (com a Linha Europa) e promete aumentar ainda mais sua presença no mercado, desde a inauguração de uma nova unidade de produção, em Itaperuna-RJ.
Foi em Carangola- MG que a empresa nasceu. Lá, a fábrica que era responsável por toda a produção de laticínios atualmente dedica-se com exclusividade aos queijos especiais da Linha Europa. Da unidade de Itaperuna – que triplicou a capacidade de produção da empresa – saem os produtos da Linha Dia-a-Dia, embalados por uma moderna tecnologia.

Name: Laticinios Passa Quatro
Description:
Localizado na Serra da Mantiqueira, no sul de Minas Gerais, uma das regiões mais belas do Brasil, o Laticínios Passa Quatro é uma empresa formada por pessoas simples, responsáveis, determinadas e apaixonadas pelo nosso negócio.

Nosso principal objetivo é a satisfação dos nossos consumidores, entregando produtos de qualidade por um preço justo. Buscamos excelência em todos os elos da cadeia produtiva, da seleção de fornecedores até o treinamento dos colaboradores.

Distribuímos os nossos produtos em todo Brasil, com caminhões refrigerados próprios ou através de parceria com transportadoras conceituadas. Cuidamos da qualidade dos nossos produtos desde a fabricação, transporte, até chegar na mesa do consumidor.

Desde o início da nossa jornada o aprendizado é constante e o dia a dia de uma fábrica de laticínios é, sem dúvida alguma, um desafio. Para sermos bem-sucedidos, acreditamos na transparência e respeito, no espírito de equipe e cooperação, entre todos os envolvidos: fornecedores, prestadores de serviço, funcionários, clientes e consumidor final. Esse é o nosso norte.

Nós somos assim!

Name: European Dairy Association
Description:
The European Dairy Association (EDA) is not only the acknowledged voice of the European milk processing industry in Brussels, but also the benchmark for all sector-specific organisations in the field of agriculture. 

We represent a European forum for both high-level debates on the future of the European 'lactosphere' and in-depth analysis of today's dairy related topics on the European agenda.

Name: Laticínios Cruziliense ltda.
Description:
Começamos em 1948, com uma pequena banca dentro do Mercado Municipal de São Paulo. O empreendimento cresceu e, ao final da década de 80, decidimos abrir laticínio próprio em Cruzília/MG.

A nossa fábrica está situada ao pé da Serra da Mantiqueira, no melhor terroir do Brasil para a produção de queijos finos. Somos herdeiros do milenar conhecimento queijeiro europeu, trazido para a região por intrépidos dinamarqueses.

A nossa produção se resume na união do conhecimento com a paixão pela arte de fazer os melhores queijos. Com equipamentos modernos, matéria-prima selecionada e processos quase artesanais somados a rigorosos controles de qualidade, desde a origem do leite até a maturação ideal dos queijos. 

Essa é a receita que nos permite fabricar queijos únicos e nos torna a queijaria brasileira mais premiada no mundo.

Juntamente com as marcas Lac Lélo e Búfalo Dourado, fazemos parte da plataforma Ultra Cheese, criada a partir do sonho de se tornar a melhor e mais completa queijaria do país.

https://www.instagram.com/queijoscruzilia/

Name: Artesana
Description: An ambitious company that aims to refine the tastes of consumers in Romania by offering artisanal dairy products (read natural, traditional, organic, no harmful chemical additives added, etc.) of superior quality.

Name: Holstein Association USA, Inc.
Description: Holstein Association USA maintains records on over 22 million Registered Holsteins, recording ancestry and collecting and analyzing production, type and genetic data to provide useable information that enables dairy producers to improve their businesses by breeding better cows. The Holstein Association works to help dairy producers recognize the full potential of their herds.

Name: eDairy News
Description:
eDairy News was born 15 years ago in the middle of a digital revolution which caused, in a short period of time, the creation of new languages and ways of thinking, along with shared content, social media and digital marketing.

We developed a platform of business and global content, implementing new tools for the dairy chain as a whole.

In eDairyNews we continue to provide information and content to the user so he can take advantage of it for his own and for his business sake, through a close relationship with: Governmental organisms, Chambers of Commerce, Milk Federations, Organizations of milk producers, Universities, Business Forums, Consulting Markets, Supermarkets, Consultants, Science and Technology Organisms.

Name: Milkedin
Description: Milkedin

Name: Provilac Milk
Description:
We are a forward-thinking speciality milk company operating in the D2C vertical. Our focus lies in procuring milk directly from prominent dairy farms through exclusive tie-ups. From milking to the final delivery, Provilac takes charge of all quality checks, cold storage logistics, and delivery processes. This comprehensive approach ensures we deliver milk to our customers in its finest form. Notably, our milk is hormone- and antibiotic-free and devoid of adulteration.

In 2013, P9 Farms Pvt Ltd was established with a singular mission: to deliver nothing short of the highest quality milk to our valued customers. Specializing in fresh milk and milk product delivery, we ensure that the farm-to-doorstep process takes no more than 24 hours post-milking. While starting the business on a small scale requires minimal entry barriers, maintaining exceptional quality and delivering it in its freshest form presents challenges when scaling up. However, Provilac has assembled a team of experts specialising in various aspects of milk production, quality control, and logistics. Our core value revolves around doing the right thing.

With our headquarters in Pune, Maharashtra, Provilac operates in Mumbai and Hyderabad as well. Our primary focus is to deliver the highest quality milk in its purest form, ensuring its integrity remains intact throughout transit.

Name: Bimilk
Description:
With 70 years of experience, Bimilk- Dairy Bitola is the biggest producer of milk, dairy products and natural fruit juices in Macedonia. The company was founded in 1952 and is based in Bitola, R.Macedonia.

The long tradition together with the sophisticated technology and continuous upgrade of the production capacities enable Bimilk to meet the needs of millions of customers every day.

Investment in the technological equipment and specialized employees are the foundation on which the whole strategy of the company lays on.

Name: Qlip B.V. - Quality Assurance in Dairy
Description:
From milk to cheese, and milk powder to milk formula for infants. As a consumer, you naturally expect that these products are safe and of good quality.

Qlip plays an important role herein. We provide independent quality assurance throughout the dairy chain. We provide audits and analyses in the field of food safety, quality, composition and sustainability. And we do this for the entire dairy chain, from farm to retail.

Our auditors conduct over 13,000 audits and reviews of the functioning and fulfillment of specific quality systems annually. We also have the world's largest dairy laboratory with state-of-the-art technology. About 15 million milk samples from cows and goats are analyzed in this laboratory each year. Our qualified employees perform over half a million chemical and microbiological analyses. This results in large amounts of valuable data on a daily basis. With this information, dairy companies and dairy farmers can optimize their processes and business operations.

Our internal quality system is designed to ensure that our operations comply with recognized national and international standards, regulations and guidelines. Various accreditation norms describe how we have to deal with these critical points. The Dutch Accreditation Council, an independent body, determines annually whether our business fulfills the requirements. 

Continuous development of our knowledge and expertise is crucial. We collaborate with customers, research institutes and suppliers to develop new technologies, standards, methods and products. A striking example of successful innovation is the fresh grazed grass indicator. We have made it possible to determine in milk whether cows have been grazing grass outside in the meadow.

We share our specific knowledge and expertise with the international dairy chain through trainings and workshops. In Europe, but also in Asia.

Name: USA Cheese Guild
Description:
The USA Cheese Guild works, on behalf the U.S. Dairy Export Council (USDEC), American dairy farmers and the entire U.S. cheese community, to build global awareness of the excellent Cheeses from the USA. Through education and promotions, the Guild aims to inform customers about the craftsmanship, innovation, variety and versatility of USA Cheeses.  

Boasting over 1,000 cheese varieties, the United States is not only the world’s largest cheese producer, it is also one of the most diverse. Hundreds of years of excellence stemming from a melting pot of backgrounds and cultures makes the United States a unique and exciting supplier of delicious cheese. We invite you to discover the heritage and selection of Cheeses from the USA. #USAcheese

Name: Oberweis Dairy
Description:
At Oberweis, quality starts with simplicity—less processing means more flavor and a healthier product for your family. Our farms never use artificial hormones or preservatives, and our gentle pasteurization method preserves essential nutrients for a pure, delicious taste.
Freshness is our priority. Every day, we receive milk from local farms, then process, bottle, and deliver it straight to your doorstep or grocery aisle. This commitment has made Oberweis a trusted name in dairy since 1927.
Our dedication to great taste extends to our iconic reusable glass bottles, which keep milk colder and fresher for longer. With family farms producing the highest-quality dairy, you’ll always have the best-tasting milk on your table.

Visit our website to learn more about Oberweis' signature products:
- Traditional Milk
- Certified USDA Organic Milk
- Oberweis Drinks
- Oberweis Ice Cream
- Seasonal Eggnog
- Seasonal Ice Cream and more!

Name: Ghani Dairies Limited
Description: Ghani group project located in Nur pur thal having 500 acres.

Name: JESA FARM DAIRY
Description:
We consistently produce high quality dairy products that give consumers the wings to pursue their lives' adventures.

From its small beginnings as a local dairy producing only raw milk, JESA has become a home grown, commercial success story and a flagship East African consumer brand.

Today, the JESA brand, with its wide range of fresh, dairy products: namely fresh Pasteurised milk, UHT Milk, Yoghurt, Butter, Fresh Cream and Cream Cheese; has come to symbolise great taste, high quality, and innovation.

Name: Solve Agri Pak (Private) Limited

Solve Agri Pak offers workable and sustainable solutions designed to cater to the needs of all stakeholders of dairy, livestock and related agriculture sectors of Pakistan and beyond. We provide a range of products and services to public and private businesses looking for solutions to increase productivity, minimize costs, increase profit margins, alleviate poverty and develop infrastructure.

SOLVE being an acronym for "SOlutions for Livestock & agriculture Value added Enterprises" – a value adding partner to farmers, value chain, processors and consumers on dairy and agriculture produce providing reliable services and solutions. 

VISION:
We aspire to become a reliable service and solution provider for our partners in dairy, livestock and agriculture sector.

•	Create comforting Environment of trust - internally & externally
•	Commitment towards customers

Name: Kerry Dairy Ireland
Description:
Sustainable and Nutritious Solutions for a Better Tomorrow.

Kerry Dairy Ireland is a vertically integrated farm-to-fork business with an extensive retail presence and a leading nutritional and dairy ingredients division, delivering high-quality dairy solutions with a focus on sustainability and innovation. From partnering with local family farms to producing world-class dairy products, we ensure every step of our value chain reflects our commitment to excellence.
 
With over 50 years’ experience in milk processing, dairy and nutritional technology advancement, and product innovation, we are a key stakeholder in the global food industry and creators of a strong portfolio of market leading dairy brands. Our from food, for food culture and deep-rooted connection to our 2,800 milk suppliers differentiates our business and offers captivating opportunities for our customers and consumers. 
 
Our dairy comes from some of the world’s richest grazing land and is produced by a network of Irish family farms that have one of the lowest carbon footprints in the world. Through a combination of expertise, innovation, and sustainability, Kerry Dairy Ireland is proud to shape the future of dairy while meeting the diverse needs of our farmers, customers, and communities. 

Kerry Dairy Ireland currently employs over 1,600 people across Ireland, Northern Ireland, UK, USA, Netherlands, Spain, Germany, and China and in 2024 generated a turnover of c. €1.4billion.

Name: GPS Dairy Consulting, LLC
Description:
At GPS Dairy Consulting, LLC we believe that it is the knowledge, talent and energy of our people that define who we are. The consultants within our organization are recognized as some of the best and most experienced dairy consultants in the industry, dedicated to providing professional, experienced and educated advice to our clients. Together we provide a broad offering of services, tools and expertise to deliver success to your dairy. Our mission is to create strength, synergy, and added-value in delivering services to our dairy clients in order to help them achieve their most challenging goals.

We don’t just do nutrition. GPS Dairy Consulting, LLC goes beyond nutrition by offering tools and resources, broad, multi-disciplined experience and a collaborative philosophy across a range of consulting services that will make your business more successful.

Name: Glacier Products Limited
Description:
Crafted Happiness  Kenyan-Made Products

We started with ice cream products in 1979 and have since expanded to include chocolates, yoghurts, chocolate spreads, topping sauces, and various catering products.

At Glacier Products Ltd, innovation and quality are at the heart of everything we do. With the largest cold chain infrastructure and distribution network in the region—combined with the fun-loving spirit of our team—we create products that bring joy to our customers.

Our Dairyland brand has achieved regional success across Kenya, Uganda, Tanzania, Rwanda, and South Sudan. We are also proud to be the only dairy FMCG in Kenya awarded the Food Safety Management Systems Certification (FSSC 22000), a testament to our commitment to excellence.

Driven by our mission and vision to craft great quality products, we continue to push boundaries and elevate the Dairyland brand to even greater heights.

Name: Lăptăria cu caimac
Description:
Suntem brandul de lactate de specialitate 100% românești, naturale și integrale, adaptate cerințelor și posibilităților lumii de azi. Ne implicăm în întregul proces: cu propria noastră fermă și cu animale hrănite din culturi proprii, avem atât mijloacele, cât și dorința de a produce lactate de calitate, sigure, nutritive și fără adaosuri inutile. Gustoase precum cele de la țară sau de la piață, dar sigure cum numai o fabrică performantă poate oferi. Îngrijim cu dedicare animalele, creăm cu pasiune gusturi noi, păstrăm standardele cu rigurozitate și credem că viața e mai liniștită când alegi faptele bune și-un pahar de lapte cald.
vând și puterea, și dorința de a produce lactate de calitate, sigure, nutritive și fără adaosuri, în 2018 am pus în funcțiune o fabrică modernă, în care îmbuteliem lapte de la vacă de cea mai bună calitate în ce privește conținutul de grăsimi, proteine și lactoză. Lapte curat, cu minimum posibil de germeni și celule somatice, datorită celor mai noi tehnologii.

Fabrica noastră este construită chiar lângă fermă, astfel încât laptele ajunge imediat pe linia de producție, neatins de om sau de aer, din rațiuni de igienă. Întregul proces (muls și îmbuteliat) are loc în doar 24 de ore. Astfel, ne asigurăm că te bucuri de lapte proaspăt, natural și sigur!

Suntem o societate integrată, ceea ce ne permite să controlăm și să garantăm pentru absolut tot ce ține de lactatele noastre, începând cu cerealele, oleaginoasele și fânul cultivate pe 3500 de ha, cu care asigurăm 90% din hrana vacilor. De altfel, așa am pornit la drum în 1994, când am înființat compania 100% românească AGROSERV MĂRIUȚA. Atunci am început să ne ocupăm de cultura câmpului, urmând ca în 2005 să punem bazele uneia dintre cele mai mari ferme de vaci de lapte din România. Livrăm de peste 10 ani lapte crud, vrac, către mari procesatori din România și din Bulgaria.
Astăzi avem 2500 de vaci de rasa pura, cu pedigree, din care 1000 de vaci de muls,  creșcute în stabulatie libera.

Name: Vandersterre
Description:
Vandersterre is a Dutch family business.  With almost 500 passionate colleagues, we produce, refine and package Dutch cheese specialties. We sell these products in the Netherlands and in more than eighty other countries around the world.

Our mission:
To be a reliable and innovative cheese family that markets brands and concepts in Dutch Cheese specialties in a sustainable way all over the world.

Our vision:
Vandersterre Group wants consumers around the world to be able to enjoy the best Dutch cheese and cheese specialties. .

Name: EUROLAIT
Description: Eurolait est une société créée en 1997, qui produit et distribue les marques Yoplait et Candia en Côte d'ivoire.

Name: Jain Dairy Products Pvt Ltd
Description:
We are one of the leading manufacturers of milk products in the private sector in Gujarat. We cater to hotels, restaurants, hospitals, canteens of industrial houses, clubs, airport caterers, super malls and multiplexes in the City of Ahmedabad. We also supply to all other major cities of the State. Our promoters Ashvin Shah, Nishith Shah, Aalap Shah & Kalpesh Trivedi practice a strong customer-centric approach. Two of the promoters are highly qualified Dairy technologists and are backed by an excellent R & D capability, resulting in superior processing expertise and high levels of hygiene.

The beginnings were modest. A small retail shop, started in 1988 by a Master of Commerce degree holder and a Dairy Technologist became quickly popular with the customers. Jain Dairy is an ISO 22000:2005 certified company. From a small milk processing operation to a modern & energy efficient dairy plant manufacturing hygienic & healthy milk products; it has truly been a long journey.

Name: Lactiber León
Description: Lactiber León produces high-quality milk product since 1970 in león, Spain.

Name: Laticínios Puranata
Description:
Desde 1994 no mercado, a Puranata se orgulha de sua história. Com dedicação, perseverança e profissionalismo, a busca pelo crescimento e reconhecimento fizeram do Grupo Puranata uma empresa respeitada pela sua seriedade e tradição.
Iniciando sua história com a produção de requeijões, hoje o Grupo Puranata produz um portfólio extenso:  requeijões, doces de leite, cream cheese, queijos: gouda, gorgonzola, reino e mussarela processada. E em breve, produzirá manteiga de leite e queijo de coalho.
Localizada em Frutal, Minas Gerais, sua matéria prima é extraída de bacias leiteiras da região do Triângulo Mineiro, nacionalmente reconhecida pela excelência em sua qualidade, o que faz com que os produtos tenham um sabor apurado e inigualável.
O leite utilizado na produção é rigorosamente selecionado, manuseado e transportado com cuidado para levar aos consumidores produtos de qualidade.
Seguindo rigorosos padrões de higiene e controle, as duas unidades produtivas seguem as normas do S.I.F. (Sistema de Inspenção Federal), o que garante a qualidade final do produto e carimba o selo de confianção para os consumidores.
PURANATA, SABOR DE MINAS, BELLA ITÁLIA, BELLA PIZZA E PRAPIZZA, marcas de confiança e tradição.

Name: Crystal Creamery
Description:
Crystal brand dairy products have been a part of California for over 100 years. Throughout our history we have remained committed to providing the freshest, local dairy products.

Founded by George Knox in 1901 we were originally known as Crystal Cream & Butter. Crystal started in the back of a small grocery store located at 728 K Street in Sacramento, California. That is where George and Caroline Knox churned butter. Twenty years later in 1921, Crystal was purchased by Carl Hansen, a Danish immigrant. When Hansen purchased Crystal, the products were still limited to butter and cream but in 1931 under Hansen’s leadership Crystal offered Sacramento its first bottled milk. This was the beginning of the expansion of Crystal’s family of products to include such products as cottage cheese, sour cream, ice cream and yogurt. The Hansen family was recognized as leaders in the dairy industry, pioneering many new technologies and growing Crystal into one of the last large independent dairy processors in the state of California. The Hansens ran the company for 86 years before selling to HP Hood, LLC.

In 2007, family-operated Foster Farms Dairy purchased Crystal bringing the brand back to its family-owned roots. Foster Farms Dairy was founded in 1941 by Max and Verda Foster and is still family-owned and operated. Today the company is led by Dennis Roberts. Since becoming part of the Foster Farms Dairy family, the Crystal brand has continued its century old tradition of providing the highest quality, freshest, local dairy products. That’s why when it comes to feedng your family, the choice is clear… Crystal.

Name: Umang Dairies Ltd.
Description:
J.K. Organisation was founded over a 100 years ago and is one of the largest industrial conglomerates in India. 


Quality Control

 	 Quality milk is collected through our own extensive Village Collection System - 300 villages & 12,000 farmers. 

 	 A fully developed R&D centre constantly works for improving systems of milk collection, processing and product upgradation.
