- UMANG SKIMMED MILK POWDER 

BULK PACKS
- WHITE MAGIK
- UMANG DAIRY CREAMER (UDC) 

 	 UMANG Danedar Pure Ghee is a popular household brand.

Name: Lactalis Eswatini
Description:
Lactalis Eswatini is the local subsidiary of the world’s largest dairy company. With over 150 employees we are head quartered in Matsapha from where we have a national footprint. 

We are specialists in the manufacture of fermented dairy products like emasi and yoghurt but also produce dairy blend beverages, fresh milk and cream. We also distribute imported products including a wide assortment of cheeses including mozzarella, fresh mozzarella, brie, camembert, feta, cream cheese, and snack cheeses under the Président and Galbani brands. We are brand leaders in UHT milk under the Umcenge brand and emasi under the Emvelo and Emndeni brands. 

At Lactalis Eswatini, we not only understand the power of food to connect people, we also unite cultures and enrich daily life. We are passionate about making great dairy products, and honoured to know families everywhere have been welcoming our products into their homes for decades.

Name: Productos Lácteos Flor de Aragua C.A
Description:
Desde hace más de 60 años, trabajamos con pasión y compromiso para llevar a las mesas de los venezolanos la mejor calidad y sabor. Nuestros quesos y productos lácteos se caracterizan por su frescura y calidad, directo desde nuestras fincas, garantizando productos excepcionales con sello Flor de Aragua.

Hoy seguimos creciendo y nos sentimos orgullosos de ser parte de la tradición gastronómica de Venezuela.

Name: Leprino UK & EU
Description:
Leprino is the leading mozzarella manufacturer in Europe, providing customised cheese making solutions to customers in over 30 countries around the world.

We are wholly owned by Leprino of Denver - Colorado, meaning we are part of the largest mozzarella manufacturing business in the world, with expertise in mozzarella like no other.

Along with our UK company headquarters in Northwich, Cheshire, Leprino has two state-of-the art mozzarella manufacturing facilities: one in Llangefni, North West Wales and one in Magheralin, Northern Ireland. The locations not only provide outstanding logistical cheese manufacturing advantages but also enable us to source the highest quality milk used to make our delicious mozzarella cheese for pizza and other food products. Our state-of-the-art Portlaoise sister site offers the latest technology in producing shred, dice and string mozzarella in a variety of formats in the Republic of Ireland.

Name: Challenge Dairy Products
Description:
Challenge Dairy Products, a division of California Dairies, Inc., is a cooperative association of member-owner farmers dedicated to delivering high-quality dairy products through industry-leading farming and sustainability practices.

Our primary focus is butter, supported by a strong food service business and two heritage retail brands in our portfolio: Challenge and Danish Creamery. Proudly Californian, our butter is cultivated by the sun, and we believe that together we can spread that sunshine through every bite, every meal, and every shared moment.

Name: NCDFI
Description: National Cooperative Dairy Federation of India (NCDFI), based at Anand (Gujarat), is the apex organization for the cooperative dairy sector. It’s members include federal dairy cooperatives of states and union territories. Primary objective of NCDFI is to facilitate the working of dairy cooperatives through coordination, networking and advocacy.

Name: Quesos El Pastor
Description: Quesos El Pastor - Hijos de Salvador S.A. was founded in 1967 by the brothers Lorenzo, Salvador and Domingo. It is currently under the management of Mr. Marco Rodríguez, second generation. Years before, the grandfather D. Salvador Rodríguez had already taken some steps in the cheese world. On May 19, 1998, on the outskirts of Santa Cristina de la Polvorosa and with an investment of more than 6 million euros, a new pressed cheese factory was inaugurated to meet the demand, both technological and production, of this highly competitive and strictly regularized market. Gradually, it has become, with a production of 11 million kg of cheese per year, one of the most important cheese factories in Spain, and the first in the production of Zamorano cheese. In 2012 a new production plant was built, in this case for the production of goat and sheep cheese. It was a bet on a new product practically unknown to the national consumer. In less than two years, goat cheese log is produced in different flavors: with papaya, with pineapple, with pepper, etc. Hijos de Salvador Rodríguez, S.A. (Quesos El Pastor) is the only manufacturer in Spain that produces sheep's cheese log. For more than half a century, the same care and attention that Don Salvador used to take when he made the cheese with his own hands has been maintained. From collecting the milk from the local shepherds with a donkey and clay pots, to using refrigerated trucks, which maintain all the properties of the milk during the journey to the production plant. --- Privacy policy: https://bit.ly/46FqwV6
Location: Santa Cristina de la Polvorosa, Zamora

Name: Holstein Canada
Description:
Holstein Canada is a member owned and directed association based in Brantford, Ontario, that promotes a healthy Canadian Dairy industry for all, while delivering progressive services and programs for dairy herd management. With more than 10,000 members, Holstein Canada plays a leading role in managing dairy genetics, improving the Holstein breed through genealogical tracking and management, and serving the best interests of all dairy producers across Canada. With a staff of 90 and a budget of $12 million, Holstein Canada carries a rich tradition and a strong, engaged membership base stretching from coast to coast.

The overall mandate of the Association is to improve the Holstein breed, and we do this in many ways.  We maintain a genealogical record of the breed (the Herdbook); we have a large, national classification program that is well-regarded in countries around the world; and we work daily to promote the best interests of breeders and owners of Holstein cattle in Canada.

With dynamic leadership and a clear vision, we are eagerly embarking on an exciting, tech-friendly future.  We offer employees a strong team-oriented workplace, supportive leadership, competitive benefits and a pension plan, and the chance for you to try new things and grow along with us.

Name: Quesería La Antigua
Description:
Dedicados a la elaboración de quesos con leche cruda de oveja, fabricamos todos nuestros quesos de forma artesanal, con el mimo y cuidado de antaño.

Una estricta selección de la materia prima, la experiencia en la fabricación para aplicar los avances tecnológicos, dar tiempo al tiempo durante su maduración, y nuestro esfuerzo diario para mejorar, con un único fin, ofrecerle siempre productos de alta calidad.

Quesería La Antigua de Fuentesaúco es una empresa compuesta por un equipo joven, dinámico y emprendedor cuyo único objetivo es elaborar un queso de alta calidad .

Nuestra empresa, situada en una de las provincias con más tradición en este tipo de quesos como es Zamora, está compuesta por personal altamente cualificado y con gran experiencia en la fabricación de queso a partir de leche cruda de oveja, siendo el resultado de nuestro proceso de elaboración unos quesos con personalidad propia.

Name: Maxum Foods Pty Ltd - Your partner in dairy
Description:
Maxum Foods opened its doors in 2003 and is one of Australia and New Zealand's principal suppliers and manufacturers of dairy ingredients to the food, health and animal nutrition industries. 

We specialise in supplying medium to large-scale food manufacturers with high-quality dairy ingredients such as milk powders, cheese and butter. Our worldwide reputation is based on an unwavering commitment to dairy, a unique internal culture and exceptional customer service. We’ve achieved rapid growth, propelled by a mantra of making life easy for our partners. We’re driven to add extra value to every transaction through excellent customer service, quality assurance and technical expertise. 

Specialising in supply chain management within the dairy ingredients industry, we offer a vast product range, offering skilled technical support, up-to-date market intelligence and exceptional customer service to back this up.

Our Awards:

- Honoured as an Australian Trusted Trader in 2019
- Awarded ‘Business Services’ Growth Company of the Year in 2018
- Awarded one of Australia's Fastest Growing SME's in 2018
- Australia’s 15th Fastest Growing Business (BRW Magazine) in 2007 
- Finalist in the NAB Agribusiness of the Year Award in 2007
- Australia’s Fastest Growing Business (BRW Magazine) in 2006

Name: Nahar Agro
Description: Poultry, Dairy

Name: Leprino UK & EU
Description:
Leprino is the leading mozzarella manufacturer in Europe, providing customised cheese making solutions to customers in over 30 countries around the world.

We are wholly owned by Leprino of Denver - Colorado, meaning we are part of the largest mozzarella manufacturing business in the world, with expertise in mozzarella like no other.

We've earned a reputation for delivering innovative solutions in mozzarella cheese manufacturing for our customers, no matter who they are, where they operate or what challenges they face. That's what makes us such a successful and highly regarded mozzarella cheese producer.

Leprino is a global cheese and dairy ingredients company (Leprino.com), based in the US, Leprino exports to over 80 countries. A leader in food technology with over 50 production patents, Leprino is the exclusive supplier of mozzarella to many of the top pizza chains in the US and around the world.

Name: Iparlat, S.A.
Description:
IPARLAT, S.A. was created from the union of dairy farmer cooperatives in Spain in 1953. Nowadays the company maintains an ongoing link with the farming sector through direct sourcing from farms, thus becoming part of the entire production process from beginning to end, evidence of the company's product expertise and quality assurance. 

The company produces UHT SOYA drinks as well as UHT dairy products,  in separate IFS approved facilities. It offers a wide product portfolio in multiple formats mainly under private label: soya-based beverages (100% non-gmo), basic milk, special milk, lactose-free milk, cream, flavoured drinks. Iparlat has production plants in Urnieta (Esnelat, Gipuzkoa), Renedo (Cantabria) and León.

Name: Red Cow Dairy
Description:
Welcome to the official LinkedIn page of Red Cow Dairy!

Red Cow Dairy, the largest private sector dairy producer in Eastern India, stands on the four pillars of Skill, Service, Super Quality, and Safety. At Red Cow Dairy, we are dedicated to delivering the freshest and highest-quality dairy and food products to your table. With a legacy spanning decades, we take pride in our commitment to excellence, sustainability, and customer satisfaction. From being a leading dairy brand of the region, the company has successfully forayed into the packaged food arena, with several successful launches over the recent few months.

Our state-of-the-art facilities ensure the purity and goodness of every drop of milk and every bite of our delectable dairy and food products. From farm to fork, our journey is marked by transparency, innovation, and a deep-rooted passion for nourishing families across the nation.

3 Processing Units | 12 Districts | 40+ Milk Chilling Plants | 300+ Distributors | 1200+ Employees | 6+ Lakh Litre/Day Production.
Being a staunch follower of sustainable dairy farming and fair trade practices, when you choose any Red Cow Dairy product, you are also supporting the local dairy community of East India. Join us on this LinkedIn journey as we share insights, stories, and updates about our products, industry trends, and our relentless pursuit of perfection. Connect with us, and let’s grow together in the world of dairy and food excellence!

Specialties: Milk, Ghee, Paneer, Curd, Lassi, Flavoured Milk, Ice cream, Rasogolla, Gulabjamun, Bread, Pasta, Vermicelli, Sauces, Vinegar, Pickle, Bun, Cream bun and more.

Name: ZuivelZicht
Description:
ZuivelZicht is een onafhankelijk vak- en nieuwsblad voor de Nederlandse zuivelketen (melkveehouderij, zuivelindustrie en –handel, zuivelretail, aanverwante en toeleverende bedrijven). 

ZuivelZicht verschijnt twaalf keer per jaar en besteedt aandacht aan melkveehouderij- en zuivelzaken in de keten. Zwaartepunten daarbij zijn het EU-zuivelbeleid en de consequenties daarvan voor de zuivelketen, ontwikkelingen op de zuivelmarkt, algemene productstrategieën van binnen- en buitenlandse zuivelondernemingen, ontwikkelingen in melkproducerende landen, zuivel in het winkelschap, alsmede (zuivel)consumententrends. 

ZuivelZicht wordt geproduceerd met medewerking van onder andere de Nederlandse Zuivel Organisatie.

Meer weten over adverteren in ZuivelZicht, in het magazine of online? Stuur dan een e-mail naar Frank van Gils: f.vangils@persmanager.nl

Heb je nieuws voor de redactie? Stuur dan een e-mail naar: redactie@zuivelzicht.nl

Interesse in een abonnement? Kijk dan op zuivelzicht.nl voor de mogelijkheden.

Name: World Wide Sires, Ltd.
Description:
World Wide Sires Ltd. (WWS) was founded in 1971 by California dairyman, Bill Clark. WWS is a wholly owned subsidiary of Select Sires Inc., the largest A.I. cooperative representing over 30,000 farmer owners across six continents and over 100 countries. With our three product brands – Select Sires, Accelerated Genetics and GenerVations – WWS distributes high quality bovine genetics to Europe, Africa, Asia, Oceania, the Middle East and the Americas
We are here for you.

Name: Claldy S.A.
Description: Empresa de origenes alemanes radicada en la ciudad de Young en el Deaprtamento de Rio Negro, Uruguay

Name: Ausfine Foods International Pty Ltd
Description:
The Ausfine Advantage is 35 years experience dealing with the volatility of the global dairy and meat industries.

Established in 1988, the Ausfine Team has cemented steadfast long-term relationships with many of the worlds leading dairy and meat companies, specialising in helping formulate market strategies and the marketing of new product lines. In addition, Ausfine have developed a unique relationship with many small to medium sized customers where the owner of the business is still responsible for purchasing decisions and put their trust into the Ausfine Team to provide real-time and valuable insights into the current market dynamics.

The Ausfine team intrinsically understands the continually evolving and complex nature of the international trade of dairy and meat products. Challenges around the vagaries of weather, trade restrictions, banking and global payment issues, shipping, documentation and clearance, logistics, and payment surety, not to mention underlying market volatility, all combine to make a minefield for the unwary. Ausfine is your partner to help you navigate through these challenges.

Name: Cheese Reporter
Description:
Cheese Reporter is a weekly trade newspaper focusing on the production of cheese, butter, cultured milk and fluid milk industries. Coverage includes prices and markets, legislative and regulatory issues, import and export analysis, dairy product contests, company features, new products, and much more. Available in mailed or electronic versions, Cheese Reporter is the most timely publication available covering world issues.  

In addition, Cheese Reporter markets a variety of technical and semi-technical textbooks and videos for the dairy and cheese industries, and provides a variety of other information resources for the dairy industry.

Name: Waikato Milking Systems
Description: Waikato Milking Systems was founded in the heart of New Zealand’s dairy industry, the Waikato region, in 1967. Although the company was born in New Zealand, it has been developed for the world and its innovative products are now used in 30 countries. The company aims to grow the value of dairy, whether that be for family-based businesses or larger, intensive operations. It is always thinking ahead, developing solutions for new markets while understanding what farmers need for their individual operations. Waikato Milking Systems is committed to providing ongoing support for its dairy solutions and products with its highly skilled and passionate workforce.

Name: GRUPA POLMLEK
Description:
Grupa Polmlek – to największa w Polsce prywatna firma mleczarska ze stuprocentowym polskim kapitałem. Od ponad 30 lat z powodzeniem realizuje założoną strategię i zdobywa coraz większy udział w rynku, w dużej mierze dzięki akwizycjom. W historii firmy przeprowadzono 20+ transakcji na rynku, przejmując spółki w Polsce z Bel France, Friesland Campina, Hoogwegt, Dr. Oetker i Saudi Arabia Investment Fund.
15 zakładów produkcyjnych, liczne powierzchnie magazynowe, wykwalifikowani pracownicy, unikalne receptury, nowoczesne technologie, dobre zaplecze logistyczne, ale także hotele i pensjonaty – tak w telegraficznym skrócie można opisać Grupę Polmlek. N
Należy do dwóch właścicieli – Andrzeja Grabowskiego i Jerzego Boruckiego. Stworzyli ją od podstaw, zaczynając od niewielkiego zakładu w Gąsewie. Z żelazną konsekwencją, w dużej mierze poprzez akwizycję kolejnych zakładów produkcyjnych, zbudowali potężną firmę, jedną z największych na rynku i z powodzeniem nią zarządzają. Wciąż pełni energii planują dalszy rozwój tak, aby utrzymać się na pierwszym miejscu wśród liderów branży mleczarskiej.
W 2024 roku wraz z dostawcami, kontrahentami, pracownikami innymi gośćmi świętowali 30-lecie Grupy Polmlek. Był to przełomowy moment dla firmy – od tamtej pory z powodzeniem włączają w procesy decyzyjne swoich sukcesorów Adama Grabowskiego i Szymona Boruckiego. Synowie założycieli Grupy są zaangażowani w budowanie rodzinnej firmy od najmłodszych lat i doskonale znają branżę, rynek i technologię.

Name: Lactalis Mozambique
Description: The Lactalis Group is a family owned company driven by passion for dairy that was founded in 1933 by André Besnier in Laval, France. Groupe Lactalis is a global player in the production and distribution of foods that are essential for everyday wellness: milk, dairy products (yogurt, cream based sauces, desserts and cheese) and fruit beverages. Lactalis Mozambique SA - is a company of the Lactalis group, which in Mozambique produces and markets, under the Parmalat and Santal brands, among others, dairy products and fruit juices.

Name: Sítio Recanto do Queijo
Description:
O Sítio Recanto do Queijo é referência no mercado de queijo parmesão ralado das marcas: Relíquia da Canastra e Vale da Canastra.  
Nosso portfólio conta ainda com o queijo parmesão Relíquia Black (peça e fatiado), queijo parmesão Relíquia (peça e fatiado), queijo montanhês Relíquia (peça e fatiado) e a manteiga Relíquia, além da nossa linha Sítio Pró com o queijo tropical e a manteiga de 5kg. Todos os nossos produtos são sempre pensados para atender um alto padrão de qualidade, sabor e valor agregado que chancelam nossos produtos. 
Desde 2007 nos posicionamos entre as cinco maiores e mais reconhecidas indústrias nacionais na categoria de queijo parmesão ralado*. 
*Ranking Top Five, Revista Supermercado Moderno, anos de 2013, 2014, 2015 e 2016. Categoria Perecíveis Lácteos / Queijo Ralado.

Name: Lactalis Nestlé Produits Frais Europe
Description:
Founded in 2006, Lactalis Nestlé Produits Frais is the result of a joint venture between two leading food industry players: Lactalis (60%) and Nestlé (40%).

Lactalis Nestlé Produits Frais is engaged in developing, producing, and selling a wide range of chilled dairy products (desserts, mousses, yogurts, greek yogurts, qvark, drinks…), mainly dairy-based, in the European market.

Thus, we meet our European consumers pleasure and well-being expectations, taking into account local specificities. To do this, we develop a portfolio of strong and innovative brands, including major iconic brands such as La Laitière, Viennois, Nesquik, YAOS, as well as local or regional brands such as Rachel’s, YOCO, and LC1.

But LNPF is above all a human adventure, shared by nearly 3,000 employees spread across our 9 production sites and 13 commercial entities, who are committed to providing delicious and responsible food.

Name: Grupo Industrial Centrolac
Description:
CENTROLAC es una empresa Nicaragüense de alimentos fundada en el año 2007. Desde sus inicios se ha posicionado como una empresa sólida, símbolo de calidad, prestigio e innovación.

La constante innovación de Centrolac desde su entrada al mercado nicaragüense le ha permitido colocarse como una empresa pionera, ya que cuenta con una moderna planta procesadora de leche que, en conjunto con su envase Tetra Pak, permite conservar la leche fresca, con la calidad e inocuidad adecuada, durante seis meses sin necesidad de refrigeración.

Un equipo de control de calidad altamente calificado supervisa constantemente todo el proceso, desde la recepción de la leche hasta el proceso de empaque y distribución.

Name: Uzhavarbumi - Chennai's Award Winning Milk Service
Description:
Uzhavarbumi is Chennai’s Award Winning Dairy Company. UzhavarBumi Agro Products Pvt Ltd, founded in July 2017, is a fresh dairy products company based in Maduranthakam, Chengalpattu, India. UB's core motive is to establish direct trade between local farmers and consumers. UB provides fresh dairy products including #milk, #ghee and #honey. Today, UB is one of Tamil Nadu's leading brands, merchandising fresh dairy products.

The ‘now’ is all about refining the natural, With consumption transcending high standards and demand increasing rapidly, we are now drowning in a pool of processed and packaged foods and continuously neglecting the advent of all food sources. In this kind of a commercial trend in the food industry, our company brings to you farm fresh foods, by taking a step back to the very sources! We aim to bridge the gap between the farmers and the final consumers. 

Consumers are now more aware of the many benefits they can reap right from nature’s lap. High energy, low carbs and calories, fiber, healthy sugars and absence of animal fat are just a few on the endless list! To cater to this newly arisen demand, and to provide quality nutrition in the most natural of ways, we bring a range of products straight out of the farms themselves. We have Cow's Milk - Native Breed, Oil, Grains and a lot fresher food, to treat your taste buds and nurture your body. 

~ Direct link between small-scale farmers and consumers
~ Natural, organic products picked from farms
~ Aim to drive out commercialization of farm-fresh goods
~ Products available include: #FreshCowMilk , #NaturalHoney , #PureCowGhee
~ Eco-friendly Packaging in Glass Bottles
~ Middlemen are eliminated in order to make the process

Name: Mataura Valley Milk
Description: Mataura Valley Milk Limited was incorporated in New Zealand in February 2008 and formed to pursue the construction of ‘The World’s Best’ nutritional formula plant on the outskirts of Gore.

Name: Paayas Milk Producer Organization
Description:
In India, milk producers are struggling for their valid share in terms of milk price, stake in organisation and livelihood development. Same could be ensured by their direct participation in organised sectors.

This is possible through 'Producer Companies' which accommodate the special characteristics of Cooperative customs with a regulatory framework of Private Ltd. Company. In a Producer Company, only a producer engaged in an activity connected with or related to Produce (Milk) can participate in the ownership. The members have necessarily to be the primary producers as defined under the Companies Act, 1956. Hence, in order to retain producers' hold in the Dairy sector, there must be a strong Producer Organisation in the form of Milk Producer Company.

PAAYAS MILK PRODUCER COMPANY LIMITED was incorporated on May 19, 2012 under Part IX A of the Companies Act 1956. Since inception, the company has received overwhelming response From the milk producers who have applied for the membership of the company and resulting that the Company has successfully allotted membership to nearly 90 thousand milk producers of Rajasthan. At present, the company has its operations in eight districts in Rajasthan and daily harvests more than 5 lakh litres of fresh raw milk from its producer-members spread in nearly 3,000 villages of State.

Name: Wensleydale Creamery
Description:
The Wensleydale Creamery in Hawes is famous the world over as the home of Yorkshire Wensleydale cheese, which achieved European Protected Geographical Indication (PGI) status in December 2013. Yorkshire Wensleydale cheese is the only one actually made in Wensleydale itself - if it doesn’t say Yorkshire Wensleydale, then it’s not from Wensleydale!

The Wensleydale Creamery continues the art of traditional cheese-making which dates back nearly a thousand years, using milk from over 40 local farms to handcraft their delicious range of cheeses. 
It is the milk from these farms, together with the Creamery’s own starter cultures and the skill of its cheese-makers that give Yorkshire Wensleydale its unique, creamy, crumbly and full of flavour taste, that no other cheese-maker can match.
 
Yorkshire Wensleydale can be found in all the major UK food retailers and independent shops and delis around the country, as well as in number of countries worldwide. 2014 saw sales development into countries such as Kuwait, Singapore, Dubai and Australia, with even bigger plans for 2015.

The Wensleydale Creamery is also home to a popular visitor centre where visitors can enjoy the Wensleydale Cheese Experience.  Featuring a museum and cheese-making viewing gallery offering visitors the opportunity to learn all about Yorkshire Wensleydale cheese, they can then sample the finished results in the cheese shop & deli as well as tasty homemade dishes in the restaurant and coffee shop. There is also a well-stocked gift shop featuring souvenirs, local art, confectionery, homewares and gift ideas for all the family.

Name: Tatura Milk Industries Limited
Description: Tatura Milk Industries is a wholly owned subsidiary of Bega Cheese. Bega Cheese is a major force in the manufacture and development of value-added, high quality dairy ingredients and consumer products, servicing domestic and   international markets. Bega Cheese is a top 200 ASX listed company, with turnover in excess of $1 billion, and employs over 1700 employees across seven sites. A highly successful organisation with a strong  regional focus, Bega Cheese is proud of our heritage and success, which continues to create outstanding career opportunities.

Name: VES-Artex
Description:
VES-Artex was formed in late 2021 after the merger of VES and Artex Barn Solutions. VES-Artex is the premier global technology solutions provider for environmental systems in agricultural facilities. 
 
Based in Chippewa Falls, Wisconsin, the home of the organizations new Global Headquarter and Innovation Center, VES-Artex also leverages operations throughout the US, Canada, Latin America and the rest of the world. 
 
VES-Artex is focused on animal wellbeing as the foundation for agricultural success, while strengthening its capabilities to impact agricultural operational performance through connected technologies. This research-driven approach brings veterinarians, designers, product experts and dairies together to innovate intelligent barn systems that optimize animal well-being and drive sustainability for farms around the world.
 
For more information about VES-Artex, visit www.ves-artex.com or follow us on all major social media platforms, including Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn and Twitter.

Shop on our brand new e-commerce website: www.ecosolutions.market

Name: NATURAL DA VACA ALIMENTOS LTDA
Description:
24 ANOS DE HISTÓRIA!

Em 1998 ainda nos chamávamos Queijo da Vaca, nosso famoso queijo de coalho era fabricado de forma artesanal, com leite da própria fazenda Riacho do Mel, localizada no município de Gravatá, em Pernambuco.

Pela qualidade, a demanda aumentou e expandimos a produção, tendo que terceirizar a fabricação em outras fazendas da região e também em Minas Gerais. Iniciamos a ampliação de portfólio, incorporando queijo do reino, queijo prato, queijo mussarela, queijo ricota, queijo minas padrão, queijo ralado e manteiga.

Em 2002, passamos a ser a Natural da Vaca, iniciando dois anos depois, em agosto de 2004, a construção da fábrica dentro da propriedade da fazenda, em Gravatá, Pernambuco, onde se localiza até os dias atuais.

Name: Norrmejerier
Description: Norrmejerier Ek. Förening är norrlänningarnas mejeri och ägs av 350 lokala bönder varav 275 aktiva mjölkleverantörer i Norrbottens, Västerbottens och delar av Västernorrlands och Jämtlands län. Vi förädlar årligen drygt 200 miljoner kg mjölk vid våra mejerier i Umeå, Luleå och Burträsk till olika mejeriprodukter som mjölk, fil, grädde och ost. I vårt produktsortiment ingår varumärkena Norrmejerier, Västerbottensost, Verum, Fjällfil, Fjällyoghurt, Norrgott och Norrlogisk. Norrmejerier sysselsätter cirka 440 årsanställda och omsätter ca 2 miljarder kronor per år.

Name: Dairy Holdings
Description: Dairy Holdings is a New Zealand majority owned and operated company with 100% of its farming assets in the South Island of New Zealand.

Name: GMP Foods (Pvt Ltd)
Description:
As a pioneering food company, GMP Foods leverages over 25 years of expertise from AYP Group to craft innovative, high-quality products that delight consumers in the Dairy, Hot Beverages, and Culinary sectors. With a steadfast commitment to freshness, nutrition, and sustainability, GMP Foods distinguishes itself by offering unique products that cater to the diverse needs of households, professional chefs, and food enthusiasts alike.

For over 25 years, AYP Group has been the gold standard in the food and ingredient trading industry, delivering top-notch products and building a robust presence across Pakistan, the Middle East and East Africa. Now, we’re excited to introduce GMP Foods, the latest chapter in our journey. 

Building on this legacy, GMP Foods has recently expanded into food manufacturing by establishing state-of-the-art facilities in Pakistan. We specialize in creating premium products across three core categories: Dairy, Hot Beverages, and Culinary, all designed to meet the needs of both consumers and businesses in Pakistan and the Middle East.

At GMP Foods, we take pride in crafting exceptional products that set us apart. Our passion for quality and innovation shines through every offering. 

Our Dairy range is crafted with the finest local and international ingredients to ensure purity and taste. 

Our Hot Beverages selection offers a variety of blends that are meticulously sourced and designed to suit diverse preferences. 

Our Culinary range brings innovation to the kitchen with products that cater to professional chefs and home cooks, enhancing flavours and elevating every dish. GMP Foods builds on a legacy of excellence with a mission to provide pure delight and enhance lives.

We are passionate about crafting high-quality products that nourish, inspire, and elevate every meal, through:

Sourcing: The finest raw materials

Innovation: Advanced packaging techniques

Quality: Preserving freshness, nutrition, and taste

Name: Zanetti S.p.A
Description:
Zanetti è una storia di famiglia che arriva ai giorni nostri attraverso cinque generazioni, come emblema di un’eccellenza che rispetta la tradizione. L’Azienda si è impegnata per tener fede all’approccio del fondatore, Guido Zanetti, con un’etica imprenditoriale fortemente radicata nel territorio, attenta al benessere delle comunità locali e all’impatto ambientale.

Saper fare i formaggi genuini di una volta su scala industriale è una sfida vinta ogni giorno grazie all'investimento nel territorio, nei fornitori locali di latte 100% italiano, nelle infrastrutture e nelle tecnologie, nel rispetto della tradizione e delle norme di sicurezza, nel controllo di tutte le fasi di produzione.

Name: Bongards Premium Cheese
Description:
In 1908, a group of enterprising farmers in Bongards, Minnesota formed the Bongards cooperative. Their goal was to craft the premium dairy products that the market demanded, and to offer the superior quality that area families deserved. 

Since then, we’ve built our heritage on always doing things the right way – the customer’s way.  At Bongards, we’re ready to be your trusted cheese supplier. More importantly, we’re determined to be your partner. As a farmer-owned coop with over a century of cheese-making expertise, we can meet all your cheese category needs with an assured supply chain, a broad selection, and the know-how to create products to your exact specifications. 

As a global cheese supplier to companies large and small, Bongards produces millions of pounds of natural cheese, process cheese, imitation cheese, and whey each year. We have robust capabilities to support customers as they innovate and grow.

Bongards brings you the experience to deliver consistent, high-quality cheese in the quantities your business demands.
•	Bongards Natural, Process, and Imitation cheeses are made from our own milk 
•	Our family-owned farms ensure consistent supply
•	A vertically integrated supply chain assures quality from raw ingredients to customer delivery

Bongards is headquartered in Chanhassen, Minnesota and has 3 production facilities located in Bongards, Minnesota, Perham, Minnesota, and Humboldt, Tennessee.

Visit our website at www.bongards.com for more information!

Name: Tarım Kredi Süt AŞ
Description:
Tarım Kredi Süt, dört tarafı ovalarla çevrili, çiftliklere ve köylüsüne yakın, Denizli’nin Acıpayam Mevkiinde kuruldu. Kurulma önceliği bölgedeki ekonomiyi canlı tutmak olsa da çok kısa bir sürede bir Türkiye markası oldu. Aynes markasını bünyesinde bulunduran Tarım Kredi Süt, birçok market markasına özel üretimler yapmaktadır. 25.000 üretici çiftçiden çiğ sütü toplayarak sütün en saf ve en iyi halini ileri teknoloji ile birleştirip sağlıklı ürünlerle tüketicisine ulaştıran, süt üretiminde geleneğe bağlı ancak yeniliklere açık, köklerine saygılı, üretimde teknolojik ancak ürünlerinde insan odaklı olarak çalışmalarını sürdürmektedir.
Denizli Acıpayam fabrikasının yanısıra 2023 yılında Eskişehir Beylikova , Erzincan ve Sivas üretim tesislerinin de Tarım Kredi Süt bünyesine eklenmesi ile toplam süt işleme kapasitesi 1.300 ton/gün‘e yükselmiştir. 224.000 m2 alanda 1.000 çalışanı ile hizmet veren Tarım Kredi Süt,  800 ton/gün yem üretim kapasitesine de sahiptir.
“Anadolu Tadıyla “ üretilen peynirleri, süt ürünlerini, yoğurdunu dünya sofralarında tanıtmaya devam eden Tarım Kredi Süt, küresel güç olma yolunda emin adımlarla ilerlerken  üretimi, ihracatı ve istihdamıyla ülkemize  katma değer sağlamak için çalışmaktadır.

Name: Ujalaa Milk Producer Organization
Description:
Ujalaa Milk Producer Company Ltd. is a producer owned enterprise registered on October 01, 2020 under chapter XXI-A of Companies Act, 2013. Ujalaa runs on the basis of Mutual Assistance Principles i.e. voluntary membership, voting rights independent of shareholding, an elected board, limited dividend, education of members and co-operation with other organizations. 
 
The core objectives of the Company are as under: 
 
1. To carry on the business of pooling, purchasing, processing of milk supplied by the members, marketing of the same and to deal in allied activities. 
2. To provide or arrange to provide technical and managerial services in the areas of breeding, feed/ fodder, veterinary services to increase milk production for the benefit of the members. 
3. To provide education, training and other activities to promote mutual assistance amongst the members. 
4. To arrange to procure quality milk from members that meet the standards laid down by the organization and statutory authorities.

Name: United National Dairy Company (Rayan l ريان)
Description:
UND (United National Dairy Company) was established in 2003 upon the merger of Al Matrood Dairy Company, a pioneering dairy farm in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia and Al reef Dairy Farm.

Today UND company employs over 550 Saudi Nationals and non-national personnel. Company’s farm, processing plants and main administrative head quarter are located at Al Ahsa in the Eastern province of the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia.

The sprawling farm consists of a herd of 12,000 plus cows and heifers of Holstein Friesian breed. The farm produces superior quality milk in excess of 130,000 lits daily on an average. Cows are milked through state-of-art milking facilities. The fresh raw-milk is then processed and converted into a range of dairy products under very stringent quality controls. The finished products are marketed under the popular brand names of “Rayan” and “Kool”. The products are distributed through a retail network of around 7,200 grocery outlets served on daily basis in the Eastern Province, Riyadh as well as neighboring Kingdom of Bahrain.

Name: Sumul Dairy (Surat Tapi District Cooperative Milk Producers' Union Ltd.)
Description:
Sumul or Surat Milk Union Limited, which is now renamed as The Surat District Co-operative Milk Producers' Union Ltd, is one among the 17 district unions which acts as manufacturing units of dairy products for Gujarat Co-operative Milk Marketing Federation Limited, the marketers of Amul brand of products.

Surat District has been a Pioneer in India in channeling trade in Cotton and Milk through co-operatives. Before SUMUL stepped in, traditional Private Milk Traders were dominant in the area.

The private trade was monopolizing the Milk market and exploiting both the Milk Producers and Consumers alike. The milk procurement price which used to be fixed by the traders (traditional Bhatias) was very low and was fluctuating from time to time at their sole discretion. These has capitalized on the absence of any infrastructure and processing facilities and has managed to keep producers from deriving equitable benefits from the marketable surplus generated. As such their income from milk was very low and they had no incentive for modern dairy farming. The farmers resented the system, but were helpless in the face of these traditional constraints and to their own lack of resourcelessness.

Dairying on the other hand, was never popular with tribal's (a major rural population in the District) as practically no infrastructure existed for milk marketing in their talukas, inaccessibility to their villages as well as taboos regarding keeping of buffaloes prevented the entire population of tribal's from considering dairying as a source of income. The tribal's kept their cows to produce bullocks rather than milk, which was insufficient even to nurse the calves. Most of the tribal's were unaware of the usual milch breeds, what to say of Scientific Animal Husbandry?

Hygienic and pure milk was almost unknown in the market. In fact unbridled adulteration of milk was practiced by these traders to meet the growing demand of milk in the city.

Name: Alpha Milkfoods Private Limited
Description:
Alpha Milkfoods Private Limited is a leading manufacturer and exporter of Dairy products in India. It is managed by a 40-year-old business group having diversified business interests.

The plant is strategically located in Hathras (Uttar Pradesh) in the milk rich belt of Northern India. 

Our current milk processing capacity is 600,000 litres per day with a robust procurement network, having 4 milk chilling centres and Milk Analysers in approx. 500 villages, to collect milk directly from the farmers (Village Level Collection System)

Our integrated business model connects all aspects of the value chain of the dairy industry which includes Cattle Feed Supply, procurement of raw milk from villages (Village Level Collection) and the Production, Supply and Sale of milk and milk-based products. We manage and run completely independent lines of Cow milk and Buffalo milk with end to end traceability

We believe that our integrated business model enables us to leverage the dairy industry value chain, ensures efficiency in costs and operating margins and has more control over the production process resulting in quality products.

We use the latest technology like Multi Stage Drying (3 stage), Continuous Butter Making Machine (CBM), Auto Butter transfers, Auto-Desludger Seperator (20KL), Hassia FFS Machine, Blast Cold Rooms etc., for achieving  finest quality and maximum productivity.

Our facility is certified by BRC, Sedex, FSSC 22000.

The Company serves Institutional & Retail customers largely. Our brands are Farmer Fresh & Fontana

Our mission ‘PROCURE THE BEST, PRODUCE THE BEST, PROVIDE THE BEST’

Name: 4 Madonne Caseificio dell'Emilia Soc. Coop. Agr.
Description:
Fondata nel 1967 da un piccolo gruppo di allevatori di Modena, la Società Cooperativa Agricola 4 Madonne Caseificio dell'Emilia prende il nome da un pilastro votivo dedicato alla Beata Vergine Maria e situato vicino alla sua sede di Lesignana di Modena. Ad oggi, la Cooperativa conta 70 soci/allevatori che operano all'interno della zona DOP del Parmigiano Reggiano, corrispondente alle province di Parma, Reggio Emilia, Modena, Bologna (a sinistra del fiume Reno) e Mantova (a destra del fiume Po). 
Dal nostro latte, produciamo ogni giorno il nostro Parmigiano Reggiano DOP a marchio "4 Madonne Caseificio dell'Emilia" e lo stagioniamo nei classici 12/18/24/30/36 mesi, fino a oltre 40/50/60/70/80 e persino 100 mesi.  Ricaviamo il latte da razze bovine differenti (Vacca Frisona, Vacca Rossa Reggiana e Vacca Bruna), ognuna delle quali ci consente di ottenere una specifica biodiversità di Parmigiano Reggiano. Produciamo inoltre Parmigiano Reggiano DOP Biologico e Parmigiano Reggiano DOP "Prodotto di Montagna". Con circa 240 mila forme di Parmigiano Reggiano prodotte ogni anno, all'interno dei nostri 7 stabilimenti di produzione, situati in provincia di Modena, Reggio Emilia e Bologna, il 4 Madonne Caseificio dell'Emilia è una Cooperativa in continua crescita, che riesce a mantiene intatto il suo profondo rapporto con il territorio e la tradizione. 
Vendiamo direttamente tramite i nostri 10 punti vendita distribuiti tra le province di Modena, Reggio Emilia e Bologna e il nostro shop online, che ci consente di raggiungere i nostri clienti in tutta Italia e in diversi paesi dell'Europa.
All'interno della nostra sede di Lesignana di Modena, abbiamo creato un ufficio turismo per accogliere i numerosi visitatori che, ogni anno, partecipano ai nostri tour guidati per vedere come facciamo il Parmigiano Reggiano, ed assaggiarlo in loco. Nel 2022 si sono registrati circa 20 mila visitatori.

Australian Dairy Nutritionals
Description: Australian Dairy Nutritionals (AHF) is a vertically integrated producer of premium quality dairy products. With a recent expansion into a new purpose-built infant formula facility, we will soon manufacture organic A2 infant formula on site, from 'paddock to tin', due for release late 2022.  Australian Dairy Nutritionals is a trusted source of premium quality dairy products using fresh milk sourced direct from its farms.

The company is looking for young, smart & energetic, high caliber candidates for its new Milk business.

Name: The Spotted Cow Fromagerie
Description:
Founded by Prateeksh Mehra and Agnay Mehra, The Spotted Cow Fromagerie is a small cheese manufacturing creamery,  based in Mumbai. We make handmade artisanal and European cheeses which are 100% vegetarian and preservative free.
Our cheeses are made in small batches and aged with utmost care. We believe in the concept of pure food which is not mass produced.
Thus... Made Not Manufactured!

Name: Bluegrass Dairy and Food
Description:
Bluegrass Dairy and Food is an internationally-recognized provider of specialty dairy ingredients and powders. Catering exclusively to large-scale food manufacturers, Bluegrass is a one-stop shop for any companies seeking top-notch dehydrated dairy products such as milk, cream, butter, cheese, and more. 

Established in 1995 by founders Billy Joe and Debbie Williams, Bluegrass Dairy and Food has the positivity and friendliness of a family business. After showing considerable success in its early years, the company was acquired by the capital investment firm Dubilier. Since then, it has grown in name and size; Bluegrass now has two main branches and conducts business with both domestic and internationally-based clients. That said, despite its growth into a large-scale enterprise, Bluegrass still holds its early values as a family-run business, priding itself both on its stellar customer service and positive company culture. We understand that without the care and effort of our employees, we would be unable to provide the top-caliber customer service and quality products that our customers expect. Thus, Bluegrass makes it a point to celebrate company-wide wins, and to thank our employees for their dedication via company-wide events and trips. 

At Bluegrass Dairy and Food, we go above and beyond to meet our customers’ diverse needs. Our standard offerings provide options for every flavor and texture need, and we have the means to further customize our base products and exactly match or exceed a competitor’s flavors. We consider taste innovation and development to be a necessary part of our process. As such, we always put in the time to work directly with the customer until they are pleased with the product we deliver. Our advanced drying technology assists us in achieving this goal; our pilot dryer allows us to offer small product batches for the client to evaluate during the creation stage, without the added hassle or expense of a full-fledged product run. We also currently offer box, tower, roller and rotary drying, as well as extensive dry or liquid blending capabilities.

While Bluegrass Dairy and Food does not offer its products for retail sale, its cheesemakers have been recognized for the high quality of their full-moisture products on numerous occasions by judges at regional, national, and international fairs. While specialize in making Cheddar, Parmesan, and Romano cheeses,  we don't limit ourselves to a few variations; if our clients need blue, Swiss, Asiago, or any other variation of cheese, we can fill their order and exceed expectations. Bluegrass Dairy and Food offers a large selection of dairy products in addition to its cheeses, including but not limited to: cream powders, butter powders, creamers and shortening powders, and specialty powders. 

Please visit BluegrassDairy.com for more information about our product offerings, capabilities, and accomplishments.

Name: Gippsland Jersey
Description:
Gippsland Jersey, co-founded by Sallie Jones and Steve Ronalds in 2016, is a boutique dairy processor that began on-farm manufacturing operations in March 2020 with four staff members. Located near Lakes Entrance, the company now employs 12 people and processes 50,000 liters of milk weekly. Their range includes full cream, unhomogenised, light milk, buttermilk, cream, sour cream, ghee and cultured butter.

The company champions local provenance, sustainability, and ethical operations, sourcing from four family farms and providing fair prices for their premium Jersey milk. Gippsland Jersey's ethos revolves around three pillars: fair farmer pricing, rural suicide prevention, and kindness, emphasising animal welfare and sustainable practices.

By paying consistent milk prices and focusing on local manufacturing, they support regional economies and contribute to the mental health of the farming community. Committed to innovation and market expansion, Gippsland Jersey continuously develops new products and engages more dairy farmers.

Name: Golden Calf Company
Description:
Golden Calf Company main focus is on neonatal calf feeding. We provide the tools and the protocol to feed calves colostrum quickly, safely and timely, so that calf scours can be prevented. http://www.GoldenCalfCompany.com

Golden Calf Company's mission is to provide dairymen and dairywomen with innovative products related to pre and post-calving. A Wisconsin local, Andrew Beckel has established its North American headquarters in the heart of America's Dairyland- Bloomer, Wisconsin.  Knowing first hand the challenges each day that dairy producers face, Golden Calf Company is committed to providing beneficial products to meet those challenges.


Colostrum Management System will provide you with a platform that addresses all aspects of colostrum from milking to calf feeding. 
- Collect harvested colostrum in the provided Filling Station
- Measure colostrum quality with our Colostrometer or Refractometer
- Pasteurize colostrum at the right temperature and inside the bag you’ll be feeding out of.
- Store colostrum in the Colostrum Bank designed just for colostrum storage.
- Thaw and re-heat the colostrum in 15 minutes to feed the calf quickly and at the right temperature
- Feed directly out of the cartridge.

Name: The Udder Way
Description:
Designed and manufactured in Tasmania, The Udder Way is a milk delivery system for hospitality, health, aged care to help remove 100 million milk bottles from Australia every year. 

We partner with quality dairies to replace their existing 9 x 2litre bottle crates with single 18 litre kegs. Every single keg saves over 5000 plastic bottles! 

Coming to a dairy near you! Save space, save time, save the planet!

Name: CRIEL Occitanie
Description:
Le CRIEL Occitanie est l’interprofession laitière régionale d'Occitanie, pour la filière lait de vache. Elle regroupe 3 collèges : les producteurs de lait, les coopératives laitières et les industriels privés. 

L'interprofession est un lieu de concertation et de propositions pour la filière laitière d'Occitanie et déploie les actions du CNIEL en région.
Sa mission : renforcer les relations entre acteurs de la filière, défendre leurs intérêts, promouvoir l'image du lait et améliorer la qualité des produits.

Le CRIEL Occitanie articule ses actions autour des 4 axes de performance de « France Terre de Lait », démarche filière de responsabilité sociétale portée par le CNIEL, et des grands enjeux suivants :
•	performance économique et sociale des membres de la filière laitière,
•	attractivité de la filière, renouvellement des générations et développement de l’emploi, gage d’une dynamique territoriale forte,
•	enjeux sociétaux tels que le bien-être du troupeau laitier, la réduction des GES, l’adaptation au changement climatique,
•	maintien d'un niveau d’excellence en termes de qualité du lait en travaillant sur la sécurité sanitaire,
•	promotion et développement de la consommation de produits laitiers.

Name: Tulip International Trading
Description: Tulip International Trading, a family-owned business since 1950, is headquartered in Amman, Jordan. With over seven decades of experience, we have established ourselves as a trusted leader in providing high-quality products and solutions for the dairy farming, food ingredients, and pharmaceutical sectors across Jordan and the Middle East. Guided by our core values of integrity, sustainability, and customer focus - we are dedicated to delivering innovative solutions that meet the unique needs of our clients.

Name: Traders Point Creamery
Description:
Traders Point Creamery is dedicated to producing the most healthful, organic and 100% grassfed dairy products possible. (* Yes, those are our real cows.)

As the first USDA-certified organic dairy farm in Indiana, we believe in “nourishing the land that nourishes us all.” We are committed to to working with our family of farmers and distributors to bring health conscious consumers the highest quality dairy. Since 2003, we have blended tradition and innovation to craft the purest and most wholesome products by working in harmony with nature’s design. Today customers can find our products nationwide, in small co-ops to large retail chains, but we still uphold the values the company was founded on. 

At Traders Point Creamery, we take pride in our differentiations.

- Organic Certification
No synthetic fertilizers, pesticides, antibiotics, or hormones.
We are honored to have been the first USDA certified organic dairy farm in Indiana

- 100% Grassfed Methods
Our herd is raised entirely on pastures, using a rotational grazing system that maximizes soil and grass health, resulting in milk that is exceptionally high in omega-3s, CLAs, and key vitamins. Our animals never receive grain or corn.

- Non-homogenized, Dairy Products
Because many of the nutrients in grassfed milk are most beneficial to our bodies when consumed with naturally-occurring fats, we produce non-homogenized dairy products. We do pasteurize our products according to Indiana state law, but we do not compromise the integrity of the natural fat particles by homogenization.

- Glass-packaging
All our products are packaged in glass, the material deemed safest for storing food products and one of the most efficiently recyclable materials available.

Name: Fonterra Manufacturing BV
Description:
In onze innovatieve ingredientenfabriek in Heerenveen verwerken we met 75 enthousiaste collega's de kaaswei van Royal A-ware. 
Met vakmanschap maken we hoogwaardige poedervormige ingredienten, die hun afzel vinden in levensmiddelen, sportvoeding, babyvoeding en medische toepassingen.
Kwaliteit staat bij ons hoog in het vaandel en is "trust in source".
Fonterra is een Nieuw Zeelandse zuivelcooperatie met hoofdkantoor in Auckland.

Name: Farmfam
Description: Our mission at FarmFam is to deliver farm-fresh milk and organic products to people across the country. We work with local farmers who use sustainable farming practices to produce high-quality milk and other organic products. By supporting these farmers, we not only provide our customers with fresh and healthy food, but we also help to promote sustainable agriculture practices. At FarmFam, we are more than just a company that delivers fresh milk and organic products. We are a community of people who believe in the power of food to transform lives. We want to help build a healthier and more sustainable future for our nation, one glass of milk at a time. So why not join us on this journey towards a better tomorrow? Try FarmFam’s farm-fresh milk and taste the difference for yourself!

Name: ROKK Processing
Description:
Established in 2007, ROKK is widely acknowledged as one of the ice cream industry’s foremost machinery brands.
From the expertly sourced, premier and well-recognised components right through to the rigid stainless steel chassis, ROKK captures and embodies solidity, reliability, and quality in every single machine it constructs. As a result, our machines' ice cream and food production seems effortless while yet still producing a superior and highly desirable end product each and every time.
Having sold machinery in every corner of the globe including the UK, Holland, Australia and Mexico, ROKK has established itself as one of the most popular and aspirational brands in the ice cream machinery industry. Indeed, there are now more ROKK rotary filling machines operating in the UK than any other current manufacturer.
All ROKK machines come with a one-year warranty and the business has experienced service engineers, fully trained in both electrics and refrigeration, on the road and on call 24 hours a day should they be required.

Name: Farmi Piimatööstus AS (Farmi Dairy Ltd)
Description:
FARMI Piimatööstus is the dairy industry company

Farmi Piimatööstus is an affiliated enterprise of AS Maag Group. Farmi Piimatööstus bases on the oldest dairy company in Estonia.  
Its origins can be traced back one and a half centuries to 1850 when the dairy of Kunda Manor was started (later Linnuse factory - now closed). AS Maag Piimatööstus (under this name) was established in 2003 and 2015 was company renamed as Farmi Piimatööstus.

Farmi Piimatööstus has the widest product assortment among Estonian dairy industries 
- Each month we produce ca 3500 tons of goods;
- Ca 20 different product segments;
- Ca 250 different products in assortment; 
- The products are packed into plastic-flow packs, bottles and cups. 

The biggest employer among food processing companies in Ida-Viru County. Today the company employs in Jõhvi and Annikvere plants ca 200 people (April 2017).

Farmi Piimatööstus has the ISO 22000:2005, FSSC 22000 and BRC quality certificates. 
We use as the raw material only local high-quality milk. Farmi Piimatööstus is the leader on the Estonian yoghurt and fresh cheese market 
and a biggest exporter of glazed curd snack.
On many occasions products made Farmi Piimatööstus have been awarded several times with the title of Best Estonian Dairy Product and are the local mark of quality (contains the image of a swallow). 

Main trademarks of Farmi Piimatööstus are Farmi and Jänks.
Farmi is use on our milk products.  Jänks series aimed primarily to children. Most of our products does not contain synthetic colours and preservatives.

Name: Muktaa Mahila Milk Producer Organization
Description:
Muktaa Milk Producer Company Ltd. is a producer owned enterprise registered on August 1, 2017 under chapter XXI-A of Companies Act, 2013. Muktaa runs on the basis of Mutual Assistance Principles i.e voluntary membership, voting rights independent of shareholding, an elected board, limited dividend, education of members and co-operation with other organisations. 

The core objectives of the Company are as under: 

1. To carry on the business of pooling, purchasing, processing of milk supplied by the members, marketing of the same and to deal in allied activities. 
2. To provide or arrange to provide technical and managerial services in the areas of breeding, feed/ fodder, veterinary services to increase milk production for the benefit of the members. 
3. To provide education, training and other activities to promote mutual assistance amongst the members. 
4. To arrange to procure quality milk from members that meet the standards laid down by the organization and statutory authorities

Name: Calin | کالین
Description:
Dorin Poudr Co. under the Calin brand name, founded in 2001, is a second-generation dairy company with the purpose of manufacturing dairy products and also helps the industry grow with our technical knowledge and experience in our beloved country. Our company started as one of the first in-states to produce organic butter. Afterward, we continued with starting to produce and package pasteurized margarine. To broaden our product-line as the next step, we started producing various kinds of cream, cheese, yogurt, yogurt milk and, different flavors of butter. As of now, after covering all the dairy products for both consumers and restaurants, we commenced the production line of in-take and industrial powders.
Calin Dairy Co., with its goal to grow the health and safety of the communities with relying on cutting-edge technology and modern and automatic product line in producing dairy, has achieved the Highest Quality certification. Developing manufacture and supply line with WHO standards, through increasing both quality and variety of products with the eye of the completely hygienic production line has been made sure to satisfy the consumers and also the health and safety standards has always been and will be the main priority of the company. Hence the plans and goals of Dorin Powder Company are to cover all the dairy product lines and broaden the in-state dairy industry by utilizing innovative industrial findings.

Name: FLORALP S.A.
