Name: Valcolatte S.p.a.
Description:
La famiglia Panizzi produce formaggi dal 1914, anno in cui i fondatori Enzo e Cesira avviarono il primo Caseificio. 

La tradizione casearia è proseguita nel tempo, fino al 1988, quando Enzo e Liliana Panizzi, gli attuali titolari, hanno rilanciato l'attività di famiglia fondando la Valcolatte che conosciamo oggi. 

Situata a Valconasso di Pontenure, a circa 10 Km da Piacenza, la nostra azienda sorge su una superficie di 112.000 mq, dove si trovano la struttura produttiva, i magazzini di stoccaggio e conservazione, il laboratorio di R&D, l'area commerciale e quella amministrativa.

Il gruppo è costituito da 4 realtà d’eccezione nel mondo lattiero caseario, dislocate in Europa e in grado di competere sui mercarti internazionali: Caseificio Valcolatte, Ovàrtej, Valcoiberia e Valcoiliria.

Con un team di oltre 300 persone, trasformiamo ogni giorno più di 600.000 litri di latte attraverso l'impiego di tecnologie all’avanguardia.

Grazie al nostro laboratorio di analisi interno, possiamo garantire un costante e meticoloso controllo chimico e microbiologico dei prodotti e delle materie prime.

Questa attenta gestione ci ha permesso di ottenere due delle maggiori certificazioni internazionali importantissime in campo alimentare: la BRC e la IFS, che rappresentano il sigillo di qualità della nostra azienda. Inoltre, abbiamo portato a termine con successo l’acquisizione delle seguenti certificazioni: ICEA, V-LABEL, HALAL, KOSHER E CERTIQUALITY che ci consentono di differenziare ulteriormente il nostro business.

Name: Open Country Dairy Ltd
Description:
Open Country is New Zealand's largest independent dairy manufacturer and the second largest dairy exporter of whole milk powder in the world. We export our premium dairy products made from high-quality New Zealand milk to over 50 markets throughout the world.

At Open Country, you can count on us to deliver, to adapt and to put you first. Inspired by the entrepreneurial spirit of our founders and our family-based values, our people are focused on building partnerships that you can count on to add value to your business.

Trusted Partnerships

Sharing a passion for dairy, we work closely with our farmer suppliers to create a quality supply of milk.

We partner to offer suppliers and customers more agile relationships, with increased product value, to create a smarter and more efficient dairy production and supply chain all the way to our customers.

Our customers value the high quality and reliability of our dairy ingredients, and the expertise of our team to ensure all customer and country regulations are met and the products delivered safely and timely.

Sustainable Future

We are committed to operating sustainably from an environmental, social and economic standpoint, and to assisting our farmer suppliers in meeting their environmental obligations. New Zealand is the perfect environment to produce high-quality, safe products for everyone to enjoy and our team operates with a sustainable future for food supply in mind.

Products

-	Milk powders are our specialty. We produce a wide range of premium milk powders and proteins, from high-quality New Zealand milk.
-	Cheese: In our state-of-the-art cheese plant, we manufacture a range of table and processing cheeses including mozzarella and cheddar varieties.
-	Organic: Open Country’s certified organic milk powders are a range of powders with superior functionality and a luxuriously creamy taste.
-	Our milk fats are high quality pure butter fats produced from top quality cream.

Name: Nishat Sutas Dairy Limited
Description:
At Nishat-Sütas Dairy Limited, we are dedicated to crafting dairy excellence.  
With a heritage spanning decades, we've honed the art of transforming nature's purest ingredients into a delectable range of dairy products including MilkFields Full Cream UHT Milk, MilkFields Flavored Milk, and MilkFields Dairy Cream.

From the freshest milk to the richest cream, our commitment to quality and innovation sets us apart in the industry.  

Our mission is clear: to provide our customers with the best quality dairy products directly from our farm to their table.

We're proud to be a part of daily moments of joy; whether it's a nutritious breakfast, a cup of tea in the afternoon, or a mid-day lunchbox snack at school.

Let's explore the endless possibilities of dairy together!

Name: Sapphire Dairies Limited
Description:
Rivayat Farms (Sapphire Dairies) was established in 2008, with an understanding that corporate farms can provide better dairy economics and hygiene for the people of Pakistan and for its investors. Today we are supplying raw milk to the corporate societies in Pakistan while establishing a wider retail network. Our current statistics at the farm is:

Current herd size is 4000 cows consisting of  Holsteins from Australia
Current milk production is 40 tons per day with 2500 milking animals.
TPC count averages fewer than 20K.
A Calf mortality since start of the project has been less than 2%.
Mastitis percentage in milking herd is less than 1%.

in 2018, the establishment of our dairy processing facility has started based on the international standards of hygienic design and premium quality. Our brand and product will be launched to the market in Q4, 2019; offering premium quality dairy products, straight from the farm!

Name: Maranguape Laticínios
Description:
A Cooperativa Agrícola Mista de Maranguape foi fundada em 28/06/1959 e surgiu da união dos esforços de 120 (cento e vinte) pessoas da sociedade maranguapense com o objetivo de proporcionar ao produtor rural do município de Maranguape uma melhor estrutura econômica e social.
A empresa iniciou suas atividades com uma usina de beneficiamento de algodão, além de uma cooperativa avícola e de crédito, na época situada no bairro Parque Iracema em Maranguape. Em julho de 1964, já no atual endereço, era inaugurada a usina de pasteurização de leite (pioneira do estado do Ceará e a primeira do conjunto de estados que vai da Paraíba ao Amazonas) e fabricação de manteiga.
Salustiano Rodrigues Pinto, o primeiro presidente eleito, permaneceu à frente da Cooperativa até 11/05/1960, época em que renunciou ao cargo. Em seguida, assumiu José do Nascimento, que presidiu os rumos da Cooperativa até 15/03/1962. O terceiro presidente eleito, Antônio Botelho Câmara, permaneceu no cargo até 08/01/1971. Em meados de 1968, diante da crise econômica que se abatera sobre a Cooperativa, iniciou um período de intervenção, que durou até março de 1972. Em janeiro de 1971 foi nomeado como interventor Wilson Bastos Rodrigues, que após o período de intervenção, e consequente recuperação econômica da Cooperativa, foi eleito como presidente. Sua gestão se manteve até 25/09/2001, data de seu falecimento. Após esse fato, foi eleito pelos cooperados para o cargo o Sr. Wilson Rodrigues Filho, presidente do Conselho de Administração até os dias atuais, que também é composto por Abraham Lincoln Ferreira de Sousa, vice-presidente, e José Rômulo Cavalcanti Prata, secretário.

Name: Prompt DairyTech
Description:
India is witnessing a dairy tech revolution that aims to make Indian milk amongst the best in the world in terms of quality. And Prompt, a fully indigenous brand, is leading this revolution by offering cutting-edge, conventional hardware and software solutions.

In 1995, Prompt marked the beginning of its journey in the dairy tech sector by giving India the ‘Automatic Milk Collection System’, which helped the dairies in India to digitalise and streamline their supply chain. Since then, we have come a long way. Today, from farm management and milk collection to quality analysis and preservation, Prompt offers innovative equipment and software solutions to ensure that the purity of milk is retained at every step. Most of our products and solutions are Cloud, IoT and BI-enabled which facilitates transparency as well as traceability throughout the supply chain at all levels on a real-time basis.

With our presence across 28 states, 350+ districts, 65,000+ villages and a team of over 900+ employees, we have embarked on a relentless pursuit to ensure the best quality of milk reaches the people of India. And we call it, the pursuit of purity.

Name: Fattorie Garofalo
Yakult Europe B.V.
Description: Yakult Europe B.V., located in Almere, is the European headquarters of the Yakult Group in Europe. Yakult Europe B.V. is a subsidiary of the Japanese multinational Yakult Honsha Co. Ltd., located in Tokyo Japan. The Japanese scientist Dr. Shirota, the founder of Yakult, produced the first bottle Yakult, a fermented milk drink with L. casei Shirota bacteria in 1935. Yakult is worldwide known as a science-based company, specialized in probiotics and other functional food products. Yakult is currently sold in 40 countries and produced in 39 factories worldwide. Since 1994, Yakult has been produced in Almere for the Netherlands and 12 other European countries.

Name: U.S. Dairy Export Council
Description: The U.S. Dairy Export Council represents dairy farmers, processors, cooperatives, ingredient suppliers and export traders. Our mission is to enhance U.S. competitiveness in global dairy markets.

Name: Lyncott
Description:
La historia de Lyncott comenzó a escribirse hace 80 años, con el sueño de convertirse en una de las mejores marcas de lácteos en México. 

Hoy Lyncott tiene un lugar especial en millones de hogares en todo el territorio nacional, nuestros productos forman parte del día a día de las familias mexicanas.

Somos una empresa impulsada por un equipo talentoso y comprometido; orgullosos del fruto de nuestro trabajo. Reconocemos, valoramos y capitalizamos las mejores prácticas con el único objetivo de que cada uno de nuestros productos sea digno de nuestra propia mesa.

Festejamos ocho décadas de cumplir un sueño, con la total certeza del gran futuro que nos aguarda y con el compromiso de seguir siendo una empresa con responsabilidad y sentido humano, con el orgullo de seguir inspirando momentos sensacionales.

Name: Milkaut Profesional
Description:
En Milkaut Profesional tenemos el objetivo de agregar valor a cada segmento de la gastronomía con productos de alta calidad que ofrezcan diferenciación, inspiren a la creación de nuevas recetas y aporten soluciones profesionales efectivas, en búsqueda de la innovación y la superación constante.
Por eso, con el respaldo de nuestra tradición y lugar de origen, impulsamos el trabajo colaborativo compartiendo una amplia gama de soluciones creativas al servicio de la mejor experiencia profesional.

Name: Hoogwegt
Description:
Hoogwegt is an independent global dairy & plant based supplier, active in all major dairy producing and consuming markets. We provide excellence across the board for the food industry, in terms of product quality, logistics services, market intelligence and risk management solutions.

The services that we provide add something extra to dairy – vision and value. Hoogwegt worldwide offices offer you the business intelligence, partnerships, and support that you need in order to respond quickly and effectively to today's dynamic and globalized food industry.

While exploring future food solutions, we believe dairy and plant based alternatives are core stones of our human diet. We want to contribute responsibly by supplying dairy & plant based products and ingredients to a growing world population.

Name: Arla Oy
Description:
ARLA - TULEVAISUUDEN TYÖPAIKKA

Suomalainen meijeriyhtiö Arla Oy kuuluu kansainväliseen Arla Foodsiin. Tarjoamme makuja Suomesta ja maailmalta päivän jokaiseen hetkeen. Tuomme jatkuvasti uusia mahdollisuuksia hyvinvoinnin edistämiseen ja kestävään ruokavalioon. Luomme maitoalan tulevaisuutta tuoden maailmaan terveellisyyttä ja inspiraatiota – luonnollisesti.

Suurin meijerimme ja pääkonttorimme sijaitsevat Sipoossa, jossa jatkamme lähes sata vuotta sitten Hjalmar Ingmanin aloittamaa meijeriperinnettä.

Name: Idaho Milk Products
Description:
Idaho Milk Products empowers leading food manufacturers to create new potential on a sustainable path to feeding the globe. We are daring food to be better.

Born from a partnership between families, our success is built on strong relationships, solid values, and top-quality products. We take pride in our independent business that emphasizes safety, quality, and a minimal environmental footprint, both on the dairies and within our plant.

Our exclusive focus lies in three product categories: milk protein concentrate and isolate, milk permeate, and cream. Our commitment to quality is reflected in our process, with products moving from milking to final packaging in as little as 24 hours, ensuring the freshest ingredients.

Harnessing scientific innovation and collaborative partnerships, we generate meaningful impact through conscious, data-driven solutions. These are tailored to our customers, employees, and global community. We believe in fostering a business culture that develops people to their fullest potential, creating leaders at all levels. We're always on it, with you in mind. Let's create a better future together.

Name: Kuwait Dairy Company (KDCow)
Description:
For over 59 years, the name of Kuwait Dairy Company has become synonymous with high-quality fresh dairy products, manufactured from fresh milk produced daily from Kuwait farms. Since its inception in 1960, through the Kuwaiti farmers’ initiative, Kuwait Dairy Company aims to create a sophisticated production and distribution process that primarily serves food security in Kuwait, and achieves a qualitative leap in national potential. Kuwait Dairy Company successfully assumed this responsibility and developed to be one of the largest and most deeply established industrial companies operating in the dairy field, both locally and GCC level.

Kuwait Dairy Company runs a variety of production lines on an area of 22 thousand square meters, with a production capacity of 350 tons daily, seeking to develop its capacity up to 550 tons per day over the coming years. A sophisticated research team that works on quality control and research to ensure that the product meets all the health standards globally, works on this massive production capacity, and continuously develop business on the other hand. All these steps are done through specialized and internationally accredited laboratories established by Kuwait Dairy Company specifically for this purpose.

It is worth mentioning that Kuwait Dairy Company, is currently completing the new extension building construction work, on an area of 70 thousand square meters that will represent a new qualitative leap for the company’s production and supply capacity.

Name: Anchor Food Professionals
Description:
Fonterra Cooperative Group is the world's largest exporter of dairy products, a leader in dairy science and innovation,  a partner to many of the world's leading food companies, and owner of a significant portfolio of consumer and foodservice brands across Asia Pacific, Middle East, US and Latin America.  Fonterra is headquartered in New Zealand, with offices in more than 40 countries world wide.

Anchor Food Professionals is a high performance foodservice brand and is how Fonterra presents its foodservice business to the world.  For more than 20 years, Anchor Food Professionals has worked with thousands of bakeries, restaurants, hotels and caterers, providing deep industry insight, world leading research and innovation, high-function, fit-for-purpose dairy products and business service solutions.

Name: Dairy Distributor
Description: A major producer of Dairy Products in Egypt with presence across all dairy categories, including: Cheeses (Processed Cheese, White Cheese, Pizza Cheese)

Name: Mercely's Ice Cream
Description:
India’s First Prebiotic & Probiotic Ice Cream

At Mercely’s, we believe that ice cream is more than just a dessert – it’s an experience.

We are India’s pioneering ice cream brand offering probiotic and prebiotic-enriched ice creams, crafted using real fruits, natural colors and premium dairy sourced directly from farmers. With a strong foundation in innovation, sustainability, and taste, Mercely’s has quickly evolved into a consumer favorite across India and international markets.

Name: Maahi Milk Producer Organization
Description:
MISSION:
Maahi Milk Producer Company is committed for giving maximum return to the Members through dairying.

VALUES:
 Quality at each level
 Trust
 Accountability
 Mutual Co-operation
 Innovation
 Passion
 Long term vision
 Honesty and transparency

VISION:
With strong commitment to our values, Maahi will be known as one of the world’s leading companies in the area of milk business

Name: Longa Vida - Lactalis Nestlé Portugal
Description:
A Lactalis Nestlé Portugal tem origem numa joint-venture internacional que junta a Nestlé, primeiro grupo mundial no sector agroalimentar e a Lactalis, líder mundial no sector dos lacticínios. A empresa foi criada em 2006 para operar no segmento dos produtos lácteos frescos, nomeadamente iogurtes e sobremesas lácteas. 

A Lactalis Nestlé Portugal comercializa marcas de grande consumo como Yoggi, Yoco, Lindahls, Kéfir, A Leiteira, Yaos, Smarties, Nesquik, Nescafé, Kit Kat ou Chocapic. Em Portugal, a Lactalis Nestlé também possui a marca Longa Vida.

Name: Cabot Creamery Cooperative
Description:
As a cooperative of dairy farm families, Cabot farmers love what they do. And they’ve been doing it every single day since 1919. More than 100 years later, we’re proud of our thriving farms, strong communities, healthy cows that produce high quality milk that we use to make Cabot’s award-winning cheese and dairy products.

Agri-Mark, our parent co-operative, is the Northeast's Premier Dairy Farmer Co-operative and marketers of Cabot, McCadam, and Agri-Mark products 

Cabot Creamery Cooperative is the world’s first dairy co-operative to achieve B Corporation Certification, a validation of its attention to environmental and social impacts on stakeholders.

Get to know us better!
https://www.facebook.com/cabotcreamery
https://twitter.com/cabotcreamery
http://pinterest.com/cabotcreamery/
http://instagram.com/cabotcreamery
http://www.youtube.com/user/CabotCreamery

Name: Banas Dairy
Description:
Banas Dairy, officially known as the Banaskantha District Cooperative Milk Producers’ Union Ltd., is a division of the Gujarat Cooperative Milk Marketing Federation (GCMMF), operating under the Ministry of Cooperation, Government of Gujarat. Established in 1969 as part of India’s transformative Operation Flood initiative, Banas Dairy has grown into Asia's largest milk producer, making a significant impact on India's dairy sector and rural economy. Headquartered in Palanpur, Banaskantha district, Gujarat, the dairy symbolizes excellence in cooperative enterprise and rural development.

With the unwavering support of over 1,80,000 shareholders and 1,450 cooperative societies, Banas Dairy collects and processes an average of 75.14 lakh liters of milk daily. During peak winter seasons, this collection surges to a record-breaking 90.86 lakh liters, solidifying its position as a leader in the global dairy industry. The organization's diverse portfolio of dairy products is marketed under the iconic Amul brand, renowned for its quality and trust across India and abroad.

In the fiscal year 2023-24, Banas Dairy achieved a turnover of ₹19,008 crore, reflecting robust growth driven by innovation, efficiency, and a focus on value-added products. This milestone underscores its commitment to empowering rural livelihoods, enhancing farmer incomes, and contributing to the socio-economic development of the region.

Banas Dairy continues to lead with a vision of sustainable growth and innovation, ensuring the highest quality standards in its products and practices. As the largest member union of GCMMF, it remains dedicated to its mission of transforming lives and advancing India's position as a global dairy powerhouse.

Name: Kuwait United Dairy Company (KUDC)
Description: Kuwait United Dairy Company is the largest dairy farm in Kuwait established in 1961. Currently, the farm is going through a major restructuring project to ensure top quality milk production as part of the nation's food security mission.

Name: Arabian Food & Dairy Factories Company - Fadeco
Description: Fadeco is THE premium ice cream experience beloved by dessert aficionados across the GCC. Using the finest ingredients sourced from across the wide world, we’ve developed a range of deliciously enjoyable flavours.

Name: Dairy Industry Ireland
Description: Dairy Industry Ireland is dedicated to the success and economic sustainability of our members since 1973. We work diligently to strengthen Ireland's reputation as a global dairy leader. We proudly represent the interests of Ireland’s primary and secondary dairy processors, including the specialised nutrition sector, through a comprehensive information and advice service, and robust representation at national, EU and international levels.

Name: The Tatua Co-operative Dairy Company Limited
Description:
The Tatua Co-operative Dairy Company is a world-leading specialised dairy ingredients manufacturer. Our co-operative is located in the heart of the Waikato region of New Zealand, a vibrant farming community. Our specialised product range includes applications from nutritional ingredient solutions for the medical and wellbeing sectors, to dairy flavours designed to help food manufacturers improve taste or reduce cost without sacrificing quality. Additionally, we offer a much-loved range of foodservice and consumer products including our iconic Dairy Whip. 

Collaborative invention, agility and a personalised commitment to long term customer partnerships are key to our success.

Name: Leche Celta
Description:
Grupo Leche Celta es una compañía láctea de origen gallego perteneciente a la multinacional portuguesa Lactogal Productos Alimentares. Con una facturación en el año 2022 de 300M, es una de las empresas líderes en España en la fabricación de leche líquida y derivados lácteos para distribuidoras de alimentación.

Grupo Leche Celta envasa productos lácteos para diferentes marcas de distribución y los comercializa a través de Iberleche, sociedad que se encuentra dentro del Grupo. 
Nuestras tres plantas situadas en A Coruña, Ávila y Cantabria producen cada año una media de 380.000 toneladas de productos lácteos procedentes de ganaderías de proximidad, en una apuesta tangible por el desarrollo y la viabilidad del medio rural del entorno.

En el año 2017, apostando por el vínculo que nos une a la naturaleza, lanzamos nuestra leche de pastoreo, y fuimos la primera empresa láctea en obtener el doble sello de AENOR de Bienestar Animal y Leche de Pastoreo, certificando que nuestro producto proviene de granjas gallegas con vacas que se alimentan esencialmente de pastos naturales.

Dentro de nuestro compromiso con el medio ambiente, en 2020 hemos incorporado a nuestros productos envases más sostenibles, fabricados con cartón FSC, con la máxima certificación de renovabilidad, incorporando plásticos de origen vegetal, hechos a partir de caña de azúcar y con una huella de carbono de hasta un 21% inferior a la versión anterior.

Además, hemos implantado un Sistema de Gestión Ambiental acorde con el Reglamento Europeo EMAS, el más exigente en cuanto a lo que requiere a las empresas que desean inscribirse en él.

Esto es Leche Celta. 
Esto es Milkfulness. 

Descubre más en lechecelta.com

Name: World Dairy Expo
Description:
Attend the event designed with today's dairy producers in mind. At World Dairy Expo everything is dairy focused and no other event in the world compares!

Be one of more than 55,000 dairy industry professionals and enthusiasts who make the trip to World Dairy Expo in Madison, Wisconsin. It's the meeting place for the global dairy industry. Expo offers the most elite combination of dairy cattle and exhibits in the world.

You'll find the most modern dairy equipment and the newest dairy technology and innovations, including animal health supplies, milking systems, feeding products, forage handling and manure equipment plus embryos, semen and genetic research. You'll see North America's top dairy cattle compete for honors in seven breed shows. Throughout the week meet herd owners in the barns, place your bids at five cattle auctions and then watch the Parade of Champions and the selection of World Dairy Expo's Supreme Champion.

While you are at World Dairy Expo you can also take advantage of free Expo Seminars on dairy management and other industry issues. These seminars offer technical expertise to help you stay knowledgeable, competitive and profitable. Explore a variety of farms from around the world and never leave the grounds by participating in World Dairy Expo's Virtual Farm Tours, presented by the producers themselves.

Make plans now to attend, October 1- October 4, 2024. For full information, find us on the web at www.worlddairyexpo,com or Facebook.com/worldairyexpo.

Name: Laticínios São Vicente S.A.
Description:
A combinação Minas Gerais e queijo é conhecida mundialmente pela qualidade e tradição cultivada pelos nossos ancestrais, que tornaram o estado uma referência gastronômica.

Como não poderia deixar de ser, a maioria das fábricas de queijos finos está no estado de Minas e o grupo familiar que hoje administra a Laticínios São Vicente é referência na produção de queijos especiais. 

A São Vicente oferece uma linha diversificada, com sabor inconfundível. A lista variada de produtos pode ser encontrada nas prateleiras dos supermercados perto de você.

Name: Asafwah Dairy & Beverages-Dhofar Foods & Investment (SAOG)
Description: Asafwah Dairy is part of Dhofar Foods & Investment (SAOG) group, established in 1983 and is one of the leading Dairy producers & one of the largest single site Dairy Farm in the Sultanate of Oman. Our farms and plant are in the Dhofar region where the climate is suitable to raise cows. Dairy plant has the state-of-the-art technology. Asafwah prefers to maintain its high credibility and always keep updating modern processing technology with a full-fledged R&D and quality division resulting in producing high-quality safe to consume products. Asafwah Dairy has diversified its product mix from fresh milk and milk products to fresh juices, UHT (long-life) products of milk and juices.

Name: Serramar Cooperativa Agroindustrial
Description:
Somos a Cooperativa Agroindustrial Serramar: somos pessoas que se unem em torno de um objetivo em comum.  
São quase 1000 (mil) cooperados ativos atuando conosco. Temos uma captação média anual de 80 milhões de litros de leite, com um rigoroso controle de qualidade desde a produção inicial na fazenda do produtor até a industrialização dos produtos comercializados. Assim conseguimos levar os melhores produtos até a sua casa. Nossa família não para de crescer para chegar até a sua família.
Temos hoje 7 (sete) unidades comerciais comerciais de com vendas de produtos agrícolas, nutrição animal, linha pet, linha de piscina, moda country e muito mais, instaladas estrategicamente à beira da Dutra de Guaratinguetá e no Bairro da Rocinha, Cunha, Lagoinha, Bananal, Lorena e em Cruzeiro.

Name: Chiveria
Description: Fabricación y comercialización de productos lácteos.

Name: Arla Foods UAE, Oman & Qatar
Description:
With a vision to create the future of dairy, and make healthy, natural dairy products for millions of people around the world, there's plenty to keep you motivated, challenged and continually developing here at Arla.
We've got a high performing culture and we have great ambitions. We've got a strong strategy for growing our business and one for growing our colleagues too. So, if a dynamic environment where change is an everyday occurrence appeals to you,
discover more about our business, immerse yourself in Arla life.

Name: AWAL DAIRY COMPANY W.L.L.
Description:
Established in 1963, Awal Dairy Company is dedicated to produce and distribute the highest quality dairy products, juices, and ice creams using the finest available ingredients, which exceed our customer’s expectations in terms of 
quality, service, and value.

To operate on a sustainable financial basis of profitability, productivity and growth for shareholders and for the prosperity of employees through career development and respect of individuals.

Awal Dairy Company is an innovative company dedicated to be the market leader, striving for perfection in excellence
of service and providing for the needs of the country and its people, protecting the environment and our living planet.


For more information, please visit the Awal Dairy Company website: https://www.awaldairy.com/

Name: SAPROCAL - Lácteos La Pradera
Description:
La Pradera es una empresa láctea paraguaya con una rica historia que se remonta a su fundación en 1995.
Hoy la planta de procesamiento se encuentra en Capiatá, donde producimos el 100% de nuestros productos, desde leches y bebidas lácteas hasta quesos, dulces y yogures.
La Pradera ofrece una gama completa de productos y es un referente de innovación y calidad en la industria láctea paraguaya.

Name: Agroindustrias San Julián
Description: Agroindustrias San Julián es una empresa que fabrica y comercializa productos lácteos, con sabores auténticos a nivel Nacional e Internacional, con más de 35 años en el mercado, siendo nuestro propósito superar y satisfacer las expectativas de nuestros clientes, por medio de sistemas efectivos de gestión, que nos permiten alcanzar un desarrollo sostenible, impactando de forma positiva a nuestra gente, clientes y comunidad.

Name: National Milk Producers Federation
Description:
The National Milk Producers Federation, established in 1916 and based in Arlington, VA, develops and carries out policies that advance the well-being of dairy producers and the cooperatives they own. The members of NMPF’s cooperatives produce the majority of the U.S. milk supply, making NMPF the voice of dairy producers on Capitol Hill and with government agencies.

NMPF provides a forum through which dairy farmers and their cooperatives formulate policy on national issues that affect milk production and marketing. NMPF's contribution to this policy is aimed at improving the economic interests of dairy farmers, thus assuring the nation's consumers an adequate supply of pure, wholesome, and nutritious milk and dairy products.

The policies of NMPF are determined by its members from across the nation. Therefore, the policy positions expressed by NMPF are the only nationwide expression of dairy farmers and their cooperatives on national public policy.

Name: Zappalà S.p.A.
Description:
Zappalà is the first dairy company in Southern Italy and the largest supplier of Sicilian cheeses for the Italian retail market. Our production capacity places us among the top dairy companies in Italy. Our mission is to represent the typical aspects and quality of Sicilian and Italian food products.

Zappalà products reach every day the main distribution boards and many countries worldwide, such as Japan, France, Belgium, Switzerland and Germany. 

We produce in a territory intact from an environmental perspective, where food still has the original flavors, by combining technology and attention to quality production, as we know that the food traditions are a valuable asset. These peculiarities allow us to differentiate us from other players.

We believe to have all the requisites that allow us to reach rewarding achievements: quality, taste, service and technology are the cornerstones that build our success.

Name: Coolechera
Description: Cooperativa de Productores de Leche de la Costa Atlántica LTDA.

Name: Chanakya Dairy Products Pvt. Ltd.
Description:
M/s Chanakya Dairy Products Ltd. (CDPL) is an Integrated Project in Dairying –a Mega Project, started in financial collaboration with M/s Punjab Agro Industries Corporation Ltd., in 2005 at Mandi Gobindgarh, Distt. Fatehgarh Sahib(Pb.) with a handling capacity of 250,000 Litres of Milk per day. The company was envisaged to be committed to ethical approach in Dairying with an ambition to contribute significantly to the ever growing White Revolution in Punjab. We produce various milk products like Pasteurized Packaged Milk, Fermented Products, Pasteurized Butter, Pure Desi Ghee, Milk Powders, Indigenous Milk Products & Ice Cream which are distributed to the National and International Markets under the brand name of HF-Super.

HF Super brand, today is a name to reckon with, in the states of Punjab, Himachal Pradesh, Chandigarh & Haryana for its unique Purity, Quality and Freshness of dairy products.It has been the result of persistent efforts and special stress on quality of Raw Material and Finished Milk Products that consumers have instilled so much confidence in the quality, that the demand reached beyond its capacity. Thus, in 2018 plant’s handling capacity was increased to 500,000 litres of milk per day. Till date, Chanakya Dairy has worked with nearly 5000 milk farmers across the states of Punjab, Haryana & Rajasthan. We have 9 chilling centres to maintain high quality of procured milk by preserving its freshness and nutrients. We also have built up a robust supply chain system where milk & milk products are delivered in a quick way.

The strong quality infrastructure has made Chanakya Dairy popular among reputed institutions and multinationals, which regularly place orders for our value added products.Our strength propagates from good work environment, skilled & devoted work force and highly experienced technical & professional staff. Our professionals provide assistance to our customers while the effective sales team has created a leading place in the market.

Name: Lactalis Zambia
Description: The Lactalis Group is a family owned company driven by passion for dairy that was founded in 1933 by André Besnier in Laval, France. Groupe Lactalis is a global player in the production and distribution of foods that are essential for everyday wellness: milk, dairy products (Cheese, yogurt, flavoured milk, cream, drinking yoghurt, fruit beverages and butter).

Name: HEALTH BRIDGE AGRO PRIVATE LIMITED
Description:
HEALTH BRIDGE AGRO PRIVATE LIMITED stands among the most progressive and dynamic Manufacturer, Exporter and Supplier of Dairy Products. Our range of dairy products includes HEALTH BRIDGE Fresh Malai Paneer, Frozen Paneer, HEALTH BRIDGE Sterilised Paneer, Pasteurized White Butter, Milk Powder, Ghee, Butter Milk, Dahi, Lassi, Pouch Milk and Cheese ( Mozzarella Cheese, Cheddar Cheese, Processed Cheese, Pizza Cheese ). Our product range is known for its nutrition profile and purity. We process these dairy products from the finest quality of milk procured directly from farmers. We guarantee timely delivery of bulk orders, easy amount mode without making any compromise on the quality of our products. Holding on all these strengths, we have an enormous customer base and stable market capitalization.
Working under the able guidance of Mr. Kishan Modi (Managing Director), we are a continuously growing organization. Based at Bhopal (Madhya Pradesh), HEALTH BRIDGE AGRO PRIVATE LIMITED was incepted in 2013.

Name: Dairy Craft India Pvt Ltd
Description:
Good cheese takes time, great cheese takes passion.

Since 1993, Dairy Craft has been creating quality cheese in India. Our expertise has been honed over 30 years, delving deep into the science and the art of cheesemaking, to make artisanal cheese accessible to everyone. Our commitment to excellence starts at the grassroots – happy farmers, happier animals, pure milk, sustainable production. Our three decades of learning, combined with constant technological innovation, have enabled us to offer the most diverse range of cheeses to the customer, from sliced and shredded products to fresh Italian mozzarella. We’re driven by a deep and abiding love for cheese, and you’ll taste that passion in everything we do.

Name: Lactalis México
Description:
Fundado en 1933 por André Besnier en Laval (Francia), el Grupo Lactalis ha sido fiel, durante tres generaciones, a su compromiso inicial: la transformación de los productos lácteos en todas sus formas. Empresa familiar, crecemos por todo el mundo, manteniéndonos fieles a nuestra historia y a nuestro patrimonio. 

Con una gran variedad de marcas de prestigio, como PRESIDENT, GALBANI, PARMALAT, LACTEL, BLACK DIAMOND, CELIA, LA LAITIERE, DUKAT, BRIDEL, SANTAL, SALAKIS, nos hemos convertido en un actor clave de la industria láctea. Con más de 270 fábricas en todo el mundo y una facturación de 28,3 millones de euros, somos el primer productor de queso a nivel mundial, el líder europeo en leche, mantequilla y nata, un actor ineludible en el mercado de los postres refrigerados, el de ingredientes lácteos y en la restauración, así como un referente cada vez más importante en la nutrición clínica e infantil. 

Nuestra fuerte cultura de empresa, la comparten hoy en día nuestros 85,500 colaboradores repartidos en 94 países. Son las personas, su “saber hacer” y su experiencia en la industria láctea los que nos permiten ofrecer cada día, productos de calidad para satisfacer los gustos de nuestros consumidores. 

Para más información sobre el Grupo Lactalis, Visita nuestra web https://www.lactalis.com/en/le-groupe-lactalis/!

Name: Miraka Limited
Description:
Miraka is New Zealand's, and the world's, first dairy processing company to use renewable geothermal energy, giving us one of the lowest manufacturing carbon emissions footprints that there is globally.

Learn more: www.miraka.co.nz

Name: HELLENIC DAIRIES SA
Description:
HELLENIC DAIRIES SA is a family business of 3rd generation that operates in the dairy sector, continuing its uninterrupted operation and contribution to the Greek economy and to the primary production. It is present not only in the Greek market but also in 47 foreign countries.

The deep and firm belief that behind every good there is something even better and the stable and consistent philosophy to produce safe and quality products has resulted in the use of high-quality raw materials, ensuring the quality and the safety. These two factors are placed to the top of our priorities.

The development of new innovative products constitutes an important role. Combining the excellent raw materials, the high technology, the strict hygiene and safety in the production and the passion of its 800 workers, the company offers a full range of dairy products with the authentic traditional taste that has captured the consumers’ heart.

At the same time, for the HELLENIC DAIRIES SA, the Corporate Social Responsibility constitutes a part of a long-term strategy. Precisely, it is the only dairy company in Southeast Europe that has installed an integrated waste treatment plant including a biogas plant. More specifically, the installation of the biogas plant is an innovative investment, unique in Europe in the dairy sector, valued at 10 million euros. It aims at the efficient treatment of all liquid waste coming from the production activities of the plant.

This project-based on the production of green energy shows our corporate responsibility towards the environment and society. By reducing the waste, the conventional energy, the carbon dioxide, and the pollution, we contribute to the overall effort for a better quality of life dedicated to future generations.

HELLENIC DAIRIES SA remains faithful to its values, designs, invests and innovates. Its intention is sustainable growth, bringing value to its shareholders, employees, suppliers, customers, and consumers.

Name: American Dairy Products Institute
Description: ADPI is one of the leading trade associations representing the dairy ingredients and related manufactured dairy products industry. Our members manufacture and market the majority of the milk-based and whey-based ingredients produced, sold, and or distributed in the U.S. and exported to the world.

Name: CowSignals Training Company
Description:
CowSignals Training Company is an independent training organization. We are your partner and preferred supplier of practical cow-based knowledge and training to secure Happy Cows, Happy Farmers, Happy Planet. 

Sustainable dairy chain
Our team consists of CowSignals Experts, which are all vets. Our main drivers are health, welfare and sustainability. During the practical training you will learn to recognize all the cow signals, to identify problems, and to solve them.  We combine all factors that are important for cow welfare in the daily work with dairy cattle; water, light, air, rest, space and feed. These come together in the CowSignals Diamond. By using CowSignals we want to create a more sustainable dairy chain. 

Dairy topics 
All dairy topics are available both as a day course and as an e-learning. 
CowSignals | Youngstock Signals | Stressfree Stockmanship | Hoof Signals | Feeding Signals | Fertility Signals | Udder Signals | Dry to Fresh | Robotic milking | Building for the cow | People Signals

One day training
We start with an interactive lecture with many practical examples. In the afternoon there will be a workshop on a dairy farm. At the end you will receive a CowSignals certificate.

E-learning
Through e-learning you can skill yourself further into various dairy-related topics. For each e-learning followed, you will receive a CowSignals certificate.

Become a CowSignals Master - 4 days
CowSignals Training Company is training dairy advisors and farmers worldwide. Active in over 70 countries in the last 5 years. We supply excellent cow-based knowledge and very good examples, and combine theory and practice in our barn workshops. We keep it simple and we stimulate thinking in solutions. That’s why our CowSignals Master training is becoming more and more famous all over the world. 
The CowSignals Masters are licensed to train adn have access to a comprehensive toolbox.

Name: Nishat Dairy (Private) Limited
All Things Dairy
Description: All Things Dairy is an dairy business founded by Toby Hopkinson & Thomas Straker.

Name: Modern Dairy Plant Company (BADR DAIRY)
Description:
Since its establishment in 1979, Modern Dairy Plant Company “Badr Dairy” (MDPC) has strived to produce a variety of quality Dairy Produce.
MDPC is a leading manufacturer & supplier of dairy products in central Saudi Arabia region covering Riyadh and spanning across Qassim and with a foothold in eastern province. It operates its milk procurement, dairy products processing and distribution through Strategic Business Units (SBUs). Its dairy products are sold under the popular brand name “Badr” since 1979. Upon inception, the company has been growing consistently under the visionary leadership of promoter directors, business acumen of operational heads and unrelenting efforts of committed workforce. The company has achieved a turnover of 27 million for the financial year 2012 and is set to achieve an ambitious target of 40 million by end 2013.
MDPC is constantly introducing new products such as Cream and gourmet labneh & white cheeses, to supplement its already existing variety of over 40 yogurts and labnehs & white cheeses.  
Since it has incorporated in the year 2002, the company has successfully applied many innovative practices and products. The company is now planning to expand its operations to cover the western province, and then the entire country of Saudi Arabia. In addition, the company plans on establishing strategic partners at both the national and international level as it looks at export opportunities to its products.

Name: eDairy Market
Description:
eDairy Market is the only exclusive dairy marketplace that allows you to create a digital dairy store, and for FREE! The largest dairy catalog in the world. The best Cost/Benefit ratio. Greater Visibility, Better Web Positioning. Expand your brand, Accelerate your company's growth.
We are the digital solution that will grow your business in the dairy market.

Name: Yoplait Liberté Canada
Description:
In Canada, since 1936 for Liberté and 1971 for Yoplait, our teams have developed iconic brands over the years (Yop, Tubes, Source, Méditerranée, and Minigo) that are deeply rooted in the daily lives of Canadian consumers. This success is built on strong and original values: the quality of products made with locally sourced milk, great taste, innovation, and expertise.

These values are further strengthened by our affiliation with the SODIAAL Group, the largest dairy farmers' cooperative in France, and by Yoplait's 60-year history of proudly sharing French dairy expertise around the world. With a presence in over 50 countries, we are the world's second-largest dairy products company!

Name: Iran Dairy Industries Co. (PEGAH) پگاه
Description:
Iran Dairy Industries Co. (IDIC) is the greatest dairy producer in Iran with "PEGAH" brand. 
It is the earliest dairy plant in Iran equipped with modern machinery. 
It has near seven decades of experience in industrial production and processing of milk and dairy products benefiting from modern technology, and at present with 1.2 million tons milk received per year.

it is one of the biggest dairy companies in the Middle East. IDIC has 29 affiliates and companies in thirteen provinces of the country and offers 600 pasteurized and sterilized dairy products with "PEGAH" brand to the market in diverse packaging. 
Now, 30% of domestic Iranian market, which is covering 75 million people, is supplied by this company.

The products included: 
- Pasteurized and UHT milk, flavored milk, pasteurized and UHT cream, different kinds of cheese (process, slice, pizza, UF), different kinds of yoghurt, probiotic products (such as yoghurt, cheese, Kefir, ice cream), drinking yoghurt.
- Butter, ice-cream, kashk.
- herbal drinks (such as Carbonated Ice tea Drink Lemon Flavor, Carbonated Herbal Drink Ginger Flavor and etc.)
Certain products of the company including UHT milk, cheese, yoghurt, dough, sterilized cream, cheese whey powder and milk powder are exported and offered in different part of the world.
Business Contact: https://pegahexport.com/contact-us/
PMMR Co WebSite Link : https://pmmr-machinery.com/

Name: Milky's
Description:
Established in 1996, Milky's Farm has grown from a small family operation with 70 dairy heifers to one of Egypt's leading dairy farms, boasting a herd of nearly 4,000 top German breed dairy cows. With over twenty years of experience, Milky's is the most trusted raw milk supplier to the largest dairy processors in Egypt.

At Milky's, we are dedicated to delivering artisan, natural dairy products to the market under our brands “The Milkman” and “Reefy.” Our products are 100% natural, free from additives and preservatives, and are pasteurized to ensure safety and purity. We take pride in our stringent hygiene standards and the latest farm and herd management systems, ensuring our products are as wholesome and nutritious as they are delicious.

Our mission is to feed the world with healthy and wholesome dairy while preserving our ecosystem. We use the latest farming technologies and modern practices to ensure sustainability and excellence in every aspect of our operation. Our products evoke nostalgia by offering the same pure, artisan milk enjoyed in the past.

Join us on our journey as we continue to provide the finest dairy products from our farm to your table.

Name: Brazzale Spa
Description: Brazzale Spa is a Food Production company located in Via Monte Pasubio, Zan??, Veneto, Italy.

Name: BelGioioso Cheese Inc.
Description: BelGioioso Cheese Inc. crafts the best Italian cheeses in the US with strict focus on distinctive quality.  Our commitment to traditional Italian recipes, selection of ingredients, ideal location and artisan inspiration makes our master cheese makers the greatest interpreters of the best Italian cheeses in the US.

Name: Norco Co-operative Limited
Description: An 100% Australian, Farmer Owned Dairy Co-operative Since 1895

Name: Leprino Brasil
Description:
Fundada em 1950 por Jim Leprino, em Denver, Colorado, a Leprino é uma das mais tradicionais marcas de laticínios para Food Service no mundo.

Com 13 fábricas espalhadas por quatro continentes (América do Norte, Reino Unido e Irlanda, Singapura, China, Japão, Coreia do Sul e Brasil), a empresa é reconhecida como a maior produtora global de mussarela e soluções em laticínios.

No Brasil, a operação fabril está localizada em Tapejara, no Noroeste do Paraná, e a matriz de negócios encontra-se em Maringá, PR. A captação de leite é realizada por meio das bacias leiteiras do Sul, com postos de resfriamento em Guaraniaçu e Santa Maria do Oeste.

A história da Leprino no Food Service brasileiro começou em 2017, com a aquisição dos Laticínios Pic-Nic. Atualmente, a empresa opera com as marcas Bacio, Pic-Nic e Pizza Cheese, distribuindo produtos para todo o território nacional.

A Leprino é apaixonada por Food Service e tem orgulho de ser certificada pela IFS, um selo que garante qualidade, segurança alimentar, credibilidade e compromisso em cada produto produzido e comercializado.

Visão global
Ser a melhor empresa de alimentos e ingredientes lácteos do mundo.

Nossos valores:
Qualidade
Serviço
Preços competitivos
Ética

Se você é distribuidor, revendedor ou possui um negócio, acesse nosso site e entre em contato. Será um prazer atendê-lo com produtos de alta qualidade, excelente desempenho e sabor, testados e aprovados por grandes redes e clientes especiais.

Name: Müller Italia (UTM Group)
Description:
Unternehmensgruppe Theo Müller is a family owned  international food business with a clear purpose and ambition.  We bring added value through the manufacture and distribution of great food products which are loved by consumers and our customers. 
Our vision is to continue to grow profitably through innovation and brands, scale and operational excellence. To enable our progress we aim to be a high performing international organisation where people love to work. 
At the core of our business is the entrepreneurship shown by Theo Müller Senior. Under his leadership it has grown to employ around  31.700 people with production and sales operations in 19 countries. 
These include Germany, the UK, Ireland, the Netherlands, Italy, Poland, the Czech Republic, Romania and Israel.
In the dairy segment we manage the business of subsidiaries with strong and iconic brands including Müller, Weihenstephan, Sachsenmilch and Käserei Loose.  Retail brands and basic dairy products, such as butter, UHT milk, lactose powder and whey protein, complete the portfolio. 
Activities in the field of convenience food also come under the umbrella of the Group with  leading brands  such as Homann, Nadler, Lisner. 
Within the UTM Group, Muller Italy runs its business as a commercial subsidiary in the mass market channel with a premium market  positioning. It operates in the FMCG dairy industry with  an indulgent, delicious, creamy  and nevertheless healthy widespread  yogurt range. The company was founded in 1995 and has acquired over the years a leadership position in the traditional yogurt market with a very distinctive, innovative and successful communication and marketing value proposition combined with a remarkably  effective commercial strategy.

Name: Baani Milk Producer Organization
Description:
Baani Milk Producer Organization was incorporated on 11th August 2014 under the provisions of sub-section 2 of section 7 of the companies’ act, 2013 with its head office located at Patiala in Punjab. 
Baani started its business operations from 06th November 2014 and is currently operating in eight districts of Punjab. It is functioning as an independent organization with its key objectives to procure milk by pooling, purchasing, processing of milk, its products and marketing the same to create maximum value for its all stakeholders—which is achieved by designing and administering appropriate animal nutrition plans, animal breeding technology and at the same time provide good quality milk and milk products at best the competitive cost to the customers.

Baani is based on a holistic model to take India’s dairy production to new heights by- animal nutrition methodologies and resulting in enhanced productivity. Ensuring better quality of life to marginal farmers and encourage women farmers in India and particularly in Punjab.

Name: Delhi Technical Campus
Description: Delhi Technical Campus is a dairy company based out of 4TH KM STONE, BAHADURGARH-BADLI ROAD NAYA GAON, BAHADURGARH, Haryana, India.

Name: Banaskantha Dist. Co-op. Milk Producers' Union Ltd., (GCMMF-AMUL)
Description:
Banaskantha District Cooperative Milk Producers' Union Limited known as Banas Dairy is a cooperative organization established in the year 1969 under the Gujarat Co-operative societies Act 1961 with the support of NDDB as a part of their Operation Flood Program launched to bring about white revolution in the country.  
Banas Dairy manufactures a large number of dairy products under AMUL, SAGAR and BANAS brands. Our product range includes Amul Pasteurized Milks, Amul longer Shelf Life Milk, Amul Butter, Amul Ghee, Sagar Ghee, Amulya Powder, Sagar Tea and Coffee Whitener, Sagar SMP, Amul SMP, Amul Shakti Powder, a wide range of Amul Ice Creams, Banas Peda, Banas Tea etc. We also provide a large number of technical inputs to over 1.8 lakh farmer households, which are organized through 1200 odd Village level Cooperative Milk Societies.
Banas Dairy is a member of Gujarat Cooperative Milk Marketing Federation (GCMMF). Which is India's largest food products marketing organization. It is a state level apex body of milk cooperatives in Gujarat which aims to provide remunerative returns to the farmers and also serve the interest of consumers by providing quality products which are good value for money. The products of dairy are marketed through Gujarat Cooperative Milk Marketing Federation, Anand.

Name: Lato Milk
Description: The Lato Milk is a dairy company founded in 2012 by Pearl Dairy Farms Limited. The plant located in Mbarara District Uganda is one of largest milk processing companies with many different types of milk products and has spread out to different parts of the world; Kenya, South Sudan, Sudan, Ethiopia, UAE, and India.

Name: Adya Dairy
Description:
The glorious journey of Adya Dairy Products Pvt Ltd started as a joint venture between The Shalimar Group and The Chokhany Group in 2016. We are an integrated dairy company which is capable of handling over 3,00,000 litres of milk per day. First, Adya Dairy collects fresh milk through the VLCC( village level collection centres) and BMC (Bulk Milk coolers) spread across different villages of Bengal. The raw milk is first processed and packaged at the dairy plant, located in Howrah district.

We have a diversified product portfolio with a vast range of milk and derivated products like Paneer, Plain Dahi, Misti Doi Aam Doi, Alphonso Mango Dahi, ghee, lassi, skimmed milk powder and butter.

Our priority is not only the customers but also the farmers. This improves the well-being of the farmers by assuring them regular purchase of milk throughout the year. We also transfer technical competence of yielding best quality milk to farmers. This in-turn results into unadulterated dairy products at affordable prices for our B2C & B2B customers.

Name: Inex
Description:
INEX is a Belgian dairy group offering the most extensive range of fresh 
to long-life dairy products, in the most modern and diverse packaging.

We process approximately 220 million litres of milk annually. Of this,more than half is exported to most EU-countries and to some countries outside the European Union. 
The remainder is retained for the Belgian market, specifically destined for supermarkets, the hotel and catering industry, collectives, for schools and for domestic consumption.

Name: Michigan Milk Producers Association
Description:
The Michigan Milk Producers Association–established in 1916–is a member-owned and operated milk marketing cooperative and dairy processor serving dairy farmers throughout Michigan, Wisconsin, Ohio and Indiana. In addition to a cheese plant in Indiana and a dairy product plant in Ohio, MMPA operates two SQF Level 3 dairy ingredient plants in Michigan, producing butter, nonfat dry milk powder, condensed skim milk, cream and whole milk powder.

Equal Opportunity Employer

Name: QUEIJOS SANTIAGO
Description:
The company Queijos Santiago was founded in 1918 in Castelo Branco, having 100 years in the history of the Portuguese cheese production.

Nowadays, Queijos Santiago has more than 100 products in the market and it is proud to be the unquestionable market leader in the fresh cheese line as well as a reference in the cured cheese line, specifically with regional products.

With four factories throughout Portugal and its headquarters in Malveira, Queijos Santiago is responsible for the picking, production, packing and distribution of all its products, what allows it to guarantee the maximum quality of the cheese that gets to the Portuguese table. A tradition allied to the quality that starts in the rigorous selection of our raw materials that come from a wide range of regional milk producers that are supported by Queijos Santiago through specialized technicians.

This quality has already been certified; the branch offices of the group were the first dairy product companies national wide to be certified accordingly to the NP EN ISO 9001:2008 norms in 2003 and 2008 and to the NP EN ISO 22000:2005 norms to management systems of food security.

In terms of flavour, the knowledge of Queijos Santiago’s tradition is present in all its variety of products. From the intense taste of purely cured cheese to the smooth characteristics of blended cheese, through the variety of fresh cheese in which Queijos Santiago is leader, with its balanced nutritional outline and unforgettable flavour, also in the Half Fat and Low Fat options.


Queijos Santiago. 
Saber que sabe bem.

Name: Glenilen Farm
Description:
Glenilen Farm is a family-run farm set up by husband and wife team, Alan and Valerie Kingston.
The farm, based in Drimoleague, West Cork, Ireland produces yoghurt, country butter, crème fraiche as well as a range of other high-quality dairy products, using milk from neighbouring farms.
Recognising the unique fresh taste and uncomplicated goodness of Glenilen Farm’s yoghurt, the brand is one of the leading Irish yoghurt brands in Ireland.
Alan’s family has been farming for generations and in 1997 Alan and Valerie decided to focus on adding further value to their milk.
With an entrepreneurial mind-set and a passion for baking, Valerie took advantage of the abundant milk supply by making delicious homemade cheesecake & yoghurt for the local country market.
Since then, Glenilen Farm has grown into a flourishing business that continues to hold true to its values of making a range of great tasting dairy products using a few simple ingredients. 
Alan spends his time making yoghurt most days as well as running the entire operation, while Valerie develops new mouth-watering recipes.
The couple work hard to ensure that their products remain authentic, fresh and contain as few ingredients as possible.
This ethos has been applied to their yoghurt range, which is made with a few simple ingredients and bursting with gut friendly cultures and real fruit.
Glenilen Farm produce is the perfect foodservice solution offering the best quality produce for your customers.

Name: Sakhi Milk Producer Organization
Description:
Sakhi Mahila Milk Producer Company Ltd. is a producer owned enterprise registered on March 19, 2016 under chapter XXI-A of Companies Act, 2013.Sakhi has only women members and runs on the basis of Mutual Assistance Principles i.e. voluntary membership, voting rights independent of shareholding, an elected board, limited dividend, education of members and co-operation with other organizations.

 The core objectives of the Company are as under:

1. To carry on the business of pooling, purchasing, processing of milk supplied by the members, marketing of the same and to deal in allied activities.
2. To provide or arrange to provide technical and managerial services in the areas of breeding, feed/ fodder, veterinary services to increase milk production for the benefit of the members.
3. To provide education, training and other activities to promote mutual assistance amongst the members.
4. To arrange to procure quality milk from members that meet the standards laid down by the organization and statutory authorities.

Name: Patanjali Dairy
Description:
Product Details: Patanjali markets a wide range of dairy products which include:-

1. Pasteurized Cow Milk (Pouch): Malai Dar milk, which is Good for the Entire family.
Available in 200 ml, 500 ml, 1 litre and 6 Litre with minimum Fat 4% and minimum
SNF 8.5%. Shelf life of 48 hours from the date of packaging if kept under
refrigeration below 8 degree centigrade.

2. Homogenized Cow Milk (Pouch): The All Purpose Milk which is thick and best for
making tea, coffe and curd. Available in 200 ml, 500 ml, 1 litre and 6 Litre with
minimum Fat 4% and minimum SNF 8.5%. Shelf life of 48 hours from the date of
packaging if kept under refrigeration below 8 degree centigrade.

3. UHT Cow Milk (Tetra Pack): Available in 1 litre and 160 Ml with minimum 3.5% fat
and SNF 8.5%. Shelf life of 180 days from packaging.

4. Dahi Cup: Patanjali Dahi is a simply delicious and gives you the taste of Home-made
curd without the hassles of setting curd at home. Our curd is prepared using the best
quality Cow milk and by maintaining standards and hygiene. Shelf life of 10 days.
* Dahi Cup: Available in 85 gm, 200 gm, 400 gm.
* Dahi Pouch: Available in 200 gm, 400 gm, 1 kg pouch

5. Plain Chach: Deliciously Refreshing product that makes you feel fresh in one go.
Available in 500 Ml. Shelf life of 48 hours from the date of packaging if kept under
refrigeration below 8 degree centigrade.

6. Masala Chach: Spiced buttermilk that refreshes you at one go. Available in 200 Ml
and 400 Ml.

7. Paneer: The most essential item used in daily life with rich taste and quality.
Available in 200 gm, 1 kg packaging.

Name: CLUN Cooperativa Rural Galega
Description:
CLUN es una cooperativa de segundo grado creada por las cooperativas gallegas Feiraco, Os Irmandiños y Melisanto. 
CLUN Cooperativa Lácteas Unidas nace con tres grandes objetivos estratégicos, que contribuyen a la sostenibilidad de la producción láctea gallega: 
- integración de los servicios técnicos financieros para alcanzar una mayor eficiencia de los costes de producción, 
- optimizar los suministros,
- agregar volumen para mejorar la cadena de valor y contribuir a su estructuración.
El nuevo grupo cuenta con las marcas de productos lácteos: CLESA, LECHE ÚNICLA, FEIRACO y SENSO.

Name: Productos Alimenticios El Recreo S.A.S
Description:
Trabajamos para entregarte alimentos  nutritivos y deliciosos de los mejores campos de Colombia.

 Bogotá  Zipaquirá  Villavicencio

Name: PT ABC Kogen Dairy
Description:
ABC Group and Mitsui & Co., one of the largest investment companies in Japan, set up a joint venture that produces quality milk and formed PT. ABC Kogen Dairy.

Achieving a high standard of quality and freshness is determined by the manufacturing process and packaging format. We are one of the first dairy company’s in the world with the capability to aseptically fill our products into UV protected bottles to guarantee it’s quality and freshness.

Name: Molkerei Gropper GmbH & Co. KG
Description:
Tradition im Herzen – Zukunft im Blick

Unser Herz schlägt für Handelsmarken. Wir produzieren Milchprodukte, Direktsäfte, Smoothies und Mineralwasser für unsere Kunden in ganz Europa. Als Ideenmolkerei und starker Partner begeistern wir seit 1929 und stehen heute als Impulsgeber in der Lebensmittelindustrie für Qualität und Innovation. Wertschätzung, Ehrlichkeit und Verlässlichkeit prägen unsere Beziehung zu unseren internen und externen Kunden.

Als kreative Köpfe und Macher sind unsere Mitarbeiter ein wertvoller Teil der Gropper-Familie und die Basis unseres gemeinsamen Erfolges. Wenn auch Sie sich voll und ganz einbringen und etwas bewegen wollen, sollten wir uns kennen lernen.

Denn bei Gropper eröffnen sich nicht nur Karrierechancen sondern echte Perspektiven.

Name: La Sibila
Description:
LA CALIDAD ES UN LENGUAJE UNIVERSAL.

La Sibila es una empresa referente en el mercado global de alimentos deshidratados, con foco en el comercio de leches en polvo, derivados y fórmulas infantiles.
Perteneciente a Grupo Los Lazos, La Sibila ofrece servicios integrados para todo el mundo, que le permiten hacer una cadena de valor desde la materia prima al producto final:
- Diseño de producto
- Formulación de leches en polvo y fórmulas infantiles
- Diseño de Packaging
- Envasado y enlatado
- Análisis y testeo en laboratorio interno
- Documentación lista para importación y exportación
- Trazabilidad total de nuestro producto

Su calidad está avalada por importantes Laboratorios Internacionales, bajo auditorías de los Gobiernos y las Empresas de Alimentos más importantes del mundo, convirtiéndose en la única empresa argentina aprobada para la producción de latas de fórmulas infantiles en China, un mercado gigante y de constante crecimiento.

Name: 3 Kaveria / 3 Friends
Description:
3 Friends is an ice cream company based in Helsinki. We believe that you don’t have to choose living life to the fullest and making conscious choices. It’s the inside that matters. We craft ice cream out of best, natural ingredients. We sell pint, cone and stick ice creams in Finland and in Sweden through multiple channels. We are the most recommended ice cream brand in Finland (2019-2024) and most recommended of all brands (2023) according to Taloustutkimus “Brändien arvostus” research. Our packaging has won Red Dot and The Dieline awards in 2019 and we have award-winning ice cream flavours such as:
•	Best vanilla ice cream *Aftonbladet 2023
•	Best vanilla ice cream *Helsingin Sanomat 2023
•	Best ice cream novelty *Liquorice cone at Svenska Dagbladet 2023
•	Best ice cream novelty *Toffee & Crunch stick at Svenska Dagbladet 2024
•	Best i test: best ice cream *Mudcake cone in Sweden’s best-i-test 2024
•	Best vegan ice cream of the year *Chocolate & Caramel Nut Sauce pint at VegeAwards 2018 and 2024
•	Best vegan ice cream of the year * Chocolate & Caramel Nut Sauce stick at VegeAwards 2023
 
Follow us @3kaveria

Name: Laticinios Santa Tereza
Description:
NOSSA EMPRESA
Há mais de 5 anos, Laticínio Santa Tereza, construiu uma história de muito trabalho e dedicação, produzindo alimentos com amor e qualidade. Produz uma diversa linha de produtos alimentícios,

Name: Franklin Foods, Part of the Hochland Group
Description: Since 1899, we've led the way in crafting the best tasting cream cheese. The secret of our success is that we’ve always placed our people and customers at the center of everything we do. From our creation of innovative brands and patented products to our best-in-class operations and commitment to sustainability, Franklin Foods is a great place to build a career.

Name: All Things Butter
Description: All Things Butter is an butter business founded by Toby Hopkinson & Thomas Straker.

Name: Gönenli Süt ve Süt Ürünleri
Description:
Gönenli Süt sektörde yılların getirdiği tecrübesi ve ürün portfolyosu ile müşterilerine yüksek kalite de fason süt ve süt ürünleri hizmeti vermektedir.
Uzun ömürlü ve günlük süt, aromalı süt, çeşitli peynir ürünleri, milkshake ve soft serve mixleri ürün portfolyosu ile geniş bir yelpazeye hizmet sunan Gönenli Süt için müşteri memnuniyeti ve başarısı en önemli performans kriteridir.

Name: Global Dairy Farmers
Description:
Global Dairy Farmers is the worldwide network of leading dairy farmers and industry partners.

GDF is a platform for leading dairy farmers, with a restricted number of non-competing companies, from all over the world to meet each other for the discussion of new strategies, as a reaction to new policy measures, legislation and market developments.

Our aim is to bring dairy farmers and related business partners in touch with each other to share knowledge and to provide the opportunities to create new network relations and business.

More information on www.globaldairyfarmers.com. 
We are registred as Cooperative Global Dairy Farmers U.A. 

 

GDF was founded in 2006 by president Bram Prins. The GDF Management team currently exists of:

Ad van Velde and Alfons Beldman - Presidents

Co Daatselaar - Treasurer

Lidy Brink - Manager

 

We wish to facilitate knowledge transfer between our members and partners and wish to have open discussions about dairy developments and strategies.

Most of our members are invited by the current GDF members, business partners or management team.

 

What kind of a network and group do we aim to be?

Mix of countries from all over the world
Mix of dairy farm models and sizes per country
A maximum of 5 members per country
Keep the group 'small' with a maximum of 100 members
 

 Profile of our members:
Open minded
Active; more activities besides farming
Innovative
Interested in international dairy farming
Fits into the existing group
Willing to share knowledge
Willing to travel the world to explore dairy farming

Name: LAITERIE LES FAYES
Description:
À la Laiterie les Fayes, c’est le goût qui l’emporte. 

Il n’est alors jamais question d’ajout de protéines, de conservateurs ou autres additifs qui viendraient perturber la qualité naturelle de notre lait. 
Tous nos produits sont ensuite fabriqués “dans les règles de l’art” pour obtenir des produits Premium, naturels et bons.

Name: Brownes Dairy
Description:
Brownes Dairy is Western Australia’s oldest, and most iconic dairy company. Established in 1886, we are a family household name, and have been in operation for over 133 years. 

Brownes Dairy was started by Edward Browne as a small dairy farm in what is now Shenton Park.

Today Brownes Dairy operates from its main site in Balcatta and owns a second site in Brunswick, collecting over 150 million litres of milk each year from over 50 dairy farms in WA’s South West.

With a diverse portfolio of delicious dairy and other products including white milk, cream, yoghurt, flavoured milk, juice and desserts, our innovation kitchen bustles with activity, working on what we can do next!

We have big hearts and prioritise quality in our products, safety in the workplace and the well-being of our employees. We’ve been doing what we do best for over 130 years, and we’ll keep going for a long time yet.

Name: Pelwatte Dairy Industries (Pvt.) Limited
Description:
Pelwatte Dairy Industries Ltd is a leading Company incorporated in Sri Lanka.  Its factory complex is located at Buttala in the Moneragala District.  Having set up in 2006 Pelwatte specializes in milk processing, animal feed and dairy products. The Company is owned by Mr. Ariyaseela Wickremanayake who is also the founder Chairman of Master Divers and Pelwatte Sugar industries Ltd.

Untitled-3With an investment of Rs.1.5 billion our factory was built for producing all kinds of dairy products viz liquid milk, milk powder, yoghurt, butter, ice cream and ghee with the objective of reducing the outflow of foreign exchange for importing milk powder from New Zealand and other countries. Presently Sri Lanka’s annual expenditure on milk imports is $300 million which translates to Rs.30 for every liter of milk that is imported.

Pelwatte Dairy Industries Ltd is a fast growing organization engaged in the manufacture and distribution of superior quality dairy products country-wide. Many growth areas have been identified and the Company is moving at a rapid pace to emerge as a force to reckon within the industry.

With the view of becoming self-sufficient in the input source of raw material to the project, we have ambitious plans of developing the dairy cattle husbandry primarily in the project surrounding area to organize and establish a continuous and trustworthy flow of quality raw materials to the factory.

We are the proud owners of a most modern dairy factory established under the Danish technology, which has the potential to produce vivid varieties of dairy products namely Full Cream Milk Powder, Non Fat Milk Powder, Yoghurt, Butter, Ice Cream, Sterilized plain and flavoured milk  and also cow Ghee.  In fact our dairy processing factory is the first largest factory of its magnitude in the island.  We are an ISO 22000: 2005 certified Company.

We aim at becoming the model of self sufficiency in milk production and allied milk based products in Sri Lanka and to stop the dependency on foreign countries for sourcing these products, a trend that we have been able to reverse successfully to some extent till now.

The Company is engaged in producing milk products of international quality and the flagship Pelwatte brand enjoys the complete confidence of customers who have been our source of strength and motivation.

Name: Them Andelsmejeri
Description:
Them Andelsmejeri producerer nogle af Danmarks bedste oste. Andelsmejeriet bygger på et stærkt fællesskab med solid lokal forankring og en historie, der går helt tilbage til 1888. Det har med andre ord været vores virke at lave velsmagende oste i mere end 130 år. Egentlig er det ret enkelt: Mælken skal være god. Den henter vi dagligt fra sunde køer, der trives på vores egne gårde. Resten handler om at være omhyggelig med håndværket. Som et lille andelsmejeri arbejder vi tæt sammen om at gøre det hele så godt, vi kan – med det fælles mål at lave oste, der ikke fås bedre. Og da vi ikke er et stort mejeri, er der aldrig langt fra tanke til handling. Virke- og udviklingslysten er stor på Them Andelsmejeri. Sammen tror vi på værdien af god gammeldags omhu og at gøre sit ypperste hele vejen fra arbejdet med dyrene, til ostene leveres til butikkerne. 

Vi er 13 landmænd, som ejer mejeriet, og alle vores gårde ligger i det smukke jyske søhøjland inden for en radius af 25 kilometer fra mejeriet. Seks af gårdene er økologiske, og vi er alle landmænd, som ved, hvordan vi får dyrene til at trives. Vi tager dyrevelfærd, bæredygtighed og klimaudfordringerne alvorligt. Derfor er vi blandt andet også ved at søsætte en klimahandlingsplan for både mejeriet og gårdene. Vi producerer både gule oste (Danbo) og en lang række special- og premium-oste – og mange af dem udvikler vi med vores helt egne unikke ostekulturer. Af vores mest kendte oste kan nævnes; Fætter Kras, Rød Krystal, Gudenå Gylden og Gran.

Har du spørgsmål eller ønsker du mere information, så kontakt os endelig på:
info@them-andelsmejeri.dk
Tlf: +45 86 84 73 88
Web: www.them-andelsmejeri.dk

Name: L'Antica Cascina | Dairy
Description:
L'Antica Cascina is a family-owned cheese company based in Forlì, Italy. Founded in 1960, we are leaders in the production of pecorino cheese, including Scoparolo, Squacquerone, and Ricotta. We are also the largest producer of Formaggio di Fossa di Sogliano DOP, a unique and flavorful cheese that has aged in underground caves for three months.

Our commitment to quality is evident in every step of our production process. We use only fresh, local milk from grass-fed sheep. Our cheeses are made with traditional methods and aged in a variety of environments to achieve the perfect flavor and texture.

We are dedicated to meeting the needs of our customers, both domestically and internationally. Our state-of-the-art facilities and efficient operations allow us to provide a consistent supply of high-quality cheese to supermarkets, restaurants, hotels, and catering companies.

Our commitment to craftsmanship is evident in our careful attention to detail and constant innovation. Every single product in our line is the result of careful research and development with the aim of achieving the highest quality standard in the market

Every product has its own essence as it's crafted using traditional artisanal methods. Antica Cascina’s success is the result of providing an authentically handcrafted product to the market. We achieve this without relying on industrial methods, all the while meeting the substantial demands of both the domestic Italian and international markets.

Our  BRC certification ensures that our products meet the highest international standards of safety and quality.

We are proud to be a leader in the cheese industry, and we are committed to providing our customers with the finest quality products.

If you're a cheese distributor, importer, or procurement professional, contact us for additional insights into our esteemed cheese selection.

Name: Intermountain Milk Processors Association (IMPA)
Description:
Idaho Milk Processors Association (IMPA) was founded in 1927 as a non-profit organization designed to promote the Idaho dairy industry. In 2019, the organizational bylaws were re-written to include Utah to make this body regionally focused. The formal mission of the association is three-fold: 
- To advance the regional dairy industry and to cooperate with all organizations that work for the advancement and development of the dairy industry.
- To hold annual conventions for the discussion of subjects relative to the processing of milk and milk products and to act in unison in matters affecting the welfare of all dairy interests.
- The Membership of IMPA is composed of such persons, firms or corporations engaged in the processing, distribution or inspection of milk, cheese, ice cream or any other dairy products in Idaho.

Associate Members include persons, firms, corporations and institutions engaged in the sale and distribution to Members of supplies, equipment, intellectual property and other related materials.

Together, IMPA members and associate members are united in advocating the responsible growth and development of a sustainable regional dairy industry.
