To provide you even better version and healthier iterations of milk and milk products, KIRPA RAM DAIRY PRIVATE LIMITED was established in year 2007 and has since then, achieved somewhat of a cult following and reputation for its milk and milk products, that are a go-to choice of clients owing to their premium quality and excellent taste. Based in Ghaziabad region of Uttar Pradesh, India with a experience of over 50 years and 4th generation in the industry. We have excelled at providing the world-class dairy products such as Ghee, Butter, Frozen Cream and Milk Powder’s to name a few and aim to persist doing so, in order to establish ourselves as industry leaders in the foreseeable future. We also believe in supplying quality products and building healthy business relationships with our valued clients.

Our aim is to expand multiple range of Value added products of Milk and make our all products available in every corner of country. That means wherever you say healthy Choice, Liladhar and Daily Health comes into your first choice!

Name: William H. Miner Agricultural Research Institute
Description:
Located in New York's fertile Champlain Valley, The William H. Miner Agricultural Research Institute is the present-day manifestation of the philosophy and principles once embodied in Heart's Delight Farm. Since its creation in 1951, the principal function has been, and continues to be, the economic improvement of agricultural operations through research, education, and demonstration.

Miner Institute conducts research programs that apply basic science to contemporary problems confronting the dairy and equine industries. Our areas of focus include the crop-animal-environment interface, cow comfort and behavior, and equine reproductive management.

Miner Institute delivers outstanding educational programs designed to train students to return to the dairy and equine industries in decision-making roles. Our continuing education programs disseminate practical animal-crop system information to producers and allied industry to enhance the future sustainability of dairy and equine production systems.

Utilizing both the onsite Holstein dairy farm and our Morgan horse herd, Miner Institute demonstrates the latest innovations in crop and dairy/equine production so that regional producers and allied industry may understand the on-farm application of new technologies.

Name: Novades BV
Description:
Novades is a partner for food producers that can no longer sell their products in the regular market. These often concern unmarketable batches of goods, for which demand has dropped. Novades creates a new destination for these by turning them into semi-finished products for feed application, and then delivers them directly to their final destination. 

Thanks to the innovative methods used by Novades, producers can realise maximum profit for their downgrades in a sustainable and transparent way. To achieve the best results, Novades cooperates with a team of nutritionists; laboratories, producers and logistics service providers.

Name: Laticínios D'annita
Description:
O Laticínios D'annita nasceu de uma história familiar de muito trabalho e experiência. O fundador Sr. José Resende, tradicional queijeiro do sul de Minas, um mestre na fabricação de queijos finos, acumulou por quase seis décadas profundos conhecimentos na produção de queijos artesanais, que garantem um sabor só comparado aos mais tradicionais laticínios do país.

Atualmente sob nova gestão, sem perder a qualidade e tradição, o Laticínios D'annita se consolida como uma empresa sólida e bastante atuante no mercado nacional que busca cada vez mais conquistar novos mercados com seus queijos diferenciados.

Sua cartela de produtos conta hoje com cinco tipo de queijos: o gouda, minas padrão, prato cobocó, tilsit e o premiado gorgonzola, eleito por seis anos consecutivos um dos três melhores do Brasil no Concurso Nacional de Produtos Lácteos.

Com toda estrutura da produção situada no município de Lavras, em Minas Gerais, junto à rodovia Fernão Dias, o Laticínios D'annita está em uma localização privilegiada, para atender as demandas das principais capitais da região Sudeste: Rio de Janeiro, São Paulo e Belo Horizonte.

Atualmente sua área de abrangência em vendas se estende para o todos os estados das regiões sul e sudeste, além de Goiás e Distrito Federal na região centro oeste, Bahia e Pernambuco na região nordeste e Amazonas na região norte.

Missão
Produzir queijos de qualidade para o mercado nacional.

Visão
Fornecer queijos de qualidade, com abrangência e destaque no mercado nacional.

Valores
Com ética, profissionalismo e acima de tudo responsabilidade, o Laticínios D’annita produz queijos de qualidade dando continuidade a uma história familiar de muito trabalho e reconhecimento, tudo isso aliado aos conceitos de sustentabilidade e preservação do meio ambiente.

Name: Alpenrose Dairy

In addition, BCZ-CBL participates constructively in the social debate on topics related to milk and dairy products, such as food safety, healthy food and sustainability.

Product analysis includes raw milk, processed milk, cream, yogurt, sour cream, ice cream and frozen yogurt.

Bentley Instruments’ mission and focus is to design, manufacture and support the most advanced dairy instrumentation in the world. We are an ISO 9001:2008 certified manufacturer.

Join us on our journey as we continue to innovate, collaborate, and deliver excellence in every product we manufacture.

#famigliafattoria

Name: Chello Dairy Products (Pvt) Ltd
Description:
The brand name of dairy products Chello was born in 1995, at Kompitiya, a very remote village in Rathnapura district. From the humble beginning as a small-scale domestic enterprise, Chello has become one of the most respected and trusted brands of dairy products of Sri Lanka today.

The founder of Chello, Mr Kapila Ruwan Bandara, a very young and enthusiastic businessman would have never believed in 1995, that he was starting to write a new chapter in Sri Lanka’s business history when he started his business journey setting up a small scale ice lolly plant.

For a period more than 5 years Chello had to experience huge difficulties and hardships. With the help of his family members, the young entrepreneur was able to boost his business and within a decade the demand of Chello products outstripped manufacturing capacity. The company thereafter decided to switch on to mechanized manufacturing with a very hygienic quality and in 2002 its first mass production facility was moved to a more spacious location where resides to date.

t the dawn of 21st century the young entrepreneur, who was only 26 years old, started to expand the production and distribution in a mass scale to meet the need of the dairy market in Sri lanka. “Give the consumer superior taste with best quality at an affordable price” was the vision of young founder chairman Mr. Kapila Ruwan Bandara, what differentiates Chello from the others is its policy of using best quality ingredients and advanced processes with no compromises to ensure superiority in products that are delivered to the consumer.

Now the Chello has reached to its peak furnishing with job facilities for more than 300 employees under the flag of Chello and the brand of Chello is not only a symbol of dairy products in Sri Lanka, but is an essential part of the business of this country.

Name: Skotidakis
Description:
Located in St. Eugene, Ontario, Canada, SKOTIDAKIS is all about excellence. In our 100,000 square feet production facility, we use fresh quality milk to craft the finest cheeses and dairy products available.

Founder Peter Skotidakis purchased the farm in 1975, pursuing his dream to create and distribute his own version of traditional Greek feta cheese. Although his herd was initially comprised of only 20 goats, this ambitious entrepreneur was destined for greater things.

He first introduced his feta and yogurt to local markets and restaurants in Montreal. His products were a success and the demand for it quickly skyrocketed. As SKOTIDAKIS products popularity increased, so did the size of his modest herd: currently, there are more than 3000 goats on the 1,500 acre SKOTIDAKIS farm.

Today, the SKOTIDAKIS team is composed of skilled and passionate workers, dedicated to developing new products and expanding the company's distribution network. Most importantly, SKOTIDAKIS remains faithful to it's roots: the ambitious spirit of our founder leads the way in breaking new ground, all the while preserving the authentic family values that make us unique.

We pride ourselves in offering authentic, fresh dairy products across Canada and various parts of the United States. Innovation is a major part of our company philosophy. In recent years, we have expanded our retail product line to include Greek yogurts, cheeses and a variety of yogurt-based dips. We also cater to the food service industry, providing quality, industrial size products to restaurants, manufacturers and distributors.

Name: Produtos Viçosa
Description: Laticínios escola, produtor do Doce de Leite Viçosa, eleito 10 vezes o melhor do Brasil.

Name: Laticínio Oro Bianco - Produtos de Búfala
Description:
É no alto da montanha, em meio ao belo Vale do Paraíba, que o Laticínio Oro Bianco produz os mais saborosos produtos 100% leite de búfala. 

A produção está localizada na propriedade da família Riess na cidade de Guaratinguetá, interior de São Paulo.

A inspiração para o projeto do Laticínio Oro Bianco surgiu de uma velha paixão da família Riess pela criação de búfalas e seu mais nobre produto, a Mozzarella. 

Para atingir a excelente qualidade de seus produtos, Simon Riess, filho mais novo e atual administrador do laticínio, foi até o velho continente se especializar com conceituados mestres queijeiros da Itália e Alemanha. Grande parte de seu conhecimento foi adquirido em longos períodos de estudos e estágios práticos realizados na cidade de Batipaglia, província de Salermo, região de origem da Mozzarella di Bufala. 
Enquanto Simon se especializava na arte de fazer queijo, seu irmão Stefan, que é advogado, estruturava a empresa legalmente e o pai cuidava da construção do espaço que hoje ocupa a produção do Laticínio. 

Finalmente a Oro Bianco iniciou suas operações em meados de 2012, unindo a tecnologia de modernos equipamentos importados da Itália com as tradicionais técnicas da produção artesanal. Todo processo de produção é acompanhado por profissionais qualificados que garantem desde a saúde da criação própria de búfalas, a qualidade da principal matéria prima, o leite, até o produto final. 

O compromisso do Laticínio Oro Bianco é oferecer produtos de qualidade impar aos seus consumidores e atendê-los de forma transparente e responsável. 

O carinho e dedicação do trabalho em família proporcionam aos consumidores a experiência de saborear produtos sempre frescos e de sabor intenso, produzidos com 100% de leite de búfala.

Name: Osam
Description: Osam is an honest effort made by a team of young, energetic professional entrepreneurs to provide high quality dairy products to our consumers.

Name: den Eelder
Description: Den Eelder is een van de weinige overgebleven zuivelboerderijen uit Nederland Al decennia lang runt familie van der Schans boerderij “den Eelder”. Ons bedrijf is gelegen in de groene omgeving van Well in de Bommelerwaard. De rivierkleigrond, waar van oudsher gras wordt geteeld, is nog steeds de basis van onze boerderij. Maar… den Eelder is meer dan alleen een boerderij. In de zuivelproductieruimte, gelegen direct naast de stal, wordt de dagelijks verse melk verwerkt tot een groot assortiment van dagverse boerderijzuivelproducten. Het gehele “productieproces”; van het gras in de wei tot en met de zuivelproducten in de verpakking, vindt dagelijks op den Eelder plaats. Verser kan het niet.

Name: Vierra Dairy Farms
Description: In 1967, Tony and Angie Vierra embarked on a humble journey, tending to a mere trio of cherished cows named Enos, Snookums, and Topsy, on their dairy farm nestled in the small central valley town of Hilmar, California. What started as a modest endeavor has flourished into a testament of passion and dedication, evolving into an innovative milk producer renowned globally. Today, their thriving enterprise boasts a herd of 5000 cows housed in state-of-the-art facilities.

Name: Fruitière de Domessin - AGROMOUSQUETAIRES
Description:
Agromousquetaires est le pôle industriel du Groupement Les Mousquetaires, premier fabricant de marques de distributeurs en France. C'est avant tout 11 000 femmes et hommes regroupés au sein de 70 sites industriels et logistiques, dont une cinquantaine d’usines, répartis en 6 pôles de performance.

Issue de la filière lait et créée en 1905, la Fruitière de Domessin est située en Rhône-Alpes et sa production est dédiée à la fabrication de fromages à pâte pressée non cuite. La société possède une unité de fabrication à Domessin en Savoie et un atelier d’affinage à Panissage en Isère.

Name: Maison Le Gall
Description:
Maison Le GALL, crémerie de tradition depuis 1923.  

Depuis un siècle, la laiterie Le Gall est basée à Quimper, en plein cœur de la Cornouaille. Elle est spécialisée dans la fabrication de produits crémiers de tradition : beurre, lait et crème fraîche. Les 50 salariés œuvrent au quotidien par amour du travail bien fait et la volonté de cultiver l’excellence de savoir-faire authentiques. 

La laiterie Le Gall, poursuit un développement dans les grandes enseignes de distribution, mais aussi dans la restauration pour les professionnels des métiers de bouche au national et à l’export. 

Depuis 1998, Le Gall a rejoint le groupe SILL Entreprises, fondé et dirigé par les familles Léon et Falc’hun.

Venez découvrir notre histoire et nos produits dès maintenant sur : https://www.laiterie-legall.fr/

Name: Damdaran.ir
Description: Thirty two years ago, in the spring of 1984 our business entity began in northern Tehran. First, we produced a variety of cow and sheep milk yogurt and raw and pasteurized milk and consequently buttermilk,traditional ice cream, yogurt, butter and cheese were added. Due to the natural quality ,our products were sold out within the first hours.After a few years we established the livestock in Shahriar producing raw milk and finally our dairy farm was founded in Haft joy village in 1999. Currently Damdaran Brand Holding includes mills and packaging pasteurized and dairy products and drinks. Our motivation and goal of entering the industry was producing healthy and varied dairy products that caused entrepreneurship and employment. Honesty and integrity are the main causes of our success in producing products that are daily needs of the people. The importance of this trade and industry is mentioned in holy scriptures by God and His prophets. Milk is named as celestial food and it includes its derivatives. The name of the company (Teen) is also derived from a sura of the Qur'an which is about the light and blessings of God. Damdaran Holding is an independent complex producing raw milk, pasteurized and sterilized dairy products and containers. Miami, Sahar,Jahan Saleh and Pars Sun companies belong to this holding.

Name: Leben Süt
Description: Şirketimiz 2000 yılında kurulmuş olmasına rağmen tarihçesi 1977 yılına kadar gitmektedir. Dedemiz Merhum Abdurrezzak Dolar’ın 35 yılı aşkın gıda sektörü tecrübesinden aldığımız ilhamla 200 m2’lik mütevazı bir üretim tesisi ile başladığımız süt ürünleri imalatımız bugün 7000 m2’lik entegre tesisimizde 12 ay devam etmektedir. Şirketimiz profesyonel kadrosu çok uzun yıllardır gıda üretim sektöründe çalışmakta olup ürünlerimizin tamamı gıda mühendisi ve gıda teknikeri gözetim - denetiminde en son teknolojiye sahip makine ve ekipmanları ile el değmeden üretilmektedir. Çok sayıda bölge insanımıza iş imkânı sağladığımız firmamızın en büyük gayesi onlarca tedarikçinin binlerce köylümüzden topladıkları bölgemizin tabii sütünü en kaliteli bir şekilde mamûl hale getirerek müşterilerimizin sağlıklı beslenmeleri için ve damak zevklerine en uygun şekilde sunmaktır. Bu gayemizin sadece söylemde kalmaması için Tarım ve Köy İşleri Bakanlığı Ürün Üretim İzinlerinin yanında ISO gibi ulusal, HACCP gibi uluslararası kalite standartları belgeleriyle kalitemizi uluslararası olarak tescillemiş bulunmaktayız. 2020 2021 ,2022  ve 2023 yıllarında GİB verilerine göre  sektörümüzde bölgemizin en çok net satış yapan firması unvanına sahip olabilmenin haklı gururunu taşımakta ve hedeflerimize adım adım ilerlemekteyiz.

Name: Lekkerkerker Group
Description:
The Lekkerkerker Group is operating in the field of dairy equipment and cream cheese production. Our family business, based in Lopik in the Green Heart of the Netherlands, was founded by Kees Lekkerkerker in 1977. Today, the next generation, brother and sister Niels and Mariska Lekkerkerker, are sharing his passion for dairy and continuing the business. 

The group consists of:
* Lekkerkerker Food; it's primary focus is the production of cream cheese products. As a b2b manufacturer it produces both private label brands as it's own brand Lebo Kaas for the professional cream cheese user in the foodservice and industry market. In retail Lekkerkerker Food has several products to offer for the ultra fresh deli counter.

* Lekkerkerker Equipment; specialised in dairy and food equipment Lekkerkerker Dairy & Food Equipment is the first choice in second life. For over 30 years Lekkerkerker gives A-brand dairy machines a second life, so that they can last for years to come. In this way we contribute to a circular economy. We are specialised in filling and packaging machines & various processing machines for butter, margarine, cheese, processed cheese and cream cheese, yoghurt and (UHT) milk.

Our platform is a hub for innovation, learning, and collaboration—empowering students, professionals, researchers, and enthusiasts to drive meaningful change in the dairy industry.

Name: Caseificio Tonon
Description:
The history of Caseificio Tonon began in the early 1960s, when Tarcisio Tonon collected milk from the farmers and delivered it to the Neapolitan dairyman Federico Ammaturo, who came to the North to produce mozzarella for the first pizzerias established in the nearby city of Treviso.

It is the same dairyman who taught the art of making mozzarella to Tarcisio Tonon, before giving him the tiny dairy farm in Quinto di Treviso, in the early 1970s. The passion for good things has accompanied the history of our company, which is also the story of a family.

In 1979 Caseificio Tonon expanded, moving to the current headquarters in Zero Branco, where it laid the foundations for constant development over the years, and led it to the employment of around 50 people now.

At the beginning of the 1980s, the use of IQF deep-freezing began to be applied, and was used for the first time in Italy to mozzarella from Caseificio Tonon; this allowed to reach foreign markets with a product of Italian food excellence.

In 1995 came the certification for the production of mozzarella with milk from organic farming, which today concerns exclusively the “latte fieno" produced in the mountains of Lessinia (VR), while in 2006 the Caseificio obtained the ISO 22000 certification (now FSSC 22000) for food safety.

Today the company is recognized as a producer of high quality mozzarella in various formats for catering, food processing and food industry, exporting 50% of production to European and international markets.

Name: ABS Italia
Description:
ABS Italia Srl, realtà leader nella genetica bovina e nei servizi di riproduzione artificiale, nasce nel 1993 a Cremona. Oltre alla vendita della genetica bovina, ABS Italia fornisce una molteplicità di servizi tecnici a supporto delle stalle italiane: dalla consulenza finanziaria alla presenza di tecnici specializzati per la fecondazione artificiale, dai piani di accoppiamento all’ottimizzazione delle performance della mandria. 

ABS Italia è una società del gruppo Genus, la più grande organizzazione di selezione genetica bovina su scala globale. Genus è presente con proprie unità in 20 paesi nel mondo (tra cui USA, Regno Unito, Brasile, Francia, Italia, Argentina, Russia) e con sedi associate in oltre 60 nazioni.

Genus possiede stalle di proprietà in numerosi paesi del mondo, i nostri centri ospitano più di 250 animali delle principali razze bovine, sia da carne che da latte, e altri 1600 sono attualmente in fase di valutazione.  
In queste stalle si raccolgono ogni anno circa 17 milioni di dosi, il seme viene congelato in contenitori di azoto liquido affinché possa essere conservato illimitatamente, trasferito e venduto in tutto il mondo.

Genus si differenzia dai propri competitor poiché dispone di un servizio di inseminazione artificiale su scala globale, con un network di figure professionali altamente qualificate e una rete di agenti indipendenti che operano sotto il marchio ABS. 

LAVORA CON NOI: siamo un team di talenti, le nostre persone provengono dai background più svariati. 
"Pionieri nel miglioramento genetico animale per nutrire il mondo": sulla base di questa vision promuoviamo la collaborazione tra le persone e incoraggiamo ciascuno a esprimere le proprie opinioni, nell’ottica di migliorare costantemente i nostri servizi.
Se pensi di avere le caratteristiche per entrare a far parte del nostro team, ti invitiamo a candidarti per una delle nostre posizioni aperte.

Name: LES PATISSIERS DE TOURAINE
Description:
Les Pâtissiers de Touraine sont les fabricants du gâteau et du soufflé St Amour, qui fait battre les cœurs. Depuis 1987, nous perpétuons la tradition de la pâtisserie française, en utilisant des ingrédients naturels, sans conservateurs, et en privilégiant l’approvisionnement régional. Notre gâteau en forme de cœur se décline en plusieurs variétés : citron, vanille et noix de coco, et se savoure à tout moment de la journée. Et ce n’est pas tout puisque depuis 2020 nous produisons les soufflés St Amour au goût intense et savoureux. Nous sommes présents dans toutes les enseignes françaises, au rayon fromages libre-service. 
Notre entreprise, située dans la vallée de l’Indre, à Pont-De-Ruan, compte une vingtaine de salariés, qui partagent les valeurs de savoir-faire, de qualité et de passion. Nous sommes également engagés pour le développement économique du territoire, et nous disposons d’une usine certifiée IFS niveau supérieur et BRC Grade AA. Rejoignez-nous sur LinkedIn pour découvrir notre histoire, nos actualités, nos événements, et pour échanger avec notre communauté. Les Pâtissiers de Touraine, c’est l’amour du gâteau !

Name: Omiros Dairies S.A.
Description:
OMIROS is a dairy products industry operating in Trikala, Thessaly. OMIROS was founded by the Giannitsi family in 1984 and was named after the Ancient Greek poet Homer (Omiros in Greek), who made the earliest reference to the
cheese we now call “FETA” in the text of his “Odyssey”.
According to the legend, Polyphemus the Cyclops became the first cheesemaker when he accidentally discovered that the milk he had been storing in sheepskin bags would clot and become edible. That is how the production of feta cheese began in Ancient Greece.
The family has been producing cheese products of exceptional taste and quality for five generations. The production of OMIROS products is based on traditional techniques of the local cheese makers, while the authenticity of their taste is hard to find these days.
In the 35 years of its operation, OMIROS dairy products industry has managed to surpass the limits of a small family business and follow a sustainable and successful growth path, securing a prominent and well-deserved position in
the dairy sector in Greece and abroad.

The milk zone department is responsible for the receiving of the milk and all the necessary actions to be done for its safe and in time collection. Annual quantity of incoming milk is 40,000 tonnes of sheep’s & goat’s milk and 7,000 tonnes of cow’s milk. Processing capability of 200 tonnes daily Milk transport fleet is 24 privately owned isolated milk tanker trucks. We are constantly improving our fleet with the latest technology and modern equipment in order to match our needs.

Omiros has become 100% export oriented in recent years, distributing its products to more than 20 countries in Europe, America and Australia and we are proud to announce that our second factory in Greece is up and running. Omiros guarantees that its high quality products meet all international legislative requirements at all stages, fromproduction to distribution. Fresh milk, collected daily from 2000 certified farms.

Name: Happy Cows Ltd.
Description:
If you are investors and looking for a place to invest your scarce capital look no further. First of all I would like to provide an outline of the project to help you understand the company and the market. Happy Cows Ltd. is a commercial organization and we are in the planning stages to build a mega dairy farm in Vietnam. The project is about to milk 1,000 cows in the first five years of operation, projected revenue is +2 million US annually. Initially we are planning to build the farm on a 60 to 300 hectare area in the Central Highlands region (named Lam Dong).

There is a huge demand for milk from cattle especially dairy cows in Vietnam currently. The market gap is roughly 75% and the profit margin is approximately 30% - 40%. We have discussed with milk processing companies (Vinamilk and Friesland Campina) I am quite happy to know they are willing to buy all the milk at an attractive price. Based on this realistic premise I think selling the milk is never a problem here in many decades to come.

The tradition stayed in the family until 1987 when Gwynfor and Thelma Adams (Carwyn's parents) rekindled the family tradition in response to milk quotas, and Caws Cenarth Cheese was born!

The cheese are crafted on their farm, in Glyneithinog, in the lovely and lush valley of the river Cych in West Wales with fresh organic milk sourced from local farms.

Caws Cenarth cheeses are multi-award winning.  We are also the proud producers of Thelma's Original Welsh Caerffili which has the coveted PGI status.

Name: Menken Zuivel
Description:
Alles begint met melk. Ook ons verhaal.
Wij zijn de vierde generatie Menken en wij geloven niet in massaproductie maar in verse boerderijzuivel. Daarom brengen wij weer echte kwaliteit op de markt. Zonder gedoe, rechtstreeks van de koe.

Menken was ooit de grootste particuliere melkfabriek van Nederland. En rond die fabriek zijn wij opgegroeid, liggen onze roots en is onze liefde voor zuivel ontstaan. Na even weg te zijn geweest zijn we weer terug! Terug om mensen weer kennis te laten maken met écht lekkere zuivel.

We werken met één boer: Ad. En onze Ad melkt de koeien, verwerkt 20 meter verderop de zuivel op zijn boerderij en levert deze rechtstreeks aan de supermarkt. Vers en zonder toegevoegde nonsens. Dat is niet alleen duurzaam maar ook veel lekkerder.

Ten slotte, Menken is meer dan melk. Menken verwelkomt je in de familie!

Name: AgVerse Technology Pvt. Ltd.
Description:
Livestock is an integral part of agricultural economy. It contributes to approx 27% of agriculture GVA and is much less dependent on climate, weather, etc. Of the 12 crore farmers, 9.6 crore indulge in livestock. Approximately 70% of livestock is controlled by small farmers for whom livestock is the only earning asset.

Thus Livestock farming has the potential to contribute in truly doubling of farmer’s income.

At Agverse we are reshaping the livestock farming by deploying the best of the technologies in the most simple and effective ways. We believe that the right mix of technologies can bring out efficient manifestation of the four pillars of dairy – Feeding, Breeding, Weeding and Heeding.

Name: Superior Animal Genetics
Description:
Over the last few decades artificial insemination (AI) has been instrumental in increasing milk yield, and thereby farmers’ income in the country. One of the signature benefits of AI is that this method that has the potential of rapid dissemination of elite male genetic material over a large geographical area. Even though AI is very powerful and useful technique for increasing the productivity of indigenous animals, the backbone for an effective AI program is the quality of the semen available.
As more and more farmers are adopting AI the demand for quality semen has grown exponentially and this has resulted in many semen stations, both government and private parties, cropping up throughout the country. Even though the semen station numbers have increased, farmers have no assurance of the quality of semen received from these stations. Also many providers have exorbitantly priced high genetic merit bull semen which most farmers cannot afford. Presently many semen stations cater only to select parts of the country leaving majority of the farmers high and dry. In light of this NDDB-DS with its deep rooted commitment to provide affordable high quality genetics to the dairy farmers, decided to set up a brand called Superior Animal Genetics (SAGTM).
SAG comprises of some of the best A-graded semen stations in the country that are located in key strategic areas enabling us to serve farmers throughout the length and breadth of the country.
 
What sets SAG apart from the rest is our-
•   Unwavering commitment to quality
•   Best genetics at affordable rates
•   Constant strive to improve and bring in latest technology
•   Quality Assurance to our customers
These factors have helped us become the top selling and also the most revered semen brand in the country.

Description:
MEVGAL USA, a subsidiary of MEVGAL S.A.(a third generation family owned and operated business), is the sole importer of authentic Greek MEVGAL dairy products in America. We are fortunate to be able to share with you our traditions of Mediterranean heritage and cuisine, and are pleased to present to you our finest cheeses made out of fresh Greek milk. 

MEVGAL is the largest dairy company of Northern Greece and the third largest producer of fresh dairy products in the country.

MEVGAL produces and sells:

Fresh pasteurized milk
Traditional and Western Style Yogurt
Cheese Products
Desserts, rice puddings, gelatin deserts and milk creams
Cholesterol-free dairy products
Natural juices

Since 1950 MEVGAL has been active in Macedonia-Greece, the heartland of fresh milk, where 67% of Greece’s fresh milk is being produced. With more than 1600 farms located close to MEVGAL facilities, meeting the national demand for high-quality milk is, therefore, guaranteed. The proximity to the farms ensures the fast delivery of the fresh milk to MEVGAL’s plant, the immediate processing and the freshness of the final product.

As a result of its excellent fresh raw milk, state-of-the-art technology applied in the production lines (HACCP system, ISO/BRC/GMO certifications), well-organized sales channel and experienced personnel, MEVGAL is distributing its products through more than 22,000 small and large points of sale in Greece while at the same time exports to 25 countries around the world.

Name: Raw Milk Company B.V.
Description:
Wil jij ook de allerbeste gefermenteerde zuivel?

Die gemaakt is van rauwe biologische melk, van koeien die gras gevoerd zijn en geen antibiotica hebben gekregen? Dan ben je bij Raw Milk Company aan het juiste adres!
Wij verhitten onze melk niet, maar fermenteren het. Dankzij fermentatie wordt rauwe melk veilig voor consumptie. Onze zuivel is daarom geschikt voor iedereen, ook voor baby's, zwangere vrouwen en ouderen.

Onze unieke Rauw Power zuivel is romig en mild van smaak en bevat nog alle essentiële voedingsstoffen die van nature in rauwe melk zitten. Rauw Power is zuivel zoals Moeder Natuur het bedoeld heeft.

De biologische melk die we gebruiken om onze rauwmelkse zuivelproducten te maken, halen wij op bij onze vaste leveranciers in Denekamp en De Lutte (Noordoost Twente, in de provincie Overijssel). Hun boerderijen liggen op een steenworp afstand van ons familiebedrijf. De koeien worden twee keer per dag gemolken, en hun melk gaat direct onze transporttank in. De melk is nog warm als ze door ons wordt verwerkt. Verser dan vers dus, met weinig vervoerskilometers. En de productie van onze zuivel gebeurt ook nog eens in een nagenoeg energieneutraal pand.

Name: Laticínios Paiolzinho
Description:
ONDE TUDO COMEÇOU: Em uma região do Sul de Minas, com terroir e clima ideais para a produção de queijos, um sítio onde existia um paiolzinho deu origem a empresa e a marca que hoje são sinônimos de qualidade.

QUEM SOMOS: Fazer queijos vai muito além da mistura de ingredientes ou o tempo de maturação, é um processo tão criterioso que parece alquimia, arte e poesia, ambos unidos em um só. Com a singularidade de um terroir único e o vínculo histórico de uma tradição familiar, o Laticínios Paiolzinho produz diariamente produtos com uma identidade única, que se refletem em um altíssimo padrão de qualidade.

NOSSA HISTÓRIA: Em 1997, na cidade de Cruzília/MG, nasce o Laticínios Paiolzinho, fruto do espírito empreendedor do casal Paulo Sérgio e Darlene Nogueira. O amor e a experiência na produção de alimentos já vinham de família. Paulo Roberto Nogueira, pai de Paulo Sérgio trabalhou mais de 30 anos em uma multinacional de alimentos e serviu de apoio e inspiração para que o Laticínios Paiolzinho se desenvolvesse, sempre buscando qualidade, aprimoramento nos produtos e diversificação. O resultado disso é uma linha de produtos completa e diversos prêmios em concursos nacionais.

Name: SKVL Organic World Inc
Description:
At SKVL Farm, we ensure our Desi Gir A2 cows thrive in a compassionate and nurturing environment, where they have the freedom to graze on nothing but organic grass and receive care throughout their entire lives, regardless of their milk-producing capability. Our dedication to offering 100% organic, fresh products stems from a deep-seated belief in achieving wellness by aligning with the natural rhythms of the earth. Through the application of age-old Ayurvedic principles, we strive to offer sustainable answers to today's health concerns, prioritizing prevention and the holistic well-being of our community.

Our products, from Gir A2 cow milk to Vedic-inspired foods, are crafted following age-old recipes and methods, ensuring they meet your body unique needs. We're dedicated to rural development, women empowerment, and fostering a community that values knowledge sharing and holistic health.

Our Farm Benefits:

Free Grazing Cows: Our cows enjoy a natural habitat, grazing freely on organic pastures.

Lifelong Care: Every cow stays at our farm for their entire life, reflecting our commitment to cruelty-free farming.

Support for Organic Farming: We advocate for and practice organic farming, contributing to a healthier planet and populace.

Our dedication goes far beyond merely creating premium food products. We are focused on enhancing food quality and driving the evolution of knowledge for the next generation of food and health services. By nurturing a culture of collaboration and exchange, we actively promote the sharing of insights and learning within our community, fostering an environment where ideas flourish and collective growth is encouraged

At SKVL-Organic we are not just a farm; we are a movement towards a healthier, more sustainable future, grounded in the wisdom of Ayurveda and the richness of nature. Join us on this journey to health and harmony.

Name: KOLIBA, a.s.
Description:
Hriňovská mliekareň KOLIBA vznikla v roku 1993 ako súkromná spoločnosť zameraná na spracovanie mlieka prevažne z Podpoľania. V súčasnosti je Koliba moderným spracovateľom mlieka so zameraním na výrobu polotvrdých zrejúcich syrov a tradičného masla. Od roku 2004  je v hriňovskej mliekarni zavedený systém kontroly kvality výroby HACCP. Manažment mliekarne  je zameraný na bezpečnosť a kvalitu výroby, čoho dôkazom sú i získané certifikáty ISO 9001:2008 a ISO22000:2005.

Najrozšírenejším a najznámejším produktom mliekarne je Hriňovská tehla, polotvrdý zrejúci syr Eidam údený aj neúdený, tradičné maslo aj nátierka s čiastkovo zastúpeným rastlinným tukom známa ako Maslová chuť. 

Od roku 2015 spracováva spoločnosť KOLIBA srvátku na ďalšiu výrobu sušených výrobkov - laktózy, sušeného proteinu WPC a proteinových tyčiniek, 

Okrem slovenského trhu, môžete naše výrobky nájsť aj v Českej republike, v Maďarsku a v Rumunsku.

Filozofiou firmy je, aby sa kvalitné  mliečne výrobky dostali na každý stôl a stali sa neoddeliteľnou súčasťou výživy pre ľudí každého veku v súlade s krédom firmy: „Mliečna pohoda bez hraníc“.

Name: Hollandia Dairy, Inc.
Description:
Since 1950, family-owned and operated Hollandia Dairy has been producing, processing and distributing our award-winning, farm-fresh milk and nutritional dairy products to the families of Southern California.

While many will argue that “milk is milk,” the Hollandia way of doing business is the difference you can taste and see. We believe healthy, happy cows give the best milk, and we make sure to take extra special care of our spotted MVPs. This is how we’re able to ship out fresh and delicious dairy products every single day for you and your family to enjoy.

Name: Savoie Lactée
Description:
Toute une filière autour d'une technologie de pointe.
À l’initiative de l’Union des Producteurs de Beaufort (UPB), des hommes et des femmes se mobilisent pour pérenniser l’agriculture de montagne.
Nos produits, garantis origine France, sont tous issus d’une production fromagère savoyarde reconnue par des signes de qualité.
Une parfaite maîtrise de toutes les étapes de fabrication et un délai de transformation rapide pour préserver les qualités nutritionnelles des matières premières.
Unique en Europe : notre site produit plus d’énergie qu’il n’en consomme.
Accompagnement personnalisé pour chacune de vos demandes.

Nos produits:
Beurre de baratte : Riche en matières grasses, notre Beurre de Baratte est
reconnu pour être un beurre malléable qui ne « rend » pas d’eau quand on
l’incorpore dans les recettes.
La crème est obtenue par l’écrémage du lactosérum issu de la fabrication de nos deux fromages : Beaufort AOP et Tomme de Savoie IGP. Rapidement refroidie, elle est acheminée tous les 2 à 3 jours dans notre atelier où elle entre immédiatement dans le cycle de fabrication. La fréquence des acheminements et des critères de fabrication stricts garantissent la qualité de
notre Beurre de Baratte.

Poudre de Lactosérum WPC 80 : Le lactosérum provient de la fabrication de 2 fromages reconnus pour leurs qualités : le Beaufort AOP et la Tomme de Savoie IGP. Il s’agit d’un lactosérum doux, écrémé, concentré par ultrafiltration puis séché dans un tunnel de séchage. La poudre ainsi obtenue contient 80 % de protéines sur matière sèche. Ces protéines naturellement riches en acides aminés branchés sont très rapidement assimilées par l’organisme.

Name: Shameh shir Agro- industrial and Livestock Co.
Description: Shameh Shir Agro- industrial and Livestock Co. has built on a 60,000 square meters land; Shameh Shir Co. is located in Pishva, south of Tehran, the capital of Iran; Pishva is one of the animal husbandry industries centers of Iran. Shameh Shir Co. has been started producing milk dairies since 2021, using global standards, the optimal energy usage and skilled-full human forces in order to achieve sustainable production; this group has stablished a smart chain from the cultivation of animal feed and high-quality fodder, which is the primary source of high-quality products, and has continuously monitored expert forces in the field of animal husbandry, agriculture, food and laboratory industries in the livestock farms under it’s collection; also, by using the latest dairy production equipments from the most reliable brands in the world, Shameh Shir Co. has succeeded in producing all kinds of milk powder, butter, cream and other milk derivatives and presenting them to the domestic and international markets under Chaltafarm and Shiraland brands. The daily capacity of receiving 1250 tons of raw milk has placed this complex in the group of the largest dairy producers of the Middle East.

Name: Nilkanth Trading Company
Description:
Nilkanth Trading Company (NTC), a pioneering entity headquartered in Kadi, Gujarat, specializing in the manufacturing and supply of premium cattle feed raw materials. From Rice Bran and Rice Bran DOC to Cottonseed Cake and Cottonseed DOC, we offer a comprehensive range of feed ingredients, ensuring superior nutrition for livestock.

With a robust international presence spanning over 20 countries, including Bangladesh, Vietnam, Taiwan, and several Gulf countries, NTC is a trusted supplier of finished feed products worldwide. Our international operations have contributed to a turnover exceeding 2000 crores within just 20 years, reflecting our commitment to excellence and customer satisfaction.

Backed by a strong sales network, NTC maintains strategic partnerships with major dairy unions across Gujarat, including industry giants like AMUL, Banaskatha Dairy, and Mehsana Dairy. Our dedication to quality, reliability, and innovation has solidified our position as a leader in the cattle feed industry, both domestically and internationally.

Join us at NTC as we continue to revolutionize the livestock feed sector, delivering premium-quality products and unmatched service to customers around the globe.

Name: Richa Group International
Description:
The Richa family started out in the trading business three generations ago. With time, Richa Group’s ambition grew and so did their business. Carrying on with the founder’s legacy, a 3rd generation company was established in 2008. 
Over the years, the company became remarkable for its distinctive selection of products, and became the leader of imported, and recently local, cheese products in the Lebanese market, introducing premium quality cheeses including Mozzarella, Edam, Emmental, Cheddar, Kashkaval and Goudha.

Name: Valio Russia
Description:
ООО «Валио» – российское подразделение финского концерна Valio, ведущего производителя молочных продуктов в Финляндии. Направление деятельности компании в России –  производство и продажа продукции, изготовленной на единственном собственном заводе в Подмосковье и партнёрских предприятиях, а также импорт немолочной и безлактозной продукции из Финляндии на российский рынок.  

При производстве продукции под собственными брендами Valio во всех странах использует единые требования к качеству сырья, производственному процессу и потребительским свойствам готовой продукции и упаковки. Имя «Valio» на молочных продуктах в России является своеобразным знаком и гарантией качества. Уже более ста лет Valio работает в России, и целью номер один было и остается сохранение неизменного качества продукции и репутации компании. 

Основным объектом для инвестиций и развития компании в России является единственный собственный завод по производству плавленого сыра Viola (в «треугольниках» и в «ваннах») и нарезке сыров - филиал «Ершово» в Подмосковье,  который соответствует всем стандартам качества концерна.  

Продукция под брендом Valio – это натуральные молочные продукты, для производства которых используется лучшее молоко, которое отбирается на собственных или аттестованных по единым стандартам качества Valio хозяйствах. Компания уделяет повышенное внимание и потребительским свойствам готовой продукции – вкусу, удобству использования, упаковке. На сегодняшний день на партнерских производствах выпускаются молоко, сливки, творог, творожные десерты, творог с джемами, сметана,  масло, а также йогурты Valio Clean Label с цельными ягодами и питьевые йогурты с большим содержанием фруктов.

Valio также поставляет в Россию продукцию финского производства: уникальные безлактозные молочные продукты Valio Eila и немолочный ассортимент (соки, воду, морсы,  кисели).

Description:

Our “Milk Factory in a Box” enables farmers to pasteurize, transport and dispense milk directly to local customers, eliminating the single use of plastic and bypassing the big corporations. 

We only work with ethical farmers who are passionate about farming better, keep calves with their mothers and follow sustainable agricultural practices.

Name: Dairy Robotics
Description:
Welcome to Dairy Robotics! 

At Dairy Robotics, we are dedicated to revolutionizing the animal health industry with innovative solutions that enhance the well-being of our bovine companions. Our cutting-edge product specializes in identifying Cow Body Condition Scores (BCS) and Mobility Scores, enabling farmers to make informed decisions for the optimal care of their herds.

 Our Mission:
We are driven by a mission to promote the health and vitality of dairy cows, contributing to the sustainability of both farms and the dairy industry as a whole. By providing accurate and actionable insights, we empower farmers to prioritize animal welfare and maximize productivity.

 Future-Forward:
Anticipating the needs of the industry, we're excited to share that Dairy Robotics is committed to pushing the boundaries of innovation. Stay tuned for our upcoming robotic milking machine, poised to elevate efficiency and quality in dairy operations like never before.

Connect with us to stay updated on the latest advancements in animal health technology, and join us in reshaping the future of dairy farming. Let's embark on this journey together, where technology and compassion converge for healthier herds and thriving farms.

#DairyRobotics #AnimalHealth #InnovationInDairy

Name: Mistwood Farms Pvt Ltd
Description:
The idea is simple enough. We need fresh raw milk, just as we would get from our indigenous breed of cows, without it being preserved or processed. Such milk is rich, creamy and full of nutrients. We did have this milk long ago, and we got our own curd, butter and ghee. But where has it gone now? How do we get it now? With all the hustling and bustling that we go through each day, how indeed? That’s us right there! We do it! Every day, we bring that very elusive creamy milk right from the farms to your door step. No processing, no chemicals, just as natures gives us, we give to you.

THAT’S ABOUT US. LESS TALK, MORE MILK. GO ON, ASK FOR A SAMPLE NOW.

Name: Niryas Food Products Pvt. Ltd.
Description:
Niryas Food Products Private Limited is a dairy venture being promoted by Mr H.P Singh. He is a proficient Chartered accountant by profession and is well-versed with the nitty-gritties of Indian dairy business dynamisms.

In rural setups, food and agriculture business is the mainstay of people’s livelihood. Provision for finance and other extension services comes as a necessary pre-condition for growth and sustainability of the rural economy. Niryas’ very genesis has endeavoured to perceive the gap between the dairy farmers’ and end consumers’ expectations. By bridging the demand-supply gap in the dairy sector through the development of a sustainable partnership with the milk pourers on one side, and an efficient marketing and sales channel for our end consumers on the other, Niryas aims to offer extensive dairy services. 

Noticeably, many a times, the consumers are disappointed on not being able to arrange milk from their nearest outlets for reasons too many!!

But, now, you can be rest assured as Niryas has taken the full responsibility of making umpteen amount of milk and other milk products available to its consumers at all times. With an additional assurance of freshness, quality, taste and purity, you can count on Niryas Foods unremittingly. Our milk will be farm fresh, hygienic, tasty and pure without any powder reconstitutes! Niryas has stepped in with its Shudh (Pure), Ati Shudh (Purest) philosophy in order to bridge the existent demand-supply gap in the milk industry.

Our procurement of pure and hygienic milk from the farmers in villages, and maintenance of the freshness and taste of the milk through efficient cold chain, till it reaches the end consumers are a reflection of Niryas’motto. It aims to capture the taste buds of the consumers with pouched milk and Ghee besides many other value added products that will be available in the market soon.

Name: Lactalis Hungária
Description:
A világ legnagyobb tejipari vállalatcsoportja, a francia Lactalis Groupe, több mint 20 éve van jelen a magyar piacon.

Többek között olyan prémium márkák széles termékpalettájával, mint a Parmalat, a Président, a Leerdammer és a Galbani. A cégcsoport magyarországi leányvállalataként a Lactalis Hungária Budapesten található központja és a Tiszafüreden lévő gyár 210 főt foglalkoztat. A Tisza-tó környékének legnagyobb munkáltatója és nyerstej-felvásárlója, így a régió gazdaságának egyik motorja és a helyi közösség aktív támogatója. 

Vállalatunkat a folyamatos termelési és minőségi fejlődés jellemzi, melynek alapja motivált, felkészült csapatunk. Munkatársaink azon dolgoznak, hogy termékeink kifogástalan minőségben kerüljenek a vásárlók asztalára. Elkötelezettek vagyunk aziránt, hogy vállalatunk nap mint nap hozzájáruljon a fogyasztók egészségének és jóllétének megőrzéséhez tápláló tejtermékek – tej, sajt, joghurt, vaj és más tejipari termékek – gazdag kínálatával.

Name: Magic Valley Dairy Systems
Description: Magic Valley Dairy Systems is a reputable dairy service company in Southern Idaho. We provide services, supplies, and chemicals for dairies. Our experienced team offers installation, maintenance, and repairs for dairy systems. We assist in designing layouts, sourcing equipment, and implementing efficient milking and feeding systems. We also supply high-quality products such as milking machines, bulk tanks, and cooling systems. Our range includes top-notch chemicals for hygiene and animal health. With a customer-centric approach, we strive for excellence and build lasting relationships with our clients. Choose Magic Valley Dairy Systems for comprehensive dairy solutions.

Description:
The Master of Professional Studies in Dairy Products Technology is an innovative program designed to prepare students from technical disciplines for rewarding and lucrative careers in the large-scale dairy foods manufacturing industry. 

The program recruits students with critical thinking and analytical skills developed in previous work experience in physical sciences, engineering, military leadership, or other technical disciplines. Through the use of Cal Poly's learn by doing philosophy, students will develop the essential knowledge needed to transform their existing knowledge and experience into a successful and lucrative career in the international dairy foods industry.

Name: Vansun Technologies Pvt Ltd
Description: Vansun is a Turnkey Dairy Farm Solutions provider/manufacturer and has brought advanced dairy farm machines and computerized systems for the modern dairy farm. For more than a decade, Vansun has continued to provide cutting-edge solutions for Dairy Farmers. We have a top team of designers, fabricators, structural engineers & architects to plan small and large dairy farms on turnkey basis.

Description:
The most trustworthy professional platform of knowledge sharing.
The most valuable 3rd party cooperation platform. 
The most professional international consultancy group that worth the local government to cooperate with.
Improving quality, safety, productivity and sustainability is needed to bring the Chinese dairy sector to the next level and is a core priority of the Chinese government.

Name: Dalewood Fromage
Description:
Dalewood Fromage is an artisanal farmstead cheesery producing cheese from the ground up with the goal to handcraft. The source is Dalewood’s own Jersey milk which makes it a genuine ESTATE cheese. 

Dalewood’s unique recipes were formulated by Rob Visser who studied Dairy Technology. After years of experimenting, time in France sniffing out traditional cheese making secrets and countless cheese tastings the Wineland range was launched – inspired by the magic and romance of the surrounding vineyards.

The range of speciality cheese includes Brie, Camembert and Blue in different styles, shapes and sizes to suit any occasion. Last but not least are the Huguenot, Boland and Lanquedoc; uniquely Dalewood, uniquely South African.

Name: Ausnutria Australia
Description:
Ausnutria Dairy Corporation (Stock code: 1717.HK) is an international high-end dairy and nutrition products enterprise with an entire business chain of raw milk collection, R&D, production, and end-market sales. The Company’s global sales and service network cover the People’s Republic of China, Australia, North America, Europe, Russia, the Middle East, and beyond. Founded in September 2003, the Company was listed on the Stock Exchange of Hong Kong Limited in October 2009, spotlighted as the first Chinese infant formula company to list in Hong Kong.

In 2015, Ausnutria group announced its ‘Golden decade’ strategy, which led the group transferred from an infant milk formula company to a complete nutritional products and nutritional healthcare services company. As such, Australia plays the most important role to make this long-term strategy really happens. 

Accordingly, Ausnutria started its investment in Australia since 2016 by acquiring Nutrition Care Pharmaceuticals (NCP), Australian Dairy Park (ADP), Ozfarm, as well as establishing Australia Camel Dairy (ACD). Furthermore, Ausnutria Pty Ltd (APL) was established as the holding company to consolidate all Australia business entities, which enables APL a competitive, full range of dairy and nutritional health business portfolio to realize the ambitious strategic goals.

Name: Jolof Flavor
Description:
Chez Jolof Flavor, nous sommes passionnés par la création de produits laitiers délicieux et sains. Chaque produit est le résultat d’un processus minutieux de la sélection des ingrédients 100% naturels à la fabrication maîtrisée par une équipe formée à la technologie alimentaire et aux normes d’hygiène. Notre mission est de fournir des produits innovants de haute qualité, fabriqués avec amour et attention en valorisant les ressources du terroir.Nous avons ainsi formulé une gamme de yaourts bi couche “Nutri’Yourt” aux saveurs locales: au bouye (pulpe du fruit du baobab), bissap (calice d’hibiscus), papaye, mangue…. 

Alors, si vous aimez les produits naturels, sains et nutritifs, vous êtes à bon port

Name: BRUNELLI SUD S.p.A.
Description:
BRVNELLI, a Dairy Manufacturing Company established in Rome, Italy, in 1938.  
Since 1987, year of completion of the main manufacturing plant of the company, meant to be the largest sheep milk manufacturing plant in central Italy, and foundation of BRUNELLI SUD S.p.A., a partnership has been formed with the parent company R.BRUNELLI S.p.A., closely operating together in the Italian sheep's milk industry so far, sharing a common goal: to let consumers worldwide appreciate the delicate taste of cheeses branded BRVNELLI. 
As business core product, the PECORINO ROMANO DOP, made in the local area of Lazio, which gave birth to this typical Italian hard cheese from sheep's milk more than 2000 years ago.
As a unique place of seasoning there's Ancient  Natural Tufa Caves dating back to the Etruscan-Roman Time, cheese aging premises where the wheels of cheese, dry-salted only, still now as in the past are kept ripening 1 year minimum up to 18 months, to be respectful to Ancient Romans' cheese-making traditions.
 
BRVNELLI has been certified by the DET NORSKE VERITAS -DNV- International Organization for the highest standards of product quality, issueing the following certificates: ISO 9001, ISO 22000, BRC, IFS. 
Organic product lines are also worth mentioning within full assortment!

Name: Happy Cow Dairy
Description: Happy Cow Dairy is a fully fledged dairy manufacturer focused on producing a diverse portfolio of quality, value added dairy products. Our portfolio mainly consists of cheese and fermented milk products; distributed to leading retail and food service institutions nationwide and across East Africa.

Name: ELMEGA, S.L.
Description:
ELMEGA designs and manufactures machinery and special solutions for the large agro-livestock sector worldwide.

Our location in the heart of a region with a great agricultural tradition allows us to maintain permanent contact with the sector. Therefore, all our products take into account the real needs of farms. 

This location, together with our vast experience and qualification, allows us to design and manufacture truly efficient products for each situation, and guarantee the best installation and support service.

Extensive experience and the trust of farmers around the world guarantee the quality of our facilities and systems, supported by a consolidated and effective distribution and after-sales network.

In our industrial processes we incorporate state-of-the-art machinery in all its production areas and highly qualified personnel. A rigorous quality control, based on the ISO9001: 2015 standard, and the application of continuous improvement systems guarantee the more than 3,000 references we manufacture. 

Being attentive to every detail, striving every day to include improvements is our job. The close relationship we maintain with the sector in general and especially with our clients, makes us conceive our trade as a mission, in which both our workers and our suppliers and distributors are involved.

Name: Lebaan Dairy
Description:
Lebaan Dairy is an integrated milk and dairy product company. The company is engaged in the production of yoghurt and other dairy products. The current portfolio of products consists of most yoghurt and dairy related products such as, set yoghurt, curd, drinking yoghurt, ice-cream, flavored milk and by products such as ghee. The company sells its products under the retail brand of the same name ‘Lebaan Dairy’. The current retail plan is to distribute Lebaan Dairy island wide.

Lebaan Dairy has  a young and dynamic workforce, specializing in dairy production and manufacturing. Lebaan Dairy Pvt Ltd. maintains high standards of quality and it is of supreme importance to deliver high quality dairy products.

Name: Cooperativa de Laticínios Vale do Mucuri
Description:
A Cooperativa de Laticínios Vale do Mucuri - COOLVAM foi fundada no dia 27 (vinte e sete) de julho de 1947, por um grupo de 29 (vinte e nove) cooperados que buscavam uma maneira mais rentável para o aproveitamento do leite produzido em suas fazendas.

No início de suas atividades, a Cooperativa funcionava somente com venda de leite in natura para outras empresas, pois não tinha estrutura industrial montada para a produção de derivados lácteos.

A COOLVAM iniciou em 1986 a industrialização de produtos derivados do leite e hoje comercializa os seguintes produtos: manteiga, queijo mussarela, queijo prato, queijo prato light, queijo parmesão, queijo minas, leite longa vida integral e desnatado, achocolatado, doce de leite, requeijão cremoso, ricota e outros.

Name: Agriprom Shanghai Co. Ltd. (上海浦牧畜牧科技有限公司)
Description:
Agriprom is a dutch company specialized in integrated Dairy farming solutions worldwide, such as:

-	Total cow comfort concept
-	Manure Management
-       Barn Design & Consulting
-       Milking solutions

In 1994, Agriprom became the very first cow mattress manufacturer, using the unique way of combining 100% energetic latex with rubber. This has proven to be by far the most natural way of bringing the pasture into the barn. 

The dairy industry and offerings in China are rapidly changing and it is becoming increasingly challenging for dairy farmers to keep up. For this reason Agriprom is offering integrated “Total Solution” packages for the Chinese market. Our global experience and network of partners combined with our local presence in China gives us the benefit of offering more suitable solutions to create either new and more sustainable dairy farms or upgrade existing farms. Planning and integrations are crucial elements for running a sustainable and productive dairy farm; Let us help you!


Agriprom是一家围绕农业开展业务的跨国公司。我们专业致力于乳业市场，旨在为您提供完整的解决方案。产品范围包括：

-	设计&咨询
-	牧场管理方案
-	水处理系统和沼气系统
-	粪污处理方案
-	奶牛舒适解决方案&牧场设备
-	饲料青贮方案
-	挤奶设备
-	动物保健

Agriprom所在的市场充满挑战性。乳品业务处于不断变化中，与气候、经济形势和基础设施等方面密切相关。我们的核心理念是向客户提供牛舍和奶牛舒适的解决方案，从而确保奶牛场在当地条件下取得最佳经济效益。自1994年起，Agriprom开始成为牛床的的制造商，使用独特的方式将顶层的橡胶垫与内层的energetic乳胶垫组合起来。

Name: Roach & Associates, LLC
Description:
Roach & Associates, LLC, established in 1995, is a full-service consulting firm that mainly serves the Dairy community. Roach & Associates offerings include civil and environmental engineering, planning, construction project management, wetland delineation, and business and management consulting for agricultural, industrial, commercial, and private clients. Roach & Associates is a small, but growing, team centrally located in Home of the Hamburger, Seymour, WI.

Since 2002, Roach and Associates has been appointed as the Receiver or the General Manager for several large dairy operations. The operations consisted of between 650 head to 8,000 head. The firsthand experience of managing large dairy operations has contributed to Roach and Associates’ ability to develop engineering designs that integrate into daily operations.

We offer consulting services for evaluating or expanding existing facilities, new “Greenfield” developments or bring existing facilities into regulatory compliance.

Our Engineering Services include: Site Planning, Topographic Surveys, Soil investigations, Waste Storage & Transfer System Designs, Sand Separation Systems, Feed Storage Areas, Leachate Collection & Runoff Treatment Systems, Assured Wetland Delineations, WPDES Permit Writing and Permit Compliance, Livestock Siting, Stormwater plans.

Our Business Services include: Business Plans, Cash Flow Analysis, Cost of Production Analysis, Grant Writing (including Comprehensive Nutrient Management Plans (CNMPs).

Roach and Associates has the experience to assist you with your Engineering and Dairy Business needs.

Name: Centrale del latte di Vicenza s.p.a.
Spółdzielnia Mleczarska w Gostyniu
Description:
Spółdzielnia Mleczarska w Gostyniu została założona w czerwcu 1889 roku. Jesteśmy liderem w produkcji mleka zagęszczonego. Wychodząc naprzeciw potrzebom konsumenta cały czas staramy się udoskonalać nasze produkty, nie zapominając przy tym o tradycyjnych wartościach. Nasz zakład wyposażony jest w nowoczesne linie do produkcji mleka zagęszczonego niesłodzonego i słodzonego w opakowaniach kartonowych i puszkach, mleka zagęszczonego niesłodzonego light, mleka smakowego w tubach, śmietanek UHT, mleka UHT, masła, mleka w proszku odtłuszczonego granulowanego, sera dojrzewającego oraz wyrobów świeżych takich jak mleko pasteryzowane oraz maślanka.
Wysoką jakość produktów potwierdzają liczne nagrody i odznaczenia. Ogółem Spółdzielnia oraz jej wyroby zostały uhonorowane ponad 100 nagrodami, medalami i wyróżnieniami.

Name: Milki Icecream Industries
Description:
Milki Icecream Industries is currently one of the best ice cream companies in Bangladesh. But this journey to become the number one ice cream brand in Bangladesh wasn't an easy one for Milki Icecream Industries. 
It was the year 1992 when Mr. Masud Hasan, the Managing Director of Milki Icecream Industries, started the operational activities of Milki Icecream. Back at that time, it wasn't easy for a new entrepreneur to enter into the ice cream market because not everything was readily available at that time. But it had been possible due to the passion of young Mr. Masud Hasan who thought of starting an ice cream company no matter the type of risks involved in such business. 
Mr. Masud successfully started the journey of Milki Icecream Industries and right now this company has over 100 employees who are working day and night to bring the best ice cream in BD for you. 
Besides, Milki Icecream imports ice cream ingredients like cocoa powder, chocolate, emulsifier, stabilizer, vanilla essence etc. from different countries of the world. This is because if premium ice cream ingredients are not used, it will not be possible for Milki Icecream to offer you the best ice cream in Bangladesh. 
Currently, Milki Icecream has a product line of 45 different varieties of ice creams and more are being added into this product line over time. Actually, Mr. Masud Hasan likes to conduct different types of experiments over ice cream so that he can come up with the best ice cream in BD for the ice cream lovers of Bangladesh. 
It is to be noted that the hardworking employees and workers of Milki Icecream maintain strict quality guidelines so that they can offer you the best ice cream in BD. At the same time, Total Quality Management is also being followed by the management of Milki Icecream. This also helps Milki Icecream to maintain the best quality and taste while manufacturing ice creams in the factory of Milki Icecream Industry. 
Take Love Before Melt...

Oggi l'azienda ha consolidato la sua crescita e ha ampliato le proprie competenze nella produzione di prodotti lattiero-caseari freschi e stagionati. La nostra specializzazione distintiva risiede nella realizzazione di mozzarella e ricotta di alta qualità, impiegando linee moderne, processi innovativi e integrati, pur mantenendo sempre una profonda attenzione alla tradizione e al rispetto per l'ambiente.

Name: smart | dairy Coöperatief U.A.
Description:
smart | dairy is an international organization located in the Netherlands. smart | dairy provides affordable modular high-tech dairy farming units to smallholder farmers in developing countries to help them to produce high quality milk, generate income and become sustainable.  These standardized modular farms, the Farm-in-the-Box  (FitB) is a so called plug and play dairy farming unit capable of housing up to twenty-five cows and can be fully operational within a week (excluding cows). The farm size is designed to be operated by a farming family. 

The company focuses on high growth emerging markets, operating with local joint venture partners to set up dairy hubs. The goal of the company is to develop and improve smallholder milk production in these regions by providing access to market, technology and to finance these through a debt fund. The company aims to produce above market returns for its investors.

Name: Practical Dairy Training Centre Kenya Ltd
Description:
Practical Dairy Training Centre Kenya (PDTC Kenya), a subsidiary of the renowned Dairy Training Centre (DTC) in Oenkerk, The Netherlands, specializes in providing practical training in dairy farm management, milk processing, and youth-based entrepreneurship through business incubation including attachment in the Netherlands. PDTC Kenya has emerged as a pioneering force in the region's dairy value-chain landscape by employing a unique blend of hands-on learning, online education, and cutting-edge simulations.
At PDTC Kenya, training is not confined to the traditional classroom as it embraces a learning-by-doing philosophy, fostering a hands-on training approach that ensures trainees acquire practical skills, knowledge and appropriate attitudes. With a commitment to maintaining a safe and conducive learning environment, PDTC Kenya keeps class groups small, enabling individualized coaching and setting concrete goals for each trainee. This educational philosophy empowers farmers, processors, and other stakeholders in the dairy value chain to drive sustainability and profitability in their operations thereby contributing to improved livelihoods, food and nutrition security. 
PDTC Kenya's core objective is to build the capacity of dairy value chain actors within the community. Through comprehensive training programmes, PDTC Kenya equips trainees with the essential skills needed for successful dairy farm management, milk processing, and entrepreneurship.
The institution offers courses in dairy cattle nutrition, herd health management, breeding and Fertility management, dairy farm economics, young stock management, housing, fodder production and conservation, hygienic milk production, milk processing, business plan development, marketing and other soft skills. These courses cater to a diverse range of dairy sector actors, including farmers, farm managers, extension service providers, technicians, agricultural students, trainers, and lecturers.

Name: RUMITECH
Description:
Livestock farming has grown anormously over the years more than ever predicted when compared to the old days, as a result of increasing demand, the priority is that to force animal capacity to get the highest profits and the lowest costs. Briefly, livestock farming has become an industry together with its subsidiary companies.
Livestock farming includes many dynamics professionally. Feed formulations for the animals, their care and handling and their feeding are being done by brand new techniques. It is not only milk and meat production but presenting the ideal product variety to the end consumer.

In both dairy and fattening cows breeding, pushing the animal performances and getting the optimum capacity is a very detailed and sensitive job. Small mistakes costs serious problems.

This is why we as Rumitech company, would like to work with you who we share the same sector together and closer, find solutions to your problems and finally our goal is to find solutions according to our country’s conditions. Name: Asociación de Pequeñas y Medianas Empresas Lácteas (APYMEL)
Description:
La Asociación de Pequeñas y Medianas Empresas Lácteas (APYMEL), es la entidad representativa de las pymes lácteas en el ámbito nacional. Hace 29 años que trabaja por el fortalecimiento de la pyme láctea y está presente en el 90% de la cuenca lechera. Casi el 90% de las empresas socias de APYMEL elaboran hasta 50.000 litros diarios de leche y el 82% tiene hasta 50 empleados. El 75% de los trabajadores de los socios de APYMEL vive en pueblos de hasta 12.000 habitantes. Las empresas socias de APYMEL son empleadores de mano de obra intensiva y generadoras de puestos de trabajo genuinos en sus comunidades, favoreciendo el desarrollo local.

APYMEL cuenta con una administración nacional, un equipo de formadores y un alto conocimiento de la industria, sus trabajadores y de los organismos gubernamentales que tienen injerencia en el sector. Con voluntad, conocimiento y capacidad para coordinar las diferentes áreas de trabajo, busca el fortalecimiento de la organización, de las pymes lácteas y de las economías locales donde funcionan dichas empresas.

Name: Brabants Duingoed Kaas
Description:
Geniet van de volle en krachtige smaak. Ambachtelijk gemaakt met de beste melk van boeren uit het gebied. Door het gedachtengoed en een eerlijke prijs voor de boer is er meer aandacht voor de dieren, de natuur en het landschap. En dat proef je!

Karakteristieke volle smaak 
Wij, trotse boeren uit het agrarische landschap rondom de Loonse en Drunense Duinen, hebben de handen ineengeslagen. We maken samen regionale en onderscheidende kaas van de beste melk die we zelf produceren. De samenstelling van de grond in het gebied zorgt voor een calciumrijke melk. Door de ambachtelijke verwerking van de niet afgeroomde melk blijven voedingsstoffen behouden en krijgt de kaas zijn karakteristieke volle smaak.
  
Ontwikkeling van het landschap  
Door de samenwerking van veertien boeren is het mogelijk om het verschil te maken. We ontwikkelen een korte keten en hebben een gezamenlijke passie voor het weiden van de koeien en de zorg voor het landschap. Een deel van de opbrengst van de kaas wordt gebruikt om het landschap, de natuur en de biodiversiteit in het Brabants Duingoed-gebied te onderhouden. We hebben 10.000 m2 bloemenstrook rondom de weilanden van de veertien boeren aangeplant voor een betere biodiversiteit. De bloemen zien er ook prachtig uit. We hebben plannen voor kikkerpoelen, insectenhotels en nog meer. 

Eerlijke prijs voor de boer 
Wij zijn de trotse hoeders van het bijzondere stuk Brabants landschap. We krijgen een eerlijke prijs voor de melk. Dit komt ten goede aan het voortbestaan van het agrarisch gebied en de verbetering van de leefomstandigheden voor de dieren. De meeste koeien lopen in de wei met kruidenrijk gras. Het veevoer is deels zelf verbouwd en divers zoals met veldbonen, tarwe en voederbieten. Dit zorgt voor een lagere voetprint, betere biodiversiteit, dierenwelzijn en de beste melk! Hier zijn we trots op. Kom daarom gerust een keer kijken!  

Proef ons gedachtengoed!

Brabants Duingoed Kaas maakt deel uit van Brabants Duingoed.

Name: Skånemejerier Storhushåll
Description:
Skånemejerier är Skånes eget mejeri, och alternativet för hela Sverige. Våra rötter är stadigt förankrade i matlandskapet Skåne där vi drivs av jordnära insikter och klokskap. Vi är bärare av stolta mattraditioner och genuint mathantverk, där de goda råvarorna står i centrum. Vi har också en öppen attityd och gillar nya spännande trender och smaker, både det som sker i det lilla bistroköket eller storköket i en skola. Och vi har koll på vad våra kunder vill ha för att utveckla vårt fantastiska Mat-Sverige.

Vårt ostsortiment är ett bra exempel på det. Ost till ostbrickan eller till matlagning, vi har hela bredden. Extra stolta är vi över Skånemejeriers egna ostar från ysteriet i Kristianstad. Till exempel Allerums långlagrade klassiska ostar; Präst, Herrgård, Grevé och Svecia – alltid med lite större smak. Men vi kan också kunnat erbjuda Sveriges bredaste sortiment av kvalitetsostar från hela Europa med starka varumärken som President, Galbani med flera.

Vårt färskvarusortiment för storhushåll utvecklas ständigt där duktiga kockar, köksmästare, kostchefer och inköpare är vår drivkraft för att erbjuda ett attraktivt sortiment. Och vi jobbar hårt för att ständigt möta era högt ställda krav för det moderna och professionella köket. Vårt eget varumärke Skånemejerier rymmer ett brett urval av både klassiska och innovativa mejeriprodukter i förpackningar som täcker alla typer av kök. Andra starka varumärken är Bravo, Hjordnära, Lindahls och Ljuva, alla med en självklar roll i det professionella köket. Vårt sortiment säljs via direktdistribution eller genom grossist. Våra kunder finns över hela Sverige.

Name: MASTERLAC
Description:
MASTERLAC fue fundada el 25 de agosto de 2023 en el municipio de El Castillo, Meta, una región conocida por la fertilidad de sus tierras y la calidad excepcional de su producción láctea. Esta iniciativa surgió en un territorio que, a pesar de haber sido profundamente afectado por el conflicto armado colombiano, ha demostrado la fortaleza y resiliencia de su gente. Gracias al esfuerzo colectivo de los castillenses, MASTERLAC se consolidó como una empresa comprometida con el desarrollo económico y social de la región, aprovechando las ventajas competitivas que ofrece el entorno.

El municipio de El Castillo, ubicado en una zona de influencia ZOMAC (Zonas Más Afectadas por el Conflicto), es un ejemplo de transformación y esperanza. Sus tierras fértiles permiten la alimentación de alta calidad para el ganado, lo que, a su vez, garantiza una leche de óptima calidad. Los productores locales se destacan por su trabajo incansable y la implementación de buenas prácticas de ordeño, elementos fundamentales para la industria láctea.

MASTERLAC nació con el propósito de ser un actor clave en la dinamización del sector agroindustrial, enfocándose en la fabricación de quesos y derivados lácteos de la más alta calidad. Desde sus inicios, la empresa ha trabajado de la mano con productores y transportadores locales, promoviendo alianzas estratégicas que potencien el desarrollo sostenible de la región.

Con una filosofía basada en la excelencia y la innovación, MASTERLAC busca no solo satisfacer las necesidades de sus clientes industriales en el sector alimenticio, sino también posicionarse como un referente de calidad y consistencia en el mercado nacional e internacional. Cada producto elaborado lleva consigo el compromiso y la pasión de una región que apuesta por la paz, el progreso y el bienestar de sus comunidades.

Name: Morgan Agrotech
Description:
Morgan Agro Tech stands as a leading agro-based enterprise dedicated to advancing India’s agricultural landscape through innovation, quality, and farmer empowerment. Established in 1998, the company has steadily evolved into a trusted name in the dairy and animal feed sectors, integrating modern technology with traditional values to deliver excellence across its operations.

With a strong presence across rural India, Morgan Agro Tech connects with over 14,000 farmers and operates a robust network of 300+ milk collection centres, managing the procurement and processing of 1.5 lakh litres of milk per day. Complementing this is the Morgan Cattle Feed Division, which produces 200 tons of nutritionally balanced cattle feed daily, scalable up to 400 tons, supporting improved livestock health and enhanced milk productivity.

At the core of Morgan Agro Tech’s philosophy lies a deep commitment to sustainability and community growth. Through transparent procurement systems, fair pricing, and continuous farmer training initiatives, the company strives to create a resilient ecosystem where both farmers and animals can thrive.

Driven by the values of integrity, quality, and innovation, Morgan Agro Tech maintains uncompromised standards at every stage — from sourcing raw materials to delivering finished products. Its expanding team of over 450 professionals ensures that every litre of milk and every grain of feed reflects the company’s dedication to trust, transparency, and care.

As it continues to grow, Morgan Agro Tech remains focused on strengthening farmer partnerships, adopting sustainable practices, and contributing to India’s journey toward agricultural self-reliance.

Empowering Farmers. Nourishing Lives.

Name: Basta goat milk
Description:
Basta Goat Milk is the best goat milk in bangalore. We bring the finest natural goat milk and milk products to your kitchen every day.

At Basta, we bring the finest natural goat milk and milk products to your kitchen every day. Basta milk is 100% clean, green, and ethically produced from happy and healthy Beetal goats.

Our vision is to bring India’s ancient wisdom of goat milk benefits to modern-day contemporary lifestyles. Traditionally, Indian village households would have a few goats and their milk was consumed by babies to build strong immunity in childhood. Ayurveda has documented the benefits of goat milk for convalescence and it’s a key ingredient in many medicines. At the same time, to cater to the globetrotting Indian pallet, we want to bring artisanal goat milk products to India as an organized & modern enterprise. Our recipes and quality of Feta and Chèvre cheese are better than many imported kinds of cheese! We would like to thank the Chefs who helped us achieve this tangy goat cheese which can add zing to almost any dish!

Our aim is to help the local farmers have a sustainable mode of additional income from goat farming. We have set up an ideal Goat farm around 1 hr away from Bengaluru city where we train our partner farmers with regards to all best practices about goat farming. We provide them with specifically researched goat feed, medicines, technological know-how, and procure milk from them. We work with the farmers very closely at each step and make sure the hygiene and the nutritive value of milk are maintained throughout.
