Name: Caseificio Savarese Natale Domenico
Description:
La storia del nostro Caseificio è legata alla storia della famiglia Savarese che, a sua volta, discende dalla famiglia Guida.
Già nel XVII secolo la famiglia Guida esercitava l’arte casearia prima a Napoli, per poi trasferirsi nella Penisola Sorrentina a seguito della Rivoluzione Napoletana del 1799. Infatti il nostro non è solo un Caseificio ma è una famiglia che è arrivata alla sua quarta generazione di artigiani. Ci definiamo artigiani perché abbiamo saputo unire alla tradizione del lavoro del latte, così come lo facevano i nostri antenati, l’innovazione dei mezzi tecnologici che la modernità ci ha messo a disposizione. Infatti noi continuiamo a produrre artigianalmente la maggior parte dei nostri prodotti puntando in primis alla qualità della materia prima, ovvero il nostro latte che è solo italiano, da decine di allevamenti bovini, attentamente selezionati e seguiti personalmente, per assicurare ai nostri prodotti la freschezza e il gusto di un tempo, che oggi con il dilagare delle produzioni industriali si è perso quasi completamente.
Sicuramente il nostro nome è legato a quello del “Bocconcino del Diavolo” o anche conosciuto come Riavulillo, Diavoletto, che è stato ideato da Francesco Savarese nel 1968, che abbinando alla tipica pasta filata il gusto pungente del peperoncino piccante e delle olive nere gli conferì quel sapore particolare che ancora oggi è talmente amato da avere una Sagra interamente dedicata.
Oggi il Caseificio viene gestito dai Fratelli Savarese che nonostante la giovane età s’impegnano costantemente per portare avanti la qualità dei prodotti legata al loro nome.

Name: Modern Sistem Hayvancılık
Description:
Modern Sistem Hayvancılık olarak, ülkemizde süt sığırcılığı başta olmak üzere sürdürülebilir gıda üretimine destek veren çiftlikler için en yeni ve verimli teknolojiye sahip, ürün ve hizmet tedariği sağlamaktayız.
Kurulduğumuz günden beri 100 yılın üzerinde bir bilgi birikimi ve hayvancılık sektöründe araştırma-geliştirmeye büyük bir önem vererek, hayvancılık içi en inovatif ürünleri, İsveç’teki Hamra deneme çiftliğinde kullanarak sektörün hizmetine sunan DeLaval firmasını kendimize partner olarak belirledik.
Süt endüstrisi için süt sağım ekipmanları ve çözümleri konusunda dünya lideri olan ve 130 yıldan fazla sürelik tecrübesi bulunan DeLaval’in, Türkiye’deki ülke distribütörlerinden birisiyiz.
Bünyemizde bulunan veteriner hekim, ziraat mühendisi branşlarındaki teknik ekibimizin yanı sıra, mimar ve inşaat mühendislerinden oluşan projelendirme ve uygulama partnerlerimizle, hayvancılık işletmesi olarak doğru ve verimli yatırım yapmanızı sağlarız.
Tarımsal Yapı tasarımındaki DeLaval bilgi ve tecrübesini, ülke gerçekleri ve yerel çözümler ile birleştirerek, yatırım bütçenizin, hayvan konforu, fonksiyonellik ve sürdürülebilir açısından en verimli şekilde kullanıldığından emin olmanızı sağlarız.
Hayvancılık işletmelerinin mimari çözümlerinin, yem yönetimi, gübre planlaması, hayvan trafiği, havalandırma, yataklık alan yönetimi gibi mimari ve teknik konuların yanı sıra, sağımhane , yataklık seçimleri, buzağı besleme sistemleri, havalandırma fanları seçimi gibi en temel konularda doğru şekilde planlamış olması işletmenizin uzun dönemdeki karlılığını etkileyecek en önemli parametrelerdir.

The word “Ανθός” (Anthos – Blossom- EN) in Greek comes from the ancient Greek language. It refers to the blooming of a flower or, in a more general sense, to anything in its most aesthetic, beautiful, and developed form. 

the blossom is enchanting and the taste is addictive.

A story filled with zeal, passion, and dedication unfolds within the pages of a farming family’s journey. The love for nature, animals, and tradition is the recipe for the success story of the ”Anthos” family. A family that embodies all families that respect the environment, animals, and honor traditions.

It all started with agriculture, from sowing and harvesting wheat, to creating a farm with animals.

Reaching today, where the entire process, from producing animal food (hay), the well-being of goats and cows, milk production, and the production of dairy products, is exclusively done by the “Anthos” family.

Everything evolved harmoniously, like a flower that gradually grows and reaches its most perfect moment when the blossom is simply enchanting.  Nos engagements
Valoriser le travail des paysannes et paysans du Larzac et du Lévezou.
Préserver la biodiversité et le lien entre agriculture et nature.
Proposer une gamme de fromages authentiques, dont une large part en Agriculture Biologique.
Promouvoir un modèle coopératif fondé sur la démocratie, la transparence et la solidarité.

 Notre savoir-faire
De la collecte du lait à l’affinage, chaque étape est maîtrisée à La Cavalerie. Nos équipes perpétuent un savoir-faire ancestral, tout en innovant pour répondre aux attentes d’aujourd’hui : naturalité, circuits courts et respect de l’environnement.

Les Bergers du Larzac, c’est l’union d’un territoire, de femmes et d’hommes engagés et d’une ambition commune :
 Offrir des fromages de brebis authentiques, 100 % aveyronnais, respectueux de la terre et de celles et ceux qui la font vivre.

Les Bergers du Larzac — Une coopérative engagée, des fromages vrais, un goût de liberté. 

 Découvrez nos fromages, rencontrez nos producteurs et rejoignez l’aventure coopérative !

Name: AGRI-TRAC Inc
Description:
Incorporated in 1976 as Woodkin Agri-Systems inc.
Specialising in Dairy barn renovations and stable installations.
Started developing the concept of "Traction-Milling" on existing slippery concrete floors to reduce Injuries to livestock in 1993.
Canada & U.S. patents on equipment and process granted in 1998.
Corporate name change from Woodkin Agri-Systems to AGRI-TRAC Inc. in 1999.
Closed down construction division in 2001 so as to fully concentrate on proving that "Traction -Milling" is a better, more effective and healthier alternative to grooving, scabbling or rubber on Dairy barn floors.
Incorporated AGRI-TRAC U.S. Inc. in 2008  based in Waunakee Wisconsin.

As of December 2010, the AGRI-TRAC process has been done in livestock facilities in 10 Canadian Provinces and 12 American States totalling well over two million square feet and counting.
We currently have crews and equipment in Western Canada, Mid-western USA, Central Canada & Eastern Canada including Quebec.
Another truck, crew and equipment will be operating in the Pennsylvania/ New York State area by March 2011.

Name: Caseificio Brusati
Description: ll Caseificio Brusati nasce nel lontano 1937 su iniziativa del Sig. Giovanni Brusati, oggi ci troviamo alla terza generazione di Mastri Casari, rappresentati da Gianpiero Brusati, il quale mantiene viva la tradizione di famiglia dedicando la propria vita alla produzione di Gorgonzola DOP, Taleggio DOP, caciotte vaccine e caprine, ederborinati di capra. La maestria nella creazione di queste eccellenze nasce dalla sua grande esperienza e soprattutto dai segreti che vengono tramandati di padre in figlio e gelosamente custoditi in ogni singola forma di formaggio prodotta. La trasformazione e la lavorazione del latte avvengono ancora a mano con il metodo tradizionale a “caldaietta”, questo procedimento, unito “all’infinita esperienza” del Sig. Brusati, permette di esaltare la qualità e soprattutto la dolcezza dei nostri formaggi. Il latte utilizzato per le produzioni DOP viene fornito dalla Cooperativa Abbiatense di Albairate (MI) partner storico del Caseificio. La Cooperativa Abbiatense ha avviato da tempo il rispetto dei protocolli CReNBA mirati a monitorare lo stato di benessere animale degli allevamenti di bovini da latte e sottopone a verifica periodica da parte di veterinari qualificati le sue stalle ubicate nelle provincie diMilano e Pavia. Nel 2016 il Caseificio Brusati entra nell’orbita del Gruppo Gandolfo (GGB Group), tra i leader nazionali del commercio di ortofrutta, da sempre attento a valorizzare aziende di nicchia con standard qualitativi di assoluta eccellenza. L'azienda decide di realizzare nuovi investimenti per adeguarsi alle richieste del mercato odierno, dunque si certifica con IFS-BRC, attua degli ampliamenti del sito produttivo di Trovo, pur mantendendo l’obiettivo di conservare l’artigianalità delle lavorazioni e la cura nellaproduzione dei formaggi. La nostra Mission è quella di far tornare di moda “il vecchio”, proiettandolo nel panorama moderno e all’avanguardia dei giorni nostri.

Name: Luigi Guffanti 1876
Description:
La Luigi Guffanti Formaggi di Arona seleziona ed alleva i migliori formaggi della tradizione casearia italiana ed europea da quando, nel 1876, il fondatore Luigi Guffanti iniziò a stagionare il Gorgonzola DOP in una miniera d’argento abbandonata in Valganna. Il formaggio, a umidità e temperatura costanti per tutto l’anno, maturava talmente bene che già agli inizi del Novecento, conquistati i mercati italiani, l’azienda esportava fino in Argentina e in California. La massima attenzione nella ricerca e nella selezione del prodotto caseario e la passione per un accurato “allevamento”, sono le regole fondamentali che la famiglia Guffanti-Fiori si tramanda ormai da cinque generazioni.
Anello fondamentale di questo “laboratorio del gusto Guffanti” è la cantina di stagionatura/”allevamento” ricavata nel sottosuolo dove, condizioni ambientali di temperatura e di umidità costanti, costituiscono per i formaggi l’ultima tappa di un lungo processo che comincia fin dal pascolo. Come le tome d’alpeggio a latte crudo, selezionate direttamente presso i produttori per poi essere portate a un livello di stagionatura ottimale nella cantina Guffanti, con mesi di attente e continue cure.

Description:
Il caseificio Lo Conte Srl nasce dall'intraprendenza e dalla passione della famiglia Lo Conte per i prodotti lattiero-caseari e trova la sua ubicazione ottimale nelle verdi colline di Ariano Irpino.
Nel 1916, i nonni paterni di Carlo Lo Conte crearono un piccolo laboratorio per la trasformazione del latte in caciocavalli e fior di latte, in quelli che allora erano i territori della duchessa Caracciolo. Carlo crebbe, sin dai primi anni della sua infanzia, in un ambiente dove l'artigianalità e la qualità erano indispensabili, un ambiente che divenne per lui una vera fonte d'ispirazione. 
Ancora giovane, si trasferì negli Stati Uniti per accrescere le sue conoscenze nel campo caseario. Lavorò in un caseificio italo-americano, perfezionando la propria tecnica produttiva, ma nel suo cuore c'era ancora la sua terra, la sua Irpinia. 
Tornò in Italia, rilevò il piccolo laboratorio di famiglia e creò, insieme a suo fratello Giovanni, una grande azienda, dove decise di puntare tutto sulla ricerca delle migliori materie prime e sulla perfezione dei suoi prodotti. 
Oggi il caseificio Lo Conte è una grande realtà, gestita con la stessa meticolosità e passione di Carlo dal figlio John, i cui prodotti sono distribuiti su tutto il territorio nazionale e in molti paesi all'estero. 
Caseificio Lo Conte: il sapore della tradizione!

Name: Latterie Ragusane SPA
Description:
Latterie Ragusane è un'azienda che si propone di valorizzare i prodotti del territorio siciliano in Italia e nel mondo. 

Per raggiungere questo obiettivo, si avvale della forza dei marchi Zappalà e Sikanino presenti da oltre quarant'anni sulle tavole di migliaia di consumatori.

I nostri prodotti vengono realizzati nel rispetto della tradizione casearia siciliana, pur utilizzando le innovazioni tecnologiche recenti e nel rispetto dei più alti standard qualitativi.

Attualmente siamo presenti in 30 paesi del mondo, mentre in Italia siamo tra le prime aziende del settore lattiero-caseario italiano, rifornendo settimanalmente importanti insegne della GDO e clienti del canale Ho.re.ca, attraverso una rete distributiva con piattaforme logistiche, depositi e agenti.

Per soddisfare le esigenze dei diversi canali di vendita in Italia e all'estero, disponiamo di una vasta gamma di prodotti caseari siciliani realizzati in molteplici confezioni e formati.

Name: Tezcanlar Süt Ürünleri
Description:
1944 yılında Tekirdağ’ın Ergene ilçesinde Velimeşe Mahallesi’nde kuruldu. 1944 yılından bugüne üretimde olan Tezcan Süt Ürünleri, Türkiye’deki süt ve süt ürünlerinin öncü kuruluşlarından biridir. 2020 yılında Arslan Süt Mamulleri markası ile birleşerek Trakya’nın en büyük yoğurt ve ayran üretim kapasitesine sahip firması konumunda yer aldığı görülmektedir.

Çiftlikten gelen taze ve sağlıklı sütün sofralara güvenle taşınmasında rol oynamaktadır. Son teknoloji üretimle hijyenik koşulları dikkate alan Tezcanlar, günlük 480 ton süt işleme kapasitesiyle birlikte İstanbul ve Trakya bölgesinde güvenilir dağıtım ağı ile hizmet vermektedir. 
İş sağlığı ve güvenliğine gösterilen özenle müşteri memnuniyetini ön planda tutmayı politika edinen Tezcanlar, hem ustalığı hem geleneği bir araya getirmektedir. 


info@tezcanlarsut.com.tr

Description:

Name: Farmery
Description:
At Farmery, we believe in the power of real food. We were born with a simple question: where does our food truly come from? Transparency and quality became our guiding principles.

We partner with local farms who share our passion for pure, fresh produce. Every product that arrives at your doorstep undergoes rigorous quality checks through FSSAI-accredited labs. We take pride in ensuring there are no traces of harmful pesticides or chemicals in your food.

Our story began with a focus on milk, a cornerstone of a healthy diet. We knew families deserved better, and we weren't alone. We built strong relationships with local dairy farms, establishing a new standard for fresh, worry-free milk.

But milk was just the seed. We're on a mission to expand our offerings, bringing the same level of quality and transparency to everything you eat. Imagine vibrant fruits and vegetables bursting with flavor, and wholesome pantry staples – all delivered with the convenience of straight-to-your-door service.

Farmery is more than just a delivery platform. It's about fostering trust in your food system. It's about knowing exactly what nourishes your family. It's about the difference real, fresh food can make on your table and in your life.

Join our growing community and experience the taste of real food, delivered with care.

Name: Fukushoku Dairy
Description:
Established in early 2003 (known then as Fukushoku Flavour), the business began as a dairy products supplier and distributor to clients around the world. With a global client base established within East Asia (China and Hong Kong), South Asia (India), Middle East and North Africa, the company is proud to be known as a professional and trustworthy supplier of high quality Australia, New Zealand and European dairy products.

In late 2010, the company's Infant Formula arm joint ventured with a well-known Australian dairy food manufacturer to establish a new production line tailored to output Infant Formula. We have a team that provides a wide array of expertise and experience, from a variety of backgrounds, both locally and overseas. We aim to present the best technical advisory service, with senior business consultants and a wide network of diverse expertise, working in the dairy industry. 

We will support all potential clients through each step of the process, providing quality assistance, consistent updates and a tailored service, designed to meet your needs and requirements.

Il 21 Maggio 2021 Bufalè si espande aprendo una nuova sede nel cuore della popolatissima zona di Fuorigrotta (NA). Da qui nasce il nuovo format e la nuova identità del Brand, finalizzato alla realizzazione di numerevoli punti vendita in varie zone della città di Napoli e non solo.

Name: Lactalis Nestlé Frischeprodukte Deutschland
Description:
Wir lieben Milch. Und das seit Generationen. Heute ist die Lactalis Gruppe Welt-Marktführer für Molkereiprodukte. Unser Geschäftsbereich entstand 2013 auf Basis eines im Jahr 2006 gegründeten Joint Ventures zwischen der Lactalis-Gruppe und Nestlé, dem weltweit führenden Lebensmittelunternehmen. Klar, dass wir als Partner auf Augenhöhe das Beste beider Welten kombinieren. Und so produzieren und vermarkten wir – in ganz Europa – als Lactalis Nestlé Frischeprodukte Joghurts und gekühlte Milchdesserts bekannter Marken wie Nestle GOLD, Nesquik, Smarties, Lion und After Eight.


Dafür stehen wir: Wenn Familientradition auf Innovationskraft trifft: Lactalis und Nestlé bündeln ihr Können, um Produkte zu schaffen, die nicht nur köstlich und erschwinglich sind, sondern auch das Leben ein Stück genussvoller machen. Denn wir glauben, ein gemeinsames Dessert oder ein Snack zwischendurch können mehr sein als nur eine Mahlzeit. Sie sind Momente der Verbindung – zwischen Generationen, zwischen Kulturen, zwischen Freunden und Familien. Es gibt ein Ziel, das uns antreibt: We are tuning the future – wir stimmen heute die richtigen Töne an, um morgen eine bessere Zukunft zu gestalten. Für die Menschen, mit denen wir arbeiten. Für die Produkte, die wir herstellen. Für die Leistung, auf die wir stolz sind. Für den Planeten, den wir schützen wollen. Innovation – der Herzschlag unserer Entwicklung Die Welt verändert sich – und wir verändern uns mit ihr. Wir gestalten heute, was Menschen morgen brauchen – Ernährung für jedes Alter, die Zukunft genussvoller und gesünder macht. Um den sich wandelnden Bedürfnissen von Genießern gerecht zu werden und unseren Einfluss auf die Umwelt so gering wie möglich zu halten, setzen wir bei Lactalis und bei Lactalis Nestlé auf kontinuierliche Innovation – jeden Tag, auf allen Ebenen. Von lokalen Ideen bis zu globalen Projekten entstehen Lösungen, die direkt von den Wünschen unserer Kunden inspiriert sind und unser Know-how erlebbar machen.

Name: Arkelshoef
Description:
Arkelshoef is een mooie, historische Boerderij in Tricht. Deze Boerderij ligt niet ver van rivier de Linge, tussen de fruitboomgaarden. Het is een authentieke Gelderse herenboerderij die al meerdere generaties eigendom is van de familie Ruighaver.

Arkelshoef is gebouwd op een terp of oeverwal. Op het erf staat ook een eeuwenoude vloedschuur. Een vloedschuur is een stal of schuur die hoger ligt dan het woonhuis. Het doel hiervan was dat men het vee hier naar toe kon brengen bij een overstroming. Ook nu nog, want in 1995 werd de vloedschuur van Arkelshoef gebruikt als veilig onderkomen voor de koeien en paarden, mocht het water gaan stijgen.

Het bedrijf heeft eigen melkkoeien, paarden en schapen. Ook zijn de roofvogels van UilTopia bij ons gehuisvest. Het hele jaar rond worden er kalfjes geboren. De melk wordt geleverd aan de coöperatieve melkfabriek De Graafstroom, waar er kaas van gemaakt wordt.

Alles op 1 locatie:
Arkelshoef verhuurt ruimten voor creatieve of zakelijke doelen, bijvoorbeeld workshops, foto sessies, film locatie, vrijgezellen feestje, teamuitje of andere gezellige bezigheid met vrienden en familie. Tevens is er ruimte voor grote evenementen of bruiloften. Zo zijn er in februari 2015 tien theatervoorstellingen gehouden in onze eeuwenoude Vloedschuur. De muziektheatervoorstelling ‘Het water komt…!’ vertelt de verhalen over de grootste evacuatie ooit in Nederland.

We bieden voor bedrijven niet alleen de beste escape games op een representatieve locatie die centraal gelegen is in West Betuwe, maar ook events op maat! Je kan bij ons een vergaderkamer, beamer en flip-over boeken, maar ook heerlijke catering op maat met veelal biologische en verse streekproducten.

We blijven focussen op één doel: het blij maken van onze gasten. Daarom hopen we dat jullie deze gastvrijheid ervaren als je langs komt bij Arkelshoef!

Name: Lee Strand Co-operative Creamery Ltd
Description:
Lee Strand is a co-operative society owned by its farmer shareholders and employs over 100 people across our various business units. Lee Strand’s main activity is the processing and distribution of liquid milk in the Kerry, West Limerick & North Cork region. Over 100 years in business, Lee Strand was established in 1920 and began its creamery and production operations in Church Street in the heart of Tralee, County Kerry. In 1992 Lee Strand re-located to its new custom designed production plant on a 10 acre site at Ballymullen in Tralee.

In recent years Lee Strand has diversified into the property market and owns and operates a multi-storey car park in Maine Street, Tralee and the Tralee Town Centre Apartments. Brownes Agri, Steel & Builder Providers in Castleisland, County Kerry is also part of the Lee Strand portfolio. Lee Strand enjoys an excellent relationship with the community and supports many community, sporting and charitable organisations and events. Lee Strand also has a strong commitment to protecting the environment and has received many prestigious national and international awards.

Lee Strand is renowned for its distinctive fresh taste, our customers can “Taste the Freshness”! All our milk is supplied from local farms within 15 kilometres of our production plant in Tralee. Our farmers are third or fourth generation farmers and take great pride in producing the highest quality milk.

Name: Distral Trading
Description:
Desde su creación por profesionales holandeses de la alimentación, en Distral Trading nos hemos dado a conocer como un distribuidor de calidad y eficiencia contrastadas en el comercio internacional de los productos lácteos. Nuestra decidida apuesta por aproximar la oferta de nuestros fabricantes a las necesidades de nuestros clientes,  junto a una alta exigencia en la calidad de los productos y una rápida capacidad de respuesta han sido las claves para conseguirlo. 

Ofrecemos a nuestros clientes una amplia gama de producto. La mayor parte comprende quesos de importación, a los que se suman derivados lácteos en polvo, mantequillas y otras grasas. Todos ellos son productos europeos de calidad garantizada procedentes de Holanda, Alemania, Bélgica e Italia entre otros países.

Los valores de una empresa de confianza

Distral Trading avanza en el sector de la alimentación gracias a unos firmes valores: 
-	Máxima calidad,
-	Estrecha colaboración con los clientes y proveedores.
-	Un servicio logístico totalmente eficaz.

Presentamos nuestros productos en todo tipo de formatos para adecuarnos a las necesidades de nuestros clientes ya sea en el Mercado Tradicional, la Industria de Alimentación o el Food Service.

La estrecha cooperación con nuestros proveedores –clave en nuestra filosofía empresarial- nos permite satisfacer las necesidades de nuestros clientes en condiciones inmejorables: tiempos de entrega mínimos, cumplimiento de los requerimientos de calidad y optimización del desarrollo de productos personalizados entre otras ventajas. Esta relación genera una confianza total tanto en los productos como en la variedad de surtido y la flexibilidad de suministro, factores que nuestros clientes consideran decisivos para el logro de una colaboración duradera.
La calidad de nuestros productos está garantizada por medio de los certificados de calidad más exigentes como BRC, IFS y HACCP.

Name: 4D4F - Data Driven Dairy Decisions For Farmers
Description: The Data Driven Dairy Decisions for Farmers (4D4F) thematic network will focus on the role which dairy animal and environmental sensors can play in collecting real time information to help make more informed decisions in dairy farming. The network will develop a Community of Practice comprised of farmers, farm advisors, technology suppliers, knowledge exchange professionals and researchers who will work together to debate, collect and communicate best practice drawn from innovative farmers, industry and the research community to facilitate the co-creation of best practice.

Benvenuti presso l'Industria Casearia Colla Paolo.

Dal 1953, presso la corte del Castello di Santimento, ci dedichiamo con passione alla produzione di eccellenze casearie. Guidati dalla terza generazione della famiglia Colla, siamo una storica realtà del territorio piacentino.

Specializzati nel Grana Padano DOP, il nostro prodotto di punta, offriamo anche una selezione di formaggi e gastronomia presso lo Spaccio Aurora, punto di riferimento per ristoranti, strutture ricettive e consumatori finali.

Sotto la guida di Piero e Roberto Colla, insieme a Francesca Colla e Filippo Guardabassi, gestiamo con esperienza e competenza ogni aspetto dell’attività, dalla produzione alla distribuzione.

Il nostro Grana Padano 30 mesi, con il marchio a fuoco "Il buono del castello", rappresenta l'apice della nostra tradizione.

Scoprite di più sulla nostra storia e sui nostri prodotti su: www.spaccioaurora.it

Name: Kelompok Studi Profesi Ternak Perah Fakultas Peternakan Universitas Padjadjaran
Description: Kelompok Studi Profesi Ternak Perah Fapet Unpad is one of the Student Activity Units at the Faculty of Animal Husbandry, Padjadjaran University. The Secretariat of the KSPTP is located in the Dairy Cattle Stall belonging to the Dairy Production Laboratory Faculty of Animal Husbandry

Name: Molkerei Hüttenthal GmbH & Co. KG
Description:
Die Molkerei Hüttenthal liegt idyllisch im Herzen des Odenwaldes. Im Jahre 1900 gegründet, ist sie seit 1912 im Privatbesitz der Familie Kohlhage.

Unsere Philosophie: Das Einfache bewahren!

Mit 25 Mitarbeitern setzen wir täglich diese Leitlinien um: 

Wir verarbeiten täglich ca. 15.000 Liter Kuhmilch und 1.000 Liter Ziegenmilch. Unsere schmackhafte Milch beziehen wir direkt von 15 Landwirten unserer Region. Zwei bäuerliche Betriebe aus dem südlichen Odenwald liefern täglich die frische Ziegenmilch. Aus Überzeugung verzichten unsere Milchlieferanten auf die Verwendung von Glyphosat und achten auf artgerechte Tierhaltung, Weidegang sowie traditionelle Fütterung ohne Gentechnik.

Die vielseitige handwerkliche Verarbeitung in unserer kleinen Molkerei erfordert große Erfahrung und umfangreiches Fachwissen. Daher sind wir stolz auf unser Team, das unsere Milch- und Käsespezialitäten mit Liebe herstellt.

Name: Rigveda Essentials
Description: Rigveda Essentials is a homegrown artisanal brand, that is passionate about preserving Indian, ethnic handicrafts and ayurvedic practices. Our mission is to preserve traditional wisdom, and align it with modern day sensibilities by working  with the marginalized, pastoral communities from rural areas who bring an invaluable reservoir of traditional wisdom and cattle rearing techniques to produce the most unadulterated ghee. Rigveda is committed to providing our clients with genuine- chemical and additives free product and aims to be a platform that provides a genuine and trustworthy produce to our customers.

Name: Ferme LA BARATTE
Description:
Depuis 1982, nous sommes éleveurs laitiers. 
En 2001, mes parents Bernadette et René-Luc font le choix de l’agriculture biologique. Cette même année, ils décident de valoriser le lait du troupeau en le transformant à la ferme. 
En 2006, je rejoins l’équipe pour développer la gamme de produits transformés et la vente directe.  
Accompagné de mon épouse Guénaëlle, puis d’Elisabeth, Céline, Estelle et Teddy, aujourd’hui nous maintenons notre engagement qualitatif en faisant évoluer nos process et nos recettes. 
Les énergies et les savoir-faire de chacun, nous permettent d’envisager l’avenir avec sérénité, dans le respect de l’environnement, de nos animaux et de l’authenticité de nos produits.
Hugues Vigneron

Name: System Happel GmbH
Description: System Happel, based in Germany, offers outstanding and specialized know-how along with a full line range program for the modern Dairy farmer. Today, System Happel is one ofthe most important International manufactures specialised in modern and Innovative milking technique. Part of Dairy Farm Solution products are, Automatic / Robotic milking, AktivPuls extremely gentle milking technology with an integrated vacuum release, automatic feeding, milkcooling, scraper robotics, RF technology, animal ID, etc. etc.

Name: Fromagerie Maurice
Description: Producteur et transformateur à la ferme depuis 2010, la Fromagerie Maurice fabrique des yaourts et du fromage au lait de vache. Située au coeur du Sud Touraine, une petite équipe de 18 passionnés fait vivre chaque jour un savoir-faire familial. La Fromagerie Maurice vous propose une large gamme de produits laitiers, des yaourts, des desserts lactés, des fromages blancs et du fromage.

Name: Paleteria LA Michoacana
Description: La Michoacana is a company based in Modesto, California, that specializes in producing high-quality and innovative paletas, CoolStix (bolis), and vasitos (cups) with real ice cream and inclusions like fruit, nuts, and chocolate. They distribute their products to thousands of retail stores across the United States, focusing on creating Mexican-inspired traditions and helping customers reminisce their family's best childhood moments. La Michoacana's key pillars are quality, flavor, and ongoing innovation, making them a trusted and preferred brand known for delicious flavors and consistent quality.

Name: JoYo
Description:
JoYo ensures you don’t  compromise your health for a daily caffeine fix. After seeing her coffee and breakfast grow cold day after day, busy mom and Founder Marina Christmas wondered why she couldn’t have both — and in a much more convenient package. Seeking to avoid the jitters and impossible-to-pronounce ingredients in your average energy drink, Christmas made something far better: caffeinated yogurt in a convenient pouch that you can take on the go or eat while starting your day. 

She enlisted the help of a chef at a Michelin-rated restaurant to develop flavors like strawberry basil that uses clean ingredients, such as milk from a small, family farm in upstate New York, strawberry puree, organic apple cider vinegar and organic blue agave.

JoYo recently received a 6-figure investment from a nationally recognized CPG Venture Firm.

Name: Dairy Mitra
Description: We are India's best sourcing marketplace for dairy animals. Our platform provides easy access to a variety of breeds with detailed information on each animal, allowing buyers to make informed decisions when buying their desired livestock.

Name: Rajpurohit Dairy
Description:
RAJPUROHIT DAIRY, DEDICATED TO THE GOOD HEALTH OF SOCIETY SINCE 1997

Small thud created by Rajpurohit Dairy has turned into a high decibel performance in the Milk and dairy Industry 
White Revolution in India started in 1970 and it transformed India from milk deficient country to one of the leading manufacturers of milk. 1997, exactly after 23 years, there was a small thud that largely went unnoticed in Rajasthan when in Ajmer Rajpurohit Dairy was formed. Today that thud has turned into a high decibel performance and it largely due to our unflinching hard work, dedication and eye on the mission, Rajpurohit dairy has become is a noteworthy name and our company operations are managed by a group of expert professionals.
Rajasthan is famous for its arts, culture and heritage. Agriculture is not the mainstay of its residents but it is second largest milk producing state in the country. We at Rajpurohit Dairy took an initiative to help those warriors of the field. We understand our social responsibility and provide employment to farmers by building a new market for their milk products so that the one who feeds us, never has to go to bed unfed.
Rajpurohit Dairy is involved in serving the varied product demands of the clients in a professional manner. The company got established as a manufacturer, exporter, and supplier of a variety of Dairy Products. Today, after 23 years ago, we are just as dedicated as ever to provide you with the products that will not make you sooth your tastebuds but will also make you strong and energetic. Our vision to be recognized as a leading Dairy products company. We manufacture high quality products under famous brand names such as Suraj and Krishnam.
With certifications from FSSAI, MSME, ISO and APEDA; our product is top notch and AGMARK certified. We put Quality above everything and adhere to strict product sourcing and processing criteria.

Name: AGAMMASUR
Description:
AGAMMASUR es una cooperativa formada por más de 300 ganaderías de caprino (la mayoría de ellas ubicadas en la provincia de Málaga) que han unido sus fuerzas para dar lugar a una cooperativa grande y sólida.

Con más de 100.000 cabezas de ganado caprino, y una producción de más de 25 millones de litros de leche /año, AGAMMASUR es una de las principales cooperativas de ganado caprino de España.

En AGAMMASUR nos apasiona nuestro trabajo, y por ello cuidamos de nuestras cabras como si se tratasen de nuestra propia familia. Somos ganaderías que promovemos el pastoreo por las zonas verdes de nuestro entorno, haciendo un uso eficiente y responsable de los recursos naturales, tales como el “Parque natural Montes de Málaga” o la “Sierra de las Nieves”, espacios naturales que dan nombre a nuestras marcas de queso.

Gracias al pastoreo, la leche de nuestras cabras está llena de matices y aromas que se transmiten a nuestros quesos convirtiéndolos en una verdadera explosión de sabor.
Combinamos técnicas tradicionales de elaboración de quesos con maquinaria de última generación para ofrecer quesos de calidad superior.

Nuestras marcas “Quesos Montes de Málaga” y “Quesos El Pinsapo” avaladas con más de 75 premios nacionales e internacionales rebosan calidad y autenticidad.

Nos preocupamos por ofrecerte el mejor queso, con un sabor inigualable.

Name: A.B. Munroe Dairy
Description:
A. B. Munroe Dairy ~ Delivering Farm Fresh Milk in Glass Bottles and other local groceries to homes in Southern New England since 1881. 

Here at Munroe Dairy we have a simple philosophy, "Some things are better left unchanged." It is one that we have kept since the beginning in 1881. Our milk comes fresh from the cow to your door in no more than 48 hours and contains no artificial hormones or antibiotics. Not to mention it is also delivered in an environmentally and health minded glass bottle that will be reused over 20 times!
Munroe being a local family owned company finds it best to support other local brethren. You can see this in the over 200 products, most coming from other local family owned New England Companies. All of which are delivered directly to your home or office

Name: Caseificio Collebianco
Description:
Il caseificio Collebianco nasce nel 1986 dall’esperienza e dalla passione per la mozzarella di bufala della famiglia Ambrosca.

Situato alle porte del Cilento, Collebianco seleziona meticolosamente il Latte di Bufala fresco e intero proveniente dagli allevamenti della Piana del Sele. Allevamenti in cui il controllo sull’igiene e sul ciclo di alimentazione delle bufale, è garantito dal consorzio di tutela, istituito con disciplinare sulla produzione della Mozzarella Dop.

Name: AK-DU PEYNİR
Description:
1943 yılında Durmaz ailesinin 1. kuşak temsilcisi olan İbrahim Durmaz, Kozak Çamavlu Köyü’nde kurduğu mandırada; koyun, keçi ve inek sütünden Deri Tulum Peyniri ve Eski Kaşar üretimi ile işe başlamıştır.

1959 yılında ailenin 2. kuşak temsilcisi olan Abdulkadir Durmaz, Dikili’nin Bahçeli Köyü’nde kurduğu mandırada Deri Tulum Peyniri üreterek işe devam etmiştir ve AK-DU markası ilk defa bu dönemde kullanılmaya başlamıştır.

1971 yılında Dikili’nin Kabakum Köyü’nde bugün üzerinde işletmenin bulunduğu 16.000 metrekarelik arazi satın alınarak yeni mandıra binası inşa edilmiş ve üretim burada aynı ürünlerle devam etmiştir.

Name: Swedish Dairy Association
Description:
Svensk Mjölk är en branschorganisation som arbetar på uppdrag av sina ägare, det vill säga sju mejeriföreningar (som tillsammans står för cirka 98 procent av Sveriges totala mjölkproduktion), tre husdjursföreningar, två avelsföretag och nio ras- och intresseföreningar.

Svensk Mjölk samlar, utvecklar och kommunicerar kunskap i kedjan från ko till konsument inom områdena nutrition, mjölkkvalitet, miljö, mjölkpolitik, mjölkekonomi, management, ko-data, utfodring, djurvälfärd och avel.

Name: Hollandia
Description:
Od začátku razíme přístup, že věci se mají dělat na 100 % a bez kompromisů. Naše výroba je od základu poctivá. Na naše výrobky jsme hrdí, dáváme do nich vždy jen ty nejlepší suroviny. Zakládáme si na špičkové kvalitě a respektu k přírodě. Ctíme tradiční postupy, které obohacujeme o moderní technologie a inovace. Nejsme suchaři, kvalita se u nás snoubí s lehkostí a originalitou.

To jsou naše hodnoty, kterých se držíme přes 30 let.

Name: Oldenburger Professional
Description: DMK is Germany’s leading dairy company serving the catering industry. Its hallmark is award-winning products that have been optimised and fine-tuned based on input from experienced chefs to make them excel in terms of flavour, versatility, usability, physical properties and more.Oldenburger Professional, DMK’s international brand, puts Germany’s know-how in the hands of chefs worldwide. It includes a collection of sure-fire recipes: culinary creations which are guaranteed to thrill guests and boost sales. What makes them so special? They have been specially developed by chefs for chefs and tested and approved in kitchens worldwide. Explore the fascinating variety of modern German cuisine using our high-quality ingredients!

Name: Erbalact
Description:
Fabrica de lactate Erbalact este rodul unei investiții realizată în localitatea Nucet din județul Dâmbovița. Unitatea productiva are o capacitate de procesare a peste 20.000 litri lapte pe zi și prelucrează materia primă obținută în ferma proprie. Fabrica produce în prezent lactatele Nucet Bunătăți Mănăstirești.
Lactatele Nucet sunt produse realizate în bună rânduială, din ingrediente naturale. Produsele tradiționale Nucet aparțin producătorului de lactate Erbalact, un producător român a cărui valori sunt : respectul pentru tradiția preparatelor în spirit autentic românesc și aplecarea spre inovația care să asigure calitatea și siguranța unor produse făcute după rețete vechi românești, în cele mai moderne condiții europene.

Name: Fromagerie TAZMALT

Fromagerie Tazmalt – Spécialité Camembert | Tizi Ouzou, Algérie

Bienvenue sur la page de Fromagerie Tazmalt, située à Tizi Ouzou, en Algérie. Nous sommes spécialisés dans la production de Camembert de haute qualité, fabriqué dans le respect des normes industrielles les plus strictes pour garantir un produit frais et savoureux.

Notre mission est de rendre le Camembert accessible à tous, tout en maintenant des standards de qualité élevés et en veillant à offrir un goût riche et authentique. Nous utilisons des ingrédients soigneusement sélectionnés, afin de vous proposer un produit délicieux, idéal pour vos repas quotidiens.

Rejoignez-nous pour découvrir notre Camembert Tazmalt des marques COEUR FONDANT et MONTBELIARDE un fromage au goût unique, disponible dans toute la région de Tizi Ouzou, sur Ager , Bejaia et ORAN

Name: UKRPRODUCT GROUP
Description:
Ukrproduct Group is the leading manufacturer of high-quality branded dairy products and kvass, which have been successfully sold in Ukraine and foreign markets for over 20 years.

On the Ukrainian market, the company is represented by the brands Our Dairyman, Molendam, Our Cheese and Arsenivskyi.

Ukrproduct Group includes 4 plants, the staff of all enterprises has more than 850 employees:
- A plant in Zhytomyr, which specializes in the production of processed cheese.
- Plant in Zhytomyr for the production of kvass.
- Dairy plant in Starokostiantyniv, producing packaged butter, spreads, cheese and powdered milk.

In addition to consumer goods, Ukrproduct Group also produces and exports industrial dairy products, including milk powder, to the CIS countries, Europe, Southeast Asia, the Middle East, Africa, and South America.
أوكر برادوكت كروب

والتي يتم بيعها بنجاح في أوكرانيا والأسواق الخارجية لأكثر من 20 عاماً.
في السوق الأوكرانية تمثل الشركة العلامات التجارية . صانع الأجبان , موليندام , جبنتنا , أرسينيفسكي.
تضم مجموعة أوكر برادوكت 4 مصانع , ويعمل في جميع المؤسسات أكثر من 850 موظفاً:
-	مصنع في زيتومير متخصص في إنتاج الجبن المطبوخ
-	معمل زيتومير لإنتاج الكفاس
-	مصنع ألبان في ستاروكوستيانتينيف , ينتج الزبدة المعبأة , والأطعمة القابلة للدهن , والجبن , والحليب المجفف.
-	مصنع ألبان في ليتشيف.
بالأضافة إلى السلع الإستهلاكية , وتقوم مجموعة أوكر برادوكت ايضاً بإنتاج وتصدير الألبان الصناعية , بما في ذلك مسحوق الحليب , إلى بلدان رابطة الدول المستقلة , وأوربا

Our Dairy Industry Training Programs are designed to build capability, provide the latest techniques, industry best practice, and hands-on experience to excel in the dairy sector. Name: La Huerta Tambo
Description:
La Huerta Tambo is a family owned brand that was founded in 2016 with the aim of intensifying and professionalizing the derivates and other goat milk productions. The idea is to lead the national market and achieve an outstanding position internationally. 
Currently, we produce hard and semi-hard cheese, fresh cheeses, ricotta and dulce de leche. We are continuously developing new products! 
La Huerta is located in the town of Huacalera, Jujuy. It's an area of exceptional natural beauty due to its geographical wealth and cultural heritage which is characteristic of La Quebrada de Humahuaca. Millennial Omaguaca and Inca cultures arrived to these lands and left a cultural legacy that is kept alive today through beliefs, rituals, festivities, art, music, agricultural techniques and food customs. Thanks to the Spaniards, the native people acquired the technique of goat rearing which resulted vital for their subsistence. From this derived the ancient artisanal technique of making goat cheese, known as "queso de campo" or "queso criollo". 
We know about the benefits of a healthy diet and we believe our products, whose daily production processes are based on international standards and sustainable practices, fall into this category. We seek to achieve the right balance between the ancient traditions of our land and the modern technology of today to offer healthy products made with 100% pure goat milk. 
We are also very committed to the protection of the environment and with the well-being and development of our community. 

We invite you to learn more about our Environmental Management Plan and CSR actions on our website www.lahuertatambo.com.

Name: Nature Milk
Description:

Cow Milk | Curd | Ghee | Butter | Paneer | Coffee | Tea

Name: Capra
Description:
At Capra, we believe in the power of local producers. That’s why we are committed to promoting their milk and transforming it into products of the highest quality.

Our expertise is fully dedicated to quality. We listen to what consumers value and ensure that every product meets their expectations.

Capra combines traditional production methods with modern technology, allowing us to guarantee an authentic and safe end product. With our BRC and IFS certifications, we adhere to the strictest quality standards, ensuring the safety of both our employees and our customers.

Name: Rothenbuhler Cheesemakers
Description:
FROM HUMBLE BEGINNINGS.

Our founder Hans Rothenbuhler grew up in Switzerland, the son of a Master Cheesemaker. Orphaned at age six, he was lovingly raised by a caretaker known as Sister Anna who taught him the importance of faith while he trained to carry on the family’s cheese making tradition. 

Hans became certified as a Master Cheesemaker in his home country. But he realized his true potential by bringing his faith in God, respect for people, and passion for excellence to America. 

Our founder would be proud to know that, today, a third generation of Rothenbuhlers are deeply committed to the family tradition of making only the very best cheese…guided by a pledge to perfection and a vision to bring nutritional goodness to your family. 

Only the best. All of the time.TM 
John Rothenbulher

Name: Udder Health Systems Inc
Description:
The company was founded in 1978 by Dr. Allan Britten for the purpose of addressing the challenges facing dairymen striving to produce high quality milk. In 2004 we added food testing to our services. This allows us to serve dairy processors, meat plants and other companies that are related to commercial production of dairy and beef products.

UHS has comprehensive, state of the art laboratories in three states and four locations. Our labs are staffed with teams of veterinarians, microbiologists, food scientists and animal scientists dedicated to providing top quality service to improve producer profitability.

Name: Arkaja Dairy
Description:
At Arkaja, we believe in the power of nature's purest gifts, and our journey began with a simple mission: to bring the freshest, most wholesome dairy products directly from local farmers to your home. Our story is one of heartfelt dedication, as we work hand in hand with trusted farmers who share our passion for quality and integrity.

From the moment our company was created, our vision has been to nourish your family with the very best dairy products, sourced from cows raised with care and respect. Our farmers pour their hearts into their work, ensuring the well-being of their herds and the purity of their milk. This unwavering commitment to excellence is the foundation of every product we offer.

We are honored to deliver Arkaja's fresh milk directly to your doorstep, connecting you to the land and the farmers who make it all possible. Each glass of milk tells a story of tradition, hard work, and love—a story that brings our community together.

As you enjoy our dairy products, know that you are supporting a network of families dedicated to providing you with the finest, most nourishing foods. Thank you for being a part of our journey and for embracing Arkaja's promise of care and quality. Together, we are shaping a brighter, healthier future for us all.

Satamaito valmistaa lähellä tuotettua maitoa, maitojuomaa, piimää ja kermaa. Satamaidon erikoisuuksia ovat normaalia pidempään säilyvät tuotteet sekä Vapaan lehmän maito, joka on pihatoissa vapaana elävien lehmien maitoa. 

Satamaidon meijeritoiminta perustettiin Porissa jo lähes 120 vuotta sitten ja sen kotitilat sijaitsevat Satakunnassa, Pohjanmaalla ja Pirkanmaalla. Vuonna 2018 meijeri muutti Porista uusiin tiloihin Ulvilaan. Vuosittain Satamaito valmistaa 45 miljoonaa litraa nestemäisiä maitotuotteita. Parhaimmillaan länsisuomalaisen maidon matka tilalta meijeriin ja kaupan hyllylle kestää vain muutamia tunteja.

Name: Dairy Farmers' Network Uganda
Description:
The dairy farmers’ network is an organization that is registered under the companies Act No.1 of 2012 or as a business name under the Business names registration act cap 109.Cap.110. Has a membership of over 200 dairy farmers with 80 registered and development partners .The Network currently operates mainly in the districts of  Mukono, Buikwe, Mpigi, Luweero, Kampala, Jinja, Mityana, Kyenjojo, Mbarara, Wakiso, Kayunga and rural communities near the capital city.
The Network currently sources its funds through development partners and these include Bimeda, Semex and Coopers Ltd.  It also gets finance from members through payment of membership fee.

VISION: The Network shall be Bench mark for modern and improved dairy farming techniques in Uganda and beyond.

MISSION: To promote a practical farmer oriented dairy farming network geared towards production of safe, quality assured products in a sustainable manner that under pins the future of dairy farming industry in Uganda.	

OBJECTIVES: The objectives of the Network shall be to:
•	To develop a robust dairy farmers’ centred network aimed at enhancing information gathering and sharing.
•	To increase household income through building farmers’ capacity in developing sustainable and profitable dairy farming techniques.
•	To foster collaboration with key players in development of dairy farming in Uganda and beyond.
•	To create an integrated dairy value chain system which is in compliance with the National environmental policy.
•	To build a strong bargaining, market oriented farmers’ network with the capacity to explore local, regional and international market.
•	Bring improved dairy farming technologies, services and inputs closer to rural communities through establishing resource centres and demonstration farms
•	To encourage families, youth and women to start commercial dairy farming as a means of wealth creation.

ACTIVITIES: Monthly study meetings, Trainings, Farm Visits, and Regional tours among others.

Name: Donia Farms
Description:
Donia Farms was founded in 1955 by Dutch immigrants that brought principles of hard work, integrity, and respect for the animals they cared for and the land they farmed. These principles are at the heart of what we do today. 

Rooted in a passion for dairy farming, The van Keulen family prides themselves on using modern farming practices to deliver the best care they can for their cows. Name: Appenzeller Switzerland
Description:
Appenzeller Käse: Das würzigste Geheimnis der Schweiz. 
Natürliche Zutaten aus dem Appenzellerland, traditionelle Handwerkskunst, die geheimnisvolle Kräutersulz und eine strenge Qualitätskontrolle - das sind die Grundsteine des Appenzeller Käses. Seit 700 Jahren wird Appenzeller Käse nach alter Handwerkstradition mit naturbelassener Rohmilch in rund 41 Dorfkäsereien hergestellt. Während seiner drei- bis neunmonatigen Reifezeit wird er dabei liebevoll mit der geheimnisvollen Kräutersulz gepflegt. Diese verleiht ihm seinen einzigartig würzigen Geschmack.
Die 1942 gegründete Sortenorganisation sorgt dafür, dass Appenzeller Käse eine typische Ostschweizer Käsespezialität bleibt und als solche gefördert wird.

Name: Caseificio Perrella
Description:
Generazioni di nonno, padri e figli si sono succedute in questi 60 anni e, insieme al tempo che è passato, si sono tramandate una sapienza antica fatta di gesti semplici e movimenti studiati per creare un prodotto buono, genuino, ricco di amore e attenzione.
I gesti sono quelli del casaro: il suo scrutare attento e sapiente, la pasta che fila nell’acqua bollente, il tocco delle due dita per essere trasformata in mozzarella e tante piccole attenzioni che sembrano futili solo in apparenza ma che in realtà fanno la differenza.
Abbiamo accolto con ardore le nuove sfide del nostro tempo e del nostro Paese, l’Italia, fino ad arrivare all’ambizioso progetto di sbarcare al Nord, in Veneto, con il nostro solito bagaglio di esperienze e competenze.
Ad oggi abbiamo due anime: quella di Verona, con la Tualat S.r.l. e quella di Bojano, con la Diboiano S.r.l.
Ci prendiamo cura della nostra mozzarella dall’inizio alla fine, la coccoliamo e non la lasciamo mai sola!

La società, scegliendo il nome Filab s.r.l. - Filiera Latte Bufalino, ha voluto definire il proprio impegno per la qualità nel settore della produzione della mozzarella di bufala.

Per garantire una produzione di Mozzarella di Bufala Campana di elevata qualità sono stati attuati alcuni interventi che hanno riguardato l'ammodernamento degli allevamenti dei soci fornitori del latte, l'ottimizzazione dell'alimentazione e il controllo dello stato sanitario delle bufale, la realizzazione di un moderno ed efficiente caseificio sociale.
Il latte di bufala, prodotto esclusivamente in provincia di Salerno, raccolto con moderni mezzi di proprietà della società, arriva nelle migliori condizioni d’igiene e temperatura al caseificio dove viene trasformato secondo la più antica tradizione casearia del luogo e permette la produzione della Mozzarella di Bufala Campana DOP dal mitico e inconfondibile sapore.

Name: MARGINSMART
Description:
MARGINSMART, developed by Dairy Analyzer LLC, is the most comprehensive price risk management tool available in the dairy industry today.  MARGINSMART was specifically designed to be used in the dairy industry by dairy producers to gain a full understanding of their price risk management situation.  MARGINSMART is completely web-based, user friendly and has experienced Customer Service Representatives to assure information is accurate and up-to-date.

MARGINSMART is completely customized to YOUR dairy!  No “one size fits all” or need to use “industry averages” if you don’t want to.  At MARGINSMART we know that every dairy farm has its own set of circumstances and to provide truly accurate information for the price risk management decisions for YOUR dairy, we incorporated many features which customize the results to your situation.  And if you have more than one dairy operation, we have made it extremely easy to switch between farms to see each one in its own customized view.  MARGINSMART also allows multiple users for each farm and allows the dairy owner to manage permissions as to what each user can access and see.

MARGINSMART allows you to enter all the crucial information related to your dairy, and then has a direct download feature whereby it continually updates commodity market prices (through the CME and CBOT), to generate real-time projections of your milk margin and net income for up to 24 months.  It has exclusive features which help you be assured that this is the most comprehensive, realistic projection available so that you can feel confident that you have all of the proper information to make price risk management decisions.

MARGINSMART is available for use by dairies of any size and in three different license levels so that each dairy producer can decide which features are most important for their specific dairy.

At MARGINSMART our commitment is to provide financial tools to make your dairy successful.

In questa giovane azienda si genera, come per il matrimonio che li vede uniti, un virtuoso sodalizio tra questi due mondi, due esperienze professionali e di vita che si stimolano e si confrontano. Nasce l’esperienza dell’affinamento da filiera corta, “Nobile”, che trova posto nei vecchi locali adibiti a fienile agricolo e riconvertiti da +tstudio in una vera e propria cheese academy : un centro per la diffusione della cultura del formaggio e dell’affinamento.
Grazie a questo innovativo progetto, infatti, il vecchio fienile diviene hangar di affinamento e i locali derivati al piano superiore diventano aule didattiche e meeting, configurandosi come headquarter di tutte le aziende di famiglia e riferimento territoriale per il mondo del formaggio.

Name: Milk & Meadows
Description:
We are a single source Gir cow farm that serves families all over Jaipur. All our milk and dairy products come only from our own cows.

Our farm follows practices that provide a stress-free and cheerful environment that keeps our cows healthy and happy.
 
Our Recipe for Goodness:
Quality over quantity.
Less is more.
Cleanliness is Godliness.
Cheaper costs more.

How We Care for Our Gir Cows:
We follow the Vedic practice of dohan.
Our cows are milked by hand, not cold machines.
All our cows roam free on our farm so they get plenty of quality leisure time with their friends.
Our cows are fed a balanced, nutritious and seasonal specific diet that is a smorgasbord of foods they love.


Why Raw A2 Milk Is Better for You:
Our milk does not go through any industrial process that interferes with its natural goodness.
Pasteurisation is used to heat milk quickly at high temperatures. This increases shelf life, but destroys many natural enzymes and proteins that are good for your gut.
Homogenisation is used to create a uniform texture, but alters the composition of fats and proteins in milk.  
Our raw Gir cow A2 milk is naturally delicious with a rich, smooth texture.


Made with the goodness of our Gir cow milk:
Bilona Ghee
Cultured White Makkhan
Fresh Paneer
Lassi & Chaach
Gourmet Butters

Name: Hamfelder Hof Bauernmeierei GmbH & Co. KG
Description:
Eine Landwirtschaft, die zu einer lebenswerten Zukunft beiträgt!

Weil jede Form von Landwirtschaft und Lebensmittelverarbeitung das Gleichgewicht der Natur beeinflusst, liegt es in unserer Verantwortung, unseren landwirtschaftlichen Fußabdruck mit Bedacht zu setzen. Bei der Erzeugung und Verarbeitung unserer Produkte steht für uns daher immer ein zukunftsfähiges Beziehungsgeflecht zwischen Menschen, Tieren und der Natur im Mittelpunkt.

Um dem gerecht zu werden, haben wir zusammen mit den Höfen unserer Gemeinschaft ein umfassendes Gesamtkonzept zur Weiterentwicklung unserer ökologischen Landwirtschaft und Tierhaltung entwickelt – in Abgleich mit neuesten Erkenntnissen aus Wissenschaft und externer Beratung. Dieses Konzept haben wir in eigenen Qualitätsstandards festgeschrieben:

- Für eine Landwirtschaft in vielfältigen, gesunden Ökosystemen
- Für eine artgerechte Tierhaltung nach neuesten wissenschaftlichen Erkenntnissen
- Für zukunftsfähige Arbeitsbedingungen unserer Bauernfamilien

Und das über unsere Bioland-Richtlinien hinaus!

Name: AMFIGAL S.A.
Description:
Amfigal S.A. is a Greek dairy company founded with the aim of exploiting the rich livestock production of the region of Amfilochia and the greater Aitoloakarnania area (Western Greece) – a land known for its rich pastoral tradition and pristine natural environment.

We specialize in the production of high-quality Greek cheeses made from 100% fresh sheep's and goat's milk sourced exclusively from local farmers. Our portfolio includes PDO products such as Feta, Kefalograviera, and Tsalafouti, as well as premium traditional cheeses like Kefalotyri, Pecorino Amfilochias, and more.

Our state-of-the-art plant of 4.500 sq.m., is located in a plot of 20 acres in Kechrinia Amfilochia, away from the big urban centers.
The current production capacity of the plant is based on advanced production lines, having the potential to lead the field within the next years, assisting products of Aetoloakarnania conquer international markets.
Presently we are cooperating with 450 selected milk producers in Aetoloakarnania, reaching a production capacity that can exceed the 100 tons of sheep and goat milk per day, 6,500 tons of feta and 1,500 tons of graviera per year, maintaining close partnerships with a network of regional producers who share our values for quality and sustainability.

We proudly serve Greece’s leading retail chains aiming to expand internationally with a focus on B2B partnerships in retail, distribution, and HORECA.

OUR MISSION
To honor the rich dairy tradition of Amfilochia by crafting authentic, high-quality cheese products with respect for nature, local farmers, and the discerning tastes of modern consumers. We proudly bring the flavor of Greece to every table, combining time-honored methods with strict quality standards.

Name: Guernsey Dairy
Description:
Guernsey Dairy processes milk fresh from our world famous local 'Guernseys' and use it to produce a range of premium quality dairy products.

We receive around 8 million litres of milk every year and use it to produce and sell 6 million litres of milk, 200,000 kg of world class Guernsey butter and 24,000 kg of award winning cheese. We also make rich dairy cream, cheese and delicious flavours of Guernsey ice cream.

Our St Andrew's Guernsey Dairy was built in the heart of the island in 1951. It is owned and operated by the States of Guernsey and The States' Trading Supervisory Board has political responsibility.

Name: Lakshyafoodindia
Description:
Lakshya Food India Limited (LFIL) is a new age & innovative FMCG company based in Jind, Haryana. At LFIL, we are proud of having our own international standard dairy farm, producing millions of litres of milk per annum along with an extensive network of milk procurement infrastructure touching the lives of thousands of local farmers on a daily basis. This strength translates into quality products from our state of the art processing facility.

Lakshya food (India) Limited incorporated in the year 2010 under companies act 1956, the company manufactures market & sell milk and milk products under the Lakshya Brand (Milk , Dahi, Paneer, Ice cream, Ghee, Butter & Sweets) in bulk packing as well as consumer packing at the state level through its own sales and distribution network in Haryana, Tri city and himachal pardesh.

The company is ISO 22000:2005 certified company and maintains all standards require for hygienic and good quality products. Lakshya food (India) Limited is having handling capacity of about 100 million litres annually. The company has about 1000 village level milk collection, collecting milk from more than 40,000 farmers daily providing them latest milk testing equipments and good quality of feed and farm management services at their door step which provides LFIL with the best quality milk to create the freshest products.

Our mission is to provide innovative, wholesome and nutritious products at an affordable price to the millions of consumers every single day through our own company outlets and a network of distributors and retailers.

Name: TownFresh
Description:
Townfresh is born from a simple dream—to bring back the purity and freshness of countryside milk to your home. During the pandemic, we realized how important it is to have clean, nutritious food you can trust. That’s when Townfresh came to life.

We work closely with local farmers to deliver milk that’s free from antibiotics and adulteration, ensuring the highest quality in every drop. Our 3-Hour Fresh Raw Milk is delivered to your doorstep within hours of milking, so you can enjoy milk the way it’s meant to be—pure, fresh, and full of nutrition.

For us, it’s not just about milk; it’s about creating a connection to the roots and traditions we grew up with. Townfresh is our way of bringing a bit of the countryside to your table, every single day.

Name: MEGGLE Romania  |  S.C. MEGGLE Romania S.R.L
Description:
“Cea mai bună calitate posibilă pentru a răspunde preferințelor consumatorilor noștri” a spus Joseph Anton Meggle II atunci când a preluat compania de la tatăl său, în 1912. Această filosofie a excelenței dă gust produselor Meggle și acum și ne ghidează în tot ceea ce facem.

Pasiunea pentru gustul bun, alegerea ingredientelor potrivite, chiar mult dinainte ca standardele să fie reglementate de legislația europeană, au făcut ca Meggle să ajungă, dintr-o mică afacere de familie fondată în 1887 în Bavaria de Sus, o companie solidă la nivel internațional, caracterizată de inovație, creativitate și flexibilitate. Acum și în viitor, suntem în permanență preocupați de păstrarea calității înalte a produselor Meggle pentru consumatorii noștri.

Dorința de rezultate excelente în condiții de producție strict controlate, grija pentru mediu și pentru comunitate, preocuparea pentru sustenabilitate și înclinarea către inovație sunt ingredientele care ne-au marcat creșterea și drumul către viitor, fără a pierde gustul inconfundabil al tradiției și valorile sănătoase de familie, transmise din generație în generație.

Ne provoacă extinderea pe noi piețe, cunoașterea specificului local și a consumatorilor din mai multe spații geografice și ne bucură atunci când produsele noastre își găsesc locul în inima comunităților atât de diverse.

Meggle înseamnă tradiție, inovație, calitate, succes și orientare către consumatori.

Our Vision – Thinking Global.Acting Local. || Vocal For Local

Dairy NutriSols is a Research and Innovation Consortium that provides sustainable process solutions for the production of nutrient-dense, shelf-stable, healthy products to combat food and nutrition insecurity.

The strength of Dairy NutriSols is its team. We have brought together an unlikely cast of experts to tackle some of the biggest challenges we are facing in food/nutrition security. Diverse thinking will get us to creative, adoptable and sustainable solutions.

Our Mission: Modernizing food processing by incorporating data analytics and emerging technologies to promote a more efficient use of resources.

Our Vision: To pioneer cutting-edge scientific solutions that combat global food insecurity, ensuring wider access to nutritious, sustainable and affordable dairy products for all.

Name: Biomilk AG
Description:
Milchmanufaktur mit Herz und Hand:
Seit 1989 – lange bevor der Bio-Boom in der Schweiz einsetze – liefern Demeter-, Bio- zertifizierte sowie konventionell produzierende uns bekannte Bauern über 1.1 Mio. Liter Kuh- und 100‘000 Liter Schafmilch pro Jahr an Biomilk.  Besonders regional ist die zusätzlich für die Marke «Chäsi Worb» angelieferte Milch. In unserer hochmodernen Milchmanufaktur in Worb stellen wir daraus in schonender Handarbeit Pastmilch, Rahm, Jogurts, Desserts und Frischkäse her. Bewusste Geniesser finden die leckeren Biomilk-Produkte in allen Biofachläden in der ganzen Schweiz sowie in ausgewählten Reform- und Delikatessenläden. Name: swissmooh AG
Description:
swissmooh AG – Swiss quality with heart and vision

“swissmooh from Swiss Family Farms to global tables”

swissmooh is more than just a brand – we bring the tradition and passion of Swiss dairy production to the world.

As a subsidiary of the mooh cooperative, we represent over 3,700 Swiss dairy farmers who produce high-quality milk products every single day – with care, responsibility, and heart.

Founded nearly 15 years ago, swissmooh AG was created with a clear mission:

 To position Swiss dairy products successfully on international markets
 To offer farmers a stable and fair economic outlook
 And to promote sustainable growth in the Swiss dairy industry through innovation and long-term partnerships

Today, swissmooh is active in China under the Swiss Family Farms brand – a symbol of 100% Swissness, rooted in Alpine tradition and strong cooperative values.

 We believe in the power of collaboration.
swissmooh works with a wide network of partners across Asia and the Middle East, building bridges between Swiss quality and global demand.
With a strong international presence, clear brand positioning, and a deep respect for our farming community, we stand for: Quality. Sustainability. Genuine values.

 Interested in learning more or collaborating?
Let’s connect – and bring a taste of Switzerland to your market.

Name: Agriprom Asia
Description:
Agriprom is a dutch company specialized in integrated Dairy farming solutions worldwide, such as:

-	Total cow comfort concept
-	Manure Management
-       Barn Design & Consulting
-       Milking solutions

In 1994, Agriprom became the very first cow mattress manufacturer, using the unique way of combining 100% energetic latex with rubber. This has proven to be by far the most natural way of bringing the pasture into the barn. 

The dairy industry and offerings are rapidly changing and it is becoming increasingly challenging for dairy farmers to keep up. For this reason Agriprom is offering integrated “Total Solution” packages for the Asian market. Our global experience and network of partners combined with our local presence gives us the benefit of offering more suitable solutions to create new, more sustainable dairy farms and upgrade existing farms. Planning and integrations are crucial elements for running a sustainable and productive dairy farm; Let us help you!

Name: CONDOR SRL
Description:
After specializing for decades in the construction of cans for milk transport, dairy accessories, milking buckets with corresponding lids, receiver jars and other stainless steel components for milking parlors in cow farms (for example sanitary traps, vacuum tanks, filter holders and so on), in recent years, we have considerably enlarged our list of items.
Today we are able to produce for example also stainless steel milk pumps and stainless steel tanks for transport of milk and more edible liquids, equipped with wheels suitable for all types of ground.
Our products are constantly updated following evolution of farming systems, in order to supply all accessories needed.
Washing systems, vacuum tanks, level probes, milk filter holders and so on, complete our range of items.
Together with development of new technologies and systems to facilitate the farmer's work, Condor is working on new solutions to improve taking care of animal health in the various stages of farming.
Apart from all components of milking system, with several types of receiver jars, we can also provide our new product TATA, a mixer, heater and milk distributor created to mix and distribute fresh milk, milk powder or other type of creamy food to calves, piglets, lambs, baby goat and other baby animals.
Our production flexibility enables us to realize “made to measure” items (also for small quantities) and to become concrete partners for our Italian and international clients in solving particular problems.
The constant confrontation with our customers has helped us to improve our products and develop new projects and ideas, keeping our production in continuing evolution.
CONDOR dedicates great attention to the choice of raw materials and quality of components; our products are checked during all phases of production up to the final electro polishing phase that sanitizes all surfaces, making them rust-proof and perfectly suitable and safe to contain edible liquids.

Name: Profit - Inteligência em Rendimento
Description:
A Profit nasce com uma experiência de mais de 20 anos de trabalhos e excelentes resultados voltados a rendimento na indústria de queijos e traz consigo uma tecnologia revolucionária chamada CoaguSensTM que nos permite determinar a firmeza de gel exata para o corte da coalhada para os mais variados tipos de queijo. Essa determinação de ponto de corte é o principal fator que afeta o rendimento sobre o qual não tínhamos controle até aqui. Essa padronização da firmeza do gel no momento do corte é a chave qua faltava para o bom funcionamento das automações e sobretudo para a otimização do rendimento da fabricação e redução da variabilidade entre lotes, impactando assim diretamente a rentabilidade da fábrica de queijos.

Name: TAZA-Taste Of Health
Description:
The story of TAZA-Taste Of Health starts with honest intentions and humble beginnings. A venture made to provide safe, pure and healthy milk to a few families. 


It has been a decade now that TAZA's excellent quality, word spread and demand made us a trusted source to provide 100% pure cow milk to the health conscious people all over Lahore who had been consuming poor quality and adulterated milk before. 


At TAZA, best international practices of dairy farms are employed, all operations executed naturally, natural feed without additional growth hormones is given to cows, automated collection processes ensure absolute hygiene.


With the trust of our loyal customers, TAZA has been constantly expanding its operations and delivering nature's white gold to new areas everyday. 


For our customer's convenience, we operate through TAZA-Taste Of Health app form which one can place an order, schedule payment and cancel deliveries just with a few clicks. 


With a history of 13 years, with its dedicated team and best practices, TAZA is still on a mission to become the first choice of people when looking for pure cow milk.

Name: La Treccia
Description:
We are Luca and Oscar from Italy

We are cousins and our lives have been tangled together almost always. As children, we often went on family weekend trips. We both vividly remember our pitstops at gas stations where local farmers often had put up a cheese stall where you could buy little fresh mozzarellas. We loved the way the cheese melted on our tongues, as we moved along on small Italian country roads. It was a mind-blowing experience for two Italian kids who loved good food. And we have no doubt that this experience founded our love for freshly made cheese.

For a short period of time we went our different ways, only to get together again to act out our common love and passion for making cheese. That’s how La Treccia was founded in July 2014 in Denmark - far away from the Italian country roads but deeply connected to Italian food tradition merged with great organic Danish milk.

When you do business or shop at La Treccia, you are dealing with craftsmen who throw themselves into the making of great cheese with life and soul. Behind our cheese lies hundreds of hours of experimenting, frustrations, failure, success, and pure joy. As such you are not only taking great cheese with you home or to your restaurant, but also holding a little piece of us. We take great pride in carefully producing tasty fresh cheese for you.

Craftmanship all the way.
Everything that can be made by hand is made by hand here at La Treccia. Like it has been done for centuries in Italy. Making most by hand also means that you develop a strong relationship between craftsman and product and also between our cheese and you - the consumers. 

We sincerely hope you will enjoy our cheese, the quality, and taste that unites Italy and Denmark between crafts tradition and raw material.

At La Treccia we love to make new friends. As we put it on our wrapping, we wish that La Treccia contribute to an exquisite, tasty cultural experience and exchange

Name: Better Milk
Description:
There are multitude of problems plaguing the Indian dairy industry and we have a holistic approach towards those problems. We are committed to creating an end-to-end solution for all those challenges troubling the dairy farmers. The model straight away tackles the problems as it stands on 4 major pillars, which are as follows-
1. Provision of different varieties of quality cattle feed from major brands in accordance to the herd profiles of the farmers, along with necessary customization for the feed at the best price.
2. Regular check-ups of Cattle health, along with vaccine roaster, timely artificial Insemination programmes and call-on-emergency services
3. Technologically upgrading the farms with cost-efficient labour-minimized models with focus on automation and hygiene. Along with consultancy to access requisite support for the degradation of these farms
4. Real-time market information, establishing market linkages by setting up Customer base and bringing in institutional buyers in the platform
...
We are currently incubated at NIAM, Jaipur through grants from RKVY-Raftaar.
Contact us for more details at info.bettermilk@gmail.com/ +91 94653 23697

Name: Kaimai Cheese Company Limited
Description:
We are a ‘top shelf’ specialty cheese producer making genuinely ‘natural’ cheeses. Here at Kaimai, we are absolutely committed to flavour, taste, aroma and texture. In 2014 Kaimai factory is upgrading with UHT- long life milk processing, commissioning date expected to be April 2015 for UHT production to begin.

This is the future of milk - it is called UHT milk or long life milk. It comes in a box and it can live without refrigeration for 6 months until opened. It can be shipped far from its source of production, it can be traded internationally, it saves money that would otherwise go towards preservation, and reduces loss through spoilage.

Name: Dandy Don's HomeMade Ice Cream
Description:
Dandy Don’s HomeMade Ice Cream started in 1981 as a retail shop called The Creamery in Tarzana, CA. It soon became apparent to owners Linda and Don Whittemore that the real opportunities were in supplying super premium ice cream to Los Angeles area restaurants, hotels and country clubs. The Whittemores opened their manufacturing plant in Van Nuys and began creating over 100 varieties of ice cream—from classic vanilla bean to the more exotic like pink ginger and jalapeño grapefruit-- using only natural flavors, natural colors, the finest fresh fruits, nuts and high quality mix-ins, all made without preservatives. 

Dandy Don’s HomeMade Ice Cream boasts extremely low overrun and a rich 14-18 percent butterfat. Because the ice cream is so dense, a 3gal. tub weighs 18 lbs. and yields 72 four-ounce scoops making it a better value to operators and more profitable than most ice creams available to foodservice.

Dandy Don’s takes pride in working with chefs, pastry chefs and F&B directors to provide a large selection of flavors, or to create custom flavors unique to their operation. Many of Los Angeles’ upscale restaurants are known for their signature desserts featuring Dandy Don’s HomeMade Ice Cream.

Don Whittemore’s early career in promotion at both RCA & Capitol Records prepared him for the other component of Dandy Don’s—catering special events with ice cream sundaes.  Dandy Don's Sundae Bar Catering brings the ice cream parlor experience - with pre-scooped ice cream in disposable cups, spoons & scores of gourmet toppings - to any size event from birthday parties with 25 guests to business events and movie premieres with thousands of attendees. On a regular basis, Dandy Don’s serves corporate events; for example, 800 sundaes for a mall opening to 3100 sundaes for a large property management firm. Sales inquiries: Dandy Don or Linda Whittemore at 1.800.DANDYDON

Name: Morballo Farms
Description:
At Morballo Farms, we are dedicated to providing high-quality dairy and meat products at affordable prices, while prioritizing organic food and sustainability. Our cows and goats are raised naturally in the lush Soon Sakesar valley in Punjab, Pakistan, resulting in superior milk production.

We never use hormonal additives or artificial treatments, ensuring pure and wholesome milk. Our animals are fed a nutritious diet of organic grass, hay, and natural supplements, promoting their well-being and the integrity of our products. From this fresh milk, we craft a range of delicious dairy products, including creamy butter and smooth yogurt made using traditional fermentation methods.

Our meat comes from livestock raised with care on pesticide-free pastures, ensuring tenderness, flavor, and freedom from harmful additives. We maintain strict quality control by sourcing directly from our organic farms. At Morballo Farms, we believe accessing pure and organic food is a fundamental right, and we make it affordable without compromising on quality. 

Join us in supporting sustainable and ethical farming practices and experience the difference of Morballo Farms.

Name: Paul Flynn | Global Senior Executive Leader

In addition to his current role as General Manager for Ornua’s Saudi Arabian JV, Al Wazeen, Paul has served as the Head of Foodservice & Retail Food for Glanbia and Fonterra. 


► KEY BUSINESS ACHIEVEMENTS
At Fonterra, Paul galvanised a business unit and grew it to US$47 million with a 13% EBIT. That business has grown to a ~US$135 million operation today.

Next, at Glanbia, he took on a business unit and challenged the team to find an extra gear. He then delivered growth of 176% in a trying economic environment.

In his current role, Paul was tasked with heading up a business start up with a $40 million investment, which has since grown to over 100 people. The team has delivered strong strategy execution and growth, with key group Quality and H&S metrics achieved.


► FEEDBACK

Dit doen wij al sinds 2007, vanuit een kleine, beheersbare organisatie met weinig overheadkosten. Wij zijn flexibel, professioneel en spelen uitstekend in op de kwaliteitseisen van de afnemers. Hiermee leggen wij de basis voor een langdurige samenwerking met onze afnemers.

Bij alles wat wij doen, draait het om het maken van de beste melk. Wij kunnen dat beloven dankzij de toewijding en expertise van onze melkveehouders en het daaruit voortvloeiende kwaliteitsbesef. Dit zorgt er voor dat de kwaliteit van de melk hoger ligt, dan het Nederlandse gemiddelde. Wij garanderen de kwaliteit door streng toezicht op de geleverde kwaliteit en door het hanteren van strikte leveringsvoorwaarden. Bovendien hebben we het traject van koe tot zuivelfabriek volledig traceerbaar en transparant gemaakt.

Het vakmanschap en de bewezen kwaliteit van onze melkveehouders maakt NoorderlandMelk een interessante en integere handelspartner voor de melkverwerkende industrie. Een partner die meedenkt en in beweging blijft. Voortdurend kijken we naar marktverbreding, zinvolle innovaties en verbetering van de efficiëntie.
