Name: ET4D
Description:
ET4D is granted by ICT-AGRI-FOOD. The project covers 11 participants from 6 EU countries and 2 participants from 2 non-EU countries (Germany, Hungary, Denmark, Estonia, Poland, Finland, Turkey and Israel) listed below: 

1. Leibniz Institute for Agricultural Engineering and Bioeconomy - main contact and project leader, Sabrina Hempel
2. AgHiTech LTD - main contact, Thomas Banhazi
3. Innvite ApS - main contact, Thomas Bjerre 
4. Estonian University of Life Sciences - main contact, Eugen Kokin
5. MIGAL Galilee Research Institute - main contact, Uri Marchaim
6. University of Zielona Góra - main contact, Joanna Frątczak-Muller
7. TOKAT GAZIOSMANPASA UNIVERSITY - main contact, Sefa Tarhan
8. AKI Agrárközgazdasági - main contact, Ildiko Tikasz
9. OULU - Centre for Wireless Communications – Networks and Systems - main contact, Konstantin Mikhaylov 
10. Wroclaw University of Environmental and Life Sciences - main contact, Sebastian Opalinski 
11. Aarhus University – Department of Electrical and Computer Engineering - main contact, Claus Aage Grøn Sørensen

ET4D's main purpose is to:

1) Validate and expand the reporting frame of a data management system (DMS) with embedded sensors for on-farm use to collect and process data from dairy barns.

2) Demonstrate the system’s applicability in real word application by deploying it in commercial farms in different countries with different climatological and socio-economic boundary conditions.

3) Identify information requirements of different interest groups and demonstrate the potential added value of the information sharing for the farmer and other interest groups.

Name: Uttarakhand Cooperative Dairy Federation Limited
Description:

Organization has registered brand name, known as “AANCHAL". The Uttarakhand Co-operative Dairy Federation Ltd. Name: Trappist Dairy
Description:
Trappist Dairy is dedicated to providing dairy products of the best quality for you and your family's daily consumption.
 
Trappist Dairy believes that milk is the best natural source of nutrition.
 
We started out as a small dairy farm operated under the Trappist Monastery on Lantau Island in the early 60's. There was once a very kind-hearted monk who donated dairy cattle to the Monastery. Impressed by the smooth, soft milk produced, the priests then founded a small operation to supply bottled fresh milk for the neighborhoods and visitors, in return for the blessings received. The operation carried on until the early 80's when the plant was relocated from Lantau to the manufacturing plant in Yuen Long, and appointed managing board of directors in order to meet increasing demand for the Trappist brand fresh milk from the public.

Name: Marcoot Jersey Creamery
Description: We are a seventh-generation family-owned Jersey dairy farm in Greenville, Illinois. Name: Caseificio Di Vagno
Description:
La nostra storia, la nostra arte casearia

Il Caseificio Di Vagno, nasce nel 1993 a Conversano dall'esperienza e dall' iniziativa di 
Francesco, che supportato dalla sua famiglia , dà vita all'azienda a conduzione familiare.
L'attenzione al dettaglio, alla qualità delle materie prime, al rispetto per le tecniche di produzione 
artigianali, ci hanno da sempre permesso di fornire prodotti tradizionali dall'ottimo gusto e genuini.
Ancora oggi , dopo più di 20 anni, abbiamo scelto di non modificare i processi produttivi coerentemente 
con l'antica tradizione casearia pugliese garantendo allo stesso tempo la massima sicurezza ed igiene 
degli alimenti secondo le severe disposizioni legislative vigenti.
Per realizzare i nostri prodotti utilizziamo solo dell’ottimo latte vaccino, che raccogliamo quotidianamente , con i nostri mezzi, dalle nostre masserie di fiducia site a pochi chilometri dal nostro laboratorio.
Dal latte fresco viene poi ottenuta la cagliata tramite tecnica del "siero ad innesto"; l’impasto che ne deriva viene poi lavorato a mano, come un tempo, dai nostri mastri casari che con passione ogni giorno contribuiscono a far arrivare sulle vostre tavole prodotti genuini dal sapore unico.
Tradizione, genuinità, passione sono i capisaldi del nostro lavoro al servizio dei nostri clienti.

Name: Forest Farm - The Organic Dairy
Description:
An award winning organic dairy farm in Aberdeenshire, home to a small herd of happy free range organic cows and Scotland's first milk vending machines.

Forest Farm is an award winning organic dairy, home to our small herd of happy organic cows who have the freedom to roam and graze on lush green pastures, just as nature intended!
Our certified organic farm is also home to Scotland's first milk vending machine, established to provide our local community with the opportunity to buy milk from the cows they see grazing on their doorstep, as fresh as it can be!
As Scotland’s longest established organic dairy, we believe our organic milk is the most pure and natural you can find, all the way from grass to glass. It is gently pasteurised right here on farm in our brand new facility to maximise freshness and non-homogenised (unprocessed) to preserve its natural goodness. 
This means the cream rises to the top - a dream for the person lucky enough to open the bottle! If you prefer whole milk simply shake, twist and enjoy!
We don't use any chemical fertilisers, pesticides, herbicides or GM feeds – not on our girls watch! Instead we work with nature and apply the highest welfare standards to ensure the whole farm works in harmony, year after year. It’s a chain of goodness that begins with healthy soil, and finishes with healthy cows, milk and people.

Our wonderfully fresh organic milk has no food miles and is available between 6.30 am and 8 pm every day. You can even fill up using one of our reusable glass bottles and if you time it right (3.30 pm - 5.30 pm) watch our cows being milked. It's no wonder people are calling our milk the cream of Aberdeen!

Please also follow our moooovements on Instagram and Twitter @forestfarmdairy.

Within minutes of the morning milking, our milk is gently gravity-fed into the making rooms just a few metres away... soon to be made into cheese, butter, yoghurt and delicious bottles of raw milk. 

Read more about our story and how we care for our land here: https://fenfarmdairy.co.uk/pages/about

Description:
Supreme Silage India Pvt Ltd, an Agribusiness start-up having signed MOU with a leading USA multinational company is focusing on bringing innovative products in Animal feed & fodder domain. An upcoming, professionally driven company developed completely new products to help increasing the milk yield and quality. Looking at the huge opportunity to raise the milk production in the country our company develops value added superior products with collaboration with American multinational company. We are pioneer in this field and will create the benchmark in this industry. We want to bring this nutritious valued added product at the door steps of the Dairy farmers. We are aiming at becoming one of the leading companies in Animal feed & fodder domain where people are nurtured to cherish their dream. 
Supreme Silage India Pvt Ltd. set up during August 2015 is the pioneer in making Silage in packed retail bale form for the dairy sector in India. This product is going to transform the whole green fodder industry and bring the convenience at the door steps of the dairy farmers. We do the business with full transparency, honesty and in most ethical ways keeping our basic core values intact. We believe in collaboration and cooperation to bring the best for the farmers by shaking hands with top notch innovation and technology driven Global Companies. We believe in bringing success to all our stakeholders including customers, employees and business partners.
Vision:
To become the leading green fodder & feed Company driven by science, technology and innovation delivering higher values to the customers.

Core Values:
1.	Trust and Credibility 
2.	Honesty & Integrity
3.	Collaboration and Cooperation
4.	Treating everyone with Respect and Dignity
5.	Health, Safety and Environment

Name: Heikkilän Juustola
Description:
Pieni ja ketterä, pääasiassa kahden ihmisen voimin pyörivä juustola Pirkanmaan ja Kanta-Hämeen rajalla Laitikkalan makukylässä. Valmistamme ensiluokkaisesta suomalaisesta luomumaidosta kaikenlaisia juustoja.
Perinteisiä, kuten leipäjuustoa ja piimäjuustoa
Ruuanlaittoon sopivia, grillijuustoa ja salaattijuustoa
ja juustokellarissa kypsyvät kittipintaiset helmet.
Valmistamme myös hapanmaitotuotteita, sekä pakkaamme pastöroitua maitoa pääasiassa kahviloille ja ravintoloille, mutta myös kuluttajille. Laadukas kahvimaitomme tunnetaankin jo ilahduttavan monessa paikassa Helsingissä ja Tampereella. 
Pyrimme tekemään tuotteet aina tilausten mukaan, jotta asiakkaat saavat ne mahdollisimman tuoreina ja näin vähennämme myös hävikkiä. 
Toimitamme pääsääntöisesti itse tuotteet omalla kalustolla. Jakelua kerran viikossa Tampereelle ja Helsinkiin, sekä niiden välille. 

A small and agile, husband and wife run dairy from the village of Laitikkala in Pirkanmaa region. Top notch milk, yogurt, cheeses etc  from top notch finnish organic milk. 
We have variety of products, ranging from ice cream to rind covered, cellar ripened cheeses, not forgetting tradiotional finnish delicasies such as leipäjuusto and pitojuusto. Feel free to ask, if it can be made out of milk we are interested in making it for you.
We also supply several high end cafes with milk in Helsinki and Tampere. Our products are made per order to ensure they are received as fresh as possible and with as long as possible shelf life. We do not like food waste and do our best to protect our clients from that as well.
Deliveries to Helsinki and Tampere are weekly and free of charge (orders over 50€+tax).

A 100-acre, single-location, multi-product dairy ecosystem where purity is engineered at scale.

Processing 5+ million litres of milk daily, SONAI is powered by 5,000 farmers, 10,000 collection societies, and 5,000 people, working as one integrated network of trust.

From milk powders, ghee, butter, AMF, cheese, paneer, UHT milk, whey protein, caseinates, and lactose — every product is driven by hands-free automation, strict cold-chain control, and world-class quality systems.

Trusted across India. Exported to 25+ countries.

Recognised as a Three-Star Export House and No.1 at the Indian Cheese Festival.

The Power of Scale. The Soul of Purity.

Name: Larson Acres Inc.
Description:
Welcome to Larson Acres, Inc where six Larson families spanning five generations combine our interests, efforts, and enthusiasm for farming to operate our dairy business in the Town of Magnolia.

Our family has been honored to be a part of Magnolia for nearly 90 years, and we value our place in the community. We started out as one farming family and now have six families of Larsons working on our family farm. We began with just 80 acres and six cows and have grown to more than 5,000 acres of agricultural land and care for 2,900 cows. 

At Larson Acres, dairy farming is about producing high-quality milk. But it’s also much more than that. It is about doing what’s right for the families in our community, our animals and our environment.

Description:
PT. Pamenang Buana Raya is a company based in Malang, East Java, Indonesia. Our goal is to give you the best design and construction for your dairy farm project.
We can assist with planning, design, drawings, construction cost estimation, construction management and equipment selection. We can provide services needed for a new or expanding dairy farm with a dedicated and experienced staff.

We have more than 10 years of experience in dairy farm projects across Indonesia. Our clients includes Greenfields Indonesia, Raffles Pacific Harvest, Great Giant Livestock and Santosa Agrindo.

From start to finish, we will be there to meet the demands of our clients and we ensure that we provide the answers needed from conceptual design all the way through construction. We understand that every farm operates differently and has different needs for their facility. We design and build to meet those needs and ensures that our clients get their facility exactly as they have conceived it.

Designing a dairy facility is not just completing a design layout and general plans. Failure to maintain communication with owners and the lack of necessary details has caused major issues in newly constructed farms. With our experience and skilled staff we ensure all our design and construction meet the industry standard.

The production site located in the southern part of the country  is equipped with modern infrastructure and technologies that guarantee the production of top-noch quality  products. During its 23 years of operation, DONIDO has developed state-of-the-art solutions for small businesses as well as multichain conglomerates around the globe. Above all, we strive to create customized products at highly competitive prices that match the unique needs of clients.  Excellent customer service is our highest priority.

Name: Kimmus Kitchen
Description: 'Kimmu's Kitchen is a women-led startup focussing on creating purest form or organic and hand made desi Ghee. A mom of two couldn't find good quality ghee at retail stores so she started to churn the ghee from buffalo milk herself. During the process, she realised that the quality and purity of milk we get in metropolitan cities is substandard. She went all the way to the healthiest villages of Punjab to source the best, grass-fed buffalos and churned the purest form of Ghee there can be. No additives, No Preservatives, No color. Just the plain old-fashioned pure ghee that the new generation has not even been introduced to.'

During a time of rapid development and constant changes some things remain timeless.

Insistence and commitment for high-quality products

Since 1979 the company has achieved considerable success in Greece and abroad, as well as constantly increasing growth rates that strengthen CHELMOS position in the globalised market.

Name: Functional Lipid Leader
Description:
Qingdao Seawit Life Science Co., Ltd. is a high-tech enterprise characterized by scientific research and innovation. Its core shareholders include well-known scholars and lipid industry experts such as academicians and Guanghua Award winners.

Seawit uses proprietary precision and moderate processing technology, which not only effectively retains fat-soluble nutrients and has good stability, but also effectively controls the generation of harmful substances such as trans fatty acids, glycidyl esters, and 3-MCPD, and the product quality reaches advanced standards. 



Seawit is committed to providing lipid application solutions for core customers. Its main products include:
1) Functional lipids: tuna oil and its powder, high EPA fish oil powder, high Omega-3 fish oil powder, algae oil DHA and its powder, ARA and its powder; MCT powder, OPO powder, CLA powder, MLCT powder;
2) Special purpose vegetable oils and their powders: high sterol wheat germ oil, walnut oil, soybean oil, corn oil, flaxseed oil, pumpkin seed oil; 3) Lipid flavor products: virgin coconut oil powder, butter powder, cream powder, coconut cream powder, etc.

Name: Balantinos Cretan Dairy
Description:
Our company produce since 1928, pure traditional cretan products, like Cretan Graviera, kefalotyri, anthotiro. white cheese etc.

An up-to-date factory in Varypetro of Nea Kydonia, respect for tradition, continuous investments on modern cheese-making technology as well as a complete, first-rate network from the dairy-farmer to the distribution of its end products have led the company to its fair conquest of the local market, still expanding. In addition, the business has won one of the top places in consumer preference not only around the entire Crete, but also in the great urban centers (Athens, Thessaloniki, Patras and other) offering all products of traditional Cretan cheese-making, incomparable in terms of both taste and quality.
Today, the fourth generation of this family business aims to increase its productivity potentials so as to continue to meet constantly growing demand.

Name: PDDP Central Society
Description:
Peoples Dairy Development Project Central Society generally known as PDDP Central Society is a leading company in the dairy industry, committed to delivering the finest quality milk and milk products to our customers. With a passion for innovation and sustainability, we specialize in producing a wide range of dairy offerings, including milk, ghee, curd, ice cream, butter, SMP and more.
Our products are crafted with the highest standards of care and quality, sourced directly from trusted farmers, and processed using advanced techniques that preserve the natural goodness of dairy. Our focus is on providing nutritious, delicious, and safe products that families and businesses can rely on.
We are dedicated to sustainability, constantly working to improve our environmental footprint and promote ethical farming practices. With a rich history of excellence and a forward-thinking approach, we aim to be a trusted partner for consumers and businesses alike in the ever-evolving dairy industry.
Join us in our journey to bring quality dairy products to the world, while supporting healthy lifestyles and a sustainable future.

Name: Margarita Cheese Products
Description:
Margarita Cheese began with a dream to create delicious, preservative-free cheese. Founded by a 19 year old with a vision of bringing value to the milk famers in a village called bolawatta, we now produce premium mozzarella, ricotta, cream cheese, and processed cheese using fresh milk from local farmers.

Our mission is to deliver healthy, flavorful cheese while supporting communities and promoting sustainable practices. Trusted by top restaurants, hotels, and supermarkets, we bring quality and care to every bite.

Name: PRATAP GHEE
Description:
PRATAP GHEE is an initiative of Late Sh. Pyare Lal Ghee Wale,  who belonged to village Dahar near Panipat in Haryana. In 1958, he started Desi Ghee business from Khari Baoli, Delhi. Former chairman of MCD Shahdara, New Delhi Sh. Pyare Lal was a spiritual man and believed that nothing but the best should be offered to God. Ghee is an essential ingredient of all Hindu rituals and should be served most piously. He said, "Ghee is Amrit, and adulterating it is the same as poisoning. In 2004 he took sanyas from grihastha ashram , & after that, he lived in Rishikesh for the rest of his life.

Partap Ghee has cherished its clients faith and unwavering trust for over six decades. In the Indian market, Partap Ghee has been synonymous with 'Purity' and it has earned a reputation and heritage for real traditional taste over the years. We have painstakingly tried to replicate the homely process. According to ayurveda, the traditional procedure produces pure desi ghee, which has considerably better flavour, aroma, and nutritional value than ghee that has undergone modern processing.

Name: COLEME
Description: COLEME es la sigla de Cooperativa de Lechería de Melo, una empresa láctea fundada en 1932 en la ciudad de Melo, departamento de Cerro Largo, Uruguay. Es la cooperativa láctea más antigua del país. COLEME se dedica a la producción y comercialización de leche y derivados lácteos, como quesos, yogures y postres. Cuenta con una planta industrial moderna en Melo y una amplia red de distribución en todo el territorio uruguayo. La cooperativa tiene un fuerte compromiso con el desarrollo local y regional. Emplea a más de 60 personas en la zona de Cerro Largo y genera un impacto económico significativo en la comunidad. COLEME también apoya a los productores lecheros locales, brindándoles asistencia técnica y financiera.

Name: Fresca Rebeca
Description:
Ofrecemos leche fresca de vacas de libre pastoreo al canal HORECA y a consumidor final utilizando sólo envases reutilizables y altos estándares productivos. 

En los primeros 12 meses de operación ya hemos entregado más de 250.000 litros, fundamentalmente a heladerías y queserías. Desde marzo de 2023 vendemos leche en botella a familias que buscan productos naturales, con bienestar animal y de baja huella en su producción.

Name: Magazzino italia
Description:
The Italian Food Hub in the Middle East & North Africa

La “vision” di MAGAZZINO ITALIA consiste nel portare i prodotti alimentari italiani ad un alto livello.

Introdurre prodotti di alta gamma; istruire il nuovo consumatore sulla tradizione del cibo italiano caratterizzata da semplicità, sicurezza e salubrità; far sperimentare ai consumatori nuovi gusti e sapori tipici del Mediterraneo; assicurare una disponibilità continua dei prodotti sugli scaffali ed un alto livello di qualità.

Realizzare la più avanzata piattaforma per la internazionalizzazione delle filiere agroalimentari italiane nelle Regioni del c.d. MENA, con “protagonisti” gli agricoltori che applicano disciplinari etici e certificati.

Valorizzare i patrimoni agroalimentari autoctoni di TUTTO il territorio italiano, garantendo la origine e la tracciabilità.

Internazionalizzare, in via esclusiva, prodotti «100% italiani» nei Paesi del Medio Oriente e del Nord Africa.

Name: Nurtureplus Pty Ltd (Aimilk Australia)
Description:
Nurtureplus Pty Ltd (Australia) established in 2011 started as a infant formula products producer and supplier to customers globally.

Nurtureplus as a founder of dairy brand - Aimilk Australia (www.aimilk.com.au), the company has ventured to focus primarily on supplying Infant Formula and Baby Nutritional Foods amongst other dairy products such as Full Cream Milk Powder and Skim Milk Powder. With worldwide customers consisting within Asia - China, Hong Kong, Malaysia, Indonesia, Philippine, and Vietnam, India, and other Middle East and North Africa regions, the company is proud to be known as a professional and trustworthy supplier of Australia Victoria dairy products.

Nurtureplus has ventured with a well-known Australian dairy food manufacturer to establish a new production line tailored to output Infant Formula. The production line has been fully producing Aimilk infant formula products since January 2012. Nurtureplus also has a strong networks and relationships with other top Australia manufacturers in pursuing to provide the best quality products for our customers, and in sustaining a long term bi-lateral business relationship.

Name: Appleton Steel, Inc.
Description: Appleton Steel is the clear choice of hoot rimming professionals and dairies around the world.   With state of the art technology and innovation our chutes offer maximum comfort and safety to both trimmer and cow.  Trimmers and dairies alike know "if you're going to get a chute, make it an Appleton!"

Name: Al-Safi For Import & Trade
Description: Al‑Safi for Import & Trade began operations in 1952, specializing in importing and distributing FMCG—dairy, beverages, detergents, confectionery, food supplements, and home & personal care. Today, we work with 5,000+ retailers and 70 wholesalers—alongside key accounts, pharmacies, and food‑service partners—to ensure nationwide coverage across the West Bank and Gaza. We manage a portfolio of ~40 international brands under exclusive distribution. Our operations are anchored using FEFO , supported by a fleet of dry/reefer/freezer trucks and cash vans. We continue to innovate through the Al‑Safi Light line—health‑focused alternatives including Stevia sweeteners, Green Cola, and Nilky plant‑based milks—delivering trusted quality at competitive prices.

Name: The Dorset Dairy Co
Description: Cultured dairy experts. Makers of Dorset's answer to Greek yoghurt and kefir using free-range West Country milk.

Name: Penn Dairy LLC
Description:
Penn Dairy is a highly specialized manufacturer with a large production capacity. We use the best combination of traditional and innovative methods to produce the best quality dairy products. This is an SQF Certified manufacturing facility. Additional certifications include: Non-GMO Project Verified, Organic, Halal, Circle K Kosher, Super Kosher and Grade A Certified.

We work with many Private Label customers and partners in co-packing. Penn Dairy’s high quality products are the result of our innovation and commitment to the dairy industry.

Name: Santa Gadea
Description:
We started building Santa Gadea in 2003, and we have created Spain's benchmark sustainable farm. Here, our organic goat cheese is produced using only our own goats' milk.

At the farm, our circular economy works along 3 interdependent work areas: agriculture, livestock and creamery. Our goats, which live in the farm, feed on our crops. The manure and the creamery residue are in turn fast-transformed, with our biotechnology, into a rich organic compost for our lands.

Santa Gadea has a negative carbon footprint thanks to the on-site generation of renewable energies and what our bioechnology has cut back in livestock emmissions.

Our organic flock of 1500 goats has the highest sanitary qualification (T3M4) and is also oficially CAEV-free (caprine virus).

Santa Gadea milk, the raw material we produce our cheese with, is therefore not just 100% farmstead, but of unmatched quality, and it enables us to present a wide variety of organic goat products: soft-paste cheeses, pressed cheeses, fresh lactic cheeses, cheese in olive oil, UHT goat milk, butter and desserts.

All 100% organic.

Name: Milk Agro
Description: Elaboramos Michel, nuestro mejor queso, combinando tradición artesanal, sabor auténtico dominicano y altos estándares de calidad, gracias a una planta de producción moderna y de alta tecnología, que garantiza una experiencia confiable y superior para el consumidor.

Name: Apollo Milchprodukte GmbH
Description:
Apollo Milchprodukte is an independent global dairy purchaser based in Germany, active in all major dairy producing and consuming markets. We provide excellence for the food industry right across the board, in terms of product quality, logistics services, market intelligence and risk management solutions.

The services we provide add something to the dairy sector that few others can add - we add vision and value. Apollo Milchprodukte offers you the business intelligence, partnerships, and support that you need in order to respond quickly and effectively to today's dynamic and globalized dairy market.

Apollo Milchprodukte supplies a wide range of dairy ingredients, dairy proteins, cheeses and liquid dairy. These are available in a variety of qualities, specifications, and pack sizes.

Name: Fine Cheesemakers of Scotland
Description:
Celebrating Fine Cheeses – Made in Scotland - Simple!
Welcome to Fine Cheesemakers of Scotland, the heart of Scottish artisanal cheese production. Our group represents a collective of passionate cheesemakers dedicated to preserving and promoting the rich heritage and outstanding quality of Scottish cheeses. From the rugged Highlands to the fertile Lowlands, our members craft a diverse array of cheeses that capture the essence of Scotland's unique landscapes and traditions.

Scotland’s diverse climates and terroir contribute to a wide range of unique flavours in our cheeses. From the creamy, mild Dunlop to the crumbly, tangy Anster and on to the bold, robust Minger, there’s a Scottish cheese to suit every palate.
We invite you to join us in celebrating the rich heritage and exceptional quality of Scottish cheeses. Whether you're a distributor looking to extend your range, a retailer searching for something unique, a restauranteur seeking to elevate your menu, or a consumer passionate about artisanal products, our members have what you're looking for.
By choosing Scottish cheese, you are not only enjoying a unique product but also supporting sustainable farming, local communities, and a proud tradition of craftsmanship. Together, we can ensure that the legacy of Scottish cheese-making continues to thrive and delight taste buds around the world.
Explore our range, meet our cheesemakers, and taste the tradition. Connect with us and be a part of our journey to champion, promote, and enjoy the finest cheeses Scotland has to offer.

Name: SE Agricultural and Commercial Solutions
Description:
Specializing in servicing the Dairy Industry with a variety of products and services.  We are your partner in the dairy industry and stand at the leading edge of advancement and support for yesterday's, today's and tomorrow's dairy farmer.  We specialize in products that are "priced right," "work right," and "built right".

Our first contribution to the industry was our Step Saver crowd gate, over 80% of our original installations are still in use today.  It proved to be dependable and economical to own.  The same is true today.

Since then we have grown and have added Construction and Resource Management to our list of capabilities to better serve our customers needs and wants.

Name: Vitomega Colostrum B.V.
Description: Vitomega Colostrum is active in collecting and processing excess colostrum, the “mother’s milk” produced by cows after giving birth to a calf. Colostrum contains high fractions of immunoglobulins, providing a wide range of health benefits to humans and animals

Name: Van Lindenberg Ingredients BV
Description:
+ Van Lindenberg Ingredients is a medium-size international supplier to the food and cattle feed industry. High quality dairy ingredients are supplied to various customers in large volumes, but also in small consignments if required. 
+ Van Lindenberg Ingredients sources a wide range of raw materials from leading producers. 
Most of the raw materials listed above can be supplied in a recombined variant. To do this, we standardise and mix the raw materials to a stipulated and required specification. Naturally the products are not used and delivered until they have been checked and meet the correct criteria.
+ Van Lindenberg Ingredients is GMP+ and SecureFeed certified. Reliability and quality are very important at Van Lindenberg Ingredients. We check and safeguard the quality of our products. Food safety is thereby essential. In order to achieve this, we ensure that all our shipments comply with all international legal requirements. We thereby work with certified external laboratories that carry out inbound and outbound checks for us.

Name: New Zealand Dairy Collaborative Limited
Description:
NZDCL is a brand new nutritional dairy powder manufacturing facility, constructed to meet the highest standards of food quality. Operating under MPI's severe supervision, our automated canning equipment with modern technology is infant formula capable.

Our product range includes but is not limited to: full cream/Skim deer, goat, sheep, cow, functional and nutritional formulated milk powder for all demographics such as children, students, working class, pregnant women, gym-goers, the elderly, and the whole family.

Description:

Products:

2. Uht sterilizer, 
3. Capping machine, 
4. Straw machine, 
5. Deaerator, 
6. Pasteurizer, 
7. Cip system, 
8. Enzymolysis system, 
9. Aseptic tank, 
10. Turnkey solutions of processing lines for the milk, juice production. 

Top quality, top aseptic technology in design, completely fit to fill dairy products, such as milk, goat milk, creams, yogurt, plant protein milk, and as well as various juice, vegetable juice drinks, tea, liquor, egg liquid, purees, etc. 
Founded in 2003, rewarded over 20 national invention patents, ISO, HACCP certificates, having serviced over 300 domestic and foreign dairy/juice companies, exported to over 26 countries in Asia, Africa, Europe, America.

The KFB series aseptic filling machines integrate advanced aseptic concepts from both domestic and international sources, innovatively employing the "Quadruple Aseptic Assurance" technology. This ensures the equipment achieves world-class performance in sterility, production stability, and automation levels compared to similar domestic and international products. As a result, it is widely applicable for manufacturing neutral beverages such as pure milk, pure goat milk, soy milk, and plant-based protein drinks.

The KFB series filling machines are categorized by product configuration and capacity into: 200S (slim 200ml), 200B (base 200ml), 250S (slim 250ml), 250B (base 250ml), 1000S (slim 1000ml), 200Z (prisma 200ml), 250Z (prisma 250ml), 330Z (prisma 330ml), 500Z (prisma 500ml), 1000Z (prisma 1000ml).

Name: Moravia Lacto a.s.
Description:
Historie společnosti Moravia Lacto sahá až do roku 1928. Tehdy byla založena německými zemědělci pod názvem „Zentralmolkerei für Iglau und Umgebung, G.M.B.H“. Když v roce 1932 přistoupili do družstva čeští zemědělci, byl připojen název „Ústřední mlékárny pro Jihlavu a okolí, z.s. s.r.o.“.Představenstvo Rolnicko mlékařského a drůbežnického družstva z.s. s r. o. dne 26. 10. 1946 rozhodlo o stavbě nové mlékárny, která začala v říjnu 1947. K 1. 1. 1951 bylo družstvo znárodněno pod názvem Horácké mlékárny n.p. Jihlava. V prosinci 1951 byl v mlékárně zahájen pravidelný provoz, kapacita zpracovaného mléka byla 30.000 litrů denně. K 1. 8. 1960 byly Jihlavské mlékárny, n.p., začleněny do organizační a výrobní struktury Lacrumu, n.p., Brno. Na začátku devadesátých let byl majetek mlékárny privatizován a k 1. 1. 1994 byla založena společnost JIMA Jihlavské mlékárny, a.s., která sdružovala mlékárnu v Jihlavě a v Telči. Majoritním vlastníkem se stala česká společnost INTERLACTO, spol. s r.o. 
V rámci nové marketingové strategie od 1. 1. 2004 nahradil název Jihlavské mlékárny, a. s., nový název Moravia Lacto, a. s. a společnost od března 2004 dodává své výrobky na trh pod značkou Moravia.

ICCA è tradizione che evolve, qualità che viaggia lontano e un prodotto pensato per arrivare sulla tavola del consumatore finale con fiducia, valore e autenticità.

- An toàn & phù hợp rộng: Không hormone, kháng sinh, lactose, gluten, GMO.

Name: Sulminas
Description:
Nossa história começa no ano de 1960, quando o casal de descendentes italianos, Artur Anghinoni e Isola Testa Anghinoni, trabalhadores rurais de Serra Negra no interior de São Paulo, compram a banca de queijos no Mercado Municipal da Lapa até então o segundo maior centro varejista da capital Paulista.

Atentos ao crescimento populacional da cidade de São Paulo e enxergando a oportunidade de atender as demandas deste crescimento, em 1961 o casal adquirir um laticínio em Borda da Mata (Sul de Minas) onde iniciam a produção de queijo prato, mussarela, queijo minas frescal, ricota e o pouco conhecido na capital paulista na época, o queijo minas meia cura que logo atingiu o sucesso de vendas.

Fato este que em 1968 houve a necessidade de abrir a venda do queijo minas meia cura com a marca Roseli para o atacado, devido a grande demanda por este item. A marca Roseli foi introduzida nos produtos lácteos em homenagem à filha do casal. Com as crescentes vendas e o sucesso da marca Roseli houve a necessidade de aumentar a produção, porém o laticínio em Borda da Mata já não suportava tal demanda e em 1977 foi adquirido o laticínio Sul Minas na cidade de Santana do Sapucaí, hoje Silvanópolis, sul de Minas Gerais.

Name: Kapıdağ Süt Ürünleri
Description:
Kapıdağ Süt Ürünleri olarak, 1978 yılından beri süt ve süt ürünleri üretiminde ailemizin özverisini ve kalitesini yansıtmaya devam ediyoruz. İlk adımımızı Karşıyaka köyündeki küçük mandıramızda, günlük 1 ton süt işleyerek atmıştık. Bugün, Erdek Karayolu üzerinde, günlük 40 ton süt işleme kapasitesine sahip modern üretim tesisimizde 15’in üzerinde çeşit peynirin üretimini aynı heyecanla gerçekleştiyoruz.

Başladığımız günden bu yana, her ürünümüzde sadece süt, tuz ve şirden mayası kullanarak doğallığa ve lezzete odaklandık. 20 farklı ildeki bayilik ağımızla, siz değerli müşterilerimize kaliteli ürünler sunuyoruz. 2017 yılından itibaren perakende satışa başladık ve Bandırma ile Erdek’te toplamda 5 fabrika satış mağazamızla, Kapıdağ’ın eşsiz lezzetlerini daha fazla kişiye ulaştırıyoruz.

Fabrika satış mağazalarımızda sadece Kapıdağ yöresine ait ürünleri değil, ülkemizin her köşesinden gelen özel ürünleri de sizlerle buluşturuyoruz. Bizim için her şey doğallık ve kalite, çünkü biz Kapıdağ Süt Ürünleri olarak, her zaman ilk günkü aşkla üretmeye devam ediyoruz.

Name: Walpole Creamery, Ltd.
Description:
What makes Walpole Creamery Ice Cream "the best, right from the start"?

Walpole Creamery award winning ice cream is 100% all natural (nothing fake about it), Super Premium (highest quality you can get) and made from scratch daily using only the finest ingredients including fresh, local milk from hormone-free cows. For every batch of ice cream we make, the nice folks down the road deliver fresh milk straight from their farm to our shop, where it is made into ice cream the very same day. It doesn't get any fresher than that!

While most ice cream makers by their base mix from large commercial producers, we take pride in making our very own base mix from scratch, right here at the Creamery. We named it Sweet Cream, and it is so good on its own that it soon became one of our top 10 best sellers.

Our wholesome ice cream contains no high fructose corn syrup, no artificial flavors and no aritificial colors. With every scrumptious spoonful of Walpole Creamery ice cream you put into your mouth, you can feel good knowing you're getting nothing but the best. We have over 25 delicious flavors to choose from so be sure to try them all to find your favorite (if you can even pick just one)!
 
You can find our, rich, creamy, delectable ice cream in over 200 stores, restaurants and scoop shops throughout NH and VT and we continue to grow daily. Visit our website for more information and please 'Like us' at fb.com/walpolecreamery to find out about news, events, fun contests and giveaways!

Description:
Profitable Dairy Systems (PDS) is a livestock consulting company, providing expert advice on:

•Feeding and herd management of dairy cows
•Feeding and herd management of young dairy stock
•Feeding and herd management of stock grown out as pink veal or dairy beef
•Grazing management of dairy cows
•Intensive feedlotting of dairy cows
•Conservation systems for fodder crops and excess pasture
•Housing and herd management of stock on small holder Asian dairy farms
•Housing and herd management of stock on large scale intensive dairy farms in Asia

•Other aspects of dairy farm management, such as forage production, reproduction, genetics, animal health, milk harvesting, climate control and stock welfare
•Dairy farm data recording systems
•Dairy farm business management
•Value adding of raw milk
•Developing training programs on any of the above dairy farm activities

Name: INYAMBO FRESH DAIRY LTD
Description:

With a strong commitment to freshness, food safety, and nutrition, we process and package our dairy products under strict hygiene standards to meet the needs of health-conscious consumers.

We work closely with farmers to ensure a reliable milk supply chain while promoting rural livelihoods and sustainable dairy practices. Our goal is to become a trusted name in Rwanda’s dairy sector by delivering fresh, safe, and nutritious products from farm to table.

Name: Skee Ismejeri
Description:
Skee Ismejeri 
- sætter nye standarder indenfor is produktion. Vi producerer udelukkende økologisk is uden tilsætningsstoffer.

De bedste råvarer anvendes 
Isen fremstilles af frisk mælk og jersey fløde fra Thise Mejeri. Gennem vort stabile samarbejde med leverandører fra hele verden sikres de bedste råvarer kvaliteter. Disse kontakter betyder at Skee Ismejeri også i fremtiden kan garantere en stabil forsyning. 

Alle har ret til et godt liv 
- også de bønder som producerer råvarerne. Derfor skal de betales anstændigt og behandles ordentligt. Dette sikres gennem Fairtrade certificeringen.

Is uden numre 
Vi har en kompromisløs holdning til madvarer. For os hører tilsætningsstoffer ikke hjemme i fødevarer. Derfor anvender vi ingen tilsætningsstoffer. Vi er stolte af vores etiket, som er uden e-numre.

Smagen er styrken 
Ved omhyggeligt at udvælge gode råvarer og behandle dem nænsomt fremkommer den lange og delikate smag.

Altid frisk is 
Ismejeriet producerer is efter ordre. På den måde sikres altid optimal friskhed.

Emballagen er intelligent
Isen beskyttes effektivt og kan tåle transport mellem forhandler og kunde. Isen smelter jævnt, det fremmer den sublime smag og konsistens. Emballagen består af polystyren. Polystyren (PS) er pga. af sin lave vægt (1-5 gram) og skånsomme fremstillings-proces, et miljø rigtigt emballage valg. Ved bortskaffelsen af PS udledes en stærkt reduceret mængde CO2 sammenlignet med traditionel emballage.

Isen er vores ambassadør 
- og forhandles i Danmark og Tyskland af førende dagligvarer butikker.

Name: Vedoura Greek Dairy Products
Description:
We are producers of dairy products based in Greece called ''Vedoura''.
Our production facility is located inThessaloniki and we sell our products both domestically and abroad. 
We are producing Greek Dessert with yogurt culture that is suitable for the food service sector. It is a special product that is ideal for the preparation of tzatziki.It can also be enjoyed as a dessert with honey, fresh fruits and nuts or used for dressings, salads and various recipes. Vedoura Greek Dessert has an excellent combination of structure, taste and texture. It is offered in 5lt and 10lt boxes and it is aiming at members of the food service sector that require a high-quality dairy product with superior product characteristics.Our Greek Desserts come in 3 different variations, depending on end user demands. We have a variation with palm oil, another one with coconut oil and a third one made with both vegetable fat and cow milk fat.
We also produce Greek yogurt, an all natural authentic yogurt made from 100% fresh Greek cow milk and the traditional recipe.It is offered in boxes of 5lt and 10 lt and with 5% or 10% fat. Our yoghurt has a silky and creamy texture and a fresh, unique taste. It is rich in valuable nutrients and ideal for the food service professional. 
Vedoura offers an excellent price-quality ratio,a flexible business approach and a more traditional and original company profile.

Name: Tudia Lactate
Description:
Tudia imbina experienta si traditia fabricarii branzeturilor bucovinene cu tehnologia moderna, foloseste retetele vechi si consacrate adaptandu-le la exigentele cumparatorului modern.

Gustul specific al lactatelor Tudia este dat de laptele colectat din sute de gospodarii si ferme din Bucovina. Avand lapte de calitate, ne permitem sa folosim procedee traditionale – cum ar fi obtinerea cascavalului din lapte nepasteurizat. Aceasta este explicatia gustului de ,,Tudia” diferit de gustul acelorasi sortimente de pe piata, care folosesc lapte pasteurizat. In contrast, noi preferam tratamentul termic prin oparirea casului. Prin pasteurizare se distruge practic flora din lapte benefica sanatatii, ceea ce noi nu dorim. Din aceasta cauza, produsele noastre sunt mai naturale si mai sanatoase, dar au un termen de valabilitate mai scurt.

Sistemului integrat de management al calitatii si sigurantei alimentului arata principala preocupare a tuturor departamentelor, de la colectarea si receptionarea materiei prime pana la livrarea si distributia produsului finit, adica siguranta alimentara.

Astfel, avem autorizate laboratoarele proprii fizico-chimic si cel de microbiologie. La fiecare etapa a procesului de productie monitorizam parametrii  pentru a ne asigura ca la finalul liniei de productie sa oferim produse gustoase si sanatoase.

Deviza noastra este multumirea clientului prin calitate, pret si seriozitatea livrarilor. Respectand acestea, am devenit una dintre cele mai mari fabrici de lactate din Romania.

Name: Latteria Sociale Cooperativa di Pozzomaggiore A.r.l.
Description:
La Latteria Sociale Cooperativa di Pozzomaggiore nasce nel 1924 e prende il nome dall’omonimo paese del centro-Sardegna. L’intraprendenza e volontà di alcuni pastori diede vita, quasi cent’anni fa, ad una delle prime cooperative della zona, con l'intento di promuovere la genuinità dei prodotti derivanti dall'economia agro-pastorale della regione.
La cooperativa oggi ha la capacità di trasformare quattro milioni di litri all’anno di latte ovino e produrre settemila quintali di formaggio e milletrecento quintali di ricotta e si occupa di tutte le fasi produttive, dall'arrivo del latte in azienda fino alla commercializzazione del prodotto finito.

Name: DairymasterEU
Description:
At Dairymaster, we redefine dairy farming, making it not just a livelihood but a thriving and sustainable venture. Operating on a global scale, we stand out with a distinctive approach — over 95% of our cutting-edge products are meticulously designed and manufactured in-house.

Our commitment goes beyond the ordinary. We passionately embrace scientific research, integrating advanced software and electronics to craft products that elevate efficiency and performance. As active members of premier scientific expert groups, we ensure our solutions are at the forefront of milking technology.

What sets us apart is our dedication to sustainability. We're not just building equipment; we're shaping the future of dairy farming. From the groundbreaking MooMonitor, monitoring cows' fertility cycles, to the SmartFeeder enabling precision nutrition, our technology isn't just innovative — it's transformative.

Experience a reduction in on-farm workload without compromising performance. Join Dairymaster on a journey where cutting-edge technology meets a profound commitment to sustainability, empowering both farmers and their herds.

Name: Laboratorio Prodor
Description:
Laboratorio Prodor è un’azienda italiana specializzata nello sviluppo e nella produzione di fermenti lattici, caglio tradizionale e caglio vegetale, pensati per il settore caseario. Con oltre 90 anni di storia, è un punto di riferimento per piccoli e medi caseifici artigianali grazie alla combinazione tra tradizione, ricerca e innovazione.
Situata a Mezzano Scotti, nel cuore della Val Trebbia, Laboratorio Prodor nasce come azienda familiare e ha saputo crescere nel tempo, evolvendo il proprio approccio e ampliando la gamma dei prodotti. Oggi offre fermenti lattici per formaggi e yogurt, caglio animale tradizionale, caglio vegetale a base di cardo selvatico e soluzioni per produzioni vegan, posizionandosi come unico produttore italiano anche in questo segmento.
La forza dell’azienda sta nella capacità di creare soluzioni su misura: ogni prodotto viene sviluppato per rispondere alle esigenze specifiche del cliente, ottimizzando processi, resa e qualità. Accanto all’offerta tecnica, Laboratorio Prodor mette al centro la relazione umana, offrendo consulenza personalizzata, rapidità di fornitura (anche per piccoli lotti) e assistenza diretta, costruendo con i clienti un rapporto di fiducia e collaborazione.
Attenta all’innovazione e alla sostenibilità, senza mai perdere il legame con il sapere artigianale, Laboratorio Prodor è oggi un partner prezioso per chi cerca non solo un fornitore, ma un alleato strategico per crescere, migliorare e portare sul mercato prodotti autentici, naturali e di altissima qualità.

Name: CWAS - Global
Description:
Central Wisconsin Ag Services was founded in 2014 by a veterinarian, Dr. John Borzillo and fourth-generation dairy farmer, Mr. Cody Heller. In just a few short years, CWAS grew to 12 staff members and began offering a wide range of services to dairy producers in the United States. 

Due to increasing global demand and our ability to offer a broad range services "under one roof", CWAS - Global was formed in 2017 to meet the needs of the international dairy community. We are currently working on projects in Indonesia and very recently, the UAE. 

We offer consulting services and training courses related to all aspects dairy production including: veterinary medicine, parlor efficiency, parlor performance, staff training, financial training and consulting, agronomy and agronomics, nutrient management, cropping, animal nutrition, import/export (of both goods and high quality Wisconsin Holsteins) and hoof care. 

In order to provide all of these services, our staff includes:
3 Veterinarians 
1 Nutritionist
1 Agronomist
1 Accountant
2 Hoof trimmers
1 Financial consultant
3 Supporting staff

Our motto "Family Values, Global Vision" embodies our ultimate goal of producing food by promoting a strong global agricultural community.

Name: La Laiterie Grenobloise
Description:
C’est l’histoire de deux reconvertis dans le fromage ayant suivi une formation de vendeur-conseil en crémerie-fromagerie, ainsi qu'une seconde en fabrication de
fromages et produits laitiers, après des parcours riches et divers, tantôt dans l'industrie, tantôt dans les médias. 

C'est aussi l'histoire d’une rencontre décisive dans les montagnes iséroises, alors que l'un, en voyage scolaire, visitait une fromagerie en Chartreuse où travaillait l'autre, alors employé polyvalent en son sein.

Nous, Pierre-Sylvain et Sébastien, partageons un amour commun pour les bons produits, une volonté de créer du lien entre les humains, et une envie de nous mettre à notre compte en exerçant une activité qui a du sens à nos yeux.

Le concept novateur de laiterie urbaine nous a vite attiré par son côté hybride. Ce que nous souhaitons faire ? Fabriquer nos propres fromages et autres produits laitiers dans notre atelier de transformation, en direct depuis Grenoble, et les revendre sur place dans une jolie boutique à notre image.

Bienvenue sur notre page, où nous aurons à coeur de vous parler de l'avancée du projet... en attendant de vous présenter nos bons fromages !

Sébastien et Pierre-Sylvain

Name: VALORLAC
Description:
Valorlac est la filiale industrielle de l’Union Laitière de la Meuse, coopérative forte de plus de 60 ans d’expérience dans la collecte et la valorisation du lait.
Créée en 2010, l’entreprise transforme le lait cru à façon pour les industriels laitiers et agroalimentaires européens, à la recherche d’un partenaire fiable, réactif et certifié.

Notre mission : transformer vos matières premières laitières en produits à haute valeur ajoutée, avec la même exigence de qualité, de traçabilité et de durabilité que pour nos propres adhérents.

Un outil industriel certifié, moderne et performant
Valorlac s’appuie sur un site de production regroupant :
une beurrerie (mise en service en 2014),
un évaporateur et un atelier d’ultrafiltration (2016),
deux lignes d’écrémage de 30 000 L/h chacune.

Nos process sont certifiés :

VLOG - production garantie sans OGM,
Agriculture Biologique - pour la transformation de laits issus de filières certifiées,
Casher et Halal - contrôles réguliers assurant la conformité aux exigences religieuses de nos clients.

Cette combinaison de certifications permet à Valorlac de servir une large diversité de marchés, du local à l'international.

Un ancrage local, une portée européenne
Implantée au cœur du bassin laitier meusien, dans le Grand Est, Valorlac bénéficie d’un positionnement idéal pour livrer rapidement l’Allemagne, la Belgique, le Luxembourg, l’Italie et les grands pôles agroalimentaires européens. Notre logistique intégrée et nos axes routiers accessibles garantissent une chaîne d’approvisionnement fluide et réactive.

Travail à façon : une offre sur mesure
Nous mettons notre outil industriel et nos équipes au service de coopératives, d’industriels et de marques qui souhaitent externaliser une partie de leur transformation.
Objectif : optimiser les volumes, garantir la qualité, et renforcer la compétitivité de chaque partenaire.

Valorlac, l’agilité industrielle au service de la filière

Name: Eilers & Wheeler (UK) Ltd

Name: JERSEY CANADA
Description:
Jersey Canada’s mission is to grow the Jersey breed by maintaining the herdbook and providing tools to increase profitability. We encourage the growth of the breed and foster genetic improvement by promoting the 'Jersey advantage' that can lead to a better bottom line. 

1] We register Jerseys. 
Registered Jerseys bring in more profit, dominate the Canadian market and are respected globally. Selling an animal with proper identification and a pedigree increases its value and can open up AI incentives. 

2] We are responsible for the Jersey herdbook. 
Good information helps you make good decisions. Whether it's pedigrees, classifications, production, or show winnings, we are the gatekeepers of valuable data. 

3] We support the future of the Jersey breed. 
Rules, regulations and requirements continue to change. With deep roots in the dairy industry, we collaborate with experts, partners and leaders to keep the breed progressive.

4] We host marketing and communication tools. 
'The Breeder' publication, eNews and social media platforms exist to entertain, educate, interact. We offer advertising options to market your assets. 

5] We support youth and recognize breeding success. 
Scholarships and performance award programs acknowledge leadership and accomplishments. 

6] We provide a virtual showring. 
Members can compete in the prestigious All Canadian contest. 

7] We educate and network. 
Through events, shows and tours, we bring the dairy community together to showcase cows, exchange ideas and celebrate the breed.

8] We share insight and advice. 
From genetics to key indicators of profitability, our staff is knowledgeable and can answer questions. 

9] We report to our members. 
Voting privileges ensure that members have a voice and can make a difference. 

10] Our leaders are dairy farmers. 
Jersey Canada's board and committee members are influential leaders that are committed to making things better for the next generation of Jersey farmers.

Name: New Park

Name: Suu

We are a NOP Certified Organic Dairy Company with 300,000 litres output per day, with a Target to reach 1 million litres output by 2020. 

Product Range-
Milk, Butter, Cheese, Milk Powder, Milk Proteins, Casein and Whey Products.

Our Organic Products are processed in a state-of-the-art plant with all required quality certifications.

When everything a cow consumes is 100% organic, the milk produced is organic. Milk produced organically is not only delicious, but has more health benefits than your average off-the-shelf packet milk. It is packed with natural nutrients, minerals, enzymes, and micronutrients. The milk is also rich in omega 3, CLA
 and vitamin e, and acts as preventive medicine. By choosing our organic milk products, you are making the right choice.

Organic milk is one of the most nutritionally complete foods packed with protein, vitamins and minerals. Studies have found that organic milk (both regular and skimmed) has more nutrients - omega-3 and vitamin E than non-organic milk. These help reduce the risk of heart disease and also to promote healthy skin.

Name: Lacto Food
Description:

Our warehouses and production hall are located on a 3000 sqm piece of land, of which 1600 sqm are cold storage spaces.

Our plant certified under ISO 22000:2005 and ISO 9001:2008.

We offer spaces for offices and storage (freezing and refrigeration).

Name: Cow Currency
Description:
Cow Currency is an ethics-first ownership and community platform designed to explore 𝐫𝐞𝐬𝐩𝐨𝐧𝐬𝐢𝐛𝐥𝐞, 𝐭𝐫𝐚𝐧𝐬𝐩𝐚𝐫𝐞𝐧𝐭, 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐚𝐜𝐜𝐨𝐮𝐧𝐭𝐚𝐛𝐥𝐞 𝐦𝐨𝐝𝐞𝐥𝐬 𝐨𝐟 𝐩𝐚𝐫𝐭𝐢𝐜𝐢𝐩𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧 𝐚𝐫𝐨𝐮𝐧𝐝 𝐫𝐞𝐚𝐥 𝐚𝐬𝐬𝐞𝐭𝐬 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐫𝐞𝐚𝐥 𝐥𝐢𝐯𝐞𝐥𝐢𝐡𝐨𝐨𝐝𝐬.

The platform is built on a simple but demanding principle:
𝐨𝐰𝐧𝐞𝐫𝐬𝐡𝐢𝐩 𝐦𝐮𝐬𝐭 𝐜𝐨𝐦𝐞 𝐰𝐢𝐭𝐡 𝐬𝐭𝐞𝐰𝐚𝐫𝐝𝐬𝐡𝐢𝐩.

In a world where assets are increasingly abstracted and traded without responsibility, Cow Currency seeks to restore the connection between:
- participation and accountability,
- visibility and care,
- innovation and cultural context.

Cow Currency integrates traditional values, community-linked operations, and modern digital transparency to create systems that are 𝐭𝐫𝐮𝐬𝐭-𝐥𝐞𝐝, 𝐠𝐨𝐯𝐞𝐫𝐧𝐚𝐧𝐜𝐞-𝐝𝐫𝐢𝐯𝐞𝐧, 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐥𝐨𝐧𝐠-𝐭𝐞𝐫𝐦 𝐢𝐧 𝐨𝐫𝐢𝐞𝐧𝐭𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧.

Technology within the platform is treated as a 𝐭𝐫𝐮𝐬𝐭 𝐥𝐚𝐲𝐞𝐫, not a shortcut to value. Transparency is considered a baseline—not the end goal. Ethics, governance, and responsibility are designed into the structure from the outset.

Cow Currency is not built for speculative participation or short-term momentum.
It is being developed deliberately for individuals, communities, and institutions that value 𝐚𝐥𝐢𝐠𝐧𝐦𝐞𝐧𝐭, 𝐜𝐨𝐧𝐭𝐢𝐧𝐮𝐢𝐭𝐲, 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐫𝐞𝐬𝐩𝐨𝐧𝐬𝐢𝐛𝐢𝐥𝐢𝐭𝐲 𝐨𝐯𝐞𝐫 𝐬𝐩𝐞𝐞𝐝.

The platform is currently in a phased development journey, focused on thoughtful design, ethical frameworks, and long-horizon readiness.

Name: SRI MAHALAKSHMI DAIRY PRIVATE LIMITED
Description:
Sri Mahalakshmi Dairy Private Limited was established in 1972 and stands today as a pioneering name in the Indian dairy industry, proudly operating under the well-recognized brand name “Aroma.” Headquartered in Vysial Street, Coimbatore District, the company has built its legacy on quality, trust, and a deep-rooted commitment to supporting the farming community.
With nearly five decades of experience, Aroma has become a household name among consumers who value purity, freshness, and consistency. The company’s core mission is to deliver wholesome dairy products that promote good health every day, while uplifting rural livelihoods and preserving traditional dairy practices.
Aroma’s wide product portfolio includes Fresh Milk, Curd, Butter, Paneer, Khoa, Ghee, Skimmed Milk Powder, Yogurt, Lassi, and Flavoured Milk. Each product is crafted with care using milk sourced from healthy dairy cows that graze on natural, green pastures, ensuring purity from the ground up.
The company’s state-of-the-art manufacturing facility follows globally benchmarked food safety and quality protocols. Aroma is proud to hold certifications such as GFSI (FSSC 22000), FSMS 22000, ISO 9001, ISO 14001, ISO 45001, FSSAI, BIS, and Agmark — a testament to its robust quality control systems and operational excellence.
Beyond manufacturing, Aroma maintains a deep connection with the farming community, working closely with dairy farmers to ensure fair practices, sustainable sourcing, and continuous improvement.
Rooted in tradition yet driven by innovation, Sri Mahalakshmi Dairy continues its journey of delivering safe, nutritious, and delicious dairy products to families across the region.
From Our Dairy to Your Daily — Fresh, Pure, Reliable.

GOOD HEALTH EVERY DAY!!!

Op elke fles staat de naam van de koe, het tijdstip van winning, de samenstelling van de melk en een smaakindicatie. Omdat wij direct na het melken verwerken, niet homogeniseren en standaardiseren, behoud de melk zijn verse en pure smaak en voedingswaarde.

Het is verrassend hoeveel variatie in smaak en toepassingen deze onversneden melk biedt! Gaat u mee op ontdekkingstocht? Pannenkoeken bakken van de lekker volle melk van Gretha 3, eiwitrijke melk van Klara 12 na het sporten, of de melk van Floortje 31 bij de broodmaaltijd, omdat u die gewoon zo lekker vindt.

Boek nu ook het verhaal achter ElkeMelk! Van idee tot product, met alle avonturen daartussenin — nuchter als hij is, vertelt Matthijs op een smakelijke manier over zijn ondernemersreis, die inmiddels reikt van de Hollandse polder tot aan het wereldpodium. Een verhaal dat jouw publiek, bedrijf of studenten gegarandeerd een glimlach én een paar mooie inzichten oplevert.

Mlekara „Granice“ je domaća, srpska mlekara. Locirana je u mestu Granice, nedaleko od Mladenovca, 50  km od Beograda. Počela je sa radom 1993. godine, kao radionica za preradu mleka u  kući porodice Vukadinović. Početna prerada mleka bila je  50 l/dnevno, da bi danas bio dostignut projektovani kapacitet od  115 000 l/dnevno.

Stalnim ulaganjem u nove tehnologije, opremu i edukaciju zaposlenih, postigli smo visok nivo  organizacije i kontrole, što omogućava efikasnu  i  savermenu proizvodnju.

Neprevazidjeni kvalitet naših proizvoda je rezultat brižljivo razvijenih  receptura, primenom  dobitne kombinacije sopstvenog znanja i moderne opreme. S ponosom ističemo da je osnovna karakteristika naših proizvoda potpuno prirodan sastav.

Otkup mleka se vrši sa ekološki čistih područja Šumadije i severnog Pomoravlja, od oko 1000 poljoprivrednih proizvodjača. Sa proizvodjačima sirovog mleka, razvili smo partnerski odnos, u cilju poboljšanja i osiguranja kvaliteta naše osnovne sirovine-mleka.

Distribucija proizvoda neprestano se proširuje, zahvaljujući interesovanju naših potrošača. Pokrivamo teritoriju  Beograda i centralne Srbije, sa tendencijom rasta.

Name: Humboldt Creamery
Description:
Our history is rich, but our philosophy is simple:  Cows are meant to graze. 

At Humboldt Creamery, we have been creating wholesome and delicious dairy products for over 85 years.  And Humboldt County provides an exceptional home to our cows.

Humboldt Creamery was founded in 1929 in Humboldt County, CA.  Humboldt provides an exceptional home to our dairy cows because the temperate climate and frequent fog keep our pastures lush and green year-round.  That’s why our cows are generally out on pasture 12 months out of the year.  The temperature varies only about 12 degrees from winter to summer, which means our cows are comfortable in their thick coats all year long.  And since we’re right along the coast, the fresh ocean breezes create some of the finest air quality around.  Repeated flooding from the rivers in the area and run-off from the coastal mountains deposit minerals, mulch, clay, and silt into the soil, creating the ideal environment for growing grasses.  Our farmers support this rich, fertile soil through careful pasture management, working with the biology of the soil and adding organic compost to replace nutrients that are taken out.  Our smaller-than-average herd sizes also give our cows lots of room to roam on pasture – about an acre per cow.

Name: KOLIBA Dairy
Description:
KOLIBA Dairy – Tradition, Quality, Innovation

Founded in 1993 in Hriňová, Slovakia, KOLIBA Dairy began as a private company dedicated to processing milk sourced from the Podpoľanie region. Over the years, it has grown into a modern dairy manufacturer specializing in the production of semi-hard cheeses, soft cheeses, traditional butter, mozzarella, and a range of dried dairy products.

KOLIBA’s core product line includes its most popular offerings: semi-hard ripened Eidam cheese, traditional Slovak butter, and the first genuinely Slovak-made mozzarella. The company is also known for producing a variety of soft, steamed cheeses that reflect local traditions and craftsmanship.

In 2004, KOLIBA implemented the HACCP system to ensure consistent quality and food safety across all production processes. This commitment to high standards has been recognized through the acquisition of internationally respected certifications, including ISO 9001:2015 (Quality Management), ISO 22000:2018 (Food Safety Management), IFS (International Featured Standards), and Halal certification. In 2020, KOLIBA further demonstrated its dedication to environmental responsibility by obtaining ISO 14001:2015 for Environmental Management.

Since 2015, KOLIBA has expanded its focus to include the processing of whey—a natural byproduct of cheese production—into high-value dried ingredients. These include lactose, whey protein concentrate (WPC), dried permeate, and dried lactose. These products are used in a variety of food and nutrition applications and reflect the company’s strategic shift toward innovation and sustainability.

With a strong foundation in tradition and a forward-looking approach to quality and environmental stewardship, KOLIBA Dairy continues to bring premium Slovak dairy products to both domestic and international markets.

Name: Desserta Hellas S.A.
Description:
Desserta Hellas S.A. is the exclusive partner of Berglandmilch, Austria's leading dairy producer and one of Europe's largest.

Our journey began with the exclusive representation of Berglandmilch products in Greece and S/E Europe, and has evolved into an affiliated company.

For over a century, we've sourced our milk from 8,700 small Austrian family farms, who are integral shareholders in the Berglandmilch cooperative. Together, we've built a sustainable production chain, from field to shelf, ensuring quality and environmental stewardship every step of the way.

At Desserta Hellas, we're dedicated to reducing our carbon footprint and environmental impact. We work closely with our farmers, constantly striving to minimize emissions and enhance sustainability across our operations.

Our products, crafted in Berglandmilch's 11 cooperative factories, reflect the rich European dairy heritage, embodying the unique Austrian nature and milk tradition. We're honored to have earned recognition in the Greek market, securing a dominant position in specific product categories.

Our vision is clear: to provide premium dairy products to every Greek household, every day. We're committed to securing a sustainable future for generations to come, transitioning towards eco-friendly production practices in dairy.

Join us as we continue to deliver excellence in dairy and work towards a more sustainable, delicious future!

Name: Berneri S.p.A.
Description:
Nata nel 1910, abbiamo tramandato di generazione in generazione la passione per il lavoro e un’attenzione per la qualità che fa parte da sempre del nostro codice genetico.
Siamo specializzati nella stagionatura e nel commercio di Grana Padano DOP e di Parmigiano Reggiano DOP sul mercato nazionale ed internazionale.
Da oltre cent’anni selezioniamo con cura i produttori, controlliamo rigorosamente la materia prima, e seguiamo con dedizione quotidiana la delicata fase della stagionatura, in cui ogni piccolo particolare è decisivo: dalla temperatura all’umidità, dalla pulizia alla tempistica della rivoltatura.
Con il processo di internazionalizzazione del nostro settore,
abbiamo introdotto, oltre al Grana Padano DOP e al Parmigiano Reggiano DOP commercializzati in vari formati, altre tipologie di formaggi:
Taleggio DOP, Provolone Valpadana DOP, Provolone,
Pecorino Romano DOP, Pecorino, Formaggio Duro prodotto in Italia, Asiago DOP, Gorgonzola Dolce DOP, Gorgonzola Piccante DOP e molte altre eccellenze italiane.
La qualità dei nostri prodotti è riconosciuta a livello internazionale.
Dopo aver superato il secolo di vita guardiamo con fiducia al futuro, perché la ricerca della qualità, la passione e l’impegno quotidiano saranno sempre il nostro marchio di fabbrica.

Name: Tewes Bis
Description:
Tewes-Bis Sp. z o.o. jest przedsiębiorstwem specjalizującym się w produkcji maszyn i urządzeń oraz całych linii technologicznych dla przemysłu spożywczego – w szczególności mleczarskiego.

Jesteśmy liderem w dostawach kompletnych linii technologicznych do produkcji różnego rodzaju twarogów, zarówno w Polsce, jak i w krajach za naszą wschodnią granicą.

Od 1991 roku specjalizacja nasza obejmuje projektowanie i wytwarzanie maszyn, urządzeń i całych linii technologicznych, opracowywanie oraz wdrażanie techniki i technologii produkcji, często prototypowych – na szczególne zamówienia klientów.

Wraz z  wysokim poziomem wytwarzanych urządzeń Tewes-Bis zapewnia swoim odbiorcom  szybko reagujący serwis, realizowany przez grupę serwisantów z długoletnim doświadczeniem i wiedzą techniczną.

Współpracujemy z wieloma zakładami mleczarskimi w kraju i za granicą. Oferujemy klientom kompleksowe programy rozwoju, wskazujemy racjonalne rozwiązania techniczne, technologiczne oraz ekonomiczno-organizacyjne, odpowiednie do warunków produkcyjnych oraz rynkowych danego przedsiębiorstwa.

Nasze całe linie technologiczne i różne urządzenia procesowe pracują w Białorusi,  Rosji, Ukrainie i krajach bałtyckich (odbieralnie i aparatownie, linie do produkcji twarogu, sera, serków, napojów fermentowanych, systemy mycia itd.), Niemczech (linie do produkcji jogurtu, stacje mycia), na Węgrzech i w Rumunii (linie do produkcji twarogu, serków, stacje mycia), również w Azji oraz Ameryce Środkowej i Południowej (systemy mycia).

Zatrudniamy wykwalifikowanych pracowników, wśród których inżynierowie tworzą działy: technologiczny, konstrukcyjny, automatyki. Wysoka kreatywność zespołu pozwala na wdrażanie nowoczesnych, w pełni zautomatyzowanych przedsięwzięć.

Name: sumaira group
Description:
Dairy farming is a class of agriculture for long-term production of milk, which is processed (either on the farm or at a dairy plant, either of which may be called a dairy) for eventual sale of a dairy product. Dairy farming has a history that goes back to the early Neolithic era, around the seventh millennium BC, in many regions of Europe and Africa. Before the 20th century, milking was done by hand on small farms. Beginning in the early 20th century, milking was done in large scale dairy farms with innovations including rotary parlors, the milking pipeline, and automatic milking systems that were commercially developed in the early 1990s.

Milk preservation methods have improved starting with the arrival of refrigeration technology in the late 19th century, which included direct expansion refrigeration and the plate heat exchanger. These cooling methods allowed dairy farms to preserve milk by reducing spoiling due to bacterial growth and humidity.

Worldwide, leading dairy industries in many countries including India, the United States, China, and New Zealand serve as important producers, exporters, and importers of milk. Since the late 20th century, there has generally been an increase in total milk production worldwide, with around 827,884,000 tonnes of milk being produced in 2017 according to the FAO.

There has been substantial concern over the amount of waste output created by dairy industries, seen through manure disposal and air pollution caused by methane gas. The industry's role in agricultural greenhouse gas emissions has also been noted to implicate environmental consequences. Various measures have been put in place in order to control the amount of phosphorus excreted by dairy livestock. The usage of rBST has also been controversial. Dairy farming in general has been criticized by animal welfare activists due to the health issues imposed upon dairy cows through intensive animal farming.

Description:
Raw Milk Connect offer independent consultancy to companies dealing with processes involving raw milk. Working +20 years within this business we combine in depth knowledge about milk production, logistics of the milk and milk analyses with solid skills within project and product management! se examples below.
 
INTERNATIONAL DAIRY MOVES TOWARDS ONE UNIFORM SETTLEMENT MODEL
When dairy cooperatives merge across borders there is a need to unify payment models. Due to differences in local procedures and national legislation this is a challenge. DEMAND FOR A NEW ANALYTICAL SOLUTION?

LIFT TO COLOMBIAN MILK PAYMENT ANALYSIS 
Assuring trustworthy laboratory results is essential to improving raw milk hygiene. We have assisted the government in developing a national bacteria conversion equation meeting international standards.

NEW ANALYTICAL PARAMETERS OFFER CRUCIAL INFORMATION FOR OPTIMIZING NUTRITION!
New parameters are routinely introduced in labs or on farm. Many ingredient companies realize that the effect of their products can now be
monitored large scale via these analyses. Our knowledge of herd management, available analyses and our large network can assist you in developing strategies and carrying out large scale trials to verify effects of an ingredient.

For more details about the partners Tove Asmussen and Berte Asmussen, please read our LinkedIn profiles. If your interest is analysis of raw milk , then please go to our website http://www.rawmilkconnect.dk  where we publish info on all aspects of this business area

Name: DairyFlo
Description:
DairyFlo specialised dairy systems, long lasting milk and air pulse tubing, milking liners, bowls and more. http://www.dairyflo.co.nz/. 

DairyFlo specialise in soft plastics including the manufacturing of soft plastic (TPE) calf feeding teats since 1995, http://www.polymerinternational.co.nz/.
Formed out of a drive to revolutionise dairy systems, DairyFlo has been established as a division of PSI to specialise in plastic formulations and moulding research and with a mission to develop cost effective innovative solutions for the dairy industry.

In 2004, after liaising with suppliers, a soft polymer became available that was acceptable for use within the food chain and the original concepts and approvals were initiated for the DairyFlo project.
Through many years of rigorous tests and on-farm trials, DairyFlo have now developed in collaboration with international raw material suppliers Bayer, a completely new and revolutionary product range that is set to make real changes to the quality of milking equipment and the bottom line for dairy producers and for the overall wellbeing of the dairy cow.

DairyFlo is inspired by the desire to improve the sustainability of New Zealand’s agricultural environment and is committed to providing the dairy farmer with a superior range of products that exceed their expectations. NZ and overseas patents pending.

Name: Shuddh Dairy India

Le origini, i principi e il costante impegno della Diano Latte.

Nel corso di oltre vent’anni di attività, II forte spirito imprenditoriale ed il costante impegno al miglioramento della proprietà, hanno permesso all’azienda di ampliare la zona di raccolta dagli allevamenti locali ad altre regioni del sud Italia prima, e della pianura Padana poi, dove è situata la maggior produzione di latte italiano.

Name: TRIKKI SA
Description:
TRIKALON DAIRY FACTORY - TRIKKI S.A. was founded in 1960 by the Agricultural Bank and the Union of Cattle Breeding Unions of Western Thessaly.

It was established on 16/11/2012 resulting from the conversion of the "joint venture of associations of agricultural cooperatives of Trikala - Karditsa SYN.P.E." in accordance with the provisions of articles 6 and 19 of Law 4015/2011.

The name is borrowed from the Homeric name of the city of Trikala, Trikki.
The primary goal was and remains the maintenance of high quality standards at all stages of production, which is also confirmed by the product quality and hygiene certificates: ISO 9001-ISO 22000 (HACCP).
Exclusively local Greek milk from cooperative producers is processed, which is collected daily from livestock units in Western Thessaly certified for the non-use of genetically modified animal feed.
Against the era of questioning what is genuine and good, TRIKKI SA. contrasts not only its good reputation but also its own good products.
The dairy industry of "TRIKKI SA" you will find it at the 2nd km of the Trikala-Karditsa National Road on the outskirts of the town of Trikala.
It is housed in modern building facilities with a total area of 6,000 sq.m which, among others, include: Milk receiving and quality control department. Cheese making department, packing room, cold rooms, yogurt production department, bottled products production department, organic department.
The technological equipment is the most modern and its operation is based on the most sophisticated application systems in the industry.
The mechanical infrastructure and installation of an integrated system for monitoring critical parameters and food safety is at the highest levels.

Name: Steffenon Alimentos
Description:
Sobre a Steffenon Alimentos

Em 1966, o pioneiro Pio Steffenon adquiriu o laticínio da família Carminatti e deu início a uma história de qualidade e tradição na fabricação de queijos. Ao longo das décadas, a empresa ampliou seu portfólio para queijos, bebidas lácteas, iogurtes, sobremesas, nata e requeijão, mantendo sempre o compromisso com a excelência .

Nosso compromisso com a qualidade começa na origem dos ingredientes: trabalhamos em parceria com produtores locais para garantir matéria-prima sempre fresca e sustentável . Com uma rede de representantes e distribuidores por todo o Rio Grande do Sul, atendemos desde restaurantes e pizzarias até grandes redes de supermercados, levando o sabor gaúcho a cada cantinho do território.

Missão
Produzir e distribuir com responsabilidade alimentos de origem láctea que sejam confiáveis e saborosos, garantindo a satisfação dos consumidores.

Visão
Ser referência no ramo de laticínios pelas ferramentas e normas de produtividade utilizadas na fabricação de nossos produtos .
Valores
Defensores de nossas marcas: trabalhamos com consciência e orgulho em cada etapa
Nossa gente: valorizamos o comprometimento e empenho de nossas equipes
Meio ambiente e segurança: zelamos pelo nosso pessoal e pelo planeta
Inovação: buscamos tecnologias que tornem o processo mais eficiente e relevante para o consumidor
Ética e desenvolvimento: agimos com transparência, respeito e sempre em busca de novos mercados;

Sustentabilidade & Comunidade
Por meio da parceria com a ASLORE, contribuímos para a logística reversa de embalagens, reforçando nosso compromisso com a economia circular . Também apoiamos produtores de leite da região, promovendo o desenvolvimento local e fortalecendo a cadeia produtiva .
Location: Boa Vista do Sul, Rio Grande do Sul

Name: Cantarelli 1876 srl
Description:
Since 1876 our experience (now at the 6th generation of Cantarelli), allows us to offer a Parmigiano Reggiano which flavour, aroma and fragrance are consistent to the most authentic tradition of the product.

Our distinctive feature lies in the NATURAL MATURATION of our cheese, which sets us apart from most of the offer in the current market. The natural maturation is still practiced today in the original stone structures which date back to the XIX century, enabling us to age cheese in a natural balance of temperature and humidity. Thanks to this process, the cheese expels the excess humidity, especially the residual from the processing, enhancing its fragrance and aroma.

Name: Apostle Whey Cheese
Description:
Located just 15 minutes from the world famous 12 Apostles on the Great Ocean Road, Apostle Whey Cheese offers a family-friendly foodie experience at their dairy farmgate!

Established by dairy farmers Julian and Dianne Benson in 2005 Apostle Whey Cheese is a labour of love that combines their two passions – sustainable farming and boutique, artisan produce.

The paddock-to-plate operation means that all cheeses are made from pure milk which has been produced by their cross-bred herd of Friesian/Jerseys.

Apostle Whey Cheese provides visitors with a unique agritourism experience where they can see many aspects of operation, from calving in the “mooternity ward”, cheeses made by hand and the cows being milked at 4pm daily. Farm tours are available Monday to Friday by appointment.

Visitors can take a break in the farmgate café and share a cheese platter, coffee, toasties, gelato or a milkshake - all made using “our milk from our cows from our farm”! 

Tastings of Apostle Whey Gin, produced in collaboration with Apollo Bay Distillery, are also available in the farmgate cafe. This range of unique gin is a blend of botanicals and “whey spirit” from our cheesemaking process.

Apostle Whey Cheese is a family-owned, single origin dairy farm and welcomes visitors 7 days a week every day of the year (except Christmas Day)!
