Name: The Hartzler Family Dairy
Description: The Hartzler Family Dairy is a family owned and operated business that has served the community for over 22 years. We exist to encourage healthy living, promote superior dairy practices, and to reflect the love of Jesus Christ in the products and services we provide. Our milk is sourced from only local dairies that are Non-GMO Project Verified and Hartzler Quality Certified, which requires the omission of pesticides and herbicides. We process our milk through Low-Temperature Vat Pasteurization which ensures the our milk retains the maximum amount of enzymes. These enzymes are crucial for healthy and proper digestion. We also do not homogenize our milk as this process changes the molecular structure of the milk and inhibits delivery of important nutrients to the body.

Name: Caseificio Abbasciano
Description:
La nostra prima mozzarella a Trento risale al gennaio 1957. Allora l’attrezzatura a disposizione era quanto si poteva trovare in una masseria pugliese dell’epoca: recipienti e suppellettili di legno, paiolo di rame su focolare di pietra riscaldato a legna. Tutte le operazioni si svolgevano manualmente. Occorreva grande “mestiere” e professionalità per ottenere prodotti di qualità. Benché i prodotti da noi proposti (essenzialmente mozzarella e ricotta) fossero pressoché sconosciuti nella nostra regione, i trentini impararono ben presto ad apprezzarli.

Da allora di strada ne è stata fatta tanta, ma sempre nel rispetto delle tradizioni. La preparazione dei prodotti e il controllo della qualità viene lasciato, oggi come allora, nelle mani di esperti casari; solo i lavori ripetitivi e faticosi vengono ora svolti dalle macchine.

Questa caratteristica ci permette di disporre di prodotti “personalizzati” che ci assicurano un posto di prestigio sul mercato. Leggere sfumature nella qualità dei nostri prodotti sono possibili, di volta in volta. Si tratta del tipico “difetto” del prodotto artigianale e allo stesso tempo del suo più alto pregio.

MISSION

Dal 1957 Abbasciano è un’azienda italiana e familiare che interpreta l’alimentazione come un momento importante, ricco di gusto, affetto e condivisione. Proponiamo un’offerta di qualità fatta di prodotti gustosi e sicuri.

Crediamo nel modello alimentare italiano che combina ingredienti di qualità e lavorazioni attente, offrendo esperienze e sapori della migliore tradizione casearia.

La riconoscenza nei confronti dei trentini, il nostro profondo amore per Trento, il rispetto per la tradizione pugliese, il coraggio e l’interesse per l’innovazione, ispirano il nostro modo di essere e motivano le persone con le quali lavoriamo.

Name: Happy Valley Dairy
Description:
Happy Valley dairy products. Made from the milk of happy cows living on lush green dairy farms in Australia.

Our 100% Australian dairy products are handmade from full cream Gippsland milk. With no preservatives or other additives, you can taste the Australian quality and freshness. Plus the high calcium in the milk helps build strong bones, teeth and muscles. This is genuine Australian dairy nutrition at its best!

Manufactured to meet the exceptionally high food standards Australia is famous for, Happy Valley dairy products aren’t just naturally tasty and good for you, they are naturally safe too. Happy days! The Happy Valley farm cheese range includes: Parmesan cheese, Mozzarella cheese, Fetta cheese and Burger cheese slices, just to name a few. These cheeses are perfect to use in your favourite cheese recipe.

Happy Valley cheese slices make the perfect addition to your favourite burger or sandwich. Happy Valley cheddar cheese is suited for use in a range of Australian food recipes, and it’s tasty enough for any cheese platter.

A home with Happy Valley dairy products in the fridge is a happy home. These great Australian food recipe ideas will make everyone even happier!

Name: ABIRAL Himalayan Dog Chew
Description:
Abiral Himalayan Dog Chew, the flagship brand of Abiral Dairy Pvt. Ltd., is one of Nepal’s leading manufacturers and exporters of 100% natural Himalayan yak chews. Since 2021, we have delivered premium yak-milk dog chews through a fully integrated supply chain, from milk collection to processing and packaging, ensuring superior export-grade quality.

 

Handcrafted using traditional Himalayan techniques, our chews are made from nak (female yak) and cow milk, mixed with lime and naturally dried to create a long-lasting, protein-rich dog treat enjoyed worldwide. Every chew is 100% natural, gluten-free, preservative-free, low-lactose, and rich in calcium and protein.

 

We work directly with 15,000 to 20,000 local farmers across the Himalayan region and follow strict ISO, HACCP, and FDA-compliant manufacturing standards. With a commitment to sustainability, ethical sourcing, and community empowerment, ABIRAL stands as a trusted global partner in the Himalayan dog chew industry.

Feed costs represent the primary expense for farms, therefore quality silage is crucial for successful businesses, helping leverage dairy income and reduce extra farming costs.

We distributing Uddergold, Pregold, 4XLA, Teatdips.

At last but not least we are cooperating with SOP.

Name: Yodelay Yogurt
Description: Yodelay is an all-natural Swiss yogurt unlike anything available in the United States. Made with locally sourced Brown Swiss cow milk, our delicious yogurts include the unique flavors of rhubarb, peach-raspberry, and tart cherry, as well as the traditional flavors of strawberry, blueberry, raspberry and pineapple.  Its smooth and creamy consistency keeps customers coming back for more. Frestine was founded with a clear purpose, to approach dairy differently. We work closely with local farms and industry partners to deliver consistent, high-standard ingredients, supported by transparent service and long-term reliability.

We understand the importance of quality and consistency across the supply chain. Our focus is on building strong and lasting partnerships, built on trust and shared goals, so our partners can operate with confidence in an evolving industry.

With a commitment to innovation, sustainability, and responsible sourcing, we collaborate with suppliers who share our values. While we began in export markets, we have steadily expanded our domestic presence, supporting the Australian dairy sector through dependable supply and tailored solutions.

At Frestine, we deliver more than just products. We are committed to providing quality, value, and genuine partnership at every step.

Name: Van der Heiden Cheese Services
Description:
Creating Premium Quality 

Bij van der Heiden Cheese Services vormen passie, traditie en innovatie de kern van ons bedrijf. Als toonaangevende dienstverlener in de wereld van kaas zijn we trots om ons verhaal met jou te delen. Ontdek ons hypermoderne rijpingshuizen, maak kennis met onze toegewijde kaasmeesters.
Wij affineren allerlei kaas-specialiteiten. Of de kazen nu gemaakt zijn van koemelk of dat geitenmelk de basis is, van rond tot rechthoek en van 16kg tot 5 kg. Dat maakt ons niets uit.
Ben je producent van Biologische kazen? Geen probleem, want ook deze kazen affineren wij met de grootste aandacht.
Meesters in kaas verpakken.
Als specialist in het verpakken gaan we verder dan de standaard diensten. Wij begrijpen dat elke kaassoort uniek is, en onze toewijding tot uiting in elk proces. 
Wij kunnen uw premium kazen voorzien van etiket en /banderol en daarna verpakken in de paraffine of onze nieuwste innovatieve verpakking Soft Vacuüm. Waarmee u kazen de premium uitstraling krijgt die het verdient.
Logistieke diensten
Laat ons jouw supply chain uit handen nemen. Waarbij wij je volledig ontzorgen, van het rijpen en verpakken van kaas tot en met het leveren van orders bij klanten. Terwijl de vraag en markten fluctueren, leveren wij logistieke diensten waarop je kan vertrouwen.

Name: The Tipperary Cheese Company
Description:
Situated in the rich pastureland that is the Golden Vale in Tipperary is the Hayes’ Farm, home of deliciously smooth soft cheeses and yogurts. Over the past 400 years the farm has been handed down from generation to generation of Hayes family members and today, brothers Donal and Liam Hayes work together and farm the land to its full potential to provide dairy products of exceptional quality.

The Hayes’ have always been involved in manufacturing having making butter to sell at local markets and to the English market in the 18th century to having a milk round in the 1970’s and now today Donal and Liam have taken that one step further to produce their delicious cheese and award winning yoghurts.

Today, the brothers are milking over 200 cows and are using milk from neighbouring farms to ensure that only the best of milk is used to make their products. As milk is the core ingredient to our products we need to make sure that we our cows are well looked after throughout the year, as happier cows produce better milk!

Name: Ashwaq Agro and Dairy Farm
Description:
About Ashwaq Agro & Dairy Farm

Ashwaq Agro & Dairy Farm is a forward-thinking agricultural enterprise based in Visakhapatnam, dedicated to sustainable farming, dairy innovation, and community value creation. At the core of our business is a commitment to ethical livestock farming, eco-friendly practices, and high-quality dairy production.

Our Mission
To nurture healthy, productive livestock with sustainable methods, producing premium dairy products while promoting environmental stewardship and rural empowerment.

What We Do

Dairy Farming: We raise and care for our herd under stringent welfare standards, ensuring healthy growth and high-quality milk yield.

Sustainable Agriculture: Through organic fertilizer production and biogas generation, we recycle farm waste into value-added resources, reducing our environmental footprint. 
Recruit.net

Community Impact: We work closely with local farmers and rural communities, supporting capacity-building, creating jobs, and contributing to the agrarian economy.

Technology & Innovation: We employ modern farming techniques and renewable energy systems to optimize production, improve animal welfare, and drive efficiency.

Our Vision
To become a leading integrated agro-dairy enterprise in India — one that balances profitability with sustainability, uplifts rural livelihoods, and sets new standards for green agriculture.

Why Ashwaq?

Quality First: Our dairy products are derived from healthy, well-maintained livestock under ethical and hygienic conditions.

Sustainable Future: By converting farm by-products into biogas and organic fertilizers, we contribute to a circular economy.

Inclusive Growth: We believe in empowering farmers and communities by providing training, resources, and fair partnerships.

Innovation Driven: Continuous investment in technology helps us scale responsibly while ensuring the highest standards of production.

Name: BAKY ALIMENTOS LTDA
Description:
A Baky Alimentos nasceu do amor e da fé de uma família que, com o anseio de prosperar e entregar valor à todos os envolvidos, fundam um Laticínio. Inicialmente comercializando 200 litros de leite por dia em uma estrutura de menos de 250 m², hoje, envolvem mais de 150 produtores parceiros e chegam à mesa de mais de 1 milhão de famílias. "Essa é a nossa Essência, é por isso que nos dedicamos todos os dias".

Uma caminhada que se iniciou em 1993, deixa um marco na sua trajetória, contemplando seus mais de 30 anos. Atualmente, conta com mais de 50 colaboradores, os quais em um esforço conjunto escrevem, no dia a dia, a sua história.

Em 2018 a Baky passa por um relevante crescimento organizacional, melhorando seus processos, qualificando pessoas e reorganizando sua produção, agora em escala industrial, sem perder a essência artesanal.

A Baky zela pelo bem-estar social e econômico dos seus colaboradores, produtores e comunidade, bem como pelo meio ambiente. A empresa fornece assistência técnica, com o objetivo de maximizar os resultados das propriedades e melhorar a qualidade de vida dos seus conveniados.

Name: SAF Vietnam
Description:
Saigon Food Manufacture - Import Export Joint Stock Company (SAF) has been in the nutrition and dairy industry for 23 years, empowering millions of Vietnamese children to thrive. At SAF, we believe that everyone deserves access to high-quality nutrition, which is why we are committed to providing inclusive, affordable dairy solutions for all.

Our products, crafted from the finest ingredients sourced from renowned dairy regions like Australia, New Zealand, and Europe, ensure that each glass of milk nourishes not only the body but also the potential of every individual. Through our trusted ELLAC brand, we offer a diverse range of products tailored for all ages—from toddlers to adults—helping to build a healthier, brighter future for generations to come.

Join us on our mission to nurture holistic well-being and bring optimal nutrition to every Vietnamese child.

Milk quality, cow friendly products and free cow traffic form the foundation of our policy, and are at the basis of the development of new products. We work with dairy farmers to create sustainable and cost-effective products that meet our business goals. The company’s success was and is based on efficiency and customization.

For more than twenty years we have been certified installer of the Lely Milk robot in the Benelux. We are proud of our bond with international dairy farmers and our continuing international growth.

Name: Climefarm
Description: Climefarm develops software that uses IoT & AI to quantify methane emissions from livestock and to optimize nutrition of farm animals. The solution improves milk yield, improves welfare of animals and reduces emissions. Our technology, thanks to advanced AI that fuels it, quantifies Scope 3 emissions for dairy sector down to each kilogram of milk produced. Furthermore, our bespoke technology can optimize nutrition of the animals that enable up to 30% enteric fermentation reduction.

Name: Talu Çiftliği
Description:
Çiftliğimiz, insan sağlığının çok zaman hiçe sayıldığı ülkemizde benzersiz kalite ve hijyende süt ve et ürünleri sunmaktadır. 

Saf ve yüksek genetik Jersey ırkı inek sürüsü ile ürettiği en az %5.5 yağlı A2 tipi çiğ sütün tamamını perakende olarak satan Talu Çiftliği, Türkiye’deki çiğ süt perakendeciliğini başka bir boyuta taşımış ve uyguladığı sayısız teknik ve yeniliklerle sektörde çığır açmıştır. Her daim örnek işletme olarak gösterilen çiftliğimiz, süt hayvancılığının ülkemizde gelişmesinde büyük rol oynamakta ve sektöre yön vermektedir.

Besi hayvanlarımız en doğal şekilde beslenmektedir. Ürettiğimiz birbirinden lezzetli kasap sucuk, kasap sosis ve dana kavurma kısa süre içersinde büyük beğeni toplamış ve raflarda her daim aranan ürünler haline gelmiştir.

İzmir, İstanbul ve Manisa’da 400 satış noktasına ulaşan çiftliğimiz, 2021 yılı içersinde birçok yeni et ve süt ürünü piyasaya çıkarmak için çalışmalar yapmaktadır. 

Kendi Çiftliğimiz, kendi hayvanlarımız, kendi üretimimiz, kendi dağıtımımız. Yunt Dağ’ından Sofranıza!

Name: Alima Cheeses
Description:
In 2007, the German Hochland brand, which has a history of nearly 100 years in the production of cheese and dairy products in the world, decides to enter the Middle East market. After a long research, he chooses “Haraz” from among the Middle Eastern countries of Iran, and from among the Iranian brands.
In the same year, specialized cheese production factories, with German Hochland technology, were opened in the city of Amol, Iran. A variety of cheeses with the Hochland brand are produced and marketed in Iran. Cheeses with a new shape and taste that are welcomed by cheese lovers. In the following years, the ownership of these factories will be transferred to Haraz Company.
Now, 15 years later, Hochland is known in the Iranian market under the Alima brand. The variety of cheeses produced has also been upgraded to about 30 models of cheese.
Alima has a variety of cheeses in different flavors:
– Breakfast cheeses such as: Danish cheese, cream cheese, buttermilk, low-fat buttermilk, low-salt
– Flavored cheeses such as: olive cheese, chili cheese, cocoa cheese, walnut cheese, date cheese
– Cooking cheeses such as cheddar cheese, gouda and mascarpone, sausage cheeses such as: smoked mozzarella, cheddar cheese
– Vegan cheese with different shapes and flavors such as vegan sausage cheese – vegan vegetables and…

Name: EU Integration Committee of Ukrainian Dairy
Description:
The Committee on European Integration initiated by the Union of Dairy Enterprises of Ukraine is an open platform for consolidating the Ukrainian dairy industry to combine the efforts of business, professional associations and government on the way to a common market with the EU.

OPEN PLATFORM
The Committee was created as a space for dialogue and cooperation for all participants of the dairy industry.

FAVOURABLE TERMS
Developing an integration strategy that maximizes the development of the Ukrainian dairy market.

COMPREHENSIVE APPROACH
Coordination of the integration process taking into account the interests of all stakeholders.

We are open to collaboration with other associations, chambers of commerce, embassies, and international programs that share the goals of our committee!

Name: IDF/ISO Analytical Week
Description:
For dairy laboratory managers, dairy scientist and analytical professionals, IDF/ISO Analytical Week 2022 provides the opportunity to network and exchange ideas on the latest development in analytical solutions and to launch new initiatives.

The event is jointly organized and hosted by Verband der Deutschen Milchwirtschaft (VDM), International Dairy Federation (IDF) and International Organization for Standardization (ISO).

The International Organization for Standardization (ISO) is an independent, non-governmental organization consisting of members from the national standards bodies of 166 countries. ISO brings together experts to share knowledge and develop International Standards that provide solutions to global challenges.

The International Dairy Federation (IDF) is a worldwide acting federation of the dairy sector. With over 1,200 highly qualified dairy experts from 43 member countries around the world, IDF represents 75% of global milk production and provides a permanent source of authoritative scientific and technical information relevant to the dairy sector.

The Verband der Deutschen Milchwirtschaft (VDM) is the German National Committee of IDF. Together with its members, it represents the interest of the entire German dairy sector within IDF for 110 years.

Name: Vogtlandmilch GmbH
Description:
Du kennst den leckeren Quark von „Sachsenland“? Die Butter und die Buttermilch von „Vogtlandweide“? Die Schulmilch von „Joe Clever“ oder „Muhmm!“? Weißt du auch, dass all diese Produkte von der Vogtlandmilch GmbH kommen?

Seit über 90 Jahren sind wir als regionales, mittelständiges Unternehmen der deutschen Milchwirtschaft im Südwesten von Sachsen, in Plauen im Vogtland, beheimatet. Bei uns verarbeiten ca. 150 Mitarbeiter Milch zu einer Vielfalt an hochwertigen Milchprodukten – Neben H-Milch, Frischmilch, Butter und Buttermilch ist unser breit gefächertes Quarksortiment der Hauptgrund, warum es unseren Kunden schmeckt. Zusätzlich beliefern wir Schulen in ganz Deutschland mit H-Milchmischgetränken und sind der einzige Schulmilchabfüller in Sachsen. Die Zufriedenheit unserer Kunden und ein ausgeprägtes Qualitätsbewusstsein gehören hier zu den obersten Unternehmensgrundsätzen.      

All das wäre nicht möglich ohne unsere Mitarbeiter. Jeder Einzelne trägt zum Unternehmenserfolg bei. Deshalb suchen wir zur Unterstützung unseres Teams nach weiteren engagierten, gewissenhaften und zuverlässigen Mitarbeitern, Auszubildenden und Studenten. 
Du kennst vielleicht unsere Produkte? Du bist auf der Suche nach einem abwechslungsreichen und krisensicheren Job in einem familiären Umfeld? Dann schicke uns deine Bewerbung an Bewerbung@vogtlandmilch.de.

Name: The Donkey Palace
Description:
The Donkey Palace in Mukkudal Tirunelveli is an innovative and unique project that aims to integrate environmental protection, animal welfare, and human welfare into one.
 
We follow a vision called "ONE HEALTH" the phrase seems new, right? so allow me to elucidate.
 
We went mainstream with the intent of protecting the native Indian donkey breeds.
 
Our major goal is to improve their reputation.
 
Obtain enough societal respect, and
 
Strip away the taboos and stereotypes about them. 
 
Portrayed as a beast of burden.
 
The conservation aspect of our project is motivated solely by the drastic decline of the donkey population in India.
 
According to the most recent 2019 livestock census, it has been reduced to 71%. In addition to conservation, a part of our mission would be to aid destitute donkeys, an income source for underprivileged communities. We want this farm to be the place where we educate and create awareness regarding donkey welfare. Donkeys are very much capable of making enormous contributions to society.
Furthermore, to raise the value of donkey milk, which has high nutritional and therapeutic value and can also be utilized to make a premium line of all-natural skincare products for people using herbs and natural ingredients, including donkey's milk.
 
Animal welfare is vital, and we analyze the donkeys' psychological and behavioral needs and provide:
 
Excellent Barn
Proper Nutrition
 
At our farm, we practice animal husbandry and provide peerless care to our animals.
 
Aside from that, the donkeys will be trained for purposes such as donkey-assisted therapy for differently-abled children, de-addiction and drug abuse patients, recreational and educational visits for school children, and tourism-related activities.

Name: Alternative Animal Bedding
Description:
Providing an affordable animal bedding solution to farmers in the Wisconsin area.  Our bedding is made from the byproducts of two local manufacturing plants -- short fibers from recycled office paper and dust from hydrated lime kilns.  Our high pH lime aides in reducing the moisture content of the short fibers but also works to kill bacteria.  Our bedding can be used in tie or free stall barns as a replacement of straw, sawdust or other materials on mats and mattresses.  Some customers use our bedding in shallow or deep bedded stalls.  Others use our bedding with a higher lime concentration to treat manure solids from digesters and screw presses.  Many customers find our bedding to be a great addition to their calf hutches or loose housing to control odor and flies while also keeping excessive moisture in check.

We are also close to rolling out a bedding groomer demo unit.  This groomer is meant to "chew" through hard spots that can develop in stalls using our bedding or even manure solids.  More information to come as we take it out for the first time and tweak the design as needed.

Name: Vállalkozás másodállásban
Description: Egy újabb könyv a magyar piacon, ami elmondja, hogyan lehet vállalkozást építeni, és pénzt csinálni.  Biztos ezt gondolod, de ha már ezt elkezdted olvasni, olvasd is végig. Magyar vagyok, magyar cégem van, és itt keresek pénzt. Ebben az országban vannak lehetőségek, és hidd el neked is sikerülni fog, ha tudod, mit és hogyan kell csinálni. Öt év tapasztalatát írtam le, onnantól kezdve, hogy tisztázni kell magunkban, hogy mik az erősségeink és gyengeségeink, milyen vállalkozást tudnánk üzemeltetni a későbbiekben. Milyen akadályokra, és gátló tényezőkre kell felkészülni a közvetlen és a közvetett környezetedben, családi, baráti és ismeretségi körben, hogyan tedd meg az első lépéseket és építs ki egy stabilan működő kis céget, amit majd, ha akarsz, a későbbiekben növelni tudsz. Megtudod a könyvből, hogyan lehet ma, folyamatosan megrendelést szerezni, és mi kell ahhoz, hogy céged stabil anyagi körülmények közt tudjon működni itt, Magyarországon. Leírom neked az én technikáimat és tapasztalataimat, az indulástól a marketingen át az ügyféllel való kapcsolattartásig, ezzel igyekezve időt, pénzt és vesződséget spórolva, hogy Te minél hamarabb egy könnyebb, biztonságosabb életet élhess. Nem száraz, technikai dolgokról fogsz itt olvasni, természetesen az is van benne, hanem történetekről, sztorikról. Igyekeztem a technikai részét is úgy leírni és átadni neked, ahogyan én megéltem és előnyt kovácsoltam, amiből csak tudtam, amiből meg nem azon jót nevetek. Minden fejezet elejére beraktam az adott fejezethez tartozó elmetérképet, ami a fejezet főbb gondolatait és témáit tartalmazza egy-egy szóban, logikus lánccá fűzve azokat. Így könnyebben tudod, memorizálni és előhívni azt a tudást, amit a könyvben gyűjtöttél. Nem kell újból elolvasnod a fejezetet, csak átnézed az elmetérképet és jönni fognak az olvasottak.

Name: Roaring Brook Dairy
Description:
Homemade by you with a little help from us! Roaring Brook Dairy makes DIY kits for cooks and non-cooks alike to learn the art of cheese, butter, and tofu making in their own home. 

Over the past decade many people from amateur chefs to food lovers to concerned parents have embraced the making of specialty foods. Roaring Brook Dairy’s Mozzarella Cheesemaking Kit, Chèvre Cheesemaking Kit, Ricotta & Cottage Cheese DIY Kit, Homemade Fresh & Creamy Butter Kit, and Tofu Making Kit help customers gain confidence and have fun by giving them the tools to succeed.

After working in the imported cheese business for close to 30 years, Leslie Kozupsky founded Roaring Brook Dairy in 2010 to share the art of cheesemaking with fellow cheese lovers. She designed the Mozzarella Cheesemaking Kit with the necessary supplies to make multiple batches of cheese in less than an hour per batch. 

The Homemade Butter and Chèvre Cheesemaking Kit soon followed suit to introduce the ease of making fresh butter and goat cheese. The introduction of the Tofu Making Kit to the line in 2014 helped Roaring Brook Dairy expand its reach with a vegetarian staple using remarkably similar steps to cheesemaking. Consumers need only a blender and a lemon to turn the kit’s organic, non-GMO soybeans into fresh tofu. And in early 2015, Roaring Brook Dairy launched the Ricotta & Cottage Cheese DIY Kit to help families make simple, quick, everyday soft cheeses a part of the family routine. 

Each kit includes an instruction manual with a glossary of terms, troubleshooting tips, and recipe suggestions. Roaring Brook Dairy’s online videos, Frequently Asked Questions, and social media sites round out the assistance available to those making their first attempt or looking for support to perfect their craft. The kits are available for a suggested retail price of $19 at a growing number of fine gourmet stores, gift shops, and housewares retailers across the country.

Il nostro progetto è valorizzare e far conoscere il nostro latte attraverso la sua trasformazione in prodotti di alta qualità, formaggi e yogurt.
Il nostro prodotto di punta ed esclusivo è un formaggio stagionato con latte vaccino e di bufala , ma non sono da meno tutti gli altri nostri prodotti
Il futuro c’è lo immaginiamo sempre più grande , se condividi la nostra mission diventa nostro partner o collaboratore.

Name: YoGreek
Description:
At YoGreek, we bring the authentic taste of Greece to your table through our rich, creamy, and naturally cultured Greek yogurt. Made with only the finest ingredients and traditional straining methods, our yogurt is a celebration of simplicity, nutrition, and heritage.

We are passionate about real food, no shortcuts, no artificial flavors, just honest dairy crafted with care. From locally sourced milk, every spoonful reflects our commitment to quality, sustainability, and wellness.

Whether you’re enjoying it as a breakfast staple, post-workout fuel, or a guilt-free dessert, our Greek yogurt supports a balanced lifestyle without compromising on flavor.

Name: Cremurah
Description:
Bringing the health and joy of drinking farm fresh milk to the people of Chennai since 2010, Enrich Foods is a dairy farm with a vision. We are committed to spread the goodness of pure cow’s milk and delicious world-class dairy products while ensuring that our cows are well-fed, healthy, and lovingly cared for.

Our holistic approach and dairy practices are focused on supplying the best-quality milk that’s devoid of any harmful additives or preservatives, along with providing great level of care to the animals and the environment.

‘Cremurah’ is our brand of dairy product range, which includes milk, curd, paneer (cottage cheese), butter, ghee (clarified butter), and khova (evaporated milk). We also turn the by-products into vermicompost, manure, and other products.

Located in Perungavoor near Redhills, our farm is only an hour away from the city of Chennai, where cows are raised and milked in a healthy and hygienic environment. We supply nearly 650 litres of farm fresh cow’s milk to our customers across Chennai through our own delivery network. At Enrich Foods, we’re passionate about milk and it shows when you explore our world of natural, wholesome milk and dairy products that taste great and offer tons of health benefits!

Name: Pecoraro Cheese Inc
Description:
Stemming from five generations of cheese makers, the Pecoraro family began its Lineage of fine cheese making in their native Campania Region of Italy. In the early 1970’s the Pecoraro family brought the art of traditional cheese making methods to their new home in Williamsburg Brooklyn, where they continue the tradition today. Decades old techniques as well as a passion for uncompromising quality have been the cornerstone of which the Pecoraro family has built their name on. 

Pecoraro Cheese is still a family owned and operated business. Today, much of the cheese making process is monitored and manufactured by specialized machinery brought in from Italy that mimics the time old technique of the “hand pulling” process.  The Pecoraro family continues to holds firm to its values of making the best artisanal, premium whole Milk cheese. Unlike many of our competitors Pecoraro Cheese is one of the few original fresh cheese manufacturers who remains in Brooklyn Today.

Name: Lechecol ZF SAS
Description:
En Lechecol ZF SAS somos una empresa familiar colombiana con más de 20 años de experiencia en la producción y comercialización de leche en polvo, comprometidos con la calidad, la sostenibilidad y el impacto social.

 Para el Retail y las grandes superficies, desarrollamos productos de marca propia con abastecimiento confiable, cero rupturas de stock y un relato sostenible que conecta con el consumidor final.

 Para la industria y el canal HORECA, ofrecemos insumos lácteos estandarizados, con respaldo técnico y presentaciones adaptadas para asegurar rendimiento, sabor y rentabilidad en cada receta.

 Para el sector institucional y social, suministramos leche en polvo fortificada y certificada, con logística escalonada y programas de trazabilidad que garantizan nutrición segura y cumplimiento normativo.

Nuestro compromiso va más allá del producto: trabajamos en alianza con pequeños productores, apoyamos iniciativas ambientales junto a Prodensa, aportamos a la Fundación Traspasando Fronteras y colaboramos con el Banco de Alimentos, porque creemos que la calidad debe alimentar también la vida de las comunidades.

 En Lechecol combinamos tradición artesanal, procesos industriales certificados y responsabilidad social, para convertirnos en el socio estratégico que tu negocio necesita.

 Escríbenos hoy y agenda una cita comercial: descubre cómo podemos llevar tu marca, tu industria o tu programa de nutrición al siguiente nivel.

With more than 25 years of experience in the field, we know our industry like the back of our hands. There’s no challenge too big or too small and we dedicate our utmost energy to every project we take on.

If you are looking to improve herd health and cow resistance, we have dairy consultant monitored products and would welcome the opportunity to work with you to achieve your desired improvements. 

With the industry looking to reduce the use of anti-biotics we are in a prime position to help farms achieve those aims.

Every farm  is unique. That’s why we customise every one of our programmes to fit your needs exactly. Whether it’s a small improvement or a comprehensive effort, we’ll sit down with you, listen to your requirements and prepare a customised plan.

Name: ΕΥ-ΖΩ Γαλακτοκομείο
Description:
Το γαλακτοκομείο ΕΥ-ΖΩ ιδρύθηκε το 1977 από τον Ευάγγελο Ζωγράφο, και έτσι πήρε και την ονομασία ΕΥ-ΖΩ από τα αρχικά του ονόματος του. Ο Ευάγγελος Ζωγράφος κατάγεται από την Αμμόχωστο, και μετά την εισβολή του 1974, κατοίκησε στα Λατσιά όπου δημιούργησε αυτή την μικρή βιοτεχνία για να ζήσει την οικογένεια του, κάνοντας έτσι μια νέα αρχή μετά την εισβολή. Ο επαγγελματισμός, η επικοινωνία με τους πελάτες, η παραγωγή προϊόντων από αγνές Κυπριακές πρώτες ύλες, ήταν μερικά από τα στοιχεία που έκαναν την εταιρεία να ξεχωρίσει για την άριστη της ποιότητα.
Σήμερα, η βιοτεχνία γαλακτοκομικών προιόντων Ευ-Ζω δραστηριοποιείται στην περιοχή Λευκωσίας και στα περίχωρα αυτής, διανέμοντας γαλακτοκομικά προιόντα τόσο σε ντόπιες μικρές αγορές όσο και σε μεγαλύτερες επιχειρήσεις όπως ταβέρνες, εστιατόρια, αλυσίδες καταστημάτων και άλλα.

Name: HASAN EKİCİ SÜT ÜRÜNLERİ
Description:
1948 yılından bu yana Anadolu'nun en kaliteli sütlerini kullanarak, geleneksel yöntemlerle ürettiğimiz tereyağı ile damaklarınızda iz bırakıyoruz. 
Bizler için tüketici memnuniyeti, vazgeçilmez bir sermaye olarak değer taşıyor. Bu yüzden, en kaliteli süt ürünleri sunmak adına, üretim sürecindeki her aşamada titizlikle çalışıyoruz ve kaliteden asla taviz vermiyoruz. 
Biz evimize götürmediğimizi müşterimizin sofrasına sunmuyoruz.
Tereyağına olan tutkumuz, büyük hedeflerimize ulaşmamız için bize güç verirken, tüketicilerimizin markamıza ve ürünlerimize olan yoğun ilgisi, motivasyonumuzun kaynağıdır.

Amacımız, müşterilerimizin her noktada kolayca ulaşabileceği bir marka haline gelmek, kalite standartlarımızı her geçen gün yükseltmek, uluslararası yenilikleri takip ederek vizyoner bir marka olmak ve dürüst ve ahlaklı ticaret kültürünü sektörde genişletmektir.

Bugün de, yarın da, Hasan Ekici kalitesini en doğal ve taze haliyle sofralarınıza taşıyarak, lezzet dolu anlar yaşamanızı sağlıyoruz.

Hasan Ekici’de değişmeyecek olan tek şey lezzettir.
Size bunun sözünü veriyoruz…

Hasan Ekici
Genel Müdür

We offer home delivery of fresh milk and handcrafted dairy products across Bahria Enclave and nearby areas, ensuring quality, safety, and convenience at your doorstep.

We provide a range of fresh, pure milk options, including:
• Cow Milk
• Buffalo Milk
• Cow-Buffalo Mix Milk

Our milk is sourced daily, tested for quality, and delivered chilled to maintain freshness. We pride ourselves on offering dairy products that are free from preservatives, chemicals, and industrial additives.

In addition to milk, our artisanal dairy products include:
• Premium Yogurt
• Authentic Greek Yogurt
• Silky-Smooth Butter
• Handmade Desi Ghee
• Fresh Cottage Cheese (Paneer)
• Stretchy Mozzarella Cheese

We are also known for our signature chilled lassi range, made from fresh yogurt and filtered water:
• Choco Lassi Chiller
• Lassi Lush Chiller
• Mango Lassi Chiller

Each product is prepared with care, hygiene, and love, using traditional recipes and modern methods that preserve both taste and nutrition.

Milk Supply is more than a business—it’s a mission-driven enterprise that connects urban consumers with safe, traceable, and ethically produced dairy, while creating income opportunities for women farmers in Pakistan.

Name: KK Cans Pvt. Ltd.
Description:
At Khambete Kothari Cans and Allied Products Pvt. Ltd., popularly known as KK Cans Pvt. Ltd., we’ve been at the forefront of India’s dairy sector since the inception of the Operation Flood Programme in the 1970s. Our journey began in Jalgaon, where we recognized the needs of milk producers and started manufacturing 40-liter aluminum cans for cooperative milk unions. Today, we stand as India’s pioneering producer of single-joint stainless steel milk cans, setting new standards for clean milk procurement.

Our commitment to innovation and quality has propelled us to become the largest manufacturer of milk cans and cooling equipment in India, with a global footprint spanning 42 countries. Since our humble beginnings in 1975, we have continuously evolved, introducing advanced products such as stainless steel 304 milk cans and bulk milk coolers to enhance milk quality and streamline operations.

Driven by a vision of growth and a dedication to meeting the evolving demands of the dairy industry, KK Cans remains a trusted partner for both private and cooperative dairy sectors. Our focus on hygiene, durability, and efficiency ensures that our products, including our renowned milk cans and cooling solutions, meet the highest standards of quality and performance.

We are proud to contribute to the dairy sector's development in India and beyond, leveraging our expertise to support farmers and milk unions with cutting-edge solutions that align with the industry's latest advancements.

Name: Ayodhya Darshan
Description: Ayodhya is also known as Saketa an ancient city of India, believed to be the birthplace of Rama and setting of the epic Ramayana. It is adjacent to Faizabad city in the central region of the Indian state of Uttar Pradesh. Ayodhya used to be the capital of the ancient Kosala Kingdom. Owing to the belief as the birthplace of Rama, Ayodhya (Awadh) has been regarded as one of the seven most important pilgrimage sites for Hindus. It is believed that the birth spot of Rama was marked by a temple, which was demolished by the orders of the Mughal emperor Babur and a mosque erected in its place.

Name: Scholze Family Farms
Description:
In 1949, Louis and Elizabeth Scholze began farming just east of the small town of Humbird, Wisconsin, with about 40 dairy cows.

In 1979, their son Marvin and his wife Minnie took over the small operation and formed M&M Dairy.  During their 30 years operating the farm, they increased the herd to about 320 cows. In the early 1990s, they made the move from a tie-stall barn to a freestall barn, and built a double-10 herringbone parlor. M&M Dairy was one of the first farms in the United States to utilize a parlor with a piping system located beneath the parlor.

Marvin and Minnie's two sons, Theo and Will returned to the farm with their families in 2011 and began operating as Scholze Family Farms in 2014.  Today we milk about 500 cows and farm about 1700 acres.

Name: Battistella Formaggi
Description:
Battistella Formaggi is a dairy factory located in the area of Treviso. It yields fame for its different types of cheeses with particular focus and attention to refined products.

Since the postwar period, the activity whithin the dairy industry, for the Battistella family, has not only been a job, but a real commitment to hold the pride in delivering their passion, to the tables of hundreds of households around the world.

"Our long story starts right in the postwar period, when the region's economy was principally relying on agricolture." It's in that period that Angelo Battistella jumped on his bicycle and rode miles and miles, moving from one house to the other, delivering the precious products of the very few creameries operating along the Piave river.
This activity evolved into a new dimention with the introduction of "Balilla", the first ever fuel-powered vehicle, which allowed to operate along longer routes, in less time, and with higher capacity.

Around 1950, Alfio (founder of Battistella Formaggi), started a cooperation with his father, who shared some precious lessons that he kept over the years, to then spread them whithin the following generations.

Alfio, along with his wife, Bianca, started then experimenting different tecniques. By all, the affination, a process that saw huge improvement not only with their practice and dedication over the years, but also with the introduction of his sons, Sandro and Daniela, to the business.

For over 40 years, Battistella Formaggi has brought evidence of experience, passion, creativity and research, without ever being affected by time.
Since always holding the pride and joy of bringing a piece of their hard work and passion among hundreds of tables around the world, Battistella Formaggi is the family-ran business where the final products stand between the oldest secrets of the local tradition, and the art of innovation!

Name: OUDWIJKER
Description:
Over de Oudwijker
Het bedrijf “Oudwijker” maakt ambachtelijke kazen met melk van Nederlandse boeren. De producten zijn bereid volgens de traditionele methode van de Toma, een populaire Noord-Italiaanse bergkaas. Naast deze zelfgemaakte kazen verkoopt “Oudwijker” ook een selectie van ambachtelijke kaas van collega-kaasmakers uit de provincie Utrecht en omstreken.
De Oudwijker komt voort uit zowel de Nederlandse (Utrecht) als de Italiaanse cultuur (pre-Alpenge- bied, dichtbij Lago Maggiore); met name het Italiaanse, kleinschalige vakmanschap: de gave om met enkele pure, natuurlijke producten iets buitengewoon lekkers te maken.
Onze waarden:
De volgende waarden wil “Oudwijker” in de dagelijkse praktijk tot leven laten komen:
+ Een heerlijke, pure smaak door vakmanschap en een zorgvuldige selectie van ingredienten.
+ Transparantie, om de voedselketen weer inzichtelijk en veilig te maken;
+ Streven naar duurzaamheid en naar welzijn van dieren;
+ Bevorderen van autonomie: een sterke en diverse lokale economie, waarbij de promotie van duurzame en 
    sociale initiatieven centraal staat.

As a locally-owned and operated business, we are deeply rooted in the community we serve. We cherish the relationships we've built with our customers and are committed to fostering a sense of trust and transparency in everything we do.

Name: Apocc Soc Coop
Description:
Siamo la Cooperativa di allevatori ovini e caprini della Calabria che ha ottenuto il riconoscimento del Pecorino Crotonese come formaggio DOP. Da quasi quarant'anni siamo nel settore caseario. Il nostro obiettivo è la realizzazione di prodotti dal grande gusto e dalla grande qualità, partendo da un latte locale certificato.

Tutto è iniziato tanti anni fa con l'acquisto di un auto cisterna per raccogliere il miglior latte del Marchesato crotonese per poi rivenderlo a vari produttori lattiero caseari dislocati nelle varie provincie calabresi.  Da qui l'idea di produrre il formaggio per proprio conto avendo in famiglia una tradizione lunga da generazioni legata alla pastorizia e all'arte della Caseificazione; nasce così il caseificio sociale. Apocc non è semplicemente un'azienda ma una forma giuridica di partecipazione dove gli allevatori sono i protagonisti della riscoperta della tradizione e della storia del Pecorino Crotonese.  Calabrialleva è il marchio commerciale della nostra Cooperativa.

Solo alcune storie diventano grandi così come solo alcuni formaggi diventano DOP.

Quattro medaglie all’International Cheese & Dairy Award. 
Oro per il pecorino Crotonese DOP stagionato (2022) 
Bronzo per il pecorino Crotonese DOP fresco (2022) 
Bronzo per la ricotta affumicata (2022)
Argento per la ricotta affumicata (2023)
La quale si è aggiudicata il riconoscimento come miglior prodotto caseario da parte della rivista Golosaria alla fiera Sol&Agrifood del Vinitaly (2022). 
Il Pecorino Crotonese ha attirato l'attenzione di alcune Tv, comparendo nella trasmissione culinaria l’Ingrediente Perfetto di La7 condotta dalla Cucinotta, ed è stato protagonista di sei puntate su Gambero Rosso Channel – Sky Tv, nel programma “Fuoco”
condotto dallo chef Max Mariola.

Farmer's All Natural Milk
Description:
Farmer’s All Natural Milk was born in 2003 out of the demand to provide quality, all natural milk to Colorado's wholesale and retail consumers. 

Farmers All Natural is produced by Royal Crest  Dairy which was established in 1927 to serve customers the highest quality dairy products.  

Farmer's All Natural Milk is pasteurized and homogenized at our modern plant in Longmont, Colorado. We begin with the freshest milk from local grade A producers. 
Farmer's All Natural contracts with these dairy farmers to not treat their cows with the bovine growth hormone rbGH.  The milk is processed using a vacuum pasteurization method which gives Farmer's All Natural a rich and creamy fresh taste.

Here at at the Farmer's All Natural, we do what we can to keep Colorado Clean.  

Our reusable milk bottles are one way we keep plastic out of our landfill. Just one reusable bottle can be used for 3-5 years.  In 2016, our customer reused over 900,000 bottles. 

Damaged milk and other products are given to local hog farmers to use as feed. Plastic, cardboard and wood pallets are taken to recycling centers.

Manure is composted and turned into valuable soil additive for dairy farmer's crops and neighboring fields.

Water is re used multiple times on our dairy farms, including as drinking water for cows, then to clean out barns and finally to water fields.  During our cleaning process at our Longmont plant, waste water is collected and deposed of properly, it's never sent down the drain into Colorado's sewer.

Milk today is produced with 63% less carbon, 90 % less land and 75% less manure than milk in 1944.

Description:
Guru Comunicazione è nata nel 2008 con l'obiettivo di promuovere attivamente e organizzare iniziative, incontri e appuntamenti nazionali dedicati ai caci. 
Entrando in contatto con un ampio pannel di produttori e potendo contare su professionisti dalle solide competenze, “Guru Comunicazione” si propone così di concorrere alla tutela di tutte quelle produzioni autentiche, tipiche e artigianali realizzate in Italia e di monitorarne la diffusione sul mercato per identificarne le variazioni, le modifiche delle richieste, i trend legati alle mode.  “Passione e missione sono le linee guida che muovono ogni nostra attività espressamente sviluppata per avvicinare il pubblico ad una comprensione reale, approfondita  e quindi soddisfacente del formaggio. Formaggio che è molto di più di un prodotto, è una mappa di sensazioni e una cartina geografica attraverso la quale leggere ogni regione del nostro Paese, ogni azienda casearia dedita alla produzione. Il detto “siamo quello che mangiamo” riguarda il benessere legato alla alimentazione, ma rimanda anche alle nostre radici, ai luoghi di provenienza di ogni prodotto, all’ambiente in cui viene realizzato e alle condizioni degli animali che sono l’anello iniziale della catena. Solo approfondendo ognuno di questi passaggi si potrà imparare a distinguere ragionevolmente ciò che è buono da ciò che non lo è, scegliendo a ragion veduta cosa accludere nella propria dieta o quale sfizio concedersi.

Name: Consorzio Vacche Rosse
Description:
Tutti conoscono il Parmigiano Reggiano. Ma quanti sanno davvero da dove nasce? Ogni forma di questo straordinario formaggio racchiude un legame profondo con la cultura agricola dell’Emilia, la sapienza contadina e una razza bovina unica: la Rossa Reggiana. Con il suo tipico mantello fromentino, questa razza autoctona del nord Italia ha accompagnato la nostra tradizione fin dai tempi dei monaci Benedettini e Cistercensi, lasciando un’impronta indelebile nella tradizione gastronomica del Paese e… nella nostra storia.  

Noi, infatti, siamo nati proprio grazie a lei. Era il 1991 quando la Rossa Reggiana rischiava l’estinzione. Un gruppo di allevatori decise allora di fondare il Consorzio di Valorizzazione dei Prodotti dell’Antica Razza Reggiana (C.V.P.A.R.R.). Quello che doveva essere un progetto biennale è cresciuto ben oltre le aspettative: oggi siamo il Consorzio Vacche Rosse, e continuiamo a portare avanti quella visione con passione e impegno.   

Ogni giorno, il nostro lavoro è un omaggio alla “madre” del Re dei Formaggi. Grazie a lei possiamo offrire una filiera corta, etica e certificata, nel cuore dell’Emilia. Dal Parmigiano Reggiano ai latticini, produciamo nel segno della tradizione, del rispetto per il territorio e della tutela della biodiversità.  

La nostra è, a tutti gli effetti, una storia dal gusto inimitabile.

Amfilochias Gi
MILK PROCESSING AND FORMULATION UNIT
ABOUT US :
 Our story begins a long time ago, when some of us were still children!
The company Amfilochia Gi was founded in 2008 on the initiative of the Agricultural Cooperative "Agrinio Union", which has been operating since 1930 and today is the main shareholder of the company. The company in this form has been producing products since 2017 in a modern milk processing plant and aims to offer high quality cheese products, with respect for the environment and society. At our facilities modern production methods and strict specifications governing the quality control, production and packaging processes are applied.
 The production processes are carried out through state-of-the-art machines, meeting all the requirements for the safety and hygiene of our products.
The production process of the products is based on those who live in the area of Amfilochia and deal with the cheese industry more broadly: the people who cultivate the land, the people who raise the animals, but also the people who work as cheese makers and food technicians in her factory. For the preparation of our national, traditional cheese, FETA, which is the pillar of Greek sheep and goat farming, as well as for the other PDO cheeses, a basic specification is that the milk to be cheese-making comes from breeds of sheep and goats traditionally reared and adapted to the production area of cheeses and their diet is based on the flora of this region.


With five product labels in our portofolio: feta P.D.O. ,graviera Amfilochias, kefalograviera P.D.O., pecorino, , tsalafouti we have consolidated our presence in the Greek market, while protecting our tradition and highlighting the hidden treasures of Amfilochia by utilizing the livestock sector of the prefecture.
Our traditional products are available exclusively in the AB Vasilopoulos network and consumers can find them in the refrigerators and cutting counters of the chain's stores throughout Greece.

Name: Allgäu Milch Käse eG
Description:
Beste Qualität ist für uns ganz natürlich.

Wir sind ein bäuerliches Unternehmen.
Die Allgäu Milch Käse eG versteht sich als ein soziale Verantwortung tragendes, im ländlichen Umfeld integriertes Unternehmen mit bäuerlichem Hintergrund. Wie es dem Wesen der Genossenschaft entspricht, haben unsere Mitglieder direkten Einfluss auf die Geschicke des Unternehmens – der bäuerliche Wille steht somit immer im Vordergrund. Ein zusätzlicher und wichtiger Mehrwert ist der Erhalt von Landschaft und Landwirtschaft im Allgäu.

Wir setzen auf Nachhaltigkeit.
Der Begriff Nachhaltigkeit ist für uns kein Schlagwort, sondern seit der Unternehmensgründung elementarer Bestandteil der Unternehmensprinzipien. Dazu zählen wir den schonenden Umgang mit den natürlichen Ressourcen ebenso wie nachhaltiges Wirtschaften und den aktiven Umweltschutz.

Wir produzieren gute, gesunde und preiswerte Lebensmittel.
Hochwertige und gleichzeitig bezahlbare Lebensmittel aus dem Rohstoff Milch zu produzieren, ist für uns ein echtes Anliegen. Zudem sehen wir es als unsere Aufgabe an, immer wieder mit Innovationen – zum Beispiel Raclettekäse, laktosefreier Quark, Heumilch Quark, haltbare Bio-Heumilch – zu überraschen.

Wir vertreiben unsere Produkte über unsere eigene Vertriebsschiene und zuverlässige Partner
Zum einen vertreiben wir Molkereiprodukte der Allgäu Milch Käse eG über unsere zuverlässigen Partner, wie z.B. die Herz Käse GmbH, die Käsemanufaktur, die Allgäu GmbH, die Hawanger Käsegenuss GmbH oder die ÖMA (Ökologische Molkereien Allgäu). Zum anderen nutzen wir unsere eigene Vertriebsschiene, um noch mehr Menschen mit unseren einzigartigen Produkten erreichen und begeistern zu können.

Name: Smileys Ice Cream
Description:
Smile, it's a Story

Traditional ice cream, or "porch ice cream" as we like to refer to it, is at the heart of what we do. It's the ice cream many people grew up making on their porches at home with lots of ice and salt and their own homemade recipes.  Ice cream that focuses on quality ingredients and flavor, and is not as concerned with how much overrun (air) is in the ice cream.  After all, air has no flavor the last time I checked.  

We began with the simple idea that we would make our ice cream the same way I grew up making it as a kid on my parent's back porch.  So we did, putting flavor and quality ingredients at the forefront, and it became a popular hit that developed into a mobile business.  We could make the flavors of ice cream that customers wanted, the old fashioned way, with original wooden bucket ice cream freezers and only the freshest ingredients right at their event in a 12' enclosed trailer that's regulated and inspected by the health department.  

In the winter of 2015, we added a new 20' trailer to our business that allows us to make our great recipes in commercial modern batch freezers.  This allows us to use the same great recipes that our customers have come to love, make any quantity of ice cream that our customers want, make bulk quantities of ice cream at an affordable cost, and allows us to operate our business in a more environmentally friendly way as the new batch freezers don't create the salt water waste that is created in making the ice cream the traditional way.

Our newest trailer allows us to bring the services of an ice cream shop right to the customers' location.  It was designed with the customer in mind, as we have learned a lot since 2001 about what customers want.  We can serve from the trailer, or lay down the back of the trailer to bring the equipment into the event that we're serving.  We can serve 800 people down to 50 people from the same trailer.  

In the summer of 2017 we opened our first brick and mortar ice cream shop.  This shop provides us with a retail and wholesale store, a stable environment to produce our great ice cream, indoor and outdoor seating for customers, and adequate freezer and refrigerator storage for our products and supplies.  Our shop space is still a "work in progress" as we continue to add products and services that our customers are requesting.

Our business now offers both the reliability of a storefront and the services that only a mobile ice cream trailer can offer.  It's this flexibility, and love of making great quality ice cream, that backs our motto of "Bringing happiness to you one scoop at a time!"

Name: ORIGIN EARTH LIMITED
Description:
ORIGIN EARTH LIMITED is a boutique dairy company based out of Havelock North, Hawke's Bay, New Zealand.

Origin Earth products are unique in that they are all crafted from single farm origin milk and the cow’s milk is sourced from Hawke’s Bay farmers who farm within an hour of the factory. 

Single farm origin means that the milk for any one batch of milk, yoghurt or cheese comes from a single farm and herd or flock.  Milk from different farms or even from different milking’s is never mixed, making all our products completely traceable. This means we can verify where the raw product was sourced and are able to trace it back to the farm, the paddock and the animals from which the milk come.

Along with all the usual information you would expect to find on a food label our products also include a farm identifier and milk batch number – that’s how we can trace it right back to the animals.

The Origin Earth factory is close to the farmers who supply our milk. Small batches are picked up by our own staff and brought to our Havelock North plant. Once at the factory, milk is immediately crafted into cheese, pot set yoghurt or fresh milk, to ensure it retains all the goodness and taste that farm staff, animals and soil biology, worked so hard to achieve.

Our fresh milk is available to you just hours after the morning milking.

No Origin Earth product is standardised, homogenised or stabilised. They have no emulsifiers, thickeners or milk powders added. What you purchase are products made from milk straight from the animal.

Name: Fullwood Packo Nederland
Description:
Wij zijn Fullwood Packo, leverancier van een volledig geïntegreerde oplossing voor hoogwaardig melk-, koel- en veestapelmanagement voor ambitieuze melkveehouders.
Al onze oplossingen zijn ontworpen rondom één kerndoel: het leven van melkkoeien en hun veehouders verbeteren en ervoor zorgen dat hun activiteiten productief en winstgevend zijn, terwijl de koeien zich comfortabel en gezond voelen. Deze filosofie strekt zich uit tot onze bredere bedrijfsaanpak. We zetten voortdurend progressieve stappen om meer te doen voor het milieu en duurzaamheid in de melkveehouderij.

We hebben verstand van melken en koelen. We weten met welke stress en uitdagingen melkveehouders te maken hebben, en ook dat geen twee bedrijven hetzelfde zijn. We nemen de tijd om uw bedrijf te begrijpen en samen te werken aan de juiste oplossing. Wat u ook kiest, elk product is ontworpen met het oog op volledige veiligheid voor u en uw koeien, met functies die helpen besparen op arbeid en mensen en tegelijk zorgen voor melkproductie van de hoogste kwaliteit.

Ons doel bestaat uit gezonde en productieve koeien voor elke melkveehouder. Onze serie van slimme oplossingen voor melken en koelen kunnen dat realiseren voor melkveehouders over de hele wereld.

Name: Dreamview Creamery
Description: Dreamview is a family owned and operated creamery, milking and bottling on site since 2017 at our farm situated on the hills above Raglan. The entire family all have huge roles to play in the day to day success of our operation and our customers love knowing exactly where their milk comes from. The wellbeing of our animals, ethical farming practices and low environmental impact are the pillars of our business model.

Name: Derivados Lácteos La Frescura
Description:
Bienvenido(a) a Lácteos La Frescura! Somos una empresa apasionada por alimentar tu bienestar y llevarte la frescura de los derivados lácteos directamente desde la hermosa región de Antioquia.

En Lácteos La Frescura, entendemos que una alimentación saludable es esencial para tu bienestar. Nuestros productos están diseñados pensando en ti y tu familia, ofreciendo la más alta calidad y el delicioso sabor de lo natural. Queremos que disfrutes cada bocado sabiendo que estás cuidando tu salud y la de los tuyos.

¿Buscas opciones alimenticias que no solo sean deliciosas, sino también beneficiosas para tu cuerpo? En Lácteos La Frescura, te ofrecemos productos lácteos frescos y nutritivos, llenos de proteínas y calcio para fortalecer tus huesos y mantener una vida activa. Desde cremosa leche hasta suaves quesos, tenemos todo lo que necesitas para complementar tu dieta de manera equilibrada y sabrosa.

Desde nuestros comienzos en Antioquia, hace más de dos décadas, Lácteos La Frescura ha sido un referente en el mercado de derivados lácteos. Nuestra pasión por la calidad y el compromiso con nuestros clientes nos ha permitido crecer y evolucionar a lo largo del tiempo. Cada día, seguimos innovando para brindarte productos que llenen tus días de sabor y bienestar.

Únete a nuestra comunidad y descubre cómo Lácteos La Frescura puede ser el aliado perfecto en tu búsqueda por un estilo de vida saludable. Síguenos para recibir contenido relevante sobre nutrición, recetas inspiradoras y promociones especiales. No esperes más! Acompáñanos en esta deliciosa travesía hacia el bienestar.

Te esperamos con los brazos abiertos en Lácteos, La Frescura, donde alimentamos tu bienestar día tras día!

Name: Boggy Meadow Farm
Description:
Boggy Meadow Farm is an artisanal cheese maker based in Walpole, New Hampshire. 

The land has been in our family since the 17th century, where it has been used as a farm for as long as anyone can remember. Twenty years ago, Powell Cabot started to make Alpine cheeses, notably our Baby Swiss and our Smoked Baby Swiss at the farm. In 2005 we introduced our first "cave-aged" cheese -- the Fiddlehead Tomme. This is a brushed rind cheese which is aged up to one year.

Today we have a small farm store which sells a variety of our cheese and other local products. These cheeses are available for purchase on our website as well, along with our handcrafted cheese boards and other gifts.

Name: Natures Adhaar
Description:
Welcome to Nature’s Adhaar 
Authentic A2 Gir Cow Ghee & Pure Forest Honey | Promoting Traditional Wisdom & Natural Wellness

At Nature’s Adhaar, we’re on a mission to bring back the purity and authenticity of traditional Indian nutrition. We manufacture and market A2 Gir Cow Ghee, prepared using the ancient Bilona method—a slow, hand-churned process that retains nutrients and enhances flavor.

Our Gir cows are raised in their natural environment, allowed to freely graze in forested areas, consuming wild herbs and walking several kilometers daily. This ethical, sustainable practice results in milk of exceptional quality, which forms the base of our premium ghee.

We also offer 100% pure forest honey, harvested from wild bee hives without any processing or adulteration—just the way nature intended.

Driven by quality, tradition, and sustainability, Nature’s Adhaar is more than a brand—it’s a commitment to health and heritage.

Let’s connect if you’re passionate about natural living, traditional food practices, or meaningful collaborations in the wellness and organic space.

Name: Milking Equipment Solutions
Description:
MES is an independent wholly owned family business based in Wales UK, with team members having over 35 years’ experience in the industry.

We are manufacturers, suppliers and global distributors of highly functional milking equipment. This high-quality milking equipment is based on tried and tested designs that provide reliable, durable and efficient animal friendly milking.

This Milking Equipment is designed with maximum repairability in mind and backed up with a huge spare parts inventory in place in the UK with a commitment to long term Milking Equipment spare parts supply.

We believe we are unique in offering several products in a “range of colours” to better suite customers own branding. In some cases, products and equipment can be modified to suite particular customer needs. This equipment is often utilized to provide a cost-effective milking machine upgrade to existing milking parlors to improve milking performance and reduce operator workload / milking time.

Our range of Milking Equipment fits most types of Milking Machines including Pipeline Milking, Jar Milking Parlors, Direct to line Milking Machines, Herringbone Milking Machines, Rotary Milking Machines and Milking Robots.

We are fundamentally “a supplier to the trade”. We purposely maintain a low brand profile subordinate to our customer’s own brand. Customers typically include a New Zealand dairy service company buying one milking pulsator in high volumes to a large Original Equipment Manufacturer (OEM) buying a single plastic moulded part or another OEM buying several products including Milking Clusters, Wash Jetters, Pulsators & Diaphragm Valves to integrate with their own branded milking machine offering.

We aim to provide a “One Stop Shop” for milking equipment. To aid this and complete our range we also supply high quality products from other prestigious manufactures.

Name: FM Alimentos
Description:
Como tudo começou...

A história da marca FM Alimentos é uma trajetória intrincada, enraizada na paixão familiar pela indústria de Laticínios. Tudo começou como uma modesta empresa de representação no dia 2 de fevereiro de 2010, com a fundação da FM Representação, uma empresa que carrega em si as raízes familiares ligadas ao setor.

Há mais de uma década, no coração do Vale do Jequitinhonha, nasceu uma empresa que viria a se tornar uma referência no setor de laticínios. Fundada por um visionário e amante da terra, Flávio Marcone Monteiro Filho. No entanto, o que a FM Alimentos tinha de modesto, ela compensava em paixão e dedicação de Flávio Marcone, ou simplesmente Flavinho, como é conhecido por todos na região, trouxe consigo uma experiência que já se acumulava ao longo de cinco anos, trabalhando incansavelmente no setor de laticínios. Sua jornada começou em 2004, quando ele veio morar com seu avô e ajudar na gestão da Amaralina, uma empresa fundada por seu avô materno no município de Guaratinga, povoado de São João do Sul, Bahia.

Flavinho sempre soube que a matéria-prima mais preciosa para a produção de laticínios excepcionais era o amor pelo que fazia. Ele acreditava que, ao transformar esse amor em alimentos, poderia inspirar a comunidade do Vale do Jequitinhonha e além. Com o tempo, a FM Alimentos floresceu, transformando-se em uma indústria que processa quase 3 milhões de litros de leite por ano. Seus queijos e produtos derivados do leite logo conquistaram o paladar de todos que tiveram o prazer de experimentá-los. As marcas Amaralina e Dugiba tornaram-se sinônimos de qualidade e sabor.

Mas a FM Alimentos não é apenas uma empresa; ela é uma força vital na comunidade. Com mais de 40 empregos diretos e 200 indiretos, a empresa apoia economicamente a região e fortalece a bacia leiteira de Santo Antônio do Jacinto, Minas Gerais, e também de Guaratinga, Bahia. A parceria com mais de 200 produtores locais é a espinha dorsal da empresa, sustentando a agricultura e

Name: OLD MACDONNELLS FARM
Description:
Old MacDonnell’s Farm creates original and real artisan food products - LIVE Natural yoghurt, soft cheese from cow's and goat's milk and Greek style hummus. We do not use ANY artificial additives - we never have and never will. We have been doing this the clean natural way since 1983, actually even before that, when our first goat Blossom arrived in the 70s.
When Brian and Wendy MacDonnell ( our parents) first promoted the idea of "Live" food, they were told it would never work. However, nowadays it is all about 'live' , 'probiotic' and 'beneficial' food.
 Old MacDonnells Farm was the first to offer this in Ireland way back in 1983. People want to protect their bodies, giving themselves the best chance health wise whilst having an enjoyable great tasting product.
 Like all good quality producers our production methods and procedures all conform to the strictest regulations and hygiene standards. There are labs and some 'Latiny' sounding words involved- but this is just to make sure standards are maintained through product testing and to ensure the live cultures we use are correctly named.
We don’t claim to be doctors or Latin word makers but science forms the base upon which we create. 
We are local, we are Irish and we provide local employment. We believe in good pure food and all food that leaves the gate from Old MacDonnell’s Farm, is still based on the founding principle of real food the real way - as Wendy and Brian MacDonnell originally set out to do.

Real, Irish, Natural - 'Goodness From Within'.

Name: Afi Projects
Description:
Afi Projects is a company specializing in agricultural projects focused on dairy farming. With a strong emphasis on cow farming, the company offers comprehensive solutions and services to promote the development and growth of dairy projects.
Afi Projects provides expert consultancy and planning services specifically tailored to dairy farming projects. Their knowledgeable team collaborates closely with clients to design and implement efficient and sustainable dairy operations. They offer expertise in areas such as barn design, feeding strategies, milking systems, breeding programs, and overall herd management.
One of the key focuses of Afi Projects is the advancement of dairy cattle. They utilize cutting-edge technologies and innovative practices to enhance the productivity and health of dairy cows. This includes implementing precision nutrition plans, genetic selection, reproductive management, and advanced monitoring systems to optimize milk production and animal well-being.
In addition, Afi Projects offers ongoing support and monitoring services to ensure the long-term success of dairy projects. They provide training programs for farmers and their staff, as well as continuous data analysis to identify areas for improvement and implement necessary adjustments to maximize efficiency and profitability.
By combining their expertise in dairy farming with a commitment to technological innovation and animal welfare, Afi Projects enables dairy farmers to achieve higher milk yields, improved herd health, and increased profitability. They play a vital role in the advancement and sustainability of the dairy industry.

Name: COLTELLERIA BHARBJT PREMANA
Description:
Il marchio BHARBJT contraddistingue da quarant'anni i ferri da taglio prodotti da una officina artigiana fondata da GIULIO GIANOLA nel 1962 a Premana, in Alta Valsassina - Valvarrone. 
In Valvarrone infatti fin dai tempi dei romani si cavava e si colava il ferro per produrre articoli da taglio ed attrezzi agricoli. 
La piccola azienda artigiana a conduzione familiare si è ritagliata una nicchia nel vasto mercato della coltelleria, specializzandosi nei coltelli da formaggio e negli articoli per casari, sfornando prodotti in acciaio forgiato e particolarmente curati nella linea e nel taglio. 
 L'evoluzione tecnologica ha contagiato anche la piccola azienda che, rilocalizzandosi sempre in paese, è ora ospitata in ampi spazi all'interno di un moderno edificio. 
Le tecnologie innovative hanno permesso all'azienda di ampliare la gamma dei prodotti e nel contempo di salvaguardare le caratteristiche di qualità di ciascuno dei ferri da taglio che caratterizzano il catalogo della linea BHARBJT.

Our 200 head Red Tractor farm assured milking herd are milked twice a day and the milk is transported less than a mile down the road to our SALSA accredited processing and bottling plant. There we process the milk which is then filled in either glass pint bottles or plastic bottles. 

We supply many local milkmen, who deliver our products to the community’s doorsteps. Along with milkmen, we also supply many business, cafes, restaurants and bakery’s. Whether this be glass pints or 1000 litre IBC, we can cater for all needs. 

We have a growing range of products available. From the classic whole, semi-skimmed and skimmed, double and whipping cream to our own range of orange juice bottling in glass pints. Name: Kabilai Farm
Description:
Bringing Back Trust in Every Drop of Milk. Naturally.

Once upon a time, fresh milk came from the cow in your backyard. Pure, warm, and untouched by chemicals or compromise. At Kabilai Farm, we bring that trust back into your home, one bottle at a time.

Founded in 2015 in Chennai, Kabilai isn’t just another milk brand. We’re a farm-first enterprise rooted in traditional practices and ethical care for our cows. These include indigenous breeds like Gir and Sahiwal, raised with compassion and without hormones or antibiotics.

Our promise is simple:
 Natural milk from happy cows
 No preservatives, no powders, no shortcuts
 Delivered within 8 hours of milking

We combine age-old dairy wisdom with modern cold-chain logistics to deliver farm-fresh cow milk and traditional dairy products straight to your doorstep. Every drop is 100% pure and traceable, just like it used to be.

Whether it’s milk, ghee, or butter, everything we produce is made the way nature intended slow, honest, and full of nourishment.

This isn’t just about milk.

It’s about trust, purity, and going back to the roots.

Name: Agricofarms
Description:
Whenever we talk of milk a dense pale liquid comes to mind with great taste and energy, but here in Pakistan it is the opposite. 80% of the milk sold in the market here is adulterated. Adulteration for us was just mixing of water with milk until we came to know about the production of fake milk using chemicals and toxic materials*. And such milk is openly sold at shops and door to door here.

 

We all know that milk is the primary and the most important source of nutrition especially for children in the early stages of growth. But the quality that our children get is unhygienic, which is leading our children to a number of conditions and diseases.

So, we came up with an idea to bring quality and healthy competition to the market. We are looking to start a dairy farm which will produce 100% organic milk. So, we need your help to come forward and fund our idea to bring health to the generations to come. Let’s join hands and be a part of this nutritional revolution.

 

*1 Hydrogen peroxide, Formalin, Penicillin, Hair removing powder, and Borax used to store milk in the absence of chillers and to avoid growth of pathogens

*2 Chilling agents like urea, ice, ammonium sulphate, etc.

*3 Preservatives like baking soda and caustic soda

*4 Injection of oxytocin ( a hormone that increases milk growth)

*5 Vegetable ghee, dried milk, water, carboxymethyl cellulose powder, sodium chloride, urea, detergents, starch, bleaching powder, essence, sweetening agents and rice powder are used to produce artificial milk.

Name: California Polytechnic Dairy Innovation Institute
Description:
About
The Cal Poly Dairy Products Technology Center, the predecessor of the Dairy Innovation Institute, was formed in 1986 to meet the growing needs of the dairy industry for relevant research, industry training, and skilled graduates. In 2016, this Center was combined with the dairy educational programs and commercial activities at Cal Poly to form the Dairy Innovation Institute. Our Institute is one of six dairy centers of excellence in the United States. Cal Poly has invested in, and firmly established a solid infrastructure of technical expertise, processing and lab research equipment, and industry partnerships to address current and future needs of the dairy industry. The Institute is not only recognized throughout California, but also nationally and internationally as a center of excellence for research, industry technology transfer, and education in dairy foods.

Programs
The Institute has active programs in research, outreach, and training. The research program currently emphasizes cheese science and technology, dairy foods quality, dairy ingredients technology, and novel process technologies. The outreach programs serve the dairy industry through short courses and symposia. The Institute provides a for trade groups, consumers, media, and individual companies. Institute graduates are known for a possessing leadership skills and practical knowledge in dairy science and technology, and are highly sought after by the dairy industry.

Name: MilkiVe DairyTech
Description:
Welcome to Milkive Dairytech! 

We are a cutting-edge dairy technology company revolutionizing the dairy industry through innovation, sustainability, and improved efficiency.

At Milkive Dairytech, we harness the power of advanced technology to optimize every aspect of the dairy production process. Our solutions integrate state-of-the-art software, IoT devices, and data analytics to help dairy farmers, processors, and stakeholders enhance productivity, streamline operations, and maximize profitability.

Our comprehensive suite of dairy technology solutions includes:

 Smart Farming: We provide intelligent farming systems that enable dairy farmers to monitor and manage their herds effectively. From automated feeding and milking to real-time health monitoring, our smart farming solutions empower farmers to make data-driven decisions, improve animal welfare, and increase yields.

 Data Analytics: We believe in the power of data. Our cutting-edge analytics platform collects and analyzes vast amounts of data to deliver actionable insights. By leveraging predictive analytics and machine learning algorithms, we help dairy businesses optimize milk production, improve supply chain management, and drive informed decision-making.

 Sustainable Practices: We are committed to promoting sustainability in the dairy industry. Our solutions focus on minimizing environmental impact, reducing waste, and enhancing resource efficiency. By implementing sustainable practices, we help dairy businesses build a greener future while ensuring long-term profitability.

 Data Security: We understand the importance of data security and privacy. Our robust systems and protocols ensure that your sensitive information is protected at all times. We prioritize data integrity, confidentiality, and compliance with industry standards, giving you peace of mind.

Name: Milkhaas
Description:
How it all started...
Living in Pakistan, it is common knowledge that the fresh milk delivered to our homes through milkmen has added water in it. However, in the past few years many reports have emerged that claim that there may be more dangerous elements in milk than just the water. Wanting to ensure that we & our families drank healthy & nutritious milk, we started investigating these claims. We got in touch with various private & public sector labs & took samples from different sources. To our surprise we found that 80% of the times other than added water, adulterants like soap, acid, starch, urea, table sugar and even chemicals like formalin were a common occurrence in not only the fresh milk but even the packaged milk. Most of the chemicals being used as adulterants were poisonous and could cause serious health hazards. The more we dug, the more of a mission it became for us to fight this corruption. As a result, we NUSTians left our corporate jobs & decided to launch a purity movement - namely Khaalis & Khaas Pvt Ltd. Milkhaas is the first product that we have launched under our brand name.
We believe that all of you are Khaas & hence deserve everything Khaalis & Khaas!

Name: Panda Ice Cream
Description:
**And the Story Began…**
In 1942, the late **Hajj Hamdi Salim Al-Salhani**, at just 25 years old, set out to pursue his dream of making ice cream and *Alaska* desserts. With great determination and creativity, he relied on electricity and mountain ice—transported by horses—to keep his products cool.

He went on to establish one of the first semi-automated factories in Damascus under the name **Asia**, located at the Salhiya Gate facing Diab’s building. Using innovative methods for his time, he created a small but advanced workshop dedicated to producing and selling ice cream. Ice was layered with salt and pressed into tanks to maintain the perfect cold conditions, keeping ice cream and Alaska fresh throughout the day.

By **1962**, the business expanded into **Bab Sharqi**, a neighborhood known for its warm-hearted people who embraced his products with love.

In **1974**, his sons carried on the legacy, growing the business and laying the foundation for the future. Finally, in **1999**, the family established **Panda Company for Ice Cream and Chocolate** in the Eastern Ghouta region (Mleiha), continuing a tradition of passion, quality, and innovation that spans generations.
