Name: KALANDARIDIS
Description:
It was 1950 when Staphanos Kalandaridis, a descerndant of an Asia Minor refugee family with a deep and long tradition in the dairy industry, decided to enter the sector of cheesemaking. Under harsh conditions and armed with an intense will to bring the family tradition to the fore, he started his business in a small factory in the village of Simantra, Chalkidiki, a region very well-known for its excellent milk quality.

This allowed the faster introduction of the raw materials, their immediate processing as well as the appropriate cooperation and the creation of strong bonds with stockbreeders with which the company has been and still is cooperating.

In the beginning the company devoted its production to feta. A few years later, the littlee building where the cheese factory used to operate could no longer cover the continually growing needs of the company. In 2007, Mr Athanasios Klandaridis transferred the compoany in the new facilities where it is still operating.

The new factory is equiped with the most sophisticated machines bought from other European countries and production takes place on a industrial level according to hygiene rules (IFS 6.1) and to the same traditional methods and recipes we have brought with us from Cappadocia. Thus, the new products acquire the same scope as the Kaseri cheese, reminding to those trying it of the traditional taste and original aroma.

Goat cheese and pepper cheese are distinguished by their unique taste; Kefalotyri for its saganaki version, yoghurt for its slight acidity and the Whey cheeses for being more fat-free but still equally tasty. It should also be mentioned that the characteristic taste of our products is also owed to the fact that we only use sheep and goat milk, as well as that our company has never used other preparations.

Name: Bamsrudlåven AS
Description:
Familiebedriften Bamsrudlåven ved Mysen i Østfold ble etablert av Eva og Rune Klufterud i 1997. De hadde et sterkt ønske om å leve av gårdens ressurser, men Bamsrud er en beskjeden gård i landbruksfylket Østfold med sine 100 mål og 5000 verpehøner. De måtte tenke alternativt for at begge skulle kunne livnære seg av gården. Det var etter en familietur til Euro Disney Paris og et besøk på Bestemor Ducks låverestaurant, innredet med gamle redskaper, at ideen om å bruke låven til festlige anledninger ble født. Låven på Bamsrud var full av slike gamle redskaper og gjenstander fra eldre generasjoner som kunne brukes. Sommeren 1997 ble det første arrangementet holdt på låven og Bamsrudlåven har siden blitt et godt etablert og populært selskapslokale i lokalmiljøet.

Ønsket om å skape et gårdsprodukt av gårdens råvarer var lenge en drøm, og en dag kom det en frier fra nabogården over åsen. På gården han kom fra drev de med melkeproduksjon og dermed ble ideen klekket! Vi spurte oss selv – hva er det beste man kan lage av melk og egg? Det måtte bli en italienskinspirert melkeis med mye egg. Vi gikk til innkjøp av en mindre iskremmaskin, prøvde oss fram for å finne vår egen oppskrift, testet smaker på besøkende gjester og fikk gode tilbakemeldinger.
Med kort avstand til Oslofjordområdet ligger Bamsrud Gård nært Norges tettest befolkede område. Med over 2 millioner menneske innenfor 1-2 timer med bil så vi potensialet for å kunne bringe et lokalt produkt på markedet. Når vi i tillegg oppdaget at det var få gårdsprodusenter av iskrem på markedet valgte vi å investere i et mikromeieri i underlåven på Bamsrud. Dessuten er Nordmenn på verdenstoppen når det gjelder iskrem forbruk og spiser i gjennomsnitt 10 L iskrem hver i året. Dersom vi tar en promille av dette markedet vil vi være fornøyd! I dag selger vi iskrem i dagligvare rundt Oslofjorden. Vi produserer ca 50 000L iskrem i året og står for egen distribusjon.

Our Products and Services
• Milk Testing Devices: Portable tools that test for parameters such as fat content, mastitis, and possible adulteration in under one minute.
• Digital Records Management: Automatic storage of milk quality data, enabling farmers to build trust with buyers and track production over time.
• Processing Support: Milk processors can quickly detect adulteration with water, starch, or preservatives before purchase, ensuring the quality of the milk they source.

Name: Agmax
Description:
At Agmax, milk quality isn’t just our business - it’s our obsession.

For over 35 years, we’ve backed hardworking Kiwi farmers with affordable, dependable, no-nonsense products that keep sheds clean, herds healthy, and milk quality high. From detergents and teatsprays to animal health and hygiene solutions, everything we do comes down to one thing: helping you maximise your milk quality, for less.

We’re proud to do things differently. And after 35 years, we reckon we must be doing something right. By delivering direct from factory to farm, we cut the fluff, keep costs down, and pass the value straight to you. Our gear’s made tough for NZ conditions, our advice is practical, and our support is real, because we know farming doesn’t stop when the weather turns or the payout drops.

Whether you’re chasing grades, managing mastitis, or getting your plant back in shape, Agmax has your back with the know-how, products, and resources to keep your operation running at its best.

Welcome to Agmax Country, where we back you to sort your own shed out.

Agmax
Maximise your milk quality.

Name: Hassan Co-operative Milk Producer's Society Union Ltd
Description:
Hassan co-operative milk producers’ society union ltd was established with an aim to support small and marginal farmers and agricultural labors through dairy development. Farmers were not sure of receiving a remurative price for their agricultural products so more and more farmers taken up diary as their main occupation rather then subsidiary occupation for their livelihood. The milk union is committed to accept all the milk offered by the milk producers in the milk shed area and hence there is a considerable increase in milk procurement during recent years. Hassan milk union believes that it is a social responsibility on part of the union to pay remunerative price to the farmers.

Kodagu district is well known for commercial crops like coffee, orange, cardamom etc. So in its area the Karnataka’s first commissioned dairy plant, Kudige dairy established in the year 1955. 

The Hassan Co-operative Milk Producer Society Union Ltd. (HCMPSUL) has came into existence in the year 1975. Now it is situated in the industrial estate beside the national highway (NH75), with the object to develop dairy development activities in the rural area.
In June 1974 an integrated project was launched in Karnataka to restructure and recognize the dairy Industry on the co-operative principles and to lay foundation for new direction in dairy development. World Bank aided dairy development project was initiated in 1975. Initially it covered 4 districts of Karnataka such as Mysore, Hassan, Tumkur, and Bangalore. 

Hassan Co-operative milk producer’s society union ltd. was set up to implement the project by Karnataka dairy development co-operation (KDDC) in 1975. It has registered on 30th March 1977 after formation of milk societies. The operational jurisdiction of union extended to 3 districts namely Hassan, Chikmagalore and Kodagu.
ISO 22000:2005 Quality management systems has been implemented.

Sardaformaggi è simbolo di una tradizione casearia secolare, portata avanti con amore e dedizione dalla famiglia Mura e Saba. La combinazione di tradizione, innovazione e tecnologia ha permesso a Sardaformaggi di crescere e fiorire, trasformandosi da piccolo caseificio locale a fiore all’occhiello dell’industria lattiero-casearia italiana nel comparto ovino, emblema del Made in Italy nelle tavole di tutto il mondo.

GARANTI DELLA SOSTENIBILITÀ
Ogni nostro formaggio racconta una storia di rispetto e responsabilità: rispetto per l’essenza viva del Territorio, per gli animali e ancor prima per i loro instancabili custodi, per l’ambiente incontaminato che ci ospita; responsabilità per la cura dei nostri prodotti unici e per i nostri clienti.

Le tecniche di produzione più antiche, tramandateci di padre in figlio, traggono nuova vita dal nostro lavoro quotidiano, improntato su metodi produttivi virtuosi in omaggio alla terra che amiamo e che proteggiamo con ogni nostra azione.


La cura per ogni nostro prodotto inizia con quella degli animali, allevati con dedizione e naturalezza nelle soleggiate e ventose campagne sarde e ancora prima con il rapporto di stretta fiducia con gli allevatori.

Il loro latte, sinonimo di freschezza e qualità, è il frutto di una natura ancora incontaminata, dove pascoli e tradizioni antiche danno vita a prodotti carichi di storia e sapore.

È cosi che le essenze naturali della materia prima fanno il proprio viaggio nel gusto, imprimendo nei nostri formaggi i loro profumi e i sapori inconfondibili.

CUSTODI DEL SAPORE, ESPLORATORI DEL GUSTO
Ripercorriamo le orme dei padri dirigendoci verso percorsi nuovi, assicurando affidabilità ed eccellenza ai prodotti che da oltre sessant’anni abbiamo il piacere di creare e declinare in innumerevoli varietà, esaltando il carattere della materia prima e la delicatezza dei sapori, per un pubblico sempre più vasto e appagato dalla genuinità dei nostri prodotti.

Name: ATLA
Description:
L'Association de la Transformation Laitière Française (ATLA) constitue une plateforme d'expertise et de dialogue au service de la compétitivité et de la durabilité de la filière laitière française.
ATLA est une structure mutualisée créée par les deux entités clés du secteur de la transformation laitière : la FNIL (Fédération Nationale de l'Industrie Laitière), représentant les laiteries privées, et La Coopération Laitière, qui fédère les acteurs coopératifs du secteur. Cette collaboration vise à renforcer la coordination et la défense des intérêts communs des entreprises laitières. 
L’association s’appuie sur une équipe d’experts spécialisés dans des domaines stratégiques tels que l’économie, les affaires sociales et la formation, les affaires techniques, réglementaires et scientifiques. Sa mission principale est de répondre aux besoins exprimés par les entreprises membres en leur offrant un accompagnement adapté et en fournissant des analyses et des solutions sur mesure. 
ATLA joue également un rôle essentiel dans l’établissement de positions communes pour l’ensemble de la filière laitière. Elle agit comme représentant des entreprises de la transformation laitière auprès des institutions publiques et privées, tant au niveau national, européen, qu’international afin de représenter et de défendre les intérêts de la transformation laitière face aux enjeux économiques, sociaux et réglementaires. 
  
Pour toute demande d’information, vous pouvez vous adresser à la FNIL  https://www.linkedin.com/company/fnil ou à La Coopération Laitière https://www.linkedin.com/company/la-cooperation-agricole-laitiere

Name: Caseificio Vincenzo Quaglia
Description:
Da quattro generazioni siamo sulla bocca di tutti, anche se avete sentito poco parlare di noi.

Da quattro generazioni siamo sulla bocca di tutti, anche se avete sentito poco parlare di noi.

La nostra storia inizia nel '900 con il fondatore Angelo Quaglia. Nel corso degli anni, abbiamo ampliato l'azienda e siamo diventati esperti nella produzione di Grana Padano DOP e di formaggi piemontesi come Bra, Toma Piemontese e Raschera.

La nostra ambizione per una totale eccellenza nei formaggi ci ha spinto ad essere tra i primi caseifici piemontesi ad aderire al prestigioso Consorzio di tutela del formaggio Grana Padano DOP. Nel corso degli anni, abbiamo anche contribuito alla creazione di altri importanti consorzi con l'obiettivo di preservare e promuovere le eccellenze casearie locali, garantendo autenticità e qualità ai consumatori: nel 1993 il Consorzio tutela formaggio Toma Piemontese, nel 1995 il Consorzio tutela formaggio Bra e nel 1997 il Consorzio tutela formaggio Raschera.

Da oltre 50 anni, ripetiamo giorno dopo giorno gesti semplici e rituali, abbinati alla tecnologia più avanzata, per offrire una qualità unica.

Sigue nuestro canal de LinkedIn y entérate de todas las novedades sobre Dairy Summit 2023, que se celebrará del 14 al 16 de noviembre en Aguascalientes, México.

Name: Colmena BV
Description:

Als toonaangevende specialist in de bio-zuivelsector leveren we enerzijds hoogwaardige grondstoffen (zoals melk en room) aan zorgvuldig geselecteerde partners die voor ons kwaliteitsvolle zuivelproducten produceren. Anderzijds kopen en stockeren wij strategisch een breed assortiment zuivelproducten (zoals boter, kaas, melk- en weipoeder etc) om optimaal in te spelen op de specifieke behoeften van onze industriële klanten. Zo garanderen we flexibiliteit, continuïteit en een uitmuntende service — elke dag opnieuw.
 Met onze diepgaande marktkennis en strategische inzichten in de evoluties binnen de (bio)zuivelmarkt, creëren we groeikansen voor onze partners en klanten. Dankzij onze proactieve benadering identificeren we nieuwe afzetkanalen en brengen we vraag en aanbod van zuivelproducten op een toekomstgerichte, duurzame manier samen. Colmena is de verbindende schakel voor wie wil groeien in een veranderende zuivelmarkt. Interesse in samenwerking of op zoek naar zuivelproducten? Neem contact met ons op en ontdek wat Colmena voor jou kan betekenen. Meer info op www.colmena.be.

Name: FormaggiCapoferri
Description:
Con Claudio e Andrea, avviati con successo all’attività da papà Aldo, siamo arrivati alla quarta generazione di esperti stagionatori di formaggi. Sempre in quel di Adrara San Martino, nostro paese di origine, e sempre nei locali che rimodernati negli anni hanno ospitato i formaggi più tradizionali e tipici delle nostre valli Bergamasche e un numero infinito di stracchini e formaggelle, i due prodotti caratteristici raccolti tra gli allevatori del Monte Bronzone e dei Colli di San Fermo.
Dalle stalle poste su quei pascoli, tradizionalmente, arriva tutta la produzione che provvediamo a stagionare e a distribuire tra le province di Bergamo e Brescia soprattutto nei negozi classici di alimentari, quei contenitori di tutto un po’ che nei paesi chiamano ancora “butiga”.
Certo non sono più i tempi in cui il nonno andava in giro con il carretto trainato dai cavalli o in cui il papà (tutti e due di nome Giovanni) andava fino nel novarese per caricare formaggi partendo nottetempo con il motocarro. Eppure, oltre allo strettissimo legame con il territorio e con le genti che vi lavorano, resta nel nostro lavoro molto della tradizione, che si trasforma in antico e quasi in mito…

Leur savoir-faire reconnu permet de valoriser le travail des producteurs de lait et des fruitières de village, avec lesquels des liens étroits de partenariat se sont construits de génération en génération. Les adhérents de la CEC ont comme objectifs communs le maintien de méthodes traditionnelles de production et la promotion de la richesse de goût incomparable de leurs fromages, propre à satisfaire chacun de leurs clients. Lu Gelato, sadece dondurma değil, aynı zamanda benzersiz bir tat deneyimi sunar. Müşteri memnuniyetini en üst düzeye çıkarmayı hedefleyen Lu Gelato, perakende müşterilerimizin damak zevkine hitap ederken, her biri titizlikle seçilen malzemelerle ve kendi reçetelerimizle ürettiğimiz zengin ve sofistike dondurma çeşitleriyle farklılaşır. Ürünlerimizi mevsimsel olarak yeniler, taze ve doğal içeriklerle en iyi lezzeti sunmayı amaçlarız. Modern ve yenilikçi tasarımlarımızla, hem bireysel müşterilerimize hem de kurumsal iş ortaklarımıza unutulmaz lezzetler sunmaktan gurur duyuyoruz.

Bunun yanı sıra, her gün mağazalarımızda ağırladığımız perakende müşterilerimize, onların memnuniyetini en ön planda tutarak, mevsimine uygun en taze ürünlerle hizmet vermekteyiz.


Kurumsal etkinlikler, özel organizasyonlar ve çalışan motivasyon programları için mükemmel bir çözüm sunan Lu Gelato, iş dünyasında da fark yaratıyor. Üstün kalite standartlarımız, esnek hizmet anlayışımız ve yaratıcı yaklaşımımızla, iş ortaklarımıza en yüksek değeri sunmayı taahhüt ediyoruz.

Name: DairyCare N Z
Description:
DairyCare NZ is an Auckland based company that has for many years been creating and selling healthcare products, mainly for New Zealand dairy cows. Our business helps dairy farmers to keep animals healthy, reduce antibiotic use and costs, and assist in increasing farm profitability.

Most of our products were originally based on the multiple curative claims and uses of the preserved inner flesh of the Aloe Vera plant.

Writings about what healing and health benefits Aloe Vera could achieve, used both as a tonic and applied topically to skin problems, have been around for more than 30 years and Aloe Vera based products have been strongly praised by veterinarians for use on animals in a number of countries.
About fifteen years ago DairyCare NZ got together with Dr. Peter Molan of Waikato University, who had researched the anti-bacterial and healing properties in what is now a distinctly New Zealand product – that of Manuka Honey.

Tests and now long term use by farmers, have shown that combining Aloe Vera and Manuka Honey in our patented Cow and Calf Formula, creates a uniquely New Zealand healthcare product, where each element contributes specific properties and additional benefits which are not available in either alone.

An added, but initially unexpected benefit, has been the finding by Formula using farmers that their cows actually produce considerably more milk, as well as being all round healthier.

They have fewer vet bills and their milk dockets show increased quantities of milk supplied. Thus, these farmers see a reduction in Farm Working Expenses and added profitability for the farm business. 

see our testimonials for more

Laboratory testing conducted through AgResearch has shown that Cow & Calf Formula stimulates immune cells and has antibacterial activity, without the potency or side effects of antibiotics. At a time when antibiotic resistance is becoming a worldwide concern, finding potential alternatives makes good sense.

Name: Kilimanjaro Dairy Co-operative Joint Enterprise Ltd
Description:
Kilimanjaro Dairy Cooperatives joint Enterprise Limited (JE) is the umbrella organization for Primary Dairy Cooperatives that was registered in July, 2017 under Cooperative Laws Act No. 6 of 2013. It was formed by fourteen (14) primary dairy cooperatives that are involved in milk sale as their major business in Hai District – Kilimanjaro Region.  These dairy cooperatives agreed together to form and implement a Joint Enterprise as an Umbrella body for the Dairy Cooperatives in Kilimanjaro Region. 
Later on, four (4) cooperatives from Siha District joined the Enterprise and the motive is to eventually increase outreach to the whole region of Kilimanjaro. Currently JE has 18 member Cooperatives, serving more than 3716 where by 961 are men and 2755 are women.

The essence of establishment of umbrella organization in Kilimanjaro was triggered by the intent to become more competitive in the formal dairy business which has become one of the main economic pillars for most rural households in Kilimanjaro Region after the decline of the coffee sector.
Objectives and Goals
To increase production, productivity and value addition of milk and other dairy products.
To promote efforts of small  and medium dairy farmers in Hai & Siha Districts and eventually other districts Kilimanjaro region to increase their investments in the dairy sector/industry.
To promote joint venture investments in dairy processing by members of the JE together with other social and impact investors
To initiate collective marketing of milk through milk collection centers under the primary dairy cooperatives whilst maintaining the hygienic and quality standards for milk products.
To undertake market research and marketing promotion of dairy products through various ICT tools
To provide extension services to cooperatives members and non-members in order to improve milk production/ productivity and animal husbandry
To increase the efficiency of its members in their participation in the dairy value.

Name: Serene Dairy Ltd.
Description:
Serenes piens is a locally owned dairy company in Latvia. It was founded and is based on our belief that the clean Latvian rural environment and efforts of our diligent professionals will come together to create top-quality dairy products that will bring success to the company on international markets.

We are convinced that the high-quality Latvian-made dairy products of Serenes piens, produced according to our unique and innovative recipes and using high-quality local milk, can satisfy the highest demands of markets throughout the world.

The main focus of the company is on creating niche products, and we are flexible in responding to changing market conditions.

We are a naturally growing company. We have responsible quality, financial and environmental policies, and we are developing gradually, thus building a solid position in the Latvian dairy-processing industry.

In everything we do, we strive to ensure the highest quality possible. Attention to detail and a flexibility to respond to changes swiftly and efficiency are factors that lie at the very heart of our decisions.

Serenes piens produces niche products for export – Akkawi-type white cheeses and heat-treated sour cream with a long expiry date, as well as sour cream, cottage cheese and various other types of dairy products. We adapt and develop our product range to match our customers’ needs.

Our main markets are Germany, Sweden, the United Kingdom, Saudi Arabia, the UAE, the United States of America, Israel, Greece, as well as other countries in the Far East, the Caucasus region and Asia. Our products are also available in Latvia.

Our raw materials come from local dairy cooperatives. We are capable to process up to 100 tons of milk per day.

Our dairy is a modern milk-processing factory; it meets the highest standards and requirements. It is located in tidy and clean environment.

Name: Sachimata Dairy
Description:
Sachimata Dairy farming solutions are organic, ISO certified, support climate-smart farming, and Indian cow-centric farming and provide 100% pure organic.
Fresh, natural & wholesome - Milk that speaks for itself. Still, there's a story to be told, and a pretty interesting one! How we came to be? During our childhood, Maa used to give us a glassful of milk right out of a clay pot as soon as we got back from school. This clay pot was kept in a Sachimata Dairy. Sachimata Dairy is a small pit dug on the ground lined with wooden pieces and cow dung cakes for heating the clay pot on a very low flame. After sitting for a couple of hours in the simmering flame of Sachimata Dairy, the milk gets an amazingly earthy aroma. Yes, we can still smell it! And this memory is what gave birth to our brand - Sachimata Dairy.

Met deze zuivel zorgen consument, supermarkt, zuivelverwerker en boer samen voor een rijke en levende weide, een weide vol vogelgeluiden.

Het Boerengilde bestaat inmiddels uit 12 boeren uit Noord Nederland, allen lid van coöperatie NoorderlandMelk. Als Gildeboeren zijn we enorm trots dat onze melk in een mooi en uniek zuivelproduct een eigen gezicht krijgt, Weide Weelde. En landelijk te vinden is bij supermarktketen Jumbo en binnenkort ook bij Poiesz, Deen en PLUS supermarkten.

Name: Nazar Al Noor International
Description:
At Nazar Al Noor International, purity is not just our promise — it’s our identity.
We are a Pakistan-based global dairy brand and export company dedicated to delivering authentic, high-quality dairy products to markets around the world. From pure Butter Ghee and natural Butter to premium Cheese and other dairy derivatives, our products represent the perfect harmony of traditional craftsmanship and modern production excellence.

Our story began with a mission to bring Pakistan’s rich dairy heritage to the global stage. Every product we create starts with fresh, high-quality milk sourced from grass-fed cattle. We use advanced processing systems to ensure maximum freshness, purity, and nutritional value, while maintaining the aroma and golden texture that define premium dairy.

We follow strict quality assurance and food safety standards, complying with ISO, GSO, and SFDA regulations to meet the requirements of international markets. Each batch undergoes multiple quality checks — from milk sourcing to packaging — ensuring that only the best reaches our customers.

Today, Nazar Al Noor International proudly serves markets across the GCC, Middle East, Africa, and beyond, with a growing presence among distributors, retailers, and private labels. Our airtight metal packaging preserves aroma and freshness, even in warm climates, giving our partners a product that is shelf-stable, aromatic, and naturally pure.

We believe in building long-term relationships founded on trust, transparency, and consistency. Our global partners rely on us for timely deliveries, competitive pricing, and products that reflect integrity and excellence.

More than a supplier, we are a brand of values — rooted in purity, guided by quality, and driven by innovation.
Our goal is to make Nazar Al Noor International a symbol of global dairy excellence, where every product embodies care, authenticity, and tradition.

To become one of the world’s most trusted dairy export brands, known for

Name: Sargra Srl - F.lli Mannoni
Description:
La Sargra s.r.l., con sede a Thiesi in provincia di Sassari, svolge la propria attività nel settore alimentare, comparto lattiero caseario, con la produzione, confezionamento e commercializzazione di prodotti derivati del latte. 
I soci e l’attuale legale rappresentante appartengono alla famiglia Mannoni di Thiesi che da quattro generazioni, sin dagli anni ’20 del secolo scorso, ha operato ed opera nel settore lattiero-caseario con la produzione di formaggi tipici della storia casearia sarda. 
Negli anni Novanta, pur conservando il marchio F.lli Mannoni, viene costituita la Sargra S.r.l. azienda casearia a conduzione familiare legata da tre generazioni alle produzioni più tipiche della storia casearia sarda con la quale la nuova generazione, ad oggi la quarta, affronta le sfide di un mercato sempre più competitivo e globalizzato, con l’obiettivo di sperimentare e introdurre sul mercato prodotti innovativi al di fuori del “tunnel” del Pecorino Romano DOP. 
La famiglia Mannoni di Thiesi, tramanda l’amore per il proprio lavoro di generazione in generazione, senza mai fossilizzarsi in tecniche obsolete per formaggi che rischiano inflazioni e perdite di valore, pur mantenendo una lavorazione altamente artigianale. 
La vocazione all’export di Sargra è manifestata dall’abilità al commercio internazionale già dalla prima generazione, che al pari delle successive ha prodotto formaggi tradizionali destinati ad un pubblico vario ed eterogeneo. 
L’attuale mercato di riferimento è costituito da consumatori propensi all’acquisto di prodotti tradizionali, tipici, in particolare realizzati con l’utilizzo di latte di qualità.

Name: VIGUSA
Description:
Bienvenidos a la calidad, experiencia, asistencia y constante colaboración con los clientes.

VIRGILIO GUAJARDO, S. A. DE C. V. (VIGUSA) es la empresa con la más larga trayectoria en el mercado mexicano. Este año 2014 VIGUSA cumple 50 años de atención y servicio a sus clientes.

En VIGUSA contamos con amplia experiencia en el mercado de industrialización de la leche y somos una empresa que no ahorramos esfuerzos en la carrera por seguir vigente para los nuevos clientes y sus expectativas.

VIGUSA no sólo ofrece equipos de vanguardia como sistemas UHT o Centrífugas auto limpiantes, sino que también se reconoce por su potencial capacidad de proyección especialmente en la elaboración en condiciones asépticas, ya sea de productos líquidos, como de aquellos con un elevado contenido sólido.

VIGUSA junto con sus colaboradores extranjeros especializados, proporciona asistencia y asesoramiento a sus clientes hasta alcanzar el desarrollo de sistemas completos de procesamiento en los que se utilizan fluidos de diferentes orígenes, empleando para ellos las tecnologías más modernas y sistemas de control de vanguardia, garantizando la máxima eficacia y flexibilidad de las líneas de producción para la alimentación.

Todos los equipos que VIGUSA ofrece, están proyectados para asegurar la óptima tecnología, facilidad de operación, mantenimiento y limpieza.

VIGUSA apoya a sus clientes con soporte técnico y tecnológico constante, gracias al empeño y atención que dedica al estudio y desarrollo de su proyecto.

Una característica importante de VIGUSA es el servicio que en todo momento otorga a sus clientes, lo cual ha demostrado durante toda su trayectoria.

Name: Clara Maria Cheese Farm & Clog Factory
Description:
At the Clara Maria Cheese Farm & Clog Factory the van Wees family carries on the traditional crafts of making world renowned Gouda cheese and old-fashioned wooden shoes. Set in the pastoral polder landscape just southwest of Amsterdam, this historic  150-year old farm creates an inviting atmosphere for visitors to step back into old-world charm. The original barn has been charmingly transformed into the wooden shoe factory and the cheese making room with a spacious, nostalgic gift shop where the walls are lined with Gouda cheeses of various flavors and sizes along with fanciful wooden shoes. Here visitors are delighted to find quaint Dutch souvenirs ranging from traditional Delft Blue ceramics to cheese plates, mugs, and kitchen linens featuring quintessential Dutch landscapes. 

We are pleased to offer tours of our cheese and clog making, along with cheese making workshops, educational & interactive school excursions, children's birthday parties, and corporate excursions.  We also have a web shop on our website, where our Gouda cheese and clogs can be ordered. For more information see our website and/or give us a call. We will be pleased to tell you all about what we have to offer and make reservations for a visit.

Name: Valgrana Spa
Description:
Nel cuore della provincia di Cuneo, terra di eccellenze enogastronomiche e forte spirito imprenditoriale, nasce e cresce Valgrana, azienda lattiero-casearia fondata nel 1991 da Franco Biraghi a Scarnafigi, vicino a Saluzzo. Dalla tradizione artigianale all’innovazione industriale, Valgrana è oggi un punto di riferimento per chi cerca formaggi autentici, genuini e legati al territorio.

L’azienda unisce la qualità delle materie prime piemontesi con la tecnologia moderna: impianti automatizzati all’avanguardia lavorano fianco a fianco con la maestria umana. Il risultato è una gamma di prodotti che raccontano una storia fatta di pascoli, aria pura, semplicità e passione familiare, oggi portata avanti dai figli Alberto e Andrea Biraghi.

Fiore all’occhiello è il Piemontino, stagionato oltre 15 mesi, realizzato con solo latte piemontese, privo di lisozima, dal gusto dolce e delicato. A completare l’offerta, i formaggi DOP come Bra, Raschera, Castelmagno e Toma Piemontese, insieme alla Toma del Marchesato, omaggio a Saluzzo e simbolo del profondo legame tra l’azienda e il territorio.

Oggi Valgrana è presente nella grande distribuzione e nella ristorazione, sia in Italia che all’estero (Francia, Belgio, Germania, Est Europa), portando nel mondo il gusto autentico e sostenibile della Granda.

Name: JUST MILK GHY
Description:
100 % FARM FRESH MILK & MILK PRODUCTS

THE Just Milk Ghy FARM-TO-HOME process ensures that quality milk reaches you at your doorstep in its purest and freshest form just as it is meant to be.

We in (Just Milk Ghy) unlike the big brands of milk we do not collect milk from multiple farmers where cattle feed, health and milking methods are not monitored. We have a single breed of cattle housed in select mid-size farms under 24 km from the city. The fodder and well-being of the cattle is monitored under supervision of trained veterinarians at all times. Just milk deals with only 100 Liters of milk per day. So, we make sure our consumer gets the best milk served in Guwahati.

India is changing rapidly in aspects of life. The effect of westernization is one of the main factors responsible for societal changes, mostly related to living standards, changing diets, and accordingly a change of product lines in the retailers. There are about 1.22 billion people in India, with around 120 million cows & buffalos. There is a long tradition of milk production and consumption (based on small units), cooperative structures, and a tradition of selling milk over the counter in the street, milk that consumed fresh.

70% of the population lives in the countryside with only 30% based in cities; however with the trend of urbanization this is changing.  

We keep a stringent check on the cattle quality and processes at the farm. Samples of our milk are regularly checked and passed by FSSAI accredited labs for any trace of chemicals, pesticides or toxins and also get checked daily basis.

Deliver Fresh Bottled milk packed from Farm arrives at our hub. Dispatches are done to your household within 3-4 hours

Name: Rawdelights Cart Private Limited
Description:
Rawdelights Cart Private Limited is a pioneering dairy company based in Kolar, Karnataka, dedicated to delivering fresh, unprocessed raw milk directly from local, pasture-raised cows to consumers' doorsteps. Founded on May 30, 2024,the company addresses common challenges in the Indian dairy industry, such as adulteration, nutrient loss due to processing, and environmental concerns associated with plastic packaging. 

Our Mission: To provide a healthier alternative to mass-produced, pasteurized milk by offering premium quality raw milk that retains its natural nutrients and flavor, while promoting sustainable and ethical farming practices.
Why Choose Rawdelights?

Premium Quality: Our milk comes from healthy, pasture-raised cows grazing on lush, chemical-free pastures, ensuring a rich and authentic taste.
Commitment to Purity: We maintain stringent hygiene and safety standards throughout the milking and packing processes, delivering milk free from antibiotics, hormones, and artificial additives.
Sustainability Focused: Dedicated to eco-friendly practices, we use 100% plastic-free, biodegradable packaging for all our products, reducing plastic waste and promoting environmental health.
Health Benefits: Packed with natural nutrients, enzymes, and beneficial bacteria, our raw milk supports a healthy gut, boosts the immune system, and provides essential vitamins and minerals in their most natural form.

Our Products:

Raw Milk: : Delivered before 7:30 AM, our milk reaches your doorstep ensuring peak freshness and nutritional benefits.
Low-Temperature Pasteurized Milk: For those seeking an extra layer of safety while preserving nutritional integrity, we offer low-temperature pasteurized milk. This method heats the milk to 145°F and holds it for 30 minutes, effectively eliminating harmful bacteria while retaining beneficial enzymes and nutrients.

Name: Briman Quesos de Campo
Description:
¿Sabes que cada año hay menos explotaciones ganaderas por falta de relevo generacional? Nuestra historia comienza hace cuatro generaciones en Albares, Guadalajara.
En Briman Quesos de Campo queremos continuar este legado elaborando queso de oveja y cabra con leche recién ordeñada de nuestro propio rebaño.
Buscamos la esencia del producto respetando su evolución natural donde los mohos y levaduras son los auténticos protagonistas y dan todo el sabor.
Nuestros procesos son artesanos con piezas hechas una a una y a mano. Las cortezas son naturales, libres de químicos y comestibles ofreciendo a cada queso su personalidad.
Tras muchos años de producir leche para comercializarla externamente, en esta nueva etapa apostamos por cerrar ciclos. Cuidamos de nuestro rebaño de cabras y ovejas para transformar su leche en queso.
Nuestras ovejas tienen una alimentación completamente natural y pasan rigurosos controles sanitarios.
Elaboramos quesos de alta calidad, saludables, respetuosos con el medio ambiente y con unas excelentes cualidades organolépticas de sabor, olor y textura, aspectos que nos diferencian de la producción industrial. Nos gusta pensar que son productos de alto valor añadido ya que territorio, ganado y gentes se funden en cada una de nuestras piezas.
Los quesos que elaboramos son:
- Queso madurado de leche cruda de oveja y cabra.
- Queso fresco de leche pasteurizada de oveja y cabra.
Nuestros valores son:
- Priorizamos los canales cortos de comercialización a través de la venta directa en nuestra quesería y en mercados de productores de la provincia.
- Apostamos por la sostenibilidad generando mediante renovables el 80% de la energía necesaria para la fabricación de los productos y reduciendo al mínimo el uso de plástico.
- Queremos un medio rural vivo, viviendo en el campo y del campo contribuyendo a la pervivencia del medio rural.
- Recuperamos alimentos y sabores tradicionales, rescatando el queso sin mas añadidos que cuajo, sal, fermentos y levaduras.

Welcome to our organic dairy farm, where we are committed to producing the highest quality dairy products while preserving the environment and supporting sustainable agriculture.

Our farm is nestled in the heart of Ushakoti forest range, surrounded by lush green forest and clean, fresh air. We believe that happy cows make the best milk, so we take great care in ensuring that our cows are healthy, well-fed, and comfortable.

We use only certified organic practices on our farm, which means that our cows graze on pesticide-free pastures and are never given antibiotics or synthetic hormones.

Name: Natyral Farming
Description:
Pasioni për një jetë aktive dhe të shëndetshme na nxiti të sillnim te konsumatori atë që i mungonte tregut shqiptar: produkte cilësore dhe 100% natyrale.

Kompania shqiptare “Natural Farming” (NAFA) është krijuar në vitin 2008 dhe që prej asaj kohe ruan me fanatizëm standardin e prodhimit, duke garantuar cilësi të lartë të produkteve që prodhohen me cikël të mbyllur brenda kompanisë. Ushqimi i bagëtive mblidhet në tokat tona, qumështi me vlera të larta ushqimore nga lopët e racave më të famshme në Europë si Bruna Alpina e Jersey dhe përpunimi i qumështit bëhet në mjediset prodhuese të NAFA-s me teknologjinë më bashkëkohore, nën brendin ekskluziv NATYRAL. Ferma organike “Natural Farming” është certifikuar me HACCAP dhe ISO 22000.

Produktet NATYRAL tërhoqën menjëherë vëmendje dhe fituan besimin e konsumatorëve, pasi janë produktet e vetme 100% të vërteta në treg. Lopët e përzgjedhura garantojnë cilësi të pakonkurrueshme të qumështit, kosit dhe bulmetit artizanal. Gjithçka që ofrohet në treg është natyrale dhe pa asnjë konservant, pa kimikate, qumësht pluhur, ngjyrues apo detergjentë.

Kosi NATYRAL është i vetmi në treg që shërben si farë për të zënë kos në shtëpitë tuaja. Nëse doni të vini re dallimin, provoni të zini kos me qumështin e markave të tjera.

Kimikatet dhe konservantët që përdoren te qumështi industrial shkaktojnë dëme të shumta në organizëm. Ato nxisin sëmundje të lëkurës, të syve, të mëlçisë, kancer, sëmundje kardiake, të zorrës së trashë, etj. Përkujdesja për shëndetin është motivimi i duhur për t’i qëndruar deri në fund idesë për produkte 100% natyrale dhe me vlera të larta ushqimore. Vërtet fëmijët tashmë po largohen gjithnjë e më shumë nga fshati dhe bagëtitë, por nuk ka pse t’iu mungojnë produktet cilësore dhe natyrale që të rriten të shëndetshëm.

ABS Global besitzt eigene Bullengestüte in Europa, Nordamerika, Lateinamerika und Indien, von denen aus Genetik an Kunden für die Milch- oder Fleischproduktion in Nordamerika, Südamerika, Asien und Europa verkauft wird. 

ABS Global ist ein Teil von Genus plc. Genus plc vertreibt mit Biotechnologie entwickelte Produkte an Milchviehhalter und Schweineproduzenten.
Genus ist ein Marktführer in Schweine-, Milichvieh- und Rindergenetik und hat eine einzigartige Ausrichtung als global agierendes Unternehmen mit spezialisierter Forschung und Entwicklung verschiedener Spezies, sowie einem international Distributionsnetzwerk. Name: Bio Farm Roberto Reggiani
Description:
A Working Family with a Dream.
Everything we know we have learnt from the generous soil of Castelfranco Emilia, where our family has been farming, breeding and producing milk for generations. In 2005, with our hands full of this land and a dream in our hearts, we decided to convert the production chain of our dairy to organic. It was a leap that required a good deal of courage and countless sacrifices. After so many years, we know we made the right choice. Our organic Parmigiano Reggiano is the gastronomic expression of an ancient and precious world. A unique cultural heritage.Zero KM Supply Chain: Our Commitment to a Healthier Future.
Every great story begins with a challenge. For the BIO Reggiani cheese factory, the challenge was to completely change every stage of the supply chain by applying organic production regulations. It was a complex and time-consuming process, but we never gave up. We continued to work head down with passion to achieve a dream that we knew was bigger than ourselves: to help create a healthier future for our children and the environment.  We do this by offering consumers a genuine product, made from the milk of happy cows and with a totally natural zero-mile supply chain.

Name: Yeeper Nutrition Technology (Qingdao) Group Co., Ltd
Shornali Farm House
Description:
Beef and milk cattle houses are specialized facilities designed to house and care for beef and dairy cattle. While the two types of cattle have similar housing needs, there are some differences in the design of their houses due to differences in their dietary and behavioral requirements.
A beef cattle house is designed primarily for raising cattle for meat production. The barn may be an open feedlot or individual stalls, depending on the preference of the farmer. The floor of the barn is typically made of concrete to allow for easy cleaning and sanitation. The barn may be equipped with feeding and watering systems, ventilation, and lighting to ensure the animals are healthy and comfortable. Beef cattle houses are typically designed to house large numbers of cattle, and the size of the facility may vary depending on the number of animals being raised.

A milk cattle house, on the other hand, is designed to house dairy cows that are raised for their milk. The barn is typically designed as a milking parlor, which is a specialized area where cows are milked. The milking parlor may be equipped with milking machines, feeding and watering systems, and ventilation to ensure the cows are comfortable during milking. The housing area for the cows may be individual stalls or an open area where they can roam freely. The floor of the barn is typically made of a soft material such as rubber to provide cushioning for the cows' hooves.

Both beef and milk cattle houses are designed to provide a safe and comfortable environment for the animals. Proper housing is essential for the health and well-being of the cattle, which is important for their productivity and profitability for the farmer.

Name: YO' DAIRY LIMITED
Description:
South Sudan has the highest livestock per capita in the world with approximately 12 million head of cattle. Estimates suggest that only 10% of milk capacity is currently being utilized, all sold through the informal market with the vast majority of milk sold in fermented form. Notwithstanding the enormous potential of the dairy sector, there are currently no commercial dairy companies collecting and packaging dairy products on a commercial level in South Sudan. YO’ Dairy has established South Sudan’s first commercial dairy company using a community inclusive model, to ensure cattle keeping communities directly benefit from all dairy sales. Initial sales will target Juba where there are an estimated 372,000 people (UNMISS).

YO’ Dairy collect milk using a community focused supply chain through establishing Milking Stations. This will allow cattle keeping communities to bring their cattle to a central location for milking which will be closely supervise by a trained Production Officer, ensuring strict quality control. The milk will then undergo processing and pasteurization to make the milk fit for consumer consumption and extend the shelf life. YO’ Dairy will produce and sell the following products:
1.	Fresh Milk
2.	Low fat milk
3.	Yoghurt 
4.	Butter

At Surenafoods, we take pride in sourcing the best quality ingredients and using traditional recipes to create our products. We believe that good food should be made with care and love, and that is why we are committed to providing our customers with the best possible products and services.

Name: Lácteos Hogar
Description:
Lácteos Hogar es una empresa orgullosamente cusqueña dedicada a la producción y distribución de productos lácteos de alta calidad, como yogurt, quesos, mantequilla y otros derivados lácteos. Nuestra pasión por la excelencia en la producción nos ha llevado a ser reconocidos en el mercado como proveedores confiables y comprometidos con la satisfacción de nuestros clientes.

En Lácteos Hogar, nos enfocamos en el uso de ingredientes frescos y naturales, seleccionando cuidadosamente a nuestros proveedores de leche para garantizar que nuestros productos cumplan con los más altos estándares de calidad y sabor. Nuestro compromiso con la innovación nos permite ofrecer una amplia gama de productos, satisfaciendo las necesidades y preferencias de nuestros consumidores.

Nos enorgullecemos de mantener prácticas éticas y sostenibles en nuestra cadena de producción. Trabajamos de la mano con nuestros proveedores y empleados, garantizando condiciones de trabajo justas y seguras, así como la promoción del desarrollo local y la protección del medio ambiente. Nuestra responsabilidad social nos impulsa a contribuir activamente al bienestar de nuestra comunidad, apoyando iniciativas de educación y desarrollo social.

El equipo de Lácteos Hogar está conformado por profesionales altamente capacitados y apasionados por su trabajo. Nuestro personal se esfuerza constantemente por mejorar nuestros procesos y productos, garantizando una experiencia de compra excepcional para nuestros clientes. Creemos firmemente en la importancia de mantener una comunicación abierta y honesta, tanto con nuestros clientes como con nuestros empleados, para asegurar una relación duradera y de confianza.

Al elegir Lácteos Hogar, nuestros clientes pueden estar seguros de que están disfrutando de productos lácteos de la más alta calidad, elaborados con amor y dedicación en cada paso del proceso. Nuestra misión es llevar el sabor y la frescura del campo cusqueño a la mesa de cada hogar.

Name: Farmer  Culture
Description:
Organic crop and livestock production focuses on building soil organic matter and biology to create a sustainable that allows farmers to manage their own particular situations dynamic environment for producing healthy food and feed.
Organic Dairy farming means raising animals on organic feed (i.e. pastures cultivated without the use of fertilizers or pesticides), have access to pasture or outside, along with the restricted usage of antibiotics and hormones. These consumers have come to rely on the assurances of certified organic dairy as a trusted source of unadulterated dairy products.
The organic movement is built on a fundamental principle: healthy soils lead to healthy crops, healthy animals, healthy humans, and a healthy planet.

AUSTRAMILK mong muốn mang đến những giá trị nhân văn cho cộng đồng, cụ thể bằng những sản phẩm với công thức được cải tiến vượt trội có giá trị cao về chất lượng, cùng với chính sách hỗ trợ giá bán luôn phù hợp và thường thấp hơn rất nhiều so với các sản phẩm cao cấp khác đang có trên thị trường.

SỨ MỆNH: AUSTRAMILK cam kết mang lại những sản phẩm được sản xuất 100% tại Úc với công thức phù hợp và mới nhất trên thị trường, đáp ứng đúng nhu cầu từ người tiêu dùng, dựa trên 3 tiêu chí chính là "TRUNG THỰC-NHÂN VĂN-CÔNG BẰNG".

TẦM NHÌN: Trong 10 năm tới, AUSTRAMILK sẽ là một trong những thương hiệu được nhiều người biết đến với những thành công dựa trên kết quả thực tế được khẳng định theo thời gian, từ những khách hàng đã tin tưởng chọn lựa AUSTRAMILK là thương hiệu đồng hành cùng mọi người cho kế hoạch chăm sóc và bảo vệ sức khỏe toàn diện.

Bên cạnh sản phẩm chủ lực dành cho bé Austramilk - Infant Formula, AUSTRAMILK tiếp tục phát triển các dòng sản phẩm cao cấp khác như: Austramilk – Mamy Pregnancy; Austramilk - Aged Care (Wonderful Life); Austramilk – Fit Body (Energy Booster); và Austramilk – Grow Up (Future Talent).

Name: Formaggio Gran Milano
Description:
La nostra è una azienda agricola della Bassa Lodigiana, la Giorgio Bozzini&Figli. I nostri valori e le nostre tradizioni sono molto ben radicati nella terra che lavoriamo. Da sempre allevatori e produttori di Latte. Siamo azienda Biologica Certificata dal 2016 e da allora produciamo solo Latte Biologico.
Questa è la classica "storia che si ripete", un ritorno alle origini di una famiglia che già nei primi del 900 trasformava il proprio latte in formaggio a pasta dura.
Gran Milano nasce come idea nel 2020, dopo la quotidiana convivialità del pranzo famigliare, dove si riunisce la famiglia, si pensa a trasformare una parte del nostro prodotto primario, il latte, in un formaggio a pasta dura.
Il nostro scopo: produrre un formaggio a pasta dura genuino, biologico e di prima qualità.  
Oltre al GRAN MILANO, nostro fiore all'occhiello di un percorso imprenditoriale, la Giorgio Bozzini&Figli, produce Latte Bio e Energia Green grazie a due impianti. Uno Fotovoltaico e l'altro di Biomasse.
Il Nostro obbiettivo è la totale sostenibilità interna e il modello di economia circolare.

Name: Thistle Hill Farm LLC
Description: Thistle Hill Farm Farmstead Tarentaise is an aged alpine raw milk organic cheese handmade by John and Janine Putnam on their family farm in North Pomfret, Vermont from the certified organic milk of their grass-fed Jersey cows. Tarentaise is a unique American farmstead cheese which reflects the Terroir of Pomfret Vermont and Thistle Hill Farm. The combination of climate, cows, feed and the traditional unmechanized methods of making Tarentaise result in a cheese which can be most closely associated with the Alpine cheeses of France. Unlike the winter cheeses, or those made solely on stored feed, Tarentaise can be compared to the summer cheeses of the Beaufort which are denser, softer and richer in their perfumes than their commercial brethren. Tarentaise is a dense, complex cheese, without the bite of sharpness which can hide the true nature of a cheese. It is smooth, has a subtle nut flavor and a huge presence, while not being too strong. Much of the taste is found in the finish.

Name: Mighty Smooth
Description:
Mighty Smooth is an innovative startup that revolutionizes children's nutrition by combining nutritious yogurt with augmented reality (AR) technology. Founded by David, a graduate student in Enology and Entrepreneurship from Fresno State, our mission is to address childhood obesity by making healthy eating fun and engaging. Our AR-enhanced yogurt offers a nutritious snack and an interactive learning experience. By scanning the yogurt packaging with a smartphone, children unlock educational games, stories, and animations that teach them about healthy eating in a memorable way. This approach helps instill lifelong healthy habits and makes learning about nutrition exciting.

We have secured $11,000 in funding through student pitch competitions and gained valuable mentorship from the California Milk Advisory Board and Fresno State's Innovation Center. Currently, we are in the pre-seed funding stage, finalizing our prototype and preparing for market launch. Our go-to-market strategy includes direct-to-consumer sales, retail partnerships with major supermarket chains and health food stores, and collaborations with schools to integrate our product into their health curriculums. Committed to sustainability, we use eco-friendly packaging to reduce plastic waste and plan to allocate 10% of our profits to fund WiFi access for underserved communities. Join us on this transformative journey to create a healthier, more educated future for our children.

Name: GRASBERGS
Description:
Grasbergu saimniecība ''Zilūži'' ir ģimenes vērtība un lolojums, kas darbojas jau otrajā paaudzē. Sākotnēji, 1994. gadā fermā bija 30 govis un saimniecība galvenokārt pienu saražoja savām vajadzībām, un laikam ejot sāka piedāvāt pienu arī piena pārstrādes cehiem. 2008. gadā ģimenes saimniecības grožus pārņemot vecākajam dēlam, ferma tiek palielināta līdz 200 govīm, turpinot piena piedāvāšanu piena pārstrādes uzņēmumiem. 

2013. gadā, sākoties piena krīzei, bija jādomā veidi kā saglabāt saimiecību un fermu, tā Grasbergu ģimene paši aizsāka piena pārstrādi, turklāt darot to pēc saviem kvalitātes standartiem, veidojot maksimāli dabīgus piena produktus.  

PROCESS
Dabīgums tiek ievērots sākot jau no pārtikas, kuru saņem gotiņas. Tiek veidots sabalansēts uzturs ar visām nepieciešamajām uzturvielām, lai arī piens būtu pēc iespējas dabīgāks.



Šobrīd ferma ir izaugusi līdz 400 govīm un Z/S ''Zilūži'' savā produkciju klāstā piedāvā - pienu, kefīru, jogurtu, saldo krējumu, krējumu, sviestu, biezpienu un saldējumu. 

Produktu radīšanā tiek izmantotas pašu saimnieku īpašās receptes.

Pienam ir ļoti īss veicamais ceļš līdz iepakojumam, jo pārstrāde un ražošana notiek turpat līdzās fermai. 



Lai saimnieku receptes tiktu īstenotas, produktu veidošana notiek bez procesa paātrināšanas. Tas notiek nesteidzīgi - dabīgā veidā. Turklāt produkti nesatur stabilizatorus. Šis ir iemesls, kas produktos saglabā aktīvās pienskābās baktērijas, kā arī kalciju, kas ir nepieciešams cilvēka organismam.

Name: Green Pastures Milk
Description:
The Green Pastures Story

The Davis, Whiting, Van Donk, McGlade and Boyd families from southwestern Victoria form The Green Pastures Movement. We’re multi-generation farming families with a firm commitment to creating healthy products, healthy farming practices and a healthy business that we can pass on to the next generation.

Our Vision

TO CREATE A WORLD-CLASS BRAND THAT WE CAN BE PROUD OF.

A brand that inspires, promotes and drives the agricultural industry so that it once again becomes economically viable, where farmers are fairly rewarded for their effort and our communities can thrive for the benefit of all Australians.

TO LEAD THE WORLD IN BETTER FARMING PRACTICES.

To inspire other farmers to join us, and farm in a way that significantly reduces our carbon footprint, our reliance on chemicals and our impact on the environment, creating better farms with healthier soil, animals and produce.

TO CREATE A LEGACY.

To give consumers cleaner, greener, better and healthier products.
To inspire our children and provide them with a future in farming.

A DAIRY FARMING REVOLUTION

In an industry known for pricing challenges and ownership by huge multinationals, we are aiming to revolutionise the way the Australian Dairy Industry, if not the world, produces milk. Over the past five years we’ve taken risks and challenged convention, all for a desire to provide Australian families with a healthier milk made on healthier farms.

REAL RESULTS

By incorporating the best of organic and conventional farming practices, our farms have reduced the use of synthetic fertiliser by up to 90%.

By taking matters into our own hands, we’ve launched our own brand of milk, distributed though Coles supermarkets. We’re also looking to ensure both environmental and financial sustainability for our own family farms while being a positive role model for the Australian dairy industry.

Name: Valley Oak Dairy Inc.

Our family came from Norway to the United States in 1878 to continue the long tradition of dairy farming. Five generations later we continue to farm the way our ancestors did, the natural way. 

Our dairy is located right in the heart of the San Joaquin Valley in Oakdale, California. Our dairy sits on 294 acres of organic certified land. 

Our cows enjoy lush organic pastures and are fed a balanced ration of GMO-free grains and hay. All of our crops are grown organically. We never use pesticides or herbicides on our crops. We never use any hormones or man made chemicals to increase milk production. Our cows grow the natural way.

Our family wants to give your family the very best milk and milk products at a price you can afford. Our mission is to provide better prices to healthy families.

Tangkor Yak Product Cooperative was formed in 2010 with the purpose of improving the livelihood of Tibetan nomads while sustaining the nomadic culture of Tibet. We add value to the traditional yak dairies by helping them to make their products available to the right markets. We produce and sell natural, additive free yogurt at regional markets, and we are currently working to expand our product line with the introduction of organic Tibetan yak cheese to the US market.

Why should you buy from Tibetan yak dairies?
1. It is delicious: produced by yaks that graze free range at 3,000 meters above sea level with the clean air and water of the Tibetan plateau.
2. It is good for you: rich nutrient content including twice the protein of cow’s milk.
3. It is unique: over 90% of the world’s yak population is on the Tibetan plateau.
4. It makes a difference: supporting yak dairies strengthens the traditions and improves the the quality of life of the Tibetan nomad population.

Name: Caseificio del Sole
Description:
Il Caseificio del Sole è una azienda artigianale a conduzione familiare che dal 2002 produce, per privati ed attività, prodotti caseari di ottima qualità con latte D.O.P 100% italiano ed esclusivamente dalle terre del Salento. La piccola impresa nasce dall’amore di un padre per le terre salentine, voglioso di trasformare la materia prima, in un prodotto che prediliga il gusto per il buon cibo che caratterizza questa terra. Lo stretto controllo di ogni processo, grazie alla conduzione artigianale del caseificio, permette di produrre mozzarelle, formaggi, yogurt e gelato di prima eccellenza. Il Caseificio del Sole da sempre ama fornire e propri clienti come ristoratori e pizzerie con prodotti ideali per ogni tipologia di cucina. 

Per la pizza, oltre alla classica mozzarella per pizza, il Caseificio del Sole offre uno dei propri fiori all'occhiello: La mozzarella fior di latte per un gusto ancor più intenso. Ricotte, formaggi freschi e stagionati sono ideali per la realizzazione di sfiziosi taglieri per ristoranti e pizzerie. 
Si effettuano consegne presso tutte le aziende nel Salento ogni giorno per portare sulle vostre tavole prodotti sempre freschi e genuini.  Si realizzano inoltre dimostrazioni con degustazioni per eventi e feste di ogni genere, dai matrimoni alle celebrazioni private. Porteremo le bontà del nostro caseificio al vostro evento con tutti i processi di realizzazione del prodotto, trasformando la vostra festa in un esperienza culinaria unica.

Name: Milkmachine
Description:
Welcome to MilkMachine, your trusted source for innovative milking solutions in India!

At MilkMachine, we are proud to be pioneers in the dairy industry, specializing in the direct-to-consumer (D2C) distribution of cutting-edge milking machines through our own website. We understand the vital role that small dairy farms play in India, particularly those managed single-handedly by women.

Our milking machines have been transformative, empowering women entrepreneurs in rural India to not only increase their livestock count and daily milk production capacity but also elevate their overall business performance and household income. We take immense pride in being part of their journey towards self-sufficiency and empowerment.

The heartwarming feedback and blessings we've received from these remarkable women serve as a constant source of inspiration for us. Their success stories drive our commitment to scaling our impact and making a meaningful difference in the lives of countless more dairy farmers across the nation.

Join us on our mission to revolutionize the dairy industry and empower women in agriculture.

Follow our page for the latest updates, insights, and stories of empowerment. Together, we can create a brighter and more prosperous future for dairy farming in India.

Name: Mufaro's Family Foods
Description:
Established in a Kent kitchen in 2003, Mufaro's Family Foods was birthed from a quirky experiment in which Albert Mufaro and his wife Majory intended to replicate, for the kids, the traditional African yoghurts they themselves had grown up on. 

From thereon what they'd produced continued to evolve with knowledge and experience until they conceived MUFARO'S CULTURED MILK.  To this very day Mufaro's Family Foods is still a family business run by family in which the core values remain entrenched in honesty and simplicity.

As our  cultured milk products grew, so did our desire to expand and it was not long before we had moved to Erith, where we are now based. This gave us the opportunity to provide our natural and healthy product to customers from across the whole of the UK. Now our Yoghurts are BRC accredited for the safety of our customers and our 'Best before' dates are laser printed on to buckets to ensure food safety guidelines are adhered by vendors.

We have also developed a dairy free variation of our yoghurt, based on Finger Millet, a super grain boasting a wealth of natural health benefits such as the appetite suppressing nature of Tryptophan. Our dairy free variety maintains the prebiotic and probiotic characteristics of Mufaro's Cultured Milk, making it a great way of tilting the balance in favour of good bacteria in your digestive tract. This will ensure that your body is greater prepared to fight infections caused by salmonella and E. coli, as well as disorders like bowel cancer.
